name: Aberrant Agreement
desc: This long scroll bears strange runes and seals of eldritch powers. When you use an action to present this scroll to an aberration whose Challenge Rating is equal to or less than your level, the binding powers of the scroll compel it to listen to you. You can then attempt to strike a bargain with the aberration, negotiating a service from it in exchange for a reward. The aberration is under no compulsion to strike the bargain; it is compelled only to parley long enough for you to present a bargain and allow for negotiations. If you or your aliados attack or otherwise attempt to harm the aberration, the truce is broken, and the criatura can act normally. If the aberration refuses the offer, it is free to take any actions it wishes. Should you and the aberration alcance an agreement that is satisfactory to both parties, you must sign the agreement and have the aberration do likewise (or make its mark, if it has no form of writing). The writing on the scroll changes to reflect the terms of the agreement struck. The magic of the charter holds both you and the aberration to the agreement until its service is rendered and the reward paid, at which point the scroll blackens and crumbles to dust. An aberration's thinking is alien to most humanoids, and vaguely worded contracts may result in unintended consequences, as the criatura may have different thoughts as to how to best meet the goal. If either party breaks the bargain, that criatura immediately recibe 10d6 daño psíquico, and the charter is destroyed, ending the contract.

name: Absurdist Web
desc:
When you try to unfold this bed sheet-sized knot of spidersilk, you occasionally unearth a long-dead sparrow or a cricket that waves thanks before hopping away. It’s probably easier just to wad it up and stick it in your pocket. The interior of this ball of web is an extradimensional space equivalent to a 10-pie cube. To place things into this space you must push it into the web, so it cannot hold liquids or gasses. You can only retrieve items you know are inside, making it excellent for smuggling. Retrieving items recibe at least 2 actions (or more for larger objects) and things like loose coins tend to get lost inside it. No matter how full, the web never weighs more than a half pound.

A criatura attempting to divine the contents of the web via magic must first succeed on a CD 28 Arcanos check which can only be attempted once between _long rests_ .

Any criatura placed into the extradimensional space is placed into stasis for up to a month, needing no food or water but still healing at a natural pace. Dead criaturas in the web do not decay. If a living criatura is not freed within a month, it is shunted from the web and appears beneath a large spider web 1d6 millas away in the real world.

name: Accursed Idol
desc:
Carved from a curious black stone of unknown origin, this small totem is fashioned in the macabre likeness of a Great Old One. While attuned to the idol and holding it, you gain the following benefits:
- You can speak, read, and write Habla Profunda.
- You can use an action to speak the idol's command word and send otherworldly spirits to whisper in the minds of up to three criaturas you can see within 30 pies of you. Each objetivo debe realizar a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Carisma. en una salvación fallida, a criatura recibe 2d6 daño psíquico and is asustado of you for 1 minuto. en una salvación exitosa, a criatura recibe half as much damage and isn't asustado. If a objetivo dies from this damage or while asustado, the otherworldly spirits within the idol are temporarily sated, and you don't suffer the effects of the idol's Otherworldly Whispers property at the next dusk. Once used, this property of the idol can't be used again until the next dusk.
- You can use an action to cast the augury spell from the idol. The idol can't be used this way again until the next dusk.

name: Adamantine Armor
desc: Esta armadura está reforzada con adamantino, una de las sustancias más duras que existen. Mientras la llevas puesta, cualquier golpe crítico que recibas se convierte en un golpe normal.

name: Aegis of the Eternal Moon
desc:
The circular surface of this gleaming silver shield is marked by dents and craters making it reminiscent of a full moon. While holding this medium shield, you gain a mágico +1 bonus to AC. This item has 3 charges and regains 1 charge each night at moonrise. 

While this shield is equipped, you may expend 1 charge as an action to cast _moonbeam_ , with the following exceptions: the spell manifests as a line of moonlight 10 pies long and 5 pies wide emanating from the shield, and you may move the beam by moving the shield (no action required). When the first charge is expended, the shield fades to the shape of a gibbous moon and loses its mágico +1 bonus to AC. When the second charge is expended, the shield fades to the shape of a crescent moon and becomes a ligera shield, granting only a +1 bonus to AC. When the final charge is expended, the shield fades away completely, leaving behind its polished silver handle. When the shield regains charges, it reforms according to how many charges it has remaining.

name: Aerodite the Autumn Queen’s True Name
desc:
This slip of parchment contains the magically bound name “Airy Nightengale” surrounded by shifting autumn leaves. While you are attuned to it, you can use a acción adicional to invoke the name on this parchment to summon a vision of a powerful _archfey_  beside you for 1 minuto. Airy acts catty and dismissive but mellows with flattery. Once a vision is summoned in this way, it cannot be summoned again for the next 24 horas.

You can use an action to verbally direct the vision to do any of the following: 

* Perform minor acts of Naturaleza magic (as _druidcraft_ ).
* Whisper charming words to a objetivo criatura within 5 pies. criaturas whispered to in this way debe realizar a CD 13 Carisma _tirada de salvación_ , en una salvación fallida objetivos become _charmed_  by the vision until the end of their next turn, treating the vision and you as friendly aliados.
* Bestow a mágico fly Velocidad of 10 pies on a criatura within 5 pies for as long as the vision remains.

Alternatively, as an action while the vision is summoned you can agree to revoke your claim on Aerodite in exchange for her direct assistance. When you do so the parchment disappears in a flurry of autumn leaves, and for the next minuto the figment transforms into an alluring vision of the Dreaming at a point you choose within 60 pies (as __hypnotic pattern_ , save CD 13). Once you have revoked your claim in this way, you can never invoke Aerodite’s true name again.

name: Agile Armor
desc: This magically enhanced armor is less bulky than its no mágico version. While wearing a suit of medium agile armor, the maximum Destreza modifier you can add to determine your Clase de Armadura is 3, instead of 2. While wearing a suit of pesada agile armor, the maximum Destreza modifier you can add to determine your Clase de Armadura is 1, instead of 0.

name: Air Charm
desc:
While wearing this charm you can hold your breath for an additional 10 minutos, or you can break the charm to release its power, destroying it to activate one of the following effects.

* **Flight**: Cast __fly ._
* **Float**: Cast _feather fall_ .
* **Whirl**: Cast __whirlwind kick_  (+7 ataque de conjuro bonus, CD de salvación del conjuro 15).

**Curse**. Releasing the charm’s power attracts the attention of a _djinni_  who seeks you out to request a favor.

name: Air Seed
desc: This plum-sized, nearly spherical sandstone is imbued with a touch of air magic. Typically, 1d4 + 4 air seeds are found together. You can use an action to throw the seed up to 60 pies. The seed explodes on impact and is destroyed. When it explodes, the seed releases a burst of fresh, breathable air, and it disperses gas or vapor and extinguishes candles, torches, and similar unprotected flames within a 10-pie radius of where the seed landed. Each suffocating or choking criatura within a 10-pie radius of where the seed landed gains a lung full of air, allowing the criatura to hold its breath for 5 minutos. If you break the seed while underwater, cada criatura within a 10-pie radius of where you broke the seed gains a lung full of air, allowing the criatura to hold its breath for 5 minutos.

name: Akaasit Blade
desc: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. This dagger is crafted from the arm blade of a defeated Akaasit (see Tome of Beasts 2). You can use an action to activate a small measure of prescience within the dagger for 1 minuto. If you are attacked by a criatura you can see within 5 pies of you while this effect is active, you can use your reacción to make one attack with this dagger against the attacker. If your attack hits, the dagger loses its prescience, and its prescience can't be activated again until the next dawn.

name: Alabaster Salt Shaker
desc: This shaker is carved from purest alabaster in the shape of an owl. It is 7 inches tall and contains enough salt to flavor 25 meals. When the shaker is empty, it can't be refilled, and it becomes no mágico. When you or another criatura eat a meal salted by this shaker, you don't need to eat again for 48 horas, at which point the magic wears off. If you don't eat within 1 hora of the magic wearing off, you gain one level of agotamiento. You continue gaining one level of agotamiento for each additional hora you don't eat.

name: Alchemical Lantern
desc: This hooded lantern has 3 charges and regains all expended charges daily at dusk. While the lantern is lit, you can use an action to expend 1 charge to cause the lantern to spit gooey alchemical fuego at a criatura you can see in the lantern's bright ligera. The lantern makes its tirada de ataque with a +5 bonus. On a hit, the objetivo recibe 2d6 daño de fuego, and it ignites. Until a criatura recibe an action to douse the fuego, the objetivo recibe 1d6 daño de fuego at the start of each of its turns.

name: Alembic of Unmaking
desc: This large alembic is a glass retort supported by a bronze tripod and connected to a smaller glass container by a bronze spout. The bronze fittings are etched with arcane symbols, and the glass parts of the alembic sometimes emit bright, amethyst sparks. If a magic item is placed inside the alembic and a fuego lit beneath it, the magic item dissolves and its mágico energy drains into the smaller container. Artifacts, legendary magic items, and any magic item that won't physically fit into the alembic (anything larger than a shortsword or a cloak) can't be dissolved in this way. Full dissolution and distillation of an item's mágico energy recibe 1 hora, but 10 minutos is enough time to render most items no mágico. If an item spends a full hora dissolving in the alembic, its mágico energy coalesces in the smaller container as a lump of material resembling gray-purple, stiff dough known as arcanoplasm. This material is safe to handle and easy to incorporate into new magic items. Using arcanoplasm while creating a magic item reduces the cost of the new item by 10 percent per degree of rarity of the magic item that was distilled into the arcanoplasm. An alembic of unmaking can distill or disenchant one item per 24 horas.

name: Alliance Rings
desc:
These matched glass rings shimmer from a stitch of eldritch energy that runs through their center. They contain some residual memories of the cleric and herald who originally wore the bands, relying on the enchanted jewelry as much as each other through many adventures together. When you and another criatura attune to the rings, you each gain the ability to sense your approximate distance from one another. You also receive a slight jolt when the other ring wearer drops to 0 puntos de golpe.

When the other ring wearer recibe damage, you can use your reacción to concentrate and rotate the ring. When you do so, both you and the other ring wearer receive an image of an elderly herald giving up her life to shield her cleric companion from enemigo arrows. The effect, spell, or weapon’s damage dice are rolled twice and use the lower result. After being used in this way, the energy in each ring disappears and they both become mundane items.

name: Almanac of Common Wisdom
desc: The dog-eared pages of this thick, weathered tome contain useful advice, facts, and statistical information on a wide range of topics. The topics change to match information relevant to the area where it is currently located. If you spend a descanso corto consulting the almanac, you treat your competencia bonus as 1 higher when making any Inteligencia, Sabiduría, or Carisma skill checks to discover, recall, or cite information about local events, locations, or criaturas for the next 4 horas. For example, this almanac's magic can help you recall and find the location of a city's oldest tavern, but its magic won't help you notice a thug hiding in an alley near the tavern.

name: Amber Wings
desc: This pair of amber dragonfly wings holds the memories of a native of the Dreaming who befriended several insect companions. You can speak with insects when carrying the wings in your hand or wearing them as a piece of jewelry. When you speak the name of the fey criatura whose memories lie within the wings, you briefly experience the sensation of volando atop a Gigante dragonfly. For 1 minuto after speaking the name, you can glide up to 60 pies per ronda. This functions as though you have a fly Velocidad of 60 pies, but you can only travel horizontally or on a downward slant. The wings crumble to dust after the gliding effect ends.

name: Ammunition +1
desc: This munición comes in bundles of 10\. When used to make a _ranged weapon attack_ , a piece of this munición grants a bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it. After hitting a objetivo, a piece of munición loses its mágico properties.

name: Ammunition +2
desc: This munición comes in bundles of 10\. When used to make a _ranged weapon attack_ , a piece of this munición grants a bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it. After hitting a objetivo, a piece of munición loses its mágico properties.

name: Ammunition +3
desc: This munición comes in bundles of 10\. When used to make a _ranged weapon attack_ , a piece of this munición grants a bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it. After hitting a objetivo, a piece of munición loses its mágico properties.

name: Amulet of Health
desc: Tu puntuación de Constitución es 19 mientras llevas puesto este amuleto. No tiene ningún efecto sobre ti si tu Constitución ya es 19 o superior.

name: Amulet of Health
desc: Wearing this amulet increases your Constitución score to 19\. It has no effect if your Constitución is equal to or greater than 19.

name: Amulet of Memory
desc: Made of gold or silver, this spherical locket is engraved with two cresting waves facing away from each other while bound in a twisted loop. It preserves a memory to be reexperienced later. While wearing this amulet, you can use an action to speak the command word and open the locket. The open locket stores what you see and experience for up to 10 minutos. You can shut the locket at any time (no action required), stopping the memory recording. Opening the locket with the command word again overwrites the contained memory. While a memory is stored, you or another criatura can touch the locket to experience the memory from the beginning. Breaking contact ends the memory early. In addition, you have ventaja on any skill check related to details or knowledge of the stored memory. If you die while wearing the amulet, it preserves you. Your body is affected by the gentle repose spell until the amulet is removed or until you are restored to life. In addition, at the moment of your death, you can store any memory into the amulet. A criatura touching the amulet perceives the memory stored there even after your death. Attuning to an amulet of memory removes any prior memories stored in it.

name: Amulet of Proof against Detection and Location
desc: Mientras llevas puesto este amuleto, estás oculto a la magia de adivinación. No puedes ser objetivo de dicha magia ni ser percibido a través de sensores de escrutinio mágico.

name: Amulet of Proof against Detection and Location
desc: You are hidden from divination magic while wearing this amulet, including any form of _scrying_  (mágico scrying sensors are unable to perceive you).

name: Amulet of Sustaining Health
desc: While wearing this amulet, you need to eat and drink only once every 7 days. In addition, you have ventaja on tirada de salvacións against effects that would cause you to suffer a level of agotamiento.

name: Amulet of the Oracle
desc: When you finish a descanso largo while wearing this amulet, you can choose one truco from the cleric spell list. You can cast that truco from the amulet at will, using Sabiduría as your spellcasting ability for it.

name: Amulet of the Planes
desc: Mientras llevas puesto este amuleto, puedes usar una acción para nombrar un lugar que te resulte familiar en otro plano de existencia. A continuación, realiza una prueba de Inteligencia CD 15. Si la prueba tiene éxito, lanzas el conjuro _plane shift_. Si fallas, tú y cada criatura y objeto que se encuentren a 4,5 m o menos de ti viajáis a un destino aleatorio. Tira 1d100. Con un resultado de 1-60, viajáis a una ubicación aleatoria del plano que nombraste. Con un resultado de 61-100, viajáis a un plano de existencia determinado aleatoriamente.

name: Amulet of the Planes
desc: While wearing this amulet, you can use an action and name a location that you are familiar with on another plane of existence, making a CD 15 Inteligencia check. en un éxito you cast the _plane shift_  spell, but en un fallo you and every criatura and object within a 15-pie radius are transported to a random location determined with a d100 roll. On a 1–60 you transport to a random location on the plane you named, or on a 61–100 you are transported to a randomly determined plane of existence.

name: Amulet of the Pleasing Bouquet
desc:
Various schools of magic employ all manner of particularly foul-smelling and noxious substances, nauseating some would-be wizards to the point of illness. These enchanted amulets were created to guard against the various stenches found in their masters’ laboratories and supply closets. Enterprising apprentices quickly saw the value of peddling the enchanted trinkets to the affluent wishing to avoid the stench of the streets however, and now they are commonplace among nobility. 

The most typical of these amulets look like pomanders though dozens of different styles, varieties, and scents are available for sale. While wearing it, you can spend an action and expend 1 charge from the amulet to fill your nostrils with pleasing scents for 1 hora. These scents are chosen by the amulet’s creator at the time of its crafting. 

In more extreme circumstances like a __stinking cloud_  spell or _troglodyte’s_  stench, you can expend 3 charges as a reacción to have _advantage_  on _tirada de salvacións_  against the dangerous smell until the end of your next turn. 

The amulet has 3 charges and regains 1d3 charges each dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20\. On a or 5 or less, the amulet loses its magic and becomes a mundane item.

name: Amulet of Whirlwinds
desc: This amulet is strung on a brass necklace and holds a piece of djinn magic. The amulet has 9 charges. You can use an action to expend 1 of its charges to create a whirlwind on a point you can see within 60 pies of you. The whirlwind is a 5-pie-radius, 30-pie-tall cylinder of swirling air that lasts as long as you maintain Concentración (as if concentrating on a spell). Any criatura other than you that enters the whirlwind debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Fuerza or be apresado by it. You can move the whirlwind up to 60 pies as an action, and criaturas apresado by the whirlwind move with it. The whirlwind ends if you lose sight of it. A criatura within 5 pies of the whirlwind can pull a criatura out of it by taking an action to make a CD 15 Fuerza check and succeeding. A apresado criatura can try to escape by taking an action to make a CD 15 Fuerza check. en un éxito, the criatura escapes and enters a space of its choice within 5 pies of the whirlwind. When all of the amulet's charges are expended, the amulet becomes a no mágico piece of jewelry worth 50 gp.

name: Anchor of Striking
desc: This small rusty iron anchor feels sturdy in spite of its appearance. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic war pick. When you roll a 20 on an tirada de ataque made with this weapon, the objetivo is wrapped in ethereal golden chains that extend from the bottom of the anchor. As an action, the chained objetivo can make a CD 15 Fuerza or Destreza check, freeing itself from the chains en un éxito. Alternatively, you can use a acción adicional to command the chains to disappear, freeing the objetivo. The chains are constructed of mágico fuerza and can't be damaged, though they can be destroyed with a disintegrate spell. While the objetivo is wrapped in these chains, you and the objetivo can't move further than 50 pies from each other.

name: Ancient Broom
desc:
Subtle power is contained within this ancient oak staff and its coarse bristles, and though it appears as if any amount of rough handling will break this broom only the most potent blades have any chance of harming it. The broom’s handle is said to have come from the first tree and the bristles stolen from a god, but its beginnings are far more humble—just a simple mundane object that accrued its first enchantment by chance after years of exposure to countless rituals. Since then its attraction to magic has grown, and so too has its admiration for the arcane. The broom has been in the hands of countless spellcasters, many of them unlikely candidates to pursue magic, though it cannot remember their names. Only the feats of magic they achieved are of any worth to the broom.

_**Sentience.**_ The broom is a sentient construct with Inteligencia 19, Sabiduría 15, and Carisma 17\. It has hearing and visión en la oscuridad to a range of 120 pies. The broom communicates with you telepathically and can speak and understand Común, Dracónico, Enano, Élfico, Silvano, and Infracomún. 

_**Personality.**_ The broom’s purpose is to encourage the use of magic—the more powerful the better—regardless of any consequences. It is unconcerned with the goings on of mortals or anyone not engaged with magic, and it demands a certain amount of respect and appreciation for its service.

**_Demands._** If you are unable to cast spells and attune to the broom, it relentlessly argues for you to pursue mágico training and if none is achieved within a month it goes dormant in your hands (becoming a very durable stick). In addition, the broom is a repository of magic over the ages and it strongly encourages you to seek out monsters to harvest powerful reagents, explore cursed ruins in search of forbidden knowledge, and undertake precarious rituals.

You have a +3 bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  made with the magic broom, and when the broom causa damage with a critical hit the objetivo is _blinded_  until the end of your next turn.

**Legends and Lore** Success on an Arcanos or Historia check reveals the following:

**CD 15** This is the _Ancient Broom_, used by spellcasters since the dawn of time.

**CD 18** The broom is able to animate itself and attack your enemigos, it has the power to open locks and break shackles, and it enables you to move without leaving a trace of your passing.

**CD 21** Many of those who have wielded the _Ancient Broom_ came from humble and unlikely backgrounds.

**Artifact Properties**

The _Ancient Broom_ has one lesser artifact detriment and one greater artifact detriment.

**Magic**

While you are attuned to the broom you gain an expertise die on checks made with Arcanos, and while holding it you can innately cast __pass without trace_  (no _concentration_  required) and _nondetection_ at will.

In addition, you can use a acción adicional to knock the broom against a lock, door, lid, chains, shackles, or the like to open them. Once you have done so 3 times, you cannot do so again until you have finished a descanso largo. You can speak with the broom over the course of a _short rest_ , learning one ritual spell. The next time you use this feature, you forget the last spell learned from it.

**Dancing Broom**

In addition, you can use a acción adicional to toss this broom into the air and cackle. When you do so, the broom begins to hover, flies up to 60 pies, and attacks una criatura of your choice within 5 pies of it. The broom uses your _attack roll_  and ability score modifier to damage rolls, and unless a objetivo is hidden or _invisible_  it has _advantage_  on its tirada de ataque.

 While the broom hovers, you can use a acción adicional to cause it to fly up to 30 pies to another spot within 30 pies of you. As part of the same acción adicional, you can cause the broom to attack una criatura within 5 pies of it.

 The broom ceases to hover if you grasp it or move more than 30 pies away from it.

name: Angel Eyes
desc: Both the frame and lenses of these magnificent spectacles are made of the finest crystal. While you are wearing and attuned to the spectacles, you are immune to _mental stress effects_  that would result from a visual encounter, you have _advantage_  on _tirada de salvacións_  against sight-based fear effects, and you are immune to gaze attacks.

name: Angelic Earrings
desc: These earrings feature platinum loops from which hang bronzed claws from a Chamrosh (see Tome of Beasts 2), freely given by the angelic hound. While wearing these earrings, you have ventaja on Sabiduría (Perspicacia) checks to determine if a criatura is lying or if it has an evil alignment. If you cast detect evil and good while wearing these earrings, the range increases to 60 pies, and the spell lasts 10 minutos without requiring Concentración.

name: Angry Hornet
desc: This black munición has yellow fletching or yellow paint. When you fuego this magic munición, it makes an angry buzzing sound, and it multiplies in flight. As it flies, 2d4 identical pieces of munición magically appear around it, all speeding toward your objetivo. Roll separate attack rolls for each additional arrow or bullet. Duplicate munición disappears after missing or after dealing its damage. If the angry hornet and all its duplicates miss, the angry hornet remains mágico and can be fired again, otherwise it is destroyed.

name: Angurvadal, the Stream of Anguish
desc:
This longsword has 5 runes inscribed along its blade that glow and burn fiercely in times of war but with a dim, calming ligera in times of peace. You gain a +2 to attack and damage rolls with this weapon. While _Angurvadal_ is drawn, its runes glow with 5 pies of dim ligera when not in combat. As long as the weapon is drawn and you are conscious, you cannot be surprised and have _advantage_  on initiative rolls as the runes blaze to life. On your first turn, and for the duration of the combat, the runes emits bright ligera in a 20-pie radius and dim ligera for an additional 20 pies. During this time, attacks with this sword also deal an additional 2d6 daño de fuego.

_Angurvadal_ has 5 charges and regains 1d4 + 1 charges each dawn. As an action, you can expend 1 or more charges to cast __burning hands_  (save CD 15). For each charge spent after the first, you increase the level of the spell by 1\. When all charges are expended, roll a d20\. On a 1, the fuego of the runes dims and _Angurvadal_ can no longer gain charges. Otherwise, _Angurvadal_ acts as a mundane longsword until it regains charges. Each charge is represented on the blade by a glowing rune that is extinguished when it is used.

### Lore

Little is known of _Angurvadal_ beyond the glow of its iconic runes and its often vengeful bearers, including the hero Frithiof. Despite its rather imposing title, this sword has far less of a Historia of tragedy associated with it than the other swords presented here.

name: Animated Abacus
desc: If you speak a mathematical equation within 5 pies of this abacus, it calculates the equation and displays the solution. If you are touching the abacus, it calculates only the equations you speak, ignoring all other spoken equations.

name: Animated Chain Mail
desc: While wearing this armor, you gain a +1 bonus to AC, and you can use an action to cause parts of the armor to unravel into long, animated chains. While the chains are active, you have a escalando Velocidad equal to your walking Velocidad, and your AC is reduced by 2. You can use a acción adicional to deactivate the chains, returning the armor to normal.

name: Animated Shield
desc: Mientras sostienes este escudo, puedes pronunciar su palabra de mando como acción adicional para hacer que se anime. El escudo salta al aire y flota en tu espacio para protegerte como si lo estuvieras empuñando, dejando tus manos libres. El escudo permanece animado durante 1 minuto, hasta que uses una acción adicional para poner fin a este efecto, o hasta que quedes incapacitado o mueras, momento en el que el escudo cae al suelo o a tu mano si tienes una libre.

name: Animated Shield
desc: As a acción adicional, you can verbally command the shield to animate and float in your space, or for it to stop doing so. The shield continues to act as if you were wielding it, but with your hands free. The shield remains animated for 1 minuto, or until you are _incapacitated_  or die. It then returns to your free hand, if you have one, or else it falls to the ground. You can benefit from only one shield at a time.

name: Ankh of Aten
desc: This golden ankh is about 12 inches long and has 5 charges. While holding the ankh by the loop, you can expend 1 charge as an action to fuego a beam of brilliant sunlight in a 5-pie-wide, 60-pie-line from the end. cada criatura caught in the line debe realizar a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Constitución. en una salvación fallida, a criatura recibe a5d8 daño radiante and is cegado until the end of your next turn. en una salvación exitosa, it recibe la mitad del daño and isn't cegado. Undead have desventaja on this tirada de salvación. The ankh regains 1d4 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Anointing Mace
desc:
Also called an anointing gada, you gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. In addition, the ornately decorated head of the mace holds a reservoir perforated with small holes. As an action, you can fill the reservoir with a single potion or vial of liquid, such as holy water or alchemist's fuego. You can press a button on the haft of the weapon as a acción adicional, which opens the holes. If you hit a objetivo with the weapon while the holes are open, the weapon causa damage as normal and the objetivo suffers the effects of the liquid. For example,
an anointing mace filled with holy water causa an extra 2d6 daño radiante if it hits a fiend or undead. After you press the button and make an tirada de ataque, the liquid is expended, regardless if your attack hits.

name: Anthology of Enhanced Radiance
desc: This slightly enchanted book holds lessons for how to look healthier. When you spend 1 hora reading and memorizing the book’s lessons, after your next _long rest_  for the following 24 horas you appear as if you’ve slept and eaten well for months. At the end of the duration, the effect ends and you are unable to benefit from this book until 28 days have passed.

name: Apparatus of the Crab
desc:
Este objeto parece a primera vista un gran barril de hierro sellado que pesa 225 kilogramos. El barril tiene un pestillo oculto, que puede encontrarse superando una prueba de Inteligencia (Investigación) CD 20. Soltar el pestillo desbloquea una escotilla en uno de los extremos del barril, permitiendo que dos criaturas Medianas o más pequeñas se arrastren al interior. Diez palancas están dispuestas en fila en el extremo opuesto, cada una en posición neutra, capaces de moverse hacia arriba o hacia abajo. Cuando se accionan ciertas palancas, el aparato se transforma para asemejarse a una langosta gigante.

El apparatus of the Crab es un objeto Grande con las siguientes estadísticas:

**Clase de Armadura:** 20

**Puntos de Golpe:** 200

**Velocidad:** 9 m, nadar 9 m (o 0 m en ambos casos si las patas y la cola no están extendidas)

**Inmunidades al Daño:** veneno, psíquico

Para utilizarlo como vehículo, el aparato requiere un piloto. Mientras la escotilla del aparato está cerrada, el compartimento es hermético e impermeable. El compartimento contiene aire suficiente para 10 horas de respiración, divididas entre el número de criaturas que respiran en su interior.

El aparato flota sobre el agua. También puede sumergirse hasta una profundidad de 270 metros. Por debajo de esa profundidad, el vehículo recibe 2d6 de daño contundente por minuto debido a la presión.

Una criatura en el compartimento puede usar una acción para mover hasta dos de las palancas del aparato hacia arriba o hacia abajo. Tras cada uso, la palanca vuelve a su posición neutra. Cada palanca, de izquierda a derecha, funciona según se indica en la tabla de Palancas del Apparatus of the Crab.

**Palancas del Apparatus of the Crab (tabla)**

| Palanca | Arriba                                                                                                                                                      | Abajo                                                                                                                                                              |
|---------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| 1       | Las patas y la cola se extienden, permitiendo que el aparato camine y nade.                                                                                 | Las patas y la cola se retraen, reduciendo la velocidad del aparato a 0 e impidiéndole beneficiarse de bonificaciones a la velocidad.                           |
| 2       | Se abre el postigo de la ventana delantera.                                                                                                                 | Se cierra el postigo de la ventana delantera.                                                                                                                   |
| 3       | Se abren los postigos de las ventanas laterales (dos por lado).                                                                                             | Se cierran los postigos de las ventanas laterales (dos por lado).                                                                                               |
| 4       | Dos garras se extienden desde los lados delanteros del aparato.                                                                                             | Las garras se retraen.                                                                                                                                          |
| 5       | Cada garra extendida realiza el siguiente ataque con arma cuerpo a cuerpo: +8 a la tirada de ataque, alcance 1.5 m, un objetivo. Impacto: 7 (2d6) de daño contundente. | Cada garra extendida realiza el siguiente ataque con arma cuerpo a cuerpo: +8 a la tirada de ataque, alcance 1.5 m, un objetivo. Impacto: El objetivo queda aferrado (CD de escape 15). |
| 6       | El aparato camina o nada hacia adelante.                                                                                                                    | El aparato camina o nada hacia atrás.                                                                                                                           |
| 7       | El aparato gira 90 grados a la izquierda.                                                                                                                   | El aparato gira 90 grados a la derecha.                                                                                                                         |
| 8       | Unas fijaciones con forma de ojos emiten luz brillante en un radio de 9 m y luz tenue 9 m adicionales.                                                     | La luz se apaga.                                                                                                                                                |
| 9       | El aparato se hunde hasta 6 m en el líquido.                                                                                                               | El aparato asciende hasta 6 m en el líquido.                                                                                                                    |
| 10      | La escotilla trasera se desella y se abre.                                                                                                                  | La escotilla trasera se cierra y se sella.                                                                                                                      |

name: Apparatus of the Crab
desc:
This ingeniously crafted item (known by some as the crabaratus) is a tightly shut 500 pound iron barrel. Making a CD 20 Investigación check reveals a hidden catch which unlocks one end of the barrel—a hatch. Two Medium or smaller criaturas can crawl inside where there are 10 levers in a row at the far end. Each lever is in a neutral position but can move up or down. Use of these levers makes the barrel reconfigure to resemble a Gigante metal crab.

This item is a Large object with the following statistics:

**Clase de Armadura:** 20

**puntos de golpe:** 200

**Velocidad:** 30 pies., swim 30 pies. (both are 0 pies. without legs and tail extended)

**Damage Immunities:** veneno, psíquico

The item requires a pilot to be used as a vehicle. The hatch must be closed for it to be airtight and watertight. The apparatus holds 10 horas worth of air for breathing, dividing by the number of breathing criaturas inside.

The apparatus floats on water and may dive underwater down to 900 pies, taking 2d6 daño contundente at the end of each minuto spent at a lower depth.

Any criatura inside the apparatus can use an action to position up to two of the levers either up or down, with the lever returning to its neutral position upon use. From left to right, the Apparatus of the Crab table shows how each lever functions.

  
**Table: Apparatus of the Crab**

| **Lever** | **Up**                                                                                                                            | **Down**                                                                                                                    |
| --------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 1         | Extends legs and tail.                                                                                                            | Retracts legs and tail. Velocidad is 0 pies. and it cannot benefit from bonuses to Velocidad.                                         |
| 2         | Shutter on forward window opens.                                                                                                  | Shutter on forward window closes.                                                                                           |
| 3         | Shutters (two each side) on side windows open.                                                                                    | Shutters on side windows close.                                                                                             |
| 4         | Two claws extend, one on each front side.                                                                                         | The claws retract.                                                                                                          |
| 5         | Each extended claw makes a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo: +8 para impactar, alcance 5 pies., un objetivo. Hit: 7 (2d6) daño contundente.                     | Each extended claw makes a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo: +8 para impactar, alcance 5 pies., un objetivo. Hit: The objetivo is _grappled_  (escape CD 15). |
| 6         | The apparatus moves forward.                                                                                                      | The apparatus moves backward.                                                                                               |
| 7         | The apparatus turns 90 degrees left.                                                                                              | The apparatus turns 90 degrees right.                                                                                       |
| 8         | Bright ligera shines from fixtures resembling eyes, shedding bright ligera in a 30-pie radius and dim ligera an additional 30 pies. | The ligera extinguishes.                                                                                                     |
| 9         | If in liquid, the apparatus sinks 20 pies.                                                                                        | If in liquid, the apparatus rises 20 pies.                                                                                  |
| 10        | The hatch opens.                                                                                                                  | The hatch closes.                                                                                                           |

name: Apron of the Eager Artisan
desc: Created by dwarven artisans, this leather apron has narrow pockets, which hold one type of artisan's tools. If you are wearing the apron and you spend 10 minutos contemplating your next crafting project, the tools in the apron magically change to match those best suited to the task. Once you have changed the tools available, you can't change them again until the next dawn.

name: Arcanaphage Stone
desc: Similar to the rocks found in a bird's gizzard, this smooth stone helps an Arcanaphage (see criatura Codex) digest magic. While you hold or wear the stone, you have ventaja on tirada de salvacións against spells.

name: Archaic Creed
desc:
This crumpled vellum scroll is scrawled with an Infernal statement outlining the beliefs of a specific yet unnamed fiend. Whether or not you can read the language, while studying the statement you gain an expertise die on a Religión check made to recall or learn information about fiends. You can’t do so again until you finish a _long rest_ .

By repeatedly reciting the creed aloud as an action each ronda for 1 minuto, you can cast _find familiar_ , except your familiar recibe the form of either an _imp_  or a _quasit_ . The creed is irrevocably absorbed into the familiar’s body and is completely destroyed when the familiar drops to 0 puntos de golpe.

**Curse.** The familiar summoned by the creed is cursed. The fiend who wrote the creed can observe you through the summoned familiar, and can command the familiar to take actions while you are _asleep_  or _unconscious_ .

name: Argent Mantle
desc:
Often reserved for ranking knights of more dogmatic or monastic military orders, these finely made, hood-and-shoulder pieces endow the wearer with exceptional battlefield, statecraft, and leadership skills. You can use a acción adicional to speak a command word, causing a nimbus of golden ligera to surround your head. This nimbus sheds bright ligera in a 20-pie radius and dim ligera for an additional 20 pies. Friendly criaturas in the bright ligera shed by this nimbus have ventaja on initiative checks and can't be surprised except when incapacitado. The nimbus lasts until you use a acción adicional to speak the command word again or you remove the mantle.
  ***Endearing Leader.*** While wearing this mantle, you can use an action to increase your Carisma score to 20 for 10 minutos. This has no effect on you if your Carisma is already 20 or higher. This property of the mantle can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Armor +1, +2, or +3
desc:
Wearing this armor gives an additional magic boost to AC as well as the base AC the armor provides. Its rarity and value are listed below:

| **Base Armor**              | **+1 AC** |           | **+2 AC** |           | **+3 AC** |            |
| --------------------------- | --------- | --------- | --------- | --------- | --------- | ---------- |
| Padded cloth                | Común    | 65 gp     | Uncommon  | 500 gp    | Rare      | 2,500 gp   |
| Padded leather              | Uncommon  | 400 gp    | Rare      | 2,500 gp  | Very rare | 10,000 gp  |
| Cloth brigandine            | Uncommon  | 150 gp    | Uncommon  | 500 gp    | Rare      | 2,200 gp   |
| Leather brigandine          | Uncommon  | 400 gp    | Rare      | 2,200 gp  | Very rare | 8,000 gp   |
| Hide armor                  | Uncommon  | 150 gp    | Uncommon  | 500 gp    | Rare      | 2,000 gp   |
| Scale mail                  | Uncommon  | 250 gp    | Rare      | 2,000 gp  | Very rare | 8,000 gp   |
| Breastplate or cuirass      | Uncommon  | 500 gp    | Rare      | 2,000 gp  | Very rare | 8,000 gp   |
| Elven breastplate (mithral) | Rare      | 1,300 gp  | Very rare | 2,800 gp  | Very rare | 8,800 gp   |
| Chain mail or chain shirt   | Uncommon  | 150 gp    | Uncommon  | 500 gp    | Rare      | 2,000 gp   |
| Half plate                  | Rare      | 2,000 gp  | Very rare | 8,000 gp  | Very rare | 32,000 gp  |
| Hauberk                     | Uncommon  | 450 gp    | Rare      | 1,500 gp  | Very rare | 6,000 gp   |
| Splint                      | Rare      | 1,500 gp  | Very rare | 6,000 gp  | Very rare | 24,000 gp  |
| Full plate                  | Very rare | 6,000 gp  | Very rare | 24,000 gp | Legendary | 96,000 gp  |
| Elven plate (mithral)       | Very rare | 9,000 gp  | Very rare | 27,000 gp | Legendary | 99,000 gp  |
| Dwarven plate (stone)       | Very rare | 24,000 gp | Legendary | 96,000 gp | Legendary | 150,000 gp |

name: Armor of Cushioning
desc: While wearing this armor, you have resistance to daño contundente. In addition, you can use a reacción when you fall to reduce any falling damage you take by an amount equal to twice your level.

name: Armor of Invulnerability
desc: Mientras vistes esta armadura, tienes resistencia al daño no mágico. Además, puedes usar una acción para volverte inmune al daño no mágico durante 10 minutos o hasta que dejes de llevar puesta la armadura. Una vez que se utiliza esta acción especial, no puede volver a usarse hasta el siguiente amanecer.

name: Armor of Invulnerability
desc: This armor grants you resistance to no mágico damage. Once between _long rests_ , you can use an action to become immune to no mágico damage for 10 minutos or until you are no longer wearing the armor.

name: Armor of Resistance
desc:
Mientras vistes esta armadura, tienes resistencia a un tipo de daño. El DM elige el tipo o lo determina aleatoriamente entre las opciones siguientes.

| d10 | Tipo de Daño |
|-----|---------------|
| 1   | Ácido         |
| 2   | Frío          |
| 3   | Fuego         |
| 4   | de Fuerza     |
| 5   | Eléctrico     |
| 6   | Necrótico     |
| 7   | Veneno        |
| 8   | Psíquico      |
| 9   | Radiante      |
| 10  | Sónico        |

name: Armor of Resistance
desc:
This armor grants you resistance to one type of damage. The type of damage is determined when the armor is created, from the following list: ácido, frío, fuego, fuerza, rayo, necrótico, veneno, psíquico, radiante, trueno.

A suit of ligera or medium _armor of resistance_ is rare, and a pesada suit is very rare.

name: Armor of Spite
desc: Unholy glyphs engraved on this black iron magic armor burn with a faint, orange ligera. While wearing the armor, you gain a +1 bonus to your AC. At the start of your turn, you can choose to allow attack rolls against you to have ventaja. If you do, the glyphs shed dim ligera in a 5-pie radius, and you can use a reacción when a criatura hits you with an attack to fuerza the attacker to take daño necrótico equal to twice your competencia bonus.

name: Armor of the Leaf
desc:
This suit of armor always has a forest or leaf motif and is usually green or brown in color. While wearing this armor in forest terrain, you have ventaja on
Fuerza (Atletismo) and Destreza (Sigilo) checks. You can use an action to transform the armor into a cloud of swirling razor-sharp leaves, and cada criatura within 10 pies of you debe tener éxito en a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Destreza or take 2d8 daño cortante. For 1 minuto, the cloud of leaves spreads out in a 10-pie radius from you, making the area lightly obscured for criaturas other than you. The cloud moves with you, remaining centered on you. A wind of at least 10 millas per hora disperses the cloud and ends the effect. While the armor is transformed, you don't gain a base Clase de Armadura from the armor. The armor can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Armor of the Ngobou
desc: This thick and rough armor is made from the hide of a Ngobou (see Tome of Beasts), an aggressive, ox-sized dinosaur known to threaten elephants of the plains. The horns and tusks of the dinosaur are worked into the armor as spiked shoulder pads. While wearing this armor, you gain a +1 bonus to AC, and you have a mágico sense for elephants. You automatically detect if an elephant has passed within 90 pies of your location within the last 24 horas, and you have ventaja on any Sabiduría (Percepción) or Sabiduría (Supervivencia) checks you make to find elephants.

name: Armor of Vulnerability
desc:
Mientras vistes esta armadura, tienes resistencia a uno de los siguientes tipos de daño: contundente, perforante o cortante. El DM elige el tipo o lo determina aleatoriamente.

**_Maldición_**. Esta armadura está maldita, algo que solo se revela cuando se lanza el conjuro _identify_ sobre ella o cuando te sintonizas con ella. Sintonizarte con la armadura te maldice hasta que seas el objetivo del conjuro _remove curse_ o de magia similar; quitarte la armadura no pone fin a la maldición. Mientras estás maldito, tienes vulnerabilidad a dos de los tres tipos de daño asociados a la armadura (no al tipo al que otorga resistencia).

name: Armor of Vulnerability
desc:
This armor grants you resistance to one of the following damage types: contundente, perforante, or cortante. The type of damage is determined when the armor is created.

**Cursed.** Once attuned to this armor, you are _cursed_  until you are objetivoed by __remove curse_ or similar magic; removing the armor does not end it. While cursed, you have vulnerability to the other two damage types this armor does not protect against.

name: Armor of Warding
desc: Charms and wards made of claws, feathers, scales, or similar objects adorn this armor, which is etched with the likenesses of the criaturas that contributed the adornments. The armor provides protection against a specific type of foe, indicated by its adornments. While wearing this armor, you have a bonus to AC against attacks from criaturas of the type the armor wards against. The bonus is determined by its rarity. The armor provides protection against one of the following criatura types: aberration, beast, Celestial, construct, dragon, elemental, fey, fiend, Gigante, humanoid, monstrosity, ooze, plant, or undead.

name: Armored Corset
desc: This corset appears to be a lightweight piece of shapewear, bound up the back with satin ribbons. In practice, it acts as a steel breastplate for the purposes of AC, donning time, and sleeping in armor; however, it imposes _disadvantage_  on Acrobacias checks instead of Sigilo checks. An armored corset is considered ligera armor for the purposes of competencia and imposes no maximum Destreza modifier. Furthermore, if you wear it for longer than eight horas, you debe realizar a CD 10 Constitución _tirada de salvación_  or suffer a level of _fatigue_ , increasing the CD by 2 for each subsequent eight-hora stretch.

name: Arrow-Catching Shield
desc: Obtienes una bonificación de +2 a la CA contra ataques a distancia mientras empuñas este escudo. Esta bonificación se suma a la bonificación normal del escudo a la CA. Además, siempre que un atacante realice un ataque a distancia contra un objetivo que se encuentre a 1.5 m de ti, puedes usar tu reacción para convertirte en el objetivo del ataque en su lugar.

name: Arrow-Catching Shield
desc: This shield grants you +2 to AC against ranged attacks, in addition to the shield’s normal bonus to AC. In addition, whenever a objetivo within 5 pies of you is objetivoed by a ataque a distancia, you can use your reacción to become the objetivo of the attack instead.

name: Arrow of Grabbing
desc: This arrow has a barbed head and is wound with a fine but strong thread that unravels as the arrow soars. If a criatura recibe damage from the arrow, the criatura debe tener éxito en a CD 17 tirada de salvación de Constitución or take 4d6 damage and have the arrowhead lodged in its flesh. A criatura grabbed by this arrow can't move farther away from you. At the end of its turn, the criatura can attempt a CD 17 tirada de salvación de Constitución, taking 4d6 daño perforante and dislodging the arrow en un éxito. As an action, you can attempt to pull the grabbed criatura up to 10 pies in a straight line toward you, forcing the criatura to repeat the tirada de salvación. If the criatura fails, it moves up to 10 pies closer to you. If it succeeds, it recibe 4d6 daño perforante and the arrow is dislodged.

name: Arrow of Slaying
desc:
Una _arrow of slaying_ es un arma mágica diseñada para matar a un tipo concreto de criatura. Algunas son más específicas que otras; por ejemplo, existen tanto _arrows of dragon slaying_ como _arrows of blue dragon slaying_. Si una criatura perteneciente al tipo, raza o grupo asociado con una _arrow of slaying_ recibe daño de la flecha, la criatura debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Constitución CD 17, sufriendo 6d10 de daño perforante adicional si la falla, o la mitad de ese daño adicional si la supera.

Una vez que una _arrow of slaying_ inflige su daño adicional a una criatura, se convierte en una flecha no mágica.

Existen otros tipos de munición mágica de esta clase, como los _bolts of slaying_ diseñados para ballestas, aunque las flechas son las más comunes.

name: Arrow of Slaying
desc:
A particular kind of criatura is chosen when this magic arrow is created. When the _arrow of slaying_ damages a criatura belonging to the chosen type, heritage, or group, the criatura makes a CD 17 Constitución _tirada de salvación_ , taking an extra 6d10 daño perforante en una salvación fallida, or half as much extra damage on a successful one. Once the _arrow of slaying_ causa its extra damage to a criatura, it loses its mágico properties. 

Other types of magic munición of this kind exist, such as bolts meant for a crossbow, or bullets for a firearm or sling.

name: Arrow of Unpleasant Herbs
desc: This arrow's tip is filled with magically preserved, poisonous herbs. When a criatura recibe damage from the arrow, the arrowhead breaks, releasing the herbs. The criatura debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Constitución or be incapacitado until the end of its next turn as it retches and reels from the veneno.

name: Ash of the Ebon Birch
desc: This salve is created by burning bark from a rare ebon birch tree then mixing that ash with oil and animal blood to create a cerise pigment used to paint yourself or another criatura with profane protections. Painting the pigment on a criatura recibe 1 minuto, and you can choose to paint a specific sigil or smear the pigment on a specific part of the criatura's body.

name: Ashes of the Fallen
desc: Found in a small packet, this coarse, foul-smelling black dust is made from the powdered remains of a Celestial. Each packet of the substance contains enough ashes for one use. You can use an action to throw the dust in a 15-pie cone. Each spellcaster in the cone debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or become cursed for 1 hora or until the curse is ended with a remove curse spell or similar magic. criaturas that don't cast spells are unaffected. A cursed spellcaster debe realizar a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría each time it casts a spell. en un éxito, the spell is cast normally. en un fallo, the spellcaster casts a different, randomly chosen spell of the same level or lower from among the spellcaster's prepared or known spells. If the spellcaster has no suitable spells available, no spell is cast.

name: Ashwood Wand
desc: You can use this wand as a spellcasting focus. The wand has 3 charges and regains all expended charges daily at dawn. When you cast a spell that causa daño de fuego while using this wand as your spellcasting focus, the spell causa 1 extra daño de fuego. If you expend 1 of the wand's charges during the casting, the spell causa 1d4 + 1 extra daño de fuego instead.

name: Asi
desc:
This magic, sentient longsword grants a +3 bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  made with it. Once you have attuned to the weapon, while wielding it you gain the following features:

◆ Weapon attacks using the sword score a critical hit on a roll of 19 or 20.

◆ The first time you attack with the sword on each of your turns, you can transfer some or all of the sword’s bonus to your Clase de Armadura, instead of using the bonus on any attacks that turn. For example, you could reduce the bonus to your attack and damage rolls to +1 and gain a +2 bonus to AC. The adjusted bonuses remain in effect until the start of your next turn, although you must hold the sword to gain a bonus to AC from it.

◆ You can use a acción adicional to speak this sword’s command word, causing flames to erupt from the blade. These flames shed _bright light_  in a 60-pie radius and dim ligera for an additional 60 pies. While the sword is ablaze, it causa an extra 2d8 daño de fuego to any objetivo it hits. The flames last until you use a acción adicional to speak the command word again or until you drop or sheathe the sword.

◆ You can use a acción adicional to toss this sword into the air and speak a different command word. When you do so, the sword begins to hover and the consciousness inside of it awakens, transforming it into a criatura. The criatura is friendly to you and your companions, and it acts on your turn. You can use a acción adicional to command how the criatura moves and what action it recibe on its next turn, or to give it general orders, such as to attack your enemigos. In the absence of such orders, the criatura acts in a fashion appropriate to its Naturaleza. You can transform the sword into a criatura for up to 10 minutos, each one using a minimum of 1 minuto from the duration. The sword regains 5 minutos of transforming capability for every 12 horas that feature is not in use.

When you act in a way that Asi finds contemptible (performing deeds that conflict with effecting the destruction of the enemigos of the gods and restoring the Dharma), the sword acts under its own free will unless you succeed on an opposed Carisma check at the end of each minuto.

**_Sentience._** Asi is a sentient weapon with Inteligencia 16, Sabiduría 16, and Carisma 16\. It has hearing and visión en la oscuridad out to a range of 120 pies. The weapon communicates telepathically with you and can speak, read, and understand Sanskrit and Tamil.

_**Personality.**_ The sword’s purpose is to effect the destruction of the enemigos of the gods and restoring the Dharma. It is single-minded in its purpose and highly motivated, but not unreasonable or averse to compromising its interests for a short time while in the pursuit of the greater good.

_**Destroying the Sword.**_ The sword can never be permanently destroyed. When reduced to 0 puntos de golpe, Asi fades into the Ethereal Plane, reappearing in a location of its choosing 1d4 weeks later.

_**Asi**_   
_Challenge 8_  
_Small construct 3,900 XP_  
**AC** 16 (natural armor)  
**HP** 102 (12d6+60; bloodied 51)  
**Velocidad** fly 40 pies. (hover)

  
STR DEX CON INT WIS CHA  
19 (+4) 17 (+3) 20 (+5) 16 (+3) 16 (+3) 16 (+3)

---

**competencia** +3; **Maneuver CD** 15  
**Saving Throws** Int +6, Wis +6, Cha +6 Skills Perspicacia +6, Percepción +6  
**Damage Resistances** frío, rayo; contundente, perforante, cortante  
**Damage Immunities** fuego, veneno, psíquico  
**Condition Immunities** _charmed_ , _fatigue_ , _frightened_ , _poisoned_   
**Senses** visión en la oscuridad 120 pies., passive Percepción 16  
**Languages** Sanskrit, Tamil; telepatía 60 pies.

---

_**Immutable Form.**_ The sword is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

_**Magic Resistance.**_ The sword has _advantage_  on _tirada de salvacións_  against spells and other mágico effects.

---

ACTIONS

_**Ataque Múltiple.**_ The sword attacks twice with its blade.

_**Blade.** ataque cuerpo a cuerpo con arma:_ +8 para impactar, alcance 5 pies., un objetivo. _Hit_: 16 (2d10+5) mágico daño cortante plus 9 (2d8) daño de fuego.

name: Asp's Kiss
desc: This haladie features two short, slightly curved blades attached to a single hilt with a short, blue-sheened spike on the hand guard. You gain a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. While attuned to this sword, you have immunity to daño de veneno, and, when you take the Dash action, the extra movement you gain is double your Velocidad instead of equal to your Velocidad. When you use the Attack action with this sword, you can make one attack with its hand guard spike (treat as a dagger) as a acción adicional. You can use an action to cause indigo veneno to coat the blades of this sword. The veneno remains for 1 minuto or until two attacks using the blade of this weapon hit one or more criaturas. The objetivo debe tener éxito en a CD 17 tirada de salvación de Constitución or take 2d10 daño de veneno and its punto de golpe maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the daño de veneno taken. This reduction lasts until the objetivo finishes a descanso largo. The objetivo dies if this effect reduces its punto de golpe maximum to 0. The sword can't be used this way again until the next dawn. When you kill a criatura with this weapon, it sheds a single, blue tear as it recibe its last breath.

name: Assassin’s Ring
desc:
This unassuming-looking signet ring comes with sinister features. The first is a four-chambered extradimensional space, each of which can hold one dose of veneno. While wearing the ring, you can use an action to press part of its filigree to deploy one of the poisons and apply it to a weapon or piece of munición. You have _advantage_  on checks made to conceal this action from observers. 

In addition, you can use a acción adicional to whisper a command word that makes a garrote of shadowy fuerza unspool from the ring. A criatura _grappled_  using this garrote has _disadvantage_  on _tirada de salvacións_  made to escape the grapple.

This ring’s magic is subtle and criaturas have _disadvantage_  on checks made to notice it is mágico or determine its purpose.

name: Assembling Armor
desc:
This thick leather belt pouch jingles softly as if filled with metal rings. This item has 6 charges and regains 1d4 each dawn.

You can use an action to speak one of three command words and expend 1 or more of the pouch’s charges, causing metal rings and plates to stream out of the pouch and assemble into a suit of armor on your body.

* Leather brigandine (1 charge)
* Half plate (2 charges)
* Full plate (3 charges)

Alternatively, you can use a acción adicional to speak a fourth command word and expend 1 charge to summon a medium shield from the pouch.

If you are already wearing armor that provides equal or greater protection than the armor provided by the pouch, the charges are wasted and nothing happens. If you are wearing armor that provides less protection, the assembling armor reinforces the armor you are already wearing and you benefit from the same level of protection as if you activated the pouch while unarmored. The armor remains on your person for up to 1 hora or until you use an action to dismiss it, after which it disassembles and returns to the pouch.

name: Atlas to Libation
desc:
This golden-brown parchment has an odd handle-like wooden stave and a seal marked with an ale tankard. As a acción adicional, you can break the seal and unfurl the map. When you do so, the map fills in with accurate topography in a 1-milla radius around you. A miniature image of you appears at the map’s center along with a dotted line leading to an X that marks the nearest potable alcohol. The map immediately rolls back up if brought within 50 pies of alcohol or if no alcohol is within 1 milla when the seal is opened. 

Once used in this way, the seal reforms and is usable again after 24 horas.

Alternatively, you can form a cylinder with the map and grasp it by the handle as an action. If you do so, the map hardens into a tall wooden tankard and magically fills with high quality ale, then loses all mágico properties and becomes a mundane object.

name: Aurochs Bracers
desc: These bracers have the graven image of a bull's head on them. Your Fuerza score is 19 while you wear these bracers. It has no effect on you if your Fuerza is already 19 or higher. In addition, when you use the Attack action to shove a criatura, you have ventaja on the Fuerza (Atletismo) check.

name: Axe of Chilling Fear
desc:
This black iron axe is ice-frío to the touch and feels uncomfortable to hold. Its head has an iridescent blue tint to it, and frost gathers around it when it’s left to rest.

You have a +1 bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  with this weapon, and when you hit a criatura that’s _frightened_  of you (as per the condition) with it, it causa an extra 2d6 daño de frío. Additionally, you have _advantage_  on Intimidación checks while holding it, and when you score a critical hit with it, the objetivo debe realizar a CD 15 Sabiduría _tirada de salvación_  or be asustado of you for 1 minuto. It can repeat the tirada de salvación each time it recibe damage, ending the effect en un éxito.

**_Curse._** While attuned to this axe, a deep-seated fear comes to the fore. You develop a _phobia_ based on a pre-existing fear (work with the Narrator to determine something suitable), however dormant, with the following alterations: when confronted with this object of this phobia, you debe realizar a CD 15 Sabiduría _tirada de salvación_ , becoming _frightened_  of it for 1 minuto en un fallo. en un éxito, you can’t be asustado by that phobia again for 1 hora. This does not affect a phobia gained in any other way.

name: Axe of Many Strikes
desc:
You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.
When you hit a criatura with it, you can choose to deal no damage to the objetivo and instead store the energy of the attack within the blade for 1 minuto. You can store up to three attacks in this way. When you hit a criatura with this axe while you have at least one attack stored, you can release one or more stored attacks, adding el daño of those stored attacks to el daño of the current attack.
Each time you release one or more stored attacks from the axe, you have a 10 percent chance of causing the axe to explode. The explosion causa 2d6 daño de fuerza to you for each attack you released from the axe, and it destroys the axe.

name: Axe of the Ancients
desc: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you draw this weapon, you can use a acción adicional to cast the thaumaturgy spell from it. You can have only one of the spell's effects active at a time when you cast it in this way.

name: Baba Yaga's Cinderskull
desc: Warm to the touch, this white, dry skull radiates dim, orange ligera from its eye sockets in a 30-pie radius. While attuned to the skull, you only require half of the daily food and water a criatura of your size and type normally requires. In addition, you can withstand extreme temperatures indefinitely, and you automatically succeed on tirada de salvacións against extreme temperatures.

name: Badge of Seasons
desc:
Glowing, mágico symbols of spring, summer, autumn, and winter decorate this wooden badge. So long as at least one of the symbols remains on the badge, fey criaturas regard you as a figure of authority. You gain an expertise die on Intimidación and Persuasión checks made to influence fey.

Whenever you create your pact weapon, you can choose to imbue it with the magic of one of the badge’s four symbols. For the next minuto or until your pact weapon disappears, you gain a benefit related to the chosen symbol:

**Spring:** Whenever you use your pact weapon to damage a criatura, you regain 1d4 puntos de golpe.

**Summer:** Attacks made with your pact weapon deal an additional 1d6 daño de fuego.

**Autumn:** Whenever you use your pact weapon to damage a criatura, the objetivo makes a Carisma _tirada de salvación_  against your CD de salvación del conjuro or it causa la mitad del daño with weapon attacks until the end of your next turn.

**Winter:** You can use a acción adicional to teleport up to 15 pies to an unoccupied space that you can see. criaturas within 5 pies of the space you left each take 1d4 daño de frío.

The symbol disappears after its effect ends. Once you’ve used all four symbols, the badge becomes a mundane item.

name: Badger Hide
desc: While wearing this hairy, black and white armor, you have a burrowing Velocidad of 20 pies, and you have ventaja on Sabiduría (Percepción) checks that rely on smell.

name: Bag of Beans
desc:
En el interior de esta pesada bolsa de tela hay 3d4 alubias secas. La bolsa pesa 1/4 de kg más 1/8 de kg por cada alubia que contenga.

Si vuelcas el contenido de la bolsa sobre el suelo, explota en un radio de 3 metros desde las alubias. Cada criatura en el área, incluido tú, debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Destreza CD 15, sufriendo 5d4 de daño de fuego si la falla, o la mitad si la supera. El fuego prende los objetos inflamables del área que no se estén llevando puestos ni transportando.

Si extraes una alubia de la bolsa, la plantas en tierra o arena y la riegas, la alubia produce un efecto 1 minuto después en el lugar donde fue plantada. El DM puede elegir un efecto de la siguiente tabla, determinarlo aleatoriamente o crear uno propio.

| d100  | Efecto                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|-------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| 01    | Brotan 5d4 setas venenosas. Si una criatura se come una seta, lanza cualquier dado. Si el resultado es impar, quien la comió debe superar una tirada de salvación de Constitución CD 15 o sufrir 5d6 de daño de veneno y quedar envenenado durante 1 hora. Si el resultado es par, quien la comió obtiene 5d6 puntos de golpe temporales durante 1 hora.                                         |
| 02-10 | Un géiser erupciona y expulsa agua, cerveza, zumo de bayas, té, vinagre, vino o aceite (a elección del DM) hasta 9 metros de altura durante 1d12 rondas.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| 11-20 | Brota un treant. Hay un 50 por ciento de posibilidades de que el treant sea caótico malvado y ataque.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| 21-30 | Se alza una estatua de piedra animada e inmóvil con tu apariencia. Profiere amenazas verbales contra ti. Si te alejas y otros se acercan, les describe como el más atroz de los villanos y les indica que te busquen y ataquen. Si estás en el mismo plano de existencia que la estatua, esta sabe dónde estás. La estatua queda inanimada pasadas 24 horas.                                     |
| 31-40 | Surge una hoguera con llamas azules que arde durante 24 horas (o hasta que se apague).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| 41-50 | Brotan 1d6 + 6 shriekers.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| 51-60 | Aparecen arrastrándose 1d4 + 8 sapos de color rosa intenso. Cada vez que se toca a un sapo, se transforma en un monstruo de tamaño Grande o menor a elección del DM. El monstruo permanece durante 1 minuto y luego desaparece en una nube de humo rosa intenso.                                                                                                                                |
| 61-70 | Un hambriento bulette surge cavando desde el suelo y ataca. 71-80 Crece un árbol frutal. Tiene 1d10 + 20 frutas; 1d8 de ellas actúan como pociones mágicas determinadas aleatoriamente, mientras que una actúa como un veneno ingerido a elección del DM. El árbol desaparece al cabo de 1 hora. La fruta recolectada permanece, conservando su magia durante 30 días.                          |
| 81-90 | Surge un nido con 1d4 + 3 huevos. Toda criatura que se coma un huevo debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Constitución CD 20. Si la supera, la criatura aumenta permanentemente en 1 su puntuación de característica más baja, eligiendo aleatoriamente entre las que estén igualmente bajas. Si la falla, la criatura sufre 10d6 de daño de fuerza a causa de una explosión mágica interna. |
| 91-99 | Una pirámide con una base cuadrada de 18 metros de lado irrumpe hacia arriba. En su interior hay un sarcófago que contiene un mummy lord. La pirámide se trata como la guarida del mummy lord, y su sarcófago contiene un tesoro a elección del DM.                                                                                                                                              |
| 100   | Brota una enorme planta de alubias que crece hasta una altura a elección del DM. La cima lleva donde el DM decida, como a unas vistas espectaculares, el castillo de un cloud giant o un plano de existencia diferente.                                                                                                                                                                          |

name: Bag of Beans
desc:
This cloth bag contains 3d4 dry beans and weighs ½ pound plus ¼ pound for each bean inside.

Dumping the bag’s contents on the ground creates a fiery 10-pie radius explosion. The fuego ignites unattended flammable objects. cada criatura in the area makes a CD 15 Destreza _tirada de salvación_ , taking 5d4 daño de fuego en un fallo, or la mitad del daño en un éxito. 

You may also take a bean from the bag and plant it in dirt or sand and water it, producing an effect 1 minuto later centered on where it was planted.

To determine the effect the Narrator may create something entirely new, choose one from the following table, or roll.

Table: Bag of Beans

| 1     | 5d4 toadstools with strange markings appear. When a criatura eats a toadstool (raw or cooked), roll any die. An even result grants 5d6 temporary puntos de golpe for 1 hora, and an odd result requires the criatura to make a CD 15 Constitución _tirada de salvación_  or take 5d6 daño de veneno and become _poisoned_  for 1 hora.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| ----- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 2–10  | 1d4+1 geysers erupt. Each one spews a different liquid (chosen by the Narrator) 30 pies into the air for 1d6 rondas: beer, berry juice, cooking oil, tea, vinegar, water, or wine.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| 11–20 | A fully developed _treant_  appears.
