There is a 50% chance it is chaotic evil, in which case it immediately attacks the nearest criatura.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| 21–30 | A stone statue in your likeness with an angry countenance rises. The statue is immobile except for its mouth, which can move and speak. It constantly rails threats and insults against you. If you leave the statue, it knows where you are (if you are on the same plane of existence) and tells anyone who comes near that you are the worst of villains, urging them to kill you. The statue attempts to cast _geas_ (save CD 10) on any nearby criatura that can speak a language you do (and isn’t your friend or companion) with the command to find and kill you. After 24 horas, the statue loses the ability to speak and cast geas, becoming completely inanimate.                                                                                    |
| 31–40 | A campfire with green flames appears for 24 horas or until it is extinguished. The area in a 10-pie radius is a haven.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| 41–50 | 1d6+6 fully developed _shriekers_  appear.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| 51–60 | 1d4+8 small pods sprout, which then unfurl to allow a luminescent pink toad to crawl out of each one. A toad transforms into a Large or smaller beast (determined by the Narrator) whenever touched. The beast remains for 1 minuto, then disappears in a puff of luminescent pink smoke.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| 61–70 | A fully developed _shambling mound_  appears. It is not hostile but appears perplexed as it is _stunned_  for 1d4 rondas. Once the stun effect ends, it is _frightened_  for 1d10+1 rondas. The source of its fear is one randomly determined criatura it can see.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| 71–80 | A tree with tantalizing fruit appears, but then turns into glass that refracts ligera in a dazzlingly beautiful manner. The glass tree evaporates over the next 24 horas.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| 81–90 | A nest appears containing 1d4+3 vibrantly multicolored eggs with equally multicolored yolks. Any criatura that eats an egg (raw or cooked) makes a CD 20 Constitución _tirada de salvación_ . en un éxito, the criatura's lowest ability score permanently increases by 1 (randomly choosing among equally low scores). en un fallo, the criatura recibe 10d6 daño de fuerza from an internal mágico explosion.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| 91–99 | A 5-pie hole with swirling multicolored vapors inside appears. todas las criaturas within 10 pies of the hole that have an Inteligencia of 6 or higher hear urgent, loving whispers from within in a language they understand. cada criatura makes a CD 15 Sabiduría _tirada de salvación_  or try to leap into the hole. The first criatura to jump into the hole (or more than one, if multiple criaturas jump in simultaneously) disappears for 1 day before reappearing. A criatura has no memory of the previous 24 horas when it reappears, but finds a new randomly determined magic item of uncommon rarity among its possessions. It also gains the benefits of a _long rest_ . The hole disappears after 1 minuto, or as soon as a criatura jumps completely into it. |
| 100   | A fantastic, gargantuan beanstalk erupts and grows to a height determined by the Narrator. The Narrator also chooses where the top leads. These options (and more) are possible: the castle of a Gigante, a magnificent view, a different plane of existence.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |

name: Bag of Bramble Beasts
desc:
This ordinary bag, made from green cloth, appears empty. Reaching inside the bag, however, reveals the presence of a small, spiky object. The bag weighs 1/2 pound. You can use an action to pull the spiky object from the bag and throw it up to 20 pies. When the object lands, it transforms into a criatura you determine by rolling a 1d8 and consulting the below table. The criatura is a bramble version (see sidebar) of the beast listed in the table. The criatura vanishes at the next dawn or when it is reduced to 0 puntos de golpe. The criatura is friendly to you and your companions, and it acts on your turn. You can use a acción adicional to command how the criatura moves and what action it recibe on its next turn, or give it general orders, such as to attack your enemigos. In the absence of such orders, the criatura acts in a fashion appropriate to its Naturaleza. Once three spiky objects have been pulled from the bag, the bag can't be used again until the next dawn. Alternatively, one willing animal companion or familiar can be placed in the bag for 1 week. A non-beast animal companion or familiar that is placed in the bag is treated as if it had been placed into a bag of holding and can be removed from the bag at any time. A beast animal companion or familiar disappears once placed in the bag, and the bag's magic is dormant until the week is up. At the end of the week, the animal companion or familiar exits the bag as a bramble criatura (see the template in the sidebar) and can be returned to its original form only with a wish. The criatura retains its status as an animal companion or familiar after its transformation and can choose to activate or deactivate its Thorn Body trait as a acción adicional. A transformed familiar can be re-summoned with the find familiar spell. Once the bag has been used to change an animal companion or familiar into a bramble criatura, it becomes an ordinary, no mágico bag. | 1d8 | criatura |
| --- | ------------ |
| 1 | Weasel |
| 2 | Gigante rat |
| 3 | Badger |
| 4 | Boar |
| 5 | Panther |
| 6 | Gigante badger | Only a beast can become a bramble criatura. It retains all its statistics except as noted below.

name: Bag of Cheese
desc:
This item is often bought from apprentice wizards with an adventurer’s first reward from questing. It is a yellow bag with the word “cheese” embroidered on it (in Común). Any food you put in this bag becomes cheese, but retains its original taste and condition—a moldy and dirty loaf of bread becomes a moldy and dirty piece of cheese. Any non-food items develop a distinctly cheesy aroma.

Alternatively, you can turn the bag inside out, transforming it into 1 Supply worth of any type of mundane cheese.

name: Bag of Devouring
desc:
Esta bolsa se asemeja superficialmente a una _bag of holding_, pero en realidad es el orificio alimenticio de una gigantesca criatura extradimensional. Darle la vuelta a la bolsa cierra dicho orificio.

La criatura extradimensional unida a la bolsa puede percibir todo lo que se coloca en su interior. La materia animal o vegetal introducida completamente en la bolsa es devorada y se pierde para siempre. Cuando una parte de una criatura viva se introduce en la bolsa, como ocurre cuando alguien mete la mano dentro, hay un 50 por ciento de posibilidades de que la criatura sea arrastrada al interior. Una criatura en el interior de la bolsa puede usar su acción para intentar escapar superando una prueba de Fuerza CD 15. Otra criatura puede usar su acción para meter la mano en la bolsa y sacar a la criatura, consiguiéndolo si supera una prueba de Fuerza CD 20 (siempre que ella misma no sea arrastrada al interior primero). Toda criatura que comience su turno en el interior de la bolsa es devorada y su cuerpo destruido.

En la bolsa se pueden guardar objetos inanimados; puede contener hasta un pie cúbico de dicho material. Sin embargo, una vez al día, la bolsa engulle los objetos que tenga dentro y los escupe en otro plano de existencia. El DM determina el momento y el plano.

Si la bolsa es perforada o rasgada, queda destruida, y todo lo que contenía es transportado a una ubicación aleatoria del Plano Astral.

name: Bag of Devouring
desc:
This item is actually an aperture for the mouth of an immense extradimensional criatura and is often mistaken for a _bag of holding_ . 

The criatura can perceive everything placed inside the bag. Up to a cubic pie of inanimate objects can be stored inside, however once per day the criatura swallows any inanimate objects inside and spews them into another plane of existence (with the Narrator deciding the plane and time of day). Animal or vegetable matter placed completely inside is instead ingested and destroyed. 

This item can be very dangerous. When part of a criatura is inside the bag (including a criatura reaching a hand inside) there is a 50% chance the bag pulls it inside. A criatura that ends its turn inside the bag is ingested and destroyed. 

A criatura inside the bag can try to escape by using an action and making a CD 15 Fuerza check. criaturas outside the bag may use an action to attempt to alcance in and pull a criatura out with a CD 20 Fuerza check. This rescue attempt is subject to the same 50% chance to be pulled inside.

perforante or tearing the item destroys it, with anything currently inside shifted to a random location on the Astral Plane. Turning the bag inside out closes the mouth.

name: Bag of Holding
desc:
Esta bolsa tiene un espacio interior considerablemente mayor que sus dimensiones exteriores: aproximadamente 60 cm de diámetro en la boca y 1.2 metros de profundidad. La bolsa puede contener hasta 250 kg, sin superar un volumen de 64 pies cúbicos. La bolsa pesa 7 kg, independientemente de su contenido. Recuperar un objeto de la bolsa requiere una acción.

Si la bolsa se sobrecarga, perfora o rasga, se rompe y queda destruida, y su contenido queda disperso por el Plano Astral. Si se le da la vuelta a la bolsa, su contenido cae al suelo sin sufrir daño, pero la bolsa debe devolverse a su posición original antes de poder usarse de nuevo. Las criaturas que respiran en el interior de la bolsa pueden sobrevivir un número de minutos igual a 10 dividido entre el número de criaturas (mínimo 1 minuto), tras lo cual comienzan a asfixiarse.

Introducir una _bag of holding_ en un espacio extradimensional creado por una _handy haversack_, un _portable hole_ o un objeto similar destruye ambos objetos al instante y abre un portal al Plano Astral. El portal se origina en el lugar donde un objeto fue introducido en el otro. Toda criatura que se encuentre a 3 metros del portal es absorbida por él hacia una ubicación aleatoria del Plano Astral. El portal se cierra a continuación. El portal es de un solo sentido y no puede reabrirse.

name: Bag of Holding
desc:
This bag’s interior space is significantly larger than its apparent size of roughly 2 pies at the mouth and 4 pies deep. The bag can hold up to 500 pounds and has an internal volume of 64 cubic pies. Regardless of its contents, it weighs 15 pounds. Retrieving an item from the bag requires an action. If you have never interacted with a specific bag of holding before, the first time you use it, it requires 1d4 rondas to take stock of its contents before anything can be retrieved from the bag.

Food or water placed in the bag immediately and permanently lose all nourishing qualities—after being in the bag, water no longer slakes thirst and food does not sate hunger or nourish. In a similar fashion, the body of a dead criatura placed in the bag cannot be restored to life by __revivify , raise dead ,_ or other similar magic. Breathing criaturas inside the bag can survive for up to 2d4 minutos divided by the number of criaturas (minimum 1 minuto), after which time they begin to suffocate.

The bag cannot hold any item that would not fit in a normal bag of its apparent size or any item with the Bulky quality. 

If the bag is punctured, torn, or otherwise structurally damaged, it ruptures and is destroyed, and the contents are scattered throughout the Astral Plane.

Placing a _bag of holding_ inside another extradimensional storage device such as a _portable hole_  or __handy haversack_ results in planar rift that destroys both items and pulls everything within 10 pies into the Astral Plane. The rift then closes and disappears.

name: Bag of Traps
desc: Anyone reaching into this apparently empty bag feels a small coin, which resembles no known currency. Removing the coin and placing or tossing it up to 20 pies creates a random mechanical trap that remains for 10 minutos or until discharged or disarmed, whereupon it disappears. The coin returns to the bag only after the trap disappears. You may draw up to 10 traps from the bag each week. The GM has the statistics for mechanical traps.

name: Bag of Tricks
desc:
Esta bolsa corriente, hecha de tela gris, herrumbre o tostada, parece estar vacía. Sin embargo, al meter la mano dentro se percibe la presencia de un pequeño objeto peludo. La bolsa pesa 1/4 de kg.

Puedes usar una acción para sacar el objeto peludo de la bolsa y lanzarlo hasta 6 metros. Al aterrizar, se transforma en una criatura que determinas tirando 1d8 y consultando la tabla correspondiente al color de la bolsa.

La criatura es amigable contigo y con tus compañeros, y actúa en tu turno. Puedes usar una acción adicional para indicar cómo se mueve la criatura y qué acción realiza en su próximo turno, o para darle órdenes generales, como que ataque a tus enemigos. En ausencia de dichas órdenes, la criatura actúa de un modo apropiado a su naturaleza.

Una vez que se hayan sacado tres objetos peludos de la bolsa, esta no puede volver a usarse hasta el amanecer siguiente.

**Bolsa de trucos gris (tabla)**

| d8 | Criatura        |
|----|-----------------|
| 1  | Weasel          |
| 2  | Giant rat       |
| 3  | Badger          |
| 4  | Boar            |
| 5  | Panther         |
| 6  | Giant badger    |
| 7  | Dire wolf       |
| 8  | Giant elk       |

**Bolsa de trucos herrumbre (tabla)**

| d8 | Criatura    |
|----|-------------|
| 1  | Rat         |
| 2  | Owl         |
| 3  | Mastiff     |
| 4  | Goat        |
| 5  | Giant goat  |
| 6  | Giant boar  |
| 7  | Lion        |
| 8  | Brown bear  |

**Bolsa de trucos tostada (tabla)**

| d8 | Criatura      |
|----|---------------|
| 1  | Jackal        |
| 2  | Ape           |
| 3  | Baboon        |
| 4  | Axe beak      |
| 5  | Black bear    |
| 6  | Giant weasel  |
| 7  | Giant hyena   |
| 8  | Tiger         |

name: Bag of Tricks
desc:
This seemingly empty cloth bag comes in several colors and has a small, fuzzy object inside. 

You can use an action to pull a fuzzy object from the bag and throw it up to 20 pies. Upon landing, it becomes a criatura determined by a roll on the Bag of Tricks table (depending on the bag’s color). 

The resulting criatura is friendly to you and any companions you have. It acts on your turn, during which you can use a acción adicional to give it simple commands such as “attack that criatura” or “move over there”. If the criatura dies or if you use the bag again, it disappears without a trace. After the first use each day, there is a 50% chance that a criatura from the bag is hostile instead of friendly and obedient.

Once you have used the bag three times, you cannot do so again until the next dawn.

__**Table: Bags of Tricks**__
| Blue bag of tricks (uncommon; cost 400 gp) |                     | Gray bag of tricks (uncommon; cost 350 gp) |                | Green bag of tricks (rare; cost 800 gp) |                   | Rust bag of tricks (uncommon; cost 400 gp**)** |              | Tan bag of tricks (uncommon; cost 300 gp) |                |
| ------------------------------------------ | ------------------- | ------------------------------------------ | -------------- | --------------------------------------- | ----------------- | ---------------------------------------------- | ------------ | ----------------------------------------- | -------------- |
| **d8**                                     | **Creatu**re        | d8                                         | **criatura**   | **d8**                                  | **criatura**      | **d8**                                         | **criatura** | **d8**                                    | **criatura**   |
| 1                                          | _Quipper_           | 1                                          | _Weasel_       | 1                                       | _Giant Crocodile_ | 1                                              | _Rat_        | 1                                         | _Jackal_       |
| 2                                          | _Octopus_           | 2                                          | _Giant rat_    | 2                                       | _Allosaurus_      | 2                                              | _Owl_        | 2                                         | _Ape_          |
| 3                                          | _Seahorse_          | 3                                          | _Badger_       | 3                                       | _Ankylosaurus_    | 3                                              | _Mastiff_    | 3                                         | _Baboon_       |
| 4                                          | _Hunter Shark_      | 4                                          | _Boar_         | 4                                       | _Raptor_          | 4                                              | _Goat_       | 4                                         | _Axe Beak_     |
| 5                                          | _Swarm of quippers_ | 5                                          | _Panther_      | 5                                       | _Giant lizard_    | 5                                              | _Giant Goat_ | 5                                         | _Black Bear_   |
| 6                                          | _Reef shark_        | 6                                          | _Giant Badger_ | 6                                       | _Triceratops_     | 6                                              | _Giant Boar_ | 6                                         | _Giant Weasel_ |
| 7                                          | _Giant Seahorse_    | 7                                          | _Dire Wolf_    | 7                                       | _Plesiosaurus_    | 7                                              | _Lion_       | 7                                         | _Giant Hyena_  |
| 8                                          | _Giant Octopus_     | 8                                          | _Giant Elk_    | 8                                       | _Pteranodon_      | 8                                              | _Brown Bear_ | 8                                         | _Tiger_        |

name: Bagpipes of Battle
desc: Inspire friends and strike fear in the hearts of your enemigos with the drone of valor and the shrill call of martial might! You must be proficient with wind instruments to use these bagpipes. You can use an action to play them and create a fearsome and inspiring tune. Each aliado within 60 pies of you that can hear the tune gains a d12 Bardic Inspiration die for 10 minutos. cada criatura within 60 pies of you that can hear the tune and that is hostile to you debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be asustado of you for 1 minuto. A hostile criatura has desventaja on this tirada de salvación if it is within 5 pies of you or your aliado. A asustado criatura must take the Dash action and move away from you by the safest available route on each of its turns, unless there is nowhere to move. A asustado criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito. Once used, the bagpipes can't be used in this way again until the next dawn.

name: Baleful Wardrums
desc: You must be proficient with percussion instruments to use these drums. The drums have 3 charges. You can use an action to play them and expend 1 charge to create a baleful rumble. cada criatura of your choice within 60 pies of you that hears you play debe tener éxito en a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or have desventaja on its next weapon or ataque de conjuro roll. A criatura that succeeds on its tirada de salvación is immune to the effect of these drums for 24 horas. The drum regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Band of Iron Thorns
desc: This black iron armband bristles with long, needle-sharp iron thorns. When you attune to the armband, the thorns bite into your flesh. The armband doesn't function unless the thorns pierce your skin and are able to alcance your blood. While wearing the band, after you roll a tirada de salvación but before the GM reveals if the roll is a success or failure, you can use your reacción to expend one Hit Die. Roll the die, and add the number rolled to your tirada de salvación.

name: Band of Restraint
desc: These simple leather straps are nearly unbreakable when used as restraints. If you spend 1 minuto tying a Small or Medium criatura's limbs with these straps, the criatura is apresado (escape CD 17) until it escapes or until you speak a command word to release the straps. While apresado by these straps, the objetivo has desventaja on Fuerza checks.

name: Bandana of Brachiation
desc: While wearing this bright yellow bandana, you have a escalando Velocidad of 30 pies, and you gain a +5 bonus to Fuerza (Atletismo) and Destreza (Acrobacias) checks to jump over obstacles, to land on your pies, and to land safely on a breakable or unstable surface, such as a tree branch or rotting wooden rafters.

name: Bandana of Bravado
desc: While wearing this bright red bandana, you have ventaja on Carisma (Intimidación) checks and on tirada de salvacións against being asustado.

name: Banner of the Fortunate
desc: While holding this banner aloft with one hand, you can use an action to inspire criaturas nearby. cada criatura of your choice within 60 pies of you that can see the banner has ventaja on its next tirada de ataque. The banner can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Barbed Devil’s Bracelet
desc:
The hand on which you wear this bracelet transforms into a claw covered with a dozen wicked spines. Your unarmed attacks with the claw deal 1d6 daño perforante, and you gain an expertise die on Juego de Manos checks made to steal small items. Your hand returns to normal if you remove the bracelet. 

As an action, you can draw upon the claw’s magic to cast __produce flame_ . Whenever you use the claw in this way, one of the bracelet’s spines disappears and your punto de golpe maximum is reduced by 1d8\. This reduction lasts until you finish a _long rest_ . If this effect reduces your punto de golpe maximum to 0, you die and your body permanently transforms into a _barbed devil_ . When the bracelet has no more spines it becomes a mundane item.

name: Barrow Bread
desc: Barrow bread is made from mashing together plantains and starches that are grown in the tropical barrows. While this viscous, starchy paste is not actually a bread, it perfectly preserves and maintains the temperature of any food tucked inside it for up to a week, protecting and preserving 1 Supply. The magic is contained in the plantain leaves that are wrapped around the barrow bread. Once unwrapped, the barrow bread itself can be consumed (as 1 Supply) within 15 minutos before the outside elements spoil it.

name: Battle Standard of Passage
desc: This battle standard hangs from a 4-pie-long pole and bears the colors and heraldry of a long-forgotten nation. You can use an action to plant the pole in the ground, causing the standard to whip and wave as if in a breeze. Choose up to six criaturas within 30 pies of the standard, which can include yourself. no mágico difficult terrain costs the criaturas you chose no extra movement. In addition, cada criatura you chose can pass through no mágico plants without being slowed by them and without taking damage from them if they have thorns, spines, or a similar hazard. The standard stops waving and the effect ends after 10 minutos, or when a criatura uses an action to pull the pole from the ground. The standard can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Bead of Exsanguination
desc: This small, black bead measures 3/4 of an inch in diameter and weights an ounce. Typically, 1d4 + 1 beads of exsanguination are found together. When arrojadiza, the bead absorbs puntos de golpe from criaturas near its impact site, damaging them. A bead can store up to 50 puntos de golpe at a time. When found, a bead contains 2d10 stored puntos de golpe. You can use an action to throw the bead up to 60 pies. cada criatura within a 20-pie radius of where the bead landed debe realizar a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Constitución, taking 3d6 daño necrótico en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one. The bead stores puntos de golpe equal to the daño necrótico dealt. The bead turns from black to crimson the more puntos de golpe are stored in it. If the bead absorbs 50 puntos de golpe or more, it explodes and is destroyed. cada criatura within a 20-pie radius of the bead when it explodes debe realizar a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Destreza, taking 6d6 daño necrótico en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one. If you are holding the bead, you can use a acción adicional to determine if the bead is below or above half its maximum stored puntos de golpe. If you hold and study the bead over the course of 1 hora, which can be done during a descanso corto, you know exactly how many puntos de golpe are stored in the bead.

name: Bead of Force
desc:
Esta pequeña esfera negra mide aproximadamente 2 cm de diámetro y pesa unos 28 gramos. Por lo general, se encuentran juntas 1d4 + 4 _beads of force_.

Puedes usar una acción para lanzar la cuenta hasta 18m. La cuenta explota al impactar y queda destruida. Toda criatura en un radio de 3m desde el punto de impacto debe superar una tirada de salvación de Destreza CD 15 o recibir 5d4 de daño de fuerza. A continuación, una esfera de fuerza transparente encierra el área durante 1 minuto. Cualquier criatura que haya fallado la tirada de salvación y se encuentre completamente dentro del área queda atrapada en el interior de la esfera. Las criaturas que hayan superado la tirada, o que se encuentren parcialmente dentro del área, son empujadas desde el centro de la esfera hasta quedar fuera de ella. Solo el aire respirable puede atravesar la pared de la esfera; ningún ataque ni otro efecto puede hacerlo.

Una criatura atrapada puede usar su acción para empujar contra la pared de la esfera, desplazándola hasta la mitad de su velocidad de movimiento. La esfera puede recogerse, y su magia hace que pese solo 500 gramos, independientemente del peso de las criaturas que contenga en su interior.

name: Bead of Force
desc:
This sphere of black glass is ¾ an inch in diameter and can be arrojadiza up to 60 pies as an action. On impact it creates a 10-pie radius explosion. criaturas in the area make a CD 15 Destreza _tirada de salvación_ , taking 5d4 daño de fuerza en un fallo. A sphere of fuerza then encloses the same area for 1 minuto. Any criatura that is completely in the area and fails its save is trapped within the sphere. criaturas that succeed on the save or that are only partially within the area are pushed away from the point of impact until they are outside the sphere instead. 

The wall of the sphere only allows air to pass, stopping all other attacks and effects. A criatura inside the sphere can use its action to push against the sides of the sphere, moving up to half its Velocidad. The sphere only weighs 1 pound if lifted, regardless of the weight of the criaturas inside.

name: Bead of Tracking
desc: This miniature bead is covered with hundreds of small hooks. When you use an action to place it on a criatura’s clothing or hide, the bead hangs there imperceptibly and creates a bond between you and the criatura. You gain an expertise die on checks made to track the criatura while the bead remains on it. To place the bead during combat without being noticed, you debe tener éxito en a Destreza (Juego de Manos) check against the criatura’s maneuver CD (or when outside of combat, the criatura’s passive Percepción).

name: Beads of Contemplation
desc:
This strand of eight wooden beads, each cleverly carved with geometric patterns, hangs from a stout length of cording. The beads store ki energy placed into them, holding the ki until you use it. The beads can store up to 8 ki points. At the end of a short or descanso largo, you can place ki energy into the beads by touching them and expending a number of ki points equal to half your competencia bonus.
While wearing or carrying the beads, you can use a acción adicional to remove any number of ki points from the beads, regaining that amount of ki points and freeing up space in the beads.

name: Bear Paws
desc: These hand wraps are made of flexible beeswax that ooze sticky honey. While wearing these gloves, you have ventaja on grapple checks. In addition, criaturas agarrado by you have desventaja on any checks made to escape your grapple.

name: Bed of Spikes
desc: This wide, wooden plank holds hundreds of two-inch long needle-like spikes. When you finish a descanso largo on the bed, you have resistance to daño perforante and ventaja on Constitución tirada de salvacións to maintain your Concentración on spells you cast for 8 horas or until you finish a short or descanso largo. Once used, the bed can't be used again until the next dusk.

name: Belt of Dwarvenkind
desc:
Mientras llevas este cinturón, obtienes los siguientes beneficios:

* Tu puntuación de Constitución aumenta en 2, hasta un máximo de 20.
* Tienes ventaja en las pruebas de Carisma (Persuasión) realizadas para interactuar con enanos.

Además, mientras estás sintonizado con el cinturón, tienes un 50 por ciento de probabilidades cada día al amanecer de que te crezca una barba completa si eres capaz de tenerla, o una barba visiblemente más tupida si ya la tienes.

Si no eres un enano, obtienes los siguientes beneficios adicionales mientras llevas el cinturón:

* Tienes ventaja en las tiradas de salvación contra el veneno y resistencia al daño por veneno.
* Tienes visión en la oscuridad con un alcance de 18m.
* Puedes hablar, leer y escribir en Dwarvish.

name: Belt of Dwarvenkind
desc:
While wearing this belt, you gain the following benefits:

* Your Constitución score increases by 2, to a maximum of 20.
* _Advantage_  on Carisma (Persuasión) checks made against dwarves.
* _Advantage_  on tirada de salvacións against veneno, and resistance to daño de veneno.
* visión en la oscuridad to a range of 60 pies.
* The ability to speak, read, sign, and write Enano.

In addition, while you are attuned to this belt there is a 50% chance at dawn each day that you grow a full beard (or a noticeably thicker beard if you have one already).

name: Belt of Giant Strength
desc:
Mientras llevas este cinturón, tu puntuación de Fuerza cambia a la puntuación que otorga el cinturón. Si tu Fuerza ya es igual o superior a la puntuación del cinturón, el objeto no tiene ningún efecto sobre ti.

Existen seis variedades de este cinturón, cada una correspondiente a uno de los seis tipos de gigantes verdaderos y con una rareza acorde a ellos. El _belt of stone giant strength_ y el _belt of frost giant strength_ tienen un aspecto diferente, pero el mismo efecto.

| Tipo                      | Fuerza | Rareza          |
|---------------------------|--------|-----------------|
| Gigante de las colinas    | 21     | Poco común      |
| Gigante de piedra/hielo   | 23     | Muy poco común  |
| Gigante del fuego         | 25     | Muy poco común  |
| Gigante de las nubes      | 27     | Legendario      |
| Gigante de las tormentas  | 29     | Legendario      |

name: Belt of Giant Strength
desc:
Braided rope made of hair from the same kind of Gigante as the belt to be made

Wearing this belt increases your Fuerza score to the score granted by the belt. It has no effect if your Fuerza is equal to or greater than the belt’s score.

Each variety of belt corresponds with a different kind of Gigante.

__**Table: Belts of Gigante Fuerza**__
| **Type**                  | **Fuerza** | **Rarity** | **Cost**   |
| ------------------------- | ------------ | ---------- | ---------- |
| _Hill giant_              | 20           | Rare       | 4,000 gp   |
| _Frost_  or _stone giant_ | 23           | Very rare  | 9,000 gp   |
| _Fire giant_              | 25           | Very rare  | 20,000 gp  |
| _Cloud giant_             | 27           | Legendary  | 55,000 gp  |
| _Storm giant_             | 29           | Legendary  | 150,000 gp |

name: Belt of the Wilds
desc: This thin cord is made from animal sinew. While wearing the cord, you have ventaja on Sabiduría (Supervivencia) checks to follow tracks left by beasts, giants, and humanoids. While wearing the belt, you can use a acción adicional to speak the belt's command word. If you do, you leave tracks of the animal of your choice instead of your regular tracks. These tracks can be those of a Large or smaller beast with a CR of 1 or lower, such as a pony, rabbit, or lion. If you repeat the command word, you end the effect.

name: Berserker Axe
desc:
Obtienes un bonificador +1 a las tiradas de ataque y de daño realizadas con esta arma mágica. Además, mientras estás sintonizado con esta arma, tu máximo de puntos de golpe aumenta en 1 por cada nivel que hayas alcanzado.

**_Maldición_**. Esta hacha está maldita, y sintonizarte con ella extiende la maldición a ti. Mientras permanezcas maldito, eres incapaz de separarte del hacha y la mantienes a tu alcance en todo momento. Además, tienes desventaja en las tiradas de ataque con armas que no sean esta, a menos que no haya ningún enemigo a 18m o menos de ti que puedas ver u oír.

Siempre que una criatura hostil te inflija daño mientras el hacha está en tu posesión, debes superar una tirada de salvación de Sabiduría CD 15 o entrar en berserker. Mientras estás en ese estado, debes usar tu acción cada ronda para atacar con el hacha a la criatura más cercana a ti. Si puedes realizar ataques adicionales como parte de la acción de Atacar, los usas para atacar a la siguiente criatura más cercana una vez que hayas derribado a tu objetivo actual. Si hay varios objetivos posibles, atacas a uno al azar. Permaneces en berserker hasta que comiences tu turno sin ninguna criatura a 18m o menos de ti que puedas ver u oír.

name: Berserker Axe
desc:
You gain +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic axe, and while you are attuned to it your punto de golpe maximum is increased by 1 for each level you have attained. 

**Curse.** After you attune to this axe you are unwilling to part with it, keeping it within alcance at all times. In addition, you have _disadvantage_  on attack rolls with weapons other than this one unless the nearest foe you are aware of is 60 pies or more away from you.

In addition, when you are damaged by a hostile criatura you make a CD 15 Sabiduría _tirada de salvación_  or go berserk. While berserk, on your turn each ronda you move to the nearest criatura and take the Attack action against it, moving to attack the next nearest criatura after you _incapacitate_  your current objetivo. When there is more than one possible objetivo, you randomly determine which to attack. You continue to be berserk until there are no criaturas you can see or hear within 60 pies of you at the start of your turn.

name: Berserker's Kilt
desc: This kilt is made from bear, elk, or wolf fur. While wearing this kilt, your Unarmored Defense increases by 1, and you gain additional benefits while raging, depending on the type of kilt you are wearing. Bear Fur (Very Rare). This kilt empowers your rage with the vigor of a bear. When you enter a rage, you gain 20 temporary puntos de golpe. These temporary puntos de golpe last until your rage ends. Elk Fur (Rare). This kilt empowers your rage with the nimble ferocity of an elk. While raging, if you move at least 30 pies straight toward a objetivo and then hit it with a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo con arma on the same turn, the objetivo recibe an extra 1d6 damage of the weapon’s type. Wolf Fur (Uncommon). This kilt empowers your rage with the Velocidad of a wolf. While raging, your walking Velocidad increases by 10 pies.

name: Bicycle Bell of Flight
desc:
This beautifully-filigreed bell can turn into a mundane bicycle of Small or Medium size (chosen at the time of creation) when you activate it as an action. Returning the bicycle to bell form also requires an action.

While riding this bicycle, you can ring its bell to gain a volando Velocidad of 50 pies and the ability to hover. You can use the bike to fly for 2 horas, expending at least 10 minutos worth of time with each use. If you are volando when the time runs out, you fall at a rate of 60 pies and take no damage from landing. The bell regains 1 hora of volando time for every 12 horas it is not in use, regardless of which form it is in.

**_Curse._** While far from malicious, the magic of the bell is exuberant to a fault. While you are using its volando Velocidad it frequently rings of its own accord, giving you _disadvantage_  on Sigilo checks.

name: Big Dipper
desc: This wooden rod is topped with a ridged ball. The rod has 7 charges for the following properties. It regains 1d6 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the rod's last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the rod melts into a pool of no mágico honey and is destroyed. Anytime you expend 1 or more charges for this rod's properties, the ridged ball flows with delicious, no mágico honey for 1 minuto.

name: Binding Oath
desc: This lengthy scroll is the testimony of a pious individual's adherence to their faith. The author has emphatically rewritten these claims many times, and its two slim, metal rollers are wrapped in yards of parchment. When you attune to the item, you rewrite certain passages to align with your own religious views. You can use an action to throw the scroll at a Huge or smaller criatura you can see within 30 pies of you. Make a ataque a distancia roll. On a hit, the scroll unfurls and wraps around the criatura. The objetivo is apresado until you take a acción adicional to command the scroll to release the criatura. If you command it to release the criatura or if you miss with the attack, the scroll curls back into a rolled-up scroll. If the apresado objetivo's alignment is the opposite of yours along the law/chaos or good/evil axis, you can use a acción adicional to cause the writing to blaze with ligera, dealing 2d6 daño radiante to the objetivo. A criatura, including the apresado objetivo, can use an action to make a CD 17 Fuerza check to tear apart the scroll. en un éxito, the scroll is destroyed. Such an attempt causes the writing to blaze with ligera, dealing 2d6 daño radiante to both the criatura making the attempt and the apresado objetivo, whether or not the attempt is successful. Alternatively, the apresado criatura can use an action to make a CD 17 Destreza check to slip free of the scroll. This action also triggers el daño effect, but it doesn't destroy the scroll. Once used, the scroll can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Birdsong Whistle
desc:
This carving of reddish soapstone resembles a miniature cardinal. When air is blown through the lower back high-pitched sounds are emitted through the bird’s open beak. When the whistle is blown the sounds of songbirds are heard by todas las criaturas in a 100-pie radius. These calls are indistinguishable from actual birds singing. 

Alternatively, you can use an action to break the whistle to summon a large flock of birds that appear at the start of your next turn and surround you in a 10-pie radius. The flock moves with you and makes you _heavily obscured_  from criaturas more than 10 pies away for 1 minuto, or until the flock recibe 10 or more damage from area effects.

name: Bituminous Orb
desc: A tarlike substance leaks continually from this orb, which radiates a cloying darkness and emanates an unnatural chill. While attuned to the orb, you have visión en la oscuridad out to a range of 60 pies. In addition, you have immunity to daño necrótico, and you have ventaja on tirada de salvacións against spells and effects that deal daño radiante. This orb has 6 charges and regains 1d6 daily at dawn. You can expend 1 charge as an action to lob some of the orb's viscous darkness at a criatura you can see within 60 pies of you. The objetivo debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Destreza or be agarrado (escape CD 15). Until this grapple ends, the criatura is cegado and recibe 2d8 daño necrótico at the start of each of its turns, and you can use a acción adicional to move the agarrado criatura up to 20 pies in any direction. You can't move the criatura more than 60 pies away from the orb. Alternatively, you can use an action to expend 2 charges and crush the agarrado criatura. The criatura debe realizar a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Constitución, taking 6d8 daño contundente en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one. You can end the grapple at any time (no action required). The orb's power can grapple only una criatura at a time.

name: Black and White Daggers
desc: These matched daggers are identical except for the stones set in their pommels. One pommel is chalcedony (opaque white), the other is obsidian (opaque black). You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls with both magic weapons. The bonus increases to +3 when you use the white dagger to attack a monstrosity, and it increases to +3 when you use the black dagger to attack an undead. When you hit a monstrosity or undead with both daggers in the same turn, that criatura recibe an extra 1d6 daño perforante from the second attack.

name: Black Dragon Oil
desc: The viscous green-black oil within this mágico ceramic pot bubbles slightly. The pot's stone stopper is sealed with greasy, dark wax. The pot contains 5 ounces of pure black dragon essence, obtained by slowly boiling the dragon in its own acidic secretions. You can use an action to apply 1 ounce of the oil to a weapon or single piece of munición. The next attack made with that weapon or munición causa an extra 2d8 daño de ácido to the objetivo. A criatura that recibe the daño de ácido debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Constitución at the start of its next turn or be burned for an extra 2d8 daño de ácido.

name: Black Phial
desc: This black stone phial has a tightly fitting stopper and 3 charges. As an action, you can fill the phial with blood taken from a living, or recently deceased (dead no longer than 1 minuto), humanoid and expend 1 charge. When you do so, the black phial transforms the blood into a potion of greater healing. A criatura who drinks this potion debe tener éxito en a CD 12 tirada de salvación de Constitución or be envenenado for 1 hora. The phial regains 1d3 expended charges daily at midnight. If you expend the phial's last charge, roll a d20: 1d20. On a 1, the phial crumbles into dust and is destroyed.

name: Blackbird Pie
desc: This item appears to be a freshly baked pie in a tin. When the crust is fully punctured the pie explodes as 24 magic blackbirds fly out and flit through the air in a 20-pie radius for 2d4 rondas, at which point the birds and the pie disappear. A criatura that starts its turn in the area or first enters into the area on its turn makes a CD 15 Destreza _tirada de salvación_ , taking 1 daño cortante en un fallo. A criatura damaged by the blackbirds has _disadvantage_  on ability checks and _attack rolls_  until the beginning of its next turn. The blackbirds are mágico and cannot be interacted with like normal animals, and attacking them has no effect.

name: Blackguard's Blade
desc: You have ventaja on attack rolls made with this weapon against a objetivo if another enemigo of the objetivo is within 5 pies of it, and it has no aliados within 5 pies of it.

name: Blacktooth
desc: This black ivory, rune-carved wand has 7 charges. It regains 1d6 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast the guiding bolt spell from it, using an attack bonus of +7. For 1 charge, you cast the 1st-level version of the spell. You can increase the espacio de conjuro level by one for each additional charge you expend.

name: Blade of Petals
desc: You gain a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. This brightly-colored shortsword is kept in a wooden scabbard with eternally blooming flowers. The blade is made of dull green steel, and its pommel is fashioned from hard rosewood. As a acción adicional, you can conjure a flowery mist which fills a 20-pie area around you with pleasant-smelling perfume. The scent dissipates after 1 minuto. A criatura damaged by the blade debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Carisma or be hechizado by you until the end of its next turn. A criatura can't be hechizado this way more than once every 24 horas.

name: Blade of the Dervish
desc: This magic scimitar is empowered by your movements. For every 10 pies you move before making an attack, you gain a +1 bonus to the attack and damage rolls of that attack, and the scimitar causa an extra 1d6 daño cortante if the attack hits (maximum of +3 and 3d6). In addition, if you use the Dash action and move within 5 pies of a criatura, you can attack that criatura as a acción adicional. On a hit, the objetivo recibe an extra 2d6 daño cortante.

name: Blade of the Temple Guardian
desc: This simple but elegant shortsword is a magic weapon. When you are wielding it and use the Flurry of Blows class feature, you can make your bonus attacks with the sword rather than unarmed strikes. If you deal damage to a criatura with this weapon and reduce it to 0 puntos de golpe, you absorb some of its energy, regaining 1 expended ki point.

name: Blasphemous Writ
desc: The Infernal runes inscribed upon this vellum scroll radiate a faint, crimson glow. When you use this spell scroll of command, the save CD is 15 instead of 13, and you can also affect objetivos that are undead or that don't understand your language.

name: Blessed Pauper's Purse
desc: This worn cloth purse appears empty, even when opened, yet seems to always have enough copper pieces in it to make any purchase of urgent necessity when you dig inside. The purse produces enough copper pieces to provide for a poor lifestyle. In addition, if anyone asks you for charity, you can always open the purse to find 1 or 2 cp available to give away. These coins appear only if you truly intend to gift them to one who asks.

name: Blinding Lantern
desc: This ornate brass lantern comes fitted with heavily inscribed plates shielding the cut crystal lens. With a flick of a lever, as an action, the plates rise and unleash a dazzling array of lights at a single objetivo within 30 pies. You must use two hands to direct the lights precisely into the eyes of a foe. The objetivo debe tener éxito en a CD 11 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be cegado until the end of its next turn. A criatura cegado by the lantern is immune to its effects for 1 minuto afterward. This property can't be used in a brightly lit area. By opening the shutter on the opposite side, the device functions as a normal bullseye lantern, yet illuminates magically, requiring no fuel and giving off no heat.

name: Blood Mark
desc: Used as a form of currency between undead lords and the humanoids of their lands, this coin resembles a gold ring with a single hole in the center. It holds 1 charge, visible as a red glow in the center of the coin. While holding the coin, you can use an action to expend 1 charge and regain 1d3 puntos de golpe. At the same time, the humanoid who pledged their blood to the coin recibe daño necrótico and reduces their punto de golpe maximum by an equal amount. This reduction lasts until the criatura finishes a descanso largo. It dies if this reduces its punto de golpe maximum to 0. You can expend the charges in up to 5 blood marks as part of the same action. To replenish an expended charge in a blood mark, a humanoid must pledge a pint of their blood in a 10-minuto ritual that involves letting a drop of their blood fall through the center of the coin. The drop disappears in the process and the center fills with a red glow. There is no limit to how much blood a humanoid may pledge, but each coin can hold only 1 charge. To pledge more, the humanoid must perform the ritual on another blood mark. Any person foolish enough to pledge more than a single blood coin might find the coins all redeemed at once, since such redemptions often happen at great blood feasts held by vampires and other undead.

name: Blood Pearl
desc: This crimson pearl feels slick to the touch and contains a mote of blood imbued with malign purpose. As an action, you can break the pearl, destroying it, and conjure a Blood Elemental (see criatura Codex) for 1 hora. The elemental is friendly to you and your companions for the duration. Roll initiative for the elemental, which has its own turns. It obeys any verbal commands that you issue to it (no action required by you). If you don't issue any commands to the elemental, it defends itself from hostile criaturas but otherwise recibe no actions.

name: Blood-Soaked Hide
desc: A criatura that starts its turn in your space debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Constitución or lose 3d6 puntos de golpe due to blood loss, and you regain a number of puntos de golpe equal to half the number of puntos de golpe the criatura lost. Constructs and undead who aren't vampires are immune to this effect. Once used, you can't use this property of the armor again until the next dawn.

name: Bloodbow
desc: This longbow is carved of a ligera, sturdy wood such as hickory or yew, and it is almost always stained a deep maroon hue, lacquered and aged under layers of sundried blood. The bow is sometimes decorated with reptilian teeth, centaur tails, or other battle trophies. The bow is designed to harm the particular type of criatura whose blood most recently soaked the weapon. When you make a ataque a distancia roll with this magic weapon against a criatura of that type, you have a +1 bonus to the attack and damage rolls. If the attack hits, the objetivo debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or become enraged until the end of your next turn. While enraged, the objetivo suffers a random short-term madness.

name: Blooddrinker Spear
desc: Prized by gnolls, the upper haft of this spear is decorated with tiny animal skulls, feathers, and other adornments. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls with this magic weapon. When you hit a criatura with this spear, you mark that criatura for 1 hora. Until the mark ends, you deal an extra 1d6 damage to the objetivo whenever you hit it with the spear, and you have ventaja on any Sabiduría (Percepción) or Sabiduría (Supervivencia) check you make to find the objetivo. If the objetivo drops to 0 puntos de golpe, the mark ends. This property can't be used on a different criatura until you spend a descanso corto cleaning the previous objetivo's blood from the spear.

name: Bloodfuel Weapon
desc: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. The first time you attack with the weapon on each of your turns, you can spend one or more Hit Dice, up to your maximum Hit Dice. For each Hit Die spent in this way, you roll the die and add your Constitución modifier to it. You lose puntos de golpe equal to the total, and the objetivo recibe extra daño necrótico equal to the total. You can't use this feature of the weapon if you don't have blood. Hit Dice spent using this weapon's feature can't be used to regain puntos de golpe during a descanso corto. You regain spent Hit Dice as normal.

name: Bloodiron Band
desc:
The Bloodiron Band gleams a metallic crimson and is set with dozens of spikes on the inside so that it pierces the skin as it closes on the forearm during attunement.

Wearing this band increases your Fuerza to 20\. It has no effect if your Fuerza is equal to or greater than 20.

**_Curse._** Because of the horrific materials required in its construction, each band comes with a terrible cost. While attuned to the bloodiron band, your maximum puntos de golpe are reduced by a number equal to twice your level. Additionally, at the start of your turn, if another criatura within 15 pies of you is _bloodied_ , you debe realizar a CD 15 Sabiduría _tirada de salvación_  (gaining _advantage_  if the criatura is an aliado). en un fallo, you must attempt to move to a space within alcance and take the attack action against that criatura.

name: Bloodlink Potion
desc: When you and another willing criatura each drink at least half this potion, your life energies are linked for 1 hora. When you or the criatura who drank the potion with you take damage while your life energies are linked, the total damage is divided equally between you. If el daño is an odd number, roll randomly to assign the extra point of damage. The effect is halted while you and the other criatura are separated by more than 60 pies. The effect ends if either of you drop to 0 puntos de golpe. This potion's red liquid is viscous and has a metallic taste.

name: Bloodpearl Bracelet
desc:
This silver or gold bracelet features three red pearls. You can use an action to remove a pearl and throw it up to 20 pies. When the pearl lands, it transforms into an ooze you determine by rolling a d6 and consulting the table that corresponds to the bracelet's color. The ooze vanishes at the next dawn or when it is reduced to 0 puntos de golpe. When you throw a pearl, your punto de golpe maximum is reduced by the amount listed in the Blood Price column. This reduction can't be removed with the greater restoration spell or similar magic and lasts until the ooze vanishes or is reduced to 0 puntos de golpe. The ooze is friendly to you and your companions and acts on your turn. You can use a acción adicional to command how the criatura moves and what action it recibe on its turn, or to give it general orders, such as to attack your enemigos. In the absence of such orders, the ooze acts in a fashion appropriate to its Naturaleza. Once all three pearls have been used, the bracelet can't be used again until the next dawn when the pearls regrow. | d6 | Ooze | CR | Blood Price |
| --- | --------------------------- | --- | ---------------- |
| 1 | Dipsa | 1/4 | 5 HP |
| 2 | Treacle | 1/4 | 5 HP |
| 3 | Gray Ooze | 1/2 | 5 HP |
| 4 | Alchemy Apprentice Ooze | 1 | 7 ( 2d6) |
| 5 | Suppurating Ooze | 1 | 7 ( 2d6) |
| 6 | Gelatinous Cube | 2 | 10 ( 3d6) | | d6 | Ooze | CR | Blood Price |
| --- | ----------------------- | --- | ---------------- |
| 1 | Philosopher's Ghost | 4 | 17 ( 5d6) |
| 2 | Ink Guardian Ooze | 4 | 17 ( 5d6) |
| 3 | Black Pudding | 4 | 17 ( 5d6) |
| 4 | Corrupting Ooze | 5 | 21 ( 6d6) |
| 5 | Blood Ooze | 6 | 24 ( 7d6) |
| 6 | Ruby ooze | 6 | 24 ( 7d6) |

name: Bloodprice Armor
desc: When a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo would hit you while you are wearing this armor, you can use your reacción to increase your Clase de Armadura by up to 10 against that attack. If you do so, you lose puntos de golpe equal to 5 times the bonus you want to add to your AC. For example, if you want to increase your AC by 2 against that attack, you lose 10 puntos de golpe.

name: Bloodspeed Elixir
desc: When you drink this potion, your Velocidad triples for 1 minuto, but if you take the Dash action, you take 2d6 daño de veneno as your body is pushed beyond its normal limits. The murky, crimson liquid smells of ozone and has a thick, sludge-like consistency.

name: Bloodthirsty Weapon
desc: This magic weapon bears long, branching channels inscribed into its blade or head, and it gives off a coppery scent. When you damage a criatura that has blood with this weapon, it loses an additional 2d6 puntos de golpe from blood loss.

name: Bloodwhisper Cauldron
desc: This ancient, oxidized cauldron sits on three stubby legs and has images of sacrifice and ritual cast into its iron sides. When filled with concoctions that contain blood, the bubbling cauldron seems to whisper secrets of ancient power to those bold enough to listen. While filled with blood, the cauldron has the following properties. Once filled, the cauldron can't be refilled again until the next dawn.

name: Bludgeon of Nightmares
desc: You gain a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this weapon. The weapon appears to be a mace of disruption, and an identify spell reveals it to be such. The first time you use this weapon to kill a criatura that has an Inteligencia score of 5 or higher, you begin having nightmares and disturbing visions that disrupt your rest. Each time you complete a descanso largo, you debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. The CD equals 10 + the total number of criaturas with Inteligencia 5 or higher that you've reduced to 0 puntos de golpe with this weapon. en un fallo, you gain no benefits from that descanso largo, and you gain one level of agotamiento.

name: Blue Rose
desc:
The petals of this cerulean flower can be prepared into a compote and consumed. A single flower can make 3 doses. When you consume a dose, your Inteligencia, Sabiduría, and Carisma scores are reduced by 1 each. This reduction lasts until you finish a descanso largo. You can consume up to three doses as part of casting a spell, and you can choose to affect your spell with one of the following options for each dose you consumed: - If the spell is of the abjuration school, increase the save CD by 2.
- If the spell has more powerful effects when cast at a higher level, treat the spell's effects as if you had cast the spell at one slot level higher than the espacio de conjuro you used.
- The spell is affected by one of the following metamagic options, even if you aren't a sorcerer: heightened, quickened, or subtle. A spell can't be affected by the same option more than once, though you can affect one spell with up to three different options. If you consume one or more doses without casting a spell, you can choose to instead affect a spell you cast before you finish a descanso largo. In addition, consuming blue rose gives you some protection against spells. When a spellcaster you can see casts a spell, you can use your reacción to cause one of the following:
- You have ventaja on the tirada de salvación against the spell if it is a spell of the abjuration school.
- If the spell is counterspell or dispel magic, the CD increases by 2 to interrupt your spellcasting or to end a magic effect on you. You can use this reacción a number of times equal to the number of doses you consumed. At the end of each descanso largo, you debe realizar a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Constitución. en una salvación fallida, your Hit Dice maximum is reduced by 25 percent. This reduction affects only the number of Hit Dice you can use to regain puntos de golpe during a descanso corto; it doesn't reduce your punto de golpe maximum. This reduction lasts until you recover from the addiction. If you have no remaining Hit Dice to lose, you suffer one level of agotamiento, and your Hit Dice are returned to 75 percent of your maximum Hit Dice. The process then repeats until you die from agotamiento or you recover from the addiction. en una salvación exitosa, your agotamiento level decreases by one level. If a successful tirada de salvación reduces your level of agotamiento below 1, you recover from the addiction. A greater restoration spell or similar magic ends the addiction and its effects. Consuming at least one dose of blue rose again halts the effects of the addiction for 2 days, at which point you can consume another dose of blue rose to halt it again or the effects of the addiction continue as normal.

name: Blue Willow Cloak
desc: This ligera cloak of fey silk is waterproof. While wearing this cloak in the rain, you can use your action to pull up the hood and become invisible for up to 1 hora. The effect ends early if you attack or cast a spell, if you use an action to pull down the hood, or if the rain stops. The cloak can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Bone Whip
desc: This whip is constructed of humanoid vertebrae with their edges magically sharpened and pointed. The bones are joined together into a coiled line by strands of steel wire. The handle is half a femur wrapped in soft leather of tanned humanoid skin. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls with this weapon. You can use an action to cause fiendish energy to coat the whip. For 1 minuto, you gain 5 temporary puntos de golpe the first time you hit a criatura on each turn. In addition, when you deal damage to a criatura with this weapon, the criatura debe tener éxito en a CD 17 tirada de salvación de Constitución or its punto de golpe maximum is reduced by an amount equal to el daño dealt. This reduction lasts until the criatura finishes a descanso largo. Once used, this property of the whip can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Bonebreaker Mace
desc: You gain a +1 bonus on attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. The bonus increases to +3 when you use it to attack an undead criatura. Often given to the grim enforcers of great necropolises, these weapons can reduce the walking dead to splinters with a single strike. When you hit an undead criatura with this magic weapon, treat that criatura as if it is vulnerable to daño contundente. If it is already vulnerable to daño contundente, your attack causa an additional 1d6 daño radiante.

name: Book of Ebon Tides
desc:
This strange, twilight-hued tome was written on pages of pure shadow weave, bound in traditional birch board covers wrapped with shadow goblin hide, and imbued with the memories of forests on the Plane of Shadow. Its covers often reflect ligera as if it were resting in a forest grove, and some owners swear that a goblin face appears on them now and again. The sturdy lock on one side opens only for wizards, elves, and Shadow Fey (see Tome of Beasts). The book has 15 charges, and it regains 2d6 + 3 expended charges daily in the twilight before dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a 1d20. On a 1, the book retains its Ebon Tides and Shadow Lore properties but loses its Spells property. When the magic ritual completes, make an Inteligencia (Arcanos) check and consult the Terrain Changes table for the appropriate DCs. You can change the terrain in any one way listed at your result or lower. For example, if your result was 17, you could turn a small forest up to 30 pies across into a grassland, create a grove of trees up to 240 pies across, create a 6-pie-wide flowing stream, overgrow 1,500 pies of an existing road, or other similar option. Only natural terrain you can see can be affected; built structures, such as homes or castles, remain untouched, though roads and trails can be overgrown or hidden. en un fallo, the terrain is unchanged. On a 1, an Overshadow (see Tome of Beasts 2) also appears and attacks you. On a 20, you can choose two options. Deities, Fey Lords and Ladies (see Tome of Beasts), archdevils, demon lords, and other powerful rulers in the Plane of Shadow can prevent these terrain modifications from happening in their presence or anywhere within their respective domains. Spells marked with an asterisk (*) can be found in Deep Magic for 5th Edition. At the GM's discretion, spells from Deep Magic for 5th Edition can be replaced with other spells of similar levels and similarly related to darkness, illusion, or shadows, such as invisibility or major image. | CD | Effect |
| --- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 8 | Obscuring a path and removing all signs of passage (30 pies per point over 7) |
| 10 | Creating a grove of trees (30 pies across per point over 9) |
| 11 | Creating or drying up a lake or pond (up to 10 pies across per point over 10) |
| 12 | Creating a flowing stream (1 pie wide per point over 11) |
| 13 | Overgrowing an existing road with brush or trees (300 pies per point over 12) |
| 14 | Shifting a river to a new course (300 pies per point over 13) |
| 15 | Moving a forest (300 pies per point over 14) |
| 16 | Creating a small hill, riverbank, or cliff (10 pies tall per point over 15) |
| 17 | Turning a small forest into grassland or clearing, or vice versa (30 pies across per point over 16) |
| 18 | Creating a new river (10 pies wide per point over 17) |
| 19 | Turning a large forest into grassland, or vice versa (300 pies across per point over 19) |
| 20 | Creating a new mountain (1,000 pies high per point over 19) |
| 21 | Drying up an existing river (reducing width by 10 pies per point over 20) |
| 22 | Shrinking an existing hill or mountain (reducing 1,000 pies per point over 21) | Written by an Élfico princess at the Court of Silver Words, this volume encodes her understanding and mastery of shadow. Whimsical illusions suffuse every page, animating its illuminated capital letters and ornamental figures. The book is a famous work among the sable elves of that plane, and it opens to the touch of any elfmarked or sable elf character.

name: Book of Eibon
desc: This fragmentary black book is reputed to descend from the realms of Hyperborea. It contains puzzling guidelines for frightful necromantic rituals and maddening interdimensional travel. The book holds the following spells: semblance of dread*, ectoplasm*, animate dead, speak with dead, emanation of Yoth*, green decay*, yellow sign*, eldritch communion*, create undead, gate, harm, astral projection, and Void rift*. Spells marked with an asterisk (*) can be found in Deep Magic for 5th Edition. At the GM's discretion, the book can contain other spells similarly related to necromancy, madness, or interdimensional travel. If you are attuned to this book, you can use it as a spellbook and as an arcane focus. In addition, while holding the book, you can use a acción adicional to cast a necromancy spell that is written in this tome without expending a espacio de conjuro or using any verbal or somatic components. Once used, this property of the book can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Book of Storing
desc:
After you attune to this 1-pie square 6-inch thick book it hides its true Naturaleza to anybody else, appearing to be a mundane diary. When you open it however, the book reveals a Tiny storage compartment.

The storage space is the same size as the book, and because this item doesn’t function as a pocket dimension it can be safely used to store such items (such as a __portable hole_ ).

name: Book Shroud
desc: When not bound to a book, this red leather book cover is embossed with images of eyes on every inch of its surface. When you wrap this cover around a tome, it shifts the book's appearance to a plain red cover with a title of your choosing and blank pages on which you can write. When viewing the wrapped book, other criaturas see the plain red version with any contents you've written. A criatura succeeding on a CD 15 Sabiduría (Percepción) check sees the real book and can remove the shroud.

name: Bookkeeper Inkpot
desc: This glass vessel looks like an ordinary inkpot. A quill fashioned from an ostrich feather accompanies the inkpot. You can use an action to speak the inkpot's command word, objetivoing a Bookkeeper (see criatura Codex) that you can see within 10 pies of you. An unwilling bookkeeper debe tener éxito en a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Carisma or be transferred to the inkpot, making you the bookkeeper's new “creator.” While the bookkeeper is contained within the inkpot, it suffers no harm due to being away from its bound book, but it can't use any of its actions or traits that apply to it being in a bound book. Dipping the quill in the inkpot and writing in a book binds the bookkeeper to the new book. If the inkpot is found as treasure, there is a 50 percent chance it contains a bookkeeper. An identify spell reveals if a bookkeeper is inside the inkpot before using the inkpot's ink.

name: Bookmark of Eldritch Insight
desc: This cloth bookmark is inscribed with blurred runes that are hard to decipher. If you use this bookmark while researching ancient evils (such as arch-devils or demon lords) or otherworldly mysteries (such as the Void or the Great Old Ones) during a descanso largo, the bookmark crumbles to dust and grants you its knowledge. You double your competencia bonus on Arcanos, Historia, and Religión checks to recall lore about the subject of your research for the next 24 horas. If you don't have competencia in these skills, you instead gain competencia in them for the next 24 horas, but you are proficient only when recalling information about the subject of your research.

name: Boots of Elvenkind
desc: Mientras llevas estas botas, tus pasos no producen ningún sonido, independientemente de la superficie por la que te muevas. Además, tienes ventaja en las pruebas de Destreza (Sigilo) que dependan de moverte en silencio.

name: Boots of Elvenkind
desc: These boots cause your steps to make no sound, no matter the material stepped upon. While wearing these boots, you gain _advantage_  on Destreza (Sigilo) checks to move silently.

name: Boots of Levitation
desc: Mientras llevas puestas estas botas, puedes usar una acción para lanzar el conjuro _levitate_ sobre ti mismo a voluntad.

name: Boots of Levitation
desc: While wearing these boots, up to 3 times between _long rests_  you can use an action to cast __levitate_  on yourself.

name: Boots of Pouncing
desc: These soft leather boots have a collar made of Albino Death Weasel fur (see criatura Codex). While you wear these boots, your walking Velocidad becomes 40 pies, unless your walking Velocidad is higher. Your Velocidad is still reduced if you are encumbered or wearing pesada armor. If you move at least 20 pies straight toward a criatura and hit it with a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo con arma on the same turn, that objetivo debe tener éxito en a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Fuerza or be knocked derribado. If the objetivo is derribado, you can make one ataque cuerpo a cuerpo con arma against it as a acción adicional.

name: Boots of Quaking
desc: While wearing these steel-toed boots, the earth itself shakes when you walk, causing harmless, but unsettling, tremors. If you move at least 15 pies in a single turn, todas las criaturas within 10 pies of you at any point during your movement debe realizar a CD 16 tirada de salvación de Fuerza or take 1d6 daño de fuerza and fall derribado. In addition, while wearing these boots, you can cast earthquake, requiring no Concentración, by speaking a command word and jumping on a point on the ground. The spell is centered on that point. Once you cast earthquake in this way, you can't do so again until the next dawn.

name: Boots of Solid Footing
desc: A thick, rubbery sole covers the bottoms and sides of these stout leather boots. They are useful for maneuvering in cluttered alleyways, slick sewers, and the occasional patch of ice or gravel. While you wear these boots, you can use a acción adicional to speak the command word. If you do, no mágico difficult terrain doesn't cost you extra movement when you walk across it wearing these boots. If you speak the command word again as a acción adicional, you end the effect. When the boots' property has been used for a total of 1 minuto, the magic ceases to function until the next dawn.

name: Boots of Speed
desc:
Mientras llevas puestas estas botas, puedes usar una acción adicional y chasquear los tacones entre sí. Si lo haces, las botas duplican tu velocidad al caminar, y cualquier criatura que realice un ataque de oportunidad contra ti tiene desventaja en la tirada de ataque. Si vuelves a chasquear los tacones, el efecto termina.

Cuando la propiedad de las botas haya sido utilizada durante un total de 10 minutos, la magia deja de funcionar hasta que completes un descanso largo.

name: Boots of Speed
desc:
While wearing these boots, you can use a acción adicional to click the heels together. You double your base Velocidad, and opportunity attacks made against you have _disadvantage_ . You can end the effect as a acción adicional.

Once the boots have been used in this way for a total of 10 minutos (each use expends a minimum of 1 minuto), they cease to function until you finish a _long rest_ .

name: Boots of Striding and Springing
desc: Mientras llevas puestas estas botas, tu velocidad al caminar se convierte en 9 m, a menos que tu velocidad al caminar ya sea mayor, y tu velocidad no se reduce si estás sobrecargado o llevas armadura pesada. Además, puedes saltar el triple de la distancia normal, aunque no puedes saltar más lejos de lo que tu movimiento restante te permita.

name: Boots of Striding and Springing
desc: While wearing these boots, your Velocidad increases to 30 pies, unless it is higher, regardless of encumbrance or armor. In addition, your jump distances increase 15 pies vertically and 30 pies horizontally (as the _jump_  spell).

name: Boots of the Grandmother
desc: While wearing these boots, you have competencia in the Sigilo skill if you don't already have it, and you double your competencia bonus on Destreza (Sigilo) checks. As an action, you can drip three drops of fresh blood onto the boots to ease your passage through the world. For 1d6 horas, you and your aliados within 30 pies of you ignore difficult terrain. Once used, this property can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Boots of the Swift Striker
desc: While you wear these boots, your walking Velocidad increases by 10 pies. In addition, when you take the Dash action while wearing these boots, you can make a single weapon attack at the end of your movement. You can't continue moving after making this attack.

name: Boots of the Winterlands
desc:
Estas botas forradas son cómodas y se sienten bastante cálidas. Mientras las llevas puestas, obtienes los siguientes beneficios:

* Tienes resistencia al daño por frío.
* Ignoras el terreno difícil causado por hielo o nieve.
* Puedes soportar temperaturas de hasta -45 grados Celsius sin protección adicional. Si llevas ropa de abrigo, puedes soportar temperaturas de hasta -73 grados Celsius.

name: Boots of the Winterlands
desc:
While wearing these boots, you gain the following benefits:

* Resistance to daño de frío.
* You ignore _difficult terrain_  caused by ice or snow.
* You can survive temperatures as low as –50° Fahrenheit (–46° Celsius) without effect, or as low as –100° Fahrenheit (–74° Celsius) with pesada clothes.

name: Borrower’s Bookmark
desc:
A neat strap of embossed leather, the borrower’s bookmark can be placed in a book, allowing it to be stored in an extradimensional space. As an action you can send the book into a pocket dimension. While it is in the pocket dimension, you can use an action to summon it to your hand or an unoccupied space within 5 pies of you. If you unattune from the bookmark while its book is within the pocket dimension, the bookmark reappears on your person, but the book is lost. The bookmark’s magic can’t be used to store anything other than a book.

**_Curse._** The borrower’s bookmark is cursed. Books dismissed to the pocket dimension are sent to a powerful entity’s lair. The entity learns all the knowledge contained therein, as well as your identity and location.

name: Bottle of Fizz
desc: When found this thick glass bottle has 25 (5d10) small red rocks inside. You can use an action to throw a red rock to the ground to create a spectacular fireworks show that lasts for 1 ronda. The fireworks cast bright ligera for 50 pies and dim ligera for a further 30 pies, and they can be heard up to 200 pies away.

name: Bottled Boat
desc: This clear glass bottle contains a tiny replica of a wooden rowboat down to the smallest detail, including two stout oars, a miniature coil of hemp rope, a fishing net, and a small cask.
