You can use an action to break the bottle, destroying the bottle and releasing its contents. The rowboat and all of the items emerge as full-sized, normal, and permanent items of their type, which includes 50 pies of hempen rope, a cask containing 20 gallons of fresh water, two oars, and a 12-pie-long rowboat.

name: Bountiful Cauldron
desc: If this small, copper cauldron is filled with water and a half pound of meat, vegetables, or other foodstuffs then placed over a fuego, it produces a simple, but hearty stew that provides una criatura with enough nourishment to sustain it for one day. As long as the food is kept within the cauldron with the lid on, the food remains fresh and edible for up to 24 horas, though it grows frío unless reheated.

name: Bouquet of Wisdom
desc:
This stunningly crafted bouquet contains 2d10 magically fresh flowers—most commonly roses. As an action, you may pluck one from the bouquet while concentrating on your intent. The flower may function as a _scroll_  of _identify , detect veneno and disease ,_ or __detect magic_ . The effect lasts for one minuto, after which the flower withers and dies.

If the bouquet is made up of seven roses or more, you can burn it to cast a _divination_  spell, revealing the answer to the question asked in the sweetly-scented smoke. Doing so destroys the bouquet.

name: Bow of Accuracy
desc: The normal range of this bow is doubled, but its long range remains the same.

name: Bow of the Viper
desc:
Both limbs of this bow are scaled and end in a snake’s open mouth.

You gain a +1 to attack and damage rolls while wielding this weapon. As a acción adicional, you can expend 1 charge to veneno one arrow suitable for the bow for 1 minuto or until it is used to damage a criatura When a criatura is damaged by the blade’s veneno, it makes a CD 15 Constitución _tirada de salvación_  or recibe 1d10 daño de veneno and becomes _poisoned_  for 1 minuto.

Alternatively, you can use an action to expend 2 charges to cast the following: _protection from veneno , shillelagh_ (transforming the bow into a snake-headed   _1 quarterstaff_ ), _thorn whip_ (causing one of the bow’s snake heads to lash out).

The bow of the viper has 4 charges and regains 1d4 expended charges each dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20\. On a or 5 or less, it can no longer regain charges and becomes a   _1 longbow_ .

name: Bowl of Commanding Water Elementals
desc:
Mientras este cuenco está lleno de agua, puedes usar una acción para pronunciar la palabra de mando del cuenco e invocar un elemental de agua, como si hubieras lanzado el conjuro _conjure elemental_. El cuenco no puede usarse de este modo de nuevo hasta el siguiente amanecer.

El cuenco tiene aproximadamente 30 cm de diámetro y la mitad de profundidad. Pesa 1,5 kg y contiene aproximadamente 11 litros.

name: Bowl of Commanding Water Elementals
desc: This pesada glass bowl weighs 3 pounds and can hold 3 gallons of water. While it is filled, you can use an action to summon a _water elemental_  as if you had cast the _conjure elemental_  spell. Once used, you must wait until the next dawn to use it again.

name: Box of Bees
desc:
Many apprentices play pranks on one another, some of which can be quite painful—the _box of bees_ is a particularly popular example and now sold by those with their own mischievous designs. Each of these wooden boxes is rectangular and approximately 2 inches long. It is usually unadorned, though some boxes seem to have something moving or vibrating inside.

When you speak the command word and use an action to expend 1 charge, the lid slides open and a bee erupts out of the box to harass a criatura of your choice within 20 pies. A criatura harassed by the bee debe tener éxito en a CD 5 Constitución _tirada de salvación_  at the start of each of its turns for 1 minuto. en un fallo, the criatura makes its next tirada de ataque or ability check with _disadvantage_ . 

When you speak another command word and expend all 3 charges, a dozen or more bees swarm out of the box and attack. A criatura attacked by the bees debe tener éxito en a CD 10 Constitución _tirada de salvación_  at the start of each of its turns for 1 minuto. en un fallo, the criatura recibe 1 point of damage and has _disadvantage_  on attack rolls and ability checks for 1 ronda. 

The box has 3 charges and regains 1d3 charges each dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20\. On a result of 5 or less, the box loses its magic and becomes a mundane item.

name: Box of Party Tricks
desc:
This small neat box contains 1d12 glowing vials. You can use an action to remove a vial and smash it to the ground, creating a randomly determined effect from the Box of Party Tricks table.

## Table: Box of Party Tricks

| **d8** | **Effect**                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| ------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 1      | A small bonfire appears in the nearest unoccupied 5-pie cube and remains for 1 minuto. All other sources of flame within 50 pies double in brightness.                                            |
| 2      | For the next minuto you gain +1 bonus to ability checks, _attack rolls_ , damage rolls, and _tirada de salvacións_  using Fuerza.                                                                       |
| 3      | You summon a small, fiercely loyal armored _weasel_  into your service (with 7 puntos de golpe and Clase de Armadura 14 thanks to its miniature mithral outfit) that obeys only your commands.                |
| 4      | A metal ball appears floating in your space and remains there until you say the command word, making it slam into the nearest hostile criatura to deal 3d6 daño contundente before disappearing. |
| 5      | For the next 1d6 horas your voice becomes higher by an octave.                                                                                                                                     |
| 6      | Until the next dawn you leave a trail of wildflowers wherever you walk.                                                                                                                            |
| 7      | A pair of __boots of elvenkind_ appear in the nearest unoccupied square. After this effect has appeared once, any further results of 7 are rerolled.                                               |
| 8      | All hostile criaturas in a 30-pie radius are ensnared by ice. An ensnared criatura is _grappled_  until it uses an action to make a CD 16 Fuerza check to break out.                            |

name: Box of Secrets
desc: This well-made, cubical box appears to be a normal container that can hold as much as a normal chest. However, each side of the chest is a lid that can be opened on cunningly concealed hinges. A successful CD 15 Sabiduría (Percepción) check notices that the sides can be opened. When you use an action to turn the box so a new side is facing up, and speak the command word before opening the lid, the current contents of the chest slip into an interdimensional space, leaving it empty once more. You can use an action to fill the box again, then turn it over to a new side and open it, again sending the contents to the interdimensional space. This can be done up to six times, once for each side of the box. To gain access to a particular batch of contents, the correct side must be facing up, and you must use an action to speak the command word as you open the lid on that side. A box of secrets is often crafted with specific means of telling the sides apart, such as unique carvings on each side, or having each side painted a different color. If any side of the box is destroyed completely, the contents that were stored through that side are lost. Likewise, if the entire box is destroyed, the contents are lost forever.

name: Bracelet of the Fire Tender
desc: This bracelet is made of thirteen small, roasted pinecones lashed together with lengths of dried sinew. It smells of pine and woodsmoke. It is uncomfortable to wear over bare skin. While wearing this bracelet, you don't have desventaja on Sabiduría (Percepción) checks that rely on sight when looking in areas lightly obscured by no mágico smoke or fog.

name: Bracers of Archery
desc: Mientras llevas puestos estos brazales, tienes competencia con el arco largo y el arco corto, y obtienes un bonificador +2 a las tiradas de daño en los ataques a distancia realizados con dichas armas.

name: Bracers of Archery
desc: While wearing these bracers, you gain competencia with the longbow and shortbow, and you gain a +2 bonus on damage rolls on ranged attacks made with them.

name: Bracers of Defense
desc: Mientras llevas puestos estos brazales, obtienes un bonificador +2 a la CA si no llevas armadura y no usas escudo.

name: Bracers of Defense
desc: While wearing these bracers, you gain a +2 bonus to AC if you are not wearing armor or using a shield.

name: Braid Whip Clasp
desc: This intricately carved ivory clasp can be wrapped around or woven into braided hair 3 pies or longer. While the clasp is attached to your braided hair, you can speak its command word as a acción adicional and transform your braid into a dangerous whip. If you speak the command word again, you end the effect. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic whip. When the clasp's property has been used for a total of 10 minutos, you can't use it to transform your braid into a whip again until the next dawn.

name: Brain Juice
desc: This foul-smelling, murky, purple-gray liquid is created from the liquefied brains of spellcasting criaturas, such as aboleths. Anyone consuming this repulsive mixture debe realizar a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Inteligencia. en una salvación exitosa, the drinker is infused with mágico power and regains 1d6 + 4 expended espacios de conjuro. en una salvación fallida, the drinker is afflicted with short-term madness for 1 day. If a criatura consumes multiple doses of brain juice and fails three consecutive Inteligencia tirada de salvacións, it is afflicted with long-term madness permanently and automatically fails all further tirada de salvacións brought about by drinking brain juice.

name: Brass Clockwork Staff
desc: This curved staff is made of coiled brass and glass wire. You can use an action to speak one of three command words and throw the staff on the ground within 10 pies of you. The staff transforms into one of three wireframe criaturas, depending on the command word: a unicorn, a hound, or a swarm of tiny beetles. The wireframe criatura or swarm is under your control and acts on its own initiative count. On your turn, you can mentally command the wireframe criatura or swarm if it is within 60 pies of you and you aren't incapacitado. You decide what action the criatura recibe and where it moves during its next turn, or you can issue it a general command, such as to attack your enemigos or guard a location. The wireframe unicorn lasts for up to 1 hora, uses the statistics of a warhorse, and can be used as a mount. The wireframe hound lasts for up to 5 minutos, uses the statistics of a dire wolf, and has ventaja to track any criatura you damaged within the past hora. The wireframe beetle swarm lasts for up to 1 minuto, uses the statistics of a swarm of beetles, and can destroy no mágico objects that aren't being worn or carried and that aren't made of stone or metal (destruction happens at a rate of 1 pound of material per ronda, up to a maximum of 10 pounds). At the end of the duration, the wireframe criatura or swarm reverts to its staff form. It reverts to its staff form early if it drops to 0 puntos de golpe or if you use an action to speak the command word again while touching it. If it reverts to its staff form early by being reduced to 0 puntos de golpe, the staff becomes inert and unusable until the third dawn after the criatura was killed. Otherwise, the wireframe criatura or swarm has all of its puntos de golpe when you transform the staff into the criatura again. When a wireframe criatura or swarm becomes the staff again, this property of the staff can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Brass Snake Ball
desc: Most commonly used by assassins to strangle sleeping victims, this pesada, brass ball is 6 inches across and weighs approximately 15 pounds. It has the image of a coiled snake embossed around it. You can use an action to command the orb to uncoil into a brass snake approximately 6 pies long and 3 inches thick. You can direct it by telepathic command to attack any criatura within your line of sight. Use the statistics for the constrictor snake, but use Clase de Armadura 14 and increase the challenge rating to 1/2 (100 XP). The snake can stay animate for up to 5 minutos or until reduced to 0 puntos de golpe. Being reduced to 0 puntos de golpe causes the snake to revert to orb form and become inert for 1 week. If damaged but not reduced to 0 puntos de golpe, the snake has full puntos de golpe when summoned again. Once you have used the orb to become a snake, it can't be used again until the next sunset.

name: Brawler's Leather
desc: These rawhide straps have lines of crimson runes running along their length. They require 10 minutos of bathing them in salt water before carefully wrapping them around your forearms. Once fitted, you gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with unarmed strikes. The straps become brittle with use. After you have dealt damage with unarmed strike attacks 10 times, the straps crumble away.

name: Brawn Armor
desc: This armor was crafted from the hide of an ancient grizzly bear. While wearing it, you gain a +1 bonus to AC, and you have ventaja on grapple checks. The armor has 3 charges. You can use a acción adicional to expend 1 charge to deal your unarmed strike damage to a criatura you are grappling. The armor regains all expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Brazen Band
desc: Made by kobold clockwork mages, this brass clockwork ring is formed to look like a coiled dragon. When you speak or whisper the Dracónico command word etched on the inside of the ring, the brass dragon uncoils and attempts to pick any lock within 10 pies of you. The dragon picks the lock using your competencia bonus but with ventaja. It is treated as having thieves' tools when attempting to pick locks. It uses your Destreza (Sigilo) bonus for purposes of not being spotted but with ventaja due to its extremely small size. Whether successful or not, once you have used the ring to attempt to pick a lock, it can't be used again until the next sunset.

name: Brazen Bulwark
desc: This rectangular shield is plated with polished brass and resembles a crenelated tower. While wielding this shield, you gain a +1 bonus to AC. This bonus is in addition to the shield's normal bonus to AC.

name: Brazier of Commanding Fire Elementals
desc:
Mientras haya fuego ardiendo en este brasero de latón, puedes usar una acción para pronunciar la palabra de mando del brasero e invocar un elemental de fuego, como si hubieras lanzado el conjuro _conjure elemental_. El brasero no puede usarse de este modo de nuevo hasta el siguiente amanecer.

El brasero pesa 5 libras.

name: Brazier of Commanding Fire Elementals
desc: While fuego burns in this 5 pound brass brazier, you can use an action to summon a _fire elemental_  as if you had cast the __conjure elemental_  spell. Once used, you must wait until the next dawn to use it again.

name: Breaker Lance
desc: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls with this magic weapon. When you attack an object or structure with this magic lance and hit, maximize your weapon damage dice against the objetivo. The lance has 3 charges. As part of an attack action with the lance, you can expend a charge while striking a barrier created by a spell, such as a wall of fuego or wall of fuerza, or an entryway protected by the arcane lock spell. You debe realizar a Fuerza check against a CD equal to 10 + the spell's level. On a successful check, the spell ends. The lance regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Breathing Reed
desc: This tiny river reed segment is cool to the touch. If you chew the reed while underwater, it provides you with enough air to breathe for up to 10 minutos. At the end of the duration, the reed loses its magic and can be harmlessly swallowed or spit out.

name: Briarthorn Bracers
desc: These leather bracers are inscribed with Élfico runes. While wearing these bracers, you gain a +1 bonus to AC if you are using no shield. In addition, while in a forest, no mágico difficult terrain costs you no extra movement.

name: Brighella's Guitar
desc: This guitar is brilliantly painted with triangles of bright color. While attuned, you gain an _expertise die_  on Interpretación checks made with this guitar. Additionally, once per day, you may use an action to cast __bestow curse_  as a 5th-level spell, without spending a espacio de conjuro. However, the curse is always _disadvantage_  on Destreza _ability checks_  and _tirada de salvacións_  and each failure is followed by a slapstick sound effect.

name: Broken Fang Talisman
desc: This talisman is a piece of burnished copper, shaped into a curved fang with a large crack through the middle. While wearing the talisman, you can use an action to cast the encrypt / decrypt (see Deep Magic for 5th Edition) spell. The talisman can't be used this way again until 1 hora has passed.

name: Brooch of Shielding
desc: Mientras llevas puesta esta hebilla, tienes resistencia al daño de fuerza e inmunidad al daño del conjuro _magic missile_.

name: Brooch of Shielding
desc: While wearing this brooch, you gain resistance to daño de fuerza and immunity to the _magic missile_  spell.

name: Broom of Flying
desc:
Esta escoba de madera, que pesa 3 libras, funciona como una escoba mundana hasta que te montas a horcajadas sobre ella y pronuncias su palabra de mando. Entonces flota bajo ti y puede ser montada en el aire. Tiene una velocidad de vuelo de 15 metros. Puede transportar hasta 400 libras, pero su velocidad de vuelo se reduce a 9 metros si transporta más de 200 libras. La escoba deja de flotar cuando aterrizas.

Puedes enviar la escoba a viajar sola hacia un destino situado a menos de 1 milla de ti si pronuncias la palabra de mando, nombras el lugar y conoces dicho lugar. La escoba regresa a ti cuando pronuncias otra palabra de mando, siempre que la escoba siga estando a menos de 1 milla de ti.

name: Broom of Flying
desc:
You can sit astride this ordinary-seeming 3 pound broom and speak its command word, causing it to hover. While it is hovering you can ride the broom to fly through the air. The broom can carry up to 200 pounds at a Velocidad of 40 pies, or up to 400 pounds at a Velocidad of 20 pies. It stops hovering if you land.

You can send the broom up to 1 milla from you by speaking its command word and naming a location you are familiar with. It can also be called back from up to a milla away with a different command word.

name: Broom of Sweeping
desc: You can use an action to speak the broom's command word and give it short instructions consisting of a few words, such as “sweep the floor” or “dust the cabinets.” The broom can clean up to 5 cubic pies each minuto and continues cleaning until you use another action to deactivate it. The broom can't climb barriers higher than 5 pies and can't open doors.

name: Brotherhood of Fezzes
desc: This trio of fezzes works only if all three hats are worn within 60 pies of each other by criaturas of the same size. If one of the hats is removed or moves further than 60 pies from the others or if criaturas of different sizes are wearing the hats, the hats' magic temporarily ceases. While three criaturas of the same size wear these fezzes within 60 pies of each other, cada criatura can use its action to cast the alter self spell from it at will. However, all three wearers of the fezzes are affected as if the same spell was simultaneously cast on each of them, making each wearer appear identical to the other. For example, if one Medium wearer uses an action to change its appearance to that of a specific elf, each other wearer's appearance changes to look like the exact same elf.

name: Bubble Wand
desc:
This slender timber wand has a wooden ring at its tip. The wand has 7 charges and regains 1d6+1 charges each dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20\. On a 1, the wand bursts into a spray of colorful bubbles and is lost forever.

While holding the wand, you can use an action to expend its charges and either create a harmless spray of colorful bubbles (1 charge) or cast the __dancing lights_ truco (2 charges). The _dancing lights_ appear as glowing bubbles.

When a criatura objetivos you with an attack while you are holding the wand, you can use your reacción to snap it (destroying the wand). You can do this after the roll is made, but before the outcome of the attack is determined. You gain a +5 bonus to AC and a fly Velocidad of 10 pies. as a Gigante soap bubble coalesces around you. The bubble persists for 1 minuto or until you are hit with an attack, at which point it bursts with a loud ‘pop’.

name: Bubbling Retort
desc: This long, thin retort is fashioned from smoky yellow glass and is topped with an intricately carved brass stopper. You can unstopper the retort and fill it with liquid as an action. Once you do so, it spews out multicolored bubbles in a 20-pie radius. The bubbles last for 1d4 + 1 rondas. While they last, criaturas within the radius are cegado and the area is heavily obscured to todas las criaturas except those with sentido de temblor. The liquid in the retort is destroyed in the process with no harmful effect on its surroundings. If any bubbles are popped, they burst with a wet smacking sound but no other effect.

name: Buckle of Blasting
desc: This soot-colored steel buckle has an exploding flame etched into its surface. It can be affixed to any Común belt. While wearing this buckle, you have resistance to daño de fuerza. In addition, the buckle has 5 charges, and it regains 1d4 + 1 charges daily at dawn. It has the following properties.

name: Bullseye Arrow
desc: This arrow has bright red fletching and a blunt, red tip. You gain a +1 bonus to attack rolls made with this magic arrow. On a hit, the arrow causa no damage, but it paints a mágico red dot on the objetivo for 1 minuto. While the dot lasts, the objetivo recibe an extra 1d4 damage of the weapon's type from any ataque a distancia that hits it. In addition, ranged weapon attacks against the objetivo score a critical hit on a roll of 19 or 20. When this arrow hits a objetivo, the arrow vanishes in a flash of red ligera and is destroyed.

name: Burglar's Lock and Key
desc: This pesada iron lock bears a stout, pitted key permanently fixed in the keyhole. As an action, you can twist the key counterclockwise to instantly open one door, chest, bag, bottle, or container of your choice within 30 pies. Any container or portal weighing more than 30 pounds or apresado in any way (latched, bolted, tied, or the like) automatically resists this effect.

name: Burning Skull
desc: This appallingly misshapen skull—though alien and monstrous in aspect—is undeniably human, and it is large and hollow enough to be worn as a helm by any Medium humanoid. The skull helm radiates an unholy spectral aura, which sheds dim ligera in a 10-pie radius. According to legends, gazing upon a burning skull freezes the blood and withers the brain of one who entiende not its mystery.

name: Butter of Disbelief
desc: This stick of mágico butter is carved with arcane runes and never melts or spoils. It has 3 charges. While holding this butter, you can use an action to slice off a piece and expend 1 charge to cast the grease spell (save CD 13) from it. The grease that covers the ground looks like melted butter. The butter regains all expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, the butter disappears.

name: Butterfly Clips
desc: These clips look like brightly colored enamel butterflies. When affixed to hair, they animate and flit around your head. Most people who wear these clips wear multiple, giving the appearance of a swarm of butterflies surrounding their hair.

name: Buzzing Blade
desc: You can use a acción adicional to speak this weapon's command word, causing the blade to emit a loud buzzing sound. The buzzing noise is audible out to 100 pies. While the sword is buzzing, it causa an extra 2d6 daño de trueno to any objetivo it hits. The buzzing lasts until you use a acción adicional to speak the command word again or until you drop or sheathe the weapon.

name: Cage of Folly
desc:
This small silver or gold birdcage traps your bad ideas and puts them on display. When you fail an Arcanos, Historia, Naturaleza, or Religión check, a little piece of a mechanical bird materializes inside the cage: first the pies, then legs, body, wings, and head. You can immediately reconsider and reroll the ability check. The _cage of folly_ can be used once every 24 horas, and recharges at the end of each week.

Once you have used the birdcage 5 times, the bird sings a mocking song for 1 hora when you fail an Arcanos, Historia, Naturaleza, or Religión check. If you open the birdcage and let the bird go free, it gives you one piece of good advice about a current problem or question that you face. At the Narrator’s discretion, the advice may give you _advantage_  on one ability check made in the next week. Afterward it flies away as the birdcage loses its magic and becomes a mundane item (though some who have released their birds claim to have encountered them again in the wilds later).

name: Campaign Field Tent
desc:
You can use an action to place this 1-inch cloth cube on the ground and speak its command word. The cube rapidly grows into a field tent with open or closed sides (your choice) that remains until you use an action to speak the command word that dismisses it, which works only if the tent is empty.
  The field tent is a canvas tent, 15 pies on a side and 10 pies high. It remains firmly fixed to the ground, even when standing on bare stone, a ship's deck, or loose sand, and its magic prevents it from being tipped over.
  cada criatura in the area where the tent appears debe realizar a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Destreza, taking 5d10 daño contundente en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one. In either case, the criatura is pushed to an unoccupied space outside but next to the tent. Objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried take this damage and are pushed automatically.
  The tent has 50 puntos de golpe, immunity to ataques no mágicos, excluding siege weapons, and resistance to all other damage. The tent contains a small table with a chair and five simple beds made of cloth and foldable wooden frames.
  The field tent can hold up to six Medium or smaller criaturas. When a criatura finishes a descanso corto in the tent, it regains double the puntos de golpe from any Hit Dice it spends. When a criatura finishes a descanso largo in the tent, it reduces its agotamiento level by 2 instead of 1. In addition, a criatura has ventaja on tirada de salvacións it makes against disease and veneno while it rests in the tent.

name: Candied Axe
desc: This battleaxe bears a golden head spun from crystalized honey. Its wooden handle is carved with reliefs of bees. You gain a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.

name: Candle of Communion
desc: This black candle burns with an eerie, violet flame. The candle's magic is activated when the candle is lit, which requires an action. When lit, the candle sheds bright ligera in a 5-pie radius and dim ligera for an additional 5 pies. cada criatura in the candle's ligera has ventaja on Constitución tirada de salvacións to maintain Concentración on necromancy spells. After burning for 1 hora, or if the candle's flame is magically or nonmagically snuffed out, it is destroyed. Alternatively, when you ligera the candle for the first time, you can cast the speak with dead spell with it. Doing so destroys the candle.

name: Candle of Invocation
desc:
Esta delgada vela está consagrada a una deidad y comparte el alineamiento de dicha deidad. El alineamiento de la vela puede detectarse con el conjuro _detect evil and good_. El DJ elige al dios y el alineamiento asociado, o lo determina de forma aleatoria.

| d20   | Alineamiento         |
|-------|----------------------|
| 1-2   | Caótico malvado      |
| 3-4   | Caótico neutral      |
| 5-7   | Caótico bueno        |
| 8-9   | Neutral malvado      |
| 10-11 | Neutral              |
| 12-13 | Neutral bueno        |
| 14-15 | Legal malvado        |
| 16-17 | Legal neutral        |
| 18-20 | Legal bueno          |

La magia de la vela se activa cuando se enciende, lo cual requiere una acción. Tras arder durante 4 horas, la vela queda destruida. Puedes apagarla antes para usarla en otro momento. Resta el tiempo que haya ardido, en incrementos de 1 minuto, del tiempo total de combustión de la vela.

Mientras está encendida, la vela emite luz tenue en un radio de 9 metros. Cualquier criatura dentro de esa luz cuyo alineamiento coincida con el de la vela realiza las tiradas de ataque, tiradas de salvación y pruebas de característica con ventaja. Además, un clérigo o druida dentro de la luz cuyo alineamiento coincida con el de la vela puede lanzar conjuros de nivel 1 que tenga preparados sin gastar espacios de conjuro, aunque el efecto del conjuro es como si se hubiera lanzado con un espacio de nivel 1.

Alternativamente, cuando enciendes la vela por primera vez, puedes lanzar el conjuro _gate_ con ella. Hacerlo destruye la vela.

name: Candle of Invocation
desc:
This golden candle is infused with raw divine magic. When attuned to by a cleric or druid, it recibe on a color appropriate to the cleric’s deity. 

You can use an action to ligera the candle and activate its magic. The candle can burn for a total of 4 horas in 1 minuto increments before being used up. 

While lit, the candle sheds dim ligera in a 30-pie radius. Any criatura within the area who worships the same deity as the attuned criatura (or at the Narrator’s discretion, an allied deity) has _advantage_  on _attack rolls_ , _tirada de salvacións_ , and ability checks. If one of the criaturas gaining the prior benefit is also a cleric, druid, or herald, they can cast 1st-level spells from one of those classes at that spell level without expending espacios de conjuro.

Alternatively, one of these candles that has not yet been lit can be used to cast the __gate_ spell. Doing so consumes the candle.

name: Candle of Summoning
desc: This black candle burns with an eerie, green flame. The candle's magic is activated when the candle is lit, which requires an action. When lit, the candle sheds bright ligera in a 5-pie radius and dim ligera for an additional 5 pies. cada criatura in the candle's ligera has ventaja on Constitución tirada de salvacións to maintain Concentración on conjuration spells. After burning for 1 hora, or if the flame is magically or nonmagically snuffed out, it is destroyed. Alternatively, when you ligera the candle for the first time, you can cast the spirit guardians spell (save CD 15) with it. Doing so destroys the candle.

name: Candle of the Surreptitious Scholar
desc:
Initially crafted by wizard apprentices trying not to irritate their roommates, these candles became extremely popular with the thieves and other ne'er do wells that can afford them (helping some less scrupulous novice mages to afford tuition). The candle has 3 charges and regains 1d3 charges each dawn. 

When you speak the command word and use an action to expend 1 charge, the candle’s flame to spring to life. Its bluish flame provides clear illumination within 5 pies and _dim light_  for another 5 pies. The enchantment of the candle is such that the ligera that it sheds is visible only to you, allowing you to read, write, or engage in other tasks with no penalties from darkness. Each charge is good for 1 hora of illumination, after which the candle winks out. 

By expending all 3 charges at once, you can create an effect identical to _light_  except that only you are able to see the ligera it sheds.

If you expend the last charge, roll a d20\. On a result of 5 or less, the candle loses its magic and becomes a mundane item.

name: Candle of Visions
desc: This black candle burns with an eerie, blue flame. The candle's magic is activated when the candle is lit, which requires an action. When lit, the candle sheds bright ligera in a 5-pie radius and dim ligera for an additional 5 pies. cada criatura in the candle's ligera has ventaja on Constitución tirada de salvacións to maintain Concentración on divination spells. After burning for 1 hora, or if the flame is magically or nonmagically snuffed out, it is destroyed. Alternatively, when you ligera the candle for the first time, you can cast the augury spell with it, which reveals its otherworldly omen in the candle's smoke. Doing so destroys the candle.

name: Cane of Chaos
desc:
The _Cane of Chaos_ (known by some by its fairytale name, the Little Silver Stick) is a gorgeous silver scepter etched with fractals, adorned with an eight-pointed star, and imbued with the power of chaos. A cunning historian may be able to track the cane’s origins to a certain mage under a certain authoritarian regime centuries ago, who supplied it to a figure widely known for their role in the regime’s downfall. Similarly, the cane seems to be drawn to those who march to their own drumbeat, directing them on behalf of its creator to sow disruption and turmoil.

**Legends and Lore** Success on an Arcanos or Historia check reveals the following:

**CD 15** This is the _Cane of Chaos_, used by a despot in times long past. It is also known as the Little Silver Stick.

**CD 18** The cane stores and is able to cast spells linked to chaos, but randomly unleashes chaotic mágico effects when used.

**CD 21** The cane can only be destroyed by a sovereign on the day of their coronation.

**Artifact Properties**

The _Cane of Chaos_ has 1d4 lesser artifact benefits, 1d4 lesser artifact detriments, 1d4–1 greater artifact benefits, and 1d4+1 greater artifact detriments. 

In addition, the cane has the sutil property and can be used as a double weapon which you become proficient with when you attune to it. You gain a +2 bonus to weapon attack rolls and damage rolls made using the _Cane of Chaos_.

## **Magic**

While you use this quarterstaff as a spell focus, you gain a +2 bonus to ataque de conjuro rolls and your CD de salvación del conjuro. You know and have prepared all spells of the chaos school of magic (but not their rare versions). 

The _Cane of Chaos_ begins with a number of charges equal to your competencia bonus and regains 1d6 charges each dawn (to a maximum number of charges equal to your level + 1, or your CR + 1). You can expend any number of charges from the cane to cast a chaos spell, which costs a number of charges equal to the spell’s level. Your spellcasting ability for these spells is your highest mental ability score (Inteligencia, Sabiduría, or Carisma).

When you expend charges from the _Cane of Chaos_, it unleashes another chaotic mágico effect, either chosen by the Narrator or randomly determined.

__**Table: Cane of Chaos**__
| **d8** | **Wild Magic Effect**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| ------ | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 1      | One random criatura you see is subject to a _polymorph_  spell cast by the cane (using your CD de salvación del conjuro), turning it into a random CR 1/8 beast.                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| 2      | The 1d6 doors nearest to you come under an _arcane lock_  effect as though cast by the criatura nearest to you that can speak, write, or sign at least one language.                                                                                                                                                                            |
| 3      | The cane creates a __control weather_  effect, driving the weather towards unseasonable extreme temperatures and conditions.                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| 4      | cada criatura within 60 pies rolls 1d6, increasing a random ability score to 18 for the next 10 minutos (1: Fuerza, 2: Destreza, 3: Constitución, 4: Inteligencia, 5: Sabiduría, 6: Carisma).                                                                                                                                                  |
| 5      | cada criatura within 60 pies is subject to a __levitation_ effect created by the cane (using your CD de salvación del conjuro). cada criatura has _disadvantage_  on _tirada de salvacións_  against the effect and en un fallo immediately rises 60 pies. For the duration, cada criatura can control its own movement as though it had cast _levitate_ on itself. |
| 6      | You grow 1d6 inches taller (this effect cannot increase your size category).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| 7      | If you are a humanoid you are permanently transformed into a different humanoid heritage (as per Table: Reincarnation for the _reincarnate_  spell).                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| 8      | Duplicates of yourself appear within 60 pies! Roll 1d6 to determine their Naturaleza (1–2: 1d6 _animated armors_ , 3–4: a _mirror image_  effect, 5–6: a __simulacrum_  effect).                                                                                                                                                                    |

## Destroying the Cane

The _Cane of Chaos_ is born from the very essence of rebellion. To destroy it, you must offer the artifact as a gift to a sovereign on the day of their coronation or to a mágico being with the Lawful alignment trait on the anniversary of their advent. If accepted as such a gift, the _Cane of Chaos_ melts into a puddle of ordinary molten silver.

name: Cantrip Wand
desc:
This wand can be used as a spellcasting focus and allows you to cast one additional truco as if you knew it, as long as it is on your spell list. Each truco wand has a truco imbued within it upon creation, and will be known by its name (such as a _fire bolt_  wand or __light  wand_). 

Other implements exist for the storing of cantrips from other classes (like _cantrip holy symbols_ or _cantrip instruments_), and though these are wondrous items they function like wands.

name: Cap of Thorns
desc: Donning this thorny wooden circlet causes it to meld with your scalp. It can be removed only upon your death or by a remove curse spell. The cap ingests some of your blood, dealing 2d4 daño perforante. After this first feeding, the thorns feed once per day for 1d4 daño perforante. Once per day, you can sacrifice 1 punto de golpe per level you possess to cast a special entangle spell made of thorny vines. Carisma is your spellcasting ability for this effect. apresado criaturas debe realizar a successful tirada de salvación de Carisma or be affected by a charm person spell as thorns pierce their body. The objetivo can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito. If the objetivo fails three consecutive saves, the thorns become deeply rooted and the hechizado effect is permanent until remove curse or similar magic is cast on the objetivo.

name: Cape of Targeting
desc: You gain a +1 bonus to AC while wearing this long, flowing cloak. Whenever you are within 10 pies of more than two criaturas, it subtly and slowly shifts its color to whatever the criaturas nearest you find the most irritating. While within 5 pies of a hostile criatura, you can use a acción adicional to speak the cloak's command word to activate it, allowing your aliados' ranged attacks to pass right through you. For 1 minuto, each friendly criatura that makes a ataque a distancia against a hostile criatura within 5 pies of you has ventaja on the tirada de ataque. Each ronda the cloak is active, it enthusiastically and telepathically says “shoot me!” in different tones and cadences into the minds of each friendly criatura that can see you and the cloak. The cloak can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Cape of the Mountebank
desc:
Esta capa desprende un leve olor a azufre. Mientras la llevas puesta, puedes usarla para lanzar el conjuro _dimension door_ como una acción. Esta propiedad de la capa no puede volver a usarse hasta el siguiente amanecer.

Cuando desapareces, dejas atrás una nube de humo, y apareces en una nube de humo similar en tu destino. El humo oscurece ligeramente el espacio que abandonaste y el espacio en el que apareces, y se disipa al final de tu siguiente turno. Una brisa ligera o un viento más fuerte dispersan el humo.

name: Cape of the Mountebank
desc: While wearing this cape, you can use an action to cast _dimension door_  once between _long rests_ . You disappear and reappear in a cloud of smoke which dissipates at the end of your next turn, or sooner if conditions are windy.

name: Captain's Flag
desc: This red and white flag adorned with a white anchor is made of velvet that never seems to fray in strong wings. When mounted and flown on a ship, the flag changes to the colors and symbol of the ship's captain and crew. While this flag is mounted on a ship, the captain and its aliados have ventaja on tirada de salvacións against being hechizado or asustado. In addition, when the captain is reduced to 0 puntos de golpe while on the ship where this flag flies, each aliado of the captain has ventaja on its attack rolls until the end of its next turn.

name: Captain's Goggles
desc: These copper and glass goggles are prized by air and sea captains across the world. The goggles are designed to repel water and never fog. After attuning to the goggles, your name (or preferred moniker) appears on the side of the goggles. While wearing the goggles, you can't suffer from agotamiento.

name: Carpet of Flying
desc:
Puedes pronunciar la palabra de mando de la alfombra como una acción para hacer que levite y vuele. Se mueve siguiendo tus indicaciones verbales, siempre que te encuentres a 9 metros o menos de ella.

Existen cuatro tamaños de _carpet of flying_. El DJ elige el tamaño de una alfombra concreta o lo determina de forma aleatoria.

| d100   | Tamaño              | Capacidad | Velocidad de vuelo |
|--------|---------------------|-----------|--------------------|
| 01-20  | 0,9 m × 1,5 m       | 90 kg     | 24 metros          |
| 21-55  | 1,2 m × 1,8 m       | 180 kg    | 18 metros          |
| 56-80  | 1,5 m × 2,1 m       | 270 kg    | 12 metros          |
| 81-100 | 1,8 m × 2,7 m       | 360 kg    | 9 metros           |

Una alfombra puede transportar hasta el doble del peso indicado en la tabla, pero vuela a la mitad de velocidad si carga más de su capacidad normal.

name: Carpet of Flying
desc:
You can use an action to speak this carpet’s command word, making it hover and fly. It moves according to your verbal commands as long as you are within 30 pies of it. 

These carpets come in four sizes. The Narrator can choose or randomly determine which size a given carpet is.

If the carpet is carrying half its capacity or less, its Velocidad is doubled.

__**Table: Carpet of volando**__
| **d20** | **Size**      | **Capacity** | **volando Velocidad** | **Cost**  |
| ------- | ------------- | ------------ | ---------------- | --------- |
| 1-4     | 3 pies. x 5 pies. | 250 lb.      | 30 pies.           | 15,000 gp |
| 5-11    | 4 pies. x 6 pies. | 500 lb.      | 25 pies.           | 20,000 gp |
| 12-16   | 5 pies. x 7 pies. | 800 lb.      | 20 pies.           | 25,000 gp |
| 17-20   | 6 pies. x 9 pies. | 1,000 lb.    | 15 pies.           | 30,000 gp |

name: Case of Preservation
desc: This item appears to be a standard map or scroll case fashioned of well-oiled leather. You can store up to ten rolled-up sheets of paper or five rolled-up sheets of parchment in this container. While ensconced in the case, the contents are protected from damage caused by fuego, exposure to water, age, or vermin.

name: Cataloguing Book
desc: This nondescript book contains statistics and details on various objects. Libraries often use these tomes to assist visitors in finding the knowledge contained within their stacks. You can use an action to touch the book to an object you wish to catalogue. The book inscribes the object's name, provided by you, on one of its pages and sketches a rough illustration to accompany the object's name. If the object is a magic item or otherwise magic-imbued, the book also inscribes the object's properties. The book becomes magically connected to the object, and its pages denote the object's current location, provided the object is not protected by nondetection or other magic that thwarts divination magic. When you attune to this book, its previously catalogued contents disappear.

name: Catalyst Oil
desc: This special elemental compound draws on nearby energy sources. Catalyst oils are tailored to one specific damage type (not including contundente, perforante, or daño cortante) and have one dose. Whenever a spell or effect of this type goes off within 60 pies of a dose of catalyst oil, the oil catalyzes and becomes the spell's new point of origin. If the spell affects a single objetivo, its original point of origin becomes the new objetivo. If the spell's area is directional (such as a cone or a cube) you determine the spell's new direction. This redirected spell is easier to evade. objetivos have ventaja on tirada de salvacións against the spell, and the caster has desventaja on the ataque de conjuro roll.

name: Cauldron of Dymwch
desc: When you speak the command word this Medium-sized 50 pound cauldron glows red-hot. Any criatura in physical contact with the object recibe 2d8 daño de fuego. You can use a acción adicional on each of your subsequent turns to cause this damage again. Liquid inside of the cauldron immediately comes to a roiling boil. If a criatura is in the liquid, it debe tener éxito en a CD 18 Constitución _tirada de salvación_ or gain one level of _fatigue_ in addition to taking damage.

name: Celestial Aegis
desc:
This suit of imposing _2 full plate_  is engraved with holy runes of a forgotten divinity. You cannot attune to this armor if you have either the Evil alignment trait. While attuned to and wearing this armor, you gain the following benefits:

* Your AC increases by 2.
* You count as one size category larger when determining your carrying capacity.
* Your Fuerza score increases to 20\. This property has no effect if your Fuerza is equal to or greater than 20.
* You have _advantage_  on Fuerza checks and _tirada de salvacións_ .
* You gain an expertise die on Intimidación checks.
* You can use a acción adicional to regain 2d6 puntos de golpe. Once you have used this property a number of times equal to your competencia bonus, you cannot do so again until you finish a _long rest_ .
* Your unarmed strikes and weapon attacks deal an extra 1d6 daño radiante.
* Aberrations, fiends, undead, and criaturas with the Evil alignment trait have _disadvantage_  on attack rolls made against you.

name: Celestial Charter
desc: Challenge Rating is equal to or less than your level, the binding powers of the scroll compel it to listen to you. You can then attempt to strike a bargain with the Celestial, negotiating a service from it in exchange for a reward. The Celestial is under no compulsion to strike the bargain; it is compelled only to parley long enough for you to present a bargain and allow for negotiations. If you or your aliados attack or otherwise attempt to harm the Celestial, the truce is broken, and the criatura can act normally. If the Celestial refuses the offer, it is free to take any actions it wishes. Should you and the Celestial alcance an agreement that is satisfactory to both parties, you must sign the charter and have the Celestial do likewise (or make its mark, if it has no form of writing). The writing on the scroll changes to reflect the terms of the agreement struck. The magic of the charter holds both you and the Celestial to the agreement until its service is rendered and the reward paid, at which point the scroll vanishes in a bright flash of ligera. A Celestial typically attempts to fulfill its end of the bargain as best it can, and it is angry if you exploit any loopholes or literal interpretations to your ventaja. If either party breaks the bargain, that criatura immediately recibe 10d6 daño radiante, and the charter is destroyed, ending the contract.

name: Celestial Sextant
desc: The ancient elves constructed these sextants to use as navigational aids on all their seagoing vessels. The knowledge of their manufacture has been lost, and few of them remain. While attuned to the sextant, you can spend 1 minuto using the sextant to determine your latitude and longitude, provided you can see the sun or stars. You can use an action steer up to four vessels that are within 1 milla of the sextant, provided their crews are willing. To do so, you must have spent at least 1 hora aboard each of the controlled vessels, performing basic sailing tasks and familiarizing yourself with the vessel.

name: Censer of Controlling Air Elementals
desc:
Mientras hay incienso ardiendo en este incensario, puedes usar una acción para pronunciar la palabra de mando del incensario e invocar un elemental de aire, como si hubieras lanzado el conjuro _conjure elemental_. El incensario no puede usarse de este modo de nuevo hasta el siguiente amanecer.

Este recipiente de 15 centímetros de ancho y 30 centímetros de alto tiene el aspecto de un cáliz con una tapa decorada. Pesa 500 gramos.

name: Censer of Controlling Air Elementals
desc: While incense burns in this 1 pound censer, you can use an action to summon an _air elemental_  as if you had cast the __conjure elemental_ spell. Once used, you must wait until the next dawn to use it again.

name: Censer of Dark Shadows
desc: This enchanted censer paints the air with mágico, smoky shadow. While holding the censer, you can use an action to speak its command word, causing the censer to emit shadow in a 30-pie radius for 1 hora. Bright ligera and sunlight within this area is reduced to dim ligera, and dim ligera within this area is reduced to mágico darkness. The shadow spreads around corners, and no mágico ligera can't illuminate this shadow. The shadow emanates from the censer and moves with it. Completely enveloping the censer within another sealed object, such as a lidded pot or a leather bag, blocks the shadow. If any of this effect's area overlaps with an area of ligera created by a spell of 2nd level or lower, the spell creating the ligera is dispelled. Once the censer is used to emit shadow, it can't do so again until the next dusk.

name: Centaur Wrist-Wraps
desc: These leather and fur wraps are imbued with centaur shamanic magic. The wraps are stained a deep amber color, and intricate motifs painted in blue seem to float above the surface of the leather. While wearing these wraps, you can call on their magic to reroll an attack made with a shortbow or longbow. You must use the new roll. Once used, the wraps must be held in wood smoke for 15 minutos before they can be used in this way again.

name: Cephalopod Breastplate
desc: This bronze breastplate depicts two krakens fighting. While wearing this armor, you gain a +1 bonus to AC. You can use an action to speak the armor's command word to release a cloud of black mist (if above water) or black ink (if underwater). It billows out from you in a 20-pie-radius cloud of mist or ink. The area is heavily obscured for 1 minuto, although a wind of moderate or greater Velocidad (at least 10 millas per hora) or a significant current disperses it. The armor can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Cestus
desc: These leather hand wraps are padded across the knuckles. You have a bonus to attack and damage rolls made with unarmed strikes while wearing these hand wraps. The bonus is determined by the item's rarity.

name: Chain Cilice
desc:
This bracelet made of spiked chain is designed to fit around the ankle, wrist, or thigh. While wearing the cilice, you can use an action to speak its command word, causing it to tighten on your skin and dealing 1d6 daño perforante to you at the start of each of your turns until you use a acción adicional to end it. If you have the Ki class feature or ki points from another source, such as the Inner Resilience feat (see the Backgrounds and Feats chapter), you regain 1 ki point for every 5 damage caused by the cilice. If the cilice would reduce you to 0 puntos de golpe, it reduces you to 1 punto de golpe instead and the effect ends.
  If the cilice's effect was ended in this way, it can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Chainbreaker Blade
desc: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you use this weapon to attack or break chains, manacles, or similar metal objects restraining criaturas, you have ventaja on the tirada de ataque or ability check. In addition, such items have vulnerability to this sword's weapon damage.

name: Chalice of Forbidden Ecstasies
desc: The cup of this garnet chalice is carved in the likeness of a human skull. When the chalice is filled with blood, the dark red gemstone pulses with a scintillating crimson ligera that sheds dim ligera in a 5-pie radius. cada criatura that drinks blood from this chalice has desventaja on enchantment spells you cast for the next 24 horas. In addition, you can use an action to cast the suggestion spell, using your CD de salvación del conjuro, on a criatura that has drunk blood from the chalice within the past 24 horas. You need to concentrate on this suggestion to maintain it during its duration. Once used, the suggestion power of the chalice can't be used again until the next dusk.

name: Chalk of Exodus
desc: This piece of chalk glitters in the ligera, as if infused with particles of mica or gypsum. The chalk has 10 charges. You can use an action and expend 1 charge to draw a door on any solid surface upon which the chalk can leave a mark. You can then push open the door while picturing a real door within 10 millas of your current location. The door you picture must be one that you have passed through, in the normal fashion, once before. The chalk opens a mágico portal to that other door, and you can step through the portal to appear at that other location as if you had stepped through that other door. At the destination, the objetivo door opens, revealing a glowing portal from which you emerge. Once through, you can shut the door, dispelling the portal, or you can leave it open for up to 1 minuto. While the door is open, any criatura that can fit through the chalk door can traverse the portal in either direction. Each time you use the chalk, roll a 1d20. On a roll of 1, the magic malfunctions and connects you to a random door similar to the one you pictured within the same range, though it might be a door you have never seen before. The chalk becomes no mágico when you use the last charge.

name: Chamrosh Salve
desc: This 3-inch-diameter ceramic jar contains 1d4 + 1 doses of a syrupy mixture that smells faintly of freshly washed dog fur. The jar is a glorious gold-white, resembling the shimmering fur of a Chamrosh (see Tome of Beasts 2), the holy hound from which this salve gets its name. As an action, one dose of the ointment can be applied to the skin. The criatura that receives it regains 2d8 + 1 puntos de golpe and is cured of the hechizado, asustado, and envenenado conditions.

name: Charcoal Stick of Aversion
desc:
At every level of society—but especially when you’re on the bottom—going unnoticed can be a great benefit. Invisibility is one thing but effectively hiding your home and your possessions can be harder. As an action, you can expend 1 charge to draw a large X on one object up to the size of a normal door. This has no effect on criaturas, or objects worn by criaturas. criaturas other than you that see the marked object roll a CD 10 Inteligencia _tirada de salvación_ . en una salvación fallida, they do not notice the marked object as anything out of the ordinary from its surroundings (such as a blasphemous icon in a church, a barrel of gunpowder in a kitchen, or an unsheathed weapon resting against the wall of a bedroom going unnoticed). en un éxito, they can interact with the object normally. A criatura that remains in the area and is consciously searching for the kind of object that you have marked receives a new tirada de salvación at the end of each minuto. A criatura interacting with a marked object automatically reveals it to todas las criaturas who observe the interaction. A charcoal mark lasts for 24 horas or until it is wiped away as an action. 

Alternatively, you can expend 2 charges to increase the CD to notice the object to 15\. 

The charcoal has 2 charges and regains 1 charge each dusk. If you expend the last charge, the charcoal is consumed.

name: Chariot a la Calabaza
desc:
The original chariot a la Calabaza was created by a powerful wizard with a penchant for transmutation and riding in style. It is pulled by two spectral stallions with flowing manes and tails, who function as per the __phantom steed_  spell. As an action, you may speak the command word to transform the chariot into a pumpkin two pies in diameter. Speaking the command word again transforms the pumpkin into a carriage and resummons the horses.

While in pumpkin form, the chariot is, in truth, a pumpkin, except that it does not naturally decay. Attempts to carve, smash, or draw upon the pumpkin are reflected onto the chariot’s form when it reappears, although the horses seem to remain unscathed regardless of such events.

name: Charlatan's Veneer
desc: This silken scarf is a more powerful version of the Commoner's Veneer (see page 128). When in an area containing 12 or more humanoids, Sabiduría (Percepción) checks to spot you have desventaja. You can use a acción adicional to call on the power in the scarf to invoke a sense of trust in those to whom you speak. If you do so, you have ventaja on the next Carisma (Persuasión) check you make against a humanoid while you are in an area containing 12 or more humanoids. In addition, while wearing the scarf, you can use modify memory on a humanoid you have successfully persuaded in the last 24 horas. The scarf can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Charm of Restoration
desc: This fist-sized ball of tightly-wound green fronds contains the bark of a mágico plant with curative properties. A natural loop is formed from one of the fronds, allowing the charm to be hung from a pack, belt, or weapon pommel. As long as you carry this charm, whenever you are objetivoed by a spell or mágico effect that restores your puntos de golpe, you regain an extra 1 punto de golpe.

name: Chessboard of Gwenddoleu Ap Ceido
desc: You can use 1d4–1 actions (minimum 1 action) to place each silver and crystal chess piece in its correct starting square on this gold chessboard. When you do so, the pieces emit noises and move themselves about the board in a thrilling game that lasts 1d4+1 minutos. Other criaturas within 60 pies make a CD 18 Sabiduría _tirada de salvación_ . en una salvación fallida, a criatura is compelled to use its action each turn watching the chess game and it has _disadvantage_ on Sabiduría (Percepción) checks until the match ends or something harmful is done to it.

name: Chieftain's Axe
desc: Furs conceal the worn runes lining the haft of this oversized, silver-headed battleaxe. You gain a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this silvered, magic weapon.

name: Chillblain Armor
desc: This armor is forged from overlapping blue steel plates or blue rings and has a frosted appearance. While wearing this armor, you gain a +1 bonus to AC, and you have resistance to daño de frío. In addition, when a criatura hits you with a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo con arma, it debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Constitución or become numbed by the supernatural frío radiating from the armor. A criatura numbed by the frío can use either an action or acción adicional on its turn, not both, and its movement Velocidad is reduced by 10 pies until the end of its next turn.

name: Chime of Opening
desc:
Este tubo metálico hueco mide aproximadamente 30 centímetros de largo y pesa 500 gramos. Puedes golpearlo como una acción, apuntando con él hacia un objeto a 36 metros o menos de ti que pueda abrirse, como una puerta, una tapa o una cerradura. El campanillo emite un tono claro y uno de los cerrojos o pestillos del objeto se abre, a menos que el sonido no pueda alcanzar el objeto. Si no quedan cerrojos ni pestillos, el propio objeto se abre.

El campanillo puede usarse diez veces. Tras la décima vez, se agrieta y queda inutilizable.

name: Chime of Opening
desc: You can use an action to strike this pie-long metal tube while pointing it at an object that can be opened (such as a lid, lock, or window) within 120 pies. The chime sounds and one lock or latch on the object opens as long as the sound can alcance the object. If no closures remain, the object itself opens. After being struck 10 times, the chime cracks and becomes useless.

name: Chronomancer's Pocket Clock
desc: This golden pocketwatch has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges daily at midnight. While holding it, you can use an action to wind it and expend 1 charge to cast the haste spell from it. If the pendant is destroyed (AC 14, 15 puntos de golpe) while it has 3 charges, the criatura that broke it gains the effects of the time stop spell.

name: Cinch of the Wolfmother
desc: This belt is made of the treated and tanned intestines of a dire wolf, enchanted to imbue those who wear it with the ferocity and determination of the wolf. While wearing this belt, you can use an action to cast the druidcraft or speak with animals spell from it at will. In addition, you have ventaja on Sabiduría (Percepción) checks that rely on hearing or smell. If you are reduced to 0 puntos de golpe while attuned to the belt and fail two death tirada de salvacións, you die immediately as your body violently erupts in a shower of blood, and a dire wolf emerges from your entrails. You assume control of the dire wolf, and it gains additional puntos de golpe equal to half of your maximum puntos de golpe prior to death. The belt then crumbles and is destroyed. If the wolf is objetivoed by a remove curse spell, then you are reborn when the wolf dies, just as the wolf was born when you died. However, if the curse remains after the wolf dies, you remain dead.

name: Cipher Sword
desc:
This sword’s blade is plated with alchemical silver, its hilt stylized to resemble an open book from which the blade emerges. Despite its masterfully-crafted appearance, however, a cipher sword is uncomfortable to hold and strangely unwieldy. It has the a dos manos and pesada properties and causa 2d8 daño cortante on a hit, but you feel this is only a fraction of its potential.

_**Curse**_. There are other cipher swords owned by a variety of criaturas across the planes. Most wielders consider themselves part of an exclusive group and expect the loyalty and cooperation of those with less mastery, regardless of other alliances. Attaining even a novice level of mastery attracts the attention of other wielders, who may have expectations of you.

The cipher sword also has the following properties:

* You are not considered proficient with this weapon.
* While wielding this weapon, you don’t benefit from any feature that would grant you additional attacks.

**_Escalation._** This weapon is immensely powerful for those willing to solve the riddle of its use. Once per week, if you’ve successfully reduced a dangerous enemigo (as determined by the Narrator) to 0 puntos de golpe with it since the last time you finished a descanso largo, make a CD 14 Inteligencia check to meditate on the sword’s secrets. en un fallo, you gain +1 to future attempts at this check. en un éxito, your level of mastery increases, you lose any bonus gained from failed attempts, the CD to advance again increases by 4, and the time between attempts increases by 1 week. If you ever willingly end your attunement to this weapon, you take 8 (4d4) daño psíquico that cannot be negated or reduced and lose all mastery you’ve gained.

The levels of mastery are as follows:

_Novice:_ You now are proficient with this weapon, and it gains the sutil property. However, wielding anything else begins to feel wrong to you, and you suffer _disadvantage_  on all melee weapon attacks made with a different weapon.

_Apprentice:_ You gain +1 to _attack and damage rolls_ with this weapon. You can also now attack twice, instead of once, when you take the Attack action with this weapon on your turn. Additionally, you now suffer _disadvantage_  on all weapon attacks with other weapons.

_Expert:_ Your bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  with this weapon increases to +2 and it gains the Vicious property. When you make a weapon attack with a different weapon, you now also take 4 (2d4) daño psíquico. This damage cannot be negated or reduced by any means.

_Master:_ Your bonus to _attack and damage rolls_ with this weapon increases to +3, and you can summon it to your hand as a acción adicional so long as you are on the same plane as it. Additionally, once per _short rest_ , when you successfully attack a criatura with it, you immediately learn about any special defenses or weaknesses that criatura possesses as the blade imparts the Sabiduría of previous wielders. Additionally, the daño psíquico you take from making a weapon attack with a different weapon increases to 8 (4d4).

name: Circlet of Blasting
desc: Mientras llevas este aro, puedes usar una acción para lanzar el conjuro _scorching ray_ con él. Cuando realizas los ataques del conjuro, lo haces con un bonificador de ataque de +5. El aro no puede usarse de esta manera de nuevo hasta el siguiente amanecer.

name: Circlet of Blasting
desc: Once per dawn, while wearing this circlet you can use an action to cast _scorching ray_ . The attack bonus for the spell when cast this way is +5.

name: Circlet of Holly
desc:
While wearing this circlet, you gain the following benefits: - **Language of the Fey**. You can speak and understand Silvano. - **Friend of the Fey.** You have ventaja on ability checks to interact socially with fey criaturas.
- **veneno Sense.** You know if any food or drink you are holding contains veneno.

name: Circlet of Persuasion
desc: While wearing this circlet, you have ventaja on Carisma (Persuasión) checks.

name: Circlet of the Apprentice
desc:
This simple circlet has the color of lightly rusted iron and is highlighted by a large violet gem in its center, which appears to contain a slowly-moving metallic fluid.

While attuned to this circlet, you gain a +1 bonus to all _tirada de salvacións_ . Additionally, when you fail a tirada de salvación, you can choose to succeed instead. You can’t use this property again until the following dawn.

**Curse.** The true name of the criatura who crafted this circlet is forever instilled within it, and it becomes aware of you upon attunement. If that criatura forces you to make a _tirada de salvación_ , you automatically fail, and you can’t use this circlet to succeed. You can learn the name of the criatura with legend lore or similar magic. Short of powerful magic (such as __wish_ ), only the maker’s willing touch or death (yours or theirs) allows you to end your attunement to the circlet. If you willingly end your attunement after the maker’s death, the circlet loses all mágico properties.

name: Clacking Teeth
desc: Taken from a Fleshspurned (see Tome of Beasts 2), a toothy ghost, this bony jaw holds oversized teeth that sweat ectoplasm. The jaw has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dusk. While holding the jaw, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges and choose a objetivo within 30 pies of you. The jaw's teeth clatter together, and the objetivo debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be confused for 1 minuto. While confused, the objetivo acts as if under the effects of the confusion spell. The objetivo can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito.

name: Clamor Bell
desc: You can affix this small, brass bell to an object with the leather cords tied to its top. If anyone other than you picks up, interacts with, or uses the object without first speaking the bell's command word, it rings for 5 minutos or until you touch it and speak the command word again. The ringing is audible 100 pies away. If a criatura recibe an action to cut the bindings holding the bell onto the object, the bell ceases ringing 1 ronda after being released from the object.

name: Clarifying Goggles
desc: These goggles contain a lens of slightly rippled blue glass that turns clear underwater. While wearing these goggles underwater, you don't have desventaja on Sabiduría (Percepción) checks that rely on sight when peering through silt, murk, or other natural underwater phenomena that would ordinarily lightly obscure your vision. While wearing these goggles above water, your vision is lightly obscured.

name: Cleaning Concoction
desc: This fresh-smelling, clear green liquid can cover a Medium or smaller criatura or object (or matched set of objects, such as a suit of clothes or pair of boots). Applying the liquid recibe 1 minuto. It removes soiling, stains, and residue, and it neutralizes and removes odors, unless those odors are particularly pungent, such as in skunks or criaturas with the Stench trait. Once the potion has cleaned the objetivo, it evaporates, leaving the criatura or object both clean and dry.

name: Cloak of Arachnida
desc:
Esta fina prenda está confeccionada en seda negra entretejida con tenues hilos plateados. Mientras la llevas puesta, obtienes los siguientes beneficios:

* Tienes resistencia al daño por veneno.
* Tienes una velocidad de escalar igual a tu velocidad de caminar.
* Puedes moverte hacia arriba, hacia abajo y a través de superficies verticales, así como boca abajo por los techos, con las manos libres.
* No puedes quedar atrapado en telarañas de ningún tipo y puedes moverte a través de ellas como si fueran terreno difícil.
* Puedes usar una acción para lanzar el conjuro _web_ (CD de salvación 13). La telaraña creada por el conjuro ocupa el doble de su área normal. Una vez usado, esta propiedad de la capa no puede volver a usarse hasta el siguiente amanecer.

name: Cloak of Arachnida
desc:
While wearing this cloak, you gain the following benefits:

* Resistance to daño de veneno.
* A escalando Velocidad equal to your base Velocidad, allowing hands-free movement across vertical and upside down surfaces.
* The ability to ignore the effects of webs and move through them as if they were _difficult terrain_ .

Once between long rests you can use an action to cast the __web_  spell (save CD 13), except it fills double the normal area.

name: Cloak of Coagulation
desc: While wearing this rust red cloak, your blood quickly clots. When you are subjected to an effect that causes additional damage on subsequent rondas due to bleeding, blood loss, or continual daño necrótico, such as a horned devil's tail attack or a sword of wounding, the effect ceases after a single ronda of damage. For example, if a stirge hits you with its proboscis, you take the initial damage, plus el daño from blood loss on the following ronda, after which the wound clots, the stirge detaches, and you take no further damage. The cloak doesn't prevent a criatura from using such an attack or effect again; a horned devil or a stirge can attack you again, though the cloak will continue to stop any recurring effects after a single ronda.

name: Cloak of Displacement
desc: Mientras llevas esta capa, proyecta una ilusión que hace que parezcas estar de pie en un lugar cercano a tu ubicación real, lo que provoca que cualquier criatura tenga desventaja en las tiradas de ataque contra ti. Si recibes daño, la propiedad deja de funcionar hasta el inicio de tu siguiente turno. Esta propiedad se suprime mientras estás incapacitado, inmovilizado o de cualquier otra forma impedido de moverte.

name: Cloak of Displacement
desc: This cloak creates a visual illusion that distorts your position. _Attack rolls_  against you have _disadvantage_  unless the attacker does not rely on sight. When you take damage, this property stops until the start of your next turn, and it is otherwise negated if you are _incapacitated_ , _restrained_ , or unable to move.

name: Cloak of Elvenkind
desc: Mientras llevas esta capa con la capucha puesta, las pruebas de Sabiduría (Percepción) realizadas para verte tienen desventaja, y tú tienes ventaja en las pruebas de Destreza (Sigilo) realizadas para ocultarte, ya que el color de la capa cambia para camuflarte. Subir o bajar la capucha requiere una acción.

name: Cloak of Elvenkind
desc: While you wear this cloak with its hood up, its color changes to camouflage you. While camouflaged, you gain _advantage_  on Destreza (Sigilo) checks made to hide and criaturas have _disadvantage_  on Sabiduría (Percepción) checks made to see you. You can use an action to put the hood up or down.

name: Cloak of Petals
desc: This delicate cloak is covered in an array of pink, purple, and yellow flowers. While wearing this cloak, you have ventaja on Destreza (Sigilo) checks made to hide in areas containing flowering plants. The cloak has 3 charges. When a criatura you can see objetivos you with an attack, you can use your reacción to expend 1 of its charges to release a shower of petals from the cloak. If you do so, the attacker has desventaja on the tirada de ataque. The cloak regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Cloak of Protection
desc: Obtienes un bonificador de +1 a la CA y a las tiradas de salvación mientras llevas esta capa.

name: Cloak of Protection
desc: While wearing this cloak, you gain a +1 bonus to Clase de Armadura and _tirada de salvacións_ .

name: Cloak of Sails
desc: The interior of this simple, black cloak looks like white sailcloth. While wearing this cloak, you gain a +1 bonus to AC and tirada de salvacións. You lose this bonus while using the cloak's Sailcloth property.

name: Cloak of Squirrels
desc: This wool brocade cloak features a repeating pattern of squirrel heads and tree branches. It has 3 charges and regains all expended charges daily at dawn. While wearing this cloak, you can use an action to expend 1 charge to cast the legion of rabid squirrels spell (see Deep Magic for 5th Edition) from it. You don't need to be in a forest to cast the spell from this cloak, as the squirrels come from within the cloak. When the spell ends, the swarm vanishes back inside the cloak.

name: Cloak of Tentacles
desc:
This cloak settles around your shoulders like a writhing criatura, somehow simultaneously warm to the touch and icy frío against your skin.
  ***Shimmering Skin.*** While wearing this cloak, you can use an action to expose its shimmering inner lining. cada criatura within 10 pies of you and that can see you debe realizar a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en una salvación fallida, a criatura is incapacitado until the end of its next turn. Once used, this property of the cloak can't be used again until the next dawn.
  ***Writhing Tentacles.*** While wearing this cloak, you can use a acción adicional to command the cloak to sprout four writhing tentacles for 1 minuto. When a criatura hits you with a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo while within 10 pies of you, one of the tentacles lashes out and makes an tirada de ataque at your attacker with a +7 bonus. On a hit, the tentacle causa 2d10 daño contundente then falls still, becoming inert. When the duration ends or once all four tentacles become inert, this property of the cloak can't be used again until the next dawn

name: Cloak of the Bat
desc:
Mientras llevas esta capa, tienes ventaja en las pruebas de Destreza (Sigilo). En una zona de luz tenue u oscuridad, puedes agarrar los bordes de la capa con ambas manos y usarla para volar a una velocidad de 12 metros. Si en algún momento sueltas los bordes de la capa mientras vuelas de esta manera, o si ya no te encuentras en luz tenue u oscuridad, pierdes esta velocidad de vuelo.

Mientras llevas la capa en una zona de luz tenue u oscuridad, puedes usar tu acción para lanzar _polymorph_ sobre ti mismo y transformarte en un murciélago. Mientras estás en forma de murciélago, conservas tus puntuaciones de Inteligencia, Sabiduría y Carisma. La capa no puede usarse de esta manera de nuevo hasta el siguiente amanecer.

name: Cloak of the Bat
desc:
While wearing this cloak, you gain _advantage_  on Destreza (Sigilo) checks. In addition, while in an area of _dim ligera or darkness_ , you gain the following benefits:

* A fly Velocidad of 40 pies while gripping the edges of the cloak with both hands.
* Once between _long rests_  you can use an action to cast _polymorph_  on yourself, transforming into a bat. Unlike normal, you retain your Inteligencia, Sabiduría, and Carisma scores.

name: Cloak of the Bearfolk
desc: While wearing this cloak, your Constitución score is 15, and you have competencia in the Atletismo skill. The cloak has no effect if you already have competencia in this skill or if your Constitución score is already 15 or higher.

name: Cloak of the Eel
desc: While wearing this rough, blue-gray leather cloak, you have a nadando Velocidad of 40 pies. When you are hit with a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo con arma while wearing this cloak, you can use your reacción to generate a powerful electric charge. The attacker debe tener éxito en a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Destreza or take 2d6 daño de rayo. The attacker has desventaja on the tirada de salvación if it hits you with a metal weapon. The cloak can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Cloak of the Empire
