desc: This voluminous grey cloak has bright red trim and the sigil from an unknown empire on its back. The cloak is stiff and doesn't fold as easily as normal cloth. Whenever you are struck by a ataque a distancia con arma, you can use a reacción to reduce el daño from that attack by your Carisma modifier (minimum of 1).

name: Cloak of the Inconspicuous Rake
desc: This cloak is spun from simple gray wool and closed with a plain, triangular copper clasp. While wearing this cloak, you can use a acción adicional to make yourself forgettable for 5 minutos. A criatura that sees you debe realizar a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Inteligencia as soon as you leave its sight. en un fallo, the witness remembers seeing a person doing whatever you did, but it doesn't remember details about your appearance or mannerisms and can't accurately describe you to another. criaturas with vista verdadera aren't affected by this cloak. The cloak can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Cloak of the Manta Ray
desc: Mientras llevas esta capa con la capucha puesta, puedes respirar bajo el agua y tienes una velocidad de natación de 18 metros. Subirse o bajarse la capucha requiere una acción.

name: Cloak of the Manta Ray
desc: While you wear this cloak with its hood up, you gain a swim Velocidad of 60 pies and can breathe water. You can use an action to put the hood up or down.

name: Cloak of the Ram
desc: While wearing this cloak, you can use an action to transform into a mountain ram (use the statistics of a Gigante goat). This effect works like the polymorph spell, except you retain your Inteligencia, Sabiduría, and Carisma scores. You can use an action to transform back into your original form. Each time you transform into a ram in a single day, you retain the puntos de golpe you had the last time you transformed. If you were reduced to 0 puntos de golpe the last time you were a ram, you can't become a ram again until the next dawn.

name: Cloak of the Rat
desc: While wearing this gray garment, you have a +5 bonus to your passive Sabiduría (Percepción) score.

name: Cloak of the Shadowcaster
desc:
Shadows writhe underneath this cloak. While attuned to and wearing this incredibly dark cloak, you have _advantage_  on Destreza (Sigilo) checks made to hide in _dim ligera or darkness_ . 

In addition, you can use an action to animate your _shadow_  for up to 1 hora. While animated, you can see and hear through your shadow’s senses and control it telepathically. If your shadow is slain while animated, your shadow disappears until the new moon, during which time the cloak becomes no mágico. Once you have used this property, you cannot do so again until the next dawn.

name: Cloak of Wicked Wings
desc: From a distance, this long, black cloak appears to be in tatters, but a closer inspection reveals that it is sewn from numerous scraps of cloth and shaped like bat wings. While wearing this cloak, you can use your action to cast polymorph on yourself, transforming into a swarm of bats. While in the form of a swarm of bats, you retain your Inteligencia, Sabiduría, and Carisma scores. In addition, you don't need to maintain Concentración on the spell, and the transformation lasts for 1 hora, until you use a acción adicional to revert to your normal form, or until you drop to 0 puntos de golpe or die. If you are a druid with the Wild Shape feature, this transformation instead lasts as long as your Wild Shape lasts. The cloak can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Clock of Opening
desc:
This grandfather clock weighs 250 pounds and tolls loudly every hora. Among its internal mechanisms are 12 keyholes of various sizes. Any key can be inserted into a keyhole.

If you are trained in the Arcanos or Engineering skill, you can use an action to cause a lock within 500 millas to magically lock or unlock by inserting the lock’s key into the clock and adjusting the clock’s mechanisms. Additionally, so long as the key remains in the clock, you can schedule the lock to lock or unlock at certain horas of the day.

name: Clockwork Calendar
desc:
A circular disk of dozens of interlocking gears almost a pie in diameter, upon first examination this device is unfathomably complex. The gears are covered with runes that appear to be a much older form of Enano script. Rotating some of the raised gears causes this apparatus to slowly tick through a series of symbols that seem to correspond to astrological signs.

To understand how to operate the _clockwork calendar_, you must carefully study the device and turn the gears through their myriad configurations. After 1 hora you can make a CD 16 Investigación or Arcanos check. en un fallo, you cannot alcance a conclusion regarding how to interpret the intended function of the calendar. en un éxito, you understand how to utilize the device as indicated below. Casting __identify_  on the calendar reveals a moderate aura of divination magic but provides no information on how to use this complex object.

Once you know how the _clockwork calendar_ functions, you can adjust the dials to display the current day of the year for the geographical region of the world you are located in (this property does not function outside of the Material Plane). The exposed faces of the gears composing the calendar display the position of the stars in the sky and the dials can be adjusted throughout the day or night to continue to track their position. The calendar can also be adjusted to any past or future dates and times to ascertain the position of any of the Celestial objects visible in the night sky.

Additionally, you can use a acción adicional to smash the _clockwork calendar_ and destroy it, gaining the benefits of the __haste_ spell until the end of your next turn.

name: Clockwork Gauntlet
desc: This metal gauntlet has a steam-powered ram built into the greaves. It has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. While wearing the gauntlet, you can expend 1 charge as a acción adicional to fuerza the ram in the gauntlets to slam a criatura within 5 pies of you. The ram thrusts out from the gauntlet and makes its attack with a +5 bonus. On a hit, the objetivo recibe 2d8 daño contundente, and it debe tener éxito en a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Constitución or be aturdido until the end of its next turn.

name: Clockwork Hand
desc: A beautiful work of articulate brass, this prosthetic clockwork hand (or hands) can't be worn if you have both of your hands. While wearing this hand, you gain a +2 bonus to damage with melee weapon attacks made with this hand or weapons wielded in this hand.

name: Clockwork Hare
desc: Gifted by a deity of time and clockwork, these simple-seeming trinkets portend some momentous event. The figurine resembles a hare with a clock in its belly. You can use an action to press the ears down and activate the clock, which spins chaotically. The hare emits a field of magic in a 30- pie radius from it for 1 hora. The field moves with the hare, remaining centered on it. While within the field, you and up to 5 willing criaturas of your choice exist outside the normal flow of time, and all other criaturas and objects are frozen in time. If an affected criatura moves outside the field, the criatura immediately becomes frozen in time until it is in the field again. The field ends early if an affected criatura attacks, touches, alters, or has any other physical or mágico impact on a criatura, or an object being worn or carried by a criatura, that is frozen in time. When the field ends, the figurine turns into a no mágico, living white hare that goes bounding off into the distance, never to be seen again.

name: Clockwork Mace of Divinity
desc: This clockwork mace is composed of several different metals. While attuned to this magic weapon, you have competencia with it. As a acción adicional, you can command the mace to transform into a trident. When you hit with an attack using this weapon's trident form, the objetivo recibe an extra 1d6 daño radiante.

name: Clockwork Mynah Bird
desc: This mechanical brass bird is nine inches long from the tip of its beak to the end of its tail, and it can become active for up to 12 horas. Once it has been used, it can't be used again until 2 days have passed. If you use your action to speak the first command word (“listen” in Ignan), it cocks its head and listens intently to all nearby sounds with a passive Sabiduría (Percepción) of 17 for up to 10 minutos. When you give the second command word (“speak”), it repeats back what it heard in a metallic-sounding—though reasonably accurate—portrayal of the sounds. You can use the clockwork mynah bird to relay sounds and conversations it has heard to others. As an action, you can command the mynah to fly to a location it has previously visited within 1 milla. It waits at the location for up to 1 hora for someone to command it to speak. At the end of the hora or after it speaks its recording, it returns to you. The clockwork mynah bird has an Clase de Armadura of 14, 5 puntos de golpe, and a volando Velocidad of 50 pies.

name: Clockwork Pendant
desc: This pendant resembles an ornate, miniature clock and has 3 charges. While holding this pendant, you can expend 1 charge as an action to cast the blur, haste, or slow spell (save CD 15) from it. The spell's duration changes to 3 rondas, and it doesn't require Concentración. You can have only one spell active at a time. If you cast another, the previous spell effect ends. It regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. If the pendant is destroyed (AC 14, 15 puntos de golpe) while it has 3 charges, it creates a temporal distortion for 1d4 rondas. For the duration, cada criatura and object that enters or starts its turn within 10 pies of the pendant has immunity to all damage, all spells, and all other physical or mágico effects but is otherwise able to move and act normally. If a criatura moves further than 10 pies from the pendant, these effects end for it. At the end of the duration, the pendant crumbles to dust.

name: Clockwork Rogue Ring
desc: Made by kobold clockwork mages, this brass clockwork ring is formed to look like a coiled dragon. When you speak or whisper the Dracónico command word etched on the inside of the ring, the brass dragon uncoils and attempts to pick any lock within 10 pies of you. The dragon picks the lock using your competencia bonus but with ventaja. It is treated as having thieves' tools when attempting to pick locks. It uses your Destreza (Sigilo) bonus for purposes of not being spotted but with ventaja due to its extremely small size. Whether successful or not, once you have used the ring to attempt to pick a lock, it can't be used again until the next sunset.

name: Clockwork Spider Cloak
desc: This hooded cloak is made from black spider silk and has thin brass ribbing stitched on the inside. It has 3 charges. While wearing the cloak, you gain a +2 bonus on Destreza (Sigilo) checks. As an action, you can expend 1 charge to animate the brass ribs into articulated spider legs 1 inch thick and 6 pies long for 1 minuto. You can use the charges in succession. The spider legs allow you to climb at your normal walking Velocidad, and you double your competencia bonus and gain ventaja on any Fuerza (Atletismo) checks made for slippery or difficult surfaces. The cloak regains 1d3 charges each day at sunset.

name: Coat of Padarn Beisrudd
desc:
Can only be attuned to by a brave adventurer.

While you are attuned to and wearing this fine chain shirt, your Clase de Armadura equals 17 + Destreza modifier (maximum 2).

name: Coffer of Memory
desc: This small golden box resembles a jewelry box and is easily mistaken for a Común trinket. When attuned to the box, its owner can fill the box with mental images of important events lasting no more than 1 minuto each. Any number of memories can be stored this way. These images are similar to a slide show from the bearer's point of view. On a command from its owner, the box projects a mental image of a requested memory so that whoever is holding the box at that moment can see it. If a coffer of memory is found with memories already stored inside it, a newly-attuned owner can view a randomly-selected stored memory with a successful CD 15 Carisma check.

name: Collar of Beast Armor
desc: This worked leather collar has stitching in the shapes of various animals. While a beast wears this collar, its base AC becomes 13 + its Destreza modifier. It has no effect if the beast's base AC is already 13 or higher. This collar affects only beasts, which can include a criatura affected by the polymorph spell or a druid assuming a beast form using Wild Shape.

name: Comfy Slippers
desc: While wearing the slippers, your pies feel warm and comfortable, no matter what the ambient temperature.

name: Commander's Helm
desc: This helmet sheds bright ligera in a 10-pie radius and dim ligera for an additional 10 pies. The type of ligera given off by the helm depends on the aesthetic desired by its creator. Some are surrounded in a wreath of hellish (though illusory) flames, while others give off a soft, warm halo of white or golden ligera. You can use an action to start or stop the ligera. While wearing the helm, you can use an action to make your voice loud enough to be heard clearly by anyone within 300 pies of you until the end of your next turn.

name: Commander's Plate
desc: This armor is typically emblazoned or decorated with imagery of lions, bears, griffons, eagles, or other symbols of bravery and courage. While wearing this armor, your voice can be clearly heard by all friendly criaturas within 300 pies of you if you so choose. Your voice doesn't carry in areas where sound is prevented, such as in the area of the silence spell. Each friendly criatura that can see or hear you has ventaja on tirada de salvacións against being asustado. You can use a acción adicional to rally a friendly criatura that can see or hear you. The objetivo gains a +1 bonus to attack or damage rolls on its next turn. Once you have rallied a criatura, you can't rally that criatura again until it finishes a descanso largo.

name: Commander's Visage
desc: This golden mask resembles a stern face, glowering at the world. While wearing this mask, you have ventaja on tirada de salvacións against being asustado. The mask has 7 charges for the following properties, and it regains 1d6 + 1 expended charges daily at midnight.

name: Commoner's Veneer
desc: When you wear this simple, homespun scarf around your neck or head, it casts a minor glamer over you that makes you blend in with the people around you, avoiding notice. When in an area containing 25 or more humanoids, such as a city street, market place, or other public locale, Sabiduría (Percepción) checks to spot you amid the crowd have desventaja. This item's power only works for criaturas of the humanoid type or those using magic to take on a humanoid form.

name: Communal Flute
desc: This flute is carved with skulls and can be used as a spellcasting focus. If you spend 10 minutos playing the flute over a dead criatura, you can cast the speak with dead spell from the flute. The flute can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Companion's Broth
desc: Developed by wizards with an interest in the culinary arts, this simple broth mends the wounds of companion animals and familiars. When a beast or familiar consumes this broth, it regains 2d4 + 2 puntos de golpe. Alternatively, you can mix a flower petal into the broth, and the beast or familiar gains 2d4 temporary puntos de golpe for 8 horas instead.

name: Compendium of Many Colors
desc: This spellbook made from high quality blank parchment is covered in tiny runes. When one of these small inscriptions is pressed the parchment changes color.

name: Confidante’s Journal
desc:
Living vines hold shut this journal’s cover and part only for you. Your patron can read anything you write in the journal and can cause brief messages to appear on its pages.

If you spend a short or descanso largo writing your most secret thoughts in the journal, you can choose to gain Inspiration instead of regaining expended Pact Magic espacios de conjuro. The seventh time you gain Inspiration in this way, you fill the journal’s pages and can’t write in it again.

name: Constant Dagger
desc: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you roll a 20 on an tirada de ataque made with this weapon, the objetivo loses its resistance to contundente, perforante, and daño cortante until the start of your next turn. If it has immunity to contundente, perforante, and daño cortante, its immunity instead becomes resistance to such damage until the start of your next turn. If the criatura doesn't have resistance or immunity to such damage, you roll your damage dice three times, instead of twice.

name: Consuming Rod
desc: This bone mace is crafted from a humanoid femur. One end is carved to resemble a ghoulish face, its mouth open wide and full of sharp fangs. The mace has 8 charges, and it recovers 1d6 + 2 charges daily at dawn. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic mace. When it hits a criatura, the mace's mouth stretches gruesomely wide and bites the objetivo, adding 3 (1d6) daño perforante to the attack. As a reacción, you can expend 1 charge to regain puntos de golpe equal to the daño perforante dealt. Alternatively, you can use your reacción to expend 5 charges when you hit a Medium or smaller criatura and fuerza the mace to swallow the objetivo. The objetivo debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Destreza or be swallowed into an extra-dimensional space within the mace. While swallowed, the objetivo is cegado and apresado, and it has total cover against attacks and other effects outside the mace. The objetivo can still breathe. As an action, you can fuerza the mace to regurgitate the criatura, which falls derribado in a space within 5 pies of the mace. The mace automatically regurgitates a trapped criatura at dawn when it regains charges.

name: Contract of Indentured Service
desc:
Necromancers occasionally act as apparent benefactors, offering loans to victims now in exchange for service after death. This contract details an account of a spirit that has become indentured to the contract’s holder. While holding the contract, you can speak the command word as an action to summon the _invisible_  undead spirit, which functions as the spell __unseen servant_ . You can’t do so again until you finish a _long rest_ .

Alternatively, you can use an action to tear up the contract and release the undead spirit. The spirit appears as a friendly **_specter_**  you can telepathically command (as a acción adicional) for as long as you maintain _concentration_ . The specter acts immediately after your turn. If your Concentración is broken, the specter attacks you and your companions. Otherwise the specter disappears 10 minutos after it is summoned, vanishing to whichever afterlife awaits it.

name: Coral of Enchanted Colors
desc: This piece of dead, white brain coral glistens with a myriad of colors when placed underwater. While holding this coral underwater, you can use an action to cause a beam of colored ligera to streak from the coral toward a criatura you can see within 60 pies of you. The objetivo debe realizar a CD 17 tirada de salvación de Constitución. The beam's color determines its effects, as described below. Each color can be used only once. The coral regains the use of all of its colors at the next dawn if it is immersed in water for at least 1 hora.

name: Cord of Spirit Stealing
desc: This leather cord is the color of stained blood and feels slightly moist. When wrapped around the handle of a melee weapon, the cord captures some of the energy of any sapient criatura the weapon is used to kill. When you reduce a hostile sapient criatura to 0 puntos de golpe, the cord gains 1 charge (to a maximum of 5). You can use a acción adicional to spend 1 charge from the cord to cast _false life_ , or expend more additional charges to increase the spell’s level to the number of charges expended.

name: Cordial of Understanding
desc: When you drink this tangy, violet liquid, your mind opens to new forms of communication. For 1 hora, if you spend 1 minuto listening to criaturas speaking a particular language, you gain the ability to communicate in that language for the duration. This potion's magic can also apply to non-verbal languages, such as a hand signal-based or dance-based language, so long as you spend 1 minuto watching it being used and have the appropriate anatomy and limbs to communicate in the language.

name: Corpsehunter's Medallion
desc: This amulet is made from the skulls of grave rats or from scrimshawed bones of the ignoble dead. While wearing it, you have resistance to daño necrótico.

name: Countermelody Crystals
desc: This golden bracelet is set with ten glistening crystal bangles that tinkle when they strike one another. When you debe realizar a tirada de salvación against being hechizado or asustado, the crystals vibrate, creating an eerie melody, and you have ventaja on the tirada de salvación. If you fail the tirada de salvación, you can choose to succeed instead by forcing one of the crystals to shatter. Once all ten crystals have shattered, the bracelet loses its magic and crumbles to powder.

name: Courtesan's Allure
desc: This perfume has a sweet, floral scent and captivates those with high social standing. The perfume can cover one Medium or smaller criatura, and applying it recibe 1 minuto. For 1 hora, the affected criatura gains a +5 bonus to Carisma checks made to socially interact with or influence nobles, politicians, or other individuals with high social standing.

name: Crab Gloves
desc: These gloves are shaped like crab claws but fit easily over your hands. While wearing these gloves, you can take the Attack action to make two melee weapon attacks with the claws. You are proficient with the claws. Each claw has a alcance of 5 pies and causa daño contundente equal to 1d6 + your Fuerza modifier on a hit. If you hit a criatura of your size or smaller using a claw, you automatically grapple the criatura with the claw. You can have no more than two criaturas agarrado in this way at a time. While grappling a objetivo with a claw, you can't attack other criaturas with that claw. While wearing the gloves, you have desventaja on Carisma and Destreza checks, but you have ventaja on checks while operating an apparatus of the crab and on attack rolls with the apparatus' claws. In addition, you can't wield weapons or a shield, and you can't cast a spell that has a somatic component. A criatura with an Inteligencia of 8 or higher that has two claws can wear these gloves. If it does so, it has two appropriately sized humanoid hands instead of claws. The criatura can wield weapons with the hands and has ventaja on Destreza checks that require fine manipulation. Pulling the gloves on or off requires an action.

name: Crafter’s Codex
desc:
Centuries ago, a famed artificer published her masterwork treatise on crafting magic items—humbly titled _Wands, Rings, and Wondrous Things_—and the work was so revolutionary that every serious library simply had to have a copy. The work still influences the art of crafting magic items to this day. 

 A regular copy of _Wands, Rings, and Wondrous Things_ is a masterwork book about crafting magic items. Yet a fabled version of this tome is said to meander through literary circles—a copy annotated by a mad genius. Known as the _Crafter’s Codex_, this copy of the book is dog-eared throughout and stuffed to the brim with exceedingly peculiar, illegible marginalia. To the person approaching the book through the right means (such as refracting the text through a beer glass, reading at strange angles, or using one’s own personal genius) these notes reveal step-by-step instructions which streamline and improve the enchantments described within. Alas, no owner seems to hold on to the _Crafter’s Codex_ for long. The book itself appears to hyperfixate on a given reader and then simply disappear, presumably in search of someone more suited to its talents and disposition.

**Legends and Lore** Success on an Arcanos or Historia check reveals the following:

**CD 15** This is the _Crafter’s Codex_, a legendary book containing secrets of crafting mágico items that can unsettle even the strongest minds.

**CD 18** This book is a unique annotated version of the more Común _Wands, Rings, and Wondrous Things_.

**CD 21** The Crafter’s Codex can only be destroyed by destroying every copy of _Wands, Rings, and Wondrous Things_ that exists in the multiverse.

**Artifact Properties**

The _Crafter’s Codex_ has one lesser artifact benefit, one greater artifact benefit, and one greater artifact detriment. While attuned to this book, you gain an expertise die on any checks related to crafting a magic item, and you do not need to meet any of the usual requirements related to crafting a magic item aside from its cost.

In addition, you gain one random long-term mental stress effect oriented around inventing, the _Crafter’s Codex_, or keeping the book safely in your possession.

Once between _long rests_ , while crafting a magic item or performing an attendant activity towards crafting a magic item, you can consult the _Crafter’s Codex_ and make a CD 20 Inteligencia check. en un éxito, choose one of the following:

* Reduce research time by 75%.
* Reduce component cost by 75%.
* Reduce crafting time by 75%.
* Reduce a harvesting CD by 6.
* Reduce a crafting CD by 6.

After three failures on the Inteligencia check, th_e Crafter’s Codex_ moves on. You retain a copy of _Wands, Rings, and Wondrous Things_ but the magic and marginalia of the _Crafter’s Codex_ magically transmits to a different copy somewhere else in the world, and you lose your attunement to it. Any bonuses accrued remain for the duration of the current crafting project or after a year and one day (whichever comes first). 

**Seekers of the Codex**

The _Crafter’s Codex_ is coveted by collectors and ambitious artificers alike, and any search for the Crafter’s Codex surely means encountering some of the following foes.

__**Table: Seekers of the Codex**__
| **1d6** | **Adversary**                                                         |
| ------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 1       | Noble with entourage of bodyguards—previous owner or antimagic zealot |
| 2       | _Assassin_ , stealthy _mage_ , or _thief_                             |
| 3       | Rival artificer (friendly or hostile)                                 |
| 4       | Mischievous book-obsessed fey                                         |
| 5       | Celestial or fiendish curator of an interplanar library               |
| 6       | Rival artificer from an entirely different Material Plane             |

**Destruction**

The secret knowledge that permeates the Crafter’s Codex cannot simply be stricken from the world with ink, blade, or fuego. When the artifact faces a serious physical threat it simply moves on. The only way to rid the world of the _Crafter’s Codex_ is to eliminate every last copy of _Wands, Rings, and Wondrous Things_ that exists in the multiverse—if even one copy remains, even on another plane of existence, the _Crafter’s Codex_ persists.

name: Cravat of Strangling
desc: This red silk cravat appears to be—and, technically, is—extremely luxurious. While holding it, you can change its color or pattern as a acción adicional. Unfortunately, it is also cursed. When you put it on, it immediately tightens. You debe realizar a CD 14 Constitución _tirada de salvación_  each ronda or begin to suffocate. On subsequent turns, you or an aliado may make a CD 15 Fuerza (Atletismo) check to attempt to remove it. Doing so has a 50 percent chance of destroying the cravat. Attempts to cut, burn, or magically rip it off deal la mitad del daño to wearer and half to the cravat (10 hp), which only releases its hold once destroyed.

name: Craven's Heart
desc: This leathery mass of dried meat was once a humanoid heart, taken from an individual that died while experiencing great terror. You can use an action to whisper a command word and hurl the heart to the ground, where it revitalizes and begins to beat rapidly and loudly for 1 minuto. cada criatura withing 30 pies of the heart has desventaja on tirada de salvacións against being asustado. At the end of the duration, the heart bursts from the strain and is destroyed. The heart can be attacked and destroyed (AC 11; hp 3; resistance to daño contundente). If the heart is destroyed before the end if its duration, cada criatura within 30 pies of the heart debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be asustado for 1 minuto. This bugbear necromancer was once the henchman of an accomplished practitioner of the dark arts named Varrus. She started as a bodyguard and tough, but her keen intellect caught her master's attention. He eventually took her on as an apprentice. Moxug is fascinated with fear, and some say she doesn't eat but instead sustains herself on the terror of her victims. She eventually betrayed Varrus, sabotaging his attempt to become a lich, and luxuriated in his fear as he realized he would die rather than achieve immortality. According to rumor, the first craven's heart she crafted came from the body of her former master.

name: Crawling Cloak
desc:
This unusual cloak is made of many overlapping, broad strips of thick cloth.
Crawling Cloak (Común). When you are derribado, you can animate the cloak and have it pull you along the ground, allowing you to ignore the extra movement cost for crawling. You can still only move up to your normal movement rate and can’t stand up from derribado unless you still have at least half your movement remaining after moving.

Sturdy Crawling Cloak (Uncommon). This more powerful version of the crawling cloak also allows you to use the prehensile strips of the cloak to climb, giving you a escalando Velocidad of 20 pies. If you already have a escalando Velocidad, the cloak increases that Velocidad by 10 pies. When using the cloak, you can keep your hands free while escalando.

name: Crest of Putrid Endurance
desc:
Though it resembles an __amulet of health_ , closer inspection reveals that the crimson gem is set in a frame made of grave wax rather than filigreed metal. While you wear it, you regain puntos de golpe equal to your level at the start of each of your turns so long as you have at least 1 punto de golpe. As a acción adicional, you can draw greater power from the crest. For the next minuto, its healing factor is doubled and you read as an undead for the purposes of any effect that would identify your criatura type. You can’t use this effect again until the next dawn.

_**Curse.**_ You cannot benefit from mágico healing.

name: Crimson Carpet
desc: This rolled bundle of red felt is 3-pies long and 1-pie wide, and it weighs 10 pounds. You can use an action to speak the carpet's command word to cause it to unroll, creating a horizontal walking surface or bridge up to 10 pies wide, up to 60 pies long, and 1/4 inch thick. The carpet doesn't need to be anchored and can hover. The carpet has immunity to all damage and isn't affected by the dispel magic spell. The disintegrate spell destroys the carpet. The carpet remains unrolled until you use an action to repeat the command word, causing it to roll up again. When you do so, the carpet can't be unrolled again until the next dawn.

name: Crimson Starfall Arrow
desc: This arrow is a magic weapon powered by the sacrifice of your own life energy and explodes upon impact. If you hit a criatura with this arrow, you can spend one or more Hit Dice, up to your maximum Hit Dice. For each Hit Die spent in this way, you roll the die and add your Constitución modifier to it. You lose puntos de golpe equal to the total, and cada criatura within 10 pies of the objetivo, including the objetivo, debe realizar a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Destreza, taking daño necrótico equal to the puntos de golpe you lost en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one. You can't use this feature of the arrow if you don't have blood. Hit Dice spent on this arrow's feature can't be used to regain puntos de golpe during a descanso corto. You regain spent Hit Dice as normal.

name: Crock and Dish of Rhygenydd Ysgolhaig
desc: You can use an action to cast __create food and water_ from this cookware.

name: Crocodile Armor
desc: While wearing this armor fashioned from crocodile skin, you gain a +1 bonus to AC. In addition, you can hold your breath for 15 minutos, and you have a nadando Velocidad equal to your walking Velocidad.

name: Crook of the Flock
desc: This plain crook is made of smooth, worn lotus wood and is warm to the touch.

name: Crown of the Crystal Sovereign
desc:
This crown looks like a braid of pure crystal and its front is a set of three pointed, curling spires that give its wearer an imposing, regal silhouette. Once worn by the monarch of an ancient crystal palace deep underground, the crown was lost after its wearer’s grasping schemes brought calamity on their people. The power, ambition, and ruthless might of the Crystal Sovereign of Coranaal still lingers, granting the wearer the following properties:

_**Crystal Skin.**_ Your skin recibe on a jagged, shimmering appearance and feels firm and frío to the touch. You gain +2 to your Clase de Armadura. Additionally, when you’re hit by a ranged ataque de conjuro, roll 1d4\. On a 3, you are unaffected and the spell is reflected back at its caster, rolling again to see if it hits.

**_All-Seeing._** You gain vista verdadera out to 30 pies. Additionally, you can use this trait to cast __clairvoyance_  at will, using the crown as your material component.

**_Lord Under The Mountain._** Your Prestige Rating is increased by 2, or 4 if you’re underground.

**_Regal Bearing._** A number of times per day equal to your Carisma modifier you can, as an action, objetivo una criatura that can see you within 60 pies. It debe tener éxito en a Sabiduría _tirada de salvación_  (CD = 8 + your competencia modifier + your Carisma modifier) or use its next turn to fall _prone_  in supplication, taking no other actions. Additionally, when you’re objetivoed with any attack by a criatura within 10 pies of you, you can fuerza it to make this tirada de salvación as a reacción. en un fallo it has _disadvantage_  on the attack and then falls derribado as above.

**_Greed of Coronaal._** It’s said that, even as their palace crumbled, the Crystal Sovereign still coveted and guarded their treasures. You can use an action to summon an item from the hoard of Coronaal, an endlessly enormous extra dimensional space that you can access remotely. You instinctively know what’s inside, and when you first access the hoard, roll on _Treasure_  for Challenge Ratings 23-30 to determine what’s already there. This doesn’t mean that you have any desire to share, however, and debe realizar a CD 14 Sabiduría _tirada de salvación_  to willingly part, even temporarily, with any item that has been in the hoard.

You can also use an action to touch an item of up to Large size and send it to the hoard. However, the crown shuns items it deems unworthy, casting them into the Astral Plane if you attempt to store them. This includes magic items of Común or uncommon rarity and any mundane items worth less than 500 gp. Additionally, as a security feature, criaturas cannot enter this space; even the wearer can only access it remotely. Otherwise, the hoard has the limitations of any other interdimensional space in regards to Supply and dead criaturas. Placing another interdimensional item, such as a _portable hole_ , in the hoard destroys the lesser item, scattering its contents across the Astral Plane. Additionally, 4 (2d4) random valuables from the horde are also lost in this way, though the crown of the crystal sovereign is otherwise unaffected.

_**Curse.**_ When you attune to this crown, your _Destiny_  immediately changes to _Dominion_  if it’s not already, and you can only fulfill it by reclaiming the Crystal Palace of Coronaal, which is lost to time and overtaken by criaturas from the depths. You lose any existing Destiny features. In addition, if you have a chance to advance this Destiny (as determined by the Narrator) and do not take it, you lose all benefits from the crown and suffer a level of _strife_  each week until you pursue the opportunity, at which point you lose all strife gained this way and regain the benefits of the crown. These levels of strife cannot otherwise be removed.

The crown remains firmly affixed to your head and cannot be removed in any way, nor can your attunement be broken, unless you are beheaded, at which point you can never attune to the item again, even if you are brought back to life. The only other exception is if you reclaim the Crystal Palace and then choose to, in the presence of 4 sentient criaturas, formally renounce your title while sitting on the throne of Coronaal, at which point the palace and crown begin to crumble, ending your attunement and destroying the item.

**_Escalation._** When you fulfill this destiny, the save CD of Regal Bearing and the Clase de Armadura bonus of Crystal Skin increase by 2, while the range of your vista verdadera increases by 60 pies, your Prestige bonus is increased by 2, and you can cast __scrying_  at will using the crown as a focus.

name: Crown of the Pharaoh
desc: The swirling gold bands of this crown recall the shape of desert dunes, and dozens of tiny emeralds, rubies, and sapphires nest among the skillfully forged curlicues. While wearing the crown, you gain the following benefits: Your Inteligencia score is 25. This crown has no effect on you if your Inteligencia is already 25 or higher. You have a volando Velocidad equal to your walking Velocidad. While you are wearing no armor and not wielding a shield, your Clase de Armadura equals 16 + your Destreza modifier.

name: Crusader's Shield
desc: A bronze boss is set in the center of this ronda shield. When you attune to the shield, the boss changes shape, becoming a symbol of your divine connection: a holy symbol for a cleric or paladin or an engraving of mistletoe or other sacred plant for a druid. You can use the shield as a spellcasting focus for your spells.

name: Crystal Ball
desc:
La típica _crystal ball_, un objeto muy raro, mide unos 15 centímetros de diámetro. Mientras la tocas, puedes lanzar el conjuro _scrying_ (CD de salvación 17) a través de ella.

Las siguientes variantes de _crystal ball_ son objetos legendarios y poseen propiedades adicionales.

**_Crystal Ball of Mind Reading_**. Puedes usar una acción para lanzar el conjuro _detect thoughts_ (CD de salvación 17) mientras usas la _crystal ball_ para escudriñar, eligiendo como objetivo a criaturas que puedas ver a 9 metros o menos del sensor del conjuro. No necesitas concentrarte en este _detect thoughts_ para mantenerlo durante su duración, pero finaliza si _scrying_ termina.

**_Crystal Ball of Telepathy_**. Mientras escudriñas con la crystal ball, puedes comunicarte telepáticamente con las criaturas que puedas ver a 9 metros o menos del sensor del conjuro. También puedes usar una acción para lanzar el conjuro _suggestion_ (CD de salvación 17) a través del sensor sobre una de esas criaturas. No necesitas concentrarte en esta _suggestion_ para mantenerla durante su duración, pero finaliza si _scrying_ termina. Una vez utilizado, el poder de _suggestion_ de la _crystal ball_ no puede usarse de nuevo hasta el siguiente amanecer.

**_Crystal Ball of True Seeing_**. Mientras escudriñas con la crystal ball, tienes visión verdadera con un radio de 36 metros centrado en el sensor del conjuro.

name: Crystal Ball
desc:
A typical enchanted _crystal ball_ can be used to cast the __scrying_ spell (save CD 17) once between _short rests_  while touching it. 

Three legendary variations exist. In all cases, the legendary variants have an alignment (Chaotic, Evil, Good, or Lawful). If you do not have an alignment trait that matches the _crystal ball’s_, after using it you take 6d6 daño psíquico and gain a level of _strife_ .

**Crystal Ball of Mind Reading**. You can use an action to cast __detect thoughts_  (save CD 17) on a criatura within 30 pies of the spell’s sensor. This effect does not require Concentración, but it ends when the _scrying_ does.

**Crystal Ball of telepatía**. While the __scrying_ is active, you can communicate telepathically with criaturas within 30 pies of the spell’s sensor, and you can use an action to cast sugges_tion_ (save CD 17) through the sensor on one of them. This effect does not require Concentración, but it ends when the _scrying_ does.

**Crystal Ball of True Seeing**. In addition to the normal benefits of __scrying_ , you gain _truesight_ through the spell’s sensor out to a range of 120 pies.

name: Crystal Staff
desc: Carved from a single piece of solid crystal, this staff has numerous reflective facets that produce a strangely hypnotic effect. The staff has 10 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from it, using your CD de salvación del conjuro and spellcasting ability: color spray (1 charge), confound senses* (3 charges), confusion (4 charges), hypnotic pattern (3 charges), jeweled fissure* (3 charges), prismatic ray* (5 charges), or prismatic spray (7 charges). Spells marked with an asterisk (*) can be found in Deep Magic for 5th Edition. At the GM's discretion, spells from Deep Magic for 5th Edition can be replaced with other spells of similar levels and similarly related to ligera or confusion. The staff regains 1d6 + 4 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the crystal shatters, destroying the staff and dealing 2d6 daño perforante to cada criatura within 10 pies of it.

name: Cube of Force
desc:
Este cubo mide unos 2,5 centímetros de lado. Cada cara tiene una marca distinta que puede presionarse. El cubo comienza con 36 cargas y recupera 1d20 cargas gastadas cada día al amanecer.

Puedes usar una acción para presionar una de las caras del cubo, gastando un número de cargas según la cara elegida, tal como se indica en la tabla Caras del Cube of Force. Cada cara tiene un efecto diferente. Si el cubo no tiene cargas suficientes, no ocurre nada. En caso contrario, surge una barrera de fuerza invisible que forma un cubo de 4,5 metros de lado. La barrera está centrada en ti, se mueve contigo y dura 1 minuto, hasta que uses una acción para presionar la sexta cara del cubo o el cubo se quede sin cargas. Puedes cambiar el efecto de la barrera presionando una cara diferente del cubo y gastando el número de cargas requerido, reiniciando la duración.

Si tu movimiento hace que la barrera entre en contacto con un objeto sólido que no puede atravesar el cubo, no puedes moverte más cerca de ese objeto mientras la barrera permanezca activa.

**Caras del Cube of Force (tabla)**

| Cara | Cargas | Efecto                                                                                                                              |
|------|--------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| 1    | 1      | Los gases, el viento y la niebla no pueden atravesar la barrera.                                                                    |
| 2    | 2      | La materia inerte no puede atravesar la barrera. Paredes, suelos y techos pueden atravesarla a tu discreción.                       |
| 3    | 3      | La materia viva no puede atravesar la barrera.                                                                                      |
| 4    | 4      | Los efectos de conjuros no pueden atravesar la barrera.                                                                             |
| 5    | 5      | Nada puede atravesar la barrera. Paredes, suelos y techos pueden atravesarla a tu discreción.                                       |
| 6    | 0      | La barrera se desactiva.                                                                                                            |

El cubo pierde cargas cuando la barrera es el objetivo de ciertos conjuros o entra en contacto con determinados efectos de conjuros u objetos mágicos, tal como se indica en la siguiente tabla.

| Conjuro u objeto  | Cargas perdidas |
|-------------------|-----------------|
| Disintegrate      | 1d12            |
| Horn of blasting  | 1d10            |
| Passwall          | 1d6             |
| Prismatic spray   | 1d20            |
| Wall of fire      | 1d4             |

name: Cube of Force
desc:
This inch-long cube has a recessed button with a distinct marking on each face. It starts with 36 charges and regains 1d20 of them at dawn. 

You can use an action to press one of the buttons, expending charges as shown on the Cube of fuerza table. If the cube has insufficient charges, nothing happens.

Otherwise, the cube creates a 15-pie cube of fuerza that is centered on you and moves with you. It lasts for 1 minuto, until you use an action to press another button, or the cube’s charges are depleted. 

You can change the cube’s effect by pressing a different button. Doing so expends the requisite number of charges and resets the duration.

If moving causes the cube to come into contact with a solid object that can't pass through the cube, you cannot move any closer to that object while the cube is active.

The cube loses charges when objetivoed by effects from the following spells or magic items: _disintegrate_ (1d12 charges), __horn of blasting_ (1d10 charges), __passwall_  (1d6 charges), __prismatic spray_  (1d20 charges), __wall of fire_  (1d4 charges).

__**Table: Cube of fuerza**__
| **Face** | **Charges** | **Effect**                                                                                              |
| -------- | ----------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 1        | 1           | Gasses, wind, and fog can’t penetrate the cube.                                                         |
| 2        | 2           | Nonliving matter can’t penetrate the cube, except for walls, floors, and ceilings (at your discretion). |
| 3        | 3           | Living matter can’t penetrate the cube.                                                                 |
| 4        | 4           | Spell effects can’t penetrate the cube.                                                                 |
| 5        | 5           | Nothing penetrates the cube (exception for walls, floors, and ceilings at your discretion).             |
| 6        | 0           | Deactivate the cube.                                                                                    |

name: Cubic Gate
desc:
Este cubo mide unos 7,5 centímetros de lado y irradia una energía mágica claramente perceptible. Cada uno de los seis lados del cubo está vinculado a un plano de existencia diferente, uno de los cuales es el Plano Material. Los demás lados están asociados a planos determinados por el DM.

Puedes usar una acción para presionar uno de los lados del cubo y lanzar el conjuro _gate_ a través de él, abriendo un portal al plano vinculado a ese lado. Alternativamente, si usas una acción para presionar un lado dos veces, puedes lanzar el conjuro _plane shift_ (CD de salvación 17) con el cubo y transportar a los objetivos al plano vinculado a ese lado.

El cubo tiene 3 cargas. Cada uso del cubo gasta 1 carga. El cubo recupera 1d3 cargas gastadas cada día al amanecer.

name: Cubic Gate
desc:
This 3-inch cube has 3 charges and regains 1d3 charges each dawn. Each side of the cube is keyed to a different plane, one of which is the Material Plane. The other five sides are determined by the Narrator.

As an action, you may press one side of the cube and spend a charge to cast the _gate  s_pell, expending a charge and opening a portal to the associated plane. You may instead press a side twice, expending 2 charges and casting _plane shift_ (save CD 17) which sends the objetivos to the associated plane.

name: Culdarath the Ninth Ring’s True Name
desc:
This slip of parchment contains the magically bound name “Ozzacath’ta Culd” and is burned black at the edges. While you are attuned to it, you can use a acción adicional to invoke the name on this parchment to summon a vision of a powerful efreet beside you for 1 minuto. Ozzacath is haughty and impatient when conjured but seems to relish the chance to burn anything. Once a vision is summoned in this way, it cannot be summoned again for the next 24 horas.

You can use an action to verbally direct the vision to do any of the following: 

* ligera a bonfire, candle, or similar flammable object within 15 pies.
* Burn brightly (or cease burning brightly) for the next minuto providing bright ligera in a 30-pie radius and dim ligera for a further 15 pies.
* Translate up to 25 words of spoken or written Ignan into Común.

Alternatively, as an action while the vision is summoned you can agree to revoke your claim on Culdarath in exchange for his direct assistance. When you do so the parchment burns to cinders and for the next minuto the vision roars into a ball of fuego within 5 pies of you (as __flaming sphere_ , save CD 13). On each of your turns, you can use a acción adicional to verbally indicate where the ball of fuego moves. Once you have revoked your claim in this way, you can never invoke Culdarath’s true name again.

name: Cunning Tools
desc:
This exquisitely designed set of thieves’ tools are enchanted to guide even the clumsiest felons to success. While using these thieves’ tools you are proficient with them, and you gain an expertise die on checks made to pick locks or disable devices such as traps. 

In addition, these thieves’ tools fold down into a single smooth rosewood handle that appears to be a finely polished piece of wood, and you gain an expertise die on checks made to conceal them.

name: Dagger of the Barbed Devil
desc: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. You can use an action to cause sharp, pointed barbs to sprout from this blade. The barbs remain for 1 minuto. When you hit a criatura while the barbs are active, the criatura debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Destreza or a barb breaks off into its flesh and the dagger loses its barbs. At the start of each of its turns, a criatura with a barb in its flesh debe realizar a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Constitución. en un fallo, it has desventaja on attack rolls and ability checks until the start of its next turn as it is wracked with pain. The barb remains until a criatura uses its action to remove the barb, dealing 1d4 daño perforante to the barbed criatura. Once you cause barbs to sprout from the dagger, you can't do so again until the next dawn.

name: Dagger of Venom
desc:
Obtienes un bonificador +1 a las tiradas de ataque y daño realizadas con esta arma mágica.

Puedes usar una acción para cubrir la hoja con un espeso veneno negro. El veneno permanece durante 1 minuto o hasta que un ataque con esta arma impacte a una criatura. Esa criatura debe superar una tirada de salvación de Constitución CD 15 o recibir 2d10 de daño por veneno y quedar envenenada durante 1 minuto. La daga no puede usarse de esta manera de nuevo hasta el siguiente amanecer.

name: Dagger of Venom
desc: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic blade. In addition, once each dawn you can use an action to veneno the dagger’s blade for 1 minuto or until it is used to damage a criatura. When a criatura is damaged by the blade’s veneno, it makes a CD 15 Constitución _tirada de salvación_  or recibe 2d10 daño de veneno and becomes _poisoned_  for 1 minuto.

name: Dancing Caltrops
desc: After you pour these magic caltrops out of the bag into an area, you can use a acción adicional to animate them and command them to move up to 10 pies to occupy a different square area that is 5 pies on a side.

name: Dancing Floret
desc: This 2-inch-long plant has a humanoid shape, and a large purple flower sits at the top of the plant on a short, neck-like stalk. Small, serrated thorns on its arms and legs allow it to cling to your clothing, and it most often dances along your arm or across your shoulders. While attuned to the floret, you have competencia in the Interpretación skill, and you double your competencia bonus on Carisma (Interpretación) checks made while dancing. The floret has 3 charges for the following other properties. The floret regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Dancing Ink
desc: This ink is favored by merchants for eye-catching banners and by toy makers for scrolls and books for children. Typically found in 1d4 pots, this ink allows you to draw an illustration that moves about the page where it was drawn, whether that is an illustration of waves crashing against a shore along the bottom of the page or a rabbit leaping over the page's text. The ink wears away over time due to the movement and fades from the page after 2d4 weeks. The ink moves only when exposed to ligera, and some long-forgotten tomes have been opened to reveal small, moving illustrations drawn by ancient scholars. One pot can be used to fill 25 pages of a book or a similar total area for larger banners.

name: Dancing Shoes
desc:
These shoes feature a low heel, but otherwise shape to the wearer’s pie. While wearing these shoes, you gain an _expertise die_  on checks that relate to dancing.

If the shoes are separated, you may attune to one. When attuned to in this way, you know the direction of its location and if another criatura has attuned to it. Once the shoes are reunited again, the effect ends.

name: Dancing Sword
desc:
Puedes usar una acción adicional para lanzar esta espada mágica al aire y pronunciar la palabra de mando. Al hacerlo, la espada comienza a levitar, vuela hasta 9m y ataca a una criatura de tu elección que esté a 1,5m de ella. La espada usa tu tirada de ataque y el modificador de puntuación de característica para las tiradas de daño.

Mientras la espada levita, puedes usar una acción adicional para hacerla volar hasta 9m hacia otro punto que esté a 9m de ti. Como parte de esa misma acción adicional, puedes hacer que la espada ataque a una criatura que esté a 1,5m de ella.

Tras atacar por cuarta vez mientras levita, la espada vuela hasta 9m e intenta regresar a tu mano. Si no tienes ninguna mano libre, cae al suelo a tus pies. Si la espada no tiene un camino despejado hacia ti, se acerca todo lo posible y luego cae al suelo. También deja de levitar si la agarras o si te alejas más de 9m de ella.

name: Dancing Sword
desc:
While you are attuned to this magic sword, you can use a acción adicional to speak the command word and throw it into the air. The sword hovers, flies up to 30 pies, and attacks una criatura of your choice within 5 pies of it (using your _attack roll_  and ability score modifier to damage rolls). On each of your turns you can use a acción adicional to make the sword fly up to 30 pies to attack another criatura within 5 pies of it. 

After the sword attacks for the fourth time, it tries to return to your hand. It flies 30 pies towards you, moving as close as it can before either being caught in your free hand or falling to the ground.

The sword ceases to hover if you move more than 30 pies away from it or grasp it.

name: Dark Stone
desc: Five _dark stones_ are usually found together. A _dark stone_ is a black, ronda pebble that is frío to the touch. It can be used as sling munición or can be arrojadiza up to 30 pies. If it is used as sling munición, a objetivo hit by the stone recibe an extra 1d6 daño de frío. Whether it is fired or arrojadiza, no mágico fires within 10 pies of the stone’s point of impact are immediately extinguished, as are any mágico lights or fires created with a espacio de conjuro of 2nd-level or lower.

name: Dastardly Quill and Parchment
desc: Favored by spies, this quill and parchment are magically linked as long as both remain on the same plane of existence. When a criatura writes or draws on any surface with the quill, that writing or drawing appears on its linked parchment, exactly as it would appear if the writer was writing or drawing on the parchment with black ink. This effect doesn't prevent the quill from being used as a standard quill on a no mágico piece of parchment, but this written communication is one-way, from quill to parchment. The quill's linked parchment is immune to all no mágico inks and stains, and any mágico messages written on the parchment disappear after 1 minuto and aren't conveyed to the criatura holding the quill. The parchment is approximately 9 inches wide by 13 inches long. If the quill's writing exceeds the area of the parchment, the older writing fades from the top of the sheet, replaced by the newer writing. Otherwise, the quill's writing remains on the parchment for 24 horas, after which time all writing fades from it. If either item is destroyed, the other item becomes no mágico.

name: Dawn Shard
desc: The blade of this magic weapon gleams with a faint golden shine, and the pommel is etched with a sunburst. As a acción adicional, you can command the weapon to shed dim ligera out to 5 pies, to shed bright ligera out to 20 pies and dim ligera for an additional 20 pies, or to douse the ligera. The weapon causa an extra 1d6 daño radiante to any criatura it hits. This increases to 2d6 daño radiante if the objetivo is undead or a criatura of shadow.

name: Deadfall Arrow
desc: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic arrow. On a hit, the arrow transforms into a 10-pie-long wooden log centered on the objetivo, destroying the arrow. The objetivo and cada criatura in the log's area debe realizar a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Destreza. en un fallo, a criatura recibe 3d6 daño contundente and is knocked derribado and apresado under the log. en un éxito, a criatura recibe half el daño and isn't knocked derribado or apresado. A apresado criatura can take its action to free itself by succeeding on a CD 15 Fuerza check. The log lasts for 1 minuto then crumbles to dust, freeing those apresado by it.

name: Death’s Essence Pendant
desc:
This small black pendant has 5 charges and regains 1d4 charges each day at dawn.

You can use an action and expend a charge to make undead of CR 1 or lower indifferent to you and criaturas you choose within 30 pies of you. Undead remain indifferent until you for up to 1 hora, or until you threaten or harm them.

Three times each day you can use a acción adicional and expend a charge to summon a skeleton (page 334 or zombie (page 335). Your summoned criatura follows you and is hostile to criaturas that are hostile to you. You may decide the action the undead recibe and where it moves during its next turn, or you can issue a general command, such as guarding an area. If not given a command, the undead only defends itself. The undead continues to follow a command until its task is complete. Undead created by the pendant turn into dust at dawn.

name: Death's Mirror
desc: Made from woven lead and silver, this ring fits only on the hand's smallest finger. As the moon is a dull reflection of the sun's glory, so too is the power within this ring merely an imitation of the healing energies that can bestow true life. The ring has 3 charges and regains all expended charges daily at dawn. While wearing the ring, you can expend 1 charge as a acción adicional to gain 5 temporary puntos de golpe for 1 hora.

name: Decanter of Endless Water
desc:
Este frasco con tapón chapotea al agitarlo, como si contuviera agua. La garrafa pesa 1 kg.

Puedes usar una acción para retirar el tapón y pronunciar una de las tres palabras de mando, tras lo cual una cantidad de agua dulce o salada (a tu elección) brota del frasco. El agua deja de fluir al comienzo de tu siguiente turno. Elige entre las siguientes opciones:

* «Stream» produce 4 litros de agua.
* «Fountain» produce 20 litros de agua.
* «Geyser» produce 115 litros de agua que brotan en forma de géiser de 9m de largo y 30cm de ancho. Como acción adicional mientras sostienes la garrafa, puedes apuntar el géiser hacia una criatura que puedas ver a 9m de ti. El objetivo debe superar una tirada de salvación de Fuerza CD 13 o recibir 1d4 de daño contundente y quedar derribado. En lugar de una criatura, puedes apuntar a un objeto que no esté siendo llevado ni transportado y que no pese más de 90 kg. El objeto es volcado o empujado hasta 4,5m de distancia.

name: Decanter of Endless Water
desc:
This flask sloshes when shaken as if full of water. You can use an action to remove the stopper and speak a command word, causing undrinkable water to flow out of the flask. It stops at the start of your next turn. 

**Stream**. This command word produces 1 gallon of water.

**Fountain.** This command word produces 5 gallons of water.

**Geyser.** This command word produces 30 gallons of water that manifests as a geyser 30 pies long and 1 pie wide. As a acción adicional, you can aim the geyser at a objetivo within 30 pies, forcing it to make a CD 13 Fuerza _tirada de salvación_  or take 1d4 daño contundente and be knocked _prone_ . Any object less than 200 pounds is knocked over or pushed up to 15 pies away.

name: Deck of Illusions
desc:
Esta caja contiene un conjunto de cartas de pergamino. Una baraja completa tiene 34 cartas. Una baraja encontrada como tesoro suele tener entre 1d20 - 1 cartas menos.

La magia de la baraja solo funciona si las cartas se sacan al azar (puedes usar una baraja de cartas normal modificada para simularla). Puedes usar una acción para sacar una carta al azar de la baraja y lanzarla al suelo en un punto a 9m de ti.

La ilusión de una o más criaturas se forma sobre la carta lanzada y permanece hasta que sea disipada. Una criatura ilusoria parece real, tiene el tamaño apropiado y se comporta como si fuera una criatura real, salvo que no puede causar daño. Mientras estés a 36m de la criatura ilusoria y puedas verla, puedes usar una acción para moverla mágicamente a cualquier punto a 9m de su carta. Cualquier interacción física con la criatura ilusoria revela que es una ilusión, ya que los objetos la atraviesan. Alguien que use una acción para inspeccionar visualmente la criatura la identifica como ilusoria con una prueba de Inteligencia (Investigación) CD 15 exitosa. La criatura entonces aparece translúcida.

La ilusión dura hasta que su carta sea movida o la ilusión sea disipada. Cuando la ilusión termina, la imagen de su carta desaparece y esa carta no puede volver a usarse.

| Carta de juego        | Ilusión                              |
|-----------------------|--------------------------------------|
| As de corazones       | Red dragon                           |
| Rey de corazones      | Knight y cuatro guardias             |
| Reina de corazones    | Succubus o Incubus                   |
| Jota de corazones     | Druid                                |
| Diez de corazones     | Cloud giant                          |
| Nueve de corazones    | Ettin                                |
| Ocho de corazones     | Bugbear                              |
| Dos de corazones      | Goblin                               |
| As de diamantes       | Beholder                             |
| Rey de diamantes      | Archmage y aprendiz de mago          |
| Reina de diamantes    | Night hag                            |
| Jota de diamantes     | Assassin                             |
| Diez de diamantes     | Fire giant                           |
| Nueve de diamantes    | Ogre mage                            |
| Ocho de diamantes     | Gnoll                                |
| Dos de diamantes      | Kobold                               |
| As de picas           | Lich                                 |
| Rey de picas          | Priest y dos Acolytes                |
| Reina de picas        | Medusa                               |
| Jota de picas         | Veteran                              |
| Diez de picas         | Frost giant                          |
| Nueve de picas        | Troll                                |
| Ocho de picas         | Hobgoblin                            |
| Dos de picas          | Goblin                               |
| As de tréboles        | Iron golem                           |
| Rey de tréboles       | Bandit captain y tres Bandits        |
| Reina de tréboles     | Erinyes                              |
| Jota de tréboles      | Berserker                            |
| Diez de tréboles      | Hill giant                           |
| Nueve de tréboles     | Ogre                                 |
| Ocho de tréboles      | Orc                                  |
| Dos de tréboles       | Kobold                               |
| Comodines (2)         | Tú (el dueño de la baraja)           |

name: Deck of Illusions
desc:
This box houses a set of 34 illustrated cards when new. A found deck is typically missing 1d20 cards. 

As an action, you can draw a random card (one manually selected does nothing) and throw it up to 30 pies from you. 

Upon landing, the card creates an illusion of one or more criaturas. These illusions are of normal size for the criaturas depicted and act normally, but are insubstantial and harmless. While you are within 120 pies of the illusion, you can use an action to move it anywhere within 30 pies from its card. 

The illusions are revealed to a criatura when it uses an action to make a CD 15 Investigación check or automatically upon any physical interaction. Once revealed, an illusion becomes translucent.

The illusion lasts until its card is moved or it is dispelled. In either case the card disappears and cannot be reused.

__**Table: Deck of Illusions**__

| ♣ King of Clubs     | Erinyes                      |

| ♣ Two of Clubs      | Kobold                       |

| ♠ Eight of Spades   | Hobgoblin                    |
| ♠ Two of Spades     | Goblin                       |
| 🃏 Joker (2)        | The deck’s wielder           |

name: Deck of Many Things
desc:
Generalmente encontrada en una caja o bolsa, esta baraja contiene un número de cartas hechas de marfil o vitela. La mayoría (75 por ciento) de estas barajas solo tienen trece cartas, pero el resto tienen veintidós.

Antes de sacar una carta, debes declarar cuántas cartas pretendes sacar y luego extraerlas al azar (puedes usar una baraja de cartas normal modificada para simularla). Las cartas sacadas en exceso de este número no tienen ningún efecto. De lo contrario, en cuanto saques una carta de la baraja, su magia surte efecto. Debes sacar cada carta en un plazo máximo de 1 hora tras la extracción anterior. Si no logras sacar el número elegido, las cartas restantes salen volando de la baraja por sí solas y surten efecto todas a la vez.

Una vez que se saca una carta, se desvanece de la existencia. A menos que la carta sea el Fool o el Jester, la carta reaparece en la baraja, lo que hace posible sacar la misma carta dos veces.

| Carta de juego         | Carta        |
|------------------------|--------------|
| As de diamantes        | Vizier\*     |
| Rey de diamantes       | Sun          |
| Reina de diamantes     | Moon         |
| Jota de diamantes      | Star         |
| Dos de diamantes       | Comet\*      |
| As de corazones        | The Fates\*  |
| Rey de corazones       | Throne       |
| Reina de corazones     | Key          |
| Jota de corazones      | Knight       |
| Dos de corazones       | Gem\*        |
| As de tréboles         | Talons\*     |
| Rey de tréboles        | The Void     |
| Reina de tréboles      | Flames       |
| Jota de tréboles       | Skull        |
| Dos de tréboles        | Idiot\*      |
| As de picas            | Donjon\*     |
| Rey de picas           | Ruin         |
| Reina de picas         | Euryale      |
| Jota de picas          | Rogue        |
| Dos de picas           | Balance\*    |
| Comodín (con TM)       | Fool\*       |
| Comodín (sin TM)       | Jester       |

\*Solo se encuentra en una baraja de veintidós cartas

**_Balance_**. Tu mente sufre una violenta alteración que cambia tu alineamiento. Legal se convierte en caótico, bueno se convierte en malvado, y viceversa. Si eres neutral verdadero o no tienes alineamiento, esta carta no tiene ningún efecto sobre ti.

**_Comet_**. Si derrotas en solitario al siguiente monstruo hostil o grupo de monstruos que encuentres, obtienes los puntos de experiencia suficientes para ganar un nivel. De lo contrario, esta carta no tiene ningún efecto.

**_Donjon_**. Desapareces y quedas sepultado en un estado de animación suspendida dentro de una esfera extradimensional. Todo lo que llevabas puesto o cargabas queda atrás en el espacio que ocupabas cuando desapareciste. Permaneces encarcelado hasta que seas encontrado y extraído de la esfera. No es posible localizarte mediante magia de adivinación, pero un conjuro de _wish_ puede revelar la ubicación de tu prisión. No sacas más cartas.

**_Euryale_**. El rostro similar al de una medusa de la carta te maldice. Sufres una penalización de -2 a las tiradas de salvación mientras estés maldecido de esta manera. Solo un dios o la magia de la carta The Fates puede poner fin a esta maldición.

**_The Fates_**. El tejido de la realidad se deshace y se rehace, permitiéndote evitar o borrar un evento como si nunca hubiera ocurrido. Puedes usar la magia de la carta en cuanto la saques o en cualquier otro momento antes de morir.

**_Flames_**. Un poderoso diablo se convierte en tu enemigo. El diablo busca tu ruina y acecha tu vida, saboreando tu sufrimiento antes de intentar matarte. Esta enemistad dura hasta que tú o el diablo muráis.

**_Fool_**. Pierdes 10.000 XP, descartas esta carta y vuelves a sacar de la baraja, contando ambas extracciones como una sola de tus extracciones declaradas. Si perder esa cantidad de XP te haría perder un nivel, en cambio pierdes la cantidad que te deja con justo los XP necesarios para mantener tu nivel.

**_Gem_**. Veinticinco piezas de joyería con un valor de 2.000 po cada una o cincuenta gemas con un valor de 1.000 po cada una aparecen a tus pies.

**_Idiot_**. Reduce permanentemente tu Inteligencia en 1d4 + 1 (hasta un mínimo de 1). Puedes sacar una carta adicional más allá de tus extracciones declaradas.

**_Jester_**. Ganas 10.000 XP, o puedes sacar dos cartas adicionales más allá de tus extracciones declaradas.

**_Key_**. Un arma mágica de rareza rara o superior con la que tienes competencia aparece en tus manos. El DJ elige el arma.

**_Knight_**. Obtienes los servicios de un guerrero de nivel 4 que aparece en un espacio que eliges a 9m de ti. El guerrero es de la misma raza que tú y te sirve fielmente hasta la muerte, creyendo que el destino lo ha unido a ti. Tú controlas a este personaje.

**_Moon_**. Se te concede la capacidad de lanzar el conjuro _wish_ 1d3 veces.

**_Rogue_**. Un personaje no jugador a elección del DJ se vuelve hostil hacia ti. La identidad de tu nuevo enemigo no se conoce hasta que el PNJ o alguien más la revele. Nada menos que un conjuro de _wish_ o una intervención divina puede poner fin a la hostilidad del PNJ hacia ti.

**_Ruin_**. Todas las formas de riqueza que portas o posees, salvo los objetos mágicos, se pierden para ti. Las propiedades portátiles desaparecen. Los negocios, edificios y tierras que posees se pierden de la manera que menos altera la realidad. Cualquier documentación que acredite que deberías poseer algo perdido por esta carta también desaparece.

**_Skull_**. Invocas un avatar de la muerte: un esqueleto humanoide fantasmal vestido con una túnica negra andrajosa y portando una guadaña espectral. Aparece en un espacio a elección del DJ a 3m de ti y te ataca, advirtiendo a todos los demás que debes ganar el combate en solitario. El avatar lucha hasta que mueres o cae a 0 puntos de golpe, momento en el que desaparece. Si alguien intenta ayudarte, ese ayudante invoca su propio avatar de la muerte. Una criatura muerta a manos de un avatar de la muerte no puede ser devuelta a la vida.

**_Star_**. Aumenta una de tus puntuaciones de característica en 2. La puntuación puede superar 20, pero no puede superar 24.

**_Sun_**. Ganas 50.000 XP y un objeto maravilloso (que el DJ determina al azar) aparece en tus manos.

**_Talons_**. Todos los objetos mágicos que llevas puestos o portas se desintegran. Los artefactos en tu posesión no son destruidos, pero sí desaparecen.

**_Throne_**. Obtienes competencia en la habilidad Persuasión y doblas tu bonificador de competencia en las pruebas realizadas con esa habilidad. Además, adquieres la propiedad legítima de una pequeña fortaleza en algún lugar del mundo. Sin embargo, la fortaleza está actualmente en manos de monstruos, a los que debes expulsar antes de poder reclamarla como tuya.

**_Vizier_**. En cualquier momento que elijas dentro del año siguiente a sacar esta carta, puedes plantear una pregunta en meditación y recibir mentalmente una respuesta veraz a esa pregunta. Además de información, la respuesta te ayuda a resolver un problema desconcertante u otro dilema. En otras palabras, el conocimiento viene acompañado de sabiduría sobre cómo aplicarlo.

**_The Void_**. Esta carta negra presagia el desastre. Tu alma es arrancada de tu cuerpo y contenida en un objeto en un lugar a elección del DJ. Uno o más seres poderosos custodian el lugar. Mientras tu alma esté atrapada de esta manera, tu cuerpo queda incapacitado. Un conjuro de _wish_ no puede recuperar tu alma, pero el conjuro revela la ubicación del objeto que la contiene. No sacas más cartas.

name: Deck of Many Things
desc:
A legend of ruination and wonder to those that have heard of it, the _Deck of Many Things_ is the fickle power of fate distilled. Most were created by gods of luck and are found in small and ornately carved coffers and have only 13 cards, but some have the full 22\. The Narrator may decide, or roll 1d4 to determine randomly (a partial deck on a 1–3, or a full deck on a 4).

Before drawing, you must declare the number of cards that you intend to draw. A modified poker deck can be used to create your own physical deck using the substitutions below. A card's magic recibe effect as soon as it is drawn. Once you begin drawing, each subsequent card must be drawn within an hora of the card that came before it. Failure to do so causes all of your remaining draws to fly out of the deck and take effect immediately. Once a card is drawn, if it is not a joker it is reshuffled into the deck, making it possible to draw the same card twice.

Once you have drawn the number of cards that you’ve declared, the deck resets and you may never draw from that deck again. Once all individuals present when the deck is discovered have drawn their cards, roll 1d4\. On a 1–3 the deck vanishes, or on a 4 it returns to its coffer, allowing you to transport it should you so choose.

The Balance, Comet, Donjon, Fates, Fool, Gem, Idiot, Talons, and Vizier cards only appear in the 22 card deck.

---

♣ **Ace of Clubs: Talons.** Every mágico item that you own is immediately destroyed. Artifacts are not destroyed and are instead cast into the multiverse.

♣ **King of Clubs: Void.** Your soul is torn from your body and trapped in an object in a location of the Narrator’s choosing where it is guarded by powerful beings. While your soul is trapped, your body is incapacitado. Even a _wish_ cannot restore your soul, but it can reveal its location. Any remaining draws from the deck are lost.

♣ **Queen of Clubs: Flames.** You gain the enmity of a powerful devil. It seeks to destroy you along with all that you love or have built, inflicting as much misery upon you and your loved ones as possible before finally slaying you. This antagonism lasts until either you or the devil perish.

♣ **Jack of Clubs: Skull.** A merciless harbinger of death appears and attempts to slay you. The harbinger appears in an unoccupied space within 10 pies and immediately attacks. A sense of mortal dread fills any aliados present, warning them to stay away. The harbinger fights until you die or it is reduced to 0 puntos de golpe. It cannot be harmed by anyone other than you, and if anyone other than you attempts to harm it, another harbinger of death is summoned for them. criaturas slain by a harbinger cannot be restored to life by any means.

♣ **Two of Clubs: Idiot.** Your Inteligencia score is permanently reduced by 1d4+1, to a minimum of 1\. You may draw one additional card beyond what you declared.

♦ **Ace of Diamonds: Vizier.** At any point within a year of drawing this card, you may ask a question while meditating and immediately receive a truthful answer that helps you to solve a problem or dilemma as well as the Sabiduría and the knowledge to apply it.

♦ **King of Diamonds: Sun.** You gain 50,000 XP, and a randomly determined wondrous item appears in your hands.

♦ **Queen of Diamonds: Moon.** You are granted 1d3 wishes (as the __wish_ spell).

♦ **Jack of Diamonds: Star.** Increase an ability score of your choice by 2\. The score cannot exceed 24.

♦ **Two of Diamonds: Comet.** Defeating the next hostile monster or group of monsters alone will grant you enough experience points to advance to the next level.

♥ **Ace of Hearts: Fates.** You are granted the ability to reweave the fabric of reality, allowing you to circumvent or erase a single event as though it had never happened. You may use this ability immediately upon drawing the card or at any point prior to your death.

♥ **King of Hearts: Throne.** You are granted competencia in the Persuasión skill and gain a 1d6 expertise die on all Carisma (Persuasión) checks. You are also granted legal domain over a small keep or fortress on the plane that your character inhabits. Your new domain is overrun by monsters and must be liberated before it can be inhabited.

♥ **Queen of Hearts: Key.** A magic weapon of at least rare rarity that you are proficient with appears in your hand. The weapon is chosen by the Narrator.

♥ **Jack of Hearts: Knight.** A _veteran_  appears and offers you their service, believing it to be destiny, and will serve you loyalty unto death. You control this character.

♥ **Two of Hearts: Gem.** You are showered in wealth. A total of 25 trinkets, easily portable pieces of art, or jewelry worth 2,000 gold each, or 50 gems worth 1,000 gold each appear directly in front of you. 

♠ **Ace of Spades: Donjon.** You vanish and are trapped in an extradimensional space. You are either inconsciente in a sphere (50%) or trapped in a nightmare realm drawn from your own experiences and fears (50%). You remain in your prison until you are freed. While divination magics cannot locate you, a wish spell reveals the location of your prison. You cannot draw any more cards.

♠ **King of Spades: Ruin.** All no mágico wealth that you own is lost. Material items vanish. Property and other holdings are lost along with any documentation. You are destitute.

♠ **Queen of Spades: Euryale.** You are _cursed_  by the card. You suffer a permanent –2 penalty to all _tirada de salvacións_ . Only a god or the Fates Card can end this curse.

♠ **Jack of Spades: Rogue.** A trusted aliado, friend, or other NPC (chosen by the Narrator) becomes a bitter enemigo, although their identity is not revealed.
