They will act against you based upon their abilities and resources, and will try to utterly destroy you. Only a _wish_ spell or divine intervention can end the NPC’s hostility. 

♠ **Two of Spades: Balance.** Your Historia rewrites itself. You gain a randomly determined background, replacing your background feature with the new background feature. You do not change the skill proficiencies or ability score increases from your previous background, or gain new skill proficiencies or ability score increases.

🃏 **Joker with Trademark: Fool.** You lose 10,000 xp and must immediately draw again. If the experience lost in this manner would cause you to lose a level, you are instead reduced to the beginning of your current level instead.

🃏 **Joker without Trademark: Jester.** Fortune smiles on the foolish. Either gain 10,000 XP or draw twice more from the deck beyond what you declared.

---

**Harbinger of Death Challenge** —

_Medium undead_ 0 XP

**Clase de Armadura** 20

**puntos de golpe** half the punto de golpe maximum of its summoner

**Velocidad** 60 pies., fly 60 pies. (hover)

**STR DEX CON INT WIS CHA**

16 (+3) 16 (+3) 16 (+3) 16 (+3) 16 (+3) 16 (+3)

**competencia** +3; **Maneuver** CD 14

**Damage Immunities** necrótico, veneno

**Condition Immunities** _charmed_ , _frightened_ , _paralyzed_ , _petrified_ , _poisoned_ , _unconscious_ 

**Senses** visión en la oscuridad 60 pies., vista verdadera 60 pies., passive Percepción 13

**Languages** todos los idiomas known to its summoner

_**Incorporeal Movement.**_ The harbinger can move through other criaturas and objects as if they were _difficult terrain_ . It recibe 5 (1d10) daño de fuerza if it ends its turn inside an object.

_**Turning Immunity**_. The harbinger is immune to features that turn undead.

ACTIONS

**_Reaping Scythe_**. The harbinger sweeps its spectral scythe through a criatura within 5 pies of it, dealing 7 (1d8+3) daño cortante plus 4 (1d8) daño necrótico. The sixth time and each subsequent time that a criatura is damaged by this attack, it makes a CD 14 Carisma _tirada de salvación_  or becomes _doomed_ .

name: Decoy Card
desc: This small, thick, parchment card displays an accurate portrait of the person carrying it. You can use an action to toss the card on the ground at a point within 10 pies of you. An illusion of you forms over the card and remains until dispelled. The illusion appears real, but it can do no harm. While you are within 120 pies of the illusion and can see it, you can use an action to make it move and behave as you wish, as long as it moves no further than 10 pies from the card. Any physical interaction with your illusory double reveals it to be an illusion, because objects pass through it. Someone who uses an action to visually inspect your illusory double identifies it as illusory with a successful CD 15 Inteligencia (Investigación) check. The illusion lasts until the card is moved or the illusion is dispelled. When the illusion ends, the card's face becomes blank, and the card becomes no mágico.

name: Deepchill Orb
desc: This fist-sized sphere of blue quartz emits frío. If placed in a container with a capacity of up to 5 cubic pies, it keeps the internal temperature of the container at a consistent 40 degrees Fahrenheit. This can keep liquids chilled, preserve cooked foods for up to 1 week, raw meats for up to 3 days, and fruits and vegetables for weeks. If you hold the orb without gloves or other insulating method, you take 1 daño de frío each minuto you hold it. At the GM's discretion, the orb's frío can be applied to other uses, such as keeping it in contact with a hot item to cool down the item enough to be handled, wrapping it and using it as a cooling pad to bring down fever or swelling, or similar.

name: Deepstone Cestus
desc: These leather hand wraps are fitted with ronda, flat stones engraved with runes. While wearing these wraps, your ki save CD increases by 2.

name: Defender
desc:
Obtienes un bonificador de +3 a las tiradas de ataque y daño realizadas con esta arma mágica.

La primera vez que atacas con la espada en cada uno de tus turnos, puedes transferir parte o la totalidad del bonificador de la espada a tu Clase de Armadura, en lugar de usarlo en los ataques de ese turno. Por ejemplo, podrías reducir el bonificador a tus tiradas de ataque y daño a +1 y obtener un bonificador de +2 a la CA. Los bonificadores ajustados permanecen en efecto hasta el inicio de tu siguiente turno, aunque debes sostener la espada para obtener el bonificador a la CA.

name: Defender
desc: You gain +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic sword. In addition, while you are attuned to the sword, on each of your turns before you make your first attack with it you can transfer some or all of the +3 bonus to your Clase de Armadura (instead of using it for attacks) until the start of your next turn or until you drop the sword (whichever comes first).

name: Defensive Umbrella
desc: This is an unassuming-looking black umbrella, but it can provide impressive protection when needed. As a acción adicional when the umbrella is open, you can press a button in the handle. The canopy immediately flattens and hardens into a   _1 ligera shield_  and the handle transforms into a _1 rapier_ . You count as already wielding both and are considered proficient as long as you are attuned to the defensive umbrella. You can return the sword and shield to umbrella form as an action by bringing the two parts together and speaking the command word. Opening or closing the umbrella requires an action.

name: Demon Armor
desc:
Mientras llevas esta armadura, obtienes un bonificador de +1 a la CA y puedes entender y hablar Abisal. Además, los guanteletes con garras de la armadura convierten los golpes desarmados con tus manos en armas mágicas que infligen daño cortante, con un bonificador de +1 a las tiradas de ataque y daño y un dado de daño de 1d8.

**_Maldición_**. Una vez que te pones esta armadura maldita, no puedes quitártela a menos que seas el objetivo del conjuro _remove curse_ o magia similar. Mientras llevas la armadura, tienes desventaja en las tiradas de ataque contra demonios y en las tiradas de salvación contra sus conjuros y habilidades especiales.

name: Demon Armor
desc:
While wearing this armor, your Clase de Armadura increases by +1 and you can understand and speak Abisal. You can attack with the armor’s clawed gauntlets (which deal 1d8 daño cortante) and gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls when doing so.

**Cursed.** You cannot remove this armor until you are objetivoed by _remove curse_ or similar magic. You have _disadvantage_  on _attack rolls_  against demons and on _tirada de salvacións_  made against them.

name: Describing Gremlins
desc:
This little porcelain chair has a tiny ethereal purple goblinoid sitting on it, and in the criatura’s hands sits another even smaller purple goblinoid, and in their hands sits an even smaller goblinoid, and the motif seems to go on forever smaller. 

This item includes 10 gremlins of decreasing scale from the largest at 4 inches tall, to the smallest that’s roughly the size of an amoeba. 

If you place a single drop of a substance in front of the series of gremlins, the largest of them leans towards it and allows the smaller gremlins a minuto to observe the drop’s contents at a cellular level. The smallest gremlin explains to the next size up, and so on, with the largest gremlin communicating back to you the description of the contents at a cellular level.

The gremlins are not particularly intelligent so most of their descriptions are similar to “_some sorta green globs_” or “_a buncha squidgy spiny things what tried to eat m_e”.

Although this information is not scientifically or medically helpful, it can easily be used to identify if a substance is the same as another previously observed substance as the gremlins are consistent in their descriptions.

name: Deserter's Boots
desc: While you wear these boots, your walking Velocidad increases by 10 pies, and you gain a +1 bonus to Destreza tirada de salvacións.

name: Devil Shark Mask
desc: When you wear this burgundy face covering, it transforms your face into a shark-like visage, and the mask sprouts wicked horns. While wearing this mask, your bite is a natural melee weapon, which you can use to make unarmed strikes. When you hit with it, your bite causa daño perforante equal to 1d8 + your Fuerza modifier, instead of the daño contundente normal for an unarmed strike. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls with this magic bite. In addition, you have ventaja on Carisma (Intimidación) checks while wearing this mask.

name: Devilish Doubloon
desc: This gold coin bears the face of a leering devil on the obverse. If it is placed among other coins, it changes its appearance to mimic its neighbors, doing so over the course of 1 hora. This is a purely cosmetic change, and it returns to its original appearance when grasped by a criatura with an Inteligencia of 5 or higher. You can use a acción adicional to toss the coin up to 20 pies. When the coin lands, it transforms into a barbed devil. The devil vanishes after 1 hora or when it is reduced to 0 puntos de golpe. When the devil vanishes, the coin reappears in a collection of at least 20 gold coins elsewhere on the same plane where it vanished. The devil is friendly to you and your companions. Roll initiative for the devil, which has its own turns. It obeys any verbal commands that you issue to it (no action required by you). If you don't issue any commands to the devil, it defends itself from hostile criaturas but otherwise recibe no actions. If you are reduced to 0 puntos de golpe and the devil is still alive, it moves to your body and uses its action to grab your soul. You debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Carisma or the devil steals your soul and you die. If the devil fails to grab your soul, it vanishes as if slain. If the devil grabs your soul, it uses its next action to transport itself back to the Hells, disappearing in a flash of brimstone. If the devil returns to the Hells with your soul, its coin doesn't reappear, and you can be restored to life only by means of a true resurrection or wish spell.

name: Devil's Barb
desc: This thin wand is fashioned from the fiendish quill of a barbed devil. While attuned to it, you have resistance to daño de frío. The wand has 6 charges for the following properties. It regains 1d6 expended charges daily at dusk. If you expend the wand's last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the wand crumbles into cinders and is destroyed. Hurl Flame. While holding the wand, you can expend 2 charges as an action to hurl a ball of devilish flame at a objetivo you can see within 150 pies of you. The objetivo debe tener éxito en a CD 15 Destreza check or take 3d6 daño de fuego. If the objetivo is a flammable object that isn't being worn or carried, it also catches fuego. Devil's Sight. While holding the wand, you can expend 1 charge as an action to cast the visión en la oscuridad spell on yourself. mágico darkness doesn't impede this visión en la oscuridad.

name: Devil’s Eye Ring
desc:
This silver ring contains the sentient eye of a devil. While you are wearing the ring and it is uncovered, you have _disadvantage_  on Persuasión checks but gain an expertise die on Intimidación checks. 

In addition, you gain visión en la oscuridad to a range of 120 pies, and are able to see through both mágico and no mágico darkness.

name: Dial of Dal
desc:
None living know who or what Dal was, only that the name is carved into this device. About half a pie in diameter, this flat disk resembles a sundial with many styles (time-telling edges), each of which can be moved on its own course, rotating on the flat of the disc on an undetectable groove. As these are moved, you receive a vision of events and emotions that have occurred in your current location.

As an action, you can use the dial of Dal to cast the __legend lore_  spell focused on your current location without the need for material components. Once used in this way, the dial cannot be used again until you finish a _long rest_ .

name: Dimensional Net
desc: Woven from the hair of celestials and fiends, this shimmering iridescent net can subdue and capture otherworldly criaturas. You have a +1 bonus to attack rolls with this magic weapon. In addition to the normal effects of a net, this net prevents any Large or smaller aberration, Celestial, or fiend hit by it from using any method of extradimensional movement, including teleportation or travel to a different plane of existence. When such a criatura is bound in this way, a criatura debe tener éxito en a CD 30 Fuerza (Atletismo) check to free the bound criatura. The net has immunity to damage dealt by the bound criatura, but another criatura can deal 20 daño cortante to the net and free the bound criatura, ending the effect. The net has AC 15 and 30 puntos de golpe. It regains 1 punto de golpe every 5 minutos as long as it has at least 1 punto de golpe. If the net drops to 0 puntos de golpe, it is destroyed.

name: Dimensional Shackles
desc:
Puedes usar una acción para colocar estos grilletes en una criatura incapacitada. Los grilletes se ajustan para adaptarse a criaturas de tamaño Pequeño a Grande. Además de funcionar como esposas convencionales, los grilletes impiden que la criatura sujeta por ellos use cualquier método de movimiento extradimensional, incluyendo la teletransportación o el viaje a un plano de existencia diferente. No impiden que la criatura atraviese un portal interdimensional.

Tú y cualquier criatura que designes al usar los grilletes podéis usar una acción para quitarlos. Una vez cada 30 días, la criatura sujeta puede realizar una prueba de Fuerza (Atletismo) CD 30. Si tiene éxito, la criatura se libera y destruye los grilletes.

name: Dimensional Shackles
desc:
You can use an action to shackle an _incapacitated_  Small- to Large-sized criatura using these manacles. Once shackled, the criatura is incapable of using or being affected by any sort of extradimensional travel or effect (including teleportation or plane shift spells and effects, but not portals). 

You and any criatura you designate when you use the shackles can use an action to remove them. At the end of every 2 weeks that pass, a shackled criatura can make a CD 30 Fuerza (Atletismo) check to break free and destroy the shackles.

name: Dirgeblade
desc: This weapon is an exquisitely crafted rapier set in a silver and leather scabbard. The blade glows a faint stormy blue and is encircled by swirling wisps of clouds. You gain a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. This weapon, when unsheathed, sheds dim blue ligera in a 20-pie radius. When you hit a criatura with it, you can expend 1 Bardic Inspiration to impart a sense of overwhelming grief in the objetivo. A criatura affected by this grief debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or fall derribado and become incapacitado by sadness until the end of its next turn. Once a month under an open sky, you can use a acción adicional to speak this magic sword's command word and cause the sword to sing a sad dirge. This dirge conjures pesada rain (or snow in freezing temperatures) in the region for 2d6 horas. The precipitation falls in an X-milla radius around you, where X is equal to your level.

name: Dirk of Daring
desc: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. While holding the dagger, you have ventaja on tirada de salvacións against being asustado.

name: Distracting Doubloon
desc: This gold coin is plain and matches the dominant coin of the region. Typically, 2d6 distracting doubloons are found together. You can use an action to toss the coin up to 20 pies. The coin bursts into a flash of golden ligera on impact. cada criatura within a 15-pie radius of where the coin landed debe tener éxito en a CD 11 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or have desventaja on Sabiduría (Percepción) checks made to perceive any criatura or object other than the coin for 1 minuto. If an affected criatura recibe damage, it can repeat the tirada de salvación, ending the effect on itself en un éxito. At the end of the duration, the coin crumbles to dust and is destroyed.

name: Djinn Vessel
desc: A rough predecessor to the ring of djinni summoning and the ring elemental command, this clay vessel is approximately a pie long and half as wide. An iron stopper engraved with a rune of binding seals its entrance. If the vessel is empty, you can use an action to remove the stopper and cast the banishment spell (save CD 15) on a Celestial, elemental, or fiend within 60 pies of you. At the end of the spell's duration, if the objetivo is an elemental, it is trapped in this vessel. While trapped, the elemental can take no actions, but it is aware of occurrences outside of the vessel and of other djinn vessels. You can use an action to remove the vessel's stopper and release the elemental the vessel contains. Once released, the elemental acts in accordance with its normal disposition and alignment.

name: Doorbreaker
desc:
The head of this magic maul is shaped like an adamantine fist. You gain a +2 bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  made with this weapon. When you hit an object or construct while wielding _Doorbreaker_, the hit is treated as a critical hit.

_Doorbreaker_ has 3 charges. When you attack or touch a portal sealed with an __arcane lock_ , you can expend 1 charge to cast __knock_  on the portal. _Doorbreaker_ regains 1d3 charges each dawn.

name: Doppelganger Ointment
desc: This ceramic jar contains 1d4 + 1 doses of a thick, creamy substance that smells faintly of pork fat. The jar and its contents weigh 1/2 a pound. Applying a single dose to your body recibe 1 minuto. For 24 horas or until it is washed off with an alcohol solution, you can change your appearance, as per the Change Appearance option of the alter self spell. For the duration, you can use a acción adicional to return to your normal form, and you can use an action to return to the form of the mimicked criatura. If you add a piece of a specific criatura (such as a single hair, nail paring, or drop of blood), the ointment becomes more powerful allowing you to flawlessly imitate that criatura, as long as its body shape is humanoid and within one size category of your own. While imitating that criatura, you have ventaja on Carisma checks made to convince others you are that specific criatura, provided they didn't see you change form.

name: Draconic Diorama
desc:
This Tiny diorama is contained within a cube-shaped box 5 inches on each side. The bottom is lead and the rest made of transparent crystal. Inside the box there are several trees made of paper and wire, a treasure chest made of clay, and a 1½-inch dragon skeleton. The skeleton stands in a different position each time the box is examined but it does not move while being observed.

While you carry the diorama, you have _advantage_  on _tirada de salvacións_  against Frightful Presence.

A successful CD 13 Arcanos or Naturaleza check reveals the skeleton is an actual dragon skeleton that has been shrunk to fit inside the box. 

**Curse.** While carrying the cursed diorama you are compelled to amass more wealth. As long as you are compelled, you debe tener éxito en a CD 13 Carisma _tirada de salvación_  to willingly part with the diorama, even temporarily.

name: Dragon Scale Mail
desc:
La cota de escamas de dragón está fabricada con las escamas de un tipo de dragón concreto. A veces los dragones recogen sus escamas desprendidas y las regalan a los humanoides. Otras veces, los cazadores desuellan y conservan cuidadosamente la piel de un dragón muerto. En cualquier caso, la cota de escamas de dragón es muy valorada.

Mientras llevas esta armadura, obtienes un bonificador de +1 a la CA, tienes ventaja en las tiradas de salvación contra la Presencia Aterradora y las armas de aliento de los dragones, y tienes resistencia a un tipo de daño determinado por el tipo de dragón que proporcionó las escamas (véase la tabla).

Además, puedes concentrar tus sentidos como una acción para discernir mágicamente la distancia y la dirección hacia el dragón más cercano del mismo tipo que la armadura que se encuentre a menos de 48 kilómetros de ti. Esta acción especial no puede volver a usarse hasta el siguiente amanecer.

| Dragón  | Resistencia  |
|---------|--------------|
| Negro   | Ácido        |
| Azul    | Relámpago    |
| Latón   | Fuego        |
| Bronce  | Relámpago    |
| Cobre   | Ácido        |
| Dorado  | Fuego        |
| Verde   | Veneno       |
| Rojo    | Fuego        |
| Plateado| Frío         |
| Blanco  | Frío         |

name: Dragon Scale Mail
desc:
While wearing this armor, you gain following benefits:

* Your Clase de Armadura increases by +1.
* _Advantage_  on _tirada de salvacións_  against the Frightful Presence and breath weapons of dragons.
* Resistance to one damage type (determined by the type of dragon that provided the scales).

In addition, once between _long rests_  you can use an action to magically detect the distance and direction to the closest dragon of the same type as the armor that is within 30 millas.

__**Table: Dragon Scale Mail**__
| Dragon   | Resistance  |
| -------- | ----------- |
| Amethyst | fuerza       |
| Black    | ácido        |
| Blue     | rayo   |
| Brass    | fuego        |
| Bronze   | rayo   |
| Copper   | ácido        |
| Earth    | cortante    |
| Emerald  | trueno     |
| Gold     | fuego        |
| Green    | veneno      |
| Red      | fuego        |
| River    | contundente |
| Sapphire | psíquico     |
| Shadow   | necrótico    |
| Silver   | frío        |
| Spirit   | radiante     |
| White    | frío        |

name: Dragon Slayer
desc:
Obtienes un bonificador de +1 a las tiradas de ataque y daño realizadas con esta arma mágica.

Cuando impactas a un dragón con esta arma, el dragón recibe 3d6 de daño adicional del tipo del arma. A efectos de esta arma, «dragón» hace referencia a cualquier criatura con el tipo dragón, incluyendo las tortugas dragón y los vivernas.

name: Dragon Slayer
desc: You gain a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic sword, and it causa an extra 3d6 damage against dragons (including any criatura with the dragon type, such as _dragon turtles_  and _wyverns_ ).

name: Dragonslaying Lance
desc:
You gain a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this weapon.

Objects hit with this lance take the maximum damage the weapon’s damage dice can deal. Dragons hit by this weapon take an extra 3d6 daño perforante. For the purpose of this weapon, "dragon" refers to any criatura with the dragon type, including _dragon turtles_  and _wyverns_ .

name: Dragonstooth Blade
desc:
This razor-sharp blade, little more than leather straps around the base of a large tooth, still carries the power of a dragon. This weapon's properties are determined by the type of dragon that once owned this tooth. The GM chooses the dragon type or determines it randomly from the options below. When you hit with an attack using this magic sword, the objetivo recibe an extra 1d6 damage of a type determined by the kind of dragon that once owned the tooth. In addition, you have resistance to the type of damage associated with that dragon. | d6 | Damage Type | Dragon Type |
| --- | ----------- | ------------------- |
| 1 | ácido | Black or Copper |
| 2 | fuego | Brass, Gold, or Red |
| 3 | veneno | Green |
| 4 | rayo | Blue or Bronze |
| 5 | frío | Silver or White |
| 6 | necrótico | Undead |

name: Draught of Ambrosia
desc: The liquid in this tiny vial is golden and has a heady, floral scent. When you drink the draught, it fortifies your body and mind, removing any infirmity caused by old age. You stop aging and are immune to any mágico and no mágico aging effects. The magic of the ambrosia lasts ten years, after which time its power fades, and you are once again subject to the ravages of time and continue aging.

name: Draught of the Black Owl
desc: When you drink this potion, you transform into a black-feathered owl for 1 hora. This effect works like the polymorph spell, except you can take only the form of an owl. While you are in the form of an owl, you retain your Inteligencia, Sabiduría, and Carisma scores. If you are a druid with the Wild Shape feature, you can transform into a Gigante owl instead. Drinking this potion doesn't expend a use of Wild Shape.

name: Dread Caduceus
desc:
When wizards go to war their desperation reveals the bleak depths and miraculous heights of magic. Long ago it was a desire to both bolster and renew their forces that led a mage to create a relic many would consider unthinkable: a scepter that twists the essence of life itself. With it the dead are remade into unrecognizable tangles of flesh that despite their deformity do the wielder of the scepter’s bidding, all as their aliados are healed and empowered with vigor far beyond mortal bounds.

This pesada silver scepter has two heads, both cast in metal and staring out of glassy onyx eyes. One head is a skull, its jaw arrojadiza open and its teeth unnaturally elongated. At the other end of the scepter is a cherubic human face that is turned upwards as though determined not to look at its sibling. 

No one is certain whether it was the creator’s shame that led them to hide the scepter, or if their enemigos cast it out of memory for fear of its power. What is known is that the legend of the _Dread Caduceus_ has endured and that whispers of its whereabouts have not been silenced by time.

While you are attuned to the _Dread Caduceus_ you may use either end of the scepter to activate its powers.

**Legends and Lore** Success on an Arcanos or Historia check reveals the following:

**CD 15** This is the _Dread Caduceus_, a holy scepter with the power to raise the dead. 

**CD 18** The cherub and skull heads cause healing and necromantic effects, respectively.

**CD 21** Those who use the scepter risk having their very flesh corrupted and their souls devoured.

**Artifact Properties**

The _Dread Caduceus_ has one lesser artifact benefit, one greater artifact benefit, one lesser artifact detriment, and one greater artifact detriment. 

The _Dread Caduceus_ warps your life energy, twisting your flesh as it corrupts that of others. While you are attuned to the scepter, your organs shift and twist, sticking to one another within you. Take 1d6 daño necrótico each dawn from this effect. This damage can only be healed by a _long or short rest_ . You also have _disadvantage_  on initiative rolls as you are distracted by this tangible shifting within.

The _Dread Caduceus_ has 2d10 charges and regains 1d10 charges each dawn. When you reduce the _Dread Caduceus_ to 0 charges, you take 10d10 daño necrótico. If this damage reduces you to 0 puntos de golpe, you instantly die and cannot be resurrected (even by a _wish_  spell).

**Cherub**

You can use an action and expend charges from the _Dread Caduceus_ to cause one of the following effects to extend from the cherub head of the scepter, objetivoing yourself or a criatura within 30 pies: 

_**Heal.**_ The criatura regains 1d8+1 puntos de golpe for each expended charge. 

**_Healing Nimbus (3 Charges)_**. A nimbus of healing appears around the criatura for 1d6 rondas. For the duration, whenever the criatura recibe damage from an attack it regains 1 punto de golpe, and when an attack misses the criatura it regains 1d4 puntos de golpe.

_**Invulnerability (3 Charges)**_. The criatura becomes immune to damage from ataques no mágicos for 1d4 rondas.

_**Exhaustless (5 Charges)**_. The criatura becomes immune to _fatigue_  for 1d6 days.

_**Resistance (5 Charges)**_. The criatura becomes resistant to one type of damage of your choice for 1d6 rondas. This property has no effect if the criatura already has resistance to that damage type.

**_Cure (10 Charges)_**. The criatura is healed of any _curses_ , _diseases_ , _poisons_ , or other negative effects, even if a _wish_  spell has previously been unsuccessful.

_**Invigorate (10 Charges).**_ The criatura permanently increases its maximum puntos de golpe by 1d8+1\. A criatura can only benefit from this property once. 

**Skull**

You can use an action and expend charges from the _Dread Caduceus_ to cause one of the following effects to extend from the skull head of the scepter, objetivoing yourself or a criatura within 100 pies: 

_**Animate Skeleton (1 Charge).**_ You return a dead criatura to a semblance of life, animating the skeleton of its body to serve at your whim. The criatura gains the _skeleton template_  and remains under your control until you die or are no longer attuned to the _Dread Caduceus_. 

_**Animate Zombie (2 Charges).**_ You return a dead criatura to a semblance of life, animating it as a zombie to serve at your whim. The criatura gains the _zombie template_  and remains under your control until you die or are no longer attuned to the _Dread Caduceus._

_**Empower Undead (2 Charges).**_ Choose 1d6 undead that you can see within range. Whenever one of the chosen undead makes a weapon attack it causa an extra 1d4 daño necrótico. Even on a miss, the undead causa 1d4 daño necrótico.

**_Animate Legion (6 Charges)._** You return 3d10 dead humanoids to a semblance of life, transforming their corpses into _zombies_ . 

You can use a acción adicional to mentally command the undead you create using the _Dread Caduceus._ When you command multiple undead, you must give them all the same command. You may decide the action the undead recibe and where it moves during its next turn, or you can issue a general command, such as guarding an area. If not given a command, the undead only defends itself. The undead continues to follow a command until its task is complete. 

In addition, any criatura you animate in this fashion retains injuries or disfigurements that were upon its corpse, and it continues to decompose.

name: Dread Scarab
desc:
The abdomen of this beetleshaped brooch is decorated with the grim semblance of a human skull. If you hold it in your hand for 1 ronda, an Abisal inscription appears on its surface, revealing its mágico Naturaleza. While wearing this brooch, you gain the following benefits:
- You have ventaja on tirada de salvacións against spells.
- The scarab has 9 charges. If you fail a tirada de salvación against a conjuration spell or a harmful effect originating from a Celestial criatura, you can use your reacción to expend 1 charge and turn the failed save into a successful one. The scarab crumbles into dust and is destroyed when its last charge is expended.

name: Dreamscrying Bowl
desc:
This terra cotta pottery bowl has a glossy black band around the rim and is sized to be used as a nightstand washbowl. Most of it is covered in geometric shapes unique to each other. When you are attuned to the bowl and fill it with holy water, the reflection on its surface portrays your most recent dream, or the dream of a sleeping criatura within your alcance. If the water is disturbed the shown dream disappears and will not return. 

Alternatively, you can shatter the bowl and choose one sleeping criatura you can see within 30 pies. Until the sleeping criatura awakens naturally, its dream and sleep cannot be interrupted or effected by any other magic.

name: Dungeon Delver's Guide
desc:
While attuned to this magic tome, you gain an _expertise die_  to skill checks made to recognize and notice underground traps and architectural features. In addition, you gain an expertise die on _tirada de salvacións_  against traps.

The book contains 10 illustrations of doors, 10 illustrations of traps, and 10 illustrations of monsters. As an action, you can permanently tear out an illustration and place it on a surface to make a real door, trap, or monster appear. Once an illustration is used, it can’t be used again.

If you place a door, a key that you can use to lock and unlock the door magically appears in your hand. Behind the door is a permanent passage through the wall. The passage is 5 pies wide, 8 pies tall, and up to 10 pies deep. The passage creates no instability. If you place a trap, you can choose between the following traps from this book (chapter 2): ácido pit trap, commanding voice trap, explosive runes trap, false door trap, hidden pit trap (x3), lock trap (x3, can be placed only on a lock).

If you place a monster, the monster is not initially hostile to any criatura present when it is summoned but is hostile to all other criaturas. It otherwise acts according to its Naturaleza. The following monsters can be placed: _black pudding_ , _gelatinous cube_ , _hell hound_ , _kobold_  (x3), _minotaur_ , skeleton immortal (x3, DDG).

name: Dust of Desiccation
desc: This small packet contains soot-like dust. There is enough of it for one use. When you use an action to blow the choking dust from your palm, cada criatura in a 30-pie cone debe realizar a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Destreza, taking 3d10 daño necrótico en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one. A criatura that fails this tirada de salvación can't speak until the end of its next turn as it chokes on the dust. Alternatively, you can use an action to throw the dust into the air, affecting yourself and cada criatura within 30 pies of you with the dust.

name: Dust of Disappearance
desc: Encontrado en un pequeño paquete, este polvo se asemeja a arena muy fina. Hay suficiente para un único uso. Cuando usas una acción para lanzar el polvo al aire, tú y cada criatura y objeto en un radio de 3 metros a tu alrededor os volvéis invisibles durante 2d4 minutos. La duración es la misma para todos los afectados, y el polvo se consume cuando su magia surte efecto. Si una criatura afectada por el polvo ataca o lanza un conjuro, la invisibilidad termina para esa criatura.

name: Dust of Disappearance
desc: This shimmering dust is usually found in a small vial that contains enough for a single use. You can use an action to scatter the dust into the air, covering you and cada criatura and object within 10 pies and rendering them _invisible_  for 2d4 minutos. This consumes the dust. If an affected criatura casts a spell or attacks, the effect ends for that criatura.

name: Dust of Dryness
desc:
Este pequeño paquete contiene 1d6 + 4 pellizcos de polvo. Puedes usar una acción para esparcir un pellizco sobre agua. El polvo transforma un cubo de agua de 4.5 metros de lado en una bolita del tamaño de una canica, que flota o reposa cerca del lugar donde se esparció el polvo. El peso de la bolita es insignificante.

Alguien puede usar una acción para estrellar la bolita contra una superficie dura, haciendo que se rompa y libere el agua que el polvo absorbió. Al hacerlo, se agota la magia de esa bolita.

Un elemental compuesto principalmente de agua que quede expuesto a un pellizco del polvo debe superar una tirada de salvación de Constitución CD 13, sufriendo 10d6 de daño necrótico si la falla, o la mitad de ese daño si la supera.

name: Dust of Dryness
desc:
This small vial contains 1d6+4 pinches of dust. You can use an action to spread a pinch over water, transforming a 15-pie cube of water into a small pellet that weighs less than an ounce. 

Using an action, you or another criatura can break the pellet against any hard surface, releasing all of the water and destroying the pellet. 

A criatura composed mostly of water that is exposed to a pinch of the dust makes a CD 13 Constitución _tirada de salvación_ , taking 10d6 daño necrótico en un fallo, or la mitad del daño en un éxito.

name: Dust of Muffling
desc: You can scatter this fine, silvery-gray dust on the ground as an action, covering a 10-pie-square area. There is enough dust in one container for up to 5 uses. When a criatura moves over an area covered in the dust, it has ventaja on Destreza (Sigilo) checks to remain unheard. The effect remains until the dust is swept up, blown away, or tracked away by the traffic of eight or more criaturas passing through the area.

name: Dust of Sneezing and Choking
desc:
Encontrado en un pequeño recipiente, este polvo se asemeja a arena muy fina. Parece ser _dust of disappearance_, y un conjuro _identify_ así lo confirma. Hay suficiente para un único uso.

Cuando usas una acción para lanzar un puñado del polvo al aire, tú y cada criatura que necesite respirar en un radio de 9 metros a tu alrededor debéis superar una tirada de salvación de Constitución CD 15 o quedaros sin poder respirar, estornudando de forma incontrolable. Una criatura afectada de este modo queda incapacitada y asfixiándose. Mientras esté consciente, la criatura puede repetir la tirada de salvación al final de cada uno de sus turnos, poniendo fin al efecto sobre ella si la supera. El conjuro _lesser restoration_ también puede poner fin al efecto sobre una criatura.

name: Dust of Sneezing and Choking
desc:
This fine gray dust is usually found in a vial and appears to be _dust of disappearance_ , even when magic is used to _identify_ it. Each vial contains enough for a single use.

You can use an action to throw the dust into the air. You and criaturas within 30 pies of you that breathe make a CD 15 Constitución _tirada de salvación_  or become wracked with violent coughing and sneezing, becoming _incapacitated_  and beginning to _suffocate_ . While conscious, a criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effects en un éxito. A _lesser restoration_  spell also ends the effects.

name: Dust of the Dead
desc: This stoppered vial is filled with dust and ash. There is enough of it for one use. When you use an action to sprinkle the dust on a willing humanoid, the objetivo falls into a death-like slumber for 8 horas. While asleep, the objetivo appears dead to all mundane and mágico means, but spells that objetivo the dead, such as the speak with dead spell, fail when used on the objetivo. The cause of death is not evident, though any wounds the objetivo has taken remain visible. If the objetivo recibe damage while asleep, it has resistance to el daño. If the objetivo is reduced to below half its puntos de golpe while asleep, it debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Constitución to wake up. If the objetivo is reduced to 5 puntos de golpe or fewer while asleep, it wakes up. If the objetivo is unwilling, it debe tener éxito en a CD 11 tirada de salvación de Constitución to avoid the effect of the dust. A sleeping criatura is considered an unwilling objetivo.

name: Dwarven Plate
desc: Mientras llevas esta armadura, obtienes un bonificador +2 a la CA. Además, si algún efecto te desplaza contra tu voluntad por el suelo, puedes usar tu reacción para reducir la distancia desplazada hasta en 3 metros.

name: Dwarven Plate
desc:
While wearing this armor, you gain the following benefits:

* Your Clase de Armadura increases by +1.
* When an effect forces you to move along the ground, you can use your reacción to reduce the forced movement by up to 10 pies.

name: Dwarven Thrower
desc: Obtienes un bonificador +3 a las tiradas de ataque y de daño realizadas con esta arma mágica. Tiene la propiedad arrojadiza con un alcance normal de 6 metros y un alcance largo de 18 metros. Cuando impactas con un ataque a distancia usando esta arma, inflige 1d8 de daño adicional o, si el objetivo es un gigante, 2d8 de daño adicional. Inmediatamente después del ataque, el arma regresa volando a tu mano.

name: Dwarven Thrower
desc: You gain +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic warhammer. In addition, while you are attuned to the hammer, you may throw it with a normal range of 20 pies and a maximum range of 60 pies. On a hit with a ataque a distancia using this hammer it causa an extra 1d8 damage (2d8 damage if the objetivo is a Gigante). When arrojadiza the warhammer immediately flies back to your hand after it hits or misses its objetivo.

name: Eagle Cape
desc: The exterior of this silk cape is lined with Gigante eagle feathers. When you fall while wearing this cape, you descend 60 pies per ronda, take no damage from falling, and always land on your pies. In addition, you can use an action to speak the cloak's command word. This turns the cape into a pair of eagle wings which give you a volando Velocidad of 60 pies for 1 hora or until you repeat the command word as an action. When the wings revert back to a cape, you can't use the cape in this way again until the next dawn.

name: Earrings of the Agent
desc: Aside from a minor difference in size, these simple golden hoops are identical to one another. Each hoop has 1 charge and provides a different mágico effect. Each hoop regains its expended charge daily at dawn. You must be wearing both hoops to use the magic of either hoop.

name: Earrings of the Eclipse
desc: These two cubes of smoked quartz are mounted on simple, silver posts. While you are wearing these earrings, you can take the Hide action while you are motionless in an area of dim ligera or darkness even when a criatura can see you or when you have nothing to obscure you from the sight of a criatura that can see you. If you are in darkness when you use the Hide action, you have ventaja on the Destreza (Sigilo) check. If you move, attack, cast a spell, or do anything other than remain motionless, you are no longer hidden and can be detected normally.

name: Earrings of the Storm Oyster
desc:
The deep blue pearls forming the core of these earrings come from oysters that survive being struck by rayo. While wearing these earrings, you gain the following benefits:
- You have resistance to rayo and daño de trueno.
- You can understand Primordial. When it is spoken, the pearls echo the words in a language you can understand, at a whisper only you can hear.
- You can't be ensordecido.
- You can breathe air and water. - As an action, you can cast the sleet storm spell (save CD 15) from the earrings. The earrings can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Earth Charm
desc:
While wearing this charm you gain an expertise die on checks and _tirada de salvacións_  to avoid falling _prone_ , or you can break the charm to release its power, destroying it to activate one of the following effects.

* **Abase:** As an action, choose a criatura you can see within 200 pies. It makes a CD 15 Fuerza _tirada de salvación_  or its volando Velocidad (if any) is reduced to 0 pies for 1 minuto, or until you lose _concentration_  (as if concentrating on a spell). An affected airborne criatura falls, taking damage when it lands (maximum 8d6 daño contundente).
* **Reshape:** Cast _stone shape ._
* **Withdraw:** Cast __meld into stone ._

**Curse**. Releasing the charm’s power attracts the attention of a _divi_  who seeks you out to demand your service.

name: Ebon Shards
desc: These obsidian shards are engraved with words in Habla Profunda, and their presence disquiets non-evil, intelligent criaturas. The writing on the shards is obscure, esoteric, and possibly incomplete. The shards have 10 charges and give you access to a powerful array of Void magic spells. While holding the shards, you use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from them, using your CD de salvación del conjuro and spellcasting ability: living shadows* (5 charges), maddening whispers* (2 charges), or void strike* (3 charges). You can also use an action to cast the crushing curse* spell from the shards without using any charges. Spells marked with an asterisk (*) can be found in Deep Magic for 5th Edition. At the GM's discretion, spells from Deep Magic for 5th Edition can be replaced with other spells of similar levels and similarly related to darkness or madness. The shards regain 1d6 + 4 expended charges daily at dusk. Each time you use the ebon shards to cast a spell, you debe tener éxito en a CD 12 tirada de salvación de Carisma or take 2d6 daño psíquico.

name: Echo Force
desc: While you are attuned to and wielding this shortsword and at your punto de golpe maximum, instead of making a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo con arma you can strike at the air to create a blade of mágico fuerza. Your blades of mágico fuerza are ranged spell attacks that use Fuerza or Destreza (your choice), have a range of 30/60 pies., and deal 1d6 daño de fuerza. When you are not at your punto de golpe maximum, this shortsword becomes a mundane item.

name: Efficacious Eyewash
desc: This clear liquid glitters with miniscule particles of ligera. A bottle of this potion contains 6 doses, and its lid comes with a built-in dropper. You can use an action to apply 1 dose to the eyes of a cegado criatura. The cegado condition is suppressed for 2d4 rondas. If the cegado condition has a duration, subtract those rondas from the total duration; if doing so reduces the overall duration to 0 rondas or less, then the condition is removed rather than suppressed. This eyewash doesn't work on criaturas that are naturally blind, such as grimlocks, or criaturas cegado by severe damage or removal of their eyes.

name: Efficient Quiver
desc:
Cada uno de los tres compartimentos de la aljaba conecta con un espacio extradimensional que le permite contener numerosos objetos sin llegar a pesar más de 1 kg. El compartimento más corto puede contener hasta sesenta flechas, virotes u objetos similares. El compartimento mediano puede contener hasta dieciocho jabalinas u objetos similares. El compartimento más largo puede contener hasta seis objetos largos, como arcos, bastones o lanzas.

Puedes sacar cualquier objeto que contenga la aljaba como si lo hicieras de una aljaba o vaina normal.

name: Efficient Quiver
desc:
This quiver has three compartments that contain extradimensional spaces. The first compartment can hold up to 60 arrows or items of a similar size. The second compartment can hold up to 18 javelins or similar items. The third compartment can hold up to 6 items such as bows, quarterstaffs, or spears.

You can retrieve any item as if it were being drawn from a regular quiver or scabbard. No single item can weigh more than 2 pounds.

name: Efreeti Bottle
desc:
Esta pintada botella de latón pesa 0,5 kg. Cuando usas una acción para retirar el tapón, una nube de humo espeso fluye desde el interior de la botella. Al final de tu turno, el humo desaparece con un destello de fuego inofensivo, y un efreeti aparece en un espacio desocupado a 9m de ti o menos.

La primera vez que se abre la botella, el DJ lanza para determinar qué ocurre.

| d100   | Efecto                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|--------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| 01-10  | El efreeti te ataca. Tras combatir durante 5 rondas, el efreeti desaparece y la botella pierde su magia.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| 11-90  | El efreeti te sirve durante 1 hora, obedeciendo tus órdenes. Después, el efreeti regresa a la botella y un nuevo tapón lo contiene. El tapón no puede retirarse durante 24 horas. Las dos próximas veces que se abra la botella, ocurre el mismo efecto. Si la botella se abre una cuarta vez, el efreeti escapa y desaparece, y la botella pierde su magia. |
| 91-100 | El efreeti puede lanzar el conjuro wish tres veces en tu nombre. Desaparece al conceder el último deseo o tras 1 hora, y la botella pierde su magia.                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |

name: Efreeti Bottle
desc:
You can use an action to unstopper this intricately carved brass bottle, causing an _efreeti_  to appear in a cloud of acrid smoke in an unoccupied space within 30 pies. When you open the bottle, roll to d100 to determine the effect.

__**Table: Efreeti Bottle**__
| **d100** | **Effect**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| -------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| 01–10    | The efreeti attacks you. The Efreeti departs after 5 rondas pass or losing half its puntos de golpe, whichever happens first, and the bottle becomes a mundane item.                                                                                                                                                    |
| 11–90    | The efreeti serves you for up to 1 hora before being drawn back into the bottle. The bottle cannot be opened again for 24 horas. This effect occurs automatically the second and third time the bottle is opened. The fourth time the bottle is opened, the efreeti vanishes and the bottle loses its enchantment. |
| 91–100   | The efreeti grants you 3 wishes (as the _wish_ spell) then vanishes after an hora or after granting the final wish, and the bottle becomes a mundane item.                                                                                                                                                         |

name: Eldritch Rod
desc: This bone rod is carved into the shape of twisting tendrils or tentacles. You can use this rod as an arcane focus. The rod has 3 charges and regains all expended charges daily at dawn. When you cast a spell that requires an tirada de ataque and that causa damage while holding this rod, you can expend 1 of its charges as part of the casting to enhance that spell. If the attack hits, the spell also releases tendrils that bind the objetivo, grappling it for 1 minuto. At the start of each of your turns, the agarrado objetivo recibe 1d6 damage of the same type dealt by the spell. At the end of each of its turns, the agarrado objetivo can make a tirada de salvación de Destreza against your CD de salvación del conjuro, freeing itself from the tendrils en un éxito. The rod's magic can grapple only un objetivo at a time. If you use the rod to grapple another objetivo, the effect on the previous objetivo ends.

name: Elemental Gem
desc:
Esta gema contiene una mota de energía elemental. Cuando usas una acción para romper la gema, se invoca un elemental como si hubieras lanzado el conjuro _conjure elemental_, y la magia de la gema se pierde. El tipo de gema determina el elemental que invoca el conjuro.

| Gema             | Elemental invocado |
|------------------|--------------------|
| Zafiro azul      | Air elemental      |
| Diamante amarillo| Earth elemental    |
| Corindón rojo    | Fire elemental     |
| Esmeralda        | Water elemental    |

name: Elemental Gem
desc:
You can use an action to break this gem, releasing a burst of elemental energy that summons an elemental to you as if you had cast the _conjure elemental_ spell. The type of gem determines the elemental summoned. 

The gem loses its enchantment when broken.

__**Table: Elemental Gem**__
| Corundum | _Fire elemental_  |
| -------- | ----------------- |
| Diamond  | _Earth elemental_ |
| Emerald  | _Water elemental_ |
| Sapphire | _Air elemental_   |

name: Elemental Quiver
desc:
When you place one or more pieces of no mágico munición into this bejeweled leather quiver, after 1 hora each is imbued with elemental power determined by the gem used in its construction. An elementally-imbued piece of munición causa an extra 1d4 elemental damage (see Table: Elemental Quiver). The enchantment begins to fade after the munición is removed from the quiver and vanishes entirely after 1 minuto. Each piece of munición imbued with elemental power expends 1 charge from the quiver. The quiver has 20 charges and regains 1d4+2 charges each dawn.

__Table: Elemental Quiver__
| **Gem**  | **Elemental Damage** |
| -------- | -------------------- |
| Diamond  | rayo            |
| Emerald  | ácido                 |
| Ruby     | fuego                 |
| Sapphire | frío                 |

name: Elemental Wraps
desc: These cloth arm wraps are decorated with elemental symbols depicting flames, rayo bolts, snowflakes, and similar. You have resistance to ácido, frío, fuego, rayo, or daño de trueno while you wear these arm wraps. You choose the type of damage when you first attune to the wraps, and you can choose a different type of damage at the end of a short or descanso largo. The wraps have 10 charges. When you hit with an unarmed strike while wearing these wraps, you can expend up to 3 of its charges. For each charge you expend, the objetivo recibe an extra 1d6 damage of the type to which you have resistance. The wraps regain 1d6 + 4 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a 1d20. On a 1, the wraps unravel and fall to the ground, becoming no mágico.

name: Elixir of Corruption
desc: This elixir looks, smells, and tastes like a potion of heroism; however, it is actually a poisonous elixir masked by illusion magic. An identify spell reveals its true Naturaleza. If you drink it, you debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Constitución or be corrupted by the diabolical power within the elixir for 1 week. While corrupted, you lose immunity to diseases, daño de veneno, and the envenenado condition. If you aren't normally immune to daño de veneno, you instead have vulnerability to daño de veneno while corrupted. The corruption can be removed with greater restoration or similar magic.

name: Elixir of Deep Slumber
desc: The milky-white liquid in this vial smells of jasmine and sandalwood. When you drink this potion, you fall into a deep sleep, from which you can't be physically awakened, for 1 hora. A successful dispel magic (CD 13) cast on you awakens you but cancels any beneficial effects of the elixir. When you awaken at the end of the hora, you benefit from the sleep as if you had finished a descanso largo.

name: Elixir of Focus
desc: This deep amber concoction seems to glow with an inner ligera. When you drink this potion, you have ventaja on the next ability check you make within 10 minutos, then the elixir's effect ends.

name: Elixir of Mimicry
desc: When you drink this sweet, oily, black liquid, you can imitate the voice of a single criatura that you have heard speak within the past 24 horas. The effects last for 3 minutos.

name: Elixir of Oracular Delirium
desc: This pearlescent fluid perpetually swirls inside its container with a slow kaleidoscopic churn. When you drink this potion, you can cast the guidance spell for 1 hora at will. You can end this effect early as an action and gain the effects of the augury spell. If you do, you are afflicted with short-term madness after learning the spell's results.

name: Elixir of Spike Skin
desc: Slivers of bone float in the viscous, gray liquid inside this vial. When you drink this potion, bone-like spikes protrude from your skin for 1 hora. Each time a criatura hits you with a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo con arma while within 5 pies of you, it debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Destreza or take 1d4 daño perforante from the spikes. In addition, while you are grappling a criatura or while a criatura is grappling you, it recibe 1d4 daño perforante at the start of your turn.

name: Elixir of the Clear Mind
desc: This cerulean blue liquid sits calmly in its flask even when jostled or shaken. When you drink this potion, you have ventaja on Sabiduría checks and tirada de salvacións for 1 hora. For the duration, if you fail a tirada de salvación against an enchantment or illusion spell or similar magic effect, you can choose to succeed instead. If you do, you draw upon all the potion's remaining power, and its effects end immediately thereafter.

name: Elixir of the Deep
desc: This thick, green, swirling liquid tastes like salted mead. For 1 hora after drinking this elixir, you can breathe underwater, and you can see clearly underwater out to a range of 60 pies. The elixir doesn't allow you to see through mágico darkness, but you can see through no mágico clouds of silt and other sedimentary particles as if they didn't exist. For the duration, you also have ventaja on tirada de salvacións against the spells and other mágico effects of fey criaturas native to water environments, such as a Lorelei (see Tome of Beasts) or Water Horse (see criatura Codex).

name: Elixir of Wakefulness
desc: This effervescent, crimson liquid is commonly held in a thin, glass vial capped in green wax. When you drink this elixir, its effects last for 8 horas. While the elixir is in effect, you can't fall asleep by normal means. You have ventaja on tirada de salvacións against effects that would put you to sleep. If you are affected by the sleep spell, your current puntos de golpe are considered 10 higher when determining the effects of the spell.

name: Elk Horn Rod
desc: This rod is fashioned from elk or reindeer horn. As an action, you can grant a +1 bonus on tirada de salvacións against spells and mágico effects to a objetivo touched by the wand, including yourself. The bonus lasts 1 ronda. If you are holding the rod while performing the somatic component of a dispel magic spell or comparable magic, you have a +1 bonus on your spellcasting ability check.

name: Elven Chain
desc: Obtienes un bonificador de +1 a la CA mientras vistes esta armadura. Se te considera competente con esta armadura aunque no tengas competencia con armadura media.

name: Elven Chain
desc: While wearing this armor your Clase de Armadura increases by +1, and you are able to wear it without penalty even without competencia. It only weighs 10 pounds, including the padding underneath, and can be stealthily worn under normal clothes.

name: Emperor’s Blade
desc:
Spiked metal barbs line this _+1 longsword_, resembling the many rows of a shark's teeth. You can use a acción adicional to speak a command word that activates or deactivates the barbs. While activated, the barbs rapidly saw back and forth to tear into your foes, making your weapon attacks with the sword deal an extra 1d8 daño cortante.

When you score a critical hit while the barbs are active, the sawing barbs leave a terrible wound that causa 1d8 ongoing damage. At the start of each of its turns, a wounded criatura makes a Constitución _tirada de salvación_  (CD 8 + your competencia bonus + your Fuerza modifier) to end the ongoing damage.

name: Enchanted Music Sheet
desc:
This music sheet of fine parchment documents musical notation of a fey Interpretación. Humming, whistling, or using an instrument to play the opening three notes causes the sheet music to issue the sounds of a hauntingly beautiful musical Interpretación for 10 minutos. Up to 6 criaturas of your choice that are within 30 pies of the sheet and able to hear the entire Interpretación gain 2 temporary puntos de golpe. A criatura can’t gain temporary puntos de golpe from the music sheet again until it completes a _long rest_ , and after using this feature you cannot do so again until you finish a short or descanso largo. 

During a descanso corto, you can spend an hora to amend the music sheet with pen and ink to alter its melody and mood. Regardless of the changes you make to the sheet, the notation remains legible and the music is always lovely. 

If you accompany the music, using an instrument or singing with a CD 12 Interpretación check, you can empower its magic. Up to 6 criaturas of your choice that are within 30 pies of you and able to hear the entire Interpretación regain 3 puntos de golpe and gain 6 temporary puntos de golpe. At the end of the Interpretación, the music sheet transforms into a flutter of petals and butterflies, and its magic is lost.

**Curse.** The music sheet is cursed and a criatura with temporary puntos de golpe gained by its music has _disadvantage_  on _tirada de salvacións_  to resist being _charmed_  and _frightened_  by celestials, fiends, and fey. Empowering the magic with your own Interpretación draws the attention of a fey who seeks you out to perform at an event of their choosing.

name: Encouraging Armor
desc: While wearing this armor, you gain a +1 bonus to AC. In addition, each friendly criatura within 10 pies of you that can see you gains a +1 bonus to attack rolls and tirada de salvacións. If you are a paladin with the Aura of Courage feature, this bonus increases to +2.

name: Enraging Ammunition
desc: When you hit a criatura with a ataque a distancia using this mágico munición, the objetivo debe tener éxito en a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or become enraged for 1 minuto. On its turn, an enraged criatura moves toward you by the most direct route, trying to get within 5 pies of you. It doesn't avoid opportunity attacks, but it moves around or avoids damaging terrain, such as lava or a pit. If the enraged criatura is within 5 pies of you, it attacks you. An enraged criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito.

name: Ensnaring Ammunition
desc: When you hit a criatura with a ataque a distancia using this mágico munición, the objetivo recibe only half el daño from the attack, and the objetivo is apresado as the munición bursts into entangling strands that wrap around it. As an action, the apresado objetivo can make a CD 13 Fuerza check, bursting the bonds en un éxito. The strands can also be attacked and destroyed (AC 10; hp 5; immunity to contundente, veneno, and daño psíquico).

name: Entrenching Mattock
desc: You gain a +1 to attack and damage rolls with this magic weapon. This bonus increases to +3 when you use the pick to attack a criatura made of earth or stone, such as an earth elemental or stone golem. As a acción adicional, you can slam the head of the pick into earth, sand, mud, or rock within 5 pies of you to create a wall of that material up to 30 pies long, 3 pies high, and 1 pie thick along that surface. The wall provides half cover to criaturas behind it. The pick can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Esquire's Rowels
desc: While riding a mount and wearing these silver-chased spurs, you have a +1 bonus to initiative rolls, and your mount1s Clase de Armadura increases by 2. In addition, while riding a mount and wearing these spurs, you and your mount have ventaja on Constitución tirada de salvacións against agotamiento caused by traveling more than 8 horas in a day.

name: Essay on Efficient Armor Management
desc: This treatise details techniques for how to quickly handle armor. Spending 1 hora over 3 days memorizing the essay’s techniques teaches you how to use an action to doff ligera and medium armors. The parchment then becomes a mundane item for a year and a day before it regains its magic.

name: Ever-Shifting Map
desc:
Created by a dwarven prospector who made it his life's goal to map out as many of the deepest dungeons and tunnels as he possibly could, this tattered piece of parchment has a display of words and diagrams on it that is in constant flux. When you attune to the map, the words change to the language of your choosing. Whenever you examine the map, you can immediately find north no matter where you are, so long as you are on a plane of existence that has traditional cardinal directions.

When you speak a command word etched on the back corner of the map while you are underground, you recall the memory of the dwarven prospector embarking on what he feared to be his last expedition, delving so deep that he thought he might never return. When this happens, the map shows you the direction to the largest cache of treasure (measured in number of coins and jewels) within 1 milla. The map shows you passageways relevant to your destination and gives you ventaja on ability checks to find secret doors, but does not note the location of monsters or traps. The information on the map disappears after your next descanso largo, at which point all writing vanishes from the parchment and it becomes a mundane item.

name: Everflowing Bowl
desc: This smooth, stone bowl feels especially cool to the touch. It holds up to 1 pint of water. When placed on the ground, the bowl magically draws water from the nearby earth and air, filling itself after 1 hora. In arid or desert environments, the bowl fills itself after 8 horas. The bowl never overflows itself.

name: Eversmoking Bottle
desc:
El humo se filtra por la boca con tapón de plomo de esta botella de latón, que pesa 0,5 kg. Cuando usas una acción para retirar el tapón, una nube de humo espeso se derrama en un radio de 18m desde la botella. El área de la nube está muy oscurecida. Cada minuto que la botella permanece abierta y dentro de la nube, el radio aumenta 3m hasta alcanzar su radio máximo de 36m.

La nube persiste mientras la botella esté abierta. Para cerrar la botella debes pronunciar su palabra de mando como una acción. Una vez cerrada la botella, la nube se disipa tras 10 minutos. Un viento moderado (de 17 a 32 km/h) también puede disipar el humo tras 1 minuto, y un viento fuerte (de más de 33 km/h) puede hacerlo tras 1 ronda.

name: Eversmoking Bottle
desc:
This glass bottle is filled with whirling smoke. You can use an action to remove the stopper, causing a thick cloud to pour out and fill a 60-pie radius centered on the bottle, making the area _heavily obscured_ . The cloud grows by 10 pies for each minuto that the bottle remains open, to a maximum radius of 120 pies.

The cloud remains until the bottle is closed. Closing the bottle requires the item’s command word and an action, after which the smoke disperses after 10 minutos. Moderate winds disperse the smoke after 1 minuto. Strong winds disperse the smoke after 1 ronda.

name: Excalibur
desc:
This legendary weapon is said to grant powerful magic to its wielder and that only the rightful ruler of the land is suitable to carry it into battle. While you are attuned to it, _Excalibur_ grants you the following benefits:

* If you are the rightful wielder of _Excalibur_, it instantly attunes to you and does not take up an attunement slot.
* You gain a +4 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this weapon.
* When you attack an object with this magic sword and hit, maximize your weapon damage dice against the objetivo.
* When you attack a criatura with this weapon and roll a 20 on the _attack roll_ , that objetivo recibe an extra 4d6 daño cortante. Then roll another d20\. If you roll a 20, you lop off one of the objetivo’s limbs, with the effect of such loss determined by the Narrator. If the criatura has no limb to sever, you lop off a portion of its body instead.
* You can speak the sword’s command word to cause the blade to shed bright ligera in a 10-pie radius and dim ligera for an additional 10 pies. Speaking the command word again or sheathing the sword puts out the ligera.
* When you are reduced to 0 puntos de golpe but not killed outright, you can drop to 1 punto de golpe instead. You can’t use this property again until you finish a descanso largo.
* You have _advantage_  on Perspicacia and Persuasión checks made against anyone but criaturas you consider to be your close aliados and companions.

name: Excalibur’s Scabbard
desc: While wearing this longsword scabbard, you have resistance to perforante and daño cortante from no mágico weapons.

name: Explorer’s Chalk
desc:
This unassuming piece of white chalk appears well-used but does not wear down no matter how many times it marks a surface. The _explorer’s chalk_ has 6 charges and regains 1d6 expended charges each dawn. When you touch it to a surface, you can expend 1 of its charges to create a mark that cannot be wiped away or obscured for 24 horas. While holding the chalk, you can use an action to become aware of the direction of the closest mark made with it as long as that mark is within 1 milla.

If you expend the _explorer’s chalk’s_ last charge, roll a d20\. On a result of 5 or less, the chalk crumbles to dust. On a 20, the chalk regains its expended charges and its number of charges increases by 1.

name: Exsanguinating Blade
desc: This double-bladed dagger has an ivory hilt, and its gold pommel is shaped into a woman's head with ruby eyes and a fanged mouth opened in a scream. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you roll a 20 on an tirada de ataque made with this weapon against a criatura that has blood, the dagger gains 1 charge. The dagger can hold 1 charge at a time. You can use a acción adicional to expend 1 charge from the dagger to cause one of the following effects: - You or a criatura you touch with the blade regains 2d8 puntos de golpe. - The next time you hit a criatura that has blood with this weapon, it causa an extra 2d8 daño necrótico.

name: Extract of Dual-Mindedness
desc: This potion can be distilled only from a hormone found in the hypothalamus of a two-headed Gigante of genius intellect. For 1 minuto after drinking this potion, you can concentrate on two spells at the same time, and you have ventaja on Constitución tirada de salvacións made to maintain your Concentración on a spell when you take damage.

name: Eye of Elsewhere
desc:
This gray stone orb is carved into the likeness and size of a disquietingly realistic human eye with a ruby iris. Once you have attuned to it you can use an action to set the eye in a gentle orbit around your head, 1d4 pies away from you. Another criatura may use an action to try and take an orbiting eye, but debe realizar a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo against AC 24 or make a CD 24 Destreza (Acrobacias) check. The eye’s AC is 24, it has 30 puntos de golpe, and resistance to all damage. While orbiting your head, it is considered a worn item. You can use an action to seize and stow the eye, returning it to an inert and inactive state. 

While the eye is actively orbiting your head, your Inteligencia score increases by 2 (to a maximum of 22), you gain an expertise die on Inteligencia checks and Percepción checks, and you cannot be _surprised_  or _blinded_ . 

_**Innate Arcane Eye.**_ While the eye orbits your head, you know and can innately cast _arcane eye_ without expending a espacio de conjuro or the need for material components.

_**Shared Paranoia.**_ After you have attuned to the eye and it has been and active for 24 horas, you develop a paranoia that persists as long as it remains active. While paranoid you have _disadvantage_  on Perspicacia checks and you are considered roughing it if you sleep in the same room or tent as another humanoid criatura. 

_**Sentience.**_ The eye is a sentient construct with Inteligencia 20, Sabiduría 15, and Carisma 8\. It cannot hear, but has vista ciega and visión en la oscuridad to a range of 60 pies. The eye communicates with you and other criaturas within 60 pies telepathically and can read, speak, and understand Abisal, Común, Habla Profunda, and Infracomún.

_**Personality.**_ The eye of elsewhere contains the soul of something utterly alien to humanoid perceptions, betrayed and plunged into a constrained form. It is constantly paranoid and convinced that some worse fate could befall it at any moment. Once attuned it will try to learn everything and anything you know, especially secrets. If you are forthcoming with information the eye grows to trust you, but can be brought into conflict if you withhold any information. When in conflict the eye shuts and you no longer gain any of the eye’s benefits or properties except for Shared Paranoia. The eye only opens again if you divulge an important secret or the information initially withheld. 

_**Destroying the Eye.**_ The eye is unbreakable but it has the power to implode and disintegrate itself. Success on a CD 28 Engaño check convinces the eye that some horrifying and frightening threat is inevitably soon to befall it. Rather than accept its fate, the eye destroys itself and blinks out of existence. On a failed check, the criatura permanently loses the eye’s trust and the eye will never attune to it or be convinced by its Engaño checks.

name: Eye of Horus
desc: This gold and lapis lazuli amulet helps you determine reality from phantasms and trickery. While wearing it, you have ventaja on tirada de salvacións against illusion spells and against being asustado.

name: Eye of the Golden God
desc: A shining multifaceted violet gem sits at the center of this fist-sized amulet. A beautifully forged band of platinum encircles the gem and affixes it to a well-made series of interlocking platinum chain links. The violet gem is warm to the touch. While wearing this amulet, you can't be asustado and you don't suffer from agotamiento. In addition, you always know which item within 20 pies of you is the most valuable, though you don't know its actual value or if it is mágico. Each time you finish a descanso largo while attuned to this amulet, roll a 1d10. On a 1-3, you awaken from your rest with that many valuable objects in your hand. The objects are minor, such as copper coins, at first and progressively get more valuable, such as gold coins, ivory statuettes, or gemstones, each time they appear. Each object is always small enough to fit in a single hand and is never worth more than 1,000 gp. The GM determines the type and value of each object. Once the left eye of an ornate and mágico statue of a pit fiend revered by a small cult of Mammon, this exquisite purple gem was pried from the idol by an adventurer named Slick Finnigan. Slick and his companions had taken it upon themselves to eradicate the cult, eager for the accolades they would receive for defeating an evil in the community. The loot they stood to gain didn't hurt either. After the assault, while his companions were busy chasing the fleeing members of the cult, Slick pocketed the gem, disfiguring the statue and weakening its power in the process. He was then attacked by a cultist who had managed to evade notice by the adventurers. Slick escaped with his life, and the gem, but was unable to acquire the second eye. Within days, the thief was finding himself assaulted by devils and cultists. He quickly offloaded his loot with a collection of merchants in town, including a jeweler who was looking for an exquisite stone to use in a piece commissioned by a local noble. Slick then set off with his pockets full of coin, happily leaving the devilish drama behind. This mágico amulet attracts the attention of worshippers of Mammon, who can almost sense its presence and are eager to claim its power for themselves, though a few extremely devout members of the weakened cult wish to return the gem to its original place in the idol. Due to this, and a bit of bad luck, this amulet has changed hands many times over the decades.

name: Eyes of Charming
desc: Estas lentes de cristal se colocan sobre los ojos. Tienen 3 cargas. Mientras las llevas puestas, puedes gastar 1 carga como acción para lanzar el conjuro _charm person_ (CD de salvación 13) sobre un humanoide que se encuentre a 9m o menos de ti, siempre que tú y el objetivo podáis veros mutuamente. Las lentes recuperan todas las cargas gastadas cada día al amanecer.

name: Eyes of Charming
desc: These framed lenses are worn over the eyes and contain 3 charges. You can use an action to expend 1 charge and cast the __charm person_ spell (save CD 13). Both you and the objetivo must be able to see each other. The lenses regain all expended charges at dawn.

name: Eyes of Minute Seeing
desc: Estas lentes de cristal se colocan sobre los ojos. Mientras las llevas puestas, puedes ver con mucha mayor claridad que de forma normal hasta una distancia de 30cm. Tienes ventaja en las pruebas de Inteligencia (Investigación) que dependan de la vista mientras buscas en un área o examinas un objeto dentro de ese alcance.

name: Eyes of Minute Seeing
desc: These wire-framed lenses are worn over the eyes and enhance your vision within 1 pie. You gain _advantage_  on any sight-based Investigación checks made to study an object or area within that range

name: Eyes of the Eagle
desc: Estas lentes de cristal se colocan sobre los ojos. Mientras las llevas puestas, tienes ventaja en las pruebas de Sabiduría (Percepción) que dependan de la vista. En condiciones de buena visibilidad, puedes distinguir detalles incluso de criaturas y objetos extremadamente lejanos de tan solo 60cm de ancho.

name: Eyes of the Eagle
desc: These wire-framed lenses fit over the eyes and grant you _advantage_  on sight-based Percepción checks. When visibility is clear you can make out fine details at extreme ranges, easily discerning criaturas and objects as small as 2 pies across.

name: Eyes of the Outer Dark
desc: These lenses are crafted of polished, opaque black stone. When placed over the eyes, however, they allow the wearer not only improved vision but glimpses into the vast emptiness between the stars. While wearing these lenses, you have visión en la oscuridad out to a range of 60 pies. If you already have visión en la oscuridad, its range is extended by 60 pies. As an action, you can use the lenses to pierce the veils of time and space and see into the outer darkness. You gain the benefits of the foresight and true seeing spells for 10 minutos. If you activate this property and you aren't suffering from a madness, you take 3d8 daño psíquico. Once used, this property of the lenses can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Eyes of the Portal Masters
desc: While you wear these crystal lenses over your eyes, you can sense the presence of any dimensional portal within 60 pies of you and whether the portal is one-way or two-way. Once you have worn the eyes for 10 minutos, their magic ceases to function until the next dawn. Putting the lenses on or off requires an action.

name: Faerie Love Letter
desc:
This miniature private correspondence, which smells of floral perfume, is proof of a particularly scandalous dalliance between two noble fey which you can exploit for a favor. While attuned to the letter you can whisper the command word to cast either __druidcraft_  or mending. You can’t do so again until you finish a _long rest_ .

Alternatively, you can use an action to summon a Tiny faerie (AC 15, HP 1, Velocidad fly 30 pies., CD de salvación del conjuro 12). The faerie is _charmed_  by you and acts immediately, casting one of the following spells as directed: __faerie fuego , healing word ,_ or __hideous laughter ,_ after which it acts to preserve its own life and will only take the Dodge or Hide actions. If the faerie dies in your service the letter loses its power, but you retain the proof of their misconduct. Otherwise the faerie disappears after 1 minuto, taking its love letter with it.

name: Family Scrapbook
desc:
