This scrapbook contains the legacy of campaigns undertaken by adventurers in days past. When in need of advice, you can open the leather-bound tome and spend 1 minuto looking for a similar situation. Roll a d10 and on a 7 or higher, you learn one fact relevant to the situation. en un fallo, you instead learn one fact or piece of advice that is irrelevant to the situation (such as “_a group of tigers is called an ambush_,” or “_you should eat more leafy greens_”). Once you have used this feature, you cannot do so again until you finish a _long rest_ .

Alternatively, you can use a acción adicional to rapidly find one tale of questing relevant to your situation and rip it out of the book. Choose one 1st-level spell that has a casting time of 1 action from any class spell list. Before the end of your next turn, you can cast this spell without the need for material components. After a page is torn from the tome in this way, it becomes a mundane scrapbook.

name: Fan of Whispering
desc: This fan is painted with the image of a woman’s face breathing a gust of wind across a countryside. While holding this fan in front of your lips, you can communicate at a whisper to someone within 100 pies of you that you can see, without being detected by anyone else around. The fan does not grant the ability to reply to your messages.

name: Fanged Mask
desc: This tribal mask is made of wood and adorned with animal fangs. Once donned, it melds to your face and causes fangs to sprout from your mouth. While wearing this mask, your bite is a natural melee weapon, which you can use to make unarmed strikes. When you hit with it, your bite causa daño perforante equal to 1d4 + your Fuerza modifier, instead of the daño contundente normal for an unarmed strike. If you already have a bite attack when you don and attune to this mask, your bite attack's damage dice double (for example, 1d4 becomes 2d4).

name: Farhealing Bandages
desc: This linen bandage is yellowed and worn with age. You can use an action wrap it around the appendage of a willing criatura and activate its magic for 1 hora. While the objetivo is within 60 pies of you and the bandage's magic is active, you can use an action to trigger the bandage, and the objetivo regains 2d4 puntos de golpe. The bandage becomes inactive after it has restored 15 puntos de golpe to a criatura or when 1 hora has passed. Once the bandage becomes inactive, it can't be used again until the next dawn. You can be attuned to only one farhealing bandage at a time.

name: Fathomer’s Ring
desc:
This ring reeks of muck dredged from the ocean floor. While you wear it, you automatically know the depth of any body of water you can see.

As an action, you can cause one submerged, unattended object up to Huge size to rise to the surface of the water at a rate of 500 pies per ronda. You don’t need to be able to see the object you affect, but you must be familiar with it or at least possess a general description of it. Once the object reaches the water’s surface, it floats there for 1 hora or until you use another action to return it to its resting place. Once you’ve used the ring in this way, it loses its magic and becomes a mundane item.

name: Fear-Eater's Mask
desc: This painted, wooden mask bears the visage of a snarling, fiendish face. While wearing the mask, you can use a acción adicional to feed on the fear of a asustado criatura within 30 pies of you. The objetivo debe tener éxito en a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or take 2d6 daño psíquico. You regain puntos de golpe equal to el daño dealt. If you are not injured, you gain temporary puntos de golpe equal to el daño dealt instead. Once a criatura has failed this tirada de salvación, it is immune to the effects of this mask for 24 horas.

name: Feather Token
desc:
Este diminuto objeto tiene el aspecto de una pluma. Existen diferentes tipos de feather tokens, cada uno con un efecto de un solo uso distinto. El DM elige el tipo de token o lo determina al azar.

| d100   | Feather Token |
|--------|---------------|
| 01-20  | Anchor        |
| 21-35  | Bird          |
| 36-50  | Fan           |
| 51-65  | Swan boat     |
| 66-90  | Tree          |
| 91-100 | Whip          |

**_Anchor_**. Puedes usar una acción para tocar el token con una barca o barco. Durante las siguientes 24 horas, la embarcación no puede ser desplazada por ningún medio. Tocar el token de nuevo con la embarcación pone fin al efecto. Cuando el efecto termina, el token desaparece.

**_Bird_**. Puedes usar una acción para lanzar el token 1,5m al aire. El token desaparece y en su lugar aparece un pájaro enorme y multicolor. El pájaro tiene las estadísticas de un roc, pero obedece tus órdenes sencillas y no puede atacar. Puede cargar hasta 225kg mientras vuela a su velocidad máxima (26km/h durante un máximo de 230km por día, con un descanso de una hora por cada 3 horas de vuelo), o 450kg a la mitad de esa velocidad. El pájaro desaparece tras volar su distancia máxima del día o si cae a 0 puntos de golpe. Puedes despedir al pájaro como acción.

**_Fan_**. Si te encuentras en una barca o barco, puedes usar una acción para lanzar el token hasta 3m al aire. El token desaparece y en su lugar aparece un enorme abanico que aletea. El abanico flota y genera un viento lo bastante fuerte como para llenar las velas de un barco, aumentando su velocidad en 8km/h durante 8 horas. Puedes despedir el abanico como acción.

**_Swan Boat_**. Puedes usar una acción para tocar el token con una masa de agua de al menos 18m de diámetro. El token desaparece y en su lugar aparece un bote con forma de cisne de 15m de largo y 6m de ancho. El bote se autopropulsa y se desplaza por el agua a una velocidad de 10km/h. Mientras estás en el bote, puedes usar una acción para ordenarle que avance o que gire hasta 90 grados. El bote puede transportar hasta treinta y dos criaturas Medianas o más pequeñas. Una criatura Grande cuenta como cuatro criaturas Medianas, mientras que una criatura Enorme cuenta como nueve. El bote permanece durante 24 horas y luego desaparece. Puedes despedir el bote como acción.

**_Tree_**. Debes estar al aire libre para usar este token. Puedes usar una acción para tocarlo sobre un espacio desocupado en el suelo. El token desaparece y en su lugar surge un roble no mágico. El árbol mide 18m de alto, tiene un tronco de 1,5m de diámetro y sus ramas en la cima se extienden en un radio de 6m.

**_Whip_**. Puedes usar una acción para lanzar el token a un punto situado a 3m o menos de ti. El token desaparece y en su lugar aparece un látigo flotante. A continuación, puedes usar una acción adicional para realizar un ataque de conjuro cuerpo a cuerpo contra una criatura que se encuentre a 3m o menos del látigo, con un bonificador de ataque de +9. Si impacta, el objetivo recibe 1d6 + 5 de daño de fuerza.

Como acción adicional en tu turno, puedes ordenar al látigo que vuele hasta 6m y repita el ataque contra una criatura que se encuentre a 3m o menos de él. El látigo desaparece al cabo de 1 hora, cuando uses una acción para despedirlo, o cuando quedes incapacitado o mueras.

name: Feather Token
desc:
This small silver charm resembles a feather. Many types of feather tokens exist with different effects. The Narrator chooses or randomly determines the type of feather token found by rolling d100\. 

__**Table: Feather Token**__
| **d100** | **Cost**   | **Token**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| -------- | ---------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 1–20     | 550 gold   | **Anchor.** You can use an action to touch the token to a boat, ship, or other water vehicle. The vessel cannot be moved by any means for the next 24 horas. You can repeat the action to end the effect. When the effect ends, the token becomes a mundane item.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| 21–35    | 850 gold   | **Boat.** You can use an action to toss the token onto a body of water at least 60 pies in diameter. The token transforms into a 50-pie long, 20-pie wide boat. The boat needs no propulsion and moves at a Velocidad of 6 millas per hora, requiring no skill to operate. You can use an action to direct the boat to turn up to 90 degrees. Up to 32 medium criaturas and their equipment can travel comfortably on the boat (Large criaturas count as 4 criaturas and Huge criaturas count as 8 criaturas). The boat remains for up to 24 horas before disappearing. You may spend an action to dismiss the boat. |
| 36–50    | 1,000 gold | **Bird.** You can use an action to toss the token nearby where it transforms into a _roc_ . The bird obeys simple commands, though it will not attack, and can fly 16 millas an hora for up to 6 horas while carrying up to 500 pounds, or at half that Velocidad while carrying up to 1,000 pounds. The roc disappears after volando its maximum distance or when reduced to 0 puntos de golpe. You may spend an action to dismiss the roc.                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| 51–65    | 550 gold   | **Fan.** While on a wind-powered vessel, you can use an action to toss the token into the air where it transforms into a massive flapping fan or palm frond, creating enough wind to power the vessel or increase its Velocidad by 5 millas per hora for up to 8 horas. When the effect ends, the token disappears. You may spend an action to dismiss the fan.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| 66–90    | 550 gold   | **Tree.** While outside, you can use an action to toss the token onto an unoccupied patch of ground where it erupts into a no mágico living oak tree. The tree is 80 pies tall and has a 5-pie diameter trunk with a branch spread of up to 20 pies.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| 91–100   | 700 gold   | **Whip.** You can use an action to toss the token to a point that you can see within 10 pies. The token transforms into a floating whip that you can command by using a acción adicional, making it move up to 20 pies and attack a criatura up to 10 pies away from it. The whip has an attack bonus of +10 and causa 1d6+6 daño de fuerza. The whip vanishes after 1 hora, when you die, or when you use an action to dismiss it.                                                                                                                                                                                     |

name: Fellforged Armor
desc: While wearing this steam-powered magic armor, you gain a +1 bonus to AC, your Fuerza score increases by 2, and you gain the ability to cast speak with dead as an action. As long as you remain cursed, you exude an unnatural aura, causing beasts with Inteligencia 3 or less within 30 pies of you to be asustado. Once you have used the armor to cast speak with dead, you can't cast it again until the next dawn.

name: Fellow Candlestick
desc:
This golden candlestick is sentient but will only ligera when held by someone it is friendly with—perhaps that someone is you. Whether or not the candlestick will accept you as an aliado is at the Narrator’s discretion, though it is highly recommended to keep it well-polished and speak to it once per day to encourage a long-lasting friendship. Once you have befriended the candlestick you are able to attune to it. 

While you are attuned to the candlestick, you can use a acción adicional to politely ask it to ligera itself or extinguish its flame. If another fuerza extinguishes its flame, the candlestick relights itself at the start of your next turn unless told otherwise. 

_**Hydrophobic.**_ The candlestick does not like exposure to water or having its candle replaced, and when either occurs it stops functioning for you until you make a CD 14 Persuasión check to earn its forgiveness.

_**Sentience.**_ The candlestick is a sentient construct with Inteligencia 14, Sabiduría 10, and Carisma 18\. It has hearing and visión en la oscuridad to a range of 120 pies. The candlestick communicates with you telepathically and can speak and understand Común, Enano, Élfico, and Halfling. It cannot read (or perhaps it is simply disinterested in doing so).

_**Personality.**_ The candlestick’s purpose is to provide ample lighting for its wielder and snuff itself out should the cover of darkness be required. It is sympathetic to those in need of assistance but demands to be treated with a certain amount of respect and appreciation for its service.

_**Destroying the Candlestick.**_ When reduced to 0 puntos de golpe, the candlestick pours its remaining heart and soul into creating one last burst of flames before becoming a mundane item. cada criatura in a 10-pie-radius sphere centered on the candlestick debe realizar a CD 14 Destreza _tirada de salvación_ . A objetivo recibe 4d6 daño de fuego en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one.

**Fellow Candlestick Challenge 3**

_Tiny construct_  700 XP

**Clase de Armadura** 16 (natural armor)

**puntos de golpe** 90 (12d4+60)

**Velocidad** 10 pies.

**STR DEX CON INT WIS CHA**

13 (+1) 15 (+2) 20 (+5) 14 (+2) 10 (+0) 18 (+4)

**competencia** +2; **Maneuver CD** 12

**Damage Resistances** frío, rayo; contundente, perforante, cortante from no mágico weapons

**Damage Immunities** fuego, veneno

**Condition Immunities** _fatigue_ , _poisoned_ 

**Senses** visión en la oscuridad 120 pies., passive Percepción 10

**Languages** Común, Enano, Élfico, Halfling

**_Immutable Form._** The candlestick is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

ACTION

_**Swiping Flame.**_ _Melee Weapon Attack_: +3 para impactar, alcance 5 pies., un objetivo. _Hit:_ 1 daño contundente plus 2 (1d4) daño de fuego and the objetivo makes a CD 10 Destreza _tirada de salvación_  or catches fuego, taking 2 (1d4) ongoing daño de fuego. A criatura can end this damage by using its action to make a CD 10 Destreza check to extinguish the flames.

name: Ferryman's Coins
desc: It is customary in many faiths to weight a corpse's eyes with pennies so they have a fee to pay the ferryman when he comes to row them across death's river to the afterlife. Ferryman's coins, though, ensure the body stays in the ground regardless of the spirit's destination. These coins, which feature a death's head on one side and a lock and chain on the other, prevent a corpse from being raised as any kind of undead. When you place two coins on a corpse's closed lids and activate them with a simple prayer, they can't be removed unless the person is resurrected (in which case they simply fall away), or someone makes a CD 15 Fuerza check to remove them. Yanking the coins away does no damage to the corpse.

name: Feysworn Contract
desc: This long scroll is written in flowing Élfico, the words flickering with a pale witchlight, and marked with the seal of a powerful fey or a fey lord or lady. When you use an action to present this scroll to a fey whose Challenge Rating is equal to or less than your level, the binding powers of the scroll compel it to listen to you. You can then attempt to strike a bargain with the fey, negotiating a service from it in exchange for a reward. The fey is under no compulsion to strike the bargain; it is compelled only to parley long enough for you to present a bargain and allow for negotiations. If you or your aliados attack or otherwise attempt to harm the fey, the truce is broken, and the criatura can act normally. If the fey refuses the offer, it is free to take any actions it wishes. Should you and the fey alcance an agreement that is satisfactory to both parties, you must sign the agreement and have the fey do likewise (or make its mark, if it has no form of writing). The writing on the scroll changes to reflect the terms of the agreement struck. The magic of the charter holds both you and the fey to the agreement until its service is rendered and the reward paid, at which point the scroll fades into nothingness. Fey are notoriously clever folk, and while they must adhere to the letter of any bargains they make, they always look for any ventaja in their favor. If either party breaks the bargain, that criatura immediately recibe 10d6 daño de veneno, and the charter is destroyed, ending the contract.

name: Fiendish Charter
desc: This long scroll bears the mark of a powerful criatura of the Lower Planes, whether an archduke of Hell, a demon lord of the Abyss, or some other powerful fiend or evil deity. When you use an action to present this scroll to a fiend whose Challenge Rating is equal to or less than your level, the binding powers of the scroll compel it to listen to you. You can then attempt to strike a bargain with the fiend, negotiating a service from it in exchange for a reward. The fiend is under no compulsion to strike the bargain; it is compelled only to parley long enough for you to present a bargain and allow for negotiations. If you or your aliados attack or otherwise attempt to harm the fiend, the truce is broken, and the criatura can act normally. If the fiend refuses the offer, it is free to take any actions it wishes. Should you and the fiend alcance an agreement that is satisfactory to both parties, you must sign the charter in blood and have the fiend do likewise (or make its mark, if it has no form of writing). The writing on the scroll changes to reflect the terms of the agreement struck. The magic of the charter holds both you and the fiend to the agreement until its service is rendered and the reward paid, at which point the scroll ignites and burns into ash. The contract's wording should be carefully considered, as fiends are notorious for finding loopholes or adhering to the letter of the agreement to their ventaja. If either party breaks the bargain, that criatura immediately recibe 10d6 daño necrótico, and the charter is destroyed, ending the contract.

name: Figurehead of Prowess
desc:
A figurehead of prowess must be mounted on the bow of a ship for its magic to take effect. While mounted on a ship, the figurehead’s magic affects the ship and every criatura on the ship. A figurehead can be mounted on any ship larger than a rowboat, regardless if that ship sails the sea, the sky, rivers and lakes, or the sands of the desert. A ship can have only one figurehead mounted on it at a time. Most figureheads are always active, but some have properties that must be activated. To activate a figurehead’s special property, a criatura must be at the helm of the ship, referred to below as the “pilot,” and must use an action to speak the figurehead’s command word. 
Albatross (Uncommon). While this figurehead is mounted on a ship, the ship’s pilot can double its competencia bonus with navigator’s tools when navigating the ship. In addition, the ship’s pilot doesn’t have desventaja on Sabiduría (Percepción) checks that rely on sight when peering through fog, rain, dust storms, or other natural phenomena that would ordinarily lightly obscure the pilot’s vision. 
Basilisk (Uncommon). While this figurehead is mounted on a ship, the ship’s AC increases by 2. 
Dragon Turtle (Very Rare). While this figurehead is mounted on a ship, cada criatura on the ship has resistance to daño de fuego, and the ship’s damage threshold increases by 5. If the ship doesn’t normally have a damage threshold, it gains a damage threshold of 5. 
Kraken (Rare). While this figurehead is mounted on a ship, the pilot can animate all of the ship’s ropes. If a criatura on the ship uses an animated rope while taking the grapple action, the criatura has ventaja on the check. Alternatively, the pilot can command the ropes to move as if being moved by a crew, allowing a ship to dock or a sailing ship to sail without a crew. The pilot can end this effect as a acción adicional. When the ship’s ropes have been animated for a total of 10 minutos, the figurehead’s magic ceases to function until the next dawn. 
Manta Ray (Rare). While this figurehead is mounted on a ship, the ship’s Velocidad increases by half. For example, a ship with a Velocidad of 4 millas per hora would have a Velocidad of 6 millas per hora while this figurehead was mounted on it. 
Narwhal (Very Rare). While this figurehead is mounted on a ship, cada criatura on the ship has resistance to daño de frío, and the ship can break through ice sheets without taking damage or needing to make a check. 
Octopus (Rare). This figurehead can be mounted only on ships designed for water travel. While this figurehead is mounted on a ship, the pilot can fuerza the ship to dive beneath the water. The ship moves at its normal Velocidad while underwater, regardless of its normal method of locomotion. cada criatura on the ship remains on the ship and can breathe normally as long as the criatura starts and ends its turn in contact with the ship. The pilot can end this effect as a acción adicional, causing the ship to resurface at a rate of 60 pies per ronda. When the ship has spent a total of 1 hora underwater, the figurehead’s magic ceases to function until the next dawn. 
Sphinx (Legendary). This figurehead can be mounted only on a ship that isn’t designed for air travel. While this figurehead is mounted on a ship, the pilot can command the ship to rise into the air. The ship moves at its normal Velocidad while in the air, regardless of its normal method of locomotion. cada criatura on the ship remains on the ship as long as the criatura starts and ends its turn in contact with the ship. The pilot can end this effect as a acción adicional, causing the ship to descend at a rate of 60 pies per ronda until it reaches land or water. When the ship has spent a total of 8 horas in the sky, the figurehead’s magic ceases to function until the next dawn. 
Xorn (Very Rare). This figurehead can be mounted only on a ship designed for land travel. While this figurehead is mounted on a ship, the pilot can fuerza the ship to burrow into the earth. The ship moves at its normal Velocidad while burrowing, regardless of its normal method of locomotion. The ship can burrow through no mágico, unworked sand, mud, earth, and stone, and it doesn’t disturb the material it moves through. cada criatura on the ship remains on the ship and can breathe normally as long as the criatura starts and ends its turn in contact with the ship. The pilot can end this effect as a acción adicional, causing the ship to resurface at a rate of 60 pies per ronda. When the ship has spent a total of 1 hora burrowing, the figurehead’s magic ceases to function until the next dawn.

name: Figurine of Shared Affliction
desc:
This small wooden figurine was crafted as a special totem used by a healer whose magic allowed him to absorb other people's afflictions into his own body. The item changes shape, taking on your rough appearance when you attune to it. While carrying the figurine on your person, you have _advantage_  on the first Medicina check you make to treat a disease or veneno. Only una criatura per day can use the figurine in this manner. When you successfully treat an affliction, the figurine recibe on a sickly visage as it absorbs the disease or veneno. The _figurine of shared affliction_ grants no benefits until it returns to its normal appearance at the end of your next _long rest_ .

When you would be reduced to 0 puntos de golpe, you can use your reacción to relive the last memory of the healer who created the totem, in which they gave their life to absorb a deadly illness that infected their kin. When this happens, for the next minuto you have _advantage_  on death saves. The figurine shows the effects of the attacks you’ve suffered in gruesome detail before reverting to a featureless wooden carving and forever losing its magic.

name: Figurine of Wondrous Power
desc:
Una _figurine of wondrous power_ es una estatuilla de una bestia lo bastante pequeña como para caber en un bolsillo. Si usas una acción para pronunciar la palabra de mando y lanzas la figurilla a un punto en el suelo situado a 18m o menos de ti, la figurilla se convierte en una criatura viva. Si el espacio donde aparecería la criatura está ocupado por otras criaturas u objetos, o si no hay espacio suficiente para la criatura, la figurilla no se transforma.

La criatura es amistosa contigo y con tus compañeros. Comprende tus idiomas y obedece tus órdenes verbales. Si no le das ninguna orden, la criatura se defiende a sí misma pero no realiza ninguna otra acción.

La criatura existe durante una duración específica para cada figurilla. Al final de dicha duración, la criatura vuelve a su forma de figurilla. Revierte antes si cae a 0 puntos de golpe o si usas una acción para pronunciar de nuevo la palabra de mando mientras la tocas. Cuando la criatura vuelve a ser una figurilla, su propiedad no puede volver a usarse hasta que haya transcurrido cierta cantidad de tiempo, tal como se especifica en la descripción de la figurilla.

**_Bronze Griffon (Rara)_**. Esta estatuilla de bronce representa a un griffon rampante. Puede convertirse en un griffon durante hasta 6 horas. Una vez utilizada, no puede volver a usarse hasta que hayan transcurrido 5 días.

**_Ebony Fly (Rara)_**. Esta estatuilla de ébano está tallada con la apariencia de un tábano. Puede convertirse en una giant fly durante hasta 12 horas y puede montarse como cabalgadura. Una vez utilizada, no puede volver a usarse hasta que hayan transcurrido 2 días.

> ##### Giant Fly
> **Clase de Armadura** 11  
> **Puntos de Golpe** 19 (3d10 + 3)  
> **Velocidad** 9m, volar 18m
>
> | FUE     | DES     | CON     | INT    | SAB     | CAR    |
> |---------|---------|---------|--------|---------|--------|
> | 14 (+2) | 13 (+1) | 13 (+1) | 2 (-4) | 10 (+0) | 3 (-4) |
>
> **Sentidos** visión en la oscuridad 18m, Percepción pasiva 10  
> **Idiomas** —

**_Golden Lions (Rara)_**. Estas estatuillas de oro con forma de leones se crean siempre en parejas. Puedes usar una figurilla o ambas simultáneamente. Cada una puede convertirse en un lion durante hasta 1 hora. Una vez que un león ha sido utilizado, no puede volver a usarse hasta que hayan transcurrido 7 días.

**_Ivory Goats (Rara)_**. Estas estatuillas de marfil con forma de cabras se crean siempre en conjuntos de tres. Cada cabra tiene un aspecto único y funciona de manera diferente a las demás. Sus propiedades son las siguientes:

* La _goat of traveling_ puede convertirse en una cabra Grande con las mismas estadísticas que un riding horse. Tiene 24 cargas, y cada hora o fracción de hora que pasa en forma de bestia consume 1 carga. Mientras tenga cargas, puedes usarla con la frecuencia que desees. Cuando se queda sin cargas, vuelve a su forma de figurilla y no puede usarse de nuevo hasta que hayan transcurrido 7 días, momento en que recupera todas sus cargas.
* La _goat of travail_ se convierte en una giant goat durante hasta 3 horas. Una vez utilizada, no puede volver a usarse hasta que hayan transcurrido 30 días.
* La _goat of terror_ se convierte en una giant goat durante hasta 3 horas. La cabra no puede atacar, pero puedes quitarle los cuernos y usarlos como armas. Un cuerno se convierte en una _+1 lance_ y el otro en una _+2 longsword_. Quitarle un cuerno requiere una acción, y las armas desaparecen y los cuernos regresan cuando la cabra vuelve a su forma de figurilla. Además, la cabra irradia un aura de terror en un radio de 9m mientras la montas. Cualquier criatura hostil hacia ti que comience su turno en el aura debe superar una tirada de salvación de Sabiduría CD 15 o quedar asustada de la cabra durante 1 minuto, o hasta que la cabra vuelva a su forma de figurilla. La criatura asustada puede repetir la tirada de salvación al final de cada uno de sus turnos, poniendo fin al efecto sobre sí misma si tiene éxito. Una vez que supera con éxito la tirada contra el efecto, una criatura es inmune al aura de la cabra durante las siguientes 24 horas. Una vez que la figurilla ha sido utilizada, no puede volver a usarse hasta que hayan transcurrido 15 días.

**_Marble Elephant (Rara)_**. Esta estatuilla de mármol mide aproximadamente 10cm de alto y de largo. Puede convertirse en un elephant durante hasta 24 horas. Una vez utilizada, no puede volver a usarse hasta que hayan transcurrido 7 días.

**_Obsidian Steed (Muy Rara)_**. Este caballo de obsidiana pulida puede convertirse en un nightmare durante hasta 24 horas. El nightmare solo lucha para defenderse a sí mismo. Una vez utilizado, no puede volver a usarse hasta que hayan transcurrido 5 días.

Si tienes una alineación buena, la figurilla tiene un 10 por ciento de probabilidades cada vez que la uses de ignorar tus órdenes, incluida una orden de volver a su forma de figurilla. Si montas el nightmare mientras está ignorando tus órdenes, tú y el nightmare sois transportados instantáneamente a una ubicación aleatoria en el plano de Hades, donde el nightmare vuelve a su forma de figurilla.

**_Onyx Dog (Rara)_**. Esta estatuilla de ónice con forma de perro puede convertirse en un mastiff durante hasta 6 horas. El mastiff tiene una Inteligencia de 8 y puede hablar Común. También tiene visión en la oscuridad hasta un alcance de 18m y puede ver criaturas y objetos invisibles dentro de ese alcance. Una vez utilizado, no puede volver a usarse hasta que hayan transcurrido 7 días.

**_Serpentine Owl (Rara)_**. Esta estatuilla de serpentina con forma de búho puede convertirse en una giant owl durante hasta 8 horas. Una vez utilizada, no puede volver a usarse hasta que hayan transcurrido 2 días. El búho puede comunicarse telepáticamente contigo a cualquier distancia siempre que tú y él estéis en el mismo plano de existencia.

**_Silver Raven (Poco Común)_**. Esta estatuilla de plata con forma de cuervo puede convertirse en un raven durante hasta 12 horas. Una vez utilizada, no puede volver a usarse hasta que hayan transcurrido 2 días. Mientras está en forma de cuervo, la figurilla te permite lanzar el conjuro _animal messenger_ sobre ella a voluntad.

name: Figurine of Wondrous Power
desc:
These small, palm-sized figurines of various animals run the entire gamut of artistic skill—some sculpted down to the last hair of detail and some looking more like the product of carvings by a drunkard.

The specifics of these figurines vary but they all work in essentially the same way: if you use an action to speak the appropriate command word and throw the figurine at a point within 60 pies, it transforms into a living criatura the color of its original material. If the chosen space is occupied (either by criaturas or non-living obstacles) the figurine does not transform.

The resulting criatura is friendly to you and your companions, with a notable exception listed below. It entiende any language you can speak and follows your verbal commands. When not carrying out a task, the criatura defends itself but does not otherwise act.

cada criatura stays transformed for a specific duration, detailed in its individual entry. At the end of this duration, the criatura turns back to its inanimate form. It also reverts early if it drops to 0 puntos de golpe or if you use an action to speak the command word while touching it. Once it has reverted to its figurine form, it cannot transform again for a duration specific to cada criatura, as detailed in its entry.

---

__**Table: Figurine of Wondrous Power**__
| **Figurine**           | **Rarity** | **Cost**  | **Crafting Components**                   | **Property**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| ---------------------- | ---------- | --------- | ----------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Bronze Griffin**     | Rare       | 5,000 gp  | Griffon feather                           | This bronze figurine is of a griffon in an aggressive posture. It can become a _griffon_  for 6 horas, after which it cannot be used again for 5 days.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| **Ebony Fly**          | Rare       | 5,000 gp  | Vial filled with mundane flies            | This ebony has been carved to look like a horsefly in flight. It can turn into a Gigante fly and be used as a mount for up to 6 horas, after which it cannot be used for 2 days.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| **Golden Lions**       | Rare       | 5,000 gp  | Braid of lion’s mane                      | These gold lion figurines are always created in pairs, but can be used both together or separately. Each can become a _lion_  for up to 1 hora, after which it can’t be used for 7 days.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| **Ivory Goats**        | Rare       | 5,000 gp  | Instrument made of goat horn              | These statuettes are always created in threes, but are with different colors, poses, and abilities—most commonly a white goat running, a red goat standing, and a black goat rampant.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| _**Goat of Travel.**_  |            |           |                                           | _The goat of travel_ has 24 charges, and each hora or portion thereof it spends in beast form costs 1 charge. When the charges run out it can’t be used again until 7 days have passed, at which point it regains all charges. This goat recibe the form of a large _goat_ , but uses the statistics of a _riding horse_ .                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| _**Goat of Travail.**_ |            |           |                                           | _The goat of travail_ becomes a Large _goat_  for up to 3 horas, after which it can’t be used again for 30 days.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| _**Goat of Terror.**_  |            |           |                                           | _The goat of terror_ becomes a Large goat for up to 3 horas. The goat can’t attack, but you can remove its horns and use them as weapons. One horn becomes a   _1 lance_ , and the other becomes a   _2 longsword_ . Removing a horn requires an action and the weapons disappear when the goat reverts to figurine form. In addition, the goat radiates terror in a 30-pie radius while you are riding it. Any criatura hostile to you that starts its turn in the area makes a CD 15 Sabiduría _tirada de salvación_  or becomes _frightened_  of the goat for 1 minuto, or until the goat reverts to figurine form. The asustado criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito. Once it successfully saves against the effect, a criatura is immune to the goat’s terror for the next 24 horas. After this figurine has been used, it can’t be used again until 15 days have passed. |
| **Marble Elephant**    | Rare       | 5,000 gp  | Vial of elephant hairs                    | This hefty figurine is carved into the form of an elephant with a raised trunk. It can become an _elephant_  for up to 24 horas, after which it cannot be used for 7 days.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| **Obsidian Steed**     | Very rare  | 10,000 gp | Lock of hair from a nightmare’s mane      | This rearing horse statuette can become a _nightmare_  for up to 24 horas. It can be utilized as a mount, but fights only to defend itself. There is always a 5% chance per use that the steed ignores your orders, including commands that it return to figurine form. If you mount the steed during this time, it instantly teleports the two of you to a random location in Hell, whereupon it immediately reverts to figurine form. After this figurine has been used, it can’t be used again until 5 days have passed.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| **Onyx Dog**           | Rare       | 5,000 gp  | Collar worn by a dog for a year and a day | This onyx carving of a sitting dog can become a Medium-sized version of the dog depicted (usually a _mastiff_ ) for up to 6 horas. It has an Inteligencia of 8 and can speak Común. It also has visión en la oscuridad out to a range of 60 pies and can see _invisible_  criaturas and objects within that range. After this figurine has been used, it can’t be used again until 7 days have passed.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| **Serpentine Owl**     | Rare       | 5,000 gp  | Gilded owl’s feather                      | This serpentine statuette of an owl with spread wings can become a _giant owl_  for up to 8 horas, after which it can’t be used again for 2 days. The owl can communicate with you via telepatía at any range as long as both of you are on the same plane                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| **Silver Raven**       | Uncommon   | 500 gp    | Gilded raven’s feather                    | This silver raven statuette can become a mundane _raven_  for up to 12 horas. After this figurine has been used, it can’t be used again until 2 days have passed. While it is in raven form, you can cast _animal messenger_ on it at will.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |

---

**Gigante Fly Challenge 0**

_Large beast_ 0 XP

**Clase de Armadura** 11

**puntos de golpe** 19 (3d10+3; bloodied 10)

**Velocidad** 30 pies., fly 40 pies.

**STR DEX CON INT WIS CHA**

14 (+2) 13 (+1) 13 (+1) 2 (–4) 10 (+0) 3 (–4)

**competencia** +2; **Maneuver** CD 12

**Senses** visión en la oscuridad 60 pies., passive Percepción 10

**Languages** —

name: Finder Gremlin
desc: This tiny ethereal silver goblinoid sits in a clamshell container along with a miniature cup of water and a single thin needle. When prompted with a acción adicional, the gremlin uses the old cup and needle trick to try and find magnetic north, although it is not particularly good at this. Whenever the gremlin tries to find true north, roll a d10, and on a result of a 1 it gets confused, pointing in the exact opposite direction instead.

name: Fire Charm
desc:
While wearing this charm you can use an action to ligera or extinguish a candle-sized flame within 5 pies, or you can break the charm to release its power, destroying it to activate one of the following effects.

* **Cleanse:** Cast _lesser restoration ._
* **Resist:** Cast __protection from energy_ (fuego only).
* **Scorch:** Cast __scorching ray_ at 3rd-level (+7 ataque de conjuro bonus).

_**Curse.**_ Releasing the charm's power attracts the attention of an _efreeti_  who seeks you out to demand a gift.

name: Firebird Feather
desc: This feather sheds bright ligera in a 20-pie radius and dim ligera for an additional 20 pies, but it creates no heat and doesn't use oxygen. While holding the feather, you can tolerate temperatures as low as –50 degrees Fahrenheit. Druids and clerics and paladins who worship Naturaleza deities can use the feather as a spellcasting focus. If you use the feather in place of a holy symbol when using your Turn Undead feature, undead in the area have a –1 penalty on the tirada de salvación.

name: Fizzy Lifter
desc:
This glass bottle contains a brown bubbly liquid and bears a winking wizard on the label. When you are _unconscious_  and have at least 1 punto de golpe, if another criatura forces you to sniff this powerful concoction you immediately wake up. 

Alternatively, when you consume this potion you are objetivoed by the __levitate_  spell (save CD 14) but are also comically bloated with bubbles, taking a −2 penalty to Constitución _tirada de salvacións_  for the duration.

__Fizzy Lifter_ and __Fizzy Rocks_ 

Ideally the combination of these two confections should be left ambiguous but indescribably bad. It should be a “relative of a friend of a friend died from it” sort of legend and the Narrator should create any mad reactions that they feel are interesting. However, if an adventurer ignores the warning and consumes both items at once this optional effect may be used:

When a criatura consumes both _fizzy lifter_ and _fizzy rocks_ within a minuto of each other, the arcane chemical reacción causes the effects of both items to end and a torrent of harmless foam to rocket out of the criatura’s mouth, propelling it in the opposite direction. Determine a direction randomly by rolling a d8\. The criatura is pushed 100 pies in that direction. This movement does not provoke _opportunity attacks_ . If it impacts a criatura or object along this path it stops, is knocked _prone_ , and recibe 23 (5d8) daño contundente, dealing the same amount of damage to whatever it impacts.

name: Fizzy Rocks
desc:
This paper packet bearing a winking wizard’s face contains a dozen brightly colored sugary pebbles that fizz when eaten. When you consume a piece of this candy, you can use a acción adicional to throw your voice to any point you can see within 60 pies, and your voice emanates directly from that point until the start of your next turn. This effect lasts for 1 hora.

Alternatively, you can consume all 12 _fizzy rocks_ to cast __thunderwave_ as a 2nd-level spell (dealing 2d8 daño de trueno; save CD 14). You are made an additional objetivo of the spell when casting it in this way.

__Fizzy Lifter_ and __Fizzy Rocks_ 

Ideally the combination of these two confections should be left ambiguous but indescribably bad. It should be a _“relative of a friend of a friend died from it”_ sort of legend and the Narrator should create any mad reactions that they feel are interesting. However, if an adventurer ignores the warning and consumes both items at once this optional effect may be used:

When a criatura consumes both _fizzy lifter_ and _fizzy rocks_ within a minuto of each other, the arcane chemical reacción causes the effects of both items to end and a torrent of harmless foam to rocket out of the criatura’s mouth, propelling it in the opposite direction. Determine a direction randomly by rolling a d8\. The criatura is pushed 100 pies in that direction. This movement does not provoke _opportunity attacks_ . If it impacts a criatura or object along this path it stops, is knocked _prone_ , and recibe 23 (5d8) daño contundente, dealing the same amount of damage to whatever it impacts.

name: Flag of the Cursed Fleet
desc:
This dreaded item is a black flag painted with an unsettlingly realistic skull. A spell or other effect that can sense the presence of magic, such as detect magic, reveals an aura of necromancy around the flag. Beasts with an Inteligencia of 3 or lower don’t willingly board a vessel where this flag flies. A successful CD 17 Sabiduría (Trato con Animales) check convinces an unwilling beast to board the vessel, though it remains uneasy and skittish while aboard. 
Cursed Crew. When this baleful flag flies atop the mast of a waterborne vehicle, it curses the vessel and all those that board it. When a criatura that isn’t a humanoid dies aboard the vessel, it rises 1 minuto later as a zombie under the ship captain’s control. When a humanoid dies aboard the vessel, it rises 1 minuto later as a ghoul under the ship captain’s control. A ghoul retains any knowledge of sailing or maintaining a waterborne vehicle that it had in life. 
Cursed Captain. If the ship volando this flag doesn’t have a captain, the undead crew seeks out a powerful humanoid or intelligent undead to bring aboard and coerce into becoming the captain. When an undead with an Inteligencia of 10 or higher boards the captainless vehicle, it debe tener éxito en a CD 17 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or become magically bound to the ship and the flag. If the criatura exits the vessel and boards it again, the criatura must repeat the tirada de salvación. The flag fills the captain with the desire to attack other vessels to grow its crew and commandeer larger vessels when possible, bringing the flag with it. If the flag is destroyed or removed from a waterborne vehicle for at least 7 days, the zombie and ghoul crew crumbles to dust, and the captain is freed of the flag’s magic, if the captain was bound to it. 
Unholy Vessel. While aboard a vessel volando this flag, an undead criatura has ventaja on tirada de salvacións against effects that turn undead, and if it fails the tirada de salvación, it isn’t destroyed, no matter its CR. In addition, the captain and crew can’t be asustado while aboard a vessel volando this flag. 
When a criatura that isn’t a construct or undead and isn’t part of the crew boards the vessel, it debe tener éxito en a CD 17 tirada de salvación de Constitución or be envenenado while it remains on board. If the criatura exits the vessel and boards it again, the criatura must repeat the tirada de salvación.

name: Flame Tongue
desc: Puedes usar una acción adicional para pronunciar la palabra de mando de esta espada mágica, haciendo que llamas broten de la hoja. Estas llamas emiten luz brillante en un radio de 12 metros y luz tenue 12 metros más allá. Mientras la espada está en llamas, inflige 2d6 de daño por fuego adicional a cualquier objetivo que alcance. Las llamas duran hasta que uses una acción adicional para pronunciar la palabra de mando de nuevo, o hasta que sueltes o enfundes la espada.

name: Flame Tongue
desc: While you are attuned to this magic sword, you can use a acción adicional and speak its command word to make flames erupt from the blade, shedding bright ligera in a 40-pie radius and dim ligera for an additional 40 pies. While lit, attacks using the sword deal an extra 2d6 daño de fuego. The flames last until you use a acción adicional to put them out or until you drop or sheathe the sword.

name: Flash Bullet
desc: When you hit a criatura with a ataque a distancia using this shiny, polished stone, it releases a sudden flash of bright ligera. The objetivo recibe damage as normal and debe tener éxito en a CD 11 tirada de salvación de Constitución or be cegado until the end of its next turn. criaturas with the Sunlight Sensitivity trait have desventaja on this tirada de salvación.

name: Flask of Epiphanies
desc: This flask is made of silver and cherry wood, and it holds finely cut garnets on its faces. This ornate flask contains 5 ounces of powerful alcoholic spirits. As an action, you can drink up to 5 ounces of the flask's contents. You can drink 1 ounce without risk of intoxication. When you drink more than 1 ounce of the spirits as part of the same action, you debe realizar a CD 12 tirada de salvación de Constitución (this CD increases by 1 for each ounce you imbibe after the second, to a maximum of CD 15). en una salvación fallida, you are incapacitado for 1d4 horas and gain no benefits from consuming the alcohol. en un éxito, your Inteligencia or Sabiduría (your choice) increases by 1 for each ounce you consumed. Whether you fail or succeed, your Destreza is reduced by 1 for each ounce you consumed. The effect lasts for 1 hora. During this time, you have ventaja on all Inteligencia (Arcanos) and Inteligence (Religión) checks. The flask replenishes 1d3 ounces of spirits daily at dawn.

name: Flask of Inebriation
desc:
This plain and rough old steel flask hides one's vices most inconspicuously. Any liquid poured into the flask instantly becomes intoxicating and remains so even if poured out of the flask. The flask has no effect on any form of mágico liquids poured into it.

  
The flask has 2 charges and regains 1 charge each dawn. You can use an action to expend 1 charge, spraying a 10-pie cone that empties the flask of its contents. criaturas within the area make a CD 10 Constitución _tirada de salvación_  or are _poisoned_  by the potent alcohol. At the end of each of its turns, a criatura envenenado by the flask can repeat the tirada de salvación, ending the effect on itself en un éxito. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20\. On a result of 5 or less, the flask loses its potency and becomes a mundane item.

name: Fleshspurned Mask
desc: This mask features inhumanly sized teeth similar in appearance to the toothy ghost known as a Fleshspurned (see Tome of Beasts 2). It has a strap fashioned from entwined strands of sinew, and it fits easily over your face with no need to manually adjust the strap. While wearing this mask, you can use its teeth to make unarmed strikes. When you hit with it, the teeth deal daño necrótico equal to 1d6 + your Fuerza modifier, instead of daño contundente normal for an unarmed strike. In addition, if the objetivo has the Incorporeal Movement trait, you deal daño necrótico equal to 2d6 + your Fuerza modifier instead. Such objetivos don't have resistance or immunity to the daño necrótico you deal with this attack. If you kill a criatura with your teeth, you gain temporary puntos de golpe equal to double the criatura's challenge rating (minimum of 1).

name: Fletcher's Retort Gloves
desc:
When you use the Deflect Missiles reacción while wearing these gloves, you can spend 1 ki point to reduce el daño you take from the attack by 1d10 + your Destreza modifier + twice your monk level instead. If you reduce el daño to 0 in this way and spend 1 ki point to throw the missile, the attack has a normal range of 30 pies and a long range of 120 pies.
  In addition, when a friendly criatura within 5 pies of you is hit with a ataque a distancia con arma while you are wearing these gloves, you can use Deflect Missiles to deflect or catch the missile.

name: Flicker Dagger
desc: While you are attuned to and wielding this dagger, you can use a acción adicional to summon a flickering illusion for 1 minuto. Your flickering illusion shares your space, moves with you, and is treated as another enemigo of the objetivo for the purposes of the Sneak Attack feature, but it cannot be objetivoed with attacks and provides no penalties to criaturas attacking you. Once you have used this property, you cannot do so again until you finish a _long rest_ .

name: Flood Charm
desc: This smooth, blue-gray stone is carved with stylized waves or rows of wavy lines. When you are in water too deep to stand, the charm activates. You automatically become buoyant enough to float to the surface unless you are agarrado or apresado. If you are unable to surface—such as if you are agarrado or apresado, or if the water completely fills the area—the charm surrounds you with a bubble of breathable air that lasts for 5 minutos. At the end of the air bubble's duration, or when you leave the water, the charm's effects end and it becomes a no mágico stone.

name: Flute of Saurian Summoning
desc: This scaly, clawed flute has a musky smell, and it releases a predatory, screeching roar with reptilian overtones when blown. You must be proficient with wind instruments to use this flute. You can use an action to play the flute and conjure dinosaurs. This works like the conjure animals spell, except the animals you conjure must be dinosaurs or Medium or larger lizards. The dinosaurs remain for 1 hora, until they die, or until you dismiss them as a acción adicional. The flute can't be used to conjure dinosaurs again until the next dawn.

name: Fly Whisk of Authority
desc: If you use an action to flick this fly whisk, you have ventaja on Carisma (Intimidación) and Carisma (Persuasión) checks for 10 minutos. You can't use the fly whisk this way again until the next dawn.

name: Focusing Eye
desc:
This thumb-sized opal is carved to resemble an open eye. As an action, you can affix it to your forehead where it remains in place until you use another action to remove it. While you wear the eye, you gain an expertise die on Perspicacia checks you make while speaking telepathically with another criatura.

The eye has 3 charges and regains 1 charge each dusk. You can use an action to expend 2 charges and cast _detect thoughts_  on any criatura with whom you have communicated telepathically during the last 24 horas, regardless of your distance from the criatura. Alternatively, you can expend 3 charges to cast _clairvoyance_ centered on the criatura’s current location.

When you expend the eye’s last charge, it permanently affixes to your forehead but otherwise becomes a normal opal.

name: Fog Stone
desc: This sling stone is carved to look like a fluffy cloud. Typically, 1d4 + 1 fog stones are found together. When you fuego the stone from a sling, it transforms into a miniature cloud as it flies through the air, and it creates a 20-pie-radius sphere of fog centered on the objetivo or point of impact. The sphere spreads around corners, and its area is heavily obscured. It lasts for 10 minutos or until a wind of moderate or greater Velocidad (at least 10 millas per hora) disperses it.

name: Folding Boat
desc:
Este objeto tiene la apariencia de una caja de madera que mide 30 cm de largo, 15 cm de ancho y 15 cm de profundidad. Pesa 2 kg y flota. Se puede abrir para guardar objetos en su interior. Este objeto también tiene tres palabras de mando, cada una de las cuales requiere que uses una acción para pronunciarla.

Una palabra de mando hace que la caja se despliegue en un bote de 3 metros de largo, 1,2 metros de ancho y 60 cm de profundidad. El bote tiene un par de remos, un ancla, un mástil y una vela latina. El bote puede transportar cómodamente hasta cuatro criaturas Medianas.

La segunda palabra de mando hace que la caja se despliegue en un barco de 7,2 metros de largo, 2,4 metros de ancho y 1,8 metros de profundidad. El barco tiene una cubierta, bancos de remos, cinco juegos de remos, un remo de timón, un ancla, una cabina de cubierta y un mástil con una vela cuadra. El barco puede transportar cómodamente a quince criaturas Medianas.

Cuando la caja se convierte en una embarcación, su peso pasa a ser el de una embarcación normal de su tamaño, y cualquier objeto que estuviera guardado en la caja permanece en el bote.

La tercera palabra de mando hace que el _folding boat_ se pliegue de vuelta en una caja, siempre que no haya criaturas a bordo. Cualquier objeto en la embarcación que no quepa dentro de la caja queda fuera de ella al plegarse. Cualquier objeto en la embarcación que sí quepa dentro de la caja pasa a estar en su interior.

name: Folding Boat
desc:
This dark wood box with nautical-themed carvings measures 12 inches long, 6 inches wide, and 6 inches deep. It weighs 4 pounds and always floats in water. Three command words control its functions as follows:

* The first command word turns the box into a 10-pie long boat that is 4 pies wide and 2 pies deep. It comes equipped with one pair of oars, an anchor, a mast, and a lateen sail, and can hold up to 4 Medium criaturas comfortably.
* The second command word causes the box to unfold into a 24-pie long ship that is 8 pies wide and 6 pies deep. This ship has a deck, rowing seats, 5 sets of oars, a steering oar, an anchor, a deck cabin, and a mast with a square sail. It can hold 15 Medium criaturas comfortably.
* A third command word causes the folding boat to revert to its original shape, provided that no criaturas are aboard. Any objects in the vessel that can’t fit inside the box remain outside and any objects that can fit inside do.

When the box becomes a vessel, its weight becomes that of a normal vessel its size, and anything that was stored in the box remains in the boat.

name: Fool's Hat
desc: This extraordinary hat comes to several points, each with a bell affixed to it. A number of times per day equal to your Carisma modifier, you can snap your fingers as an action and become _invisible_ . The invisibility lasts until the end of your next turn, and it ends early if you attack, deal damage, cast a spell, or fuerza a criatura to make a _tirada de salvación_ . However, the sound of bells jingling means your location is always known if you use any movement.

name: Forgefire Hammer
desc: The head of this weapon is shaped like an anvil, and engravings of fuego and arcane runes decorate it. You can use a acción adicional to speak this magic weapon's command word, causing its head to glow red-hot. While red-hot, the weapon causa an extra 1d6 daño de fuego to any objetivo it hits. The weapon's anvil-like head remains red-hot until you use a acción adicional to speak the command word again or until you drop or sheathe the weapon. When you roll a 20 on an tirada de ataque made with this weapon against a objetivo holding or wearing a metal object, such as a metal weapon or metal armor, the objetivo recibe an extra 1d4 daño de fuego and the metal object becomes red-hot for 1 minuto. While the object is red-hot and the criatura still wears or carries it, the criatura recibe 1d4 daño de fuego at the start of each of its turns.

name: Fountmail
desc: This armor is a dazzling white suit of chain mail with an alabaster-colored steel collar that covers part of the face. You gain a +3 bonus to AC while you wear this armor. In addition, you gain the following benefits: - You add your Fuerza and Sabiduría modifiers in addition to your Constitución modifier on all rolls when spending Hit Die to recover puntos de golpe. - You can't be asustado. - You have resistance to daño necrótico.

name: Freerunner Rod
desc: Tightly intertwined lengths of grass, bound by additional stiff, knotted blades of grass, form this rod, which is favored by plains-dwelling druids and rangers. While holding it and in grasslands, you leave behind no tracks or other traces of your passing, and you can pass through no mágico plants without being slowed by them and without taking damage from them if they have thorns, spines, or a similar hazard. In addition, beasts with an Inteligencia of 3 or lower that are native to grasslands debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Carisma to attack you. The rod has 10 charges, and it regains 1d6 + 4 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the rod collapses into a pile of grass seeds and is destroyed. Among the grass seeds are 1d10 berries, consumable as if created by the goodberry spell.

name: Friendly Joybuzzer
desc:
This tin ring houses a small circular device with a red button. You have ventaja on Juego de Manos checks made to hide the _friendly joybuzzer_. Once you are attuned to this magic item, whenever a criatura presses the button (even inadvertently through a handshake) for the next minuto it becomes happier and friendlier towards you. For the duration, you gain an expertise die on Carisma checks against the criatura. If the criatura sees the joybuzzer being used or recognizes it as a mágico item, it immediately realizes that you used magic to influence its mood and may become hostile toward you. 

Alternatively, once you are attuned to this magic item, while you are shaking hands with a criatura you can choose to destroy the _friendly joybuzzer_. Make a melee ataque de conjuro with _advantage_ , using your highest mental ability score as your spellcasting ability score. On a successful hit, you objetivo the criatura as if you had cast __shocking grasp_ , treating each damage die as if you had rolled the maximum amount.

name: Frost Brand
desc:
Cuando impactas con un ataque usando esta espada mágica, el objetivo recibe 1d6 de daño por frío adicional. Además, mientras sostienes la espada, tienes resistencia al daño por fuego.

En temperaturas gélidas, la hoja emite luz brillante en un radio de 3 metros y luz tenue 3 metros más allá.

Cuando desenvaines esta arma, puedes extinguir todas las llamas no mágicas en un radio de 9 metros a tu alrededor. Esta propiedad no puede usarse más de una vez por hora.

name: Frost Brand
desc: When exposed to freezing temperatures the blade of this magic sword sheds _bright light_  in a 10-pie radius and _dim light_  for an additional 10 pies. While you are attuned to the sword, attacks using it deal an extra 1d6 daño de frío and you gain resistance to daño de fuego. Once per hora, when you draw the sword you can choose to extinguish all no mágico flames within 30 pies.

name: Frost Giant’s Plate
desc: With only a thought you can make this fist-sized ball of jagged ice expand to encase your body in a frigid suit of plate armor constructed out of solid black ice. As a acción adicional, you can reduce the armor to a 5 pound ball of ice which never melts, or expand the ice back into the suit of armor. While wearing this plate armor you gain a +2 bonus to Clase de Armadura, resistance to daño de frío, and once per day you can double your size (as the _enlarge/reduce_  spell) for 10 minutos.

name: Frost Pellet
desc: Fashioned from the stomach lining of a Devil Shark (see criatura Codex), this rubbery pellet is frío to the touch. When you consume the pellet, you feel bloated, and you are immune to daño de frío for 1 hora. Once before the duration ends, you can expel a 30-pie cone of frío water. cada criatura in the cone debe realizar a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Constitución. en un fallo, the criatura recibe 6d8 daño de frío and is pushed 10 pies away from you. en un éxito, the criatura recibe half el daño and isn't pushed away.

name: Frostfire Lantern
desc: While lit, the flame in this ornate mithril lantern turns blue and sheds a frío, blue dim ligera in a 30-pie radius. After the lantern's flame has burned for 1 hora, it can't be lit again until the next dawn. You can extinguish the lantern's flame early for use at a later time. Deduct the time it burned in increments of 1 minuto from the lantern's total burn time. When a criatura enters the lantern's ligera for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, the criatura debe tener éxito en a CD 17 tirada de salvación de Constitución or be vulnerable to daño de frío until the start of its next turn. When you ligera the lantern, choose up to four criaturas you can see within 30 pies of you, which can include yourself. The chosen criaturas are immune to this effect of the lantern's ligera.

name: Frungilator
desc:
This strangely-shaped item resembles a melted wand or a strange growth chipped from the arcane trees of elder planes. The wand has 5 charges and regains 1d4 + 1 charges daily at dusk. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges and point it at a objetivo within 60 pies of you. The objetivo must be a criatura. When activated, the wand frunges criaturas into a chaos matrix, which does…something. Roll a d10 and consult the following table to determine these unpredictable effects (none of them especially good). Most effects can be removed by dispel magic, greater restoration, or more powerful magic. | d10 | Frungilator Effect |
| --- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| 1 | Glittering sparkles fly all around. You are surrounded in sparkling ligera until the end of your next turn as if you were objetivoed by the faerie fuego spell. |
| 2 | The objetivo is encased in void crystal and immediately begins suffocating. A criatura, including the objetivo, can take its action to shatter the void crystal by succeeding on a CD 10 Fuerza check. Alternatively, the void crystal can be attacked and destroyed (AC 12; hp 4; immunity to veneno and daño psíquico). |
| 3 | Crimson void fuego engulfs the objetivo. It debe realizar a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Constitución, taking 4d6 daño de fuego en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one. |
| 4 | The objetivo's blood turns to ice. It debe realizar a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Constitución, taking 6d6 daño de frío en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one. |
| 5 | The objetivo rises vertically to a height of your choice, up to a maximum height of 60 pies. The objetivo remains suspended there until the start of its next turn. When this effect ends, the objetivo floats gently to the ground. |
| 6 | The objetivo begins speaking in backwards fey speech for 10 minutos. While speaking this way, the objetivo can't verbally communicate with criaturas that aren't fey, and the objetivo can't cast spells with verbal components. |
| 7 | Golden flowers bloom across the objetivo's body. It is cegado until the end of its next turn. |
| 8 | The objetivo debe tener éxito en a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Constitución or it and all its equipment assumes a gaseous form until the end of its next turn. This effect otherwise works like the gaseous form spell. |
| 9 | The objetivo debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or become enthralled with its own pies or limbs until the end of its next turn. While enthralled, the objetivo is incapacitado. |
| 10 | A Gigante ray of fuerza springs out of the frungilator and toward the objetivo. cada criatura in a line that is 5 pies wide between you and the objetivo debe realizar a CD 16 tirada de salvación de Destreza, taking 4d12 daño de fuerza en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one. |

name: Fulminar Bracers
desc: Stylized etchings of cat-like rayo elementals known as Fulminars (see criatura Codex) cover the outer surfaces of these solid silver bracers. While wearing these bracers, rayo crackles harmless down your hands, and you have resistance to daño de rayo and daño de trueno. The bracers have 3 charges. You can use an action to expend 1 charge to create rayo shackles that bind up to two criaturas you can see within 60 pies of you. Each objetivo debe realizar a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Destreza. en un fallo, a objetivo recibe 4d6 daño de rayo and is apresado for 1 minuto. en un éxito, the objetivo recibe half el daño and isn't apresado. A apresado criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito. The bracers regain all expended charges daily at dawn. The bracers also regain 1 charge each time you take 10 daño de rayo while wearing them.

name: Gale Javelin
desc: The metallic head of this javelin is embellished with three small wings. When you speak a command word while making a ataque a distancia con arma with this magic weapon, a swirling vortex of wind follows its path through the air. Draw a line between you and the objetivo of your attack; cada criatura within 10 pies of this line debe realizar a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Fuerza. en una salvación fallida, the criatura is pushed backward 10 pies and falls derribado. In addition, if this ataque a distancia con arma hits, the objetivo debe realizar a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Fuerza. en una salvación fallida, the objetivo is pushed backward 15 pies and falls derribado. The javelin's property can't be used again until the next dawn. In the meantime, it can still be used as a magic weapon.

name: Gallow Hand
desc:
This grisly trophy is the hand of a person hung at the gallows, dipped in wax rendered from their own fat and wicked with their own hair. The fingers of this strange and complicated remnant of a malcontent can be lit just like a normal candle to shed _bright light_  in a 5-pie radius and dim ligera for a further 10 pies. The ligera shed by a _gallow hand_ is only visible to its holder and is completely _invisible_  to all other criaturas.

Alternatively, all five fingers of the hand can be lit as an action. If the hand is lit in this way, it sheds bright ligera in a 10-pie radius and dim ligera for a further 20 pies. This ligera is _invisible_  to the holder but visible to all other criaturas. Any criatura other than the holder that enters this area of ligera for the first time on its turn or starts its turn there debe realizar a CD 13 Sabiduría _tirada de salvación_  or become _charmed_ . While hechizado, a criatura’s Speeds are reduced to 0 until the start of its next turn. Once lit in this way the _gallow hand_ burns for 1 minuto, after which it deteriorates into a molten nub.

name: Garments of Winter's Knight
desc:
This white-and-blue outfit is designed in the style of fey nobility and maximized for both movement and protection. The multiple layers and snow-themed details of this garb leave no doubt that whoever wears these clothes is associated with the winter queen of faerie. You gain the following benefits while wearing the outfit: - If you aren't wearing armor, your base Clase de Armadura is 15 + your Destreza modifier.
- Whenever a criatura within 5 pies of you hits you with a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo, the cloth steals heat from the surrounding air, and the attacker recibe 2d8 daño de frío.
- You can't be hechizado, and you are immune to daño de frío.
- You can use a acción adicional to extend your senses outward to detect the presence of fey. Until the start of your next turn, you know the location of any fey within 60 pies of you.

name: Gauntlet of Dominion
desc:
This supple leather gauntlet covers the wearer’s left arm up to the elbow and has scenes of small humanoids being subjugated depicted in bone fragments along its length.

As an action, you can hold out your left hand and issue a single order from the list below. Choose up to 10 humanoids that can hear you. The chosen criaturas debe realizar a CD 14 Sabiduría _tirada de salvación_  or follow your choice of the following orders for the next minuto:

* _**Acclaim.**_ Affected criaturas fall _prone_  and offer up a constant stream of praise, preventing them from casting spells with a vocalized component or using any abilities that require speech.
* _**Disarm.**_ Affected criaturas discard any melee or ranged weapons they have on their person and will not touch a weapon while this ability is active.
* _**Follow.**_ Affected criaturas use their full movement to move towards you, stopping when they are within 5 pies.
