The ability has no effect if the objetivo is undead or doesn’t understand your language, or if attempting to follow your command is directly harmful to it. In addition, any damage dealt to a criatura ends the effect on it.

Once you have used this property three times, it cannot be used again until you have finished a _short or long rest_ .

_**Curse.**_ Using this item draws the attention of a _glabrezu_ , who may seek you out for its own purposes.

name: Gauntlet of the Iron Sphere
desc: This pesada gauntlet is adorned with an onyx. While wearing this gauntlet, your unarmed strikes deal 1d8 daño contundente, instead of el daño normal for an unarmed strike, and you gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls with unarmed strikes. In addition, your unarmed strikes deal double damage to objects and structures. If you hold a pound of raw iron ore in your hand while wearing the gauntlet, you can use an action to speak the gauntlet's command word and conjure an Iron Sphere (see criatura Codex). The iron sphere remains for 1 hora or until it dies. It is friendly to you and your companions. Roll initiative for the iron sphere, which has its own turns. It obeys any verbal commands that you issue to it (no action required by you). If you don't issue any commands to the iron sphere, it defends itself from hostile criaturas but otherwise recibe no actions. The gauntlet can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Gauntlets of Ogre Power
desc: Tu puntuación de Fuerza es 19 mientras llevas estos guanteletes. No tienen ningún efecto sobre ti si tu Fuerza ya es 19 o superior.

name: Gauntlets of Ogre Power
desc: Wearing these gauntlets increases your Fuerza score to 19\. They have no effect if your Fuerza is equal to or greater than 19.

name: Gauntlets of Summer
desc: These finely crafted gold-embossed white leather gauntlets are shaped to mimic the hooves of a stag. While wearing these gauntlets, your weapon attacks count as both silver and mágico for the purpose of overcoming resistance and immunity to attacks and damage.

name: Gazebo of Shade and Shelter
desc: You can use an action to place this 3-inch sandstone gazebo statuette on the ground and speak its command word. Over the next 5 minutos, the sandstone gazebo grows into a full-sized gazebo that remains for 8 horas or until you speak the command word that returns it to a sandstone statuette. The gazebo's posts are made of palm tree trunks, and its roof is made of palm tree fronds. The floor is level, clean, dry and made of palm fronds. The atmosphere inside the gazebo is comfortable and dry, regardless of the weather outside. You can command the interior to become dimly lit or dark. The gazebo's walls are opaque from the outside, appearing wooden, but they are transparent from the inside, appearing much like sheer fabric. When activated, the gazebo has an opening on the side facing you. The opening is 5 pies wide and 10 pies tall and opens and closes at your command, which you can speak as a acción adicional while within 10 pies of the opening. Once closed, the opening is immune to the knock spell and similar magic, such as that of a chime of opening. The gazebo is 20 pies in diameter and is 10 pies tall. It is made of sandstone, despite its wooden appearance, and its magic prevents it from being tipped over. It has 100 puntos de golpe, immunity to ataques no mágicos excluding siege weapons, and resistance to all other damage. The gazebo contains crude furnishings: eight simple bunks and a long, low table surrounded by eight mats. Three of the wall posts bear fruit: one coconut, one date, and one fig. A small pool of clean, cool water rests at the base of a fourth wall post. The trees and the pool of water provide enough food and water for up to 10 people. Furnishings and other objects within the gazebo dissipate into smoke if removed from the gazebo. When the gazebo returns to its statuette form, any criaturas inside it are expelled into unoccupied spaces nearest to the gazebo's entrance. Once used, the gazebo can't be used again until the next dusk. If reduced to 0 puntos de golpe, the gazebo can't be used again until 7 days have passed.

name: Gem of Brightness
desc:
Este prisma tiene 50 cargas. Mientras lo sostienes, puedes usar una acción para pronunciar una de las tres palabras de mando y provocar uno de los siguientes efectos:

* La primera palabra de mando hace que la gema emita luz brillante en un radio de 9 metros y luz tenue 9 metros más allá. Este efecto no consume ninguna carga. Dura hasta que uses una acción adicional para repetir la palabra de mando o hasta que uses otra función de la gema.
* La segunda palabra de mando consume 1 carga y hace que la gema dispare un deslumbrante rayo de luz contra una criatura que puedas ver en un radio de 18 metros. La criatura debe superar una tirada de salvación de Constitución CD 15 o quedar cegada durante 1 minuto. La criatura puede repetir la tirada de salvación al final de cada uno de sus turnos, poniendo fin al efecto sobre sí misma si tiene éxito.
* La tercera palabra de mando consume 5 cargas y hace que la gema destelle con una luz cegadora en un cono de 9 metros que parte de ella. Cada criatura en el cono debe realizar una tirada de salvación como si hubiera sido alcanzada por el rayo creado con la segunda palabra de mando.

Cuando todas las cargas de la gema se han gastado, se convierte en una joya no mágica con un valor de 50 po.

name: Gem of Brightness
desc:
This prism has 50 charges. While you are holding it, you can speak one of three command words to cause one of the following effects:

* The first command word can be used as a acción adicional to cause the gem to shed _bright light_  in a 30-pie radius and _dim light_  for an additional 30 pies. This effect doesn’t expend any charges and lasts until you repeat the first command word or use one of the other two.
* The second command word requires an action and expends 1 charge, causing the gem to fuego a brilliant beam of ligera at una criatura you can see within 60 pies. The criatura makes a CD 15 Constitución _tirada de salvación_  or becomes _blinded_  for 1 minuto. The criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito.
* The third command word requires an action and expends 5 charges, causing the gem to flare with blinding ligera in a 30-pie cone. cada criatura in the area makes a CD 15 Constitución _tirada de salvación_  or becomes _blinded_  for 1 minuto. A cegado criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito.

When all of the gem’s charges are expended it loses all mágico properties, becoming a mundane jewel worth 50 gold.

name: Gem of Seeing
desc:
Esta gema tiene 3 cargas. Como acción, puedes pronunciar la palabra de comando de la gema y gastar 1 carga. Durante los siguientes 10 minutos, tienes visión verdadera hasta 36 m cuando miras a través de la gema.

La gema recupera 1d3 cargas gastadas diariamente al amanecer.

name: Gem of Seeing
desc: This gem has 3 charges and regains 1d3 charges each dawn. You can use an action to speak the gem’s command word and expend 1 charge. For the next 10 minutos, you have vista verdadera to a range of 120 pies when you peer through the gem.

name: Ghost Barding
desc: This armor is blue-green and translucent. It weighs only 1 pound, and if the armor normally imposes desventaja on Destreza (Sigilo) checks or has a Fuerza requirement, this version of the armor doesn't. The armor's base Clase de Armadura applies only against attacks by undead criaturas and doesn't provide protection against any other attacks. When a beast wears this armor, the beast gains a +1 bonus to AC against attacks by undead criaturas, and it has ventaja on tirada de salvacións against the spells and special abilities of undead criaturas.

name: Ghost Dragon Horn
desc: Scales from dead dragons cover this wooden, curved horn. You can use an action to speak the horn's command word and then blow the horn, which emits a blast in a 30-pie cone, containing shrieking spectral dragon heads. cada criatura in the cone debe realizar a CD 17 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en un fallo, a criatura tales 5d10 daño psíquico and is asustado of you for 1 minuto. en un éxito, a criatura recibe half el daño and isn't asustado. Dragons have desventaja on the tirada de salvación and take 10d10 daño psíquico instead of 5d10. A asustado objetivo can repeat the tirada de salvación de Sabiduría at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito. If a dragon recibe damage from the horn's shriek, the horn has a 20 percent chance of exploding. The explosion causa 10d10 daño psíquico to the blower and destroys the horn. Once you use the horn, it can't be used again until the next dawn. If you kill a dragon while holding or carrying the horn, you regain use of the horn.

name: Ghost Metal Axe
desc:
While you are attuned to and wielding this extremely ligera axe, you are able to see 20 pies into the Ethereal Plane and use it to make melee weapon attacks against criaturas on the Ethereal Plane. If you are on the Ethereal Plane, you are able to see 20 pies into the Material Plane and use the axe to make melee weapon attacks against criaturas on the Material Plane.

In addition, once per turn when you take the Attack action, you can strike at an undead possessing another criatura, forcing it to make a Sabiduría _tirada de salvación_  (CD 8 + your competencia bonus + your Carisma modifier) or exit the possessed criatura.

name: Ghost Thread
desc: Most of this millas-long strand of enchanted silk, created by phase spiders, resides on the Ethereal Plane. Only a few inches at either end exist permanently on the Material Plane, and those may be used as any normal string would be. criaturas using it to navigate can follow one end to the other by running their hand along the thread, which phases into the Material Plane beneath their grasp. If dropped or severed (AC 8, 1 punto de golpe), the thread disappears back into the Ethereal Plane in 2d6 rondas.

name: Ghoul Light
desc: This bullseye lantern sheds ligera as normal when a lit candle is placed inside of it. If the ligera shines on meat, no matter how toxic or rotten, for at least 10 minutos, the meat is rendered safe to eat. The lantern's magic doesn't improve the meat's flavor, but the ligera does restore the meat's nutritional value and purify it, rendering it free of veneno and disease. In addition, when an undead criatura ends its turn in the ligera, it recibe 1 daño radiante.

name: Ghoulbane Oil
desc: This rusty-red gelatinous liquid glistens with tiny sparkling crystal flecks. The oil can coat one weapon or 5 pieces of munición. Applying the oil recibe 1 minuto. For 1 hora, if a ghoul, ghast, or Darakhul (see Tome of Beasts) recibe damage from the coated item, it recibe an extra 2d6 damage of the weapon's type.

name: Ghoulbane Rod
desc: Arcane glyphs decorate the spherical head of this tarnished rod, while engravings of cracked and broken skulls and bones circle its haft. When an undead criatura is within 120 pies of the rod, the rod's arcane glyphs emit a soft glow. As an action, you can plant the haft end of the rod in the ground, whereupon the rod's glyphs flare to life and the rod's magic activates. When an undead criatura enters or starts its turn within 30 pies of the planted rod, it debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or have desventaja on attack rolls against criaturas that aren't undead until the start of its next turn. If a ghoul fails this tirada de salvación, it also recibe a –2 penalty to AC and Destreza tirada de salvacións, its Velocidad is halved, and it can't use reactions. The rod's magic remains active while planted in the ground, and after it has been active for a total of 10 minutos, its magic ceases to function until the next dawn. A criatura can use an action to pull the rod from the ground, ending the effect early for use at a later time. Deduct the time it was active in increments of 1 minuto from the rod's total active time.

name: Giant Slayer
desc:
Obtienes un bonificador +1 a las tiradas de ataque y daño realizadas con esta arma mágica.

Cuando impactas a un gigante con ella, el gigante recibe 2d6 de daño adicional del tipo del arma y debe superar una tirada de salvación de Fuerza CD 15 o caer derribado. A efectos de esta arma, «gigante» hace referencia a cualquier criatura con el tipo gigante, incluidos los ettins y los trolls.

name: Giant Slayer
desc: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon, and it causa an extra 2d6 damage against giants (including any criatura with the Gigante type, such as _ettins_  and _trolls_ ). In addition, when the weapon causa damage to a Gigante, the Gigante makes a CD 15 Fuerza _tirada de salvación_  or falls _prone_ .

name: Giantstrike Cestus
desc: These leather hand wraps are fitted with iron plates engraved with runes. When you make unarmed strikes while wearing these wraps, your Martial Arts die is one die higher.

name: Giggling Orb
desc: This glass sphere measures 3 inches in diameter and contains a swirling, yellow mist. You can use an action to throw the orb up to 60 pies. The orb shatters on impact and is destroyed. cada criatura within a 20-pie-radius of where the orb landed debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or fall derribado in fits of laughter, becoming incapacitado and unable to stand for 1 minuto. A criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito.

name: Girdle of Traveling Alchemy
desc:
This wide leather girdle has many sewn-in pouches and holsters that hold an assortment of empty beakers and vials. Once you have attuned to the girdle, these containers magically fill with the following liquids:
- 2 flasks of alchemist's fuego
- 2 flasks of alchemist's ice*
- 2 vials of ácido - 2 jars of swarm repellent* - 1 vial of assassin's blood veneno - 1 potion of escalando - 1 potion of healing Each container magically replenishes each day at dawn, if you are wearing the girdle. All the potions and alchemical substances produced by the girdle lose their properties if they're transferred to another container before being used.

name: Glamour Rings
desc: These rings are made from twisted loops of gold and onyx and are always found in pairs. The rings' magic works only while you and another humanoid of the same size each wear one ring and are on the same plane of existence. While wearing a ring, you or the other humanoid can use an action to swap your appearances, if both of you are willing. This effect works like the Change Appearance effect of the alter self spell, except you can change your appearance to only look identical to each other. Your clothing and equipment don't change, and the effect lasts until one of you uses this property again or until one of you removes the ring.

name: Glamoured Padded Leather
desc: While wearing this armor your Clase de Armadura increases by +1, and you can use a acción adicional to make the armor appear to be any normal set of clothing or other kind of armor. The illusion allows you to choose the details of its appearance, and it lasts until you remove the armor or use the property again.

name: Glamoured Studded Leather
desc: Mientras llevas esta armadura, obtienes un bonificador +1 a la CA. También puedes usar una acción adicional para pronunciar la palabra de comando de la armadura y hacer que adopte la apariencia de un conjunto de ropa normal u otro tipo de armadura. Tú decides su aspecto, incluidos el color, el estilo y los accesorios, pero la armadura conserva su volumen y peso normales. La apariencia ilusoria dura hasta que uses esta propiedad de nuevo o te quites la armadura.

name: Glass Ring
desc:
Though glass is expensive and not found in all buildings, breaking a window is a Común aspect of burglary—a dangerous part if there are guards to worry about. As a acción adicional, you can expend 1 charge to make the hand and arm wearing the ring pass through a single pane of glass for 2d4 + 2 rondas. Objects that you hold in that hand also pass through the glass. If your hand or arm are still through the glass at the end of the duration, you take 1d10 daño cortante as the glass breaks. 

Alternatively, when you hit a criatura made of glass or crystal with a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo using the hand wearing the ring, you can command the ring to shatter. The hit causa an additional 2d8 damage.

The ring has 2 charges and regains 1 charge each dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20\. On a result of 5 or less, the ring loses its magic and becomes a mundane item.

name: Glass Wand of Leng
desc: The tip of this twisted clear glass wand is razorsharp. It can be wielded as a magic dagger that grants a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it. The wand weighs 4 pounds and is roughly 18 inches long. When you tap the wand, it emits a single, loud note which can be heard up to 20 pies away and does not stop sounding until you choose to silence it. This wand has 5 charges and regains 1d4 + 1 charges daily at dawn. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells (save CD 17): arcane lock (2 charges), disguise self (1 charge), or tongues (3 charges).

name: Glasses of Rodentius
desc:
These ronda glasses have a thin black metal frame and lenses that softly shimmer green. Engraved into the arms are very subtle rodents arranged into a helix. While you are wearing the glasses, you can see the paths that rodents have traveled in the last two days. The paths appear as shimmering green lines that alcance upwards. The sooner a rat has traveled the path, the brighter the trail appears. When observed under the effects of __detect magic ,_ a small spectral rat crawls off of the glasses and squeaks. 

Alternatively, you can use an action to snap the glasses in half and cast _charm monster_  (save CD 13) on up to 10 rats you can see within range. Unlike normal, the duration of the spell is reduced to 1 minuto.

name: Glazed Blade
desc: A pleasant scent emerges from this weapon. While it is on your person, you have ventaja on Carisma (Persuasión) checks made to interact with humanoids and fey.

name: Gliding Cloak
desc: By grasping the ends of the cloak while falling, you can glide up to 5 pies horizontally in any direction for every 1 pie you fall. You descend 60 pies per ronda but take no damage from falling while gliding in this way. A tailwind allows you to glide 10 pies per 1 pie descended, but a headwind forces you to only glide 5 pies per 2 pies descended.

name: Gloam Bread
desc:
Available from the few merchants who reside around the city’s market square, these dark, dense bread rolls are incredibly filling, but leave an unpleasant, greasy taste in your mouth

Each piece of Gloam Bread is considered one Supply. When consumed, you have _advantage_  on Sabiduría _tirada de salvacións_  against the Fellspire Gloaming challenge for 24 horas.

In addition, you can make a CD 16 Sabiduría _tirada de salvación_ , reducing your _strife_  by one level en un éxito. Once a criatura reduces its strife in this way it cannot do so again until it has had a _long rest_ .

name: Gloomflower Corsage
desc:
This black, six-petaled flower fits neatly on a garment's lapel or peeking out of a pocket. While wearing it, you have ventaja on tirada de salvacións against being cegado, ensordecido, or asustado. While wearing the flower, you can use an action to speak one of three command words to invoke the corsage's power and cause one of the following effects: - When you speak the first command word, you gain vista ciega out to a range of 120 pies for 1 hora.
- When you speak the second command word, choose a objetivo within 120 pies of you and make a ataque a distancia with a +7 bonus. On a hit, the objetivo recibe 3d6 daño psíquico.
- When you speak the third command word, your form shifts and shimmers. For 1 minuto, any criatura has desventaja on attack rolls against you. An attacker is immune to this effect if it doesn't rely on sight, as with vista ciega, or can see through illusions, as with vista verdadera. Each time you use the flower, one of its petals curls in on itself. You can't use the flower if all of its petals are curled. The flower uncurls 1d6 petals daily at dusk.

name: Glory’s Glaive
desc:
A red sash with gold trim adorns the haft of this glaive, the steel head of which is always polished to a mirror shine. The counterweight is made of brass and resembles a snarling lion, giving the weapon a regal appearance that belies its prideful, capricious Naturaleza.

This glaive’s blade is dull, and cannot be sharpened by any whetstone, causing it to deal only 1d6 daño contundente on a hit. As a acción adicional, you can attempt to flatter the weapon with a CD 13 Persuasión check. en un fallo, you take 1d4 daño psíquico that cannot be reduced or negated. en un éxito, the blade becomes sharp for 10 minutos. While sharp, it causa 1d12 daño cortante, grants +1 to _attack and damage rolls_  made with it, and gains the flamboyant property. If it’s used in inglorious ways, such as for the execution of an unarmed foe or being used to cut down brush, it will immediately turn dull and refuse to become sharp until properly placated, as determined by the Narrator.

You can forgo your journey activity to spend time polishing, admiring, or training with _glory’s glaive_ to gain a bonus equal to your competencia bonus on Persuasión checks to flatter it for the next 24 horas.

**_Escalation._** If you strike the killing blow in battle with a mighty or storied foe (as determined by the Narrator) with _glory’s glaive_, its ego can grow a maximum of twice. When its ego grows, its bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  increases by +1, the CD to flatter it increases by 3, and the daño psíquico taken en un fallo increases by 1d4.

name: Glove of Swift Return
desc: While you are attuned to and wearing this crimson glove, any weapon you throw returns to your gloved hand immediately after it hits or misses the objetivo.

name: Gloves of Missile Snaring
desc: Estos guantes parecen fundirse casi con tus manos cuando te los pones. Cuando un ataque de arma a distancia te impacta mientras los llevas puestos, puedes usar tu reacción para reducir el daño en 1d10 + tu modificador de Destreza, siempre que tengas una mano libre. Si reduces el daño a 0, puedes atrapar el proyectil si es lo suficientemente pequeño como para sostenerlo en esa mano.

name: Gloves of Missile Snaring
desc: While wearing these gloves, when you are hit by a ataque a distancia con arma you can use your reacción to reduce el daño by 1d10 + your Destreza modifier, as long as you have a free hand. If el daño is reduced to 0, you can catch the missile if it is small enough to be held in that hand.

name: Gloves of Swimming and Climbing
desc: Mientras llevas estos guantes puestos, trepar y nadar no te cuestan movimiento adicional, y obtienes un bonificador +5 a las pruebas de Fuerza (Atletismo) realizadas para trepar o nadar.

name: Gloves of Swimming and Climbing
desc:
While wearing these gloves you gain the following benefits:

* escalando and nadando don’t cost extra movement.
* +5 bonus to Atletismo checks made to climb or swim.

name: Gloves of the Magister
desc: The backs of each of these black leather gloves are set with gold fittings as if to hold a jewel. While you wear the gloves, you can cast mage hand at will. You can affix an ioun stone into the fitting on a glove. While the stone is affixed, you gain the benefits of the stone as if you had it in orbit around your head. If you take an action to touch a criatura, you can transfer the benefits of the ioun stone to that criatura for 1 hora. While the criatura is gifted the benefits, the stone turns gray and provides you with no benefits for the duration. You can use an action to end this effect and return power to the stone. The stone's benefits can also be dispelled from a criatura as if they were a 7th-level spell. When the effect ends, the stone regains its color and provides you with its benefits once more.

name: Gloves of the Walking Shade
desc:
Each glove is actually comprised of three, black ivory rings (typically fitting the thumb, middle finger, and pinkie) which are connected to each other. The rings are then connected to an intricately-engraved onyx wrist cuff by a web of fine platinum chains and tiny diamonds. While wearing these gloves, you gain the following benefits: - You have resistance to daño necrótico.
- You can spend one Hit Die during a descanso corto to remove one level of agotamiento instead of regaining puntos de golpe.
- You can use an action to become a living shadow for 1 minuto. For the duration, you can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing, and you can take the Hide action as a acción adicional while you are in dim ligera or darkness. Once used, this property of the gloves can't be used again until the next nightfall.

name: Gnawing Spear
desc: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls with this magic weapon. When you roll a 20 on an tirada de ataque made with this spear, its head animates, grows serrated teeth, and lodges itself in the objetivo. While the spear is lodged in the objetivo and you are wielding the spear, the objetivo is agarrado by you. At the start of each of your turns, the spear twists and grinds, dealing 2d6 daño perforante to the agarrado objetivo. If you release the spear, it remains lodged in the objetivo, dealing damage each ronda as normal, but the objetivo is no longer agarrado by you. While the spear is lodged in a objetivo, you can't make attacks with it. A criatura, including the apresado objetivo, can take its action to remove the spear by succeeding on a CD 15 Fuerza check. The objetivo recibe 1d6 daño perforante when the spear is removed. You can use an action to speak the spear's command word, causing it to dislodge itself and fall into an unoccupied space within 5 pies of the objetivo.

name: Goblin Mask
desc:
Your vision shifts into a sickly yellow tint. Your muscles tense up and contract inside you, made twitchy as new sensory information floods your brain. You gain the following benefits and powers while wearing the _goblin mask_:

**_Darkvision_.** You can see in dim ligera within 60 pies of you as if it were bright ligera, and in darkness as if it were dim ligera.

_**Goblin Tongue**_. You can speak, read, and write Goblin as a language.

_**Nimble Escape.**_ This mask has 5 charges. While wearing it, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges to take the Disengage or Hide action as a acción adicional during your turn. The mask regains 1d4 + 1 charges daily at sunrise. If you expend the mask’s last charge, roll a d20\. On a 1, the mask shrivels away and is destroyed.

name: Goblin Shield
desc: This shield resembles a snarling goblin's head. It has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. While wielding this shield, you can use a acción adicional to expend 1 charge and command the goblin's head to bite a criatura within 5 pies of you. Make a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo con arma with the shield. You have competencia with this attack if you are proficient with shields. On a hit, the objetivo recibe 2d4 daño perforante.

name: Goggles of Firesight
desc: The lenses of these combination fleshy and plantlike goggles extend a few inches away from the goggles on a pair of tentacles. While wearing these lenses, you can see through lightly obscured and heavily obscured areas without your vision being obscured, if those areas are obscured by fuego, smoke, or fog. Other effects that would obscure your vision, such as rain or darkness, affect you normally. When you fail a tirada de salvación against being cegado, you can use a reacción to call on the power within the goggles. If you do so, you succeed on the tirada de salvación instead. The goggles can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Goggles of Night
desc: Mientras llevas puestas estas lentes oscuras, tienes visión en la oscuridad con un alcance de 18m. Si ya tienes visión en la oscuridad, llevar las gafas aumenta su alcance en 18m.

name: Goggles of Night
desc: While wearing these goggles, you gain visión en la oscuridad to a range of 60 pies, or increase your existing visión en la oscuridad by 60 pies.

name: Goggles of Shade
desc: While wearing these dark lenses, you have ventaja on Carisma (Engaño) checks. If you have the Sunlight Sensitivity trait and wear these goggles, you no longer suffer the penalties of Sunlight Sensitivity while in sunlight.

name: Golden Bolt
desc: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. This crossbow doesn't have the loading property, and it doesn't require munición. Immediately after firing a bolt from this weapon, another golden bolt forms to take its place.

name: Golden Chain Shirt
desc:
While wearing this incredibly ligera chain shirt your AC equals 14 + your Destreza modifier. If you have the Unarmored Defense feature, you can also add half your Sabiduría modifier to your Clase de Armadura, and wearing this armor does not interfere with the Adept Velocidad feature.

Once per day when you take a critical hit, you can use your reacción to make the golden chain shirt _blind_  your attacker. The criatura makes a CD 16 Constitución _tirada de salvación_  or is cegado for 1 minuto. At the end of each of its turns, the blind criatura makes another tirada de salvación, ending the effect on itself en un éxito.

In addition, your Fuerza increases to 17, you have _advantage_  on Fuerza tirada de salvacións and ability checks, and your Carrying Capacity is determined as if your size is Gargantuan (8 times as much as normal).

name: Gong of Alarm
desc: As an action, you can cast the __alarm_  spell through this brass gong. When cast this way, the spell’s duration becomes 1 month. The gong can’t be used to cast _alarm_ again while the spell is active and for 24 horas thereafter.

name: Gorgon Scale
desc: The iron scales of this armor have a green-tinged iridescence. While wearing this armor, you gain a +1 bonus to AC, and you have immunity to the petrificado condition. If you move at least 20 pies straight toward a criatura and then hit it with a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo con arma on the same turn, you can use a acción adicional to imbue the hit with some of the armor's petrifying magic. The objetivo debe realizar a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Constitución. en una salvación fallida, the objetivo begins to turn to stone and is apresado. The apresado objetivo must repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of its next turn. en un éxito, the effect ends on the objetivo. en un fallo, the objetivo is petrificado until freed by the greater restoration spell or other magic. The armor can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Gossip Earring
desc: The days of wondering what the socialites across the room are chatting about have come to an end! This brass earring is sculpted into the shape of whispering maidens. Whenever a criatura says your name while within 100 pies the earring activates, transmitting the criatura’s words as a hushed whisper into your ears until it has gone at least 1 minuto without saying your name.

name: Gram, the Sword of Grief
desc:
This longsword gleams with gold ornamentation, though the blade is a strange brown color. While you are attuned to Gram, you gain the following benefits:

* You gain a +3 bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  made with this magic sword.
* While you are attuned to the sword and use it to attack a dragon, on a hit it causa an extra 3d6 daño cortante. If you use it to attack a humanoid, on a hit it causa an extra 2d8 daño de veneno.

### Lore

Sword of the legendary hero Sigurd Sigmundsson, it was originally won by his father Sigmund when the god Odin approached him in disguise at a wedding feast. Odin thrust the sword it into a tree and proclaimed that anyone who pulled it from the tree would receive the sword itself as a gift, and that none had ever borne a finer blade. Sigmund drew it, only for Odin to eventually break the blade after he had used it in several battles. The two halves were bequeathed to his son, Sigurd.

_Gram_ was reforged by the dwarf Regin for Sigurd in order to slay Regin’s brother, the wizard-turned-dragon, Fafnir, and reclaim a cursed treasure. Sigurd proofed the blade on Regin’s own anvil, breaking the blade again, and then again after a second forging. Finally, on the third time, it split the anvil in half with a single stroke. Sigurd later killed Fafnir by hiding in a ditch and thrusting upwards into the drake’s unprotected belly. The ditch carried away most of the dragon’s burning, poisonous blood but _Gram_, as well as Sigrud’s arm up to the shoulder, were bathed in it, and a portion of that venomous malice remains in the sword. Though Sigurd’s eventual tragic end had more to do with a cursed ring he stole from the dragon’s hoard than _Gram_, it is nevertheless known as the Sword of Grief.

name: Granny Wax
desc: Normally found in a small glass jar containing 1d3 doses, this foul-smelling, greasy yellow substance is made by hags in accordance with an age-old secret recipe. You can use an action to rub one dose of the wax onto an ordinary broom or wooden stick and transform it into a broom of volando for 1 hora.

name: Grappling Gun
desc:
This device resembles a crossbow with a grappling hook fixed onto a spear that emerges from the front of it. You can use an action to fuego it at a perch within 120 pies—a crux of tree boughs, the corner of a building, the top of a street ligera, a cluster of rocks across a chasm—and make a ataque a distancia con arma roll against AC 13\. On a successful hit the device’s grappling hook affixes itself to the perch and you can use a acción adicional to retract the line, moving to a square adjacent to the grappling hook. When you are within 10 pies of the grappling hook you can use a reacción to return it to the _grappling gun_. 

A _grappling gun_ that has its line obstructed by another criatura or broken (AC 20, 20 puntos de golpe) becomes inoperable until it is reloaded with an action. 

In addition, you can fuego the _grappling gun_ as an attack against a criatura (range 60/120 pies.), dealing 1d4 daño contundente. On a hit the criatura makes a CD 10 Fuerza _tirada de salvación_  or is knocked _prone_ .

name: Grasping Cap
desc: This cap is a simple, blue silk hat with a goose feather trim. While wearing this cap, you have ventaja on Fuerza (Atletismo) checks made to climb, and the cap deflects the first ataque a distancia made against you each ronda. In addition, when a criatura attacks you while within 30 pies of you, it is illuminated and sheds red-hued dim ligera in a 50-pie radius until the end of its next turn. Any tirada de ataque against an illuminated criatura has ventaja if the attacker can see it.

name: Grasping Cloak
desc: Made of strips of black leather, this cloak always shines as if freshly oiled. The strips writhe and grasp at nearby criaturas. While wearing this cloak, you can use a acción adicional to command the strips to grapple a criatura no more than one size larger than you within 5 pies of you. The strips make the grapple tirada de ataque with a +7 bonus. On a hit, the objetivo is agarrado by the cloak, leaving your hands free to perform other tasks or actions that require both hands. However, you are still considered to be grappling a criatura, limiting your movement as normal. The cloak can grapple only una criatura at a time. Alternatively, you can use a acción adicional to command the strips to aid you in grappling. If you do so, you have ventaja on your next tirada de ataque made to grapple a criatura. While grappling a criatura in this way, you have ventaja on the contested check if a criatura attempts to escape your grapple.

name: Grasping Shield
desc: The boss at the center of this shield is a hand fashioned of metal. While wielding this shield, you gain a +1 bonus to AC. This bonus is in addition to the shield's normal bonus to AC.

name: Grave Reagent
desc: This luminous green concoction creates an undead servant. If you spend 1 minuto anointing the corpse of a Small or Medium humanoid, this arcane solution imbues the objetivo with a foul mimicry of life, raising it as an undead criatura. The objetivo becomes a zombie under your control (the GM has the zombie's statistics). On each of your turns, you can use a acción adicional to verbally command the zombie if it is within 60 pies of you. You decide what action the zombie will take and where it will move during its next turn, or you can issue a general command, such as to guard a particular chamber or corridor. If you issue no commands, the zombie only defends itself against hostile criaturas. Once given an order, the zombie continues to follow it until its task is complete. The zombie is under your control for 24 horas, after which it stops obeying any command you've given it.

name: Grave Ward Armor
desc: This armor bears gold or brass symbols of sunlight and sun deities and never tarnishes or rusts. The armor is immune to daño necrótico and rusting attacks such as those of a rust monster. While wearing this armor, your maximum puntos de golpe can't be reduced. As an action, you can speak a command word to gain the effect of a protection from evil and good spell for 1 minuto (no Concentración required). While the spell is active, if you are reduced to 0 puntos de golpe, you drop to 1 punto de golpe instead. Once you use this property, it can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Greater Potion of Troll Blood
desc: When drink this potion, you regain 3 puntos de golpe at the start of each of your turns. After it has restored 30 puntos de golpe, the potion's effects end.

name: Green Mantle
desc:
This garment is made of living plants—mosses, vines, and grasses—interwoven into a ligera, comfortable piece of clothing. When you attune to this mantle, it forms a symbiotic relationship with you, sinking roots beneath your skin. While wearing the mantle, your punto de golpe maximum is reduced by 5, and you gain the following benefits: - If you aren't wearing armor, your base Clase de Armadura is 13 + your Destreza modifier.
- You have resistance to daño radiante.
- You have immunity to the envenenado condition and daño de veneno that originates from a plant, moss, fungus, or plant criatura.
- As an action, you cause the mantle to produce 6 berries. It can have no more than 12 berries on it at one time. The berries have the same effect as berries produced by the goodberry spell. Unlike the goodberry spell, the berries retain their potency as long as they are not picked from the mantle. Once used, this property can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Green Scale Shield
desc: While you hold this shield, you have _resistance_  to daño de veneno.

name: Gremlin Translator
desc:
This Tiny ethereal orange goblinoid sits inside a decorative silver earring. The gremlin speaks Común and has limited knowledge of all other known languages, able to understand and translate the following phrases regardless of what language they are spoken in:

* Excuse me
* Please
* Yes
* No
* Where is the privy?

When prompted the gremlin provides you with the correct translation of any of those phrases in any language. It can also attempt to translate anything spoken or written in any language, however it only recognizes the words that comprise the above phrases.

name: Gremlin's Paw
desc: This wand is fashioned from the fossilized forearm and claw of a gremlin. The wand has 5 charges. While holding the wand, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells (save CD 15): bane (1 charge), bestow curse (3 charges), or hideous laughter (1 charge). The wand regains 1d4 + 1 expended charges daily at dusk. If you expend the wand's last charge, roll a d20. On a 20, you debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or become afflicted with short-term madness. On a 1, the rod crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

name: Grifter's Deck
desc: When you deal a card from this slightly greasy, well-used deck, you can choose any specific card to be on top of the deck, assuming it hasn't already been dealt. Alternatively, you can choose a general card of a specific value or suit that hasn't already been dealt.

name: Grim Escutcheon
desc: This blackened iron shield is adorned with the menacing relief of a monstrously gaunt skull. You gain a +1 bonus to AC while you wield this shield. This bonus is in addition to the shield's normal bonus to AC. While holding this shield, you can use a acción adicional to speak its command word to cast the fear spell (save CD 13). The shield can't be used this way again until the next dusk.

name: Gritless Grease
desc: This small, metal jar, 3 inches in diameter, holds 1d4 + 1 doses of a pungent waxy oil. As an action, one dose can be applied to or swallowed by a clockwork criatura or device. The clockwork criatura or device ignores difficult terrain, and mágico effects can't reduce its Velocidad for 8 horas. As an action, the clockwork criatura, or a criatura holding a clockwork device, can gain the effect of the haste spell until the end of its next turn (no Concentración required). The effects of the haste spell melt the grease, ending all its effects at the end of the spell's duration.

name: Guide to Respecting Social Mores
desc: This small, rather dry book contains instructions on etiquette and proper behavior. Its hidden and most useful purpose is to scream loudly to create a distraction whenever its carrier is subjected to unwanted social interactions.

name: Hair Fuses
desc: These small wicks and glued strips powdered with gunpowder are worn in the hair, usually at the ends of long braids or in a voluminous beard. You can use an action or acción adicional to ligera these fuses, rolling 1d12\. On a 12, the fuses all ignite at once and you take 1d6 daño de fuego. Otherwise they burn for 1 minuto and give you ventaja on Carisma (Intimidación) checks, but _disadvantage_  on all other Carisma checks

name: Hair Pick of Protection
desc: This hair pick has glittering teeth that slide easily into your hair, making your hair look perfectly coiffed and battle-ready. Though typically worn in hair, you can also wear the pick as a brooch or cloak clasp. While wearing this pick, you gain a +2 bonus to AC, and you have ventaja on tirada de salvacións against spells. In addition, the pick magically boosts your self-esteem and your confidence in your ability to overcome any challenge, making you immune to the asustado condition.

name: Hallowed Effigy
desc: This pie-long totem, crafted from the bones and skull of a Tiny woodland beast bound in thin leather strips, serves as a boon for you and your aliados and as a stinging trap to those who threaten you. The totem has 10 charges, and it regains 1d6 + 4 expended charges daily at dawn. If the last charge is expended, it can't regain charges again until a druid performs a 24-hora ritual, which involves the sacrifice of a Tiny woodland beast. You can use an action to secure the effigy on any natural organic substrate (such as dirt, mud, grass, and so on). While secured in this way, it pulses with primal energy on initiative count 20 each ronda, expending 1 charge. When it pulses, you and cada criatura friendly to you within 15 pies of the totem regains 1d6 puntos de golpe, and cada criatura hostile to you within 15 pies of the totem debe realizar a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Constitución, taking 1d6 daño necrótico en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one. It continues to pulse each ronda until you pick it up, it runs out of charges, or it is destroyed. The totem has AC 20 and 20 puntos de golpe. It regains 1 punto de golpe every 5 minutos as long as it has at least 1 punto de golpe. If it drops to 0 puntos de golpe, it is destroyed.

name: Hallucinatory Dust
desc: This small packet contains black pollen from a Gloomflower (see criatura Codex). Hazy images swirl around the pollen when observed outside the packet. There is enough of it for one use. When you use an action to blow the dust from your palm, cada criatura in a 30-pie cone debe realizar a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en un fallo, a criatura sees terrible visions, manifesting its fears and anxieties for 1 minuto. While affected, it recibe 2d6 daño psíquico at the start of each of its turns and must spend its action to make one ataque cuerpo a cuerpo against a criatura within 5 pies of it, other than you or itself. If the criatura can't make a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo, it recibe the Dodge action. The criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito. en un éxito, a criatura becomes incapacitado until the end of its next turn as the visions fill its mind then quickly fade. A criatura reduced to 0 puntos de golpe by the dust's daño psíquico falls inconsciente and is stable. When the criatura regains consciousness, it is permanently plagued by hallucinations and has desventaja on ability checks until cured by a remove curse spell or similar magic.

name: Hammer of Decrees
desc: This adamantine hammer was part of a set of smith's tools used to create weapons of law for an ancient dwarven civilization. It is pitted and appears damaged, and its oak handle is split and bound with cracking hide. While attuned to this hammer, you have ventaja on ability checks using smith's tools, and the time it recibe you to craft an item with your smith's tools is halved.

name: Hammer of Throwing
desc: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls with this magic weapon. In addition, when you throw the hammer, it returns to your hand at the end of your turn. If you have no hand free, it falls to the ground at your pies.

name: Hammer of Thunderbolts
desc:
Obtienes un bonificador +1 a las tiradas de ataque y de daño realizadas con esta arma mágica.

**_Perdición de Gigantes (Requiere Sintonización)_**. Debes llevar puesto un _belt of giant strength_ (de cualquier variedad) y unos _gauntlets of ogre power_ para sintonizarte con esta arma. La sintonización termina si te quitas cualquiera de esos objetos. Mientras estás sintonizado con esta arma y la sostienes, tu puntuación de Fuerza aumenta en 4 y puede superar 20, pero no 30. Cuando sacas un 20 en una tirada de ataque realizada con esta arma contra un gigante, el gigante debe superar una tirada de salvación de Constitución CD 17 o morir.

El martillo también tiene 5 cargas. Mientras estés sintonizado con él, puedes gastar 1 carga y realizar un ataque a distancia con el martillo, lanzándolo como si tuviera la propiedad arrojadiza con un alcance normal de 6m y un alcance largo de 18m. Si el ataque impacta, el martillo desata un trueno audible a 90m. El objetivo y todas las criaturas que se encuentren a 9m de él deben superar una tirada de salvación de Constitución CD 17 o quedar aturdidas hasta el final de tu próximo turno. El martillo recupera 1d4 + 1 cargas gastadas cada día al amanecer.

name: Hammer of Thunderbolts
desc:
You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic maul. This weapon can only be attuned to when you are wearing a __belt of Gigante strength_ and __gauntlets of ogre power ._ The attunement ends if you remove or change attunement away from either of those items. 

While you are attuned to this weapon and holding it:

* Your Fuerza score increases by 4 (and can exceed 20, but not 30).
* When you make an tirada de ataque with this weapon against a Gigante and roll a natural 20, the Gigante makes a CD 17 Constitución _tirada de salvación_  or dies.

You can expend 1 charge and make a ataque a distancia con arma with the maul with a normal range of 20 pies and a maximum range of 60 pies. On a hit, the maul unleashes a thunderclap heard from up to 300 pies away. The objetivo and every criatura within 30 pies of it make a CD 17 Constitución _tirada de salvación_  or become _stunned_  until the end of your next turn.

  
The maul has 5 charges and regains 1d4+1 charges each dawn.

name: Hamper of Gwyddno Garanhir & Knife of Llawfrodedd the Horseman
desc: You can use an action to cast _create food and water_  by putting 1d4 _Supply_ into this large wooden basket or using this cutting knife to prepare a 1d4 Supply. You cannot use food created in this way to activate either of these magic items.

name: Hand of the Night
desc:
Thin ridges of ivory trace the fingers of this supple leather glove, yet they never restrict the movement or flexibility of the hand. While wearing this glove, you can cause an object held in your hand to turn _invisible_ , provided it weighs 5 pounds or less. The object remains invisible until you let go of it or end the effect as a free action. If you make an attack with an invisible weapon that has the sutil property, the attack doesn’t trigger any reactions unless the criatura making the reacción can perceive invisible objects.

Additionally, if you are in _dim ligera or darkness_ , you can turn invisible as an action. You remain invisible for 10 minutos or until you use movement or take any actions or reactions.

_**Curse.**_ While in sunlight, your skin appears gray and veiny, your face is gaunt, and your eyes turn hollow, pale, and milky, giving you an unsettling demeanor. The exact effects of this appearance can vary broadly depending on who’s around to see it, often imposing desventaja on Carisma checks or even outright hostility. Additionally, while in sunlight you make any _tirada de salvacións_  with a –2 penalty.

_**Escalation.**_ This glove’s true powers open up when, through subtlety and subterfuge, you steal something greater than just objects. This could mean stealing a soul away from death, stealing victory from the jaws of defeat, or something even more unusual. The first time you perform such a feat, the glove gains 3 charges that replenish each dawn. Additionally, each time you trigger the escalation you can choose from one of the following benefits, each of which cost 1 charge to use.

• You can cast disguise self without expending a espacio de conjuro, and Carisma is your spellcasting ability for this effect. You can’t do so again until the next dawn.  
• For 1 minuto you can use movement while benefiting from this glove’s invisibility.  
• If you take an action or reacción while benefiting from this glove’s invisibility, you can instead become visible at the start of your next turn.

name: Handy Halter
desc: This noosed strap (also known as the Halter of Clydno Eiddyn as it was long stapled to the pie of his bed) has 3 charges. While holding it, you can use an action and expend 1 charge to cast the __find steed_  spell from it. The rope regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Handy Haversack
desc:
Esta mochila tiene una bolsa central y dos bolsas laterales, cada una de las cuales es un espacio extradimensional. Cada bolsa lateral puede contener hasta 9 kg de material, sin superar un volumen de 0,06 metros cúbicos. La gran bolsa central puede contener hasta 0,23 metros cúbicos o 36 kg de material. La mochila siempre pesa 2,5 kg, independientemente de su contenido.

Colocar un objeto en la mochila sigue las reglas normales para interactuar con objetos. Recuperar un objeto de la mochila requiere que uses una acción. Cuando metes la mano en la mochila para buscar un objeto específico, ese objeto siempre aparece mágicamente en la parte superior.

La mochila tiene algunas limitaciones. Si está sobrecargada, o si un objeto punzante la perfora o rasga, la mochila se rompe y queda destruida. Si la mochila es destruida, su contenido se pierde para siempre, aunque un artefacto siempre vuelve a aparecer en algún lugar. Si la mochila se da la vuelta del revés, su contenido cae al exterior sin daños, y la mochila debe volver a colocarse correctamente antes de poder usarse de nuevo. Si se coloca una criatura que respira dentro de la mochila, la criatura puede sobrevivir hasta 10 minutos, tras los cuales comienza a asfixiarse.

Colocar la mochila dentro de un espacio extradimensional creado por un _bag of holding_, un _portable hole_ o un objeto similar destruye instantáneamente ambos objetos y abre un portal al Plano Astral. El portal se origina en el lugar donde se colocó un objeto dentro del otro. Cualquier criatura que se encuentre a 3m del portal es absorbida por él y depositada en un lugar aleatorio del Plano Astral. El portal se cierra entonces. El portal es de un solo sentido y no puede volver a abrirse.

name: Handy Haversack
desc:
This backpack has a central pouch and two side pouches, each of which is an extradimensional space. Each side pouch can hold up to 20 pounds of material, not exceeding a volume of 2 cubic pies. The large central pouch can hold up to 8 cubic pies or 80 pounds of material. The backpack always weighs 5 pounds regardless of its contents.

Placing an object in the haversack follows the normal rules for interacting with objects. Retrieving an item from the haversack requires you to use an action. When you alcance into the haversack for a specific item, the item is always magically on top. If the haversack is turned inside out, its contents spill forth, unharmed, and the haversack must be put right before it can be used again.

Food or water placed in the bag immediately and permanently lose all nourishing qualities—after being in the bag, water no longer slakes thirst and food does not sate hunger or nourish. In a similar fashion, the body of a dead criatura placed in the bag cannot be restored to life by __revivify , raise dead ,_ or other similar magic. Breathing criaturas inside the bag can survive for up to 2d4 minutos divided by the number of criaturas (minimum 1 minuto), after which time they begin to _suffocate_ .

The bag cannot hold any item that would not fit in a normal bag of its apparent size or any item with the Bulky quality. 

If the bag is punctured, torn, or otherwise structurally damaged, it ruptures and is destroyed, and the contents are scattered throughout the Astral Plane.

Placing a _handy haversack_ inside another extradimensional storage device such as a _bag of holding_ or __portable hole_ results in planar rift that destroys both items and pulls everything within 10 pies into the Astral Plane. The rift then closes and disappears.

name: Handy Scroll Quiver
desc: This belt quiver is wide enough to pass a rolled scroll through the opening. Containing an extra dimensional space, the quiver can hold up to 25 scrolls and weighs 1 pound, regardless of its contents. Placing a scroll in the quiver follows the normal rules for interacting with objects. Retrieving a scroll from the quiver requires you to use an action. When you alcance into the quiver for a specific scroll, that scroll is always magically on top. The quiver has a few limitations. If it is overloaded, or if a sharp object pierces it or tears it, the quiver ruptures and is destroyed. If the quiver is destroyed, its contents are lost forever, although an artifact always turns up again somewhere. If a breathing criatura is placed within the quiver, the criatura can survive for up to 5 minutos, after which time it begins to suffocate. Placing the quiver inside an extradimensional space created by a bag of holding, handy haversack, or similar item instantly destroys both items and opens a gate to the Astral Plane. The gate originates where the one item was placed inside the other. Any criatura within 10 pies of the gate is sucked through it and deposited in a random location on the Astral Plane. The gate then closes. The gate is one-way only and can't be reopened.

name: Hangman's Noose
desc: Certain hemp ropes used in the execution of final justice can affect those beyond the alcance of normal magics. This noose has 3 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges to cast the hold monster spell from it. Unlike the standard version of this spell, though, the magic of the hangman's noose affects only undead. It regains 1d3 charges daily at dawn.

name: Hardening Polish
desc: This gray polish is viscous and difficult to spread. The polish can coat one metal weapon or up to 10 pieces of munición. Applying the polish recibe 1 minuto. For 1 hora, the coated item hardens and becomes stronger, and it counts as an adamantine weapon for the purpose of overcoming resistance and immunity to attacks and damage not made with adamantine weapons.

name: Harlequin's Cards
desc:
This deck of cards has a series of cut-outs within each card. As an action, you can make a CD 12 Interpretación check to send the cards volando through your hands, creating the appearance that the cut-outs are moving to tell a story of your choice. If you are standing near a ligera source, the story is cast on a nearby wall through shadowplay.

On a failed check, the story’s end is unsatisfying; if you fail by 5 or more, it recibe a ghastly turn, ending in murder, betrayal, or gruesome death.

name: Harmonizing Instrument
desc: Any stringed instrument can be a harmonizing instrument, and you must be proficient with stringed instruments to use a harmonizing instrument. This instrument has 3 charges for the following properties. The instrument regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Harvest
desc:
This seems like nothing more than a simple tool at first, rough at the handle and rusted at the edges, but the sickle’s impossibly sharp and shining crescent blade reveals its true Naturaleza.

You gain a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic sickle. It has the following additional properties. 

_**Red Reaping.**_ Whenever you use _Harvest_ to reduce a living criatura to 0 puntos de golpe, it absorbs that criatura’s soul and stores it within. _Harvest_ cannot store more than one soul in this way and the souls of any criaturas you reduce to 0 puntos de golpe while a criatura’s soul is already contained within it are not affected by this property.

_**Sow the Reaped.**_ You can use an action to strike the ground with the sickle and produce a blood clone using a criatura’s soul stored within _Harvest._ This blood clone appears in an unoccupied space adjacent to you and uses the statistics the criatura had when it was alive, except it is both ooze and undead in addition to its other types. Blood clones formed in this way act immediately after you in initiative, and they obey your verbal commands to the best of their ability. Without such commands, the blood clone only defends itself. Once formed, a blood clone remains until destroyed or until 10 minutos pass, after which it dissolves into rotten offal and the trapped soul travels to whatever afterlife was intended for it.

_**Only Life May Die.** Harvest_ has no effect on unliving criaturas, and passes harmlessly through constructs and undead when it is used to attack them. 

_**Sentience.** Harvest_ is a sentient weapon with Inteligencia 14, Sabiduría 18, and Carisma 17\. It sees and hears using your senses. _Harvest_ communicates with only you telepathically and can read, speak, and understand Común, Halfling, and Orc. It cannot communicate with a criatura it is not attuned to.

_**Personality.**_ This sickle originally had a much more benign purpose, created by a halfling archdruid to bring forth a new plant for each one harvested. When its creator was killed by an orcish warchief it became a weapon, and in her hands it grew to find a new purpose. It eventually convinced its bearer to sow what she reaped, and caused the very spirit and blood of those she had cut down to slaughter its orcish captors. _Harvest_ has come to believe that all people are inherently wicked and deserve death. It believes that real peace can only be achieved when the last mind capable of war and cruelty goes silent, leaving nothing but the plants and beasts. _Harvest_ tolerates people with a connection to Naturaleza but only if they are regularly giving it a chance to continue its “culling”. It whispers often of its great work, and begs you to enrich the earth’s soil with blood that it spills. If you go more than 3 days without using Harvest to slay a sentient criatura, you’ll be in conflict with _Harvest_. When in conflict, any time you use the Sow the Reaped property the resulting blood clone ignores your verbal orders and attacks you to the best of its ability. If you are killed by the blood clone in this way, your soul is absorbed into _Harvest_. 

_**Destroying Harvest.**_ _Harvest_ is unbreakable but a person that has mastered Naturaleza can unmake it. With 24 horas worth of ritual work, any 20th level druid can deconstruct the weapon and return its tortured mind to the earth it was formed from, rendering _Harvest_ an inert mundane sickle made with a moonstone blade.

name: Hat of Disguise
desc: Mientras llevas puesto este sombrero, puedes usar una acción para lanzar el conjuro _disguise self_ desde él a voluntad. El conjuro termina si el sombrero es retirado.

name: Hat of Disguise
desc: While wearing this hat, you can use an action to cast __disguise self_ at will. The spell ends if the hat is removed.

name: Hat of Grand Entrances
desc: Step into the room and make a grand entrance! This top hat has embroidered figurines of trumpet players in full regalia. By speaking a command word, you can cause the figures to magically and loudly herald your arrival by trumpet blasts, followed by a speech announcing your name, titles, and any of your major accomplishments. You can alter this speech beforehand by giving any special instructions to the hat before speaking the command word. Once this hat has heralded an entrance it can’t be used again for 10 minutos.

name: Hat of Mental Acuity
desc: This well-crafted cap appears to be standard wear for academics. Embroidered on the edge of the inside lining in green thread are sigils. If you cast comprehend languages on them, they read, “They that are guided go not astray.” While wearing the hat, you have ventaja on all Inteligencia and Sabiduría checks. If you are proficient in an Inteligencia or Sabiduría-based skill, you double your competencia bonus for the skill.

name: Hazelwood Wand
desc: You can use this wand as a spellcasting focus. The wand has 3 charges and regains all expended charges daily at dawn. When you cast the goodberry spell while using this wand as your spellcasting focus, you can expend 1 of the wand's charges to transform the berries into hazelnuts, which restore 2 puntos de golpe instead of 1. The spell is otherwise unchanged. In addition, when you cast a spell that causa daño de rayo while using this wand as your spellcasting focus, the spell causa 1 extra daño de rayo.

name: Headband of Intellect
desc: Tu puntuación de Inteligencia es 19 mientras llevas puesta esta diadema. No tiene ningún efecto sobre ti si tu Inteligencia ya es 19 o superior.

name: Headband of Intellect
desc: Wearing this headband increases your Inteligencia score to 19\. It has no effect if your Inteligencia is equal to greater than 19.

name: Headdress of Majesty
desc: This elaborate headpiece is adorned with small gemstones and thin strips of gold that frame your head like a radiante halo. While you wear this headdress, you have ventaja on Carisma (Intimidación) and Carisma (Persuasión) checks. The headdress has 5 charges for the following properties. It regains all expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a 1d20. On a 1, the headdress becomes a no mágico, tawdry ornament of cheap metals and paste gems.

name: Headrest of the Cattle Queens
desc: This polished and curved wooden headrest is designed to keep the user's head comfortably elevated while sleeping. If you sleep at least 6 horas as part of a descanso largo while using the headrest, you regain 1 additional spent Hit Die, and your agotamiento level is reduced by 2 (rather than 1) when you finish the descanso largo.

name: Headscarf of the Oasis
desc: This dun-colored, well-worn silk wrap is long enough to cover the face and head of a Medium or smaller humanoid, barely revealing the eyes. While wearing this headscarf over your mouth and nose, you have ventaja on ability checks and tirada de salvacións against being cegado and against extended exposure to hot weather and hot environments. Pulling the headscarf on or off your mouth and nose requires an action.

name: Healthful Honeypot
desc: This clay honeypot weighs 10 pounds. A sweet aroma wafts constantly from it, and it produces enough honey to feed up to 12 humanoids. Eating the honey restores 1d8 puntos de golpe, and the honey provides enough nourishment to sustain a humanoid for one day. Once 12 doses of the honey have been consumed, the honeypot can't produce more honey until the next dawn.

name: Heartbreak's Dagger
desc: This delicate dagger, not much larger than a hatpin, features a curling silver cross-piece and a hilt wrapped in soft red leather. You gain a +1 to _attack and damage rolls_  with this weapon. On a critical hit, the objetivo debe realizar a Constitución _tirada de salvación_  versus your maneuver CD. en un fallo, it begins to bleed heavily, taking an additional 2d4 damage at the start of each of its turns. It can make another tirada de salvación de Constitución at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect en un éxito. This effect does not stack.

name: Heartglow Lantern
desc:
Fashioned from a single piece of specially grown, hexagonal crystal fitted within a metal frame, a heartglow lantern doesn1t use burning fuel or ignited material to generate ligera, making it ideal in caverns where air supplies can be precious. You can use an action while holding one of these lanterns to cause it to shed bright ligera in a 20-pie radius and dim ligera for an additional 20 pies. The ligera lasts until you use a acción adicional to repeat the command word or until the lantern is no longer being held or carried by a living criatura.
  Each lantern can create an additional effect when it is infused with vitality. Any criatura touching a lantern can use an action to infuse it with some of the criatura1s vitality. The criatura1s hit-point maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the criatura1s competencia bonus, and the lantern gains charges equal to that amount. This reduction lasts until the criatura finishes a descanso largo. Each lantern can hold any number of charges from any number of criaturas, but cada criatura can infuse a lantern with vitality only once between long rests.
  ***Deadbane (Uncommon).*** While holding this lantern, you can use an action and expend 1 or more of its charges to cause the lantern to detect undead for 1 hora. When an undead is within 20 pies of the lantern, the ligera it sheds changes to blue, growing brighter the closer the undead is to the lantern. For each charge you spend beyond the first, the duration increases by 30 minutos, and the distance the lantern can detect undead increases by 5 pies. Increasing this distance doesn't increase the radius of the ligera shed by the lantern.
  ***Floodmote (Very Rare).*** If you are submerged while holding or carrying this lantern, you can use a reacción and expend 1 or more of its charges to create a small bubble of air for yourself for 1 hora. For each charge you spend beyond the first, the duration increases by 1 hora, and you can choose one additional criatura within 30 pies of you to also be protected with a bubble of air. The bubble of air surrounds only a criatura's head or other airbreathing organ and provides breathable air to the criatura for the duration.
  ***Tumblesafe (Rare).*** If you or a friendly criatura you can see within 40 pies of you falls while you are holding or carrying this lantern, you can use a reacción and expend 1 or more of its charges to slow the fall. For each charge you spend beyond the first, you can extend the ligera shed by the lantern by 5 pies. Each falling criatura and object in the lantern's ligera descends at a rate of 60 pies per ronda and recibe no damage from falling. It continues to descend at this rate until it lands, even if it exits the lantern's ligera before it lands.

name: Heat Stone
desc: Prized by reptilian humanoids, this magic stone is warm to the touch. While carrying this stone, you are comfortable in and can tolerate temperatures as low as –20 degrees Fahrenheit without any additional protection. If you wear pesada clothes, you can tolerate temperatures as low as –50 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: Heaven's Roof Ring
desc: Awarded to those who have performed some great service to the cloud elves, this silver band of this ring is set with a flat gray stone etched with a wing. Once a day, you can spend an action to gain fly Velocidad of 50 pies for 10 minutos, and once per day, as a reacción, you can cast _feather fall_  on yourself. While attuned, you are also fully acclimated to great heights and automatically succeed on checks against the effects of the _Elsenian Span_.

name: Heliotrope Heart
desc: This polished orb of dark-green stone is latticed with pulsing crimson inclusions that resemble slowly dilating spatters of blood. While attuned to this orb, your punto de golpe maximum can't be reduced by the bite of a vampire, vampire spawn, or other vampiric criatura. In addition, while holding this orb, you can use an action to speak its command word and cast the 2nd-level version of the false life spell. Once used, this property can't be used again until the next dusk.

name: Hellfire Armor
desc: This spiked armor is a dark, almost black crimson when inactive. While wearing this armor, you can use an action to cause it to glow and appear red-hot, giving you a hellish appearance. The armor sheds ligera as a candle, but it doesn’t emit heat. The effect lasts until you use a acción adicional to end it.

name: Helm of Brilliance
desc:
Este deslumbrante yelmo está engarzado con 1d10 diamantes, 2d10 rubíes, 3d10 ópalos de fuego y 4d10 ópalos. Cualquier gema arrancada del yelmo se desintegra en polvo. Cuando todas las gemas son retiradas o destruidas, el yelmo pierde su magia.

Obtienes los siguientes beneficios mientras lo llevas puesto:

* Puedes usar una acción para lanzar uno de los siguientes conjuros (CD de salvación 18), usando una de las gemas del yelmo del tipo indicado como componente: _daylight_ (ópalo), _fireball_ (ópalo de fuego), _prismatic spray_ (diamante) o _wall of fire_ (rubí). La gema es destruida al lanzar el conjuro y desaparece del yelmo.
* Siempre que el yelmo tenga al menos un diamante, emite luz tenue en un radio de 9 metros cuando al menos un no muerto se encuentra dentro de esa área. Cualquier no muerto que comience su turno en esa área recibe 1d6 de daño radiante.
* Siempre que el yelmo tenga al menos un rubí, tienes resistencia al daño de fuego.
* Siempre que el yelmo tenga al menos un ópalo de fuego, puedes usar una acción y pronunciar una palabra de mando para hacer que un arma que estés sosteniendo estalle en llamas. Las llamas emiten luz brillante en un radio de 3 metros y luz tenue 3 metros adicionales. Las llamas son inofensivas para ti y para el arma. Cuando impactas con un ataque usando el arma en llamas, el objetivo recibe 1d6 de daño de fuego adicional. Las llamas duran hasta que uses una acción adicional para pronunciar de nuevo la palabra de mando, o hasta que sueltes o guardes el arma.

Tira un d20 si llevas puesto el yelmo y recibes daño de fuego como resultado de fallar una tirada de salvación contra un conjuro. Con un resultado de 1, el yelmo emite rayos de luz desde sus gemas restantes. Cada criatura a 18 metros del yelmo que no seas tú debe superar una tirada de salvación de Destreza CD 17 o ser alcanzada por un rayo, recibiendo daño radiante igual al número de gemas que haya en el yelmo. El yelmo y sus gemas quedan entonces destruidos.

name: Helm of Brilliance
desc:
This helm is set with 1d10 diamonds, 2d10 rubies, 3d10 fuego opals, and 4d10 opals. Gems removed from the helm crumble to dust. The helm loses its magic when all the gems are removed.

While wearing this helm, you gain the following benefits:

* You can use an action to cast one of the following spells (save CD 18) with the listed gem as its component: _daylight_ (opal), __fireball_  (fuego opal), _prismatic spray_ (diamond), or _wall of fire_  (ruby). The gem is then destroyed.
* If at least one diamond remains, the helm casts dim ligera in a 30-pie radius if at least one undead is within 30 pies. Any undead that starts its turn in the ligera recibe 1d6 daño radiante.
* If at least one ruby remains, you have resistance to daño de fuego.
* If at least one fuego opal remains, you can use an action to speak a command word and cause a weapon you are holding to erupt in flames, causing it to deal an extra 1d6 daño de fuego on a hit. The flames cast bright ligera in a 10-pie radius and dim ligera for an additional 10 pies. The flames last until you use a acción adicional to speak the command word or you release the weapon.
* Whenever you fail a _tirada de salvación_  against a spell and take daño de fuego as a result, roll a d20\. On a 1, ligera blazes from the remaining gems. cada criatura within 60 pies other than you debe tener éxito en a CD 17 tirada de salvación de Destreza or take daño radiante equal to the number of gems in the helm. The helm and the remaining gems are then destroyed.

name: Helm of Comprehending Languages
desc: Mientras llevas puesto este yelmo, puedes usar una acción para lanzar el conjuro _comprehend languages_ desde él a voluntad.

name: Helm of Comprehending Languages
desc: While wearing this helm, you can use an action to cast __comprehend languages_ at will.

name: Helm of Telepathy
desc:
Mientras llevas puesto este yelmo, puedes usar una acción para lanzar el conjuro _detect thoughts_ (CD de salvación 13) desde él. Mientras mantengas la concentración en el conjuro, puedes usar una acción adicional para enviar un mensaje telepático a la criatura en la que estés concentrado. Ella puede responder —usando una acción adicional para hacerlo— mientras mantengas el foco sobre ella.

Mientras te concentras en una criatura con _detect thoughts_, puedes usar una acción para lanzar el conjuro _suggestion_ (CD de salvación 13) desde el yelmo sobre esa criatura. Una vez usada, la propiedad de _suggestion_ no puede volver a usarse hasta el siguiente amanecer.

name: Helm of Telepathy
desc:
While wearing this helm, you gain the following benefits:

* You can use an action to cast _detect thoughts_ (save CD 13) at will. While maintaining _concentration_ , you can use a acción adicional to send a telepathic message to a criatura you are focused on. It can reply with a acción adicional while you are focused on it. If a criatura successfully saves against this property, it becomes immune to it for 24 horas.

Once between _long rests_ , while focusing on a criatura with _detect thoughts_ you can use an action to cast __suggestion_  (save CD 13) on that criatura.

name: Helm of Teleportation
desc: Este yelmo tiene 3 cargas. Mientras lo llevas puesto, puedes usar una acción y gastar 1 carga para lanzar el conjuro _teleport_ desde él. El yelmo recupera 1d3 cargas gastadas cada día al amanecer.

name: Helm of Teleportation
desc: While wearing this helm you can use an action to cast _teleport_ . The helm has 3 charges and regains 1d3 charges each dawn.

name: Helm of the Slashing Fin
desc: While wearing this helm, you can use an action to speak its command word to gain the ability to breathe underwater, but you lose the ability to breathe air. You can speak its command word again or remove the helm as an action to end this effect.

name: Hewer's Draught
desc: When you drink this potion, you have ventaja on attack rolls made with weapons that deal perforante or daño cortante for 1 minuto. This potion's translucent amber liquid glimmers when agitated.

name: Hexen Blade
desc: The colorful surface of this sleek adamantine shortsword exhibits a perpetually shifting, iridescent sheen. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. The sword has 5 charges and regains 1d4 + 1 charges daily at dawn. While holding it, you can use an action and expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from it, using CD de salvación del conjuro 15: disguise self (1 charge), hypnotic pattern (3 charges), or mirror image (2 charges).

name: Hidden Armament
desc: While holding this magic weapon, you can use an action to transform it into a tattoo on the palm of your hand. You can use a acción adicional to transform the tattoo back into a weapon.

name: Holy Avenger
desc:
Obtienes un bonificador de +3 a las tiradas de ataque y de daño realizadas con esta arma mágica. Cuando impactas a un infernal o a un no muerto con ella, esa criatura recibe 2d10 de daño radiante adicional.

Mientras sostienes la espada desenvainada, crea un aura en un radio de 3 metros a tu alrededor. Tú y todas las criaturas que te sean afines dentro del aura tenéis ventaja en las tiradas de salvación contra conjuros y otros efectos mágicos. Si tienes 17 o más niveles en la clase paladín, el radio del aura aumenta a 9 metros.

name: Holy Avenger
desc: You gain a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic sword. While you are attuned to the sword and use it to attack a fiend or undead, on a hit it causa an extra 2d10 daño radiante. In addition, while drawn the sword creates an aura in a 10-pie radius around you. You and friendly criaturas in the aura gain _advantage_  on _tirada de salvacións_  against spells and other mágico effects. If you have 17 or more levels in the herald class, the aura increases to a 30-pie radius.

name: Holy Verdant Bat Droppings
desc:
This ceramic jar, 3 inches in diameter, contains 1d4 + 1 doses of a thick mixture with a pungent, muddy reek. The jar and its contents weigh 1/2 pound. Derro matriarchs and children gather a particular green bat guano to cure various afflictions, and the resulting glowing green paste can be spread on the skin to heal various conditions. As an action, one dose of the droppings can be swallowed or applied to the skin. The criatura that receives it gains one of the following benefits: - Cured of paralysis or petrification
- Reduces agotamiento level by one
- Regains 50 puntos de golpe

name: Honey Buckle
desc: While wearing this bear head-shaped belt buckle, you can use an action to cast polymorph on yourself, transforming into a type of bear determined by the type of belt buckle you are wearing. While you are in the form of a bear, you retain your Inteligencia, Sabiduría, and Carisma scores. In addition, you don’t need to maintain Concentración on the spell, and the transformation lasts for 1 hora, until you use a acción adicional to revert to your normal form, or until you drop to 0 puntos de golpe or die. The belt buckle can’t be used this way again until the next dawn. Black Honey Buckle (Uncommon). When you use this belt buckle to cast polymorph on yourself, you transform into a black bear. Brown Honey Buckle (Rare). When you use this belt buckle to cast polymorph on yourself, you transform into a brown bear. White Honey Buckle (Very Rare). When you use this belt buckle to cast polymorph on yourself, you transform into a polar bear.

name: Honey Lamp
desc: Honey lamps, made from glowing honey encased in beeswax, shed ligera as a lamp. Though the lamps are often found in the shape of a globe, the honey can also be sealed inside stone or wood recesses.
