If the wax that shields the honey is broken or smashed, the honey crystallizes in 7 days and ceases to glow. Eating the honey while it is still glowing grants visión en la oscuridad out to a range of 30 pies for 1 week and 1 day.

name: Honey of the Warped Wildflowers
desc: This spirit honey is made from wildflowers growing in an area warped by magic, such as the flowers growing at the base of a wizard's tower or growing in a mágico wasteland. When you consume this honey, you have resistance to daño psíquico, and you have ventaja on Inteligencia tirada de salvacións. In addition, you can use an action to warp reality around una criatura you can see within 60 pies of you. The objetivo debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Inteligencia or be bewildered for 1 minuto. At the start of a bewildered criatura's turn, it must roll a die. On an even result, the criatura can act normally. On an odd result, the criatura is incapacitado until the start of its next turn as it becomes disoriented by its surroundings and unable to fully determine what is real and what isn't. You can't warp the reality around another criatura in this way again until you finish a descanso largo.

name: Honey Trap
desc: This jar is made of beaten metal and engraved with honeybees. It has 7 charges, and it regains 1d6 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the jar's last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the jar shatters and loses all its mágico properties. While holding the jar, you can use an action to expend 1 charge to hurl a glob of honey at a objetivo within 30 pies of you. Make a ataque a distancia roll with an attack bonus equal to your Destreza modifier plus your competencia bonus. On a hit, the glob expands, and the criatura is apresado. A criatura apresado by the honey can use an action to make a CD 15 Fuerza (Atletismo) or Destreza (Acrobacias) check (objetivo's choice). en un éxito, the criatura is no longer apresado by the honey.

name: Honeypot of Awakening
desc: If you place 1 pound of honey inside this pot, the honey transforms into an ochre jelly after 24 horas. The jelly remains in a dormant state within the pot until you dump it out. You can use an action to dump the jelly from the pot in an unoccupied space within 5 pies of you. Once dumped, the ochre jelly is hostile to todas las criaturas, including you. Only one ochre jelly can occupy the pot at a time.

name: Hopeful Slippers
desc:
A wish made from the innocent heart of a scullery maid created these mágico shoes, upon which she danced her way into a better life. You can only attune to these shoes if you are the first criatura to do so. When you attune to the shoes, they resize to perfectly fit your pies and your pies alone. During the day they take the form of simple wooden clogs, and by night the shoes transform into beautiful glass slippers that somehow hold your weight without breaking. 

While wearing these shoes as clogs, your Sabiduría score increases by 2 and you gain an expertise die on Trato con Animales checks. While wearing these shoes as glass slippers, your Carisma score increases by 2 and you gain an expertise die on Interpretación checks. 

Alternatively, you can use a acción adicional to shatter the glass slipper against the floor, sending shards exploding outward in a 10-pie radius. criaturas and objects in the area make a CD 15 Destreza _tirada de salvación_ , taking 8d6 mágico daño perforante en una salvación fallida or half as much en un éxito. Afterwards the area becomes _difficult terrain_ , and the remaining shoe becomes a mundane item.

name: Hope's Final Light
desc:
This fine silver _hooded lantern_ is lit with an everburning ligera that emanates no heat and burns a pale blue. With its filigreed hood down in the dark, it projects strange shadows on nearby walls which dance like those of a zoetrope, depicting stories of heroic triumph against all odds. Holding it lifts your spirits.

When you find this lantern, roll 2d6 – 2\. The result is its current charges. While carrying it,  
you can increase its current charges by sacrificing some of your own vitality. For each charge you add, your maximum hit dice are reduced by 1 and your current hit dice are reduced by the same amount (to a minimum of 0). The lantern can only hold a maximum of 10 charges at one time. If an effect would cause the lantern to expend more charges than it currently has, you immediately provide charges to meet the need. If you do not have enough hit dice to meet the cost, the effect fails.

If the lantern has 6 or more charges, the radius of its _bright light_  is doubled. If the lantern has 0 charges, it sheds no ligera. Charges can be expended in the following ways using your reacción (unless otherwise noted):

* aliados in the lantern’s bright ligera can use their reacción to spend 1 charge to add 1d12 to an _attack roll_ , _ability check_ , or _tirada de salvación_  after it’s rolled. You can use your own reacción to disallow this use.
* When a criatura in the lantern’s bright ligera is reduced to 0 puntos de golpe, you can expend 1 or more charges to roll 1d12 per charge expended. The criatura is conscious with puntos de golpe equal to the result.
* When a criatura in the lantern’s bright ligera recibe damage, you can project a shield over them. el daño is negated, and the lantern loses 1 charge per 10 damage negated (minimum 1).
* When a criatura in the lantern’s bright ligera is objetivoed by a spell or would be caught in the area of a spell, you can negate the spell’s effect on that criatura. The lantern loses charges equal to the spell’s level.

If _hope’s final light_ is missing any charges at dawn, roll 1d8\. On a 1, nothing happens. Otherwise, it regains all lost charges.

_**Curse.**_ Hope’s final ligera is a dangerous burden. If you have 0 hit dice remaining after providing charges to it, you are pulled into the lantern and are impossible to resurrect except by the direct intervention of a deity. The stories of criaturas who vanish in this way are depicted in the shadows it casts.

name: Horn of Blasting
desc:
Puedes usar una acción para pronunciar la palabra de mando del cuerno y luego soplarlo, lo que emite una explosión atronadora en un cono de 9m que puede oírse a 180m de distancia. Cada criatura en el cono debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Constitución CD 15. Si falla la tirada, la criatura sufre 5d6 de daño por trueno y queda ensordecida durante 1 minuto. Si tiene éxito, la criatura sufre la mitad del daño y no queda ensordecida. Las criaturas y los objetos hechos de vidrio o cristal tienen desventaja en la tirada de salvación y sufren 10d6 de daño por trueno en lugar de 5d6.

Cada uso de la magia del cuerno tiene un 20 por ciento de probabilidades de provocar que el cuerno explote. La explosión inflige 10d6 de daño por fuego a quien lo sopla y destruye el cuerno.

name: Horn of Blasting
desc:
You can use an action to speak the horn’s command word and blow it, emitting a thunderous blast in a 30-pie cone that is audible 600 pies away. cada criatura in the area makes a CD 15 Constitución _tirada de salvación_ . en una salvación fallida, a criatura recibe 5d6 daño de trueno and is _deafened_  for 1 minuto. en una salvación exitosa, a criatura recibe la mitad del daño and isn’t ensordecido. criaturas and objects made of glass or crystal have desventaja on the tirada de salvación and take double damage.

Each use of the horn’s magic has a 20% chance of making it explode, dealing 10d6 daño de fuego to you and destroying it.

name: Horn of Valhalla
desc:
Puedes usar una acción para soplar este cuerno. En respuesta, espíritus guerreros del Valhalla aparecen a 18m de ti. Utilizan las estadísticas de un berserker. Regresan al Valhalla tras 1 hora o cuando caen a 0 puntos de golpe. Una vez que uses el cuerno, no podrá volver a usarse hasta que hayan transcurrido 7 días.

Se sabe que existen cuatro tipos de _horn of Valhalla_, cada uno fabricado con un metal diferente. El tipo de cuerno determina cuántos berserkers responden a su llamada, así como el requisito para su uso. El DM elige el tipo de cuerno o lo determina aleatoriamente.

| d100   | Tipo de cuerno | Berserkers invocados | Requisito                                        |
|--------|----------------|----------------------|--------------------------------------------------|
| 01-40  | Plata          | 2d4 + 2              | Ninguno                                          |
| 41-75  | Latón          | 3d4 + 3              | Competencia con todas las armas sencillas        |
| 76-90  | Bronce         | 4d4 + 4              | Competencia con todas las armaduras medianas     |
| 91-00  | Hierro         | 5d4 + 5              | Competencia con todas las armas marciales        |

Si soplas el cuerno sin cumplir su requisito, los berserkers invocados te atacan. Si cumples el requisito, son amistosos contigo y con tus compañeros, y siguen tus órdenes.
rarity: rare (silver or brass), very rare (bronze) or legendary (iron)

name: Horn of Valhalla
desc:
You can use an action to blow this horn and summon the spirits of fallen warriors. These spirits appear within 60 pies of you and use the statistics for _berserker hordes_ . They return to Valhalla after 1 hora or when they drop to 0 puntos de golpe. Once you use the horn, it can’t be used again for 7 days.

Four types of _horn of Valhalla_ are known to exist, each made of a different metal. The horn’s type determines how many _berserker hordes_  answer its summons, as well as the requirement for its use. The Narrator chooses the horn’s type or determines it randomly.

__**Table: Horn of Valhalla**__
| **Horn**   | **Rarity** | **Cost**  | **Crafting Components**                                | **Berserker Hordes Summoned** |
| ---------- | ---------- | --------- | ------------------------------------------------------ | ----------------------------- |
| **Silver** | Rare       | 1,000 gp  | Silver sword pendant that has been carried into battle | 2                             |
| **Brass**  | Rare       | 5,000 gp  | Horn of a Celestial criatura                           | 3                             |
| **Bronze** | Very rare  | 10,000 gp | Horn of a _horned devil_                               | 4                             |
| **Iron**   | Legendary  | 75,000 gp | Horn that has been blown by a _solar_                  | 5                             |

name: Horseshoes of a Zephyr
desc: Estas herraduras de hierro vienen en un juego de cuatro. Mientras las cuatro herraduras están colocadas en los cascos de un caballo o criatura similar, permiten a la criatura moverse con normalidad mientras flota 10 centímetros por encima del suelo. Este efecto permite a la criatura cruzar o permanecer sobre superficies no sólidas o inestables, como el agua o la lava. La criatura no deja rastros e ignora el terreno difícil. Además, la criatura puede moverse a velocidad normal durante hasta 12 horas al día sin sufrir agotamiento por una marcha forzada.

name: Horseshoes of a Zephyr
desc:
These iron horseshoes come in a set of four. While all four shoes are affixed to the hooves of a horse or similar criatura, they allow the criatura to perform the following feats:

* Move normally while floating 4 inches above the ground, allowing it to cross or stand above nonsolid or unstable surfaces (such as lava or water).
* Leave no tracks and ignore _difficult terrain_ .
* Move its Velocidad for up to 12 horas a day without suffering _fatigue_  from a forced march.

name: Horseshoes of Speed
desc: Estas herraduras de hierro vienen en un juego de cuatro. Mientras las cuatro herraduras están colocadas en los cascos de un caballo o criatura similar, aumentan la velocidad de desplazamiento de la criatura en 9m.

name: Horseshoes of Speed
desc: These iron horseshoes come in a set of four. Once all four are affixed to the hooves of a horse or similar criatura, its Velocidad increases by 30 pies.

name: How to Make Fiends and Influence People
desc: The cracks in the deep green leather binding of this ancient book reveal an unwavering orange glow. After studying this book for 1 hora each day over the course of a year and a day, you gain permanent influence over one randomly determined humanoid on your plane, even if it is immune to being _charmed_ . This otherwise functions as the _suggestion_ spell (no _tirada de salvación_ ). The objetivo uses the statistics of a _cambion_ , but maintains its prior physical appearance. A __wish_ spell, or the destruction of the book via __disintegrate_  or similar magic, frees the criatura from this effect.

name: Howling Rod
desc: This sturdy, iron rod is topped with the head of a howling wolf with red carnelians for eyes. The rod has 5 charges for the following properties, and it regains 1d4 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Humble Cudgel of Temperance
desc: This simple, polished club has a studded iron band around one end. When you attack a envenenado criatura with this magic weapon, you have ventaja on the tirada de ataque. When you roll a 20 on an tirada de ataque made with this weapon, the objetivo becomes envenenado for 1 minuto. If the objetivo was already envenenado, it becomes incapacitado instead. The objetivo can make a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Constitución at the end of each of its turns, ending the envenenado or incapacitado condition on itself en un éxito. Formerly a moneylender with a heart of stone and a small army of brutal thugs, Faustin the Drunkard awoke one day with a punishing hangover that seemed never-ending. He took this as a sign of punishment from the gods, not for his violence and thievery, but for his taste for the grape, in abundance. He decided all problems stemmed from the “demon” alcohol, and he became a cleric. No less brutal than before, he and his thugs objetivoed public houses, ale makers, and more. In his quest to rid the world of alcohol, he had the humble cudgel of temperance made and blessed with terrifying power. Now long since deceased, his simple, humble-appearing club continues to wreck havoc wherever it turns up.

name: Humour Realignment Transfiguration
desc:
People seeking a permanent change to their body tend to avoid shapechanging magic—it’s costly and scarce, and the thought of a wayward dispel reverting you to your old form and triggering a wave of dysphoria is horrifying. Instead most seek out magics that gradually encourage the systems of their body to adopt a new form. These magics take many shapes: potions from an alchemist, a blessed amulet, a pouch of ritual ingredients from a wizard. 

Using the magic requires a 5 minuto ritual at the end of each _long rest_ . At the end of the first month, your outward appearance begins to take on the shape and characteristics of a form more comfortable to you. By the end of six months of use, your body fully shifts to your desired comfortable form. To maintain the new form you must continue to perform the ritual—ceasing it reverts these changes at the same pace. Any new form must be of the same heritage as your previous form. 

Most practitioners provide 3 months’ supply at a time to encourage you to regularly seek assessment from a transmutation expert and catch dangerous changes before they cause you trouble. Unsurprisingly, many transmutation wizards, alchemists, and priests of elven deities across the land chose their career so they could pursue this path without any gatekeepers.

name: Hungry Quasit
desc:
This Tiny bloodstone is carved in the shape of a grinning, pot-bellied _quasit_ . Whenever you would gain temporary puntos de golpe, you can choose to store them inside the quasit instead. Unlike normal temporary puntos de golpe, the puntos de golpe you store inside the quasit stack, although the maximum number of temporary puntos de golpe the quasit can hold at one time is equal to your Carisma modifier + your warlock level (minimum 1).

You can use an action to activate the quasit and gain all the temporary puntos de golpe currently stored inside it, which last for up to 1 hora. Whenever you activate the quasit, roll a d20\. On a result of 5 or less, you don’t gain any temporary puntos de golpe, and instead the _quasit_  animates and flies off never to be seen again.

name: Hunter's Charm
desc: This small fetish is made out of bones, feathers, and semi-precious gems. Typically worn around the neck, this charm can also be wrapped around your brow or wrist or affixed to a weapon. While wearing or carrying this charm, you have a bonus to attack and damage rolls made against your favored enemigos. The bonus is determined by the charm's rarity.

name: Hunter's Quiver
desc: You can pull an endless number of no mágico arrows from this quiver. An arrow disappears when it is fired or if it leaves your possession for longer than 1 minuto. While you carry the quiver, if no hostile criaturas are within 30 pies of you, you can use a acción adicional to aim, gaining _advantage_  on _ranged weapon attacks_  until the end of your turn.

name: Ice Riders
desc:
The magic focused in the soles of these boots enable you to traverse ice and snow as if it were solid, non-slippery ground. You ignore _difficult terrain_  created by frío conditions.

When traveling over snow, you leave only 1/2-inch deep footprints, enabling you to walk over deep drifts without the dangers of falling in. Similarly, you can step onto a floating chunk of ice without fear of tipping it over, although jumping onto the ice will “push” it in the direction of the jump.

name: Iceblink
desc: The blade of this weapon is cool to the touch and gives off a yellow-white radiance, shedding bright ligera in a 10-pie radius and dim ligera for an additional 10 pies. In temperatures above freezing, vapor wafts off the chilled blade. When you hit with an attack using this magic sword, the objetivo recibe an extra 1d6 daño de frío.

name: Idol of Light
desc:
This glass idol resembles a humanoid woman with a set of iridescent butterfly wings and a crystalline crown. The idol sheds bright ligera in a 10-pie radius and dim ligera for an additional 10 pies at all times. It has 10 charges and regains 1d6 + 4 charges each day if exposed to the ligera of dawn. You can expend the idol’s charges to produce the following effects:

* When you take radiante or daño necrótico, you can use your reacción to expend 1 charge and gain _resistance_  to that damage type for the next minuto or until you use this property again.
* As an action, you can expend 2 charges to make the idol shed ligera, as if by the __daylight_ spell, for 10 minutos.
* As an action, you can expend 3 charges to cast __dispel magic_ , objetivoing an illusion or necromancy spell. You can increase the espacio de conjuro level by one for each additional charge you expend.
* As a acción adicional, you can expend 4 charges to cause the idol to flare with blinding ligera. criaturas you choose within 30 pies debe tener éxito en a CD 13 Constitución _tirada de salvación_  or be _blinded_  until the end of your next turn. Undead make the save with _disadvantage_ .

name: Immovable Rod
desc: Esta vara plana de hierro tiene un botón en uno de sus extremos. Puedes usar una acción para presionar el botón, lo que hace que la vara quede mágicamente fija en su lugar. Hasta que tú u otra criatura use una acción para presionar el botón de nuevo, la vara no se mueve, aunque desafíe la gravedad. La vara puede soportar hasta 3.600 kilogramos de peso. Un peso mayor provoca que la vara se desactive y caiga. Una criatura puede usar una acción para realizar una prueba de Fuerza CD 30 y, si tiene éxito, mover la vara fija hasta 3m.

name: Immovable Rod
desc:
You can use an action to press this metal rod’s single button, magically fixing it in place where it defies gravity. To move the rod, you or another criatura must use an action to press the button again.

The rod can support up to 8,000 pounds of weight (if this is exceeded, the rod deactivates and falls). A criatura that attempts to move the rod needs to make a CD 30 Fuerza check, moving the rod up to 10 pies en un éxito.

name: Impact Club
desc: This magic weapon has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. When you hit a objetivo on your turn, you can take a acción adicional to spend 1 charge and attempt to shove the objetivo. The club grants you a +1 bonus on your Fuerza (Atletismo) check to shove the objetivo. If you roll a 20 on your tirada de ataque with the club, you have ventaja on your Fuerza (Atletismo) check to shove the objetivo, and you can push the objetivo up to 10 pies away.

name: Impaling Weapon
desc: When you attack a criatura with this magic weapon and roll a 20 on the tirada de ataque, you embed the weapon in the objetivo. If the objetivo is Medium or smaller and is within 5 pies of a wall or other solid object when you hit with this weapon, it is also apresado while the weapon is embedded. At the end of the objetivo's turn while the weapon is embedded in it, the objetivo recibe damage equal to the weapon's damage, with no additional modifiers. A criatura, including the objetivo, can use its action to make a CD 13 Fuerza check, removing the weapon from the objetivo en un éxito. You can remove the embedded weapon from the objetivo by speaking the weapon's command word.

name: Impossible Cube
desc:
At a glance this hand-sized item appears to be a metal framework in the simple shape of a cube, but when looked at more closely it becomes clear that the geometry of the framework is impossible with absurd angles, preposterous twists, and endpoints. Any attempt to follow the various lines and compositions to their conclusion is frustrating at best and truly maddening at worst. 

When a criatura with an Inteligencia score of 6 or higher sees the cube for the first time it makes a CD 10 Sabiduría _tirada de salvación_  or becomes compelled to study the cube further. When a criatura first studies the cube, it makes a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or suffers from the Terrorized short-term _mental stress effect_  and a compulsion to study the cube even further. A criatura that fails this tirada de salvación by 5 or more instead suffers from the Distorted Perceptions long-term mental stress effect. Any further inspection of the cube has no additional effect.

name: Incense of Recovery
desc: This block of perfumed incense appears to be normal, no mágico incense until lit. The incense burns for 1 hora and gives off a lavender scent, accompanied by pale mauve smoke that lightly obscures the area within 30 pies of it. Each spellcaster that recibe a descanso corto in the smoke regains one expended espacio de conjuro at the end of the descanso corto.

name: Infernal Carapace
desc:
This suit of terrifying   _2 full plate_ is engraved with Infernal runes that blaze with unholy power. You cannot attune to this armor if you have the Good alignment trait. While attuned to and wearing this armor, you gain the following benefits:

* Your AC increases by 2.
* You count as one size category larger when determining your carrying capacity.
* Your Fuerza score increases to 20\. This property has no effect if your Fuerza is equal to or greater than 20.
* You have _advantage_  on Fuerza checks and _tirada de salvacións_ .
* You can use a acción adicional and choose a criatura that can see you, forcing it to make a Sabiduría _tirada de salvación_  (CD 8 + your competencia bonus + your Carisma modifier) or become _frightened_  for 1 minuto. Once you have used this property a number of times equal to your competencia bonus, you cannot do so again until you finish a descanso largo.
* Your unarmed strikes and weapon attacks deal an extra 1d6 daño necrótico.
* Celestials, elementals, fey, and criaturas with the Good alignment trait have _disadvantage_  on _attack rolls_  made against you.

name: Inkpot of the Thrifty Apprentice
desc:
This appears to be nothing more than a mundane pot of ink. When you speak the command word and use a acción adicional to expend 1 charge, it fills with enough high quality and particularly durable ink of the color of your choice to fill 50 pages of parchment. This ink is extremely hard to remove from any surface, including cloth or flesh, and often recibe many days and washings to clean away. The ink cannot be used to inscribe spells, and when removed from the pot with anything but a quill the ink instantly dries. 

When you speak another command word and expend all 3 charges as an action, a 15-pie cone of ink erupts from the inkpot, coating anything and everything that it hits. criaturas in the area make a CD 10 Destreza _tirada de salvación_ . en un fallo, a criatura is _blinded_  until it spends an action cleaning the ink away from its eyes. 

The inkpot has 3 charges and regains 1d3 charges each dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20\. On a 5 or less, the inkpot loses its magic and becomes a mundane item.

name: Inspiring Pahu
desc:
This large bass drum is made from hearty kamani (a wood ligera in color and native to far away islands) covered in cured sharkskin. Carvings all around the instrument depict warriors engaged in song and dance around a Gigante funeral pyre, and a leather strap hangs from its side to secure the drum at the waist. When struck the drum creates a deep resonant sound that sets the tempo for a song, an excellent tool for motivating warriors before battle.

This drum has 2 charges and regains 1 charge each dawn. You can use a acción adicional to play it and expend 1 charge, focusing its energies on a living criatura that has 0 puntos de golpe and that you can see within 20 pies. Until the start of your next turn, the criatura has _advantage_  on death _tirada de salvacións_ .

Alternatively, you can use an action to play it and expend 2 charges. cada criatura within 30 pies of you that hears you play makes a CD 20 Constitución _tirada de salvación_ . en un éxito, a criatura gains inspiration. 

If you expend the last charge, roll a d20\. On a result of 5 or less, the sharkskin membrane covering the drum breaks and it becomes a mundane item.

name: Instant Fortress
desc:
Puedes utilizar una acción para colocar este cubo de metal de 2,5 cm en el suelo y pronunciar su palabra de mando. El cubo crece rápidamente hasta convertirse en una fortaleza que permanece hasta que uses una acción para pronunciar la palabra de mando que la disipa, lo cual solo funciona si la fortaleza está vacía.

La fortaleza es una torre cuadrada de 6m de lado y 9m de altura, con aspilleras en todos los lados y una almena en la cima. Su interior está dividido en dos plantas, con una escalera de mano a lo largo de una pared que las comunica. La escalera termina en una trampilla que da acceso al tejado. Al activarse, la torre tiene una pequeña puerta en el lado que te da la cara. La puerta solo se abre a tu orden, que puedes pronunciar como acción adicional. Es inmune al conjuro _knock_ y a magia similar, como la de un _chime of opening_.

Cada criatura en el área donde aparece la fortaleza debe superar una tirada de salvación de Destreza CD 15, sufriendo 10d10 de daño contundente si la falla, o la mitad si la supera. En cualquier caso, la criatura es empujada a un espacio desocupado fuera de la fortaleza pero adyacente a ella. Los objetos en el área que no se lleven puestos ni en la mano sufren este daño y son empujados automáticamente.

La torre está fabricada de adamantino y su magia impide que sea volcada. El tejado, la puerta y cada muro tienen 100 puntos de golpe,

inmunidad al daño de armas no mágicas salvo armas de asedio, y resistencia a todo el daño restante. Solo un conjuro _wish_ puede reparar la fortaleza (este uso del conjuro cuenta como replicar un conjuro de nivel 8 o inferior). Cada lanzamiento de _wish_ hace que el tejado, la puerta o un muro recuperen 50 puntos de golpe.

name: Instant Fortress
desc:
You can use an action to place this 1-inch metal cube on the ground and speak its command word. The cube rapidly grows into a fortress that remains until you use another action to speak the command word that dismisses it. The fortress can only be dismissed when it is empty. 

When activated, the cube transforms into a square tower, 20 pies on a side and 30 pies high, with arrow slits on all sides and a battlement atop it, with a small door on the side facing you. The door opens only at your command, which you can speak as a acción adicional (it is immune to spells like _knock_  and related magic, such as a __chime of opening_ .) The tower’s interior has two floors, with a ladder connecting them and continuing on to a trapdoor to the roof. 

cada criatura in the area where the fortress appears makes a CD 15 Destreza _tirada de salvación_ , taking 10d10 daño contundente en un fallo, or la mitad del daño en un éxito. In either case, the criatura is pushed to an unoccupied space next to the fortress. Objects in the area that aren’t being worn or carried take full damage and are pushed automatically.

The tower is made of adamantine, and its magic prevents it from being tipped over. The roof, the door, and the walls each have AC 20, 100 puntos de golpe, immunity to damage from no mágico weapons (excluding siege weapons), and resistance to all other damage. Only a _wish_  spell can repair the fortress (this use of the spell counts as replicating a spell of 8th-level or lower). Each casting causes the roof, the door, or one wall to regain 50 puntos de golpe.

name: Instrument of Irresistible Symphonies
desc: Once per week, you can use an action to speak a command word that causes this instrument to play its own beautiful music for 1 minuto. Choose a criatura you can see within 30 pies of the instrument that is able to hear the music. The criatura makes a CD 13 Carisma _tirada de salvación_  at the start of each of its turns or it is forced to dance in place for as long as the music plays. While the criatura dances, it is considered _grappled_ .

name: Interplanar Paint
desc: This black, tarry substance can be used to paint a single black doorway on a flat surface. A pot contains enough paint to create one doorway. While painting, you must concentrate on a plane of existence other than the one you currently occupy. If you are not interrupted, the doorway can be painted in 5 minutos. Once completed, the painting opens a two-way portal to the plane you imagined. The doorway is mirrored on the other plane, often appearing on a rocky face or the wall of a building. The doorway lasts for 1 week or until 5 gallons of water with flecks of silver worth at least 2,000 gp is applied to one side of the door.

name: Ioun Stone
desc:
Una _Ioun stone_ recibe su nombre de Ioun, una deidad del conocimiento y la profecía venerada en algunos mundos. Existen muchos tipos de _Ioun stone_, cada uno con una combinación única de forma y color.

Cuando usas una acción para lanzar una de estas piedras al aire, la piedra orbita tu cabeza a una distancia de 1d3 pies y te otorga un beneficio. A partir de entonces, otra criatura debe usar una acción para agarrar o atrapar la piedra con una red y separártela, ya sea superando una tirada de ataque contra CA 24 o superando una prueba de Destreza (Acrobacias) CD 24. Puedes usar una acción para coger la piedra y guardarla, poniendo fin a su efecto.

Una piedra tiene CA 24, 10 puntos de golpe y resistencia a todo el daño. Se considera un objeto que se lleva puesto mientras orbita tu cabeza.

**_Absorption (Muy Rara)_**. Mientras este elipsoide lavanda pálido orbita tu cabeza, puedes usar tu reacción para cancelar un conjuro de nivel 4 o inferior lanzado por una criatura que puedas ver y que te tenga a ti como único objetivo.

Una vez que la piedra haya cancelado 20 niveles de conjuros, se agota y se vuelve gris opaco, perdiendo su magia. Si eres el objetivo de un conjuro cuyo nivel sea superior al número de niveles de conjuro que le quedan a la piedra, esta no puede cancelarlo.

**_Agility (Muy Rara)_**. Tu puntuación de Destreza aumenta en 2, hasta un máximo de 20, mientras esta esfera rojo oscuro orbita tu cabeza.

**_Awareness (Rara)_**. No puedes ser sorprendido mientras este romboide azul oscuro orbita tu cabeza.

**_Fortitude (Muy Rara)_**. Tu puntuación de Constitución aumenta en 2, hasta un máximo de 20, mientras este romboide rosa orbita tu cabeza.

**_Greater Absorption (Legendaria)_**. Mientras este elipsoide jaspeado de lavanda y verde orbita tu cabeza, puedes usar tu reacción para cancelar un conjuro de nivel 8 o inferior lanzado por una criatura que puedas ver y que te tenga a ti como único objetivo.

Una vez que la piedra haya cancelado 50 niveles de conjuros, se agota y se vuelve gris opaco, perdiendo su magia. Si eres el objetivo de un conjuro cuyo nivel sea superior al número de niveles de conjuro que le quedan a la piedra, esta no puede cancelarlo.

**_Insight (Muy Rara)_**. Tu puntuación de Sabiduría aumenta en 2, hasta un máximo de 20, mientras esta esfera azul incandescente orbita tu cabeza.

**_Intellect (Muy Rara)_**. Tu puntuación de Inteligencia aumenta en 2, hasta un máximo de 20, mientras esta esfera jaspeada de escarlata y azul orbita tu cabeza.

**_Leadership (Muy Rara)_**. Tu puntuación de Carisma aumenta en 2, hasta un máximo de 20, mientras esta esfera jaspeada de rosa y verde orbita tu cabeza.

**_Mastery (Legendaria)_**. Tu bonificador de competencia aumenta en 1 mientras este prisma verde pálido orbita tu cabeza.

**_Protection (Rara)_**. Obtienes un bonificador +1 a la CA mientras este prisma rosa polvoriento orbita tu cabeza.

**_Regeneration (Legendaria)_**. Recuperas 15 puntos de golpe al final de cada hora que este huso blanco nacarado orbite tu cabeza, siempre que tengas al menos 1 punto de golpe.

**_Reserve (Rara)_**. Este prisma púrpura vibrante almacena conjuros lanzados en él, reteniéndolos hasta que los utilices. La piedra puede almacenar hasta 3 niveles de conjuros a la vez. Cuando se encuentra, contiene 1d4 - 1 niveles de conjuros almacenados elegidos por el DM.

Cualquier criatura puede lanzar un conjuro de nivel 1 a 3 en la piedra tocándola en el momento del lanzamiento. El conjuro no tiene ningún efecto salvo quedar almacenado en la piedra. Si la piedra no puede contener el conjuro, este se consume sin efecto. El nivel de la ranura utilizada para lanzar el conjuro determina el espacio que ocupa.

Mientras esta piedra orbita tu cabeza, puedes lanzar cualquier conjuro almacenado en ella. El conjuro usa el nivel de ranura, la CD de salvación de conjuro, el bonificador de ataque de conjuro y la característica de lanzamiento de conjuro del lanzador original, pero por lo demás se trata como si tú lo hubieras lanzado. El conjuro lanzado desde la piedra deja de estar almacenado en ella, liberando espacio.

**_Strength (Muy Rara)_**. Tu puntuación de Fuerza aumenta en 2, hasta un máximo de 20, mientras este romboide azul pálido orbita tu cabeza.

**_Sustenance (Rara)_**. No necesitas comer ni beber mientras este huso transparente orbita tu cabeza.

name: Ioun Stone
desc:
Some say these enchanted gems take their name from a deity of knowledge, others that they are named for the sound they make as they gently orbit their bearer’s head. Whatever the case, there are many types of _ioun stones_, each imbued with powerful beneficial magic.

The specifics of these stones vary but they all work in essentially the same way: once you have attuned to it you can use an action to set a stone in a gentle orbit around your head, 1d4 pies away from you. Another criatura may use an action to try and take an orbiting stone, but debe realizar a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo against AC 24 or make a CD 24 Destreza (Acrobacias) check. An _ioun stone’s_ AC is 24, it has 10 puntos de golpe, and resistance to all damage. While orbiting your head, it is considered a worn item. You can use an action to seize and stow the stone, returning it to an inert and inactive state.

__**Table: Ioun Stones**__
| **Type**           | **Rarity** | **Cost**  | **Crafting Components**                                                               | **Property**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| ------------------ | ---------- | --------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| Absorption         | Very rare  | 10,000 gp | Refined negative energy                                                               | While this white marble sphere orbits your head, when a criatura you can see casts a spell of 4th-level or lower objetivoing only you, you can use your reacción to have the stone harmlessly absorb the spell, suffering no damage or negative effects. The stone can absorb 20 spell levels. If a spell is higher level than the available spell levels left in the stone, the spell cannot be absorbed. After absorbing 20 spell levels the stone loses its magic and turns a faded gray.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| Agility            | Very rare  | 15,000 gp | A cat’s dream captured in the Astral Plane                                            | While this ice-blue octahedron orbits your head your Destreza score is increased by 2 (to a maximum of 20).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| Awareness          | Rare       | 600 gp    | Phase spider’s eye                                                                    | While this bright red cylinder orbits your head, it chimes to keep you from being _surprised_ .                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| Fortitude          | Very rare  | 15,000 gp | Hoof or horn of a divine ox                                                           | While this bright pink dodecahedron orbits your head your Constitución score is increased by 2 (to a maximum of 20).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| Greater Absorption | Legendary  | 50,000 gp | Refined negative energy, shards from a destroyed __staff of power_                    | This gold and onyx ellipsoid draws powerful magic into it. While this gem orbits your head, it functions as an _ioun stone_ of _absorption_, but can absorb spells of 8th-level or lower, up to a maximum of 50 total spell levels.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| Perspicacia            | Very rare  | 15,000 gp | Tail feathers from an awakened owl                                                    | While this clear octahedron orbits your head your Sabiduría score is increased by 2 (to a maximum of 20).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| Intellect          | Very rare  | 15,000 gp | Canine teeth from an awakened fox                                                     | While this cobalt blue tetrahedron orbits your head your Inteligencia score is increased by 2 (to a maximum of 20).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| Leadership         | Very rare  | 15,000 gp | Collar from a loyal dog that died of old age                                          | While this brilliant yellow cube orbits your head your Carisma score is increased 2 (to a maximum of 20).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| Mastery            | Legendary  | 50,000 gp | The most treasured possession of a slain adventurer that redeemed themselves in death | While this jet icosahedron orbits your head, your competencia bonus is increased by 1.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| Protection         | Rare       | 1,000 gp  | Bone plate from a _stegosaurus_                                                       | While this dusty blue tetrahedron orbits your head, your AC is increased by +1.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| Regeneration       | Legendary  | 25,000 gp | _Basilisk's_  gizzard                                                                 | While this green and purple spindle orbits your head, you regain 15 puntos de golpe every hora, provided you have at least 1 punto de golpe.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| Reserve            | Rare       | 600 gp    | __Pearl of power_                                                                     | This radiante indigo prism encases a pearl and can store spells for later use. The stone can hold up to 3 spell levels and is typically found with 1d4 – 1 levels of stored spells. To store a spell in the stone, a criatura must cast a 1st-, 2nd-, or 3rd-level spell while holding it. The spell is drawn into the stone with no other effect. If there aren’t enough available levels to hold a spell, it cannot be stored. While the stone is orbiting you, you can cast any spell stored in it using the appropriate action. The spell uses the spell level, CD de salvación del conjuro, attack bonus, and spellcasting ability of the criatura that stored the spell, but you are considered to be the caster. Once a spell is cast, it is no longer stored. |
| Fuerza           | Very rare  | 15,000 gp | Canine teeth from an awakened bear                                                    | While this bright pink pentagonal trapezohedron orbits your head your Fuerza score is increased by 2 (to a maximum of 20).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| Sustenance         | Rare       | 525 gp    | Honeycomb from a Gigante bee beehive                                                    | While this delicate amber spindle orbits your head, when taking a descanso largo you can roll a d20\. On an 11 or higher, you do not require Supply during that _long rest_ .                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |

name: Iron Bands of Binding
desc:
Esta esfera de hierro oxidado mide 7,5 cm de diámetro y pesa 0,5 kg. Puedes usar una acción para pronunciar la palabra de mando y lanzar la esfera hacia una criatura de tamaño Grande o menor que puedas ver a 18m o menos de ti. Mientras la esfera se desplaza por el aire, se abre en una maraña de bandas de metal.

Realiza una tirada de ataque a distancia con un bonificador de ataque igual a tu modificador de Destreza más tu bonificador de competencia. Si impactas, el objetivo queda apresado hasta que uses una acción adicional para pronunciar de nuevo la palabra de mando y liberarlo. Hacerlo, o fallar con el ataque, hace que las bandas se contraigan y vuelvan a formar una esfera.

Cualquier criatura, incluida la apresada, puede usar una acción para realizar una prueba de Fuerza CD 20 e intentar romper las bandas de hierro. Si lo consigue, el objeto queda destruido y la criatura apresada queda libre. Si la prueba falla, cualquier intento posterior realizado por esa misma criatura falla automáticamente hasta que transcurran 24 horas.

Una vez que se hayan usado las bandas, no pueden volver a usarse hasta el siguiente amanecer.

name: Iron Bands of Binding
desc:
This smooth iron sphere conceals a formidable set of restraints that unfolds into metal bands when arrojadiza. Once between long rests you can use an action to throw it at a criatura within 60 pies, treating it as if it were a ataque a distancia con arma with which you are proficient. On a hit, if the criatura is Huge-sized or smaller it becomes _restrained_  until you use a acción adicional to speak a different command word and release it.

A criatura can try to break the bands by using an action to make a CD 20 Fuerza Check. en un éxito, the bands are broken and the _restrained_  criatura is freed. en un fallo, the criatura cannot try again until 24 horas have passed.

name: Iron Flask
desc:
Esta botella de hierro tiene un tapón de latón. Puedes usar una acción para pronunciar la palabra de mando del frasco, eligiendo como objetivo una criatura que puedas ver a 18m o menos de ti. Si el objetivo es originario de un plano de existencia distinto al que te encuentras, debe superar una tirada de salvación de Sabiduría CD 17 o quedar atrapado en el frasco. Si el objetivo ya ha sido atrapado anteriormente por el frasco, tiene ventaja en la tirada de salvación. Una vez atrapada, la criatura permanece en el frasco hasta ser liberada. El frasco solo puede contener una criatura a la vez. Una criatura atrapada en el frasco no necesita respirar, comer ni beber, y no envejece.

Puedes usar una acción para retirar el tapón del frasco y liberar a la criatura que contiene. La criatura es amistosa contigo y con tus compañeros durante 1 hora y obedece tus órdenes durante ese tiempo. Si no le das ninguna orden o le das una orden que probablemente resulte en su muerte, se defiende a sí misma pero no realiza ninguna otra acción. Al final de la duración, la criatura actúa conforme a su disposición y alineamiento normales.

Un conjuro _identify_ revela que hay una criatura dentro del frasco, pero la única forma de determinar el tipo de criatura es abrir el frasco. Una botella recién descubierta podría contener ya una criatura elegida por el DM o determinada aleatoriamente.

| d100  | Contenido               |
|-------|-------------------------|

| 51-54 | Demon (tipo 1)          |
| 55-58 | Demon (tipo 2)          |
| 59-62 | Demon (tipo 3)          |
| 63-64 | Demon (tipo 4)          |
| 65    | Demon (tipo 5)          |
| 66    | Demon (tipo 6)          |

| 70-73 | Devil (menor)           |

| 92-95 | Salamander              |
| 96    | Solar                   |
| 97-99 | Succubus/incubus        |
| 100   | Xorn                    |

name: Iron Flask
desc:
This dark iron bottle feels pesada in your hand. Engraved with powerful runes of binding, it is capable of trapping otherworldly criaturas. You can use an action to speak the command word and remove the silver stopper from the flask, objetivoing a criatura within 60 pies that is not native to the plane of existence the flask is currently on.

* If the _iron flask_ is empty and you can see the criatura, it makes a CD 17 Sabiduría _tirada de salvación_  or becomes trapped in the flask. A criatura that has previously been trapped in this flask has _advantage_  on this save. The trapped criatura is held in stasis—it doesn’t breathe, eat, drink, or age.
* As an action, you can release the criatura trapped within. A released criatura remains friendly to you and your aliados for 1 hora, during which it obeys your verbal commands, and afterward it acts normally. Without any commands or when given a command likely to result in its death, the criatura defends itself but otherwise recibe no actions.
* Casting _identify_ on this flask also reveals if a criatura is trapped within, but will not reveal the type. The only way to determine an _iron flask’s_ contents is to open the flask and release its inhabitant.
* Newly acquired _iron flasks_ may already have a trapped criatura, either chosen by the Narrator or determined randomly.

__**Table: Iron Flask**__

| 93       | Metallic dragon (any)    |

| 95       | Spirit dragon (any)      |
| 96       | _Couatl_                 |
| 97       | Succubus/Incubus         |
| 98       | Ghost from another plane |
| 99       | _Dragon turtle_          |
| 100      | _Xorn_                   |

name: Iron Foe Mace
desc:
Crafted with the ichor of a rust monster, this pale white mace looks and feels like bone, but has the heft of stone and consumes metal on impact. You gain +2 bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  made with this mágico mace. However, if your Fuerza score is less than 16 you suffer _disadvantage_  on attack rolls made with the mace.

On a successful attack, you can use your reacción to expend a charge and attempt to consume non-mágico metal armor or a shield worn by your objetivo, in addition to your normal damage. Alternately, when an attack misses you, you can use your reacción to spend a charge to deflect the weapon and attempt to consume it. Finally, you can use your action to spend a charge and touch the mace to any unattended non-mágico metal object of Medium size or smaller and consume it.

The wielder of an item you are trying to consume debe tener éxito en a CD 14 Constitución _tirada de salvación_ , otherwise the item is destroyed. Unattended objects are automatically destroyed. The mace has 4 charges and regains 1d4 charges each dawn.

name: Ironskin Oil
desc: This grayish fluid is cool to the touch and slightly gritty. The oil can cover a Medium or smaller criatura, along with the equipment it's wearing and carrying (one additional vial is required for each size category above Medium). Applying the oil recibe 10 minutos. The affected criatura has resistance to perforante and daño cortante for 1 hora.

name: Ironweed Rope
desc: When this tough, fibrous plant is carefully woven into rope it has AC 17, 10 puntos de golpe, and resistance to contundente, perforante, and daño cortante from ataques no mágicos.

name: Ivory Knights
desc:
These two ivory figurines look as though they belong with a chess set. If you and one other person hold one of the knights, you can use an action to whisper in the ear of the game piece to communicate with the criatura holding the other (as the _message_ truco).

If you and the person carrying the other figurine hold your game pieces to your hearts while within 120 pies of each other, you share a remembrance of two outmatched knights rushing into battle. Within the next minuto, each of you can use an action once to teleport to any point between your current positions. You each can teleport once, after which the figurines lose their power.

name: Ivy Crown of Prophecy
desc: While wearing this ivy, filigreed crown, you can use an action to cast the divination spell from it. The crown can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Jade Tiger
desc:
This jade figurine carries the memories of a _weretiger_  that spent years tracking and hunting its prey under the ligera of the jungle moon. When you attune to the item and keep it on your person, you gain an expertise die on Supervivencia checks made to find and follow tracks for up to 1 hora per day.

When you speak the _jade tiger's_ command word, you vividly recall one of the _weretiger’s_  most challenging hunts. For the next minuto, you can use a acción adicional to make a Sigilo check to hide immediately before or after you take the Attack action. The _jade tiger's_ magic forever fades away after being used in this way.

name: Járngreipr
desc: These iron gauntlets are required in order to handle the mighty _Mjölnir_ . Your Fuerza score is 19 while you wear these gauntlets. This benefit has no effect on you if your Fuerza is 19 or higher without them. The gloves have 5 charges. You can use your reacción to expend a charge to gain _advantage_  on a Fuerza check or Fuerza _tirada de salvación_ . The gloves regain 1d4+1 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Jarred Brain
desc:
A humanoid brain floats in formaldehyde within this glass and iron jar, the electrodes protruding from its lid sparking on occasion as the mass of tissue within twitches. You can use an action to gain a flash of Perspicacia by shocking your own mind with the jar’s electrodes, taking 1d6 daño de rayo. You gain 5 expertise dice to use on Inteligencia checks made in the next minuto, either individually or up to as many as 3 at a time. Once the jar is used in this way the sparks recede and it cannot be used in this way again for the next 24 horas. 

Alternatively, the brain can be wired up directly to the mind of another criatura. This process recibe 1 minuto and allows a criatura to consult the jarred brain about a specific course of action (as the spell __augury_ ), after which it malfunctions and shatters.

name: Javelin of Lightning
desc:
Esta jabalina es un arma mágica. Cuando la lanzas y pronuncias su palabra de mando, se transforma en un rayo, formando una línea de 1,5m de ancho que se extiende desde ti hasta un objetivo situado a 36m o menos. Cada criatura en la línea, exceptuando a ti y al objetivo, debe superar una tirada de salvación de Destreza CD 13, sufriendo 4d6 de daño por rayo si la falla, o la mitad si la supera. El rayo vuelve a convertirse en una jabalina cuando alcanza al objetivo. Realiza una tirada de ataque de arma a distancia contra el objetivo. Si impactas, el objetivo sufre el daño de la jabalina más 4d6 de daño por rayo.

La propiedad de la jabalina no puede volver a usarse hasta el siguiente amanecer. Mientras tanto, la jabalina puede seguir utilizándose como arma mágica.

name: Javelin of Lightning
desc: Once per dawn, when you throw this magic weapon and speak its command word it transforms into a 5-pie wide line of electricity that is 120 pies long. cada criatura in the area (excluding you) makes a CD 13 Destreza _tirada de salvación_ , taking 4d6 daño de rayo en una salvación fallida, or la mitad del daño en un éxito. The objetivo of your attack recibe the javelin’s normal damage plus 4d6 daño de rayo.

name: Javelin of Teleportation
desc:
This short-hafted javelin bears a long, metal head. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you hit a criatura with this weapon, you can speak its command word and fuerza the objetivo to make a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en una salvación fallida, the objetivo is teleported to an unoccupied space you can see within 60 pies of you. That space must be on the ground or on a floor.
  The javelin’s property can’t be used again until the next dawn. In the meantime, the javelin can still be used as a magic weapon.

name: Jeweler's Anvil
desc: This small, pie-long anvil is engraved with images of jewelry in various stages of the crafting process. It weighs 10 pounds and can be mounted on a table or desk. You can use a acción adicional to speak its command word and activate it, causing it to warm any nonferrous metals (including their alloys, such as brass or bronze). While you remain within 5 pies of the anvil, you can verbally command it to increase or decrease the temperature, allowing you to soften or melt any kind of nonferrous metal. While activated, the anvil remains warm to the touch, but its heat affects only nonferrous metal. You can use a acción adicional to repeat the command word to deactivate the anvil. If you use the anvil while making any check with jeweler's tools or tinker's tools, you can double your competencia bonus. If your competencia bonus is already doubled, you have ventaja on the check instead.

name: Jungle Mess Kit
desc: This crucial piece of Supervivencia gear guarantees safe use of the most basic of consumables. The hinged metal container acts as a cook pot and opens to reveal a cup, plate, and eating utensils. This kit renders any spoiled, rotten, or even naturally poisonous food or drink safe to consume. It can purify only mundane, natural effects. It has no effect on food that is magically spoiled, rotted, or envenenado, and it can't neutralize brewed poisons, venoms, or similarly manufactured toxins. Once it has purified 3 cubic pies of food and drink, it can't be used to do so again until the next dawn.

name: Justicar's Mask
desc: This stern-faced mask is crafted of silver. While wearing the mask, your gaze can root enemigos to the spot. When a criatura that can see the mask starts its turn within 30 pies of you, you can use a reacción to fuerza it to make a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría, if you can see the criatura and aren't incapacitado. en un fallo, the criatura is apresado. The criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito. Otherwise, the condition lasts until removed with the dispel magic spell or until you end it (no action required). Justicars are arbiters of law and order, operating independently of any official city guard or watch divisions. They are recognizable by their black, hooded robes, silver masks, and the rods they carry as weapons. These stern sentinels are overseen by The Magister, a powerful wizard of whom little is known other than their title. The Magister has made it their duty to oversee order in the city and executes their plans through the Justicars, giving them the Magister's mark, a signet ring, as a symbol of their authority. While some officers and members of the watch may be resentful of the Justicars' presence, many are grateful for their aid, especially in situations that could require magic. Justicar's are a small, elite group, typically acting as solo agents, though extremely dangerous situations bring them together in pairs or larger groups as needed. The Justicars are outfitted with three symbols of authority that are also imbued with power: their masks, rods, and rings. Each by itself is a useful item, but they are made stronger when worn together. The combined powers of this trinity of items make a Justicar a formidable fuerza in the pursuit of law and order.

name: Keffiyeh of Serendipitous Escape
desc: This checkered cotton headdress is indistinguishable from the mundane scarves worn by the desert nomads. As an action, you can remove the headdress, spread it open on the ground, and speak the command word. The keffiyeh transforms into a 3-pie by 5-pie carpet of volando which moves according to your spoken directions provided that you are within 30 pies of it. Speaking the command word a second time transforms the carpet back into a headdress again.

name: Knight-Sergeant's Surcoat
desc:
Fashioned from durable canvas and fine silk, this long, padded knight’s tabard bears the colors and heraldry of a long-forgotten order of knights. While wearing this surcoat, you have ventaja on Sabiduría (Trato con Animales) checks when interacting with horses, and you have ventaja on Carisma (Persuasión) checks made to interact with humanoids of a higher social rank than you, such as an army’s general or a region’s monarch.
  ***Knight’s Livery.*** While attuned to and wearing both the *knightsergeant’s surcoat* and the *argent mantle*, your Carisma score is 20. This has no effect on you if your Carisma is already 20 or higher.

name: Knockabout Billet
desc: This stout, oaken cudgel helps you knock your opponents to the ground or away from you. When you hit a criatura with this magic weapon, you can shove the objetivo as part of the same attack, using your tirada de ataque in place of a Fuerza (Atletismo) check. The weapon causa damage as normal, regardless of the result of the shove. This property of the club can be used no more than once per hora.

name: Kobold Firework
desc:
These small pouches and cylinders are filled with mágico powders and reagents, and they each have a small fuse protruding from their closures. You can use an action to ligera a firework then throw it up to 30 pies. The firework activates immediately or on initiative count 20 of the following ronda, as detailed below. Once a firework’s effects end, it is destroyed. A firework can’t be lit underwater, and submersion in water destroys a firework. A lit firework can be destroyed early by dousing it with at least 1 gallon of water.
 Blinding Goblin-Cracker (Uncommon). This bright yellow firework releases a blinding flash of ligera on impact. cada criatura within 15 pies of where the firework landed and that can see it debe tener éxito en a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Constitución or be cegado for 1 minuto. A cegado criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito.
 Deafening Kobold-Barker (Uncommon). This firework consists of several tiny green cylinders strung together and bursts with a loud sound on impact. cada criatura within 15 pies of where the firework landed and that can hear it debe tener éxito en a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Constitución or be ensordecido for 1 minuto. A ensordecido criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito.
 Enchanting Elf-Fountain (Uncommon). This purple pyramidal firework produces a fascinating and colorful shower of sparks for 1 minuto. The shower of sparks starts on the ronda after you throw it. While the firework showers sparks, cada criatura that enters or starts its turn within 30 pies of the firework debe realizar a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en una salvación fallida, the criatura has desventaja on Sabiduría (Percepción) checks made to perceive any criatura or object other than the firework until the start of its next turn.
 Fairy Sparkler (Común). This narrow firework is decorated with stars and emits a bright, sparkling ligera for 1 minuto. It starts emitting ligera on the ronda after you throw it. The firework sheds bright ligera in a 30-pie radius and dim ligera for an additional 30 pies. invisible criaturas and objects are visible as long as they are in the firework’s bright ligera.
 Priest ligera (Rare). This silver cylinder firework produces a tall, argent flame and numerous golden sparks for 10 minutos. The flame appears on the ronda after you throw it. The firework sheds bright ligera in a 30-pie radius and dim ligera for an additional 30 pies. An undead criatura can’t willingly enter the firework’s bright ligera by no mágico means. If the undead criatura tries to use teleportation or similar interplanar travel to do so, it must first succeed on a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Carisma. If an undead criatura is in the bright ligera when it appears, the criatura debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be compelled to leave the bright ligera. It won’t move into any obviously deadly hazard, such as a fuego or pit, but it will provoke opportunity attacks to move out of the bright ligera. In addition, each non-undead criatura in the bright ligera can’t be hechizado, asustado, or possessed by an undead criatura.
 Red Dragon’s Breath (Very Rare). This firework is wrapped in gold leaf and inscribed with scarlet runes, and it erupts into a vertical column of fuego on impact. cada criatura in a 10-pie-radius, 60-pie-high cylinder centered on the point of impact debe realizar a CD 17 tirada de salvación de Destreza, taking 10d6 daño de fuego en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one.
 Snake Fountain (Rare). This short, wide cylinder is red, yellow, and black with a scale motif, and it produces snakes made of ash for 1 minuto. It starts producing snakes on the ronda after you throw it. The firework creates 1 poisonous snake each ronda. The snakes are friendly to you and your companions. Roll initiative for the snakes as a group, which has its own turns. They obey any verbal commands that you issue to them (no action required by you). If you don’t issue any commands to them, they defend themselves from hostile criaturas, but otherwise take no actions. The snakes remain for 10 minutos, until you dismiss them as a acción adicional, or until they are doused with at least 1 gallon of water.

name: Kraken Clutch Ring
desc: This green copper ring is etched with the image of a kraken with splayed tentacles. The ring has 5 charges, and it regains 1d4 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn, as long as it was immersed in water for at least 1 hora since the previous dawn. If the ring has at least 1 charge, you have ventaja on grapple checks. While wearing this ring, you can expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from it, using CD de salvación del conjuro 15: black tentacles (2 charges), call rayo (1 charge), or control weather (4 charges).

name: Kraken Scale
desc:
This plump, palm-sized scale is pliant, and its mustard-green surface is tattooed with figures of sea monsters. It is also always slightly damp to the touch and gives off the faintest smell of brine.

When you are hit with an attack that would deal daño de rayo, you can, as a reacción before damage is dealt, press the scale to give yourself rayo _resistance_  until the start of your next turn. Each time you do, roll 1d20 and subtract the amount of damage prevented. If the total is less than 1, the scale pops with a burst of seawater and a splash of seawater bursts from it as it loses its mágico properties.

name: Kyshaarth's Fang
desc: This dagger's blade is composed of black, bone-like material. Tales suggest the weapon is fashioned from a Voidling's (see Tome of Beasts) tendril barb. When you hit with an attack using this magic weapon, the objetivo recibe an extra 2d6 daño necrótico. If you are in dim ligera or darkness, you regain a number of puntos de golpe equal to half the daño necrótico dealt.

name: Labyrs of the Raging Bull
desc: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. While you wield the axe, you have ventaja on Fuerza (Atletismo) checks to shove a criatura, and you can shove a criatura up to two sizes larger than you.

name: Lævateinn
desc:
Lævateinn was forged in the underworld by Loki (who of the Æsir is the one most associated with dwarves) near the doors of death itself, spoken of in the very late Eddic poem Fjölvinsmál. Some historians believe its translation ends with ‘wounding wand’ while others claim it is ‘wounding twig’, similar to the word for magic staff (gambantein). Either way it is this weapon and this weapon only that can kill the golden rooster Víðópnir (which sits in the branches of Yggdrasil and may be tied to Ragnarök, or possibly be another name for Gullinkambi) so that its wing joints (the only things that will suffice) can be used to distract the dogs guarding the flame-encircled castle holding Menglöð, a maiden fated to be married to the hero Svipdagr. The runed weapon awaits within however, protected by the jötunn Sinmara (a _storm giant_ ) who will only exchange it for a tail feather from the golden rooster—that can only be harmed by the very same sword, creating a paradoxical task. Its forger and the owner of the chest that contains it can reveal the secrets to bypassing the 9 locks holding its prison closed, although Loki would only ever do so if a cunning price is attached...

LÆVATEINN

Until you are attuned to this staff, it appears to be a rotting quarterstaff or battered longsword. After you have attuned to it however, runes glow along the length of the wood or the blade.

This staff can be wielded as a magic quarterstaff that grants a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it. While wielding it, you can use a acción adicional to transform it into a magic longsword or back.

The staff has 10 charges for the following properties. It regains 1d8+4 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20\. On a 1, the staff loses its properties and becomes a no mágico weapon (whichever form it is in when the last charge is expended).

While it is in staff form, the runes grant access to magic.

_**Spell Runes.**_ You can use an action to expend 1 or more of the staff’s charges to activate a rune and cast one of the following spells from it (CD de salvación del conjuro 18, +10 para impactar with spell attacks): __hideous laughter_  (1 charge), _speak with animals_  (1 charge), _pass without trace_  (2 charges), _dispel magic_  (3 charges), _speak with plants_  (3 charges), __confusion_  (4 charges), __glibness_  (8 charges). You can also use an action to cast the __charm person , disguise self ,_ or __vicious mockery_  spells from the staff without using any charges.

While it is in longsword form, the runes channel magic with less sutil and unleash lethal energies.

_**Death Rune.**_ You can use a acción adicional and 1 charge to activate this rune, causing shadows to flow out from the weapon for 1 minuto. These shadows reduce _dim light_  in a 40-pie radius to _darkness_ , and bright ligera in a 20-pie radius to dim ligera. While the weapon is shadowed, it causa an extra 2d6 daño necrótico to any objetivo it hits. The shadows last until you use a acción adicional to speak the command word again, the duration expires, or until you drop the weapon.

_**Flame Rune.**_ You can use a acción adicional and 1 charge to activate this rune, causing flames to erupt from the weapon for 1 minuto. These flames shed _bright light_  in a 40-pie radius and dim ligera for an additional 40 pies. While the weapon is ablaze, it causa an extra 2d6 daño de fuego to any objetivo it hits. The flames last until you use a acción adicional to speak the command word again, the duration expires, or until you drop the weapon.

name: Language Pyramid
desc: Script from dozens of languages flows across this sandstone pyramid's surface. While holding or carrying the pyramid, you understand the literal meaning of any spoken language that you hear. In addition, you understand any written language that you see, but you must be touching the surface on which the words are written. It recibe 1 minuto to read one page of text. The pyramid has 3 charges, and it regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. You can use an action to expend 1 of its charges to imbue yourself with mágico speech for 1 hora. For the duration, any criatura that knows at least one language and that can hear you entiende any words you speak. In addition, you can use an action to expend 1 of the pyramid's charges to imbue up to six criaturas within 30 pies of you with mágico understanding for 1 hora. For the duration, each objetivo can understand any spoken language that it hears.

name: Lantern of Auspex
desc: This elaborate lantern is covered in simple glyphs, and its glass panels are intricately etched. Two of the panels depict a robed woman holding out a single hand, while the other two panels depict the same woman with her face partially obscured by a hand of cards. The lantern's magic is activated when it is lit, which requires an action. Once lit, the lantern sheds bright ligera in a 30-pie radius and dim ligera for an additional 30 pies for 1 hora. You can use an action to open or close one of the glass panels on the lantern. If you open a panel, a vision of a random event that happened or that might happen plays out in the ligera's area. Closing a panel stops the vision. The visions are shown as nondescript smoky apparitions that play out silently in the lantern's ligera. At the GM's discretion, the vision might change to a different event each 1 minuto that the panel remains open and the lantern lit. Once used, the lantern can't be used in this way again until 7 days have passed.

name: Lantern of Judgment
desc:
This mithral and gold lantern is emblazoned with a sunburst symbol. While holding the lantern, you have ventaja on Sabiduría (Perspicacia) and Inteligencia (Investigación) checks. As a acción adicional, you can speak a command word to cause one of the following effects: - The lantern casts bright ligera in a 60-pie cone and dim ligera for an additional 60 pies. - The lantern casts bright ligera in a 30-pie radius and dim ligera for an additional 30 pies. - The lantern sheds dim ligera in a 5-pie radius.
- Douse the lantern's ligera. When you cause the lantern to shed bright ligera, you can speak an additional command word to cause the ligera to become sunlight. The sunlight lasts for 1 minuto after which the lantern goes dark and can't be used again until the next dawn. During this time, the lantern can function as a standard hooded lantern if provided with oil.

name: Lantern of Revealing
desc: Mientras está encendida, esta linterna con capucha consume 1 pinta de aceite cada 6 horas, emitiendo luz brillante en un radio de 9 m y luz tenue en 9 m adicionales. Las criaturas y objetos invisibles son visibles siempre que se encuentren dentro de la luz brillante de la linterna. Puedes usar una acción para bajar la capucha, reduciendo la luz a luz tenue en un radio de 1,5 m.

name: Lantern of Revealing
