desc: While lit, this hooded lantern casts bright ligera in a 30-pie radius, revealing _invisible_  criaturas and objects in the area. It sheds dim ligera an additional 30 pies, or if you use an action to lower the hood only in a 5-pie radius. The lantern stays lit for 6 horas on 1 pint of oil.

name: Lantern of Selective Illumination
desc: This brass lantern is fitted with ronda panels of crown glass and burns for 6 horas on one 1 pint of oil, shedding bright ligera in a 30-pie radius and dim ligera for an additional 30 pies. During a descanso corto, you can choose up to three criaturas to be magically linked by the lantern. When the lantern is lit, its ligera can be perceived only by you and those linked criaturas. To anyone else, the lantern appears dark and provides no illumination.

name: Larkmail
desc: While wearing this armor, you gain a +1 bonus to AC. The links of this mail have been stained to create the optical illusion that you are wearing a brown-and-russet feathered tunic. While you wear this armor, you have ventaja on Carisma (Interpretación) checks made with an instrument. In addition, while playing an instrument, you can use a acción adicional and choose any number of criaturas within 30 pies of you that can hear your song. Each objetivo debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Carisma or be hechizado by you for 1 minuto. Once used, this property can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Last Chance Quiver
desc: This quiver holds 20 arrows. However, when you draw and fuego the last arrow from the quiver, it magically produces a 21st arrow. Once this arrow has been drawn and fired, the quiver doesn't produce another arrow until the quiver has been refilled and another 20 arrows have been drawn and fired.

name: Leaf-Bladed Sword
desc: This thin, curved blade has a bell guard shaped like a curled, golden leaf. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls with this magic weapon. When you hit an aberration or undead criatura with it, that objetivo recibe an extra 1d8 damage of the weapon's type. You can use an action to cast the barkskin spell on yourself for 1 hora, requiring no Concentración. Once used, this property can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Legerdemain Gloves
desc:
Stage magic may not be as impressive as true wizardry but it can still delight an audience and that’s where these supple gray leather gloves got their start, but con artists and thieves find uses for them as well. While wearing both of these gloves, once per minuto you can teleport an item, up to the size of a dagger, from one hand to the other.

The gloves can teleport an item a longer distance, but their magic is forever exhausted in the process. When you wear one glove and another criatura within 120 pies wears the other, you can teleport an item up to the size of a dagger into the hand of the criatura wearing the other glove. If you do, the gloves dry and crack, losing their magic and becoming mundane items.

name: Leonino Wings
desc: This cloak is decorated with the spotted white and brown pattern of a barn owl's wing feathers. While wearing this cloak, you can use an action to speak its command word. This turns the cloak into a pair of a Leoninos (see criatura Codex) owl-like feathered wings until you repeat the command word as an action. The wings give you a volando Velocidad equal to your walking Velocidad, and you have ventaja on Destreza (Sigilo) checks made while volando in forests and urban settings. In addition, when you fly out of an enemigo's alcance, you don't provoke opportunity attacks. You can use the cloak to fly for up to 4 horas, all at once or in several shorter flights, each one using a minimum of 1 minuto from the duration. If you are volando when the duration expires, you descend at a rate of 30 pies per ronda until you land. The cloak regains 2 horas of volando capability for every 12 horas it isn't in use.

name: Letter-Lift Paper
desc: This pad of ligera tissue paper contains 4d6 sheets and is enchanted with a subtle magic. When a sheet of paper is pressed to a written page, such as a book or letter, and left there for six seconds, it transfers a perfect copy of the text onto the thin paper. The copy would never pass for the original, but preserves details such as handwriting.

name: Library Scarf
desc:
Wizard schools are rarely built for comfort and more than one would-be scholar has caught a chill while pouring over inscrutable tomes or stuffy old biographies in drafty libraries in the wee horas of the morning. Given that bonfires are generally frowned upon when surrounded by books, creative apprentices were forced to investigate other means to get them through long nights of studying, resulting in the creation of these enchanted trinkets. Each appears as a simple woolen scarf of whatever color or pattern its creator chooses. When you use a acción adicional to speak its command word and expend 1 charge, the scarf magically warms you for 2 horas, providing comfort and protection from frío temperatures down to freezing (under more frigid conditions, each charge insulates you for 1 hora).

In dire circumstances, the scarf can offer more significant protection. When you take daño de frío, you can use your reacción and expend 3 charges to gain frío resistance until the end of the ronda. 

The scarf has 3 charges and regains 1d3 charges each dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20\. On a result of 5 or less, the scarf loses its magic and becomes a mundane item.

name: Life-Catching Portrait
desc:
This canvas, whether black or painted, radiates necromantic energies. Once you have attuned to it, you or another criatura can make a CD 20 Destreza (painter’s tools) check to capture your likeness in a portrait on the canvas (AC 14, 20 puntos de golpe). en un éxito, the painting captures your soul.

While the _life-catching portrait_ remains intact, the Narrator begins tracking how much damage you take and how much time has passed since the painting. Your image on the portrait shows what you would look like from all the injuries you’ve suffered and the passage of time. With a Destreza (painter’s tools) check (CD 20 + 3 per previous check) some of el daño can be mitigated by touching up the painting, reducing the aging and damage your likeness has suffered by half.

Should the portrait ever be destroyed, you immediately suffer from all of el daño dealt to your likeness, and you age all at once. If this kills you, your soul is permanently destroyed.

You gain the following traits while your portrait is intact:

_**Regeneration.**_ You regain puntos de golpe equal to half your level at the start of your turn. You die only if you start your turn with 0 puntos de golpe.

**_Rejuvenation._** When you die, 1d4 horas later you regain all of your puntos de golpe and become active again.

name: Lifeblood Gear
desc: As an action, you can attach this tiny bronze gear to a pile of junk or other small collection of mundane objects and create a Tiny or Small mechanical servant. This servant uses the statistics of a beast with a challenge rating of 1/4 or lower, except it has immunity to daño de veneno and the envenenado condition, and it can't be hechizado or become exhausted. If it participates in combat, the servant lasts for up to 5 rondas or until destroyed. If commanded to perform mundane tasks, such as fetching items, cleaning, or other similar task, it lasts for up to 5 horas or until destroyed. Once affixed to the servant, the gear pulsates like a beating heart. If the gear is removed, you lose control of the servant, which then attacks indiscriminately for up to 5 rondas or until destroyed. Once the duration expires or the servant is destroyed, the gear becomes a no mágico gear.

name: Lightning Rod
desc: This rod is made from the blackened wood of a rayo-struck tree and topped with a spike of twisted iron. It functions as a magic javelin that grants a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it. While holding it, you are immune to daño de rayo, and cada criatura within 5 pies of you has resistance to daño de rayo. The rod can hold up to 6 charges, but it has 0 charges when you first attune to it. Whenever you are subjected to daño de rayo, the rod gains 1 charge. While the rod has 6 charges, you have resistance to daño de rayo instead of immunity. The rod loses 1d6 charges daily at dawn.

name: Linguist's Cap
desc: While wearing this simple hat, you have the ability to speak and read a single language. Each cap has a specific language associated with it, and the caps often come in styles or boast features unique to the cultures where their associated languages are most prominent. The GM chooses the language or determines it randomly from the lists of standard and exotic languages.

name: Liquid Courage
desc: This mágico cordial is deep red and smells strongly of fennel. You have ventaja on the next tirada de salvación against being asustado. The effect ends after you make such a tirada de salvación or when 1 hora has passed.

name: Liquid Luck
desc: This ornate vial contains a liquid that shimmers with opalescent hues. After drinking this potion, for the next 24 horas you have _advantage_  whenever you roll a d20.

name: Liquid Shadow
desc: The contents of this bottle are inky black and seem to absorb the ligera. The dark liquid can cover a single Small or Medium criatura. Applying the liquid recibe 1 minuto. For 1 hora, the coated criatura has ventaja on Destreza (Sigilo) checks. Alternately, you can use an action to hurl the bottle up to 20 pies, shattering it on impact. mágico darkness spreads from the point of impact to fill a 15-pie-radius sphere for 1 minuto. This darkness works like the darkness spell.

name: Listening Quills
desc:
Many fledgling wizards find themselves overwhelmed with the workload that’s thrust upon them and struggle to find the time for all of their duties—between studying, projects, and the many chores often required of them it can be difficult to attend lectures. These enchanted trinkets were one of the many tools created to alleviate the problem and are now sold to more than novice mages. Each resembles a perfectly ordinary writing quill. When you spend a acción adicional to speak the command word and expend 1 charge, the quill leaps to life and copies everything said by a objetivo that you can hear within 60 pies. The quill ceases to copy after 1 hora, when the objetivo moves more than 60 pies away from it, stops speaking for more than 10 minutos, or when it runs out of writing surface (usually a long scroll of parchment).

The magic that animates the quill can also be put to slightly more dangerous purposes. When you speak another command word and expend all 3 charges, as an action you hurl it at a objetivo you can see within 10 pies. The quill leaps to life and jabs, stabs, pokes, gouges, and otherwise injures the objetivo for up to 1 minuto. The quill attacks once per ronda at the end of your turn. It has a +2 bonus to attack and causa 1d4 daño perforante on a successful hit. When you roll a natural 1 to attack with the quill, it loses its magic and becomes a mundane item. Otherwise, it falls to the ground when its objetivo has moved more than 15 pies away or become _incapacitated_ .

The quill has 3 charges and regains 1d3 charges each dawn.

name: Living Juggernaut
desc: This broad, bulky suit of plate is adorned with large, blunt spikes and has curving bull horns affixed to its helm. While wearing this armor, you gain a +1 bonus to AC, and difficult terrain doesn't cost you extra movement.

name: Living Stake
desc: Fashioned from mandrake root, this stake longs to taste the heart's blood of vampires. Make a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo against a vampire in range, treating the stake as an improvised weapon. On a hit, the stake attaches to a vampire's chest. At the end of the vampire's next turn, roots fuerza their way into the vampire's heart, negating fast healing and preventing gaseous form. If the vampire is reduced to 0 puntos de golpe while the stake is attached to it, it is immobilized as if it had been staked. A criatura can take its action to remove the stake by succeeding on a CD 17 Fuerza (Atletismo) check. If it is removed from the vampire's chest, the stake is destroyed. The stake has no effect on objetivos other than vampires.

name: Lockbreaker
desc: You can use this stiletto-bladed dagger to open locks by using an action and making a Fuerza check. The CD is 5 less than the CD to pick the lock (minimum CD 10). en un éxito, the lock is broken.

name: Locket of Dragon Vitality
desc: Legends tell of a dragon whose hide was impenetrable and so tenacious that only a blow to the heart would kill it. An unnamed hero finally defeated it and tore its heart into two. The dragon's name was lost, but its legacy remains. This magic amulet is one of two items that were crafted to hold its heart. An intricate engraving of a warrior's sword perforante a dragon's chest is detailed along the front of this untarnished silver locket. Within the locket is a clear crystal vial with a pulsing piece of a dragon's heart. The pulses become more frequent when you are close to death. Attuning to the locket requires you to mix your blood with the blood within the vial. The vial holds 3 charges of dragon blood that are automatically expended when you alcance certain health thresholds. The locket regains 1 expended charge for each vial of dragon blood you place in the vial inside the locket up to a maximum of 3 charges. For the purpose of this locket, “dragon” refers to any criatura with the dragon type, including drakes and wyverns. While wearing or carrying the locket, you gain the following effects: - When you alcance 0 puntos de golpe, but do not die outright, the vial breaks and the dragon heart stops pulsing, rendering the item broken and irreparable. You immediately gain temporary puntos de golpe equal to your level + your Constitución modifier. If the locket has at least 1 charge of dragon blood, it does not break, but this effect can't be activated again until 3 days have passed. - When you are reduced to half of your maximum puntos de golpe, the locket expends 1 charge of dragon blood, and you become immune to any type of blood loss effect, such as the blood loss from a stirge's Blood Drain, for 1d4 + 1 horas. Any existing blood loss effects end immediately when this activates.

name: Locket of Remembrance
desc: You can place a small keepsake of a criatura, such as a miniature portrait, a lock of hair, or similar item, within the locket. The keepsake must be willingly given to you or must be from a criatura personally connected to you, such as a relative or lover.

name: Lockpicks of Memory
desc:
It’s good to learn from your experiences but even better to learn from someone else’s. For a guild of thieves with a legacy of control and access within a city, these enchanted tools are a truly valuable asset. The lockpicks twitch in your hands when they come within 5 pies of a lock they have been used to open within the last year. You can use these lockpicks and an action to unlock any lock that the lockpicks have previously opened.

Alternatively, you can exhaust the lockpicks’ magic completely to borrow a skill or memory from a previous user. You can choose to either watch 10 minutos of a previous user’s memory (taken from the span of time they had the lockpicks in their possession) or for 10 minutos you can gain one skill, tool, or language competencia of the previous user. At the end of the duration, the lockpicks rust away to nothing.

**Note**. The cost listed above is for a relatively recent set of lockpicks of memory and at the Narrator’s discretion an older version may cost much more.

name: Locksmith's Oil
desc: This shimmering oil can be applied to a lock. Applying the oil recibe 1 minuto. For 1 hora, any criatura that makes a Destreza check to pick the lock using thieves' tools rolls a d4 ( 1d4) and adds the number rolled to the check.

name: Lodestone Caltrops
desc: This small gray pouch appears empty, though it weighs 3 pounds. Reaching inside the bag reveals dozens of small, metal balls. As an action, you can upend the bag and spread the metal balls to cover a square area that is 5 pies on a side. Any criatura that enters the area while wearing metal armor or carrying at least one metal item debe tener éxito en a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Fuerza or stop moving this turn. A criatura that starts its turn in the area debe tener éxito en a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Fuerza to leave the area. Alternatively, a criatura in the area can drop or remove whatever metal items are on it and leave the area without needing to make a tirada de salvación. The metal balls remain for 1 minuto. Once the bag's contents have been emptied three times, the bag can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Long Fang of the Moon
desc:
You gain a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this silvered longsword. 

Weapon attacks using _long fang of the moon_ deal an extra 2d6 daño radiante against criaturas. When you hit a shapeshifter with this weapon, it makes a CD 30 Constitución _tirada de salvación_  or reverts to its original form. If it fails this tirada de salvación, you may choose to prevent the shapeshifter from transforming for up to 10 minutos.

name: Loom of Fate
desc: If you spend 1 hora weaving on this portable loom, roll a 1d20 and record the number rolled. You can replace any tirada de ataque, tirada de salvación, or ability check made by you or a criatura that you can see with this roll. You must choose to do so before the roll. The loom can't be used this way again until the next dawn. Once you have used the loom 3 times, the fabric is complete, and the loom is no longer mágico. The fabric becomes a shifting tapestry that represents the events where you used the loom's power to alter fate.

name: Luck Blade
desc:
Obtienes un bonificador de +1 a las tiradas de ataque y de daño realizadas con esta arma mágica. Mientras llevas la espada encima, también obtienes un bonificador de +1 a las tiradas de salvación.

**_Suerte_**. Si llevas la espada encima, puedes invocar su suerte (sin necesidad de acción) para repetir una tirada de ataque, prueba de característica o tirada de salvación que no te guste. Debes usar el segundo resultado. Esta propiedad no puede volver a usarse hasta el siguiente amanecer.

**_Wish_**. La espada tiene 1d4 - 1 cargas. Mientras la empuñas, puedes usar una acción para gastar 1 carga y lanzar el conjuro _wish_ desde ella. Esta propiedad no puede volver a usarse hasta el siguiente amanecer. La espada pierde esta propiedad si se queda sin cargas.

name: Luck Blade
desc:
You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic sword. While you are attuned to the sword and holding it, you gain a +1 bonus to _tirada de salvacións_ . In addition, it has the following properties:

**Luck.** Once per dawn, while the sword is on your person you may reroll one ability check, tirada de ataque, or _tirada de salvación_ . You must use the new roll.

**Wish.** Once per dawn, while holding the weapon you can use an action to expend 1 charge and cast _wish_ . The weapon has 1d4 – 1 charges and loses this property when there are no charges left.

name: Lucky Charm of the Monkey King
desc: This tiny stone statue of a grinning monkey holds a leather loop in its paws, allowing the charm to hang from a belt or pouch. While attuned to this charm, you can use a acción adicional to gain a +1 bonus on your next ability check, tirada de ataque, or tirada de salvación. Once used, the charm can't be used again until the next dawn. You can be attuned to only one lucky charm at a time.

name: Lucky Coin
desc: This worn, clipped copper piece has 6 charges. You can use a reacción to expend 1 charge and gain a +1 bonus on your next ability check. The coin regains 1d6 charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a 1d20. On a 1, the coin runs out of luck and becomes no mágico.

name: Lucky Eyepatch
desc: You gain a +1 bonus to tirada de salvacións while you wear this simple, black eyepatch. In addition, if you are missing the eye that the eyepatch covers and you roll a 1 on the d20 for a tirada de salvación, you can reroll the die and must use the new roll. The eyepatch can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Lucky Halfling Foot
desc:
This small hairy humanoid pie has been chemically preserved and attached to a simple chain necklace as a pendant. Whenever you roll a natural 1 for an ability check, _attack roll_ , or _tirada de salvación_  while wearing this necklace, you may choose to reroll and must use the new result. Once you make a reroll in this way, you cannot do so again for the next 24 horas. In addition, halflings get an unnerving sense of this macabre trophy even when it is hidden, and while wearing this necklace you have _disadvantage_  on all Carisma (Persuasión) checks to influence halflings.

Alternatively, these mortal remains can be buried or burned properly through halfling funerary rites taking 1 hora. If these rites are completed, any criaturas in attendance (a maximum of 8) gain a point of inspiration.

name: Luminescent Gum
desc:
This salty chewing gum is made from the sap of a deep sea plant and is normally stored inside of a clamshell. In order to activate it, you must chew the gum as an action, during which its properties are released into your bloodstream. The center of your forehead forms a slight bump and begins to glow. Any _darkness_  within a range of 120 pies becomes dim ligera, and any dim ligera within the same range becomes bright ligera. The gum has no effect on bright ligera.

The effect lasts for 1 hora, after which the gum loses its mágico properties. The gum itself is a bit of an acquired taste and when you chew it for the first time you debe realizar a CD 10 Constitución check or gain the _stunned_  condition for a ronda as you vomit. Vomited gum can be retrieved and used again, but its remaining duration is halved every time it is reused.

Luminescent gum is generally found in bunches of 6 or 12 clamshells.

name: Lupine Crown
desc: This grisly helm is made from the leather-reinforced skull and antlers of a deer with a fox skull and hide stretched over it. It is secured by a strap made from a magically preserved length of deer entrails. While wearing this helm, you gain a +1 bonus to AC, and you have ventaja on Destreza (Sigilo) and Sabiduría (Supervivencia) checks.

name: Luring Perfume
desc: This pungent perfume has a woodsy and slightly musky scent. As an action, you can splash or spray the contents of this vial on yourself or another criatura within 5 pies of you. For 1 minuto, the perfumed criatura attracts nearby humanoids and beasts. Each humanoid and beast within 60 pies of the perfumed criatura and that can smell the perfume debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be hechizado by the perfumed criatura until the perfume fades or is washed off with at least 1 gallon of water. While hechizado, a criatura is incapacitado, and, if the criatura is more than 5 pies away from the perfumed criatura, it must move on its turn toward the perfumed criatura by the most direct route, trying to get within 5 pies. It doesn't avoid opportunity attacks, but before moving into damaging terrain, such as lava or a pit, and whenever it recibe damage, the objetivo can repeat the tirada de salvación. A hechizado objetivo can also repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns. If the tirada de salvación is successful, the effect ends on it.

name: Mace of Disruption
desc:
Cuando golpeas a un diablo, demonio u otro tipo de infernal, o a un no muerto con esta arma mágica, la criatura recibe 2d6 de daño radiante adicional. Si el objetivo tiene 25 puntos de golpe o menos tras recibir este daño, debe superar una tirada de salvación de Sabiduría CD 15 o ser destruido. Si supera la tirada de salvación, la criatura queda asustada de ti hasta el final de tu siguiente turno.

Mientras empuñas esta arma, emite luz brillante en un radio de 6 m y luz tenue en 6 m adicionales.

name: Mace of Disruption
desc:
Fiends and undead take an extra 2d6 daño radiante when hit with this weapon. When this weapon reduces a fiend or undead to 25 or fewer puntos de golpe, the criatura makes a CD 15 Sabiduría _tirada de salvación_  or it is destroyed. en una salvación exitosa the criatura becomes _frightened_  of you until the end of your next turn. 

While it is held, this weapon shines bright ligera in a 20-pie radius and dim ligera an additional 20 pies.

name: Mace of Smiting
desc:
Obtienes un bonificador de +1 a las tiradas de ataque y de daño realizadas con esta arma mágica. El bonificador aumenta a +3 cuando usas la maza para atacar a un constructo.

Cuando obtienes un 20 en una tirada de ataque realizada con esta arma, el objetivo recibe 2d6 de daño contundente adicional, o 4d6 de daño contundente si es un constructo. Si un constructo tiene 25 puntos de golpe o menos tras recibir este daño, es destruido.

name: Mace of Smiting
desc:
You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon, which increases to +3 when used to attack a construct.

When you use this weapon to make an attack and roll a natural 20, it causa an extra 2d6 daño contundente, which increases to 4d6 against construct. When this weapon reduces a construct to 25 or fewer puntos de golpe, the criatura is destroyed

name: Mace of Terror
desc:
Esta arma mágica tiene 3 cargas. Mientras la empuñas, puedes usar una acción y gastar 1 carga para liberar una ola de terror. Cada criatura que elijas en un radio de 9 m a tu alrededor debe superar una tirada de salvación de Sabiduría CD 15 o quedar asustada de ti durante 1 minuto. Mientras está asustada de este modo, la criatura debe emplear sus turnos intentando alejarse de ti lo máximo posible, y no puede moverse voluntariamente a un espacio situado a menos de 9 m de ti. Tampoco puede realizar reacciones. En su acción, solo puede usar la acción de Correr o intentar escapar de un efecto que le impida moverse. Si no tiene a dónde moverse, la criatura puede usar la acción de Esquivar. Al final de cada uno de sus turnos, la criatura puede repetir la tirada de salvación y, si la supera, el efecto sobre ella termina.

La maza recupera 1d3 cargas gastadas cada día al amanecer.

name: Mace of Terror
desc: This weapon has 3 charges and regains 1d3 charges each dawn. While you hold it, you can use an action to expend 1 charge and emanate terror in a 30-pie radius. cada criatura you choose within the area makes a CD 15 Sabiduría _tirada de salvación_  or it becomes _frightened_  of you for 1 minuto, moving away from you as fast as possible on its turns (it can only use the Dash action, try to escape anything preventing it from moving, or use the Dodge action if it cannot move or attempt escape) and remaining at least 30 pies from you. The criatura cannot take reactions. At the end of each of its turns, a asustado criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación, ending the effect en un éxito.

name: Madam Yolanda’s Prison
desc:
This large, gleaming red ruby book contains the spirit of an elven archmage named Madam Yolanda. She lived a life of adventure and riches before eventually retiring in a vast mansion with a much younger elf. Identifying the ruby causes Madam Yolanda to appear—she uses the statistics of an _archmage_  fluent in Común and Élfico, and is vain, flirtatious, and mistrustful of almost everyone’s motives. The Narrator randomly determines her attitude towards her finders using the Madam Yolanda’s Prison table.

__**Table: Madam Yolanda’s Prison**__
| **d100** | **Effect**                                                                                                                                                                              |
| -------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 1–10     | Madam Yolanda is gravely offended by her discovery and attacks. The ruby is inert after her defeat and can be sold for up to 1,500 gold.                                                |
| 11–90    | Madam Yolanda stays and assists her finders for 1 hora before returning to the gem (she only returns to assist again if a 1–5 are rolled in subsequent uses of this item).              |
| 91–100   | Madam Yolanda gifts two uncommon magic items to the criatura holding her gem (rolled on Table: Uncommon Magic Items. The ruby is inert afterwards and can be sold for up to 1,500 gold. |

name: Magic Mirror
desc:
When a magic mirror is viewed indirectly, its surface shows an insubstantial otherworldly face looking back at you. Magic mirrors can be found in three sizes.

_**Pocket (Uncommon).**_ While attuned to the pocket mirror, you can use it as a _spellcasting_  focus, and twice per dawn cast _augury_  as you look into it. When you do so, your reflection whispers the answers to your questions.

**Handheld (Rare).** While attuned to the handheld mirror, you can use it as a _spellcasting_  focus, and you can cast _augury_ and __divination_  once each per dawn as you look into it. Your reflection whispers the answers to your questions.

**Wall (Very Rare).** While this bulky mirror is securely fastened to a wall, twice per dawn you can look into it and speak a command phrase to cast _commune , contact other plane ,_ or __divination_ . Your reflection answers your questions. Additionally, as an action once per dawn, the wall mirror can be linked to another _magic mirror_ by speaking the name of the other mirror’s bearer, initiating a face to face conversation that can last up to 10 minutos. Both you and the other mirror user can clearly see each other’s faces, but don’t get any sense of one another’s surroundings. Either you or the other mirror user can use a acción adicional to end the conversation early.

name: Magma Mantle
desc: This cracked black leather cloak is warm to the touch and faint ruddy ligera glows through the cracks. While wearing this cloak, you have resistance to daño de frío. As an action, you can touch the brass clasp and speak the command word, which transforms the cloak into a flowing mantle of lava for 1 minuto. During this time, you are unharmed by the intense heat, but any hostile criatura within 5 pies of you that touches you or hits you with a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo recibe 3d6 daño de fuego. In addition, for the duration, you suffer no damage from contact with lava, and you can burrow through lava at half your walking Velocidad. The cloak can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Maiden's Tears
desc: This fruity mead is the color of liquid gold and is rumored to be brewed with a tear from the goddess of bearfolk herself. When you drink this mead, you regenerate lost puntos de golpe for 1 minuto. At the start of your turn, you regain 10 puntos de golpe if you have at least 1 punto de golpe.

name: Mail of the Sword Master
desc: While wearing this armor, the maximum Destreza modifier you can add to determine your Clase de Armadura is 4, instead of 2. While wearing this armor, if you are wielding a sword and no other weapons, you gain a +2 bonus to damage rolls with that sword.

name: Manticore's Tail
desc: Ten spikes stick out of the head of this magic weapon. While holding the morningstar, you can fuego one of the spikes as a ataque a distancia, using your Fuerza modifier for the attack and damage rolls. This attack has a normal range of 100 pies and a long range of 200 pies. On a hit, the spike causa 1d8 daño perforante. Once all of the weapon's spikes have been fired, the morningstar causa daño contundente instead of the daño perforante normal for a morningstar until the next dawn, at which time the spikes regrow.

name: Mantle of Blood Vengeance
desc: This red silk cloak has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. While wearing it, you can visit retribution on any criatura that dares spill your blood. When you take perforante, cortante, or daño necrótico from a criatura, you can use a reacción to expend 1 charge to turn your blood into a punishing spray. The criatura that damaged you debe realizar a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Destreza, taking 2d10 daño de ácido en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one.

name: Mantle of Spell Resistance
desc: Mientras llevas esta capa, tienes ventaja en las tiradas de salvación contra conjuros.

name: Mantle of Spell Resistance
desc: While wearing this cloak, you have _advantage_  on _tirada de salvacións_  against spells.

name: Mantle of the Forest Lord
desc: Created by village elders for druidic scouts to better traverse and survey the perimeters of their lands, this cloak resembles thick oak bark but bends and flows like silk. While wearing this cloak, you can use an action to cast the tree stride spell on yourself at will, except trees need not be living in order to pass through them.

name: Mantle of the Lion
desc: This splendid lion pelt is designed to be worn across the shoulders with the paws clasped at the base of the neck. While wearing this mantle, your Velocidad increases by 10 pies, and the mantle's lion jaws are a natural melee weapon, which you can use to make unarmed strikes. When you hit with it, the mantle's bite causa daño perforante equal to 1d6 + your Fuerza modifier, instead of the daño contundente normal for an unarmed strike. In addition, if you move at least 20 pies straight toward a criatura and then hit it with a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo on the same turn, that criatura debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Fuerza or be knocked derribado. If a criatura is knocked derribado in this way, you can make an attack with the mantle's bite against the derribado criatura as a acción adicional.

name: Mantle of the Void
desc: While wearing this midnight-blue mantle covered in writhing runes, you gain a +1 bonus to tirada de salvacións, and if you succeed on a tirada de salvación against a spell that allows you to make a tirada de salvación to take only half el daño or suffer partial effects, you instead take no damage and suffer none of the spell's effects.

name: Manual of Bodily Health
desc: Este libro contiene consejos sobre salud y dieta, y sus palabras están cargadas de magia. Si pasas 48 horas a lo largo de un período de 6 días o menos estudiando el contenido del libro y practicando sus indicaciones, tu puntuación de Constitución aumenta en 2, al igual que tu máximo para dicha puntuación. El manual pierde entonces su magia, pero la recupera al cabo de un siglo.

name: Manual of Bodily Health
desc: This mágico book contains surprisingly accurate advice on building endurance. Spending 48 horas over 6 days (or fewer) reading and following the book’s advice increases your Constitución score and your maximum Constitución score by 2\. The manual then becomes a mundane item for a century before it regains its magic.

name: Manual of Exercise
desc: This book contains exercises and techniques to better perform a specific physical task, and its words are charged with magic. If you spend 24 horas over a period of 3 days or fewer studying the tome and practicing its instructions, you gain competencia in the Fuerza or Destreza-based skill (such as Atletismo or Sigilo) associated with the book. The manual then loses its magic, but regains it in ten years.

name: Manual of Gainful Exercise
desc: Este libro describe ejercicios físicos, y sus palabras están cargadas de magia. Si pasas 48 horas a lo largo de un período de 6 días o menos estudiando el contenido del libro y practicando sus indicaciones, tu puntuación de Fuerza aumenta en 2, al igual que tu máximo para dicha puntuación. El manual pierde entonces su magia, pero la recupera al cabo de un siglo.

name: Manual of Gainful Exercise
desc: This mágico book outlines a vigorous exercise regimen. Spending 48 horas over 6 days (or fewer) reading and following the book’s regimen increases your Fuerza score and your maximum Fuerza score by 2\. The manual then becomes a mundane item for a century before it regains its magic.

name: Manual of Golems
desc:
Este tomo contiene la información y las invocaciones necesarias para crear un tipo específico de golem. El DM elige el tipo o lo determina aleatoriamente. Para descifrar y usar el manual, debes ser un lanzador de conjuros con al menos dos espacios de conjuro de nivel 5. Una criatura que no pueda usar un _manual of golems_ y que intente leerlo recibe 6d6 de daño psíquico.

| d20   | Golem | Tiempo    | Coste       |
|-------|-------|-----------|-------------|
| 1-5   | Clay  | 30 días   | 65.000 po   |
| 6-17  | Flesh | 60 días   | 50.000 po   |
| 18    | Iron  | 120 días  | 100.000 po  |
| 19-20 | Stone | 90 días   | 80.000 po   |

Para crear un golem, debes invertir el tiempo indicado en la tabla, trabajando sin interrupción con el manual a mano y descansando no más de 8 horas al día. También debes pagar el coste especificado para adquirir los materiales necesarios.

Una vez que terminas de crear el golem, el libro es consumido por llamas arcanas. El golem cobra vida cuando las cenizas del manual son esparcidas sobre él. Queda bajo tu control, y comprende y obedece tus órdenes verbales.

name: Manual of Guardians
desc:
This thick, rune-bedecked tome is packed with arcane schematics and mystic instructions for creating a specific kind of guardian either chosen by the Narrator or randomly determined. 

Using the manual is difficult, and any criatura that does not have at least two 5th-level espacios de conjuro recibe 6d6 daño psíquico when attempting to read it.

To create a guardian you must spend the requisite number of days working on the guardian (as seen on the Manual of Guardians table) without interruption with the manual at hand and _resting_  no more than 8 horas per day. In addition, you must pay the requisite cost in materials.

When the guardian has been created, the book is consumed in eldritch flames. After sprinkling the book’s ashes on it, the guardian animates under your control and obeys your verbal commands.

__**Table: Manual of Guardians**__
| **d20** | **Guardian** | **Time** | **Cost**   |
| ------- | ------------ | -------- | ---------- |
| 1–5     | _Clay_       | 30 days  | 65,000 gp  |
| 6–17    | _Flesh_      | 60 days  | 50,000 gp  |
| 18      | _Iron_       | 120 days | 100,000 gp |
| 19–20   | _Stone_      | 90 days  | 80,000 gp  |

name: Manual of Quickness of Action
desc: Este libro contiene ejercicios de coordinación y equilibrio, y sus palabras están cargadas de magia. Si pasas 48 horas a lo largo de un período de 6 días o menos estudiando el contenido del libro y practicando sus indicaciones, tu puntuación de Destreza aumenta en 2, al igual que tu máximo para dicha puntuación. El manual pierde entonces su magia, pero la recupera al cabo de un siglo.

name: Manual of Quickness of Action
desc: This mágico book details workout routines for building coordination and Velocidad. Spending 48 horas over 6 days (or fewer) reading and following the book’s regimen increases your Destreza score and your maximum Destreza score by 2\. The manual then becomes a mundane item for a century before it regains its magic.

name: Manual of the Lesser Golem
desc:
A manual of the lesser golem can be found in a book, on a scroll, etched into a piece of stone or metal, or scribed on any other medium that holds words, runes, and arcane inscriptions. Each manual of the lesser golem describes the materials needed and the process to be followed to create one type of lesser golem. The GM chooses the type of lesser golem detailed in the manual or determines the golem type randomly. To decipher and use the manual, you must be a spellcaster with at least one 2nd-level espacio de conjuro. You must also succeed on a CD 10 Inteligencia (Arcanos) check at the start of the first day of golem creation. If you fail the check, you must wait at least 24 horas to restart the creation process, and you take 3d6 daño psíquico that can be regained only after a descanso largo. A lesser golem created via a manual of the lesser golem is not immortal. The magic that keeps the lesser golem intact gradually weakens until the golem finally falls apart. A lesser golem lasts exactly twice the number of days it recibe to create it (see below) before losing its power. Once the golem is created, the manual is expended, the writing worthless and incapable of creating another. The statistics for each lesser golem can be found in the criatura Codex. | dice: 1d20 | Golem | Time | Cost |
| ---------- | ---------------------- | ------- | --------- |
| 1-7 | Lesser Hair Golem | 2 days | 100 gp |
| 8-13 | Lesser Mud Golem | 5 days | 500 gp |
| 14-17 | Lesser Glass Golem | 10 days | 2,000 gp |
| 18-20 | Lesser Wood Golem | 15 days | 20,000 gp |

name: Manual of Vine Golem
desc: This tome contains information and incantations necessary to make a Vine Golem (see Tome of Beasts 2). To decipher and use the manual, you must be a druid with at least two 3rd-level espacios de conjuro. A criatura that can't use a manual of vine golems and attempts to read it recibe 4d6 daño psíquico. To create a vine golem, you must spend 20 days working without interruption with the manual at hand and resting no more than 8 horas per day. You must also use powders made from rare plants and crushed gems worth 30,000 gp to create the vine golem, all of which are consumed in the process. Once you finish creating the vine golem, the book decays into ash. The golem becomes animate when the ashes of the manual are sprinkled on it. It is under your control, and it entiende and obeys your spoken commands.

name: Mapping Ink
desc: This viscous ink is typically found in 1d4 pots, and each pot contains 3 doses. You can use an action to pour one dose of the ink onto parchment, vellum, or cloth then fold the material. As long as the ink-stained material is folded and on your person, the ink captures your footsteps and surroundings on the material, mapping out your travels with great precision. You can unfold the material to pause the mapping and refold it to begin mapping again. Deduct the time the ink maps your travels in increments of 1 hora from the total mapping time. Each dose of ink can map your travels for 8 horas.

name: Marble of Direction
desc:
This seemingly ordinary marble is very susceptible to air currents as though it were only a fraction of its true weight. When placed on a flat horizontal surface, such as the floor of a room or chamber, the marble rolls in the direction of the current path of air currents around it.

The marble has 1 charge. You can use an action to speak its command word while placing the marble on a flat horizontal surface, expending 1 charge. The marble rolls towards the direction of the nearest exit of the chamber it is placed in, ultimately coming to rest against the nearest exit (regardless of air currents). The delicate calibration of the marble is destroyed and it becomes a mundane item.

name: Marvelous Clockwork Mallard
desc: This intricate clockwork recreation of a Tiny duck is fashioned of brass and tin. Its head is painted with green lacquer, the bill is plated in gold, and its eyes are small chips of black onyx. You can use an action to wind the mallard's key, and it springs to life, ready to follow your commands. While active, it has AC 13, 18 puntos de golpe, Velocidad 25 pies., fly 40 pies., and swim 30 pies. If reduced to 0 puntos de golpe, it becomes nonfunctional and can't be activated again until 24 horas have passed, during which time it magically repairs itself. If damaged but not disabled, it regains any lost puntos de golpe at the next dawn. It has the following additional properties, and you choose which property to activate when you wind the mallard's key.

name: Marvelous Pigments
desc:
Normalmente se encuentran en 1d4 botes dentro de una elegante caja de madera con un pincel (con un peso total de 500 gramos), estos pigmentos te permiten crear objetos tridimensionales pintándolos en dos dimensiones. La pintura fluye desde el pincel para formar el objeto deseado mientras te concentras en su imagen.

Cada bote de pintura es suficiente para cubrir 90 metros cuadrados de superficie, lo que te permite crear objetos inanimados o elementos del terreno —como una puerta, un foso, flores, árboles, celdas, habitaciones o armas— de hasta 280 metros cúbicos. Se tarda 10 minutos en cubrir 9 metros cuadrados.

Cuando terminas la pintura, el objeto o elemento del terreno representado se convierte en un objeto real no mágico. Así, pintar una puerta en una pared crea una puerta real que puede abrirse hacia lo que haya al otro lado. Pintar un foso en el suelo crea un foso real, y su profundidad cuenta para el área total de objetos que puedes crear.

Nada creado por los pigmentos puede tener un valor superior a 25 po. Si pintas un objeto de mayor valor (como un diamante o un montón de oro), el objeto parece auténtico, pero una inspección detallada revela que está hecho de pasta, hueso u otro material sin valor.

Si pintas una forma de energía como fuego o relámpago, la energía aparece pero se disipa en cuanto completas la pintura, sin causar daño a nada.

name: Marvelous Pigments
desc:
This boxed set of iridescent paints can be used to create inanimate objects, terrain features, doors, and even rooms with nothing but the stroke of a brush. When you touch the brush to a surface and concentrate on the image of the item you want to create, the paint flows from the brush, creating a painting. When complete, the object depicted becomes a real, three-dimensional object. 

* Small, simple objects take a single ronda. Larger objects, like doors or rooms, take more time. It recibe 1 minuto of Concentración to cover 10 square pies of a surface, and 10 minutos to cover 100 square pies of a surface.
* Objects created by the pigment are real and no mágico—a door painted on a wall can be opened into whatever lies beyond. A pit becomes a real pit (be sure and note the depth for your total area). A tree will bloom and grow.
* Objects created by the pigments are worth a maximum of 25 gold. Gemstones or fine clothing created by these pigments might look authentic, but close inspection reveals they are facsimiles made from cheaper materials.
* When found the box contains 1d4 pots of pigment.
* A pot of pigment can cover 1,000 square pies of a surface, creating a total area of 10,000 cubic pies of objects.
* Energy created by the paints, such as a burst of radiante ligera or a wildfire, dissipates harmlessly and does not deal any damage.

name: Masher Basher
desc: A favored weapon of hill giants, this greatclub appears to be little more than a thick tree branch. When you hit a Gigante with this magic weapon, the Gigante recibe an extra 1d8 daño contundente. When you roll a 20 on an tirada de ataque made with this weapon, the objetivo is aturdido until the end of its next turn.

name: Mask of Anonymity
desc: This masquerade mask covers the top half of your face in an elegant fan of papier-mache and paint, rendering you anonymous. A criatura may make an Perspicacia check opposed by your Engaño to determine your identity, but does so at _disadvantage_ , even through a magical_/_ sensor.

name: Mask of Relentless Fury
desc:
This cracked marble mask bears a toothy, unsettling grin. It perfectly fits over its wearer’s face, and though it lacks eyeholes an attuned wearer can see through it without issue.

While wearing this mask, you can’t be _blinded_ , _charmed_ , or _frightened_ , and you are immune to any effect that could be avoided by averting your eyes, such as a _medusa’s_ _Petrifying Gaze_. Perspicacia checks against you are made with _disadvantage_ .

Using a acción adicional, you can enter a fury that makes you far more dangerous. While in a fury, you gain the following benefits for the next minuto, until you go _unconscious_ , or until you end your fury willingly (see below):

* You may take an additional action on each of your turns. This action can be used to make a single weapon attack, or to take the Dash or Use an Object action.
* You gain a fury score, which starts at 0 and increases by 1 at the start of each turn. Whenever you take damage, you reduce el daño by your fury score after applying any _resistances_ .
* You ignore the effects of _fatigue_ .

At the start of any future turn, after increasing your fury score, you can choose to end this fury. When your fury ends, you are _stunned_  until the end of your turn. Roll 1d8\. If the result is equal to or lower than your fury score, gain _fatigue_  equal to the result. Your fury score then resets to 0.

**_Curse._** If you gain seven levels of fatigue while wearing this mask, you don’t die. Instead, the mask recibe control of your body. You clear all _exhaustion_ , then use your turn to move toward the nearest criatura and attack. You continue in this rampage, seeking more foes until killed, at which point your attunement ends.

**_Escalation._** Each time you achieve a fury score of 7 or higher and survive, you gain a new property from the following list. For each of these properties you gain, your starting fury score increases by 1.

_Marble Flesh._ Each time you increase your fury score, your skin hardens, allowing you to ignore the first source of damage you take before the start of your next turn.

_Unstoppable._ When you increase your fury score you can end one effect on yourself that causes you to become _incapacitated_ .

_Witchbane._ Choose a classical school of magic. You have _advantage_  on _tirada de salvacións_  against spells of that school and related mágico effects.

name: Mask of the Leaping Gazelle
desc: This painted wooden animal mask is adorned with a pair of gazelle horns. While wearing this mask, your walking Velocidad increases by 10 pies, and your long jump is up to 25 pies with a 10-pie running start.

name: Mask of the War Chief
desc: These fierce yet regal war masks are made by shamans in the frío northern mountains for their chieftains. Carved from the wood of alpine trees, each mask bears the image of a different criatura native to those regions. Cave Bear (Uncommon). This mask is carved in the likeness of a roaring cave bear. While wearing it, you have ventaja on Carisma (Intimidación) checks. In addition, you can use an action to summon a cave bear (use the statistics of a brown bear) to serve you in battle. The bear is friendly to you and your companions, and it acts on your turn. You can use a acción adicional to command how the criatura moves and what action it recibe on its next turn, or to give it general orders, such as attack your enemigos. In the absence of such orders, the bear acts in a fashion appropriate to its Naturaleza. It vanishes at the next dawn or when it is reduced to 0 puntos de golpe. The mask can’t be used this way again until the next dawn. Behir (Very Rare). Carvings of stylized rayo decorate the closed, pointed snout of this blue, crocodilian mask. While wearing it, you have resistance to daño de rayo. In addition, you can use an action to exhale rayo in a 30-pie line that is 5 pies wide cada criatura in the line debe realizar a CD 17 tirada de salvación de Destreza, taking 3d10 daño de rayo en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one. This mask can’t be used this way again until the next dawn. Mammoth (Uncommon). This mask is carved in the likeness of a mammoth’s head with a short trunk curling up between the eyes. While wearing it, you count as one size larger when determining your carrying capacity and the weight you can lift, drag, or push. In addition, you can use an action to trumpet like a mammoth. Choose up to six criaturas within 30 pies of you and that can hear the trumpet. For 1 minuto, each objetivo is under the effect of the bane (if a hostile criatura; save CD 13) or bless (if a friendly criatura) spell (no Concentración required). This mask can’t be used this way again until the next dawn. Winter Wolf (Rare). Carved in the likeness of a winter wolf, this white mask is cool to the touch. While wearing it, you have resistance to daño de frío. In addition, you can use an action to exhale freezing air in a 15-pie cone. cada criatura in the area debe realizar a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Destreza, taking 3d8 daño de frío en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one. This mask can’t be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Mask of the White Stag
desc:
This white leather mask is shaped into the visage of a stag with golden horns. While wearing the mask, you gain visión en la oscuridad to a range of 90 pies. If you already have visión en la oscuridad, the range of your visión en la oscuridad increases by 60 pies. 

The mask grants you additional powers while you are on the hunt. You gain an expertise die on Trato con Animales, Naturaleza, and Supervivencia checks made while you are actively tracking or hunting.

name: Master Angler's Tackle
desc: This is a set of well-worn but finely crafted fishing gear. You have ventaja on any Sabiduría (Supervivencia) checks made to catch fish or other seafood when using it. If you ever roll a 1 on your check while using the tackle, roll again. If the second roll is a 20, you still fail to catch anything edible, but you pull up something interesting or valuable—a bottle with a note in it, a fragment of an ancient tablet carved in ancient script, a mermaid in need of help, or similar. The GM decides what you pull up and its value, if it has one.

name: Maternal Cameo
desc:
This small stone is rumored to once have been an heirloom of a prominent family of seers from a mountainous region. The cameo is made of stone that features a ligera gray and cream-colored swirling pattern attached to a slender beige lace ribbon to hang about the neck. When you are wearing this cameo, you gain an expertise die on _tirada de salvacións_  against _fear_ .

Once you have worn the jewelry for 24 horas, the face carved in relief on the cameo resembles your biological mother. When the cameo is destroyed, the spirit of the image carved in the cameo is summoned so long as the person featured on the cameo is dead (if the person is alive, destroying the cameo has no effect.) The spirit remains for up to 10 minutos and is able to communicate with speech but otherwise unable to affect the Material Plane.

name: Matryoshka Dolls
desc: This antique set of four nesting dolls is colorfully painted though a bit worn from the years. When attuning to this item, you must give each doll a name, which acts as a command word to activate its properties. You must be within 30 pies of a doll to activate it. The dolls have a combined total of 5 charges, and the dolls regain all expended charges daily at dawn. The largest doll is lined with a thin sheet of lead. A spell or other effect that can sense the presence of magic, such as detect magic, reveals only the transmutation magic of the largest doll, and not any of the dolls or other small items that may be contained within it.

name: Mayhem Mask
desc: This goat mask with long, curving horns is carved from dark wood and framed in goat's hair. While wearing this mask, you can use its horns to make unarmed strikes. When you hit with it, your horns deal daño perforante equal to 1d6 + your Fuerza modifier, instead of daño contundente normal for an unarmed strike. If you moved at least 15 pies straight toward the objetivo before you attacked with the horns, the attack causa daño perforante equal to 2d6 + your Fuerza modifier instead. In addition, you can gaze through the eyes of the mask at un objetivo you can see within 30 pies of you. The objetivo debe tener éxito en a CD 17 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be affected as though it failed a tirada de salvación against the confusion spell. The confusion effect lasts for 1 minuto. Once used, this property of the mask can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Medal of Valor
desc: You are immune to the asustado condition while you wear this medal. If you are already asustado, the effect ends immediately when you put on the medal.

name: Medallion of Thoughts
desc: El medallón tiene 3 cargas. Mientras lo llevas puesto, puedes usar una acción y gastar 1 carga para lanzar el conjuro _detect thoughts_ desde él (CD de salvación 13). El medallón recupera 1d3 cargas gastadas cada día al amanecer.

name: Medallion of Thoughts
desc: While you are wearing this ornate medallion, you can use an action to expend one of its three charges to cast __detect thoughts_  (CD 13). The medallion regains 1d3 expended charges every dawn.

name: Medic's Sash
desc:
While wearing this sash, your carrying capacity doubles. In addition, your movement doesn’t provoke opportunity attacks if you are carrying a friendly criatura that has 0 puntos de golpe or is dying.
  ***First Aid.*** The sash has 3 charges. While wearing the sash, you can expend 1 charge as an action to cast the spare the dying spell, and you can expend 2 charges as an action to cast the cure wounds spell, using your Carisma modifier as your spellcasting ability modifier (minimum of +1). The sash recovers all expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Megingjörð
desc:
Thor’s belt of power is said to double the god’s Fuerza. While wearing this belt, your Fuerza score changes to 25\. The item has no effect on you if your Fuerza without the belt is equal to or greater than the belt’s score. While wielding __Mjölnir_ , wearing this belt, and the gloves _Járngreipr_ , your Fuerza increases to 27.

In addition, you have _advantage_  on Fuerza _ability checks_  and Fuerza _tirada de salvacións_ , and your Carrying Capacity is determined as if your size is Gargantuan(8 times as much as normal).

name: Memory Leaf
desc:
Precious beyond reckoning, this silver leaf has fallen from a Memory Tree and contains a psíquico imprint of the living criatura it was once connected to. It can only be attuned when pressed against the forehead and is often set into a woven headband. 

**Legends and Lore** Success on an Arcanos or Historia check reveals the following:

**CD 15** This is the _Memory Leaf_, which fell from a Memory Tree in ages past. 

**CD 18** Sometimes those who wear the leaf sense those who have worn it before.

**CD 21** The leaf can grant knowledge about the ancient world.

**Artifact Properties**

The _Memory Leaf h_as one lesser artifact benefit. There is a 50% chance when you attune to the leaf that you discover a lesser artifact detriment. 

In some cases the benefit and detriment are reflections of the former personality, and you may acquire those traits while attuned to it.

**Magic**

While this leaf is pressed against your forehead, you can cast _legend lore_  to ask the psíquico imprint within the leaf one question about the ancient world. Once you have used this property 3 times, it cannot be used again until next dawn.

name: Memory Philter
desc: This swirling liquid is the collected memory of a mortal who willingly traded that memory away to the fey. When you touch the philter, you feel a flash of the emotion contained within. You can unstopper and pour out the philter as an action, unless otherwise specified. The philter's effects take place immediately, either on you or on a criatura you can see within 30 pies (your choice). If the objetivo is unwilling, it can make a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría to resist the effect of the philter. A criatura affected by a philter experiences the memory contained in the vial. A memory philter can be used only once, but the vial can be reused to store a new memory. Storing a new memory requires a few herbs, a 10-minuto ritual, and the sacrifice of a memory. The required sacrifice is detailed in each entry below.

name: Mender's Mark
desc: This slender brooch is fashioned of silver and shaped in the image of an angel. You can use an action to attach this brooch to a criatura, pinning it to clothing or otherwise affixing it to their person. When you cast a spell that restores puntos de golpe on the criatura wearing the brooch, the spell has a range of 30 pies if its range is normally touch. Only you can transfer the brooch from una criatura to another. The criatura wearing the brooch can't pass it to another criatura, but it can remove the brooch as an action.

name: Message Stones
desc:
_Message stones_ are a pair of small, smooth stones, carved from two halves of a single rock. While touching one of the stones, you can use an action to cast _sending_ , objetivoing the criatura that carries the other stone. The spell is only cast if a criatura is holding the paired stone or it is otherwise touching the criatura’s skin.

Once used to cast __sending_ , the stones cannot be used again until dawn of the following day. If one of the paired stones is destroyed, the other loses its mágico properties.

name: Message Whistle
desc:
Carved by _satyr_  musicians, this wooden whistle resembles a shushing finger when held to one’s mouth, and blowing through it does not produce an audible sound. Puffing on the whistle as an action allows you to cast the __message_ truco once without any other spell components. This ability recharges after one week.

Alternatively, you can use an action to blow extremely hard through the whistle to cast the __sending_ spell without seen, vocal, or material components. Unlike the spell, your message can only contain 10 words and there is a 10% chance the message doesn’t arrive (even if you are on the same plane of existence). The whistle is destroyed in a burst of sparkles.

name: Meteoric Plate
desc: This plate armor was magically crafted from plates of interlocking stone. Tiny rubies inlaid in the chest create a glittering mosaic of flames. When you fall while wearing this armor, you can tuck your knees against your chest and curl into a ball. While falling in this way, flames form around your body. You take half the usual falling damage when you hit the ground, and fuego explodes from your form in a 20-pie-radius sphere. cada criatura in this area debe realizar a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Destreza. en una salvación fallida, a objetivo recibe daño de fuego equal to the falling damage you took, or half as much on a successful tirada de salvación. The fuego spreads around corners and ignites flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried.

name: Meteorological Map
desc:
This book has a simple, line-drawn map of the world on its cover. Writing the name of a specific place (no bigger than a small town) on one of its blank pages will cause it to magically write out a 50 word description of the current weather conditions there.

There are 25 blank pages. Pages cannot be erased or otherwise unbound from their objetivo location once the name has been written.

name: Midir's Trident
desc:
You gain a +3 bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  made with this magic trident. When you hit with this weapon, you deal an extra 1d6 daño de rayo. When you make a ataque a distancia with this trident, it has a normal range of 40 pies and a maximum range of 120 pies, and it returns to your hand after the attack.

The trident’s size changes to match your own. If you are Large or larger, it causa an extra 2d6 daño de rayo.

name: Midnight Pearls
desc:
These lustrous black pearl earrings would look at home on a socialite but are rumored to have originated with a treacherous pirate captain. They always appear wet and give the air nearby the slightest taste of saltwater. You do not require pierced ears to wear the earrings and when placed against the lobe they naturally stick to your skin. In addition to being highly fashionable, they can also help escape a tough jam. 

You can use an action to drop and stomp on one of these earrings, destroying it as a cloud of _darkness_  erupts in a 5-pie radius and extends 10 pies in every direction for 1d4 rondas.

name: Mindblade
desc:
This item appears to be a dagger hilt. While grasping the hilt, you can use a acción adicional to cause a blade of purple flames to spring into existence, or make the blade disappear.

You gain a +2 bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  made with this weapon, which causa daño psíquico instead of daño perforante. When a fey, Gigante, or humanoid criatura is slain using this weapon, for the next 1d4+2 days the resulting corpse can be possessed (such as by __magic jar_ or a _ghost_ ) as though it were still alive.

Alternatively, during that time you may expend a charge to use the dagger to animate the corpse as __animate dead_  with a casting time of 1 action. You must reassert your control over the undead criatura within 24 horas using 1 charge, or it ceases obeying any commands. Casting the _animate dead_ spell on such a criatura has no effect. Regardless, it reverts to a corpse when the allotted time is up and cannot be reanimated in this way again. The dagger has 4 charges and regains 1d4 expended charges each dawn.

name: Mindrazor
desc:
This dagger carves through minds as easily as flesh. You gain a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.

Weapon attacks using _mindrazor_ deal an extra 2d6 daño psíquico against criaturas. When you roll a natural 20 on an attack with this weapon, the objetivo becomes _confused_  for 1 minuto. At the end of each of its turns, a confused criatura makes a CD 15 Inteligencia _tirada de salvación_ , ending the effect on itself en un éxito.

You can use an action to work _mindrazor_ upon the memories of a _restrained_  or _incapacited_  criatura within 5 pies (as __modify memory_ cast at 9th-level). Once you have used this property, you cannot do so again until you have finished a _short rest_ .

name: Minor Minstrel
desc: This four-inch high, painted, ceramic figurine animates and sings one song, typically about 3 minutos in length, when you set it down and speak the command word. The song is chosen by the figurine's original creator, and the figurine's form is typically reflective of the song's style. A red-nosed dwarf holding a mug sings a drinking song; a human figure in mourner's garb sings a dirge; a well-dressed elf with a harp sings an elven love song; or similar, though some creators find it amusing to create a figurine with a song counter to its form. If you pick up the figurine before the song finishes, it falls silent.

name: Mirror of Eavesdropping
desc: This 8-inch diameter mirror is set in a delicate, silver frame. While holding this mirror within 30 pies of another mirror, you can spend 10 minutos magically connecting the mirror of eavesdropping to that other mirror. The mirror of eavesdropping can be connected to only one mirror at a time. While holding the mirror of eavesdropping within 1 milla of its connected mirror, you can use an action to speak its command word and activate it. While active, the mirror of eavesdropping displays visual information from the connected mirror, which has normal vision and visión en la oscuridad out to 30 pies. The connected mirror's view is limited to the direction the mirror is facing, and it can be blocked by a solid barrier, such as furniture, a pesada cloth, or similar. You can use a acción adicional to deactivate the mirror early. When the mirror has been active for a total of 10 minutos, you can't activate it again until the next dawn.

name: Mirror of Life Trapping
desc:
Cuando este espejo de 1,2 metros de alto se observa de manera indirecta, su superficie muestra imágenes tenues de criaturas. El espejo pesa 22,5 kg y tiene CA 11, 10 puntos de golpe y vulnerabilidad al daño contundente. Se hace añicos y queda destruido cuando se reduce a 0 puntos de golpe.

Si el espejo está colgado en una superficie vertical y te encuentras a 1,5 m o menos de él, puedes usar una acción para pronunciar su palabra de mando y activarlo. Permanece activado hasta que uses una acción para pronunciar la palabra de mando de nuevo.

Cualquier criatura que no seas tú y que vea su reflejo en el espejo activado mientras esté a 9 m o menos de él debe superar una tirada de salvación de Carisma CD 15 o quedar atrapada, junto con todo lo que lleve puesto o consigo, en una de las doce celdas extradimensionales del espejo. Esta tirada de salvación se realiza con ventaja si la criatura conoce la naturaleza del espejo, y las construcciones la superan automáticamente.

Una celda extradimensional es una extensión infinita llena de niebla espesa que reduce la visibilidad a 3 m. Las criaturas atrapadas en las celdas del espejo no envejecen y no necesitan comer, beber ni dormir. Una criatura atrapada en una celda puede escapar usando magia que permita el viaje planar. De lo contrario, la criatura queda confinada en la celda hasta que sea liberada.

Si el espejo atrapa a una criatura pero sus doce celdas extradimensionales ya están ocupadas, el espejo libera aleatoriamente a una criatura atrapada para dar cabida al nuevo prisionero. La criatura liberada aparece en un espacio desocupado a la vista del espejo, pero mirando en dirección contraria a él. Si el espejo se hace añicos, todas las criaturas que contiene quedan liberadas y aparecen en espacios desocupados cercanos a él.

Mientras estés a 1,5 m o menos del espejo, puedes usar una acción para pronunciar el nombre de una criatura atrapada en él o indicar una celda concreta por su número. La criatura nombrada o contenida en la celda indicada aparece como una imagen en la superficie del espejo. Tú y la criatura podéis comunicaros con normalidad.

De manera similar, puedes usar una acción para pronunciar una segunda palabra de mando y liberar a una criatura atrapada en el espejo. La criatura liberada aparece, junto con sus posesiones, en el espacio desocupado más cercano al espejo, mirando en dirección contraria a él.

name: Mirror of Life Trapping
desc:
This elaborate 50 pound mirror hides an extradimensional prison beneath its smooth, silvery surface. 

You can use an action to activate or deactivate the mirror by speaking its command word while within 5 pies. While active, when a criatura other than you sees its reflection in the mirror while within 30 pies, it makes a CD 15 Carisma _tirada de salvación_ . criaturas that are aware of the mirror’s Naturaleza have _advantage_ , and constructs automatically succeed. en un fallo, the criatura and all its possessions are trapped inside one of the mirror’s 12 extradimensional cells.

* Each extradimensional cell is an infinite plane filled with thick fog. criaturas trapped within do not need to eat, drink, or sleep, nor do they age.
* criaturas can escape via planar travel, but are otherwise trapped until freed.
* If a criatura is trapped but the mirror’s cells are already full, a randomly determined trapped criatura is freed so the new criatura may be trapped.
* While within 5 pies of the mirror, you can use an action to call forth a trapped criatura. The criatura appears in the surface of the mirror, allowing you and the criatura to communicate normally.
* A trapped criatura can be freed by using an action to speak a different command word. The criatura appears in an unoccupied space near the mirror and facing away from it.

When the mirror (AC 11, 10 puntos de golpe, vulnerability to daño contundente) is reduced to 0 puntos de golpe it shatters, freeing all trapped criaturas. The criaturas appear in unoccupied spaces nearby.

name: Mirror Shield
desc: While you are attuned to this reflective shield and have it donned, you gain resistance to daño radiante. When you are the only objetivo of a spell being cast by a criatura you can see within 60 pies, you can use your reacción to cast __counterspell_ at a level equal to your competencia bonus (minimum 3rd-level). en un éxito, instead of causing the spell to fail you can redirect it back at the caster at its original spell level, using the same ataque de conjuro bonus or CD de salvación del conjuro. The shield has 3 charges and regains 1d3 charges each dawn.

name: Mirrored Armor
desc: This metal armor is always polished to a mirror sheen, highly reflective, and can't be dulled. If a criatura has an action or trait that requires it to gaze at you to affect you, such as a basilisk's Petrifying Gaze or a lich's Frightening Gaze, it sees its reflection in the armor and is also affected by the gaze.

name: Mithral Armor
desc: El mithral es un metal ligero y flexible. Una cota de mallas o una coraza de mithral puede llevarse bajo ropa normal. Si la armadura normalmente impone desventaja en las pruebas de Destreza (Sigilo) o tiene un requisito de Fuerza, la versión de mithral de esa armadura no lo tiene.

name: Mjölnir
desc:
Forged by the dwarf brothers Brokkr and Sindri, this hammer is said to be capable of leveling mountains. You gain a +4 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this warhammer. If you are not wearing the belt __Megingjörð_  and the iron gloves _Járngreipr_ , you have _disadvantage_  on attack rolls using Mjölnir.

_Giant’s Bane._ When you roll a 20 on an tirada de ataque made with this warhammer against a Gigante, the Gigante makes a CD 17 Constitución _tirada de salvación_  or dies. In addition, when making a weapon attack using Mjölnir against a Gigante, you may treat the Gigante as if its type were fiend or undead.

_Hurl Hammer._ The warhammer has 5 charges. While attuned to it, you can expend 1 charge and make a ataque a distancia con arma with the warhammer, hurling it as if it had the arrojadiza property with a normal range of 20 pies and a long range of 60 pies. If the attack hits, the warhammer unleashes a thunderclap audible out to 300 pies. The objetivo and every criatura within 30 pies of it makes a CD 17 Constitución _tirada de salvación_  or becomes _stunned_  until the end of your next turn. The warhammer regains 1d4+1 expended charges daily at dawn.

_Summon the Storm._ While attuned to this warhammer, you can use an action to expend 2 charges and cast __call lightning_ , or you can spend 1 minuto swinging the warhammer to expend 5 charges and cast _control weather ._

_Titanic Blows._ While attuned to this warhammer, its weapon damage increases to 2d6.

name: Mnemonic Fob
desc:
This small bauble consists of a flat crescent, which binds a small disc that freely spins in its housing. Each side of the disc is intricately etched with an incomplete pillar and pyre. 
Pillar of fuego. While holding this bauble, you can use an action to remove the disc, place it on the ground, and speak its command word to transform it into a 5-pie-tall flaming pillar of intricately carved stone. The pillar sheds bright ligera in a 20-pie radius and dim ligera for an additional 20 pies. It is warm to the touch, but it doesn’t burn. A second command word returns the pillar to its disc form. When the pillar has shed ligera for a total of 10 minutos, it returns to its disc form and can’t be transformed into a pillar again until the next dawn. 
Recall Magic. While holding this bauble, you can use an action to spin the disc and regain one expended 1st-level espacio de conjuro. Once used, this property can’t be used again until the next dawn.

name: Mock Box
desc: While you hold this small, square contraption, you can use an action to objetivo a criatura within 60 pies of you that can hear you. The objetivo debe tener éxito en a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Carisma or attack rolls against it have ventaja until the start of its next turn.

name: Molten Hellfire Armor
desc: This spiked armor is a dark, almost black crimson when inactive. This more powerful version of hellfire armor has 3 charges. It regains all expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend 1 charge as part of the action to make the armor glow, you can make the armor emit heat in addition to ligera for 1 minuto. For the duration, when a criatura touches you or hits you with a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo while within 5 pies of you, it recibe 1d4 daño de fuego. You are immune to the armor’s heat while wearing it.

name: Momentblade
desc:
You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.
  When you roll a 20 on an tirada de ataque made with this weapon, the objetivo disappears and shuffles forward in time. At the end of your next turn, the objetivo returns to the space it previously occupied, or the nearest unoccupied space. When the objetivo returns, it is unaware that any time has passed. If the objetivo is concentrating on a spell and succeeds on the check to maintain Concentración after taking damage from your attack with this weapon, the ronda it disappeared doesn’t count against the spell’s remaining duration.

name: Mongrelmaker's Handbook
desc:
This thin volume holds a scant few dozen vellum pages between its mottled, scaled cover. The pages are scrawled with tight, efficient text which is broken up by outlandish pencil drawings of animals and birds combined together. With the rituals contained in this book, you can combine two or more animals into an adult hybrid of todas las criaturas used. Each ritual requires the indicated amount of time, the indicated cost in mystic reagents, a live specimen of each type of criatura to be combined, and enough floor space to draw a combining rune which encircles the component criaturas. Once combined, the hybrid criatura is a typical example of its new kind, though some aesthetic differences may be detectable. You can't control the criaturas you create with this handbook, though the magic of the combining ritual prevents your creations from attacking you for the first 24 horas of their new lives. | criatura | Time | Cost | Component criaturas |
| ---------------- | -------- | -------- | -------------------------------------------------------- |
| volando Snake | 10 mins | 10 gp | A poisonous snake and a Small or smaller bird of prey |
| Leonino | 10 mins | 15 gp | A cat and a Small or smaller bird of prey |
| Wolpertinger | 10 mins | 20 gp | A rabbit, a Small or smaller bird of prey, and a deer |
| Carbuncle | 1 hora | 500 gp | A cat and a bird of paradise |
| Cockatrice | 1 hora | 150 gp | A lizard and a domestic bird such as a chicken or turkey |
| Death Dog | 1 hora | 100 gp | A dog and a rooster |
| Dogmole | 1 hora | 175 gp | A dog and a mole |
| Hippogriff | 1 hora | 200 gp | A horse and a Gigante eagle |
| Bearmit crab | 6 horas | 600 gp | A brown bear and a Gigante crab |
| Griffon | 6 horas | 600 gp | A lion and a Gigante eagle |
| Pegasus | 6 horas | 1,000 gp | A white horse and a Gigante owl |
| Manticore | 24 horas | 2,000 gp | A lion, a porcupine, and a Gigante bat |
| Owlbear | 24 horas | 2,000 gp | A brown bear and a Gigante eagle |

name: Monkey's Paw of Fortune
desc: This preserved monkey's paw hangs on a simple leather thong. This paw helps you alter your fate. If you are wearing this paw when you fail an tirada de ataque, ability check, or tirada de salvación, you can use your reacción to reroll the roll with a +10 bonus. You must take the second roll. When you use this property of the paw, one of its fingers curls tight to the palm. When all five fingers are curled tightly into a fist, the monkey's paw loses its magic.

name: Moon Through the Trees
desc: This charm is comprised of six polished river stones bound into the shape of a star with glue made from the connective tissues of animals. The reflective surfaces of the stones shimmer with a mágico iridescence. While you are within 20 pies of a living tree, you can use a acción adicional to become invisible for 1 minuto. While invisible, you can use a acción adicional to become visible. If you do, cada criatura of your choice within 30 pies of you debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Constitución or be cegado for 1 minuto.
