A cegado criatura can repeat this tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito. If a criatura's tirada de salvación is successful or the effect ends for it, the criatura is immune to this charm's blinding feature for the next 24 horas.

name: Moonfield Lens
desc: This lens is rainbow-hued and protected by a sturdy leather case. It has 4 charges, and it regains 1d3 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn. As an action, you can hold the lens to your eye, speak its command word, and expend 2 charges to cause one of the following effects: - *** Find Loved One.** You know the precise location of una criatura you love (platonic, familial, or romantic). This knowledge extends into other planes. - *** True Path.** For 1 hora, you automatically succeed on all Sabiduría (Supervivencia) checks to navigate in the wild. If you are underground, you automatically know the most direct route to alcance the surface.

name: Moonsteel Weapon
desc: The blade of this magic weapon seems to shine from within with a pale, white ligera. The weapon causa an extra 1d6 daño radiante to any criatura it hits. If the criatura is a shapechanger or any other criatura not in its true form, it becomes asustado until the start of your next turn. At the start of its turn, a criatura asustado in this way debe tener éxito en a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Carisma or immediately return to its true form. For the purpose of this weapon, “shapechanger” refers to any criatura with the Shapechanger trait.

name: Mordant Blade
desc: You can use a acción adicional to speak this magic weapon's command word, causing the blade to weep a caustic, green ácido. While weeping ácido, the weapon causa an extra 2d6 daño de ácido to any objetivo it hits. The weapon continues to weep ácido until you use a acción adicional to speak the command word again or you sheathe or drop the weapon.

name: Mountain Hewer
desc: You gain a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. The massive head of this axe is made from chiseled stone lashed to its haft by thick rope and leather strands. Small chips of stone fall from its edge intermittently, though it shows no sign of damage or wear. You can use your action to speak the command word to cause small stones to float and swirl around the axe, shedding bright ligera in a 30-pie radius and dim ligera for an additional 30 pies. The ligera remains until you use a acción adicional to speak the command word again or until you drop or sheathe the axe. As a acción adicional, choose a criatura you can see. For 1 minuto, that criatura debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría each time it is damaged by the axe or become asustado until the end of your next turn. criaturas of Large size or greater have desventaja on this save. Once used, this property of the axe can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Mountaineer's Crossbow
desc: This crossbow has a weathered look, and scenes of mountains are etched across its stock. An adamantine grappling hook and cable are built into this magic crossbow. While no munición is loaded in the crossbow, you can use an action to fuego the grappling hook at a surface, structure, precipice, or other similar location that you can see within 60 pies of you. The grappling hook magically attaches to the surface and connects to the crossbow via an adamantine cable. While the grappling hook is attached to a surface and you are holding the crossbow, you can use an action to speak a command word to reel yourself and up to 1,000 pounds of willing criaturas and objects connected to you to the surface. Speaking a second command word as a acción adicional releases the grappling hook from the surface, reattaching it to the crossbow, and winds the cable back into a tiny pocket dimension inside the crossbow. This cable has AC 12, 20 puntos de golpe, and immunity to all damage except ácido, rayo, and daño cortante from adamantine weapons. If the cable drops to 0 puntos de golpe, the crossbow can't be used in this way again until 24 horas have passed.

name: Mourning Medallion
desc:
This medallion hangs from a very old rope made from the braided hair of those long past. When you are reduced to 0 puntos de golpe while wearing it, before going _unconscious_  you can use your reacción to ask the medallion a single question which it answers with “yes,” “no,” or “unknown.” It answers truthfully, using the knowledge of all those who have died. Roll 1d20 after using this feature. On a result of 5 or less, the medallion becomes a mundane piece of mourning jewelry. Once you have used this feature, you cannot do so again until you finish a _long rest_ .

Alternatively, you can instead use your reacción to rip the medallion from its braid when you are reduced to 0 puntos de golpe but not killed outright. You drop to 1 punto de golpe instead and the medallion becomes a mundane piece of mourning jewelry.

name: Muffled Armor
desc: This mágico armor is laid with enchantments to mute its noise and ease movement, even muting and dulling its colors and shine when you attempt to conceal yourself. While wearing this armor, you don't have desventaja on Destreza (Sigilo) checks as a result of wearing the armor, but you might still have desventaja on such checks from other effects.

name: Mug of Merry Drinking
desc: While you hold this broad, tall mug, any liquid placed inside it warms or cools to exactly the temperature you want it, though the mug can't freeze or boil the liquid. If you drop the mug or it is knocked from your hand, it always lands upright without spilling its contents.

name: Mug of Warming
desc:
This quilted-patterned mug is perfect for frío winter nights or when caffeinated beverages are a morning necessity. Any liquid poured into the mug is instantly warmed to a piping hot temperature, remaining hot even when poured out. The mug has no effect on any form of mágico liquids poured into it.

The mug has 3 charges and regains 1 charge each dawn. You can use an action to expend 1 charge, splashing the contents of the mug into a 5-pie square in a conflagration of flame. criaturas and objects in the area make a CD 10 Destreza _tirada de salvación_ , taking 1d4 daño de fuego en un fallo. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20\. On a result of 5 or less, the mug loses its warming properties and becomes a mundane item.

name: Murderous Straight Razor
desc:
This otherwise gleaming implement has dark stains that cannot be polished or scrubbed off. You gain a +2 bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  made with this razor. A number of times per day equal to half your competencia bonus, when you hit with a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo you can use a acción adicional to channel the inherent hatred of the razor, dealing 2d6 daño necrótico.

_**Curse.**_ Once attuned to this weapon, you are _cursed_  until you are objetivoed by _remove curse_ or similar magic. Your appearance and manner have a hint of murderous rage at all times, giving you _disadvantage_  on Carisma checks and making beasts hostile towards you. Additionally, you have desventaja on attack rolls with any other weapon and debe realizar a CD 14 Sabiduría _tirada de salvación_  to willingly part with the razor, even temporarily.

name: Mutineer's Blade
desc: This finely balanced scimitar has an elaborate brass hilt. You gain a +2 bonus on attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. You can use a acción adicional to speak the scimitar's command word, causing the blade to shed bright green ligera in a 10-pie radius and dim ligera for an additional 10 pies. The ligera lasts until you use a acción adicional to speak the command word again or until you drop or sheathe the scimitar. When you roll a 20 on an tirada de ataque made with this weapon, the objetivo is overcome with the desire for mutiny. On the objetivo's next turn, it debe realizar one attack against its nearest aliado, then the effect ends, whether or not the attack was successful.

name: Nameless Cults
desc: This dubious old book, bound in pesada leather with iron hasps, details the forbidden secrets and monstrous blasphemy of a multitude of nightmare cults that worship nameless and ghastly entities. It reads like the monologue of a maniac, illustrated with unsettling glyphs and filled with fluctuating moments of vagueness and clarity. The tome is a spellbook that contains the following spells, all of which can be found in the Mythos Magic Chapter of Deep Magic for 5th Edition: black goat's blessing, curse of Yig, ectoplasm, eldritch communion, emanation of Yoth, green decay, hunger of Leng, mind exchange, seed of destruction, semblance of dread, sign of Koth, sleep of the deep, summon eldritch servitor, summon avatar, unseen strangler, voorish sign, warp mind and matter, and yellow sign. At the GM's discretion, the tome can contain other spells similarly related to the Great Old Ones. While attuned to the book, you can reference it whenever you make an Inteligencia check to recall information about any aspect of evil or the occult, such as lore about Great Old Ones, mythos criaturas, or the cults that worship them. When doing so, your competencia bonus for that check is doubled.

name: Nautilus
desc:
This vessel at first appears to be a Gargantuan sea monster 230 pies long by 30 pies in height and width, its body covered in hard reflective scales. Along the top there is a hidden catch, which can be found with a successful CD 23 Inteligencia (Investigación) check. Releasing the catch unlocks a hatch revealing a cylinder wide enough for a Medium criatura to crawl inside. The _Nautilus_ is a Gargantuan object with the following statistics:

**Clase de Armadura:** 25  
**puntos de golpe:** 400 (damage threshold 20)  
**Velocidad** swim 200 pies. (can turn a maximum of 15 degrees in a ronda)  
**Damage Immunities** veneno, psíquico  
**Crew Capacity** 25; **Passenger Capacity** 600  
**Travel Pace** 58 millas per hora (460 millas per day)

To be used as a vehicle, the _Nautilus_ requires one pilot at the helm. While the hatch is closed, the compartment is airtight and watertight.

The steel submarine holds enough air for 15,000 horas of breathing, divided by the number of breathing criaturas inside (at most 625 for 24 horas). There are 2 decks of interior compartments, most of which are 6 pies high. Interior doors are airtight, have AC 20 and 50 puntos de golpe, and can be bypassed with CD 18 Destreza (thieves’ tools) checks or CD 25 Fuerza checks.

The _Nautilus_ floats on water. It can also go underwater to a depth of 9,000 pies. Below that, the vehicle recibe 2d6 daño contundente per minuto from pressure.

A criatura at the helm can use an action to pilot the _Nautilus_ by making a CD 18 Inteligencia (vehicle \[water\]) check, with desventaja if there are no other criaturas controlling the ballasts, hydraulics, and sensors (each an action), or with _advantage_  if each position has a criatura helping. en un éxito, the pilot can double the effects of any acceleration, deceleration, or turning they make with the _Nautilus_ on their turn. In addition, the pilot can send the submarine careening into a criatura or object, making an tirada de ataque as usual.

_**Prow.** ataque cuerpo a cuerpo con arma:_ +12 para impactar, alcance 20 pies., un objetivo. _Hit:_ 34 (8d6+6) daño perforante. On a natural 1, the Nautilus recibe 34 (8d6+6) daño contundente.

Any criatura in the command room can pull a lever to activate its function, but the _Nautilus_ only responds to the first 8 levers pulled in a ronda, and a lever only performs a function once per ronda. While traveling forward the lever to travel backwards does not function, and while traveling backward the level to travel forwards does not function. After each use, a lever goes back to its neutral position.

__Nautilus Controls__
| Lever | Up                                                                                                                                                              | Down                                                                        |
| ----- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 1     | Forward window shutter opens.                                                                                                                                   | Forward window shutter closes.                                              |
| 2     | Side window shutters open (20 per side).                                                                                                                        | Side window shutters close (20 per side).                                   |
| 3     | Two manipulator arms extend from the front of the Nautilus.                                                                                                     | The manipulator arms retract.                                               |
| 4     | Each extended manipulator arm makes the following _melee weapon attack_: +12 para impactar, alcance 15 pies., un objetivo. _Hit_: The objetivo is _grappled_  (escape CD 20). | One or both extended manipulator arms release what they are holding.        |
| 5     | The _Nautilus_ accelerates forward, increasing its Velocidad by 20 pies (to a maximum of 200 pies).                                                                 | The _Nautilus_ decelerates, reducing its Velocidad by 50 pies (minimum 0 pies). |
| 6     | The _Nautilus_ accelerates backward, increasing its Velocidad by 20 pies (to a maximum of 200 pies).                                                                | The _Nautilus_ decelerates, reducing its Velocidad by 50 pies (minimum 0 pies). |
| 7     | The _Nautilus_ turns 15 degrees left.                                                                                                                           | The _Nautilus_ turns 15 degrees right.                                      |
| 8     | Eyelike fixtures emit bright ligera in a 300-pie radius and dim ligera for an additional 150 pies.                                                               | The ligera turns off.                                                        |
| 9     | The _Nautilus_ sinks as much as 50 pies in liquid.                                                                                                              | The _Nautilus_ rises up to 50 pies in liquid.                               |
| 10    | The top hatch unseals and opens.                                                                                                                                | The top hatch closes and seals.                                             |

name: Necklace of Adaptation
desc: Mientras llevas puesto este collar, puedes respirar con normalidad en cualquier entorno y tienes ventaja en las tiradas de salvación contra gases y vapores nocivos (como los efectos de _cloudkill_ y _stinking cloud_, venenos inhalados y las armas de aliento de algunos dragones).

name: Necklace of Adaptation
desc: While wearing this finely-woven necklace, you can breathe normally in any environment and you have _advantage_  on _tirada de salvacións_  made against harmful gases, vapors, and other inhaled effects.

name: Necklace of Fireballs
desc:
Este collar tiene 1d6 + 3 cuentas colgando de él. Puedes usar una acción para desprender una cuenta y lanzarla hasta 18m de distancia. Cuando llega al final de su trayectoria, la cuenta detona como el conjuro _fireball_ de nivel 3 (CD de salvación 15).

Puedes lanzar varias cuentas, o incluso el collar entero, como una sola acción. Al hacerlo, aumenta el nivel del _fireball_ en 1 por cada cuenta adicional a partir de la primera.

name: Necklace of Fireballs
desc:
This gorgeous necklace is affixed with 1d6+3 beads that radiate power. You can use an action to hurl a bead up to 60 pies. When the bead lands it detonates as a 3rd-level __fireball_ (save CD 15). 

You can hurl multiple beads with the same action, increasing the spell level of the __fireball_  by 1 for each bead beyond the first.

name: Necklace of Hunger
desc:
While you are attuned to and wearing this necklace of serrated teeth, you gain a bite natural weapon attack that causa 1d6 mágico daño perforante, and you cannot become _diseased_  or _poisoned_  from anything you eat or drink.

In addition, you may eat anything organic that can reasonably fit in your mouth without difficulty (or regard for taste) and gain sustenance from doing so as if you have consumed a normal meal. 

**Curse.** Your appearance and aura carries a hint of malice and despair. You have _disadvantage_  on Carisma checks and beasts are hostile towards you.

name: Necklace of Prayer Beads
desc:
Este collar tiene 1d4 + 2 cuentas mágicas hechas de aguamarina, perla negra o topacio. También tiene muchas cuentas no mágicas hechas de piedras como ámbar, heliotropo, citrino, coral, jade, perla o cuarzo. Si una cuenta mágica se retira del collar, pierde su magia.

Existen seis tipos de cuentas mágicas. El DM decide el tipo de cada cuenta del collar o lo determina aleatoriamente. Un collar puede tener más de una cuenta del mismo tipo. Para usar una, debes llevar el collar puesto. Cada cuenta contiene un conjuro que puedes lanzar desde ella como acción adicional (usando tu CD de salvación de conjuros si se requiere una tirada de salvación). Una vez que se lanza el conjuro de una cuenta mágica, esa cuenta no puede volver a usarse hasta el siguiente amanecer.

| d20   | Cuenta de...      | Conjuro                                              |
|-------|-------------------|------------------------------------------------------|
| 1-6   | Bendición         | Bless                                                |
| 7-12  | Curación          | Cure wounds (nivel 2) o lesser restoration           |
| 13-16 | Favor             | Greater restoration                                  |
| 17-18 | Golpe             | Branding smite                                       |
| 19    | Invocación        | Planar ally                                          |
| 20    | Caminar el viento | Wind walk                                            |
requires_attunement: requires attunement by a cleric, druid, or paladin

name: Necklace of Prayer Beads
desc:
This many-beaded necklace helps mark prayers. Of the many types of gemstone beads, 1d4+2 are mágico and can be removed from the necklace as a acción adicional to cast a spell (described on Table: Necklace of Prayer Beads). There are 6 types of magic beads, and which are on the necklace are randomly determined or chosen by the Narrator.

A necklace can have multiple beads of the same type. To use a bead, you must be wearing the necklace, and if it requires a spell save you use your CD de salvación del conjuro. Once a bead has been used, it loses its magic until the next dawn

__**Table: Necklace of Prayer Beads**__
| **d20** | **Bead of**  | **Spell**                                         |
| ------- | ------------ | ------------------------------------------------- |
| 1-6     | Blessing     | __bless_                                          |
| 7-12    | Curing       | __cure wounds  (2nd-level) or lesser restoration_ |
| 13-16   | Favor        | __greater restoration_                            |
| 17-18   | Invigorating | __invigorated strikes_                            |
| 19      | Summons      | __planar ally_                                    |
| 20      | Wind         | __wind walk_                                      |

name: Necromantic Ink
desc: The scent of death and decay hangs around this grey ink. It is typically found in 1d4 pots, and each pot contains 2 doses. If you spend 1 minuto using one dose of the ink to draw symbols of death on a dead criatura that has been dead no longer than 10 days, you can imbue the criatura with the ink's magic. The criatura rises 24 horas later as a skeleton or zombie (your choice), unless the criatura is restored to life or its body is destroyed. You have no control over the undead criatura.

name: Neutralizing Bead
desc: This hard, gritty, flavorless bead can be dissolved in liquid or powdered between your fingers and sprinkled over food. Doing so neutralizes any poisons that may be present. If the food or liquid is envenenado, it recibe on a brief reddish hue where it makes contact with the bead as the bead dissolves. Alternatively, you can chew and swallow the bead and gain the effects of an antitoxin.

name: Nine Lives Stealer
desc:
Obtienes un bonificador de +2 a las tiradas de ataque y daño realizadas con esta arma mágica.

La espada tiene 1d8 + 1 cargas. Si obtienes un golpe crítico contra una criatura que tenga menos de 100 puntos de golpe, esta debe superar una tirada de salvación de Constitución CD 15 o morir al instante, mientras la espada le arranca su fuerza vital del cuerpo (un constructo o un no-muerto es inmune). La espada pierde 1 carga si la criatura muere. Cuando la espada no le quedan cargas, pierde esta propiedad.

name: Nine Lives Stealer
desc:
You gain a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic sword.

The sword has 1d8+1 charges. When you use the sword to score a critical hit against a criatura that is not a construct or undead, if it has less than 100 puntos de golpe it makes a CD 15 Constitución _tirada de salvación_  or it instantly dies as the sword rips the life fuerza out of it. Each time a criatura is killed in this manner the sword expends a charge. When all its charges are gone, the sword loses this property.

name: Ninefold Swarmdagger
desc:
You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.
  When you hit a criatura with this weapon, you can use a acción adicional to launch ghostly duplicates of the dagger at nearby criaturas. Ghostly duplicates of the dagger fly at up to three criaturas you can see within 30 pies of the criatura you hit. Make a ataque a distancia with this dagger at each objetivo. On a hit, a objetivo recibe 1d4 daño de fuerza. Once you hit six criaturas with these ghostly daggers, you can’t launch ghostly daggers from this weapon again until the next dawn.

name: Nithing Pole
desc: This pole is crafted to exact retribution for an act of cowardice or dishonor. It's a sturdy wooden stave, 6 to 10 pies long, carved with runes that name the dishonored objetivo of the pole's curse. The carved shaft is draped in horsehide, topped with a horse's skull, and placed where its objetivo is expected to pass by. Typically, the pole is driven into the ground or wedged into a rocky cleft in a remote spot where the intended victim won't see it until it's too late. The pole is created to punish a specific person for a specific crime. The exact objetivo must be named on the pole; a generic identity such as “the person who cegado Lars Gustafson” isn't precise enough. The moment the named objetivo approaches within 333 pies, the pole casts bestow curse (with a range of 333 pies instead of touch) on the objetivo. The CD for the objetivo's tirada de salvación de Sabiduría is 15. If the tirada de salvación is successful, the pole recasts the spell at the end of each ronda until the tirada de salvación fails, the objetivo retreats out of range, or the pole is destroyed. Anyone other than the pole's creator who tries to destroy or knock down the pole is also objetivoed by a bestow curse spell, but only once. The effect of the curse is set when the pole is created, and the curse lasts 8 horas without requiring Concentración. The pole becomes no mágico once it has laid its curse on its intended objetivo. An untriggered and forgotten nithing pole remains dangerous for centuries.

name: Nullifier's Lexicon
desc: This book has a black leather cover with silver bindings and a silver front plate. Void Speech glyphs adorn the front plate, which is pitted and tarnished. The pages are thin sheets of corrupted brass and are inscribed with more blasphemous glyphs. While you are attuned to the lexicon, you can speak, read, and write Void Speech, and you know the crushing curse* truco. At the GM's discretion, you know the chill touch truco instead.

name: Oakwood Wand
desc: You can use this wand as a spellcasting focus. The wand has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. While holding it, you can expend 1 charge as an action to cast the detect veneno and disease spell from it. When you cast a spell that causa daño de frío while using this wand as your spellcasting focus, the spell causa 1 extra daño de frío.

name: Oathbow
desc:
Cuando encasas una flecha en este arco, este susurra en élfico: «Derrota veloz a mis enemigos». Cuando uses esta arma para realizar un ataque a distancia, puedes pronunciar la frase de mando: «Muerte veloz a quien me ha agraviado». El objetivo de tu ataque se convierte en tu enemigo jurado hasta que muera o hasta el amanecer siete días después. Solo puedes tener un enemigo jurado a la vez. Cuando tu enemigo jurado muere, puedes elegir uno nuevo tras el siguiente amanecer.

Cuando realizas una tirada de ataque a distancia con esta arma contra tu enemigo jurado, tienes ventaja en la tirada. Además, tu objetivo no obtiene ningún beneficio de la cobertura, salvo la cobertura total, y no sufres desventaja por distancia larga. Si el ataque impacta, tu enemigo jurado recibe 3d6 de daño perforante adicional.

Mientras tu enemigo jurado siga con vida, tienes desventaja en las tiradas de ataque con todas las demás armas.

name: Oathbow
desc:
This bow whispers its urgent desire for the quick defeat of your enemigos in Élfico when you nock an arrow. When you use this bow to make a _ranged weapon attack_  against a criatura, you can swear an oath against the objetivo of your attack and make it your sworn enemigo until its death or dawn seven days later. You may choose a new sworn enemigo following the next dawn after your current sworn enemigo dies. 

Your ranged weapon attacks using this bow have ventaja against your sworn enemigo, and your sworn enemigo cannot gain benefit from cover other than _total cover_ . You do not have _disadvantage_  on ranged weapon attacks with the bow that are at long range as long as your sworn enemigo is your objetivo, and on a hit your sworn enemigo recibe an extra 3d6 daño perforante.

You have _disadvantage_  on attacks made with weapons other than this bow while your sworn enemigo lives.

name: Obsidian Butterfly Knife
desc:
Made of razor-sharp obsidian, this finely-balanced blade glows faintly with deep purple ligera. 

You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this dagger. 

You can use an action to cause the dagger’s inner ligera to brighten, glowing like the corona of an eclipsed sun. This glow lasts for 1 minuto or until you use it to deal damage to a criatura. That criatura makes a CD 12 Constitución _tirada de salvación_  or it recibe 3d6 daño necrótico and is unable to regain puntos de golpe for 1 minuto. If this damage reduces the objetivo to 0 puntos de golpe, the objetivo immediately dies and 1d4 rondas later its body explodes into a swarm of obsidian butterflies that completely eviscerate the corpse, leaving only the heart behind. The dagger can’t be used this way again until it is exposed to a new sunrise.

name: Octopus Bracers
desc: These bronze bracers are etched with depictions of frolicking octopuses. While wearing these bracers, you can use an action to speak their command word and transform your arms into tentacles. You can use a acción adicional to repeat the command word and return your arms to normal. The tentacles are natural melee weapons, which you can use to make unarmed strikes. Your alcance extends by 5 pies while your arms are tentacles. When you hit with a tentacle, it causa daño contundente equal to 1d8 + your Fuerza or Destreza modifier (your choice). If you hit a criatura of your size or smaller than you, it is agarrado. Each tentacle can grapple only un objetivo. While grappling a objetivo with a tentacle, you can't attack other criaturas with that tentacle. While your arms are tentacles, you can't wield weapons that require two hands, and you can't wield shields. In addition, you can't cast a spell that has a somatic component. When the bracers' property has been used for a total of 10 minutos, the magic ceases to function until the next dawn.

name: Oculi of the Ancestor
desc: An intricately depicted replica of an eyeball, right down to the blood vessels and other fine details, this item is carved from sacred hardwoods by soothsayers using a specialized ceremonial blade handcrafted specifically for this purpose. When you use an action to place the orb within the eye socket of a skull, it telepathically shows you the last thing that was experienced by the criatura before it died. This lasts for up to 1 minuto and is limited to only what the criatura saw or heard in the final moments of its life. The orb can't show you what the criatura might have detected using another sense, such as sentido de temblor.

name: Odd Bodkin
desc: This dagger has a twisted, jagged blade. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you hit a criatura other than a construct or an undead with this weapon, it loses 1d4 puntos de golpe at the start of each of its turns from a jagged wound. Each time you successfully hit the wounded objetivo with this dagger, el daño dealt by the wound increases by 1d4. Any criatura can take an action to stanch the wound with a successful CD 11 Sabiduría (Medicina) check. The wound also closes if the wounded criatura receives mágico healing.

name: Odorless Oil
desc: This odorless, colorless oil can cover a Medium or smaller object or criatura, along with the equipment the criatura is wearing or carrying (one additional vial is required for each size category above Medium). Applying the oil recibe 10 minutos. For 1 hora, the affected objetivo gives off no scent, can't be tracked by scent, and can't be detected with Sabiduría (Percepción) checks that rely on smell.

name: Ogre's Pot
desc: This cauldron boils anything placed inside it, whether venison or timber, to a vaguely edible paste. A spoonful of the paste provides enough nourishment to sustain a criatura for one day. As a acción adicional, you can speak the pot's command word and fuerza it to roll directly to you at a Velocidad of 40 pies per ronda as long as you and the pot are on the same plane of existence. It follows the shortest possible path, stopping when it moves to within 5 pies of you, and it bowls over or knocks down any objects or criaturas in its path. A criatura in its path debe tener éxito en a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Destreza or take 2d6 daño contundente and be knocked derribado. When this magic pot comes into contact with an object or structure, it causa 4d6 daño contundente. If el daño doesn't destroy or create a path through the object or structure, the pot continues to deal damage at the end of each ronda, carving a path through the obstacle.

name: Oil of Concussion
desc: You can apply this thick, gray oil to one contundente weapon or up to 5 pieces of contundente munición. Applying the oil recibe 1 minuto. For 1 hora, any attack with the coated item scores a critical hit on a roll of 19 or 20.

name: Oil of Cosmetic Enhancement
desc: After spending 10 minutos massaging this oil into an item smaller than a 5-pie cube, it permanently changes the item’s cosmetic appearance. This might change the item’s colors, add intricate designs, or make it blend into its environment. The oil causes no damage and leaves no residue, and it only works on no mágico items made out of natural materials (such as cotton, parchment, stone, or wood).

name: Oil of Defoliation
desc: Sometimes known as weedkiller oil, this greasy amber fluid contains the crushed husks of dozens of locusts. One vial of the oily substance can coat one weapon or up to 5 pieces of munición. Applying the oil recibe 1 minuto. For 1 hora, the coated item causa an extra 1d6 daño necrótico to plants or plant criaturas on a successful hit. The oil can also be applied directly to a willing, apresado, or immobile plant or plant criatura. In this case, the substance causa 4d6 daño necrótico, which is enough to kill most ordinary plant life smaller than a large tree.

name: Oil of Etherealness
desc: Gotas de este aceite gris turbio se forman en el exterior de su recipiente y se evaporan rápidamente. El aceite puede cubrir a una criatura Mediana o más pequeña, junto con el equipo que lleve puesto y en mano (se requiere un frasco adicional por cada categoría de tamaño por encima de Mediano). Aplicar el aceite lleva 10 minutos. La criatura afectada obtiene entonces el efecto del conjuro _etherealness_ durante 1 hora.

name: Oil of Etherealness
desc: This misty white solution has turned to vapor in its vial, becoming liquid again when shaken. You can spend 10 minutos applying the ephemeral substance to a Medium or smaller criatura, as well as its gear. One additional vial is required for each size category above Medium. A criatura covered in the oil becomes ethereal (as the __etherealness_  spell) for 1 hora.

name: Oil of Extreme Bludgeoning
desc: This viscous indigo-hued oil smells of iron. The oil can coat one contundente weapon or up to 5 pieces of contundente munición. Applying the oil recibe 1 minuto. For 1 hora, the coated item is mágico, has a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls, and causa an extra 1d4 daño de fuerza on a hit.

name: Oil of Numbing
desc: This astringent-smelling oil stings slightly when applied to flesh, but the feeling quickly fades. The oil can cover a Medium or smaller criatura (one additional vial is required for each size category above Medium). Applying the oil recibe 10 minutos. For 1 hora, the affected criatura has ventaja on Constitución tirada de salvacións to maintain its Concentración on a spell when it recibe damage, and it has ventaja on ability checks and tirada de salvacións made to endure pain. However, the affected criatura's flesh is slightly numbed and senseless, and it has desventaja on ability checks that require fine motor skills or a sense of touch.

name: Oil of Sharpening
desc: You can apply this fine, silvery oil to one perforante or cortante weapon or up to 5 pieces of perforante or cortante munición. Applying the oil recibe 1 minuto. For 1 hora, any attack with the coated item scores a critical hit on a roll of 19 or 20.

name: Oil of Sharpness
desc: Este aceite claro y gelatinoso destella con diminutas esquirlas de plata ultrafinas. El aceite puede cubrir un arma cortante o perforante, o hasta 5 piezas de munición cortante o perforante. Aplicar el aceite lleva 1 minuto. Durante 1 hora, el objeto cubierto es mágico y obtiene un bonificador de +3 a las tiradas de ataque y de daño.

name: Oil of Sharpness
desc: It recibe 1 minuto to use this glittering oil to cover a weapon that causa cortante or daño perforante, or 5 pieces of munición that causa cortante or daño perforante. For 1 hora the weapon or munición is mágico, and when using it you gain a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls.

name: Oil of Slipperiness
desc:
Este ungüento negro y pegajoso es espeso y pesado dentro del recipiente, pero fluye rápidamente al verterse. El aceite puede cubrir a una criatura Mediana o más pequeña, junto con el equipo que lleva puesto y cargado (se necesita un frasco adicional por cada categoría de tamaño por encima de Mediano). Aplicar el aceite lleva 10 minutos. La criatura afectada obtiene entonces el efecto de un conjuro _freedom of movement_ durante 8 horas.

Alternativamente, el aceite puede verterse sobre el suelo como una acción, donde cubre un cuadrado de 3 metros de lado, duplicando el efecto del conjuro _grease_ en esa área durante 8 horas.

name: Oil of Slipperiness
desc: You can spend 10 minutos applying this thick black oil to a Medium or smaller criatura, as well as its gear. One additional vial is required for each size category above Medium. A criatura covered in the oil gains the effect of a __freedom of movement_ spell for 2 horas. Alternatively, you can use an action to pour the oil on the ground next to you, making a 10-pie square slippery (as the _grease_ spell) for 8 horas.

name: Oni Mask
desc: This horned mask is fashioned into the fearsome likeness of a pale oni. The mask has 6 charges for the following properties. The mask regains 1d6 expended charges daily at dawn. Spells. While wearing the mask, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells (save CD 15): charm person (1 charge), invisibility (2 charges), or sleep (1 charge). Change Shape. You can expend 3 charges as an action to magically polymorph into a Small or Medium humanoid, into a Large Gigante, or back into your true form. Other than your size, your statistics are the same in each form. The only equipment that is transformed is your weapon, which enlarges or shrinks so that it can be wielded in any form. If you die, you revert to your true form, and your weapon reverts to its normal size.

name: Opera-Goer’s Guise
desc: This dashing filigreed white mask translates a song’s meaning directly into your mind. When wearing the _opera-goer’s guise_, you can magically understand any language so long as it is sung. This item has no effect on written or spoken words.

name: Opus Maleficarum
desc:
This book looks to have survived a fuego. Its pages are browned upon the edges with many corners lost to char. The cover appears to be made from the skin of a reptile, but the blackened scales are cracked from the flames making identification all but impossible. Within, the pages of this book are filled with profane writings, eldritch symbols, and twisted imagery one might associate with a warlock’s book of shadows. Largely illegible, to those of a more martial bent the meanings of strange words become clear.

Spending at least 24 horas over the course of 7 nights reading and practicing the forms and phrases within the _Opus_ allows a reader with access to martial maneuvers to learn a single maneuver from the Eldritch Blackguard combat tradition, as long as it is of a degree they can learn. This does not count against the character’s limit of known combat traditions or maneuvers. Any character capable of casting a truco or 1st level spell who reads the _Opus_ also suffers 1 level of _strife_ .

Once this tome has been read, it becomes a mundane item for one year and a day before it regains its magic

name: Oracle Charm
desc: This small charm resembles a human finger bone engraved with runes and complicated knotwork patterns. As you contemplate a specific course of action that you plan to take within the next 30 minutos, you can use an action to snap the charm in half to gain the benefit of an augury spell. Once used, the charm is destroyed.

name: Orb of Chaotic Assault
desc: This iridescent glass sphere’s color is constantly shifting. When used as an improvised weapon the orb breaks on impact. If the orb shatters against a criatura, one randomly determined resistance or immunity the criatura has is reduced for 1d6+1 rondas, after which the criatura’s defenses return to normal. A criatura’s immunity to a damage type changes to resistance to that damage type, or it loses its resistance. Success on a CD 15 Inteligencia (Arcanos) check reveals what resistance has been affected after the orb is used.

name: Orb of Dragonkind
desc:
En tiempos remotos, elfos y humanos libraron una terrible guerra contra los dragones malvados. Cuando el mundo parecía condenado, poderosos magos se unieron y emplearon su mayor magia, forjando cinco _Orbs of Dragonkind_ (o _Dragon Orbs_) para ayudarles a derrotar a los dragones. Un orbe fue llevado a cada una de las cinco torres de magos, donde fueron usados para acelerar la guerra hacia un final victorioso. Los magos usaban los orbes para atraer dragones hacia ellos y luego los destruían con poderosa magia.

A medida que las torres de magos fueron cayendo en épocas posteriores, los orbes fueron destruidos o se desvanecieron en la leyenda, y se cree que solo tres han sobrevivido. Su magia ha sido distorsionada y corrompida a lo largo de los siglos, de modo que, aunque su propósito primario de convocar dragones sigue funcionando, también permiten cierto grado de control sobre ellos.

Cada orbe contiene la esencia de un dragón malvado, una presencia que resiente cualquier intento de extraer magia de él. Quienes carecen de una personalidad fuerte podrían acabar esclavizados por un orbe.

Un orbe es un globo de cristal grabado de unos 25 centímetros de diámetro. Al ser usado, crece hasta unos 50 centímetros de diámetro, y una neblina arremolina en su interior.

Mientras estés sintonizado con un orbe, puedes usar una acción para escudriñar las profundidades del orbe y pronunciar su palabra de mando. Debes entonces realizar una prueba de Carisma CD 15. Si tienes éxito, controlas el orbe mientras permanezcas sintonizado con él. Si fallas, quedas hechizado por el orbe mientras permanezcas sintonizado con él.

Mientras estés hechizado por el orbe, no puedes poner fin voluntariamente a tu sintonía con él, y el orbe lanza _suggestion_ sobre ti a voluntad (CD de salvación 18), instándote a trabajar hacia los fines malvados que desea. La esencia del dragón dentro del orbe podría querer muchas cosas: la aniquilación de un pueblo en particular, la liberación del orbe, extender el sufrimiento en el mundo, promover el culto a Tiamat, u otra cosa que el DJ decida.

**_Propiedades Aleatorias_**. Un _Orb of Dragonkind_ tiene las siguientes propiedades aleatorias:

* 2 propiedades beneficiosas menores
* 1 propiedad perjudicial menor
* 1 propiedad perjudicial mayor

**_Conjuros_**. El orbe tiene 7 cargas y recupera 1d4 + 3 cargas gastadas cada día al amanecer. Si controlas el orbe, puedes usar una acción y gastar 1 o más cargas para lanzar uno de los siguientes conjuros (CD de salvación 18) desde él: _cure wounds_ (versión de 5.º nivel, 3 cargas), _daylight_ (1 carga), _death ward_ (2 cargas) o _scrying_ (3 cargas).

También puedes usar una acción para lanzar el conjuro _detect magic_ desde el orbe sin gastar ninguna carga.

**_Convocar Dragones_**. Mientras controles el orbe, puedes usar una acción para hacer que el artefacto emita una llamada telepática que se extiende en todas direcciones durante 60 kilómetros. Los dragones malvados que se encuentren en el área sienten la compulsión de acudir al orbe lo antes posible por la ruta más directa. Las deidades dracónicas como Tiamat no se ven afectadas por esta llamada. Los dragones atraídos por el orbe podrían mostrarse hostiles hacia ti por haberlos compelido en contra de su voluntad. Una vez que hayas usado esta propiedad, no puede volver a usarse hasta pasada 1 hora.

**_Destruir un Orbe_**. Un _Orb of Dragonkind_ parece frágil, pero es impervio a la mayoría de los daños, incluidos los ataques y armas de aliento de los dragones. No obstante, un conjuro _disintegrate_ o un buen golpe de un arma mágica +3 son suficientes para destruir un orbe.

name: Orb of Dragonkind
desc:
Long ago the souls of five evil dragons were ripped from their corporeal bodies and captured with Arcanos by mages that sought to end the tyranny of wicked winged serpents. Each is contained within an intricately inscribed crystal globe 10 inches across—though when the magic within is called upon, an orb swells to double its size and glows with a faint ligera revealing the color of the scales that once belonged to what little remains of the criatura that now resides in it. 

While you are attuned to and holding a_n Orb of Dragonkind,_ you can use an action and speak a command word to attempt to control the Dracónico soul within by making a CD 15 Carisma check. en un éxito, you can control the _Orb of Dragonkind,_ or en un fallo you are hechizado by it. Both effects last until you are no longer attuned to the orb.

While you are hechizado by the orb, you cannot choose to end your attunement to it. In addition, the orb can innately cast __suggestion_ on you at will (save CD 18) to compel you to commit evil acts that serve its purposes—exacting revenge, attaining its freedom, spread suffering and ruin, encourage the worship of foul Dracónico deities, collect the other _orbs of dragonkind_, or whatever else the Narrator deems fit. 

**Legends and Lore** Success on an Arcanos or Historia check reveals the following:

**CD 15** This is an _Orb of Dragonkind,_ an artifact with the power to control dragons. 

**CD 20** Five orbs were made, each containing the soul of an evil dragon.

**CD 25** The orb can summon evil dragons, but does not actually control them.

**Artifact Properties**

An _Orb of Dragonkind_ has two lesser artifact benefits, one lesser artifact detriment, and one greater artifact detriment.

**Magic**

While you are controlling an _Orb of Dragonkind,_ you can use an action to cast detect magic at will. You can also expend 1 or more charges to cast _detect magic_ (no charge), __daylight  (_1 charge), __death ward_  (2 charges), _cure wounds_  (5th-level version, 3 charges), or __scrying_ (save CD 18; 3 charges). 

**The orb has 7 charges and regains 1d4 + 3 expended charges each dawn.**

**Call Dragons**

While you are controlling an _Orb of Dragonkind_, you can use an action to send a telepathic message in a 40-milla radius. Evil dragons that are mortal and in the area are compelled to take the quickest and most direct route to the orb, though they may not be friendly or pleased with being forced to answer the call. Once this property has been used, you cannot use it again for 1 hora.

**Destroying an Orb**

Despite its glass appearance, an _Orb of Dragonkind_ is immune to most types of damage (including Dracónico breath weapons and natural attacks), but they can be destroyed by the __disintegrate_ spell or a single strike from a weapon with a +3 mágico bonus to attack and damage rolls.

name: Orb of Elsewhere
desc:
This crystalline orb is filled with dense smoke that constantly changes color. While holding the orb, you can use an action and speak its command word to open a portal to a random location on a plane from the Orb of Elsewhere table. The portal remains open either until the next dawn on your original Material Plane, or until you use an action to speak the command word to close it.

Once the portal is closed, the orb remains at the entry point to that plane. If at the end of the duration the orb has not been used to create a portal of return, it teleports to a random point on its plane of origin (leaving any criaturas that traveled through the portal stranded).

The orb’s destination changes at dawn on your Material Plane each day, and its portal never goes to the same location twice in a row.

__**Table: Orb of Elsewhere**__
| **d12** | **Plane**      |
| ------- | -------------- |
| 1       | Plane of Air   |
| 2       | Plane of Earth |
| 3       | Plane of Water |
| 4       | Plane of fuego  |
| 5       | Plane of Death |
| 6       | Plane of Life  |
| 7       | Plane of Space |
| 8       | Plane of Time  |
| 9       | Ethereal Plane |
| 10      | Astral Plane   |
| 11      | Dreaming       |
| 12      | Bleak Gate     |

name: Orb of Enthralling Patterns
desc: This plain, glass orb shimmers with iridescence. While holding this orb, you can use an action to speak its command word, which causes it to levitate and emit multicolored ligera. cada criatura other than you within 10 pies of the orb debe tener éxito en a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or look at only the orb for 1 minuto. For the duration, a criatura looking at the orb has desventaja on Sabiduría (Percepción) checks to perceive anything that is not the orb. criaturas that failed the tirada de salvación have no memory of what happened while they were looking at the orb. Once used, the orb can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Orb of Obfuscation
desc: Originally fashioned in the laboratory of the archmage Lugax for his good natured but often roguish friend, Kennich, these spherical ceramic containers are the size of a large human fist. Arcane sigils decorate each orb, detailing its properties to those capable of reading the sigils. The magic-infused chemicals in each orb must be briefly exposed to air before being arrojadiza to activate them. A metal rod sits in the cork of each orb, allowing you to quickly twist open the container before throwing it. Typically, 1d4 + 1 orbs of obfuscation are found together. You can use an action to activate and throw the orb up to 60 pies. The orb explodes on impact and is destroyed. The orb's effects are determined by its type. Orb of Obfuscation (Uncommon). This orb is a dark olive color with a stripe of bright blue paint encircling it. When activated, the orb releases an opaque grey gas and creates a 30-pie-radius sphere of this gas centered on the point where the orb landed. The sphere spreads around corners, and its area is heavily obscured. The mágico gas also dampens sound. cada criatura in the gas can hear only sounds originating within 5 pies of it, and criaturas outside of the gas can’t hear sounds originating inside the gas. The gas lasts for 5 minutos or until a wind of moderate or greater Velocidad (at least 10 millas per hora) disperses it. Explosive Orb of Obfuscation (Rare). This oblong orb has a putty grey color with a stripe of yellow paint encircling it. When activated, this orb releases the same opaque grey gas as the orb of obfuscation. In addition to the effects of that gas, this orb also releases a burst of caustic chemicals on impact. cada criatura within a 15-pie radius of where the orb landed debe realizar a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Destreza, taking 4d4 daño de ácido en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one. If a criatura fails this tirada de salvación, the chemicals cling to it for 1 minuto. At the end of each of its turns, the criatura debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Constitución or take 2d4 daño de ácido from the clinging chemicals. Any criatura can take an action to remove the clinging chemicals with a successful CD 15 Sabiduría (Medicina) check.

name: Orb of the Dragon Breaker
desc: This iridescent glass sphere resembles a soap bubble tinted the color of the dragon scale used to create it. When used as an improvised weapon the orb breaks on impact. If the orb shatters against a criatura, the criatura’s immunity or resistance to a damage type associated with the dragon scale used in the orb’s creation (fuego for a red dragon scale, ácido for a green dragon scale, and so on) is either reduced from immunity to a damage type to resistance to the same damage type, or it loses its resistance. The orb’s effects last for 1d6+1 rondas, after which the criatura’s defenses return to normal.

name: Organizer Gremlin
desc: This small black pocketbook comes with a tiny ethereal gold goblinoid who holds a cheap pen and eagerly awaits your instructions. Roughly half of this 120 page book is blank scratch paper, and the other half is a calendar of the current year. The gremlin writes down anything you ask it to and even recibe down dictation if requested. It will also mark reminders in the calendar and circle dates. Despite its love for writing however, its penmanship is quite poor, it doesn’t actually understand what anything it’s writing actually means, and any word with 3 or more syllables is always misspelled. Accurately understanding anything the gremlin has written requires a CD 10 Inteligencia check.

name: Osseous Plate
desc: This medium armor is made from the bones of several humanoids—ribs, shoulder, femurs and many others have been bound in leather and fused with necromantic magic—and while donned it imparts a touch of undeath to the wearer. While wearing this armor, you gain resistance to veneno and daño necrótico, but also vulnerability to daño contundente. As a acción adicional, you can make the bones rattle to gain _advantage_  on the next Intimidación check you make this turn against a humanoid. It is in all other ways similar to chain mail, except that you don’t have _disadvantage_  on Sigilo checks while wearing it.

name: Osseous Warhammer
desc: Attacks made using this grim-looking weapon do both physical and supernatural harm. You can use a acción adicional to let the weapon feed off your life fuerza. While activated, whenever you successfully hit with the warhammer you deal an additional 1d6 daño necrótico, but also take 1d4 daño de frío. This effect lasts until deactivated by using another acción adicional or letting go of the weapon.

name: Ouroboros Amulet
desc: Carved in the likeness of a serpent swallowing its own tail, this circular jade amulet is frequently worn by serpentfolk mystics and the worshippers of dark and forgotten gods. While wearing this amulet, you have ventaja on tirada de salvacións against being hechizado. In addition, you can use an action to cast the suggestion spell (save CD 13). The amulet can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Pact Paper
desc: This smooth paper is like vellum but is prepared from dozens of scales cast off by a Pact Drake (see criatura Codex). A contract can be inked on this paper, and the paper limns all falsehoods on it with a fiery glow. A command word clears the paper, allowing for several drafts. Another command word locks the contract in place and leaves space for signatures. criaturas signing the contract are afterward bound by the contract with all other signatories alerted when one of the signatories breaks the contract. The criatura breaking the contract debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Carisma or become cegado, ensordecido, and aturdido for 1d6 minutos. A criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of minuto, ending the conditions on itself en un éxito. After the conditions end, the criatura has desventaja on tirada de salvacións until it finishes a descanso largo. Once a contract has been locked in place and signed, the paper can't be cleared. If the contract has a duration or stipulation for its end, the pact paper is destroyed when the contract ends, releasing all signatories from any further obligations and immediately ending any effects on them.

name: Paired Gauntlets of Striking
desc: These leather gloves are reinforced with steel plates and decorated with images of two humanoids fighting side-by-side. While you and another criatura are each wearing one of the gauntlets and are each within 5 pies of the same criatura, you both have ventaja on the first tirada de ataque you make against that criatura on each of your turns.

name: Paramour’s Daisy
desc:
This bright yellow daisy never wilts or fades. The daisy has exactly 20 petals when you first receive it. 

While the daisy has an even number of petals, both your personality and physical appearance become vibrant. You gain an expertise die on Persuasión checks, but you have _disadvantage_  on Sigilo checks. 

While the daisy has an odd number of petals, your presence fades into the background. You gain an expertise die on Sigilo checks, but you have _disadvantage_  on Persuasión checks.

You can use an action to pluck one petal from the daisy. The daisy loses its magic once you remove its final petal.

name: Parasol of Temperate Weather
desc: This fine, cloth-wrapped 2-pie-long pole unfolds into a parasol with a diameter of 3 pies, which is large enough to cover one Medium or smaller criatura. While traveling under the parasol, you ignore the drawbacks of traveling in hot weather or a hot environment. Though it protects you from the sun's heat in the desert or geothermal heat in deep caverns, the parasol doesn't protect you from damage caused by super-heated environments or criaturas, such as lava or an azer's Heated Body trait, or magic that causa daño de fuego, such as the fuego bolt spell.

name: Parasol of the Blade
desc:
This appears to be a mundane parasol, with a bird-shaped handle and a delicate lace canopy. As a acción adicional, you can say the command word and pull the handle free to draw a blade of ligera from the shaft of the parasol, with the handle as its hilt. You gain a +1 _bonus to attack and damage rolls_  made with this weapon, which functions as a rapier that causa daño radiante instead of perforante and has the parrying immunity property. You are considered proficient with it as long as you are attuned to the parasol of the blade.

Returning the handle to the parasol requires an action, and if the blade is more than 120 pies from the rest of the parasol, it flickers out and cannot be used until the parasol is whole again.

name: Pavilion of Dreams
desc:
This pie-long box is 6 inches wide and 6 inches deep. With 1 minuto of work, the box's poles and multicolored silks can be unfolded into a pavilion expansive enough to sleep eight Medium or smaller criaturas comfortably. The pavilion can stand in winds of up to 60 millas per hora without suffering damage or collapsing, and its interior remains comfortable and dry no matter the weather conditions or temperature outside. criaturas who sleep within the pavilion are immune to spells and other mágico effects that would disrupt their sleep or negatively affect their dreams, such as the monstrous messenger version of the dream spell or a night hag's Nightmare Haunting. criaturas who take a descanso largo in the pavilion, and who sleep for at least half that time, have shared dreams of future events. Though unclear upon waking, these premonitions sit in the backs of the criaturas' minds for the next 24 horas. Before the duration ends, a criatura can call on the premonitions, expending them and immediately gaining one of the following benefits.
- If you are surprised during combat, you can choose instead to not be surprised.
- If you are not surprised at the beginning of combat, you have ventaja on the initiative roll.
- You have ventaja on a single tirada de ataque, ability check, or tirada de salvación.
- If you are adjacent to a criatura that is attacked, you can use a reacción to interpose yourself between the criatura and the attack. You become the new objetivo of the attack.
- When in combat, you can use a reacción to distract an enemigo within 30 pies of you that attacks an aliado you can see. If you do so, the enemigo has desventaja on the tirada de ataque.
- When an enemigo uses the Disengage action, you can use a reacción to move up to your Velocidad toward that enemigo. Once used, the pavilion can't be used again until the next dusk.

name: Pearl of Diving
desc: This white pearl shines iridescently in almost any ligera. While underwater and grasping the pearl, you have resistance to daño de frío and to daño contundente from ataques no mágicos.

name: Pearl of Power
desc: Mientras esta perla esté en tu persona, puedes usar una acción para pronunciar su palabra de mando y recuperar un espacio de conjuro gastado. Si el espacio gastado era de 4.º nivel o superior, el nuevo espacio es de 3.er nivel. Una vez que hayas usado la perla, no puede volver a usarse hasta el siguiente amanecer.

name: Pearl of Power
desc: While holding this lustrous pearl, you can use an action to speak its command word and regain one expended espacio de conjuro of up to 3rd-level. If restoring a higher level slot, the new slot is 3rd-level. Once used, the pearl loses its magic until the next dawn.

name: Perdita Ravenwing’s True Name
desc:
This slip of parchment contains the magically bound name “Agnes Nittworthy” surrounded by occult symbols and raven feathers. While you are attuned to it, you can use a acción adicional to invoke the name on this parchment to summon a vision of a powerful and ancient hag beside you for 1 minuto. Agnes acts aloof and mysterious but becomes oddly motherly around the young or incompetent. Once a vision is summoned in this way, it cannot be summoned again for the next 24 horas.

You can use an action to verbally direct the vision to do any of the following: 

* Create ominous noises or effects (as _thaumaturgy_ ).
* Magically veneno up to a pound of food within 5 pies. Any criatura that consumes this envenenado food debe realizar a CD 13 Constitución _tirada de salvación_  or become _poisoned_  for 10 minutos.
* Mimic animal sounds or the voices of specific humanoids. A criatura that hears the sounds can tell they are imitations with a successful CD 13 Perspicacia check.

Alternatively, as an action while the vision is summoned you can agree to revoke your claim on Perdita in exchange for her direct assistance. When you do so the parchment crumbles into dust and for the next minuto the vision curses a criatura of your choice within 30 pies (as __bestow curse_ , save CD 13) after which she disappears. Once you have revoked your claim in this way, you can never invoke Perdita’s true name again.

name: Perfect Disguise
desc:
This set of novelty glasses has a comically-oversized false nose along with a thick fake mustache and bushy eyebrows. These glasses have 3 charges and regain 1 charge each dawn. While wearing the glasses you can expend 1 charge to cast the spell __disguise self_  (save CD 14). 

However, you cannot mask the glasses themselves using __disguise self_  in this way—no matter how your disguise looks, it includes the novelty glasses.

If you expend the last charge, roll a d20\. On a result of 5 or less, the _perfect disguise_ is glued to your face (as _sovereign glue_ ) and it becomes a mundane item.

name: Perfume Vile
desc:
You can use a acción adicional to spray perfume from this fashionable bottle, immediately dispelling any foul odors on a criatura or object of Large size or smaller and leaving behind only the faint smell of peonies that lasts for 1d4 horas. The bottle has enough perfume in it for 20 sprays.

Alternatively, you can use an action to throw the bottle at a point within 30 pies, creating a 20-pie radius sphere of pink gas centered where it hits. The cloud spreads around corners, and its area is heavily obscured. The cloud lingers in the air for 1d4 rondas. A criatura that enters the area or starts its turn there makes a Constitución _tirada de salvación_  (CD equal to the number of perfume sprays remaining) or it recibe 1d4 daño de veneno and becomes aturdido for 1 ronda. criaturas already wearing the perfume have _advantage_  on this tirada de salvación.

name: Periapt of Eldritch Knowledge
desc: This pendant consists of a hollow metal cylinder on a fine, silver chain and is capable of holding one scroll. When you put a spell scroll in the pendant, it is added to your list of known or prepared spells, but you must still expend a espacio de conjuro to cast it. If the spell has more powerful effects when cast at a higher level, you can expend a espacio de conjuro of a higher level to cast it. If you have metamagic options, you can apply any metamagic option you know to the spell, expending sorcery points as normal. When you cast the spell, the spell scroll isn't consumed. If the spell on the spell scroll isn't on your class's spell list, you can't cast it unless it is half the level of the highest spell level you can cast (minimum level 1). The pendant can hold only one scroll at a time, and you can remove or replace the spell scroll in the pendant as an action. When you remove or replace the spell scroll, you don't immediately regain espacios de conjuro expended on the scroll's spell. You regain expended espacios de conjuro as normal for your class.

name: Periapt of Health
desc: Eres inmune a contraer cualquier enfermedad mientras lleves este colgante. Si ya estás infectado con una enfermedad, los efectos de la enfermedad quedan suprimidos mientras lleves el colgante.

name: Periapt of Health
desc: While wearing this pendant, you are immune to _diseases_  (you cannot contract any disease, and the effects if any ongoing diseases are suppressed).

name: Periapt of Proof Against Lies
desc: A pendant fashioned from the claw or horn of a Pact Drake (see criatura Codex) is affixed to a thin gold chain. While you wear it, you know if you hear a lie, but this doesn't apply to evasive statements that remain within the boundaries of the truth. If you lie while wearing this pendant, you become envenenado for 10 minutos.

name: Periapt of Proof against Poison
desc: Esta delicada cadena de plata tiene colgando una gema negra de talla brillante. Mientras la llevas puesta, los venenos no tienen ningún efecto sobre ti. Eres inmune a la condición de envenenado y tienes inmunidad al daño por veneno.

name: Periapt of Proof Against Poison
desc: A slick film surrounds this delicate pendant and makes it shimmer. While wearing this pendant, you are immune to daño de veneno and the _poisoned_  condition.

name: Periapt of Wound Closure
desc: Mientras llevas este colgante puesto, te estabilizas automáticamente cuando estás agonizando al inicio de tu turno. Además, cada vez que tires un Dado de Golpe para recuperar puntos de golpe, dobla el número de puntos de golpe que recuperas.

name: Periapt of Wound Closure
desc:
Engraved with symbols of healing, this warm silver pendant prevents you from dying.

* While wearing this pendant, you automatically stabilize when dying. You may still roll your Death _tirada de salvación_  to try and roll a 20, but may only roll once on each of your turns and no more than three times.
* Whenever you roll a Hit Die to regain puntos de golpe, you regain twice as many as normal.

name: Pestilent Spear
desc: The head of this spear is deadly sharp, despite the rust and slimy residue on it that always accumulate no matter how well it is cleaned. When you hit a criatura with this magic weapon, it debe tener éxito en a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Constitución or contract the sewer plague disease.

name: Phase Arrow
desc: When you make a ataque a distancia with this arrow, the attack ignores half and three-quarters cover as the arrow dips briefly into the Plane of Shadow on its way to the objetivo. If the objetivo has full cover and you are aware the objetivo is in a particular space, you can fuego this arrow at the objetivo with desventaja on the tirada de ataque.

name: Phase Mirror
desc: Unlike other magic items, multiple criaturas can attune to the phase mirror by touching it as part of the same descanso corto. A criatura remains attuned to the mirror as long as it is on the same plane of existence as the mirror or until it chooses to end its attunement to the mirror during a descanso corto. Phase mirrors look almost identical to standard mirrors, but their surfaces are slightly clouded. These mirrors are found in a variety of sizes, from handheld to massive disks. The larger the mirror, the more power it can take in, and consequently, the more criaturas it can affect. When it is created, a mirror is connected to a specific plane. The mirror draws in starlight and uses that energy to move between its current plane and its connected plane. While holding or touching a fully charged mirror, an attuned criatura can use an action to speak the command word and activate the mirror. When activated, the mirror transports todas las criaturas attuned to it to the mirror's connected plane or back to the Material Plane at a destination of the activating criatura's choice. This effect works like the plane shift spell, except it transports only attuned criaturas, regardless of their distance from each other, and the destination must be on the Material Plane or the mirror's connected plane. If the mirror is broken, its magic ends, and each attuned criatura is trapped in whatever plane it occupies when the mirror breaks. Once activated, the mirror stays active for 24 horas and any attuned criatura can use an action to transport all attuned criaturas back and forth between the two planes. After these 24 horas have passed, the power drains from the mirror, and it can't be activated again until it is recharged. Each phase mirror has a different recharge time and limit to the number of criaturas that can be attuned to it, depending on the mirror's size.

name: Phidjetz Spinner
desc:
This dart was crafted by the monk Phidjetz, a martial recluse obsessed with dragons. The spinner consists of a golden central disk with four metal dragon heads protruding symmetrically from its center point: one red, one white, one blue and one black. As an action, you can spin the disk using the pinch grip in its center. You choose a single objetivo within 30 pies and make a ataque a distancia roll. The spinner then flies at the chosen objetivo. Once airborne, each dragon head emits a blast of elemental energy appropriate to its type. When you hit a criatura, determine which dragon head affects it by rolling a d4 on the following chart. | d4 | Effect |
| --- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 1 | Red. The objetivo recibe 1d6 daño de fuego and combustible materials on the objetivo ignite, doing 1d4 daño de fuego each turn until it is put out. |
| 2 | White. The objetivo recibe 1d6 daño de frío and is apresado until the start of your next turn. |
| 3 | Blue. The objetivo recibe 1d6 daño de rayo and is paralizado until the start of your next turn. |
| 4 | Black. The objetivo recibe 1d6 daño de ácido and is envenenado until the start of your next turn. | After the attack, the spinner flies up to 60 pies and tries to return to your hand. If you have no hand free, it falls to the ground at your pies.

name: Philter of Love
desc: La próxima vez que veas a una criatura en los 10 minutos siguientes a beber este filtro, quedas hechizado por esa criatura durante 1 hora. Si la criatura es de una especie y género por los que normalmente te sientes atraído, la consideras tu verdadero amor mientras estás hechizado. El líquido efervescente de tonos rosados de esta poción contiene una burbuja con forma de corazón que es fácil de pasar por alto.

name: Philter of Love
desc: After drinking this philter, the next time you see a criatura in the next 10 minutos, you become _charmed_  by that criatura for 1 hora. If you would normally be attracted to the criatura, while hechizado you believe it to be your true love.

name: Philter of Luck
desc:
When you drink this vibrant green, effervescent potion, you gain a finite amount of good fortune. Roll a d3 to determine where your fortune falls: ability checks (1), tirada de salvacións (2), or attack rolls (3). When you make a roll associated with your fortune, you can choose to tap into your good fortune and reroll the d20. This effect ends after you tap into your good fortune or when 1 hora has passed. | d3 | Use fortune for |
| --- | --------------- |
| 1 | ability checks |
| 2 | tirada de salvacións |
| 3 | attack rolls |

name: Phoenix Ember
desc: This egg-shaped red and black stone is hot to the touch. An ancient, fossilized phoenix egg, the stone holds the burning essence of life and rebirth. While you are carrying the stone, you have resistance to daño de fuego. Fiery Rebirth. If you drop to 0 puntos de golpe while carrying the stone, you can drop to 1 punto de golpe instead. If you do, a wave of flame bursts out from you, filling the area within 20 pies of you. Each of your enemigos in the area debe realizar a CD 17 tirada de salvación de Destreza, taking 8d6 daño de fuego en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one. Once used, this property can’t be used again until the next dawn, and a small, burning crack appears in the egg’s surface. Spells. The stone has 3 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from it: revivify (1 charge), raise dead (2 charges), or resurrection (3 charges, the spell functions as long as some bit of the objetivo’s body remains, even just ashes or dust). If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the stone shatters into searing fragments, and a firebird (see Tome of Beasts) arises from the ashes. On any other roll, the stone regains 1d3 charges.

name: Phoenix-Feather Cap
desc: While attuned to this stylish cap, you can cast __fly_ on yourself at will without the need for components. In addition, the cap has 2 charges. You can use an action to expend a charge to use Wild Shape as if you were a _druid_  of 10th level. While using Wild Shape, you always retain one distinctive visual characteristic no matter what beast you are transformed into. The cap regains all of its expended charges whenever you finish a _short or long rest_ .

name: Pick of Ice Breaking
desc: The metal head of this war pick is covered in tiny arcane runes. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. The bonus increases to +3 when you use the war pick to attack a construct, elemental, fey, or other criatura made almost entirely of ice or snow. When you roll a 20 on an tirada de ataque made with this weapon against such a criatura, the objetivo recibe an extra 2d8 daño perforante. When you hit an object made of ice or snow with this weapon, the object doesn't have a damage threshold when determining el daño you deal to it with this weapon.

name: Pipes of Haunting
desc: Debes tener competencia con instrumentos de viento para usar estas flautas. Tienen 3 cargas. Puedes usar una acción para tocarlas y gastar 1 carga para crear una melodía inquietante y hechizante. Cada criatura que se encuentre a 9m de ti y te escuche tocar debe superar una tirada de salvación de Sabiduría CD 15 o quedar asustada de ti durante 1 minuto. Si lo deseas, todas las criaturas en el área que no sean hostiles hacia ti superan automáticamente la tirada de salvación. Una criatura que falle la tirada de salvación puede repetirla al final de cada uno de sus turnos, poniendo fin al efecto sobre sí misma si tiene éxito. Una criatura que supere su tirada de salvación es inmune al efecto de estas flautas durante 24 horas. Las flautas recuperan 1d3 cargas gastadas diariamente al amanecer.

name: Pipes of Haunting
desc: Using these pipes requires competencia with wind instruments. You can use an action and expend 1 charge to play them and create an eerie, spellbinding tune. cada criatura within 30 pies that hears you play makes a CD 15 Sabiduría _tirada de salvación_  or becomes _frightened_  of you for 1 minuto. You may choose for nonhostile criaturas in the area to automatically succeed on the tirada de salvación. A asustado criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito. A criatura that succeeds on its tirada de salvación is immune to these _pipes of haunting_ for 24 horas. The pipes have 3 charges and regain 1d3 charges each dawn.

name: Pipes of Madness
desc: You must be proficient with wind instruments to use these strange, pale ivory pipes. They have 5 charges. You can use an action to play them and expend 1 charge to emit a weird strain of alien music that is audible up to 600 pies away. Choose up to three criaturas within 60 pies of you that can hear you play. Each objetivo debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be affected as if you had cast the confusion spell on it. The pipes regain 1d4 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Pipes of the Sewers
desc:
Debes tener competencia con instrumentos de viento para usar estas flautas. Mientras estás sintonizado con ellas, las ratas ordinarias y las ratas gigantes son indiferentes hacia ti y no te atacarán a menos que las amenaces o les hagas daño.

Las flautas tienen 3 cargas. Si tocas las flautas como una acción, puedes usar una acción adicional para gastar entre 1 y 3 cargas, invocando una nube de ratas por cada carga gastada, siempre que haya suficientes ratas en un radio de medio kilómetro como para ser convocadas de esta forma (según determine el DM). Si no hay suficientes ratas para formar una nube, la carga se desperdicia. Las nubes convocadas se mueven hacia la música por la ruta más corta disponible, pero fuera de eso no están bajo tu control. Las flautas recuperan 1d3 cargas gastadas diariamente al amanecer.

Siempre que una nube de ratas que no esté bajo el control de otra criatura se acerque a 9m de ti mientras estás tocando las flautas, puedes realizar una prueba de Carisma enfrentada a la prueba de Sabiduría de la nube. Si pierdes la confrontación, la nube actúa como lo haría normalmente y no puede ser influenciada por la música de las flautas durante las próximas 24 horas. Si ganas la confrontación, la nube queda influenciada por la música de las flautas y se vuelve amistosa contigo y con tus compañeros mientras sigas tocando las flautas cada ronda como una acción. Una nube amistosa obedece tus órdenes. Si no le das ninguna orden a una nube amistosa, esta se defiende a sí misma pero no realiza ninguna otra acción. Si una nube amistosa comienza su turno y no puede escuchar la música de las flautas, tu control sobre esa nube termina, y la nube actúa como lo haría normalmente y no puede ser influenciada por la música de las flautas durante las próximas 24 horas.

name: Pipes of the Sewers
desc:
You must be proficient with wind instruments to use these pipes. The pipes have 3 charges and regain 1d3 expended charges at dawn. 

You can use an action to expend 1 to 3 charges and play the pipes, summoning a _swarm of rats_  for each expended charge. Summoned swarms are not under anyone’s control and appear by the shortest available route, and if there are not enough rats within a half milla (at the Narrator’s discretion) for this to take effect the expended charges are wasted and no swarm is summoned.

While you are using an action to play the pipes, you can make a Carisma check contested by the Sabiduría check of a swarm of rats within 30 pies. en un fallo, the swarm acts normally and is immune to the pipes for 24 horas. en un éxito, the swarm becomes friendly to you and your aliados until you stop playing the pipes, following your commands. If not given any commands a friendly swarm defends itself but otherwise recibe no actions. Any friendly swarm that begins its turn unable to hear music from the pipes breaks your control, behaving as normal and immune to the effects of the pipes for 24 horas.

name: Pistol of the Umbral Court
desc: This hand crossbow is made from coal-colored wood. Its limb is made from frío steel and boasts engravings of sharp teeth. The barrel is magically oiled and smells faintly of ash. The grip is made from rough leather. You gain a +2 bonus on attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you hit with an attack with this weapon, you can fuerza the objetivo of your attack to succeed on a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Fuerza or be pushed 5 pies away from you. The objetivo recibe damage, as normal, whether it was pushed away or not. As a acción adicional, you can increase the distance criaturas are pushed to 20 pies for 1 minuto. If the criatura strikes a solid object before the movement is complete, it recibe 1d6 daño contundente for every 10 pies traveled. Once used, this property of the crossbow can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Plague Doctor's Mask
desc:
This waxed leather mask covers an entire humanoid face and resembles the beak of a bird. A pair of glass lenses allow you to see through it and the bill provides a constant smell of lavender. While attuned to the _plague doctor’s mask_, you gain an expertise die on Constitución _tirada de salvacións_  against _diseases_ .

When you spend your action to concentrate and inhale the fragrance inside the mask, you recall memories from the brilliant surgeon who created the item.
