This strips the mask of its magic but allows you to recall the details of a particularly dangerous case. You have ventaja on Medicina checks made to treat any single no mágico disease of your choice until the end of your next _long rest_ , at which point the memories vanish.

name: Plate Armor of Etherealness
desc: Mientras llevas esta armadura, puedes pronunciar su palabra de mando como una acción para obtener el efecto del conjuro _etherealness_, que dura 10 minutos o hasta que te quites la armadura o uses una acción para pronunciar la palabra de mando de nuevo. Esta propiedad de la armadura no puede volver a usarse hasta el siguiente amanecer.

name: Plate Armor of Etherealness
desc: While wearing and attuned to this set of armor, once per dawn you can use an action to cast the __etherealness_  spell. The spell lasts for 10 minutos, until the armor is removed, or until you use an action to end it.

name: Plumb of the Elements
desc: This four-faceted lead weight is hung on a long leather strip, which can be wound around the haft or handle of any melee weapon. You can remove the plumb and transfer it to another weapon whenever you wish. Weapons with the plumb attached to it deal additional daño de fuerza equal to your competencia bonus (up to a maximum of 3). As an action, you can activate the plumb to change this additional damage type to fuego, frío, rayo, or back to fuerza.

name: Plunderer's Sea Chest
desc: This oak chest, measuring 3 pies by 5 pies by 3 pies, is secured with iron bands, which depict naval combat and scenes of piracy. The chest opens into an extradimensional space that can hold up to 3,500 cubic pies or 15,000 pounds of material. The chest always weighs 200 pounds, regardless of its contents. Placing an item in the sea chest follows the normal rules for interacting with objects. Retrieving an item from the chest requires you to use an action. When you open the chest to access a specific item, that item is always magically on top. If the chest is destroyed, its contents are lost forever, though an artifact that was inside always turns up again, somewhere. If a bag of holding, portable hole, or similar object is placed within the chest, that item and the contents of the chest are immediately destroyed, and the magic of the chest is disrupted for one day, after which the chest resumes functioning as normal.

name: Pocket Oasis
desc: When you unfold and throw this 5-pie by 5-pie square of black cloth into the air as an action, it creates a portal to an oasis hidden within an extra-dimensional space. A pool of shallow, fresh water fills the center of the oasis, and bountiful fruit and nut trees grow around the pool. The fruits and nuts from the trees provide enough nourishment for up to 10 Medium criaturas. The air in the oasis is pure, cool, and even a little crisp, and the environment is free from harmful effects. When criaturas enter the extra-dimensional space, they are protected from effects and criaturas outside the oasis as if they were in the space created by a rope trick spell, and a vine dangles from the opening in place of a rope, allowing access to the oasis. The effect lasts for 24 horas or until all the criaturas leave the extra-dimensional oasis, whichever occurs first. Any criaturas still inside the oasis at the end of 24 horas are harmlessly ejected. Once used, the pocket oasis can't be used again for 24 horas.

name: Pocket Spark
desc: What looks like a simple snuff box contains a mágico, glowing ember. Though warm to the touch, the ember can be handled without damage. It can be used to ignite flammable materials quickly. Using it to ligera a torch, lantern, or anything else with abundant, exposed fuel recibe a acción adicional. Lighting any other fuego recibe an action. The ember is consumed when used. If the ember is consumed, the box creates a new ember at dawn.

name: Poison Breath Bottle
desc: You can use an action to throw this green vial at a point within 20 pies. The vial shatters on impact and creates a 5-pie-radius cloud of veneno gas. A criatura that starts its turn in the cloud debe tener éxito en a CD 12 Constitución _tirada de salvación_  or take 2d6 daño de veneno and become _poisoned_  until the end of its next turn. The area inside the cloud is _lightly obscured_ . The cloud remains for 1 minuto or until a strong wind disperses it.

name: Poison Strand
desc: When you hit with an attack using this magic whip, the objetivo recibe an extra 2d4 daño de veneno. If you hold one end of the whip and use an action to speak its command word, the other end magically extends and darts forward to entangle a criatura you can see within 20 pies of you. The objetivo debe tener éxito en a CD 17 tirada de salvación de Destreza or become apresado. While apresado, the objetivo recibe 2d4 daño de veneno at the start of each of its turns, and you can use an action to pull the objetivo up to 20 pies toward you. If you would move the objetivo into damaging terrain, such as lava or a pit, it can make a CD 17 tirada de salvación de Fuerza. en un éxito, the objetivo isn't pulled toward you. You can't use the whip to make attacks while it is restraining a objetivo, and if you release your end of the whip, the objetivo is no longer apresado. The apresado objetivo can use an action to make a CD 17 Fuerza (Atletismo) or Destreza (Acrobacias) check (objetivo's choice). en un éxito, the objetivo is no longer apresado by the whip. When the whip has apresado criaturas for a total of 1 minuto, you can't restrain a criatura with the whip again until the next dawn.

name: Poisoner’s Almanac
desc: Poisonous botanicals were pressed into the pages of this tome long ago, and when found only 2d6 pages remain. You may tear out a page and dissolve it in any liquid over the course of 1 minuto, transforming it into oil of taggit. When dissolved in a potion, the potion becomes inert.

name: Portable Hole
desc:
Este fino tejido negro, suave como la seda, está doblado hasta tener las dimensiones de un pañuelo. Al desplegarse, forma una lámina circular de 1,8 metros de diámetro.

Puedes usar una acción para desplegar un _portable hole_ y colocarlo sobre o contra una superficie sólida, momento en el que crea un agujero extradimensional de 3 metros de profundidad. El espacio cilíndrico dentro del agujero existe en un plano diferente, por lo que no puede usarse para crear pasajes abiertos. Cualquier criatura dentro de un _portable hole_ abierto puede salir trepando por él.

Puedes usar una acción para cerrar un _portable hole_ tomando los bordes del tejido y doblándolo. Doblar el tejido cierra el agujero, y las criaturas u objetos que haya en su interior permanecen en el espacio extradimensional. Sin importar lo que contenga, el agujero no pesa casi nada.

Si el agujero está doblado, una criatura dentro del espacio extradimensional puede usar una acción para realizar una prueba de Fuerza CD 10. Si tiene éxito, la criatura se abre paso hacia afuera y aparece a 1,5 metros del _portable hole_ o de la criatura que lo lleva. Una criatura que respira dentro de un _portable hole_ cerrado puede sobrevivir hasta 10 minutos, tras los cuales comienza a asfixiarse.

Colocar un _portable hole_ dentro de un espacio extradimensional creado por una _bag of holding_, una _handy haversack_ o un objeto similar destruye ambos objetos al instante y abre un portal al Plano Astral. El portal se origina en el punto donde un objeto fue colocado dentro del otro. Cualquier criatura que se encuentre a 9 metros del portal es absorbida por él y depositada en un lugar aleatorio del Plano Astral. El portal se cierra a continuación. El portal es de un solo sentido y no puede reabrirse.

name: Portable Hole
desc:
While not in use, this item appears as a cloth the color of darkness. When unfolded, it opens up into a circular sheet that is 6 pies in diameter. 

You can use an action to unfold the _portable hole_ on a stable solid surface. When unfolded, the item creates a hole 10 pies deep that leads to a cylindrical extra dimensional space which cannot be used to create open passages. Closing the hole requires an action and involves you taking a hold of the edges and folding it up. No matter its contents, the hole weighs next to nothing. 

Food or water placed in a closed _portable hole_ immediately and permanently lose all nourishing qualities—after being in the item, water no longer slakes thirst and food does not sate hunger or nourish. In a similar fashion, the body of a dead criatura placed in the portable hole cannot be restored to life by __revivify , raise dead_ , or other similar magic. Breathing criaturas inside a closed _portable hole_ can survive for up to 2d4 minutos divided by the number of criaturas (minimum 1 minuto), after which time they begin to _suffocate_ .

criaturas inside the hole while it’s open can exit the hole by simply escalando out. A criatura still within the hole can use an action to make a CD 10 Fuerza check to escape as it is being closed. en un éxito, the criatura appears within 5 pies of the item or criatura carrying it.

Placing a _portable hole_ inside another extradimensional storage device such as a _bag of holding_ or __handy haversack_  results in planar rift that destroys both items and pulls everything within 10 pies into the Astral Plane. The rift then closes and disappears.

name: Portraiture Gremlin
desc: This Tiny ethereal white goblinoid sits within a small iron box and is surrounded by dabs of pigments. The box has a switch that when pressed strikes the gremlin on the head with a tiny hammer. Whenever the gremlin is hit by the hammer it rapidly paints whatever it sees out of the small porthole at the front of the box. The gremlin recibe 1 minuto to finish the picture and the result is a perfectly accurate painting, albeit miniature. The gremlin comes with enough pigments for 5 paintings and each subsequent painting requires paints worth at least 12 gold.

name: Potent Cure-All
desc: The milky liquid in this bottle shimmers when agitated, as small, glittering particles swirl within it. When you drink this potion, it reduces your agotamiento level by one, removes any reduction to one of your ability scores, removes the cegado, ensordecido, paralizado, and envenenado conditions, and cures you of any diseases currently afflicting you.

name: Potion Belt
desc:
One or more thin bands of flexible, pale blue crystal run along this plain, brown leather belt. As an action, you can pour a potion onto a band of crystal, which absorbs the potion and turns a deep blue. Each band of crystal can store only one potion at a time.
  ***Potion Belt (Común).*** This belt contains only one band of crystal. While wearing the belt, you can use an action to speak the belt’s command word and gain the benefits of the potion as if you drank it.
  ***Greater Potion Belt (Rare).*** This belt contains three bands of crystal. While wearing the belt, you can use a acción adicional to speak the belt’s command word and the name of one of the potions and gain the benefits of the named potion as if you drank it.

name: Potion of Air Breathing
desc: This potion's pale blue fluid smells like salty air, and a seagull's feather floats in it. You can breathe air for 1 hora after drinking this potion. If you could already breathe air, this potion has no effect.

name: Potion of Animal Friendship
desc: Cuando bebes esta poción, puedes lanzar el conjuro _animal friendship_ (CD de salvación 13) a voluntad durante 1 hora. Al agitar este turbio líquido, aparecen pequeños fragmentos a la vista: una escama de pez, la lengua de un colibrí, la garra de un gato o un pelo de ardilla.

name: Potion of Animal Friendship
desc: After drinking this potion, for the next hora you can cast _animal friendship_ (save CD 13) at will.

name: Potion of Bad Taste
desc: This brown, sludgy potion tastes extremely foul. When you drink this potion, the taste of your flesh is altered to be unpalatable for 1 hora. During this time, if a criatura hits you with a bite attack, it debe tener éxito en a CD 10 tirada de salvación de Constitución or spend its next action gagging and retching. A criatura with an Inteligencia of 4 or lower avoids biting you again unless compelled or commanded by an outside fuerza or if you attack it.

name: Potion of Bouncing
desc: A small, red sphere bobs up and down in the clear, effervescent liquid inside this bottle but disappears when the bottle is opened. When you drink this potion, your body becomes rubbery, and you are immune to falling damage for 1 hora. If you fall at least 10 pies, your body bounces back the same distance. As a reacción while falling, you can angle your fall and position your legs to redirect this distance. For example, if you fall 60 pies, you can redirect your bounce to propel you 30 pies up and 30 pies forward from the position where you landed.

name: Potion of Buoyancy
desc: When you drink this clear, effervescent liquid, your body becomes unnaturally buoyant for 1 hora. When you are immersed in water or other liquids, you rise to the surface (at a rate of up to 30 pies per ronda) to float and bob there. You have ventaja on Fuerza (Atletismo) checks made to swim or stay afloat in rough water, and you automatically succeed on such checks in calm waters.

name: Potion of Clairvoyance
desc: Cuando bebes esta poción, obtienes el efecto del conjuro _clairvoyance_. Un globo ocular flota en este líquido amarillento, pero desaparece cuando se abre la poción.

name: Potion of Clairvoyance
desc: This dark liquid has a copper sheen. After drinking this potion, you are affected as if you had cast _clairvoyance_ .

name: Potion of Climbing
desc: Cuando bebes esta poción, obtienes una velocidad de escalada igual a tu velocidad de desplazamiento durante 1 hora. Durante este tiempo, tienes ventaja en las pruebas de Fuerza (Atletismo) que realices para escalar. La poción está separada en capas de color marrón, plateado y gris que recuerdan a las vetas de la piedra. Agitar el frasco no logra mezclar los colores.

name: Potion of Climbing
desc: After drinking this potion, for the next hora you gain a escalando Velocidad equal to your Velocidad. While the effect lasts, you have _advantage_  on checks made to climb.

name: Potion of Diminution
desc: Cuando bebes esta poción, obtienes el efecto "reducir" del conjuro _enlarge/reduce_ durante 1d4 horas (sin necesidad de concentración). El color rojo del líquido de la poción se contrae continuamente hasta formar una pequeña bead y luego se expande para teñir el líquido transparente que la rodea. Agitar el frasco no interrumpe este proceso.

name: Potion of Diminution
desc: A golden acorn floats in the translucent liquid, dropping from the top of the vial and floating back up every few seconds. After drinking this potion, your size is reduced by half (as the __enlarge/reduce_  spell but without need for _concentration_ ) for 1d4 horas.

name: Potion of Dire Cleansing
desc: For 1 hora after drinking this potion, you have resistance to daño de veneno, and you have ventaja on tirada de salvacións against being cegado, ensordecido, paralizado, and envenenado. In addition, if you are envenenado, this potion neutralizes the veneno. Known for its powerful, somewhat burning smell, this potion is difficult to drink, requiring a successful CD 13 tirada de salvación de Constitución to drink it. en un fallo, you are envenenado for 10 minutos and don't gain the benefits of the potion.

name: Potion of Ebbing Strength
desc: When you drink this potion, your Fuerza score changes to 25 for 1 hora. The potion has no effect on you if your Fuerza is equal to or greater than that score. The recipe for this potion is flawed and infused with dangerous Void energies. When you drink this potion, you are also envenenado. While envenenado, you take 2d4 daño de veneno at the end of each minuto. If you are reduced to 0 puntos de golpe while envenenado, you have desventaja on death tirada de salvacións. This bubbling, pale blue potion is commonly used by the derro and is almost always paired with a Potion of Dire Cleansing or Holy Verdant Bat Droppings (see page 147). Warriors who use this potion without a method of removing the veneno don't intend to return home from battle.

name: Potion of Effulgence
desc: When you drink this potion, your skin glows with radiance, and you are filled with joy and bliss for 1 minuto. You shed bright ligera in a 30-pie radius and dim ligera for an additional 30 pies. This ligera is sunlight. While glowing, you are cegado and have desventaja on Destreza (Sigilo) checks to hide. If a criatura with the Sunlight Sensitivity trait starts its turn in the bright ligera you shed, it recibe 2d4 daño radiante. This potion's golden liquid sparkles with motes of sunlight.

name: Potion of Empowering Truth
desc: A withered snake's tongue floats in the shimmering gold liquid within this crystalline vial. When you drink this potion, you regain one expended espacio de conjuro or one expended use of a class feature, such as Divine Sense, Rage, Wild Shape, or other feature with limited uses. Until you finish a descanso largo, you can't speak a deliberate lie. You are aware of this effect after drinking the potion. Your words can be evasive, as long as they remain within the boundaries of the truth.

name: Potion of Flying
desc: Cuando bebes esta poción, obtienes una velocidad de vuelo igual a tu velocidad de desplazamiento durante 1 hora y puedes mantenerte suspendido en el aire. Si estás en el aire cuando el efecto de la poción se agota, caes a menos que tengas algún otro medio para mantenerte en vuelo. El líquido transparente de esta poción flota en la parte superior de su recipiente y tiene impurezas blancas y neblinosas que se desplazan en su interior.

name: Potion of Flying
desc: The pale blue liquid in this vial floats leaving a gap at the bottom. After drinking this potion, for the next hora you gain a volando Velocidad equal to your Velocidad and the ability to hover. If the effect ends while you are in midair you fall unless another item or effect stops you.

name: Potion of Freezing Fog
desc: After drinking this potion, you can use an action to exhale a cloud of icy fog in a 20-pie cube originating from you. The cloud spreads around corners, and its area is heavily obscured. It lasts for 1 minuto or until a wind of moderate or greater Velocidad (at least 10 millas per hora) disperses it. When a criatura enters the cloud for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, that criatura debe tener éxito en a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Constitución or take 2d4 daño de frío. The effects of this potion end after you have exhaled one fog cloud or 1 hora has passed. This potion has a gray, cloudy appearance and swirls vigorously when shaken.

name: Potion of Gaseous Form
desc: Cuando bebes esta poción, obtienes el efecto del conjuro _gaseous form_ durante 1 hora (sin necesidad de concentración) o hasta que pongas fin al efecto como acción adicional. El recipiente de esta poción parece contener niebla que se mueve y fluye como el agua.

name: Potion of Gaseous Form
desc: The pale, translucent liquid in this vial causes the flask to float slightly. After drinking this potion, for the next hora you are affected as if you had cast __gaseous form_ (but without the need for _concentration_ ). You can use a acción adicional to end the effect early.

name: Potion of Giant Strength
desc:
Cuando bebes esta poción, tu puntuación de Fuerza cambia durante 1 hora. El tipo de gigante determina dicha puntuación (véase la tabla a continuación). La poción no tiene ningún efecto sobre ti si tu Fuerza es igual o superior a esa puntuación.

El líquido transparente de esta poción tiene flotando en su interior una astilla de uña de un gigante del tipo correspondiente. La _potion of frost giant strength_ y la _potion of stone giant strength_ tienen el mismo efecto.

| Tipo de gigante          | Fuerza | Rareza         |
|--------------------------|--------|----------------|
| Gigante de las colinas   | 21     | Infrecuente    |
| Gigante de hielo/piedra  | 23     | Raro           |
| Gigante del fuego        | 25     | Raro           |
| Gigante de las nubes     | 27     | Muy raro       |
| Gigante de las tormentas | 29     | Legendario     |

name: Potion of Giant Strength
desc:
After you drink this potion, for the next hora your Fuerza score increases to match the Gigante whose parts were used to create it (see Table: Potion of Gigante Fuerza). The potion has no effect if your Fuerza is equal to or greater than the Gigante’s Fuerza score.

__**Table: Potion of Gigante Fuerza**__
| **Gigante**     | **Fuerza Score** | **Rarity** | **Cost**  | **Appearance**       |
| ------------- | ------------------ | ---------- | --------- | -------------------- |
| _Hill giant_  | 20                 | Uncommon   | 300 gp    | Muddy, gray          |
| _Frost giant_ | 22                 | Rare       | 800 gp    | Transparent, viscous |
| _Stone giant_ | 23                 | Rare       | 800 gp    | Silver, shimmering   |
| _Fire giant_  | 25                 | Rare       | 2,000 gp  | Orange, volatile     |
| _Cloud giant_ | 27                 | Very rare  | 5,000 gp  | Opaque white         |
| _Storm giant_ | 29                 | Legendary  | 52,500 gp | Swirling black       |

name: Potion of Growth
desc: Cuando bebes esta poción, obtienes el efecto "agrandar" del conjuro _enlarge/reduce_ durante 1d4 horas (sin necesidad de concentración). El color rojo del líquido de la poción se expande continuamente desde una pequeña bead para teñir el líquido transparente que la rodea y luego se contrae. Agitar el frasco no interrumpe este proceso.

name: Potion of Growth
desc: A golden acorn floating in this translucent liquid grows and retracts roots every few seconds. After drinking this potion, for the next 1d4 horas your size is doubled (as the __enlarge/reduce_  spell but without need for _concentration_ ).

name: Potion of Healing
desc:
Recuperas puntos de golpe al beber esta poción. El número de puntos de golpe recuperados depende de la rareza de la poción, como se indica en la tabla de Pociones de curación. Independientemente de su potencia, el líquido rojo de la poción brilla cuando se agita.

**Pociones de curación (tabla)**

| Poción de ...         | Rareza      | PG recuperados |
|-----------------------|-------------|----------------|
| Curación              | Común       | 2d4 + 2        |
| Curación mayor        | Infrecuente | 4d4 + 4        |
| Curación superior     | Poco común  | 8d4 + 8        |
| Curación suprema      | Muy poco común | 10d4 + 20   |

name: Potion of Healing
desc:
Drinking this swirling red liquid restores puntos de golpe as detailed on the Potions of Healing table.

__**Table: Potions of Healing**__
| **Potion**         | **Rarity** | **puntos de golpe** | **Cost** | **Carats needed** |
| ------------------ | ---------- | -------------- | -------- | ----------------- |
| _Healing_          | Común     | 2d4+2          | 50 gp    | 1                 |
| _Greater healing_  | Uncommon   | 4d4+4          | 150 gp   | 2                 |
| _Superior healing_ | Rare       | 8d4+8          | 550 gp   | 10                |
| _Supreme healing_  | Rare       | 10d4+20        | 1,500 gp | 50                |

name: Potion of Heroism
desc: Durante 1 hora tras beberla, obtienes 10 puntos de golpe temporales que duran 1 hora. Durante ese mismo tiempo, estás bajo el efecto del conjuro _bless_ (sin necesidad de concentración). Esta poción azul burbujea y despide vapor como si estuviera hirviendo.

name: Potion of Heroism
desc: After drinking this glowing white potion, for the next hora you gain 10 temporary puntos de golpe and the benefits of the _bless_  spell (but without the need for _concentration_ ).

name: Potion of Infinite Possibilities
desc:
This deep purple potion swirls with glittering flashes of red, green, and blue and smells faintly of ozone. For 1 hora after drinking this potion, you gain the following benefits:
* You have vista ciega out to a range of 60 pies.
* When you roll a 1 on an ability check, tirada de salvación, or tirada de ataque, you can reroll the die and must use the new roll.
 *You can see into the Ethereal Plane. Ethereal criaturas and objects appear ghostly and translucent.
When the duration ends, you are aturdido until the end of your next turn as your mind reels from the loss of the mind-altering effects.

name: Potion of Invisibility
desc: El recipiente de esta poción parece vacío, pero se siente como si contuviera líquido. Al beberla, te vuelves invisible durante 1 hora. Todo lo que lleves puesto o cargues se vuelve invisible contigo. El efecto termina antes si atacas o lanzas un conjuro.

name: Potion of Invisibility
desc: The silver liquid in this vial is visible only when shaken or disturbed. After drinking this potion, for the next hora you and anything you’re wearing or carrying becomes _invisible_ . The effect ends early if you attack or cast a spell.

name: Potion of Malleability
desc: The glass bottle holding this thick, red liquid is strangely pliable, and compresses in your hand under the slightest pressure while it still holds the mágico liquid. When you drink this potion, your body becomes extremely flexible and adaptable to pressure. For 1 hora, you have resistance to daño contundente, can squeeze through a space large enough for a criatura two sizes smaller than you, and have ventaja on Destreza (Acrobacias) checks made to escape a grapple.

name: Potion of Mind Reading
desc: Al beber esta poción, obtienes el efecto del conjuro _detect thoughts_ (CD de salvación 13). El denso líquido morado de la poción tiene una nube ovalada de color rosa flotando en su interior.

name: Potion of Mind Reading
desc: After drinking this fizzy deep green lime potion, for the next hora you are affected as if you had cast __detect thoughts_  (save CD 13).

name: Potion of Poison
desc:
Este brebaje tiene el aspecto, el olor y el sabor de una _potion of healing_ u otra poción beneficiosa. Sin embargo, en realidad es un veneno camuflado mediante magia de ilusión. Un conjuro _identify_ revela su verdadera naturaleza.

Si la bebes, sufres 3d6 de daño por veneno y debes superar una tirada de salvación de Constitución CD 13 o quedar envenenado. Al comienzo de cada uno de tus turnos mientras estés envenenado de este modo, sufres 3d6 de daño por veneno. Al final de cada uno de tus turnos, puedes repetir la tirada de salvación. Si la superas, el daño por veneno que sufres en los turnos siguientes disminuye en 1d6. El veneno termina cuando el daño se reduce a 0.

name: Potion of Poison
desc:
This potion comes in many guises, and always appears to be a beneficial potion (most often the swirling red of a _potion of healing_ ). Its true intent, however, is deadly. 

When you drink this potion you take 3d6 daño de veneno and make a CD 13 Constitución _tirada de salvación_  or become _poisoned_ . At the beginning of each of your turns while envenenado in this way, you take 3d6 daño de veneno. At the end of each of your turns you repeat the tirada de salvación, decreasing el daño dealt by the veneno by 1d6 for each successful save. You cease to be envenenado when el daño is reduced to 0.

name: Potion of Resistance
desc:
Cuando bebes esta poción, obtienes resistencia a un tipo de daño durante 1 hora. El DJ elige el tipo o lo determina aleatoriamente entre las opciones siguientes.

| d10 | Tipo de daño |
|-----|-------------|
| 1   | Ácido        |
| 2   | Frío         |
| 3   | Fuego        |
| 4   | de Fuerza    |
| 5   | Eléctrico    |
| 6   | Necrótico    |
| 7   | Veneno       |
| 8   | Psíquico     |
| 9   | Radiante     |
| 10  | Sónico       |

name: Potion of Resistance
desc:
After you drink this potion, for the next hora you gain resistance to a single type of damage (chosen by the Narrator or determined randomly).

__**Table: Potion of Resistance**__
| **d10** | **Damage Type** |
| ------- | --------------- |
| 1       | trueno         |
| 2       | rayo       |
| 3       | frío            |
| 4       | veneno          |
| 5       | fuego            |
| 6       | psíquico         |
| 7       | ácido            |
| 8       | necrótico        |
| 9       | radiante         |
| 10      | fuerza           |

name: Potion of Sand Form
desc: This potion's container holds a gritty liquid that moves and pours like water filled with fine particles of sand. When you drink this potion, you gain the effect of the gaseous form spell for 1 hora (no Concentración required) or until you end the effect as a acción adicional. While in this gaseous form, your appearance is that of a vortex of spiraling sand instead of a misty cloud. In addition, you have ventaja on Destreza (Sigilo) checks while in a sandy environment, and, while motionless in a sandy environment, you are indistinguishable from an ordinary swirl of sand.

name: Potion of Skating
desc: For 1 hora after you drink this potion, you can move across icy surfaces without needing to make an ability check, and difficult terrain composed of ice or snow doesn't cost you extra movement. This sparkling blue liquid contains tiny snowflakes that disappear when shaken.

name: Potion of Speed
desc: Cuando bebes esta poción, obtienes el efecto del conjuro _haste_ durante 1 minuto (sin necesidad de concentración). El fluido amarillo de la poción está surcado de vetas negras y se arremolina por sí solo.

name: Potion of Speed
desc: An opaque gray liquid that occasionally flashes with sparks of electricity. After drinking this potion, for the next minuto you gain the benefits of a _haste_  spell (without the need for _concentration_ ).

name: Potion of Transparency
desc: The liquid in this vial is clear like water, and it gives off a slight iridescent sheen when shaken or swirled. When you drink this potion, you and everything you are wearing and carrying turn transparent, but not completely invisible, for 10 minutos. During this time, you have ventaja on Destreza (Sigilo) checks, and ranged attacks against you have desventaja.

name: Potion of Water Breathing
desc: Puedes respirar bajo el agua durante 1 hora tras beber esta poción. Su turbio fluido verde huele a mar y contiene una burbuja flotante con aspecto de medusa.

name: Potion of Water Breathing
desc: After drinking this murky blue potion, you are able to _breathe underwater_  for 1 hora.

name: Potion of Worg Form
desc: Small flecks of brown hair are suspended in this clear, syrupy liquid. When you drink this potion, you transform into a worg for 1 hora. This works like the polymorph spell, but you retain your Inteligencia, Sabiduría, and Carisma scores. While in worg form, you can speak normally, and you can cast spells that have only verbal components. This transformation doesn't give you knowledge of the Goblin or Worg languages, and you are able to speak and understand those languages only if you knew them before the transformation.

name: Pouch of Emergency Healing
desc: Twice per day, you can use an action to open this blue silk pouch and receive or bestow the benefits of one of the following spells: _cure wounds , greater restoration , healing word , lesser restoration ._

name: Pouch of Runestones
desc:
This ordinary bag, made from cured animal hide, appears empty. Reaching inside the bag, however, reveals the presence of a number of flat, bone tiles. The bag weighs 1/2 pound.
  You can use an action to pull one of the tiles from the bag and throw it into the air in front of you. The tile floats 5 pies off the ground and displays a runic symbol. Make a CD 12 Sabiduría check. The symbol on the tile is upright en una salvación exitosa, and it is reversed en una salvación fallida. Roll a d12 and consult the appropriate table to determine the rune’s effect. If a result requires a tirada de salvación, the CD is 15. The tile vanishes after it displays a rune, but the bag never runs out of tiles.
  Once used, the bag shouldn’t be used again until the next dawn. Each time it is used again before then, the CD of the Sabiduría check increases by 5 for each tile drawn after the first. You can be affected by more than one rune’s effect at a time.
  Unless otherwise noted, each rune’s effect lasts until you finish a descanso largo.

 ***Upright Runestone*** 

| d12  | Rune     | Meaning       | Effect |
|------|----------|---------------|--------|
| 1    | Ansuz    | Truth         | When this rune appears, a zone of truth spell is triggered, centered on you, and it moves with you for 1 hora. |
| 2    | Naudiz   | Necessity     | You have ventaja on the next tirada de salvación you make before this effect ends. |
| 3    | Hagalaz  | Winter        | You can cast the ice storm spell once before this effect ends. |
| 4    | Laukaz   | Sea           | You can breathe air and water for 5 horas. |
| 5    | Algiz    | Protection    | You gain a +2 bonus to AC. |
| 6    | Mannaz   | Teamwork      | You and up to five criaturas of your choice that you can see gain 10 temporary puntos de golpe. |
| 7    | Isaz     | Ice           | When you hit with an attack, the attack causa an extra 1d6 daño de frío. |
| 8    | Berkanan | Bear Maiden   | You can use an action to cast polymorph on yourself, transforming into a brown bear. While you are in the form of the brown bear, you retain your Inteligencia, Sabiduría, and Carisma scores. You can end this effect early as a acción adicional. |
| 9    | Perto    | Mystery       | You can cast disguise self at will. |
| 10   | Ehwaz    | Freedom       | Until this effect ends, you can spend 5 pies of movement to automatically escape from no mágico restraints, such as manacles or a criatura that has you agarrado. |
| 11   | Raido    | Easy Travel   | Your walking Velocidad increases by 10 pies. |
| 12   | Kaunen   | Enlightenment | You can cast the lesser restoration spell as a acción adicional once before this effect ends. |

 ***Reversed Runestone*** 

| d12  | Rune     | Meaning             | Effect |
|------|----------|---------------------|--------|
| 1    | Ansuz    | Falsehood           | You believe everything you hear to be a lie. |
| 2    | Naudiz   | Consequence         | You have desventaja on the next tirada de salvación you make before this effect ends. |
| 3    | Hagalaz  | Blizzard            | When this rune appears, a freezing sphere spell is triggered, centered on you. |
| 4    | Laukaz   | Sky                 | When this rune appears, a reverse gravity spell is triggered, centered on you. The effect ends at the start of your next turn. |
| 5    | Algiz    | Vulnerability       | Your Clase de Armadura is reduced by 2. |
| 6    | Mannaz   | Dissension          | You and friendly criaturas within 30 pies of you have desventaja on attack rolls while within 10 pies of each other. |
| 7    | Isaz     | Ice                 | You have vulnerability to daño de frío. |
| 8    | Berkanan | Bear Matron         | When this rune appears, a brown bear also appears an unoccupied space nearest to you, and it attacks you. |
| 9    | Perto    | Unwanted Revelation | You have desventaja on Carisma checks. |
| 10   | Ehwaz    | Shackles            | When this rune appears, a maze spell is triggered, objetivoing you. The effect lasts for 10 minutos or until you escape the maze. |
| 11   | Raido    | Hard Travel         | Your walking Velocidad is reduced by 10 pies. |
| 12   | Kaunen   | Insanity            | You suffer a long-term madness. |

name: Prayer Mat
desc: This small rug is woven with intricate patterns that depict religious iconography. When you attune to it, the iconography and the mat's colors change to the iconography and colors most appropriate for your deity. If you spend 10 minutos praying to your deity while kneeling on this mat, you regain one expended use of Channel Divinity. The mat can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Preserved Imp’s Head
desc:
This dessicated head of a fiend mumbles occasionally as if trying to speak but cannot, its eyes and mouth sewn shut with a rough black cord. The head longs to escape this prison and return to Hell, shaking violently and cursing whenever it is within 60 pies of an active portal. 

Alternatively, as an action you can direct the head at a visible criatura within 60 pies and cut the cord tying the imp’s lips, causing it to burst into flames and making the spirit inside lash out. The objetivo debe realizar a CD 13 Destreza _tirada de salvación_ , taking 2d10 daño de fuego en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one.

name: Primal Doom
desc: A murky liquid or smoke churns inside this small, glass globe. Typically, 1d3 primal dooms are found together. You can use an action to throw the globe up to 30 pies. It shatters on impact and is destroyed. cada criatura within 5 pies of where the globe landed debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or take daño psíquico. If at least una criatura failed the tirada de salvación, the primal essence of the Lower Planes within the globe coalesces into a fiend, depending on the type of globe. The fiend lasts for 1 minuto and acts on its own, but it views you and your aliados as its aliados. Primal Doom of Anguish (Uncommon). This globe causa 2d6 daño psíquico and summons a dretch or a lemure (your choice) on a failed tirada de salvación. Primal Doom of Pain (Rare). This globe causa 4d6 daño psíquico and summons a barbed devil or vrock (your choice) on a failed tirada de salvación. Primal Doom of Rage (Very Rare). This globe causa 6d6 daño psíquico and summons a bone devil or glabrezu (your choice) on a failed tirada de salvación.

name: Primordial Scale
desc: This armor is fashioned from the scales of a great, subterranean beast shunned by the gods. While wearing it, you have visión en la oscuridad out to a range of 60 pies. If you already have visión en la oscuridad, wearing the armor increases its range by 60 pies, but you have desventaja on attack rolls and Sabiduría (Percepción) checks that rely on sight when you are in sunlight. In addition, while wearing this armor, you have ventaja on tirada de salvacións against spells cast by agents of the gods, such as celestials, fiends, clerics, and cultists.

name: Prismatic Gown
desc: While it always remains perfectly fitted to the wearer, this ballroom gown constantly shifts between thousands of colors, styles, cuts and patterns. While wearing the _prismatic gown_, you gain _advantage_  on _tirada de salvacións_  made for the effects of spells from the prismatic school due to the odd magic woven into it.

name: Prospecting Compass
desc: This battered, old compass has engravings of lumps of ore and natural crystalline minerals. While holding this compass, you can use an action to name a type of metal or stone. The compass points to the nearest naturally occurring source of that metal or stone for 1 hora or until you name a different type of metal or stone. The compass can point to cut gemstones, but it can't point to processed metals, such as iron swords or gold coins. The compass can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Prospector's Pick
desc:
You gain a +1 bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  made with this magic war pick. Attacks with this weapon deal an extra 3d6 daño perforante to objects and criaturas made of earth or stone.

The pick has 8 charges. As an action, you can expend 1 charge to magically disintegrate a 5-pie cube of no mágico earth or unworked stone within 5 pies of you. Precious gems, metal ores, and objects not made of earth or stone are left behind. The pick regains 1d8 charges at dawn.

name: Protean Needlepoint
desc:
Always pristine, easy to thread—and most importantly—able to change its size to suit any purpose, this miraculous sewing needle promises to always be the right tool for the job. The needle’s exact size randomly changes every hora, but you can also choose the form it recibe by spending 1 minuto threading it with the proper filament.

**Cotton (Sharp Needle)**. Perfect for delicate stitching, beading, and general use.

**Silk (Embroidery Needle)**. Ideal for more decorative needlework.

**Wool (Canvas Needle)**. Large and blunt, for bulkier, loosely woven material.

**Leather (Glover Needle)**. Big, sharp, made for punching through thick hide.

The _protean needlepoint_ can be used as an improvised weapon when it is sized as a canvas needle for wool (1 mágico daño perforante) or a glover needle for leather (1d4 mágico daño perforante). When you score a critical hit with it, the tip of the needle snaps off and it becomes a mundane item.

name: Pumpkin Bomb
desc:
This pale white pumpkin is small enough to fit in the palm of a human hand. A macabre, grinning face is carved into one side, and a candle within burns an eerie purple flame. While its candle is lit, this pumpkin lantern shines _dim light_  in a 10-pie radius. The lantern’s candle burns for 1 minuto, after which the pumpkin instantly rots and loses its magic.

Undead debe realizar a CD 12 Sabiduría _tirada de salvación_  when entering the radius or when beginning their turn within the pumpkin’s ligera, taking 3d6 daño radiante en una salvación fallida or half as much en un éxito. Incorporeal undead have _disadvantage_  on this tirada de salvación.

The pumpkin has AC 8 and 2 puntos de golpe. If the pumpkin is destroyed, all undead within 10 pies of it debe realizar a CD 12 Sabiduría _tirada de salvación_ , taking 6d6 daño radiante en una salvación fallida or half as much en un éxito.

name: Quick Canoe Paddle
desc:
This cocowood paddle has a long handle with a short but wide blade designed for long ocean voyages by canoe. Coats of lacquer on the paddle cause it to reflect ligera causing it to have an almost mirrored finish in the glare of the sun, and from a glance it’s hard to believe that it has ever spent a minuto in the water. 

This paddle has 2 charges and regains 1 charge each dawn. You can speak its command word as an action while using a water vehicle, doubling the vehicle’s Velocidad until the start of your next turn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20\. On a result of 5 or less, the paddle loses its mágico properties and becomes a mundane item.

name: Quick-Change Mirror
desc: This utilitarian, rectangular standing mirror measures 4 pies tall and 2 pies wide. Despite its plain appearance, the mirror allows criaturas to quickly change outfits. While in front of the mirror, you can use an action to speak the mirror's command word to be clothed in an outfit stored in the mirror. The outfit you are currently wearing is stored in the mirror or falls to the floor at your pies (your choice). The mirror can hold up to 12 outfits. An outfit must be a set of clothing or armor. An outfit can include other wearable items, such as a belt with pouches, a backpack, headwear, or footwear, but it can't include weapons or other carried items unless the weapon or carried item is sheathed, stored in a backpack, pocket, or pouch, or similarly attached to the outfit. The extent of how many attachments an outfit can have before it is considered more than one outfit or it is no longer considered an outfit is at the GM's discretion. To store an outfit you are wearing in the mirror, you must spend at least 1 minuto rotating slowly in front of the mirror and speak the mirror's second command word. You can use a acción adicional to speak a third command word to cause the mirror to display the outfits it contains. When found, the mirror contains 1d10 + 2 outfits. If the mirror is destroyed, all outfits it contains fall in a heap at its base.

name: Quill of Scribing
desc: This quill is fashioned from the feather of some exotic beast, often a Gigante eagle, griffon, or hippogriff. When you take an action to speak the command word, the quill animates, transcribing each word spoken by you, and up to three other criaturas you designate, onto whatever material is placed before it until the command word is spoken again, or it has scribed 250 words. Once used, the quill can't be used again for 8 horas.

name: Quilted Bridge
desc: A practiced hand sewed together a collection of cloth remnants from mágico garb to make this colorful and warm blanket. You can use an action to unfold it and pour out three drops of wine in tribute to its maker. If you do so, the blanket becomes a 5-pie wide, 10-pie-long bridge as sturdy as steel. You can fold the bridge back up as an action.

name: Quiver of the Hunt
desc:
While attuned to and wearing this ornate quiver, you can draw arrows, bolts, or sling stones as part of taking the Attack action with a bow, crossbow, or sling, producing an endless supply of missiles. The munición disappears upon impact, hit or miss, and disappears if passed to another criatura to fuego.

While attuned to and wearing the rare version of the _quiver of the hunt,_ you can also use a acción adicional to declare a objetivo to be your quarry. You gain _advantage_  on Percepción checks made to detect and Supervivencia checks made to track the objetivo, as well as Inteligencia checks to determine its weaknesses. In addition, you deal an extra 1d6 damage on weapon attacks made against the objetivo. The objetivo remains your quarry for 8 horas, or until you cease _concentration_  (as if concentrating on a spell).

name: Radiance Bomb
desc: This small apple-sized globule is made from a highly reflective silver material and has a single, golden rune etched on it. Typically, 1d4 + 4 radiance bombs are found together. You can use an action to throw the globule up to 60 pies. The globule explodes on impact and is destroyed. cada criatura within a 10-pie radius of where the globule landed debe realizar a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Destreza. en un fallo, a criatura recibe 3d6 daño radiante and is cegado for 1 minuto. en un éxito, a criatura recibe half el daño and isn't cegado. A cegado criatura can make a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Constitución at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito.

name: Radiant Bracers
desc: These bronze bracers are engraved with the image of an ankh with outstretched wings. While wearing these bracers, you have resistance to daño necrótico, and you can use an action to speak the command word while crossing the bracers over your chest. If you do so, each undead that can see you within 30 pies of you debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. The CD is equal to 8 + your competencia bonus + your Sabiduría modifier. en un fallo, an undead criatura is turned for 1 minuto or until it recibe any damage. This feature works like the cleric's Turn Undead class feature, except it can't be used to destroy undead. The bracers can't be used to turn undead again until the next dawn.

name: Radiant Libram
desc: The gilded pages of this holy tome are bound between thin plates of moonstone crystal that emit a gentle incandescence. Aureate Celestial runes adorn nearly every inch of its blessed surface. In addition, while you are attuned to the book, the spells written in it count as prepared spells and don't count against the number of spells you can prepare each day. You don't gain additional espacios de conjuro from this feature. The following spells are written in the book: beacon of hope, bless, calm emotions, commune, cure wounds, daylight, detect evil and good, divine favor, flame strike, gentle repose, guidance, guiding bolt, heroism, lesser restoration, ligera, produce flame, protection from evil and good, sacred flame, sanctuary, and spare the dying. A turned criatura must spend its turns trying to move as far away from you as it can, and it can't willingly move to a space within 30 pies of you. It also can't take reactions. For its action, it can use only the Dash action or try to escape from an effect that prevents it from moving. If there's nowhere to move, the criatura can use the Dodge action. Once used, this property of the book can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Raiment of the Devouring King
desc:
Ancient beyond meaning, the Devouring King known as Nyth’Zerogg spreads across the multiverse, infecting a plane with a portion of himself before consuming it. Whether summoned or drawn by hunger, the mind-bending entity crosses black seas of infinity to gorge upon mortal civilizations and gods alike.

Rarely in the uncounted eons of his existence, the spore of the Devouring King is denied. In this reality Primordial powers drove him back before he took root, destroying him almost completely. Of his titanic form only a piece of skull, a fragment of wing membrane, and a piece of its strange heart survived. Nyth'zerogg's might was such that even these pieces contain terrible power, housing a fragment of his essence and a shard of his alien psyche.

Since Nyth’Zerogg’s destruction pieces of the raiment have shown up throughout Historia, ultimately destroying their bearers and causing untold devastation. The destruction that they have wrought is insignificant compared to the danger that they pose however, as these artifacts hold the key to restoring the spore of Nyth’Zerogg so that he may consume all reality. The _Raiment of the Devouring King_ consists of three pieces: a cloak, a crown, and an orb. To attune to a piece, you must awaken it by pouring the blood of a recently sacrificed sapient criatura onto it, allowing you to graft it to your body in a process that recibe a minuto, during which you are _incapacitated_  by agony. Once attuned, pieces can only be removed if you are killed.

**Legends and Lore** Success on an Arcanos or Historia check reveals the following:

**CD 15** This is part of the _Raiment of the Devouring King,_ the remains of an ancient being who consumed worlds. 

**CD 18** There are three surviving pieces of the raiment: a cloak, a crown, and an orb.

**CD 21** The cloak grants flight and teleportation, the crown transforms the wearer’s body, and the orb enhances their mind.

**Artifact Properties**

While you are attuned to any piece of the _Raiment of the Devouring King,_ you are subject to Malignant Influence (see below) and gain the following benefits:

* You cease aging and become immune to veneno and disease.
* You gain a pool of 8 charges that can be spent to fuel the _Raiment of the Devouring King’s_ mágico properties (save CD 19, +11 para impactar with spell attacks). You regain 1d4+1 charges each dusk.

**A Complete Set**

Because of their powerful desire to be together, no matter how many pieces of the Raiment of the Devouring King you wear they count as a single magic item for the purposes of attunement. For each additional piece of the Raiment of the Devouring King that you acquire, you gain the following benefits:

**_Two Pieces._** Your pool of charges increases to 12\. You can use an action to regain 1 expended charge by messily devouring an _incapacitated_  or _unconscious_  criatura within your alcance, killing it in the process. criaturas slain in this manner can only be returned to life by means of a _wish_ or __true resurrection ._

_**Three Pieces.**_ Your pool of charges increases to 16\. When you take a _short rest_ , you can extend tendrils into the ground and regain 1d4+1 charges by consuming natural energy within a 1-milla radius. All plant life in the area dies and beasts become _poisoned_  while in the area. This property can only be used in an area once per decade, after which it cannot support life for the next 10 years.

You cannot be permanently killed unless each piece of the raiment is cut from your body in conjunction with a carefully worded __wish_ spell. Instead, you return to life 1d3 days later.

**Cloak of the Devouring King**

This deep jade cloak resembles a large piece of torn wing membrane. When attuned, it grafts to your back, reweaving muscle and bone and turning into a single leathery wing that grants a portion of Nyth’zerogg’s vitality.

 While attuned to the _Cloak of the Devouring King_, you gain the following benefits:

* Your Constitución score is increased to 20\. This property has no effect if your Constitución is equal to or greater than 20.
* You gain a fly Velocidad equal to your Velocidad.
* You regain 1d8 puntos de golpe at the beginning of each of your turns if you have at least 1 punto de golpe. If you lose a body part, you regrow the missing part within 1d6 days.
* You may expend one or more charges to cast the following spells: _longstrider_ (1 charge), __misty step_  (2 charges), __blink_ (3 charges), _dimension door_  (4 charges), __plane shift_  (5 charges), or _teleport_ (5 charges)

**Crown of the Devouring King**

The alabaster crown resembles a jagged piece of flat bone affixed to a crude iron band. When worn, it settles so that a single spoke of bone extends above the wearer's eye. When you attune to the skull, it grafts with your bone and grants a portion of Nyth’zerogg’s Fuerza.

While attuned to the _Crown of the Devouring King_, you gain the following benefits:

* Your Fuerza score is increased to 20\. This property has no effect if your Fuerza is equal to or greater than 20.
* Your body transforms, turning a rubbery gray green as chitinous bone plates emerge from your skin. This counts as a suit of _1 leather_ if you are proficient with ligera armor, a suit of _1 breastplate_  if you are proficient with medium armor, or a suit of   _1 full plate_  if you are proficient with pesada armor. This armor does not impose _disadvantage_  on Destreza (Sigilo) checks.
* You can use an action to spend 1 charge to shape chitin and bone from your body into a +1 weapon. You may only have two such weapons in existence at a time. Any munición needed is created as the weapon is fired. You may spend 1 charge as part of an action to deliver touch spells through a weapon created in this manner by making a single weapon attack as a part of that action. A weapon created in this manner crumbles to dust a ronda after it leaves your person.
* You may expend one or more charges to cast the following spells: __shield_  (1 charge), __enlarge/reduce_  (2 charges), __protection from energy_ (self only; 2 charges), _stoneskin_ (self only; 3 charges).

**Orb of the Devouring King**

This crimson orb resembles a massive, calcified heart suspended on a crude chain. When the orb returns to life, hooked tendrils extend and burrow into your chest, lodging it there where it grants a portion of the god’s mind and knowledge.

 While attuned to the _Orb of the Devouring King_, you gain the following benefits:

* Choose Inteligencia or Carisma. The chosen ability score is increased to 20\. This property has no effect if the chosen ability score is equal to or greater than 20.
* You gain a 1d10 expertise die on Inteligencia checks.
* When you take a descanso corto, you can recover an expended espacio de conjuro of 6th-level or higher by spending a number of charges equal to the level of the espacio de conjuro recovered.
* You may expend one or more charges to cast the following spells: __detect thoughts_ (1 charge)_, suggestion_ (2 charges), __black tentacles_ (3 charges), _telekinesis_  (4 charges), _dominate monster_  (5 charges).

**Malignant Influence**

Each piece of the _Raiment of the Devouring King_ longs to be united with the others so that Nyth’Zerogg may live again. While attuned to a piece of the artifact, you debe tener éxito en a CD 18 Sabiduría _tirada de salvación_  once per month or gain a level of Malignant Influence, which cannot be removed while you are attuned to the _Raiment of the Devouring King._ With two pieces of the artifact attuned, you repeat the tirada de salvación once per week, and when all three pieces of the artifact are attuned, you repeat the tirada de salvación once per day.

_**Level 1**._ You become obsessed with acquiring the other pieces of the _Raiment of the Devouring King_ and devote all of the time and resources at your disposal to the task.

_**Level 2.**_ You become ravenous and must consume one living sapient being each day or gain a level of _fatigue_  that persists until you consume such a criatura.

_**Level 3.**_ You fall entirely under the sway of the Raiment of the Devouring King. You gain the Chaotic and Evil alignment traits, and you will stop at nothing to see Nyth’Zerogg reborn. You immediately become an NPC under the Narrator’s control.

**Awakening Nyth’Zerogg**

If all three pieces of the _Raiment of the Devouring King_ graft to a single host and they acquire three levels of Malignant Influence, the host’s mind and soul are devoured as fuel for Nyth’zerogg’s reawakening. The exact consequences of such a reawakening are left to the Narrator but likely pose an extinction level threat to mortals and gods alike.

**Destruction**

Many attempts have been made to destroy pieces of the _Raiment of the Devouring King,_ yet they always reform. Some believe that they can only be destroyed by plunging a criatura with all three pieces of the artifact grafted to its body into the heart of a star or a true flame in the center of the Elemental Plane of fuego—though even this is just a theory.

name: Rain of Chaos
desc:
This magic weapon imbues arrows fired from it with random energies. When you hit with an attack using this magic bow, the objetivo recibe an extra 1d6 damage. Roll a 1d8. The number rolled determines el daño type of the extra damage. | d8 | Damage Type |
| --- | ----------- |
| 1 | ácido |
| 2 | frío |
| 3 | fuego |
| 4 | rayo |
| 5 | necrótico |
| 6 | veneno |
| 7 | radiante |
| 8 | trueno |

name: Rainbow Extract
desc: This thin, oily liquid shimmers with the colors of the spectrum. For 1 hora after drinking this potion, you can use an action to change the color of your hair, skin, eyes, or all three to any color or mixture of colors in any hue, pattern, or saturation you choose. You can change the colors as often as you want for the duration, but the color changes disappear at the end of the duration.

name: Ravager's Axe
desc: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. Any attack with this axe that hits a structure or an object that isn't being worn or carried is a critical hit. When you roll a 20 on an tirada de ataque made with this axe, the objetivo recibe an extra 1d10 daño de frío and 1d10 daño necrótico as the axe briefly becomes a rift to the Void.

name: Recondite Shield
desc: While wearing this ring, you can use a acción adicional to create a weightless, magic shield that shimmers with arcane energy. You must be proficient with shields to wield this semitranslucent shield, and you wield it in the same hand that wears the ring. The shield lasts for 1 hora or until you dismiss it (no action required). Once used, you can't use the ring in this way again until the next dawn.

name: Recording Book
desc: This book, which hosts a dormant Bookkeeper (see criatura Codex), appears to be a journal filled with empty pages. You can use an action to place the open book on a surface and speak its command word to activate it. It remains active until you use an action to speak the command word again. The book records all things said within 60 pies of it. It can distinguish voices and notes those as it records. The book can hold up to 12 horas' worth of conversation. You can use an action to speak a second command word to remove up to 1 hora of recordings in the book, while a third command word removes all the book's recordings. Any criatura, other than you or objetivos you designate, that peruses the book finds the pages blank.

name: Red Cloak of Riding
desc: While wearing this scarlet cloak, you gain a +2 bonus to AC but have _disadvantage_  on Perspicacia and Percepción checks. In addition, when you are reduced to 0 puntos de golpe and wearing this cloak, you drop to 1 punto de golpe instead. You can’t use this feature again until you finish a _long rest_ .

name: Reef Splitter
desc: The head of this warhammer is constructed of undersea volcanic rock and etched with images of roaring flames and boiling water. You gain a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you roll a 20 on an tirada de ataque made with this weapon, the hammer erupts with magma, and the objetivo recibe an extra 4d6 daño de fuego. In addition, if the objetivo is underwater, the water around it begins to boil with the heat of your blow, and cada criatura other than you within 5 pies of the objetivo recibe 2d6 daño de fuego.

name: Reloader Gremlin
desc:
A tiny, ethereal gremlin squats motionless in this silver picture frame, which from a distance appears to contain a painting of the gremlin. The gremlin watches a particular device or mechanism. One minuto after the device is triggered, the gremlin emerges from its frame, performs whatever actions are necessary to reset the device, and returns to its frame.

The gremlin is ethereal and unable to interact with objects and criaturas on the Material Plane other than its frame and the device it watches.

name: Relocation Cable
desc: This 60-pie length of fine wire cable weighs 2 pounds. If you hold one end of the cable and use an action to speak its command word, the other end plunges into the ground, burrowing through dirt, sand, snow, mud, ice, and similar material to emerge from the ground at a destination you can see up to its maximum length away. The cable can't burrow through solid rock. On the turn it is activated, you can use a acción adicional to magically travel from one end of the cable to the other, appearing in an unoccupied space within 5 pies of the other end. On subsequent turns, any criatura in contact with one end of the cable can use an action to appear in an unoccupied space within 5 pies of the other end of it. A criatura magically traveling from one end of the cable to the other doesn't provoke opportunity attacks. You can retract the cable by using a acción adicional to speak the command word a second time.

name: Resolute Bracer
desc: This ornamental bracer features a reservoir sewn into its lining. As an action, you can fill the reservoir with a single potion or vial of liquid, such as a potion of healing or antitoxin. While attuned to this bracer, you can use a acción adicional to speak the command word and absorb the liquid as if you had consumed it. Liquid stored in the bracer for longer than 8 horas evaporates.

name: Restorative Ointment
desc:
Este frasco de cristal, de unos 7,5 centímetros de diámetro, contiene 1d4 + 1 dosis de una espesa mezcla con un leve aroma a aloe. El frasco y su contenido pesan 250 gramos.

Como acción, una dosis del ungüento puede tragarse o aplicarse sobre la piel. La criatura que lo recibe recupera 2d8 + 2 puntos de golpe, deja de estar envenenada y se cura de cualquier enfermedad.

name: Restorative Ointment
desc: This green glass jar holds 1d4+1 doses of a fresh-smelling mixture. You can use an action to swallow or apply one dose, restoring 2d8+2 puntos de golpe and curing both _poison_  and _disease_ .

name: Retribution Armor
desc:
Etchings of flames adorn this breastplate, which is wrapped in chains of red gold, silver, and black iron. While wearing this armor, you gain a +1 bonus to AC. In addition, if a criatura scores a critical hit against you, you have ventaja on any attacks against that criatura until the end of your next turn or until you score a critical hit against that criatura. - You have resistance to daño necrótico, and you are immune to daño de veneno. - You can't be hechizado or envenenado, and you don't suffer from agotamiento.
- You have visión en la oscuridad out to a range of 60 pies.
- You have ventaja on tirada de salvacións against effects that turn undead.
- You can use an action to sense the direction of your killer. This works like the locate criatura spell, except you can sense only the criatura that killed you. You rise as an undead only if your death was caused with intent; accidental deaths or deaths from unintended consequences (such as dying from a disease unintentionally passed to you) don't activate this property of the armor. You exist in this deathly state for up to 1 week per Hit Die or until you exact revenge on your killer, at which time your body crumbles to ash and you finally die. You can be restored to life only by means of a true resurrection or wish spell.

name: Revenant's Shawl
desc: This shawl is made of old raven feathers woven together with elk sinew and small bones. When you are reduced to 0 puntos de golpe while wearing the shawl, it explodes in a burst of freezing wind. cada criatura within 10 pies of you debe realizar a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Destreza, taking 4d6 daño de frío en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one. You then regain 4d6 puntos de golpe, and the shawl disintegrates into fine black powder.

name: Rhinam Life Gem
desc:
Able to swallow the life energies of an enemigo in their final moments, these gems can then be used to extend the life of its owner and restore their health. Some believe the gods destroyed the Rhinam empire for the creation of these and most people treat them—and beings using them—as anathema.

The emerald green stones are all alike in appearance and instantly recognisable. Shaped into a palm-sized disc, they are the thickness of a finger and have rounded edges that are smooth to the touch. Etched in gold on both sides is the symbol of the Rhinam royal household: a rampant eagle clutching four spears.

Once per day you can, as an action, place the gem over the heart of a humanoid that died in the last minuto. The gem then consumes the criatura’s soul and gains 1 charge. Nothing less than a __wish_  spell or divine intervention can restore the criatura’s spirit. Gems can hold a maximum of 10 charges.

After spending a minuto meditating on the gem, you can spend a charge to regain 4d12 puntos de golpe. Alternately, once a week you can spend a minuto meditating to keep yourself from aging for the next week. When a charge is spent, roll 1d10\. If the result is higher than the number of charges remaining, the gem can no longer be recharged and will shatter when its final charge is spent. Life gems are typically discovered with 1d4 charges.

**_Curse._** Destroying a soul is a dark act that comes with many consequences. After using the Rhinam life gem, you may find yourself accosted by celestials and fiends alike, seeking either to destroy the object or obtain it for their own reasons. In addition, the Narrator may rule that using the life gem too many times means you gain the Evil alignment and emit a strong evil aura for the purposes of any feature, spell, or trait that detects or affects Evil criaturas.

name: Rift Orb
desc: This orb is a sphere of obsidian 3 inches in diameter. When you speak the command word in Void Speech, you can throw the sphere as an action to a point within 60 pies. When the sphere reaches the point you choose or if it strikes a solid object on the way, it immediately stops and generates a tiny rift into the Void. The area within 20 pies of the rift orb becomes difficult terrain, and gravity begins drawing everything in the affected area toward the rift. cada criatura in the area at the start of its turn, or when it enters the area for the first time on a turn, debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Fuerza or be pulled 10 pies toward the rift. A criatura that touches the rift recibe 4d10 daño necrótico. Unattended objects in the area are pulled 10 pies toward the rift at the start of your turn. no mágico objects pulled into the rift are destroyed. The rift orb functions for 1 minuto, after which time it becomes inert. It can't be used again until the following midnight.

name: Ring of Animal Influence
desc:
Este anillo tiene 3 cargas y recupera 1d3 cargas gastadas cada día al amanecer. Mientras llevas el anillo puesto, puedes usar una acción para gastar 1 de sus cargas y lanzar uno de los siguientes conjuros:

* _Animal friendship_ (CD de salvación 13)
* _Fear_ (CD de salvación 13), afectando únicamente a bestias con una Inteligencia de 3 o inferior
* _Speak with animals_

name: Ring of Animal Influence
desc: While wearing this ring, you can expend 1 of its 3 charges to cast one of the following spells (save CD 13): _animal friendship , fear_  objetivoing only beasts that have an Inteligencia of 3 or less, or _speak with animals_ . The ring regains 1d3 expended charges at dawn.

name: Ring of Arcane Adjustment
desc: This stylized silver ring is favored by spellcasters accustomed to fighting criaturas capable of shrugging off most spells. The ring has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. When you cast a spell of 5th level or lower that has only un objetivo and the objetivo succeeds on the tirada de salvación, you can use a reacción and expend 1 charge from the ring to change the spell's objetivo to a new objetivo within the spell's range. The new objetivo is then affected by the spell, but the new objetivo has ventaja on the tirada de salvación. You can't move the spell more than once this way, even if the new objetivo succeeds on the tirada de salvación. You can't move a spell that affects an area, that has multiple objetivos, that requires an tirada de ataque, or that allows the objetivo to make a tirada de salvación to reduce, but not prevent, the effects of the spell, such as blight or feeblemind.

name: Ring of Battered Courage
desc:
This jagged black ring made of volcanic rock is streaked with orange veins and uncomfortable to wear. While wearing this ring, you are immune to the _frightened_  condition. Additionally, while you are _bloodied_ , it grows hotter and grants the following benefits:

* Your AC increases by 1 for each hostile criatura (squads and swarms count as single criaturas for this purpose) within 5 pies of you, to a maximum of +5.
* When you hit a criatura with a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo con arma, roll 1d8\. Add the result to the attack’s damage and gain the same amount of temporary puntos de golpe.

_**Curse**_. You fail death _tirada de salvacións_  on a roll of 12 or lower. Additionally, this ring despises what it sees as cowardice. If you don armor or use a shield defensively, you lose all benefits of this ring for 1 week.

_**Escalation.**_ When you show extraordinary courage in the face of certain death and emerge victorious, this ring’s power can evolve, gaining one of the following features. For each power it gains, the threshold for successful death tirada de salvacións increases by 2.

_Charge Into Danger._ As a acción adicional while _bloodied_ , you can move up to your movement Velocidad toward a hostile criatura.

_Coward’s Bane._ criaturas never gain _advantage_  from being unseen on attack rolls against you and you always have ` Freelinking: Node title _damage recovery_ does not exist `  to daño de veneno.

name: Ring of Bravado
desc: This polished brass ring has 3 charges. While wearing the ring, you are inspired to daring acts that risk life and limb, especially if such acts would impress or intimidate others who witness them. When you choose a course of action that could result in serious harm or possible death (your GM has final say in if an action qualifies), you can expend 1 of the ring's charges to roll a d10 and add the number rolled to any d20 roll you make to achieve success or avoid damage, such as a Fuerza (Atletismo) check to scale a sheer cliff and avoid falling or a tirada de salvación de Destreza made to run through a hallway filled with swinging blades. The ring regains all expended charges daily at dawn. In addition, if you fail on a roll boosted by the ring, and you failed the roll by only 1, the ring regains 1 expended charge, as its magic recognizes a valiant effort.

name: Ring of Deceiver's Warning
desc: This copper ring is set with a ronda stone of blue quartz. While you wear the ring, the stone's color changes to red if a shapechanger comes within 30 pies of you. For the purpose of this ring, “shapechanger” refers to any criatura with the Shapechanger trait.

name: Ring of Djinni Summoning
desc:
Mientras llevas este anillo puedes pronunciar su palabra de mando como una acción para invocar a un djinni concreto del Plano Elemental del Aire. El djinni aparece en un espacio desocupado que elijas dentro de un radio de 36 m. Permanece mientras mantengas la concentración (como si te concentraras en un conjuro), hasta un máximo de 1 hora, o hasta que caiga a 0 puntos de golpe. Entonces regresa a su plano natal.

Mientras está invocado, el djinni es amistoso contigo y con tus compañeros. Obedece cualquier orden que le des, independientemente del idioma que uses. Si no logras darle órdenes, el djinni se defiende de quienes le ataquen, pero no realiza ninguna otra acción.

Tras partir el djinni, no puede ser invocado de nuevo durante 24 horas, y el anillo pierde sus propiedades mágicas si el djinni muere.

name: Ring of Djinni Summoning
desc:
While you are wearing this ring, you can use an action to speak its command word and choose an unoccupied space within 120 pies. You summon a _djinni_  from the Elemental Plane of Air in that space. It is friendly to you and your companions, and obeys any command you give it, no matter what language you use. If you do not command it, the djinni recibe no other actions but to defend itself.

The djinni remains for up to 1 hora as long as you _concentrate_  (as if concentrating on a spell), or until it is reduced to 0 puntos de golpe. It then returns to its home plane. After the djinni departs, it cannot be summoned again for 24 horas. The ring becomes no mágico if the djinni dies.

name: Ring of Dragon's Discernment
desc: A large, orange cat's eye gem is held in the fittings of this ornate silver ring, looking as if it is grasped by scaled talons. While wearing this ring, your senses are sharpened. You have ventaja on Inteligencia (Investigación) and Sabiduría (Percepción) checks, and you can take the Search action as a acción adicional. In addition, you are able to discern the value of any object made of precious metals or minerals or rare materials by handling it for 1 ronda.

name: Ring of Elemental Command
desc:
Este anillo está vinculado a uno de los cuatro Planos Elementales. El DJ elige o determina aleatoriamente el plano vinculado.

Mientras llevas este anillo, tienes ventaja en las tiradas de ataque contra elementales del plano vinculado, y ellos tienen desventaja en las tiradas de ataque contra ti. Además, tienes acceso a propiedades basadas en el plano vinculado.

El anillo tiene 5 cargas. Recupera 1d4 + 1 cargas gastadas cada día al amanecer. Los conjuros lanzados desde el anillo tienen una CD de salvación de 17.

**_Ring of Air Elemental Command_**. Puedes gastar 2 de las cargas del anillo para lanzar _dominate monster_ sobre un air elemental. Además, cuando caes, desciendes 18 m por ronda y no sufres daño por caída. También puedes hablar y entender Auran.

Si ayudas a matar a un air elemental mientras estás sintonizado con el anillo, obtienes acceso a las siguientes propiedades adicionales:

* Tienes resistencia al daño por relámpago.
* Tienes una velocidad de vuelo igual a tu velocidad de desplazamiento y puedes planear.
* Puedes lanzar los siguientes conjuros desde el anillo, gastando el número necesario de cargas: _chain lightning_ (3 cargas), _gust of wind_ (2 cargas) o _wind wall_ (1 carga).

**_Ring of Earth Elemental Command_**. Puedes gastar 2 de las cargas del anillo para lanzar _dominate monster_ sobre un earth elemental. Además, puedes moverte por terreno difícil compuesto de escombros, rocas o tierra como si fuera terreno normal. También puedes hablar y entender Terran.

Si ayudas a matar a un earth elemental mientras estás sintonizado con el anillo, obtienes acceso a las siguientes propiedades adicionales:

* Tienes resistencia al daño por ácido.
* Puedes moverte a través de tierra sólida o roca como si esas zonas fueran terreno difícil. Si terminas tu turno en ese lugar, eres expulsado al espacio desocupado más cercano que hayas ocupado por última vez.
* Puedes lanzar los siguientes conjuros desde el anillo, gastando el número necesario de cargas: _stone shape_ (2 cargas), _stoneskin_ (3 cargas) o _wall of stone_ (3 cargas).

**_Ring of Fire Elemental Command_**. Puedes gastar 2 de las cargas del anillo para lanzar _dominate monster_ sobre un fire elemental. Además, tienes resistencia al daño por fuego. También puedes hablar y entender Ignan.

Si ayudas a matar a un fire elemental mientras estás sintonizado con el anillo, obtienes acceso a las siguientes propiedades adicionales:

* Eres inmune al daño por fuego.
* Puedes lanzar los siguientes conjuros desde el anillo, gastando el número necesario de cargas: _burning hands_ (1 carga), _fireball_ (2 cargas) y _wall of fire_ (3 cargas).

**_Ring of Water Elemental Command_**. Puedes gastar 2 de las cargas del anillo para lanzar _dominate monster_ sobre un water elemental. Además, puedes pararte y caminar sobre superficies líquidas como si fueran suelo sólido. También puedes hablar y entender Aquan.

Si ayudas a matar a un water elemental mientras estás sintonizado con el anillo, obtienes acceso a las siguientes propiedades adicionales:

* Puedes respirar bajo el agua y tienes una velocidad de natación igual a tu velocidad de desplazamiento.
* Puedes lanzar los siguientes conjuros desde el anillo, gastando el número necesario de cargas: _create or destroy water_ (1 carga), _control water_ (3 cargas), _ice storm_ (2 cargas) o _wall of ice_ (3 cargas).

name: Ring of Elemental Command
desc:
This ring is attuned to one of the four Elemental Planes, as determined by the Narrator. While wearing this ring, you have _advantage_  on _attack rolls_  against elementals from the linked plane, and they have _disadvantage_  on attack rolls against you. You can also expend 2 of the ring’s charges to cast _` Freelinking: Node title dominate does not exist `_ monster on an elemental native to the linked plane. The ring imparts additional benefits based on the linked plane.

The ring has 5 charges and regains 1d4+1 charges at dawn. Spells cast from the ring have a save CD of 17.

**Ring of Air Elemental Command**. You can speak and understand Auran. While wearing this ring, when you fall you descend at a rate of 60 pies per ronda and take no damage from landing.  
If you help kill an air elemental while attuned to this ring, you gain the following:

* Resistance to daño de rayo.
* A volando Velocidad equal to your Velocidad and the ability to hover.
* The ability to cast the following spells by expending the necessary charges: __chain lightning_  (3 charges), __gust of wind_  (2 charges), __wind wall_  (1 charge).

**Ring of Earth Elemental Command.** You can speak and understand Terran. While wearing this ring, you are not slowed by _difficult terrain_  composed of rocks, dirt, and other earth.  
If you help kill an earth elemental while attuned to this ring, you gain the following:

* Resistance to daño de ácido.
* The ability to move through solid rock and earth as if it were _difficult terrain_ . If you end your turn in those areas, you are pushed into the nearest unoccupied space you last occupied.
* The ability to cast the following spells by expending the necessary charges: _stone shape_  (2 charges), __stoneskin_  (3 charges), _wall of stone_  (3 charges).

**Ring of fuego Elemental Command**. You can speak and understand Ignan. While wearing this ring, you have resistance to daño de fuego.  
If you help kill a fuego elemental while attuned to the ring, you gain the following:

* Immunity to daño de fuego.
* The ability to cast the following spells by expending the necessary charges: _burning hands_ (1 charge), _fireball_ (2 charges), _wall of fire_ (3 charges).
