**Ring of Water Elemental Command.** You can speak and understand Aquan. While wearing this ring, you can stand on and move across any liquid surface as if it were solid ground.  
If you help kill a water elemental while attuned to the ring, you gain the following:

* The ability to breathe underwater and have a nadando Velocidad equal to your Velocidad.
* The ability to cast the following spells by expending the necessary charges: _create or_ _destroy water_ (1 charge), _ice storm_ (2 charges), _control water_ (3 charges), _wall of ice_ (3 charges).

name: Ring of Evasion
desc: Este anillo tiene 3 cargas y recupera 1d3 cargas gastadas cada día al amanecer. Cuando fallas una tirada de salvación de Destreza mientras lo llevas puesto, puedes usar tu reacción para gastar 1 de sus cargas y superar esa tirada de salvación en su lugar.

name: Ring of Evasion
desc: While wearing this ring, if you fail a Destreza _tirada de salvación_ , you can use your reacción to expend 1 charge to succeed instead. The ring has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges at dawn.

name: Ring of Feather Falling
desc: Cuando caes mientras llevas este anillo, desciendes 18 m por ronda y no sufres daño por caída.

name: Ring of Feather Falling
desc: While wearing this ring, when you fall you descend at a Velocidad of 60 pies per ronda and take no damage from landing.

name: Ring of Featherweight Weapons
desc: If you normally have desventaja on attack rolls made with weapons with the pesada property due to your size, you don't have desventaja on those attack rolls while you wear this ring. This ring has no effect on you if you are Medium or larger or if you don't normally have desventaja on attack rolls with pesada weapons.

name: Ring of Free Action
desc: Mientras llevas este anillo, el terreno difícil no te cuesta movimiento adicional. Además, la magia no puede reducir tu velocidad ni causarte la condición de paralizado o apresado.

name: Ring of Free Action
desc: While wearing this ring, you are not slowed by _difficult terrain_ , and magic cannot cause you to be _restrained_ , _paralyzed_ , or slow your movement.

name: Ring of Giant Mingling
desc: While wearing this ring, your size changes to match the size of those around you. If you are a Large criatura and start your turn within 100 pies of four or more Medium criaturas, this ring makes you Medium. Similarly, if you are a Medium criatura and start your turn within 100 pies of four or more Large criaturas, this ring makes you Large. These effects work like the effects of the enlarge/reduce spell, except they persist as long as you wear the ring and satisfy the conditions.

name: Ring of Hoarded Life
desc:
This ring stores puntos de golpe sacrificed to it, holding them until the attuned wearer uses them. The ring can store up to 30 puntos de golpe at a time. When found, it contains 2d10 stored puntos de golpe. While wearing this ring, you can use an action to spend one or more Hit Dice, up to your maximum Hit Dice. For each Hit Die spent in this way, you roll the die and add your Constitución modifier to it. Your punto de golpe maximum is reduced by the total, and the ring stores the total, up to 30 puntos de golpe. This punto de golpe maximum reduction can't be removed with the greater restoration spell or similar magic and lasts as long as puntos de golpe remain stored in the ring. You can't store puntos de golpe in the ring if you don't have blood. When puntos de golpe are stored in the ring, you can cause one of the following effects: - You can use a acción adicional to remove stored puntos de golpe from the ring and regain that number of puntos de golpe.
- You can use an action to remove stored puntos de golpe from the ring while touching the ring to a criatura. If you do so, the criatura regains puntos de golpe equal to the amount of puntos de golpe you removed from the ring.
- When you are reduced to 0 puntos de golpe and are not killed outright, you can use a reacción to empty the ring of stored puntos de golpe and regain puntos de golpe equal to that amount. Hit Dice spent on this ring's features can't be used to regain puntos de golpe during a descanso corto. You regain spent Hit Dice as normal.

name: Ring of Imperious Command
desc: Embossed in gold on this pesada iron ring is the image of a crown. The ring has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. While wearing this ring, you have ventaja on Carisma (Intimidación) checks, and you can project your voice up to 300 pies with perfect clarity. In addition, you can use an action and expend 1 of the ring's charges to command a criatura you can see within 30 pies of you to kneel before you. The objetivo debe realizar a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Carisma. en un fallo, the objetivo spends its next turn moving toward you by the shortest and most direct route then falls derribado and ends its turn.

name: Ring of Inspiration Storing
desc:
Sages and scholars argue about the Naturaleza of these rings, their very existence as much a mystery as the criaturas that supposedly forged them. Though all of them look slightly different, at their core is a strand of destiny spun by a _fateholder_  to subtly empower and guide its pawns.

This ring stores inspiration and holds it for later use. While wearing this ring, you can choose to gain and use the inspiration stored within it. Once the inspiration is used, it is no longer stored within the ring.

When found, the ring contains 1d4 – 1 inspiration, as determined by the Narrator. The ring can store up to 4 inspiration at a time. To store inspiration, a criatura with inspiration spends a _short rest_  wearing the ring and chooses to bestow it. The inspiration has no immediate effect.

In addition, whenever inspiration from within the ring is used the Narrator may choose to grant a vision of possible future events of great import.

name: Ring of Invisibility
desc: Mientras llevas este anillo puesto, puedes volverte invisible como una acción. Todo lo que lleves puesto o cargues se vuelve invisible contigo. Permaneces invisible hasta que te quites el anillo, hasta que ataques o lances un conjuro, o hasta que uses una acción adicional para volverte visible de nuevo.

name: Ring of Invisibility
desc: While wearing this ring, you can use an action to turn _invisible_  along with anything you are carrying or wearing. You remain invisible until the ring is removed, you attack or cast a spell, or you use a acción adicional to become visible.

name: Ring of Jumping
desc: Mientras llevas este anillo puesto, puedes lanzar el conjuro _jump_ desde él como una acción adicional a voluntad, pero solo puedes elegirte a ti mismo como objetivo al hacerlo.

name: Ring of Jumping
desc: While wearing this ring, you can use a acción adicional to cast the _jump_  spell on yourself.

name: Ring of Light's Comfort
desc: A disc of white chalcedony sits within an encompassing band of black onyx, set into fittings on this pewter ring. While wearing this ring in dim ligera or darkness, you can use a acción adicional to speak the ring's command word, causing it to shed bright ligera in a 30-pie radius and dim ligera for an additional 30 pies. The ring automatically sheds this ligera if you start your turn within 60 pies of an undead or lycanthrope. The ligera lasts until you use a acción adicional to repeat the command word. In addition, you can't be hechizado, asustado, or possessed by undead or lycanthropes.

name: Ring of Mind Shielding
desc:
Mientras llevas este anillo puesto, eres inmune a la magia que permita a otras criaturas leer tus pensamientos, determinar si estás mintiendo, conocer tu alineamiento o conocer tu tipo de criatura. Las criaturas solo pueden comunicarse contigo telepáticamente si tú lo permites.

Puedes usar una acción para hacer que el anillo se vuelva invisible hasta que uses otra acción para hacerlo visible de nuevo, hasta que te quites el anillo o hasta que mueras.

Si mueres mientras llevas el anillo puesto, tu alma entra en él, a menos que ya albergue otra alma. Puedes permanecer en el anillo o partir hacia el más allá. Mientras tu alma esté en el anillo, puedes comunicarte telepáticamente con cualquier criatura que lo lleve puesto. El portador no puede impedir esta comunicación telepática.

name: Ring of Mind Shielding
desc:
While wearing this ring, criaturas cannot magically read your thoughts, know if you’re lying, or discern your criatura type, and you can only be communicated with telepathically if you allow it.

If you die while wearing this ring, your soul enters the ring upon death, unless another soul already occupies it. You choose when your soul leaves the ring. While within the ring, you can communicate telepathically with anyone wearing it (this communication cannot be prevented.)

You can use an action to make the ring _invisible_ , and it remains so until it is removed, you die, or you use an action to make it visible.

name: Ring of Night's Solace
desc: A disc of black onyx sits within an encompassing band of white chalcedony, set into fittings on this pewter ring. While wearing this ring in bright ligera, you are draped in a comforting cloak of shadow, protecting you from the harshest glare. If you have the Sunlight Sensitivity trait or a similar trait that causes you to have desventaja on attack rolls or Sabiduría (Percepción) checks while in bright ligera or sunlight, you don't suffer those effects while wearing this ring. In addition, you have ventaja on tirada de salvacións against being cegado.

name: Ring of Powerful Summons
desc: When you summon a criatura with a conjuration spell while wearing this ring, the criatura gains a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls and 1d4 + 4 temporary puntos de golpe.

name: Ring of Protection
desc: Obtienes un bonificador +1 a la CA y a las tiradas de salvación mientras llevas este anillo puesto.

name: Ring of Protection
desc: While wearing this ring, you gain a +1 bonus to Clase de Armadura and _tirada de salvacións_ .

name: Ring of Regeneration
desc: Mientras llevas este anillo puesto, recuperas 1d6 puntos de golpe cada 10 minutos, siempre que tengas al menos 1 punto de golpe. Si pierdes una parte del cuerpo, el anillo hace que la parte perdida vuelva a crecer y recupere su plena funcionalidad tras 1d6 + 1 días, siempre que hayas tenido al menos 1 punto de golpe durante todo ese tiempo.

name: Ring of Regeneration
desc: While wearing this ring, as long as you have at least 1 punto de golpe you regain 1d6 puntos de golpe every 10 minutos. As long as you have at least 1 punto de golpe the entire time, when you lose a body part over the next 1d6 + 1 days it completely regrows and you regain full functionality.

name: Ring of Remembrance
desc: This ring is a sturdy piece of string, tied at the ends to form a circle. While wearing it, you can use an action to invoke its power by twisting it on your finger. If you do so, you have ventaja on the next Inteligencia check you make to recall information. The ring can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Ring of Resistance
desc:
Mientras llevas puesto este anillo, tienes resistencia a un tipo de daño. La gema engarzada en el anillo indica el tipo, que el DM elige o determina aleatoriamente.

| d10 | Tipo de daño | Gema        |
|-----|--------------|-------------|
| 1   | Ácido        | Perla       |
| 2   | Frío         | Turmalina   |
| 3   | Fuego        | Granate     |
| 4   | de Fuerza    | Zafiro      |
| 5   | Relámpago    | Citrino     |
| 6   | Necrótico    | Azabache    |
| 7   | Veneno       | Amatista    |
| 8   | Psíquico     | Jade        |
| 9   | Radiante     | Topacio     |
| 10  | Trueno       | Espinela    |

name: Ring of Resistance
desc:
While wearing this ring, you have resistance to one type of damage based on the ring’s gemstone (either chosen by the Narrator or determined randomly).

__**Table: Ring of Resistance**__
| **d10** | **Damage Type** | **Gem**     |
| ------- | --------------- | ----------- |
| 1       | ácido            | Peridot     |
| 2       | frío            | Aquamarine  |
| 3       | fuego            | Garnet      |
| 4       | fuerza           | Sapphire    |
| 5       | rayo       | Citrine     |
| 6       | necrótico        | Labradorite |
| 7       | veneno          | Amethyst    |
| 8       | psíquico         | Moonstone   |
| 9       | radiante         | Topaz       |
| 10      | trueno         | Spinel      |

name: Ring of Sealing
desc: This ring appears to be made of golden chain links. It has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. When you hit a criatura with a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo while wearing this ring, you can use a acción adicional and expend 1 of the ring's charges to cause mystical golden chains to spring from the ground and wrap around the criatura. The objetivo debe realizar a CD 17 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en un fallo, the mágico chains hold the objetivo firmly in place, and it is apresado. The objetivo can't move or be moved by any means. The objetivo can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito. However, if the objetivo fails three consecutive tirada de salvacións, the chains bind the objetivo permanently. A successful dispel magic (CD 17) cast on the chains destroys them.

name: Ring of Shadows
desc: While wearing this ebony ring in dim ligera or darkness, you have ventaja on Destreza (Sigilo) checks. When you roll a 20 on a Destreza (Sigilo) check, the ring's magic ceases to function until the next dawn.

name: Ring of Shooting Stars
desc:
Mientras llevas puesto este anillo en penumbra u oscuridad, puedes lanzar _dancing lights_ y _light_ desde el anillo a voluntad. Lanzar cualquiera de estos conjuros desde el anillo requiere una acción.

El anillo tiene 6 cargas para las siguientes propiedades adicionales. El anillo recupera 1d6 cargas gastadas cada día al amanecer.

**_Faerie Fire_**. Puedes gastar 1 carga como acción para lanzar _faerie fire_ desde el anillo.

**_Ball Lightning_**. Puedes gastar 2 cargas como acción para crear entre una y cuatro esferas de relámpago de 1 metro de diámetro. Cuantas más esferas crees, menos poderosa será cada una de forma individual.

Cada esfera aparece en un espacio desocupado que puedas ver a 36 metros de ti o menos. Las esferas duran mientras te concentres (como si te concentraras en un conjuro), hasta un máximo de 1 minuto. Cada esfera emite luz tenue en un radio de 9 metros.

Como acción adicional, puedes mover cada esfera hasta 9 metros, pero nunca a más de 36 metros de ti. Cuando una criatura que no seas tú se acerca a 1,5 metros de una esfera, esta descarga un rayo sobre esa criatura y desaparece. Esa criatura debe superar una tirada de salvación de Destreza CD 15. Si falla, la criatura recibe daño por relámpago según el número de esferas que hayas creado.

| Esferas | Daño por relámpago |
|---------|--------------------|
| 4       | 2d4                |
| 3       | 2d6                |
| 2       | 5d4                |
| 1       | 4d12               |

**_Shooting Stars_**. Puedes gastar entre 1 y 3 cargas como acción. Por cada carga que gastes, lanzas desde el anillo un punto de luz brillante hacia un punto que puedas ver a 18 metros de ti o menos. Cada criatura que se encuentre dentro de un cubo de 4,5 metros originado en ese punto queda cubierta de chispas y debe superar una tirada de salvación de Destreza CD 15, sufriendo 5d4 de daño por fuego si falla, o la mitad si tiene éxito.

name: Ring of Shooting Stars
desc:
While wearing this ring, if you are in _dim ligera or darkness_  you can use an action to cast _dancing lights_ or _light_. The ring has 6 charges and regains 1d6 expended charges at dawn.

**Faerie fuego.** You can use an action and expend 1 charge to cast _faerie fuego ._

**Ball rayo**. You can use an action and expend 2 charges to create up to four 3-pie-diameter rayo spheres. The number of spheres created determines each sphere’s intensity (see Table: Ball rayo), each sheds ligera in a 30-pie radius, and they remain up to 1 minuto as long as you _concentrate_  (as if concentrating on a spell). As a acción adicional, you can move each sphere up to 30 pies, but no further than 120 pies from you.

When a criatura other than you comes within 5 pies of a sphere, the sphere discharges rayo at that criatura and then disappears. The criatura makes a CD 15 Destreza _tirada de salvación_  or recibe daño de rayo based on the sphere’s intensity.

Shooting Stars. You can use an action to expend 1 to 3 charges. For each expended charge, you shoot a glittering mote of ligera at a point you can see within 60 pies where it explodes in a 15-pie-cube of sparks. cada criatura in the area makes a CD 15 Destreza _tirada de salvación_ , taking 5d4 daño de fuego en una salvación fallida, or la mitad del daño en un éxito.

__**Table: Ball rayo**__
| **Spheres** | **daño de rayo** |
| ----------- | -------------------- |
| 1           | 4d12                 |
| 2           | 5d4                  |
| 3           | 2d6                  |
| 4           | 2d4                  |

name: Ring of Small Mercies
desc: While wearing this plain, beaten pewter ring, you can use an action to cast the spare the dying spell from it at will.

name: Ring of Spell Negation
desc:
This ring has 3 charges, and it regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. While wearing the ring, you can use your reacción to expend 1 of its charges to cast counterspell, and you lose puntos de golpe related to the spell's level. You can't use this feature of the ring if you don't have blood. The types of spells you can counter and the amount of puntos de golpe you lose depend on the type of ring you are wearing. | d8 | School |
| --- | ------------- |
| 1 | Abjuration |
| 2 | Conjuration |
| 3 | Divination |
| 4 | Enchantment |
| 5 | Evocation |
| 6 | Illusion |
| 7 | Necromancy |
| 8 | Transmutation |

name: Ring of Spell Storing
desc:
Este anillo almacena conjuros lanzados en él, reteniéndolos hasta que el portador sintonizado los utilice. El anillo puede almacenar hasta 5 niveles de conjuros a la vez. Cuando se encuentra, contiene 1d6 - 1 niveles de conjuros almacenados elegidos por el DM.

Cualquier criatura puede lanzar un conjuro de nivel 1 a 5 en el anillo tocándolo mientras lo lanza. El conjuro no surte ningún efecto salvo quedar almacenado en el anillo. Si el anillo no puede contener el conjuro, este se consume sin efecto. El nivel de la ranura utilizada para lanzar el conjuro determina el espacio que ocupa.

Mientras llevas puesto este anillo, puedes lanzar cualquier conjuro almacenado en él. El conjuro utiliza el nivel de ranura, la CD de salvación, el bonificador de ataque con conjuros y la característica de lanzamiento de conjuros del lanzador original, pero por lo demás se trata como si lo hubieras lanzado tú. El conjuro lanzado desde el anillo deja de estar almacenado en él, liberando espacio.

name: Ring of Spell Storing
desc:
This ring stores spells cast into it, and holds them for later use. While wearing this ring, you can cast any spell stored within it. The spell has the slot level, CD de salvación del conjuro, ataque de conjuro modifier, and spellcasting ability of the original caster. Once the spell is cast, it is no longer stored within the ring.

When found, the ring contains 1d6 – 1 levels of stored spells, as determined by the Narrator. The ring can store up to 5 levels worth of spells at a time. To store a spell, a criatura casts any spell of 1st- to 5th-level while touching the ring. The spell has no immediate effect. The level the spell is cast at determines how much space it uses. If the ring cannot store the spell, the spell fails and the espacio de conjuro is wasted.

name: Ring of Spell Turning
desc: Mientras llevas puesto este anillo, tienes ventaja en las tiradas de salvación contra cualquier conjuro que te tenga como único objetivo (no en área de efecto). Además, si sacas un 20 en la tirada de salvación y el conjuro es de nivel 7 o inferior, el conjuro no tiene efecto sobre ti y en su lugar afecta al lanzador, usando el nivel de ranura, la CD de salvación, el bonificador de ataque y la característica de lanzamiento de conjuros de dicho lanzador.

name: Ring of Spell Turning
desc: While wearing this ring, you have _advantage_  on _tirada de salvacións_  against spells that objetivo only you (not an area of effect spell). Additionally, on a tirada de salvación with a natural 20 if the spell is 7th-level or lower, the spell instead objetivos the caster, using their original slot level, CD de salvación del conjuro, ataque de conjuro modifier, and spellcasting ability.

name: Ring of Stored Vitality
desc: While you are attuned to and wearing this ring of polished, white chalcedony, you can feed some of your vitality into the ring to charge it. You can use an action to suffer 1 level of agotamiento. For each level of agotamiento you suffer, the ring regains 1 charge. The ring can store up to 3 charges. As the ring increases in charges, its color reddens, becoming a deep red when it has 3 charges. Your level of agotamiento can be reduced by normal means. If you already suffer from 3 or more levels of agotamiento, you can't suffer another level of agotamiento to restore a charge to the ring. While wearing the ring and suffering agotamiento, you can use an action to expend 1 or more charges from the ring to reduce your agotamiento level. Your agotamiento level is reduced by 1 for each charge you expend.

name: Ring of Swimming
desc: Mientras llevas puesto este anillo, tienes una velocidad de natación de 12 metros.

name: Ring of Swimming
desc: While wearing this ring, you have a swim Velocidad of 40 pies.

name: Ring of Telekinesis
desc: Mientras llevas este anillo, puedes lanzar el conjuro _telekinesis_ a voluntad, pero solo puedes tomar como objetivo objetos que no estén siendo llevados o transportados.

name: Ring of Telekinesis
desc: While wearing this ring, you can cast __telekinesis_ , but you are only able to objetivo unattended objects.

name: Ring of the Dolphin
desc: This gold ring bears a jade carving in the shape of a leaping dolphin. While wearing this ring, you have a nadando Velocidad of 40 pies. In addition, you can hold your breath for twice as long while underwater.

name: Ring of the Frog
desc: A pale chrysoprase cut into the shape of a frog is the centerpiece of this tarnished copper ring. While wearing this ring, you have a nadando Velocidad of 20 pies, and you can jump three times the normal distance, though you can't jump farther than your remaining movement would allow.

name: Ring of the Frost Knight
desc: This white gold ring is covered in a thin sheet of ice and always feels frío to the touch. The ring has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. While wearing the ring, you can use an action to expend 1 charge to surround yourself in a suit of enchanted ice that resembles plate armor. For 1 hora, your AC can't be less than 16, regardless of what kind of armor you are wearing, and you have resistance to daño de frío. The icy armor melts, ending the effect early, if you take 20 daño de fuego or more.

name: Ring of the Grove's Guardian
desc: This pale gold ring looks as though made of delicately braided vines wrapped around a small, rough obsidian stone. While wearing this ring, you have ventaja on Sabiduría (Percepción) checks. You can use an action to speak the ring's command word to activate it and draw upon the vitality of the grove to which the ring is bound. You regain 2d10 puntos de golpe. Once used, this property can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Ring of the Jarl
desc: This thick band of hammered yellow gold is warm to the touch even in the coldest of climes. While you wear it, you have resistance to daño de frío. If you are also wearing boots of the winterlands, you are immune to daño de frío instead. Bolstering Shout. When you roll for initiative while wearing this ring, you can use a reacción to shout a war cry, bolstering your aliados. Each friendly criatura within 30 pies of you and that can hear you gains a +2 bonus on its initiative roll, and it has ventaja on attack rolls for a number of rondas equal to your Carisma modifier (minimum of 1 ronda). Once used, this property of the ring can’t be used again until the next dawn. Wergild. While wearing this ring, you can use an action to create a no mágico duplicate of the ring that is worth 100 gp. You can bestow this ring upon another as a gift. The ring can’t be used for Común barter or trade, but it can be used for debts and payment of a warlike Naturaleza. You can give this ring to a subordinate warrior in your service or to someone to whom you owe a blood-debt, as a weregild in lieu of further fighting. You can create up to 3 of these rings each week. Rings that are not gifted within 24 horas of their creation vanish again.

name: Ring of the Ram
desc:
Este anillo tiene 3 cargas y recupera 1d3 cargas gastadas diariamente al amanecer. Mientras llevas el anillo, puedes utilizar una acción para gastar entre 1 y 3 de sus cargas para atacar a una criatura que puedas ver a 18m de ti. El anillo genera la cabeza espectral de un carnero y realiza su tirada de ataque con un bonificador de +7. Si impacta, por cada carga que gastes, el objetivo recibe 2d10 de daño de fuerza y es empujado 1.5m en dirección contraria a ti.

Alternativamente, puedes gastar entre 1 y 3 cargas del anillo como acción para intentar romper un objeto que puedas ver a 18m de ti que no esté siendo llevado o transportado. El anillo realiza una prueba de Fuerza con un bonificador de +5 por cada carga que gastes.

name: Ring of the Ram
desc:
This ring has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges at dawn. While wearing this ring, you can use an action to expend 1 to 3 charges and choose a criatura you can see within 60 pies. A spectral ram’s head launches from the ring to slam into the criatura, making its _attack roll_  with a +7 bonus. On a hit, for every expended charge the attack causa 2d10 daño de fuerza and the criatura is pushed 5 pies away. 

Additionally, you can use an action to expend 1 to 3 charges to break an unattended object you can see within 60 pies. The ring makes a Fuerza check with a +5 bonus for each expended charge

name: Ring of the Vengeance Seeker
desc:
This silver ring is set with an exquisite emerald. As an action, you can rotate the ring three times on your finger, casting the __poison skin_  spell. When cast in this way, the effect of the bright colors gives the appearance of brilliantly-colored makeup, face paint, or hair dye, removing the _disadvantage_  to Sigilo. Recognizing the coloring for what it is requires a CD 14 Arcanos check. Once the ring has been used in this way, it cannot be used until the next evening.

You can also use an action to release the gem from its setting and drop it into a container of liquid no larger than a mug of ale. The liquid functions as a truth serum. Once the gem is removed, the ring becomes a mundane item.

name: Ring of the Water Dancer
desc: This thin braided purple ring is fashioned from a single piece of coral. While wearing this ring, you can stand on and move across any liquid surface as if it were solid ground. In addition, while walking atop any liquid, your movement Velocidad increases by 10 pies and you gain a +1 bonus to your AC.

name: Ring of Three Wishes
desc: Mientras llevas este anillo, puedes utilizar una acción para gastar 1 de sus 3 cargas y lanzar el conjuro _wish_ desde él. El anillo pierde su carácter mágico cuando usas la última carga.

name: Ring of Three Wishes
desc: While wearing this ring, you can use an action to expend 1 of its 3 charges to cast __wish_ . When all the ring’s charges are expended, it loses its magic.

name: Ring of Ursa
desc:
This wooden ring is set with a strip of fossilized honey. While wearing this ring, you gain the following benefits: - Your Fuerza score increases by 2, to a maximum of 20.
- You have ventaja on Carisma (Persuasión) checks made to interact with bearfolk. In addition, while attuned to the ring, your hair grows thick and abundant. Your facial features grow more snout-like, and your teeth elongate. If you aren't a bearfolk, you gain the following benefits while wearing the ring:
- You can now make a bite attack as an unarmed strike. When you hit with it, your bite causa daño perforante equal to 1d6 + your Fuerza modifier, instead of the daño contundente normal for an unarmed strike. - You gain a powerful build and count as one size larger when determining your carrying capacity and the weight you can push, drag, or lift.

name: Ring of Warmth
desc: Mientras llevas este anillo, tienes resistencia al daño por frío. Además, tú y todo lo que vistes y transportas no sufrís ningún daño por temperaturas de hasta -45 grados Celsius.

name: Ring of Warmth
desc: While wearing this ring, you have resistance to daño de frío. Additionally, you and anything you are wearing or carrying remain unharmed by temperatures as low as –50° Fahrenheit (–46° Celsius).

name: Ring of Water Walking
desc: Mientras llevas este anillo, puedes mantenerte en pie y moverte sobre cualquier superficie líquida como si fuera terreno sólido.

name: Ring of Water Walking
desc: While wearing this ring, you can choose to stand on or move across any liquid surface as if it were solid ground.

name: Ring of X-ray Vision
desc:
Mientras llevas este anillo, puedes usar una acción para pronunciar su palabra de mando. Al hacerlo, puedes ver hacia el interior y a través de la materia sólida durante 1 minuto. Esta visión tiene un radio de 9 metros. Para ti, los objetos sólidos dentro de ese radio aparecen transparentes y no impiden el paso de la luz a través de ellos. La visión puede penetrar 30 centímetros de piedra, 2,5 centímetros de metal común, o hasta 90 centímetros de madera o tierra. Las sustancias más gruesas bloquean la visión, al igual que una lámina delgada de plomo.

Cada vez que uses el anillo de nuevo antes de realizar un descanso prolongado, debes superar una tirada de salvación de Constitución CD 15 o ganar un nivel de agotamiento.

name: Ring of X-Ray Vision
desc:
While wearing this ring, you can use an action to speak its command word and see through solid objects and matter in a 30-pie radius for 1 minuto. Solid objects within the radius appear ghostly and transparent, allowing ligera to pass through them. You can see through up 3 pies of wood and dirt, 1 pie of stone, and 1 inch of Común metal (thicker materials or a thin sheet of lead block the vision).

When you use this ring again before taking a _long rest_ , you make a CD 15 Constitución _tirada de salvación_  or suffer one level of _fatigue_  and one level of _strife_ .

name: River Token
desc: This small pebble measures 3/4 of an inch in diameter and weighs an ounce. The pebbles are often shaped like salmon, river clams, or iridescent river rocks. Typically, 1d4 + 4 river tokens are found together. The token gives off a distinct shine in sunlight and radiates a scent of fresh, roiling water. It is sturdy but crumbles easily if crushed. As an action, you can destroy the token by crushing it and sprinkling the remains into a river, calming the waters to a gentle current and soothing nearby water-dwelling criaturas for 1 hora. Water-dwelling beasts in the river with an Inteligencia of 3 or lower are soothed and indifferent toward passing humanoids for the duration. The token's magic soothes but doesn't fully suppress the hostilities of all other water-dwelling criaturas. For the duration, each other water-dwelling criatura debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría to attack or take hostile actions toward passing humanoids. The token's soothing magic ends on a criatura if that criatura is attacked.

name: Riverine Blade
desc: The crossguard of this distinctive sword depicts a stylized Garroter Crab (see Tome of Beasts) with claws extended, and the pommel is set with a smooth, spherical, blue-black river rock. You gain a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. While on a boat or while standing in any depth of water, you have ventaja on Destreza checks and tirada de salvacións.

name: Robe of Eyes
desc:
Esta túnica está adornada con patrones que semejan ojos. Mientras la llevas puesta, obtienes los siguientes beneficios:

* La túnica te permite ver en todas las direcciones, y tienes ventaja en las pruebas de Sabiduría (Percepción) que dependan de la vista.
* Tienes visión en la oscuridad con un alcance de 36 metros.
* Puedes ver criaturas y objetos invisibles, así como ver hacia el Plano Etéreo, con un alcance de 36 metros.

Los ojos de la túnica no pueden cerrarse ni desviarse. Aunque puedes cerrar o desviar tus propios ojos, nunca se considera que lo estás haciendo mientras llevas esta túnica.

Un conjuro _light_ lanzado sobre la túnica, o un conjuro _daylight_ lanzado a 1,5 metros o menos de ella, te provoca ceguera durante 1 minuto. Al final de cada uno de tus turnos, puedes realizar una tirada de salvación de Constitución (CD 11 para _light_ o CD 15 para _daylight_), poniendo fin a la ceguera si tienes éxito.

name: Robe of Eyes
desc:
Numerous upraised eyes are sewn into the fabric of this robe. You gain the following benefits while attuned to and wearing the robe:

* _Advantage_  on sight-based Percepción checks.
* visión en la oscuridad to a range of 120 pies.
* The ability to see 120 pies into the Ethereal Plane.
* The ability to see _invisible_  criaturas and objects within 120 pies.
* The ability to see in all directions.
* You are always considered to have your eyes open and may not close or avert them.

 When a _daylight_ or __light_ spell is cast within 5 pies of you or on the robe, you are _blinded_  for 1 minuto. At the end of each of your turns, you make a CD 11 (_light)_ or CD 15 (_daylight_) Constitución _tirada de salvación_  to end the condition.

name: Robe of Scintillating Colors
desc: Esta túnica tiene 3 cargas y recupera 1d3 cargas gastadas cada día al amanecer. Mientras la llevas puesta, puedes usar una acción y gastar 1 carga para hacer que la prenda muestre un patrón cambiante de tonos deslumbrantes hasta el final de tu próximo turno. Durante este tiempo, la túnica emite luz brillante en un radio de 9 metros y luz tenue 9 metros más allá. Las criaturas que puedan verte tienen desventaja en las tiradas de ataque contra ti. Además, cualquier criatura dentro de la luz brillante que pueda verte cuando se activa el poder de la túnica debe superar una tirada de salvación de Sabiduría CD 15 o quedar aturdida hasta que el efecto termine.

name: Robe of Scintillating Colors
desc:
While wearing and attuned to this robe of stimulating and lively colors, you can use an action to expend 1 charge and make the garment to emit _bright kaleidoscopic light_  for 30 pies and dim ligera for an additional 30 pies. The ligera lasts until the end of your next turn. criaturas that can see you have _disadvantage_  on _attack rolls_  against you, and criaturas within 30 pies that can see you when the ligera is emitted make a CD 15 Sabiduría _tirada de salvación_  or are _stunned_  until the end of your next turn.

The robe has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges at dawn.

name: Robe of Stars
desc:
Esta túnica negra o azul oscuro está bordada con pequeñas estrellas blancas o plateadas. Obtienes un bonificador +1 a las tiradas de salvación mientras la llevas puesta.

Seis estrellas, situadas en la parte delantera superior de la túnica, son especialmente grandes. Mientras llevas esta túnica, puedes usar una acción para arrancar una de las estrellas y usarla para lanzar _magic missile_ como un conjuro de 5.º nivel. Cada día al atardecer, 1d6 estrellas arrancadas reaparecen en la túnica.

Mientras llevas la túnica, puedes usar una acción para entrar en el Plano Astral junto con todo lo que llevas puesto y cargas. Permaneces allí hasta que uses una acción para regresar al plano en el que te encontrabas. Reapareces en el último espacio que ocupabas, o si ese espacio está ocupado, en el espacio desocupado más cercano.

name: Robe of Stars
desc:
This robe is the color of the night sky and has a half dozen mágico metal stars sewn into it. You gain the following benefits while attuned to and wearing the robe:

* A +1 bonus to _tirada de salvacións_
* You can use an action to shift to the Astral Plane along with everything you are wearing and carrying. You remain there until you use an action to return, appearing either in the space you last occupied or the nearest unoccupied space.

Up to 6 times each day, you can use an action to pull a star from the robe to cast _magic missile_  (as a 5th-level spell). At dusk 1d6 removed stars reappear.

name: Robe of the Archmagi
desc:
Esta elegante prenda está confeccionada con una exquisita tela blanca, gris o negra, adornada con runas plateadas. El color de la túnica corresponde a la alineación para la que fue creada. Una túnica blanca fue hecha para el bien, la gris para la neutralidad y la negra para el mal. No puedes sintonizarte con una _robe of the archmagi_ que no se corresponda con tu alineación.

Obtienes los siguientes beneficios mientras llevas la túnica:

* Si no llevas armadura, tu Clase de Armadura base es 15 + tu modificador de Destreza.
* Tienes ventaja en las tiradas de salvación contra conjuros y otros efectos mágicos.
* Tu CD de salvación de conjuros y tu bonificador de ataque con conjuros aumentan en 2 cada uno.
requires_attunement: requires attunement by a sorcerer, warlock, or wizard

name: Robe of the Archmagi
desc:
This elegant garment is adorned with runes sewn with metallic thread. You gain the following benefits while attuned to and wearing the robe:

* While not wearing armor, your Clase de Armadura is 15 + your Destreza modifier.
* ventaja on _tirada de salvacións_  against spells and other mágico effects.
* Your _spell save CD and ataque de conjuro bonus_  are increased by 2.

name: Robe of Useful Items
desc:
Esta túnica está cubierta de parches de tela de diversas formas y colores. Mientras llevas la túnica puesta, puedes usar una acción para desprender uno de los parches, que se convierte en el objeto o criatura que representa. Una vez retirado el último parche, la túnica se convierte en una prenda ordinaria.

La túnica tiene dos parches de cada uno de los siguientes tipos:

* Dagger
* Bullseye lantern (rellena y encendida)
* Espejo de acero
* Palo de 3 metros
* Cuerda de cáñamo (15 metros, enrollada)
* Saco

Además, la túnica tiene 4d4 parches adicionales. El DM elige los parches o los determina aleatoriamente.

| d100   | Parche                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
|--------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| 01-08  | Bolsa con 100 po                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| 09-15  | Cofre de plata (30 cm de largo, 15 cm de ancho y de profundidad) con un valor de 500 po                                                                                                                         |
| 16-22  | Puerta de hierro (de hasta 3 metros de ancho y 3 metros de alto, con barra en el lado que elijas), que puedes colocar en una abertura a tu alcance; se adapta al tamaño de la abertura y se ancla con bisagras  |
| 23-30  | 10 gemas con un valor de 100 po cada una                                                                                                                                                                        |
| 31-44  | Escalera de madera (7,2 metros de largo)                                                                                                                                                                        |
| 45-51  | Un caballo de montar con alforjas                                                                                                                                                                               |
| 52-59  | Foso (un cubo de 3 metros por lado), que puedes colocar en el suelo a 3 metros o menos de ti                                                                                                                    |
| 60-68  | 4 potions of healing                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| 69-75  | Bote de remos (3,6 metros de largo)                                                                                                                                                                             |
| 76-83  | Spell scroll que contiene un conjuro de nivel 1 a 3                                                                                                                                                             |
| 84-90  | 2 mastiffs                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| 91-96  | Ventana (60 cm por 1,2 metros, de hasta 60 cm de profundidad), que puedes colocar sobre una superficie vertical a tu alcance                                                                                    |
| 97-100 | Ariete portátil                                                                                                                                                                                                 |

name: Robe of Useful Items
desc:
Leather patches of various shapes and colors are sewn into this robe. While attuned to and wearing the robe, you can use an action to detach one of the patches, causing it to become the object it represents. Once the last patch is removed, the robe loses its mágico properties.

The robe has two of each of the following patches: 

* _Dagger_
* _Bullseye lantern_  (filled and lit)
* _Steel mirror_
* 10-pie _pole_
* _Hempen rope_  (50 pies, coiled)
* _Sack_

In addition, the robe has 4d4 other patches (either chosen by the Narrator or randomly determined).

__**Table: Robe of Useful Items**__

| 99–100   | Iron door (up to 10 pies wide and 10 pies high, barred on one side of your choice), which you can place in an opening you can alcance (the door conforms to fit the opening, attaching and hinging itself) |

name: Rod of Absorption
desc:
Mientras sostienes esta vara, puedes usar tu reacción para absorber un conjuro que te tenga como único objetivo y que no tenga área de efecto. El efecto del conjuro absorbido se cancela y la energía del conjuro —no el conjuro en sí— queda almacenada en la vara. La energía tiene el mismo nivel que el conjuro tenía cuando fue lanzado. La vara puede absorber y almacenar hasta 50 niveles de energía a lo largo de su existencia. Una vez que la vara ha absorbido 50 niveles de energía, no puede absorber más. Si eres objetivo de un conjuro que la vara no puede almacenar, esta no tiene efecto alguno sobre dicho conjuro.

Cuando te sintonizas con la vara, sabes cuántos niveles de energía ha absorbido a lo largo de su existencia y cuántos niveles de energía de conjuro tiene almacenados en ese momento.

Si eres un lanzador de conjuros y sostienes la vara, puedes convertir la energía almacenada en ella en espacios de conjuro para lanzar conjuros que hayas preparado o conozcas. Solo puedes crear espacios de conjuro de un nivel igual o inferior al de tus propios espacios de conjuro, con un máximo de nivel 5. Utilizas los niveles almacenados en lugar de tus espacios, pero lanzas el conjuro de forma normal en todo lo demás. Por ejemplo, puedes usar 3 niveles almacenados en la vara como un espacio de conjuro de nivel 3.

Una vara recién encontrada ya tiene 1d10 niveles de energía de conjuro almacenados. Una vara que ya no puede absorber energía de conjuro y no le queda energía alguna se convierte en un objeto no mágico.

name: Rod of Absorption
desc:
While holding this rod, when you are the only objetivo of a spell you can use your reacción to absorb it as it is being cast. An absorbed spell has no effect and its energy is stored within the rod. The spell’s energy equals the spell levels used to cast it. The rod can store up to 50 spell levels worth of energy over the course of its existence. The rod cannot hold more than 50 spell levels worth of energy. If the rod does not have the space to store a spell and you try to absorb it, the rod has no effect.

After attuning to the rod you know how much energy it currently contains and how much it has held over the course of its existence. A spellcaster can expend the energy in the rod and convert it to espacios de conjuro—for example, you can expend 3 spell levels of energy from the rod to cast a 3rd-level spell, even if you no longer have the espacios de conjuro to cast it. The spell must be a spell you know or have prepared, at a level you can cast it, and no higher than 5th-level.

When found the rod contains 1d10 spell levels. A rod that can no longer store energy and no longer has any energy remaining within it loses its mágico properties.

name: Rod of Alertness
desc:
Esta vara tiene una cabeza con aletas y las siguientes propiedades.

**_Alerta_**. Mientras sostienes la vara, tienes ventaja en las pruebas de Sabiduría (Percepción) y en las tiradas de iniciativa.

**_Conjuros_**. Mientras sostienes la vara, puedes usar una acción para lanzar uno de los siguientes conjuros a través de ella: _detect evil and good_, _detect magic_, _detect poison and disease_ o _see invisibility_.

**_Aura protectora_**. Como acción, puedes clavar el extremo inferior de la vara en el suelo, tras lo cual la cabeza de la vara emite luz brillante en un radio de 18 metros y luz tenue durante 18 metros adicionales. Mientras estén en esa luz brillante, tú y cualquier criatura que te sea amistosa obtenéis un bonificador de +1 a la CA y a las tiradas de salvación, y podéis percibir la ubicación de cualquier criatura hostil invisible que también se encuentre en la luz brillante.

La cabeza de la vara deja de brillar y el efecto termina tras 10 minutos o cuando una criatura use una acción para retirar la vara del suelo. Esta propiedad no puede volver a usarse hasta el siguiente amanecer.

name: Rod of Alertness
desc:
While holding this rod, you have _advantage_  on Percepción checks and _initiative_  rolls, and as an action you can cast the following spells: __detect evil and good , detect magic , detect veneno and disease ,_ see __invisibility ._

**Protective Aura**. Once per dawn, you can use an action to plant the rod in the ground and speak its command word, causing it to emit _bright light_  in a 60-pie radius and dim ligera for an additional 60 pies. While in the bright ligera, you and criaturas friendly to you gain a +1 bonus to AC and _tirada de salvacións_  and can sense the location of any _invisible_  hostile criatura also in the bright ligera.

The rod stops glowing and the effect ends after 10 minutos, or sooner if a criatura uses an action to pull the rod from the ground.

name: Rod of Blade Bending
desc: This simple iron rod functions as a magic mace that grants a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it. Blade Bend. While holding the rod, you can use an action to activate it, creating a mágico field around you for 10 minutos. When a criatura attacks you with a melee weapon that causa perforante or daño cortante while the field is active, it debe realizar a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en un fallo, the criatura’s attack misses. en un éxito, the criatura’s attack hits you, but you have resistance to any perforante or daño cortante dealt by the attack as the weapon bends partially away from your body. Once used, this property can’t be used again until the next dawn.

name: Rod of Bubbles
desc: This rod appears to be made of foamy bubbles, but it is completely solid to the touch. This rod has 3 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges to conjure a bubble around a criatura or object within 30 pies. If the objetivo is a criatura, it debe realizar a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Fuerza. en una salvación fallida, the objetivo becomes trapped in a 10-pie sphere of water. A Huge or larger criatura automatically succeeds on this tirada de salvación. A criatura trapped within the bubble is apresado unless it has a nadando Velocidad and can't breathe unless it can breathe water. If the objetivo is an object, it becomes soaked in water, any fuego effects are extinguished, and any ácido effects are negated. The bubble floats in the exact spot where it was conjured for up to 1 minuto, unless blown by a strong wind or moved by water. The bubble has 50 puntos de golpe, AC 8, immunity to daño de ácido and vulnerability to daño perforante. The inside of the bubble also has resistance to all damage except daño perforante. The bubble disappears after 1 minuto or when it is reduced to 0 puntos de golpe. When not in use, this rod can be commanded to take liquid form and be stored in a small vial. The rod regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Rod of Conveyance
desc: The top of this rod is capped with a bronze horse head, and its pie is decorated with a horsehair plume. By placing the rod between your legs, you can use an action to temporarily transform the rod into a horse-like construct. This works like the phantom steed spell, except you can use a acción adicional to end the effect early to use the rod again at a later time. Deduct the time the horse was active in increments of 1 minuto from the spell's 1-hora duration. When the rod has been a horse for a total of 1 hora, the magic ceases to function until the next dawn.

name: Rod of Deflection
desc: This thin, flexible rod is made of braided silver and brass wire and topped with a spoon-like cup. While holding the rod, you can use a reacción to deflect a ataque a distancia con arma against you. You can simply cause the attack to miss, or you can attempt to redirect the attack against another objetivo, even your attacker. The attack must have enough remaining range to alcance the new objetivo. If the additional distance between yourself and the new objetivo is within the attack's long range, it is made at desventaja as normal, using the original tirada de ataque as the first roll. The rod has 3 charges. You can expend a charge as a reacción to redirect a ranged ataque de conjuro as if it were a ataque a distancia con arma, up to the spell's maximum range. The rod regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Rod of Entropy
desc:
This skull-topped rod can be used as a club that grants a +1 bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  and causa an extra 1d6 daño necrótico.

The rod has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges at dawn. As an action, you can expend the rod’s charges, increasing entropy in a 15-pie cone. cada criatura in the area makes a CD 15 Constitución _tirada de salvación_ . en un fallo, the objetivo recibe 3d8 daño necrótico per charge expended, or half el daño en un éxito. A criatura killed by this damage decays and becomes an inanimate skeleton. In addition, no mágico objects in the area that are not being carried or worn experience rapid aging. If you expended 1 charge, soft materials like leather and cloth rot away, and liquid evaporates. If you expended 2 charges, hard organic materials like wood and bone crumble, and iron and steel rust away. Expending 3 charges causes Medium or smaller stone objects to crumble to dust.

name: Rod of Ghastly Might
desc: The knobbed head of this tarnished silver rod resembles the top half of a jawless, syphilitic skull, and it functions as a magic mace that grants a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it. The rod has properties associated with five different buttons that are set erratically along the haft. It has three other properties as well, detailed below. If you press **button 1**, the rod's head erupts in a fiery nimbus of Abisal energy that sheds dim ligera in a 5-pie radius. While the rod is ablaze, it causa an extra 1d6 daño de fuego and 1d6 daño necrótico to any objetivo it hits. If you press **button 2**, the rod's head becomes enveloped in a black aura of enervating energy. When you hit a objetivo with the rod while it is enveloped in this energy, the objetivo debe tener éxito en a CD 17 tirada de salvación de Constitución or deal only la mitad del daño with weapon attacks that use Fuerza until the end of its next turn. If you press **button 3**, a 2-pie blade springs from the tip of the rod's handle as the handle lengthens into a 5-pie haft, transforming the rod into a magic glaive that grants a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it. If you press **button 4**, a 3-pronged, bladed grappling hook affixed to a long chain springs from the tip of the rod's handle. The bladed grappling hook counts as a magic sickle with alcance that grants a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it. When you hit a objetivo with the bladed grappling hook, the objetivo debe tener éxito en an opposed Fuerza check or fall derribado. If you press **button 5**, the rod assumes or remains in its normal form and you can extinguish all no mágico flames within 30 pies of you. Turning Defiance. While holding the rod, you and any undead aliados within 30 pies of you have ventaja on tirada de salvacións against effects that turn undead. Contagion. When you hit a criatura with a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo using the rod, you can fuerza the objetivo to make a CD 17 tirada de salvación de Constitución. en un fallo, the objetivo is afflicted with a disease. This works like the contagion spell. Once used, this property can’t be used again until the next dusk. Create Specter. As an action, you can objetivo a humanoid within 10 pies of you that was killed by the rod or one of its effects and has been dead for no longer than 1 minuto. The objetivo’s spirit rises as a specter under your control in the space of its corpse or in the nearest unoccupied space. You can have no more than one specter under your control at one time. Once used, this property can’t be used again until the next dusk.

name: Rod of Hellish Grounding
desc: This curious jade rod is tipped with a knob of crimson crystal that glows and shimmers with eldritch phosphorescence. While holding or carrying the rod, you have visión en la oscuridad out to a range of 30 pies, and you have ventaja on Destreza (Acrobacias) checks. Hellish Desiccation. While holding this rod, you can use an action to fuego a crimson ray at an object or criatura made of metal that you can see within 60 pies of you. The ray forms a 5-pie wide line between you and the objetivo. cada criatura in that line that isn’t a construct or an undead debe realizar a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Destreza, taking 8d6 daño de fuerza en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one. criaturas and objects made of metal are unaffected. If this damage reduces a criatura to 0 puntos de golpe, it is desiccated. A desiccated criatura is reduced to a withered corpse, but everything it is wearing and carrying is unaffected. The criatura can be restored to life only by means of a true resurrection or a wish spell. Once used, this property can’t be used again until the next dawn.

name: Rod of Icicles
desc: This white crystalline rod is shaped like an icicle. The rod has 5 charges and regains 1d4 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn. While holding the rod, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges to attack una criatura you can see within 60 pies of you. The rod launches an icicle at the objetivo and makes its tirada de ataque with a +7 bonus. On a hit, the objetivo recibe 2d6 daño perforante and 2d6 daño de frío. On a critical hit, the objetivo is also paralizado until the end of its next turn as it momentarily freezes. If you take daño de fuego while holding this rod, you become immune to daño de fuego for 1 minuto, and the rod loses 2 charges. If the rod has only 1 charge remaining when you take daño de fuego, you become immune to daño de fuego, as normal, but the rod melts into a puddle of water and is destroyed.

name: Rod of Lordly Might
desc:
Esta vara tiene una cabeza con aletas y funciona como una maza mágica que otorga un bonificador de +3 a las tiradas de ataque y de daño realizadas con ella. La vara tiene propiedades asociadas a seis botones distintos dispuestos en fila a lo largo del mango. También posee otras tres propiedades, descritas a continuación.

**_Seis botones_**. Puedes pulsar uno de los seis botones de la vara como acción adicional. El efecto de un botón dura hasta que pulsas un botón diferente o vuelves a pulsar el mismo, lo que hace que la vara recupere su forma normal.

Si pulsas el **botón 1**, la vara se convierte en una _flame tongue_, ya que una hoja ígnea brota del extremo opuesto a la cabeza con aletas.

Si pulsas el **botón 2**, la cabeza con aletas de la vara se pliega hacia abajo y brotan dos hojas en forma de media luna, transformando la vara en un hacha de batalla mágica que otorga un bonificador de +3 a las tiradas de ataque y de daño realizadas con ella.

Si pulsas el **botón 3**, la cabeza con aletas se pliega hacia abajo, una punta de lanza surge del extremo de la vara y el mango se alarga hasta formar un asta de 1,8 metros, transformando la vara en una lanza mágica que otorga un bonificador de +3 a las tiradas de ataque y de daño realizadas con ella.

Si pulsas el **botón 4**, la vara se transforma en un palo de escalada de hasta 15 metros de largo, según especifiques. En superficies tan duras como el granito, una estaca en la parte inferior y tres ganchos en la parte superior anclan el palo. Peldaños horizontales de 7,5 cm se despliegan desde los lados, separados 30 cm entre sí, formando una escalera. El palo puede soportar hasta 1.800 kg. Un peso mayor o la falta de un anclaje sólido hacen que la vara recupere su forma normal.

Si pulsas el **botón 5**, la vara se transforma en un ariete de mano y otorga a su usuario un bonificador de +10 a las pruebas de Fuerza realizadas para derribar puertas, barricadas y otros obstáculos.

Si pulsas el **botón 6**, la vara adopta o mantiene su forma normal e indica el norte magnético. (No ocurre nada si esta función de la vara se usa en un lugar que carece de norte magnético.) La vara también te proporciona conocimiento aproximado de tu profundidad bajo tierra o de tu altura sobre ella.

**_Drenar vida_**. Cuando impactas a una criatura con un ataque cuerpo a cuerpo usando la vara, puedes obligar al objetivo a realizar una tirada de salvación de Constitución CD 17. Si falla, el objetivo recibe 4d6 de daño necrótico adicional y tú recuperas un número de puntos de golpe igual a la mitad de ese daño necrótico. Esta propiedad no puede volver a usarse hasta el siguiente amanecer.

**_Paralizar_**. Cuando impactas a una criatura con un ataque cuerpo a cuerpo usando la vara, puedes obligar al objetivo a realizar una tirada de salvación de Fuerza CD 17. Si falla, el objetivo queda paralizado durante 1 minuto. El objetivo puede repetir la tirada de salvación al final de cada uno de sus turnos, poniendo fin al efecto si tiene éxito. Esta propiedad no puede volver a usarse hasta el siguiente amanecer.

**_Aterrorizar_**. Mientras sostienes la vara, puedes usar una acción para obligar a cada criatura que puedas ver a 9 metros o menos de ti a realizar una tirada de salvación de Sabiduría CD 17. Si falla, el objetivo queda asustado de ti durante 1 minuto. Un objetivo asustado puede repetir la tirada de salvación al final de cada uno de sus turnos, poniendo fin al efecto sobre sí mismo si tiene éxito. Esta propiedad no puede volver a usarse hasta el siguiente amanecer.

name: Rod of Lordly Might
desc:
You have a +3 bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  made with this rod, which appears as a mágico mace in its default form. When you hit a criatura with a weapon attack using the rod, you can activate one of the following three properties, each of which can be used once per dawn:

* **Drain Life:** The objetivo makes a CD 17 Constitución _tirada de salvación_ , taking an extra 4d6 daño necrótico en un fallo. You regain a number of puntos de golpe equal to half the daño necrótico dealt.
* **Paralyze:** The objetivo makes a CD 17 Fuerza _tirada de salvación_  or is _paralyzed_  for 1 minuto. At the end of each of its turns, it repeats the tirada de salvación, ending the effect en un éxito.
* **Terrify:** The objetivo makes a CD 17 Sabiduría _tirada de salvación_  or is _frightened_  for 1 minuto. At the end of each of its turns, it repeats the tirada de salvación, ending the effect en un éxito.

**Six Buttons.** The rod has buttons along its haft which alter its form when pressed. You can press one of the buttons as a acción adicional, and the effect lasts until you push a different button for a new effect, or press the same button again causing the rod to revert to its default form.

* **Button 1:** The rod loses its bonus to attack and damage rolls, instead producing a fiery blade from its haft which you can wield as a _flame tongue_  sword.
* **Button 2:** The rod transforms into a magic battleaxe.
* **Button 3:** The rod transforms into a magic spear.
* **Button 4:** The rod transforms into a escalando pole up to 50 pies long. A spike at the bottom and three hooks at the top anchor the pole into any surface as hard as granite. Horizontal bars 3 inches long fold out from the sides, 1 pie apart, forming a ladder. The pole can bear up to 4,000 pounds. Either excess weight or a lack of solid anchoring causes the rod to revert to its default form.
* **Button 5:** The rod transforms into a handheld battering ram that grants a +10 bonus to Fuerza checks made to break through doors, barricades, and other barriers.
* **Button 6:** The rod assumes or remains in its default form and indicates magnetic north, and how far above or below ground that you are. Nothing happens if this function is used in a location without a magnetic north, or a ground as a reference point.

name: Rod of Reformation
desc: This rod of polished white oak is wrapped in a knotted cord with three iron rings binding each end. If you are holding the rod and fail a tirada de salvación against a transmutation spell or other effect that would change your body or remove or alter parts of you, you can choose to succeed instead. The rod can’t be used this way again until the next dawn. The rod has 5 charges for the following properties. It regains 1d4 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the rings fall off, the cord unknots, and the entire rod slowly falls to pieces and is destroyed. Cure Transformation. While holding the rod, you can use an action to expend 1 charge while touching a criatura that has been affected by a transmutation spell or other effect that changed its physical form, such as the polymorph spell or a medusa's Petrifying Gaze. The rod restores the criatura to its original form. If the criatura is willingly transformed, such as a druid using Wild Shape, you debe realizar a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo con arma roll, using the rod. You are proficient with the rod if you are proficient with clubs. On a hit, you can expend 1 of the rod’s charges to fuerza the objetivo to make a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Constitución. en un fallo, the objetivo reverts to its original form. Mend Form. While holding the rod, you can use an action to expend 2 charges to reattach a criatura's severed limb or body part. The limb must be held in place while you use the rod, and the process recibe 1 minuto to complete. You can’t reattach limbs or other body parts to dead criaturas. If the limb is lost, you can spend 4 charges instead to regenerate the missing piece, which recibe 2 minutos to complete. Reconstruct Form. While holding the rod, you can use an action to expend 5 charges to reconstruct the form of a criatura or object that has been disintegrated, burned to ash, or similarly destroyed. An item is completely restored to its original state. A criatura’s body is fully restored to the state it was in before it was destroyed. The criatura isn’t restored to life, but this reconstruction of its form allows the criatura to be restored to life by spells that require the body to be present, such as raise dead.

name: Rod of Repossession
desc: This short, metal rod is engraved with arcane runes and images of open hands. The rod has 3 charges and regains all expended charges daily at dawn. While holding the rod, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges and objetivo an object within 30 pies of you that isn't being worn or carried. If the object weighs no more than 25 pounds, it floats to your open hand. If you have no hands free, the object sticks to the tip of the rod until the end of your next turn or until you remove it as a acción adicional.

name: Rod of Rulership
desc: Puedes usar una acción para exhibir la vara y exigir obediencia a cada criatura de tu elección que puedas ver a 36 metros o menos de ti. Cada objetivo debe superar una tirada de salvación de Sabiduría CD 15 o quedar hechizado por ti durante 8 horas. Mientras está hechizada de este modo, la criatura te considera su líder de confianza. Si tú o tus compañeros la dañáis, o si se le ordena hacer algo contrario a su naturaleza, el objetivo deja de estar hechizado de este modo. La vara no puede volver a usarse hasta el siguiente amanecer.

name: Rod of Rulership
desc: Once per dawn, while holding this rod you can use an action to command obedience. cada criatura of your choice that you can see within 120 pies makes a CD 15 Sabiduría _tirada de salvación_ . en un fallo, a criatura is _charmed_  by you for 8 horas. A criatura hechizado by you regards you as its trusted leader. The charm is broken if you or your companions either command a hechizado criatura to do something contrary to its Naturaleza, or cause the criatura harm.

name: Rod of Sacrificial Blessing
desc: This silvery rod is set with rubies on each end. One end holds rubies shaped to resemble an open, fanged maw, and the other end's rubies are shaped to resemble a heart. While holding this rod, you can use an action to spend one or more Hit Dice, up to half your maximum Hit Dice, while pointing the heart-shaped ruby end of the rod at a objetivo within 60 pies of you. For each Hit Die spent in this way, you roll the die and add your Constitución modifier to it. You lose puntos de golpe equal to the total, and the objetivo regains puntos de golpe equal to the total puntos de golpe you lost. You can't use this feature if you don't have blood. Hit Dice spent on this feature can't be used to regain puntos de golpe during a descanso corto. You regain spent Hit Dice as normal.

name: Rod of Sanguine Mastery
desc: This rod is topped with a red ram's skull with two backswept horns. As an action, you can spend one or more Hit Dice, up to half of your maximum Hit Dice. For each Hit Die spent in this way, you roll the die and add your Constitución modifier to it. You lose puntos de golpe equal to the total, and a objetivo within 60 pies of you debe realizar a CD 17 tirada de salvación de Destreza, taking daño necrótico equal to the total en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one. You can't use this feature if you don't have blood. Hit Dice spent on this feature can't be used to regain puntos de golpe during a descanso corto. You regain spent Hit Dice as normal.

name: Rod of Security
desc:
Mientras sostienes esta vara, puedes usar una acción para activarla. La vara te transporta instantáneamente a ti y a hasta 199 criaturas voluntarias que puedas ver a un paraíso que existe en un espacio extraplanar. Tú eliges la forma que toma ese paraíso. Podría ser un jardín tranquilo, un claro encantador, una taberna alegre, un palacio inmenso, una isla tropical, un carnaval fantástico, o cualquier otro lugar que puedas imaginar. Independientemente de su naturaleza, el paraíso contiene suficiente agua y alimento para sustentar a sus visitantes. Todo lo demás con lo que se pueda interactuar dentro del espacio extraplanar solo puede existir allí. Por ejemplo, una flor recogida de un jardín en el paraíso desaparece si se saca del espacio extraplanar.

Por cada hora que un visitante pase en el paraíso, recupera puntos de golpe como si hubiera gastado 1 Dado de Golpe. Además, las criaturas no envejecen mientras están en el paraíso, aunque el tiempo transcurre con normalidad. Los visitantes pueden permanecer en el paraíso hasta un máximo de 200 días dividido por el número de criaturas presentes (redondeando hacia abajo).

Cuando se agota el tiempo o usas una acción para ponerle fin, todos los visitantes reaparecen en el lugar que ocupaban cuando activaste la vara, o en el espacio desocupado más cercano a ese lugar. La vara no puede volver a usarse hasta que hayan transcurrido diez días.

name: Rod of Security
desc:
This rod provides a _haven_  for the decadent adventurer—a safe place to wait out one's problems.

**Supply Storage.** This rod can magically store up to 200 Supply. While holding the rod you can use an action to objetivo up to 20 Supply you can see within 5 pies of you, which instantly vanishes and is stored in the rod. You can’t use this ability in paradise.

A newly found rod has 2d100 Supply already stored.

**Paradise.** While holding the rod, you can use an action to activate it and expend an amount of Supply (1 per criatura) for yourself and each willing criatura you can see. You and the other criaturas are instantly transported into an extraplanar _haven_  that recibe the form of any paradise you can imagine (or chosen at random using the Sample Paradises table). It contains enough Supply to sustain its visitors, and for each hora spent in paradise a visitor regains 10 puntos de golpe. criaturas don’t age while in paradise, although time passes normally. To maintain the extraplanar space each day beyond the first, an amount of Supply equal to the number of visitors must be expended from the rod.

Apart from visitors and the objects they brought into the paradise, everything within the paradise can only exist there. A cushion taken from a palace paradise, for example, disappears when taken outside.

When you expend the last Supply stored in the rod or you use an action to end it, all visitors reappear in the location they occupied when you activated the rod, or the nearest unoccupied space, and the rod can’t be used again until 10 days have passed.

__**Table: Sample Paradises**__
| **d6** | **Paradise**       |
| ------ | ------------------ |
| 1      | Cloud castle       |
| 2      | Cozy tavern        |
| 3      | Fantastic carnival |
| 4      | Luxurious palace   |
| 5      | Tranquil glade     |
| 6      | Tropical island    |

name: Rod of Swarming Skulls
desc: An open-mouthed skull caps this thick, onyx rod. The rod has 5 charges and regains 1d4 + 1 expended charges daily at dusk. While holding the rod, you can use an action and expend 1 of the rod's charges to unleash a swarm of miniature spectral blue skulls at a objetivo within 30 pies. The objetivo debe realizar a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en un fallo, it recibe 3d6 daño psíquico and becomes paralizado with fear until the end of its next turn. en un éxito, it recibe half el daño and isn't paralizado. criaturas that can't be asustado are immune to this effect.

name: Rod of the Disciplinarian
desc: This black lacquered wooden rod is banded in steel, has a flanged head, and functions as a magic mace. As a acción adicional, you can brandish the rod at a criatura and demand it refrain from a particular activity— attacking, casting, moving, or similar. The activity can be as specific (don't attack the person next to you) or as open (don't cast a spell) as you want, but the activity must be a conscious act on the criatura's part, must be something you can determine is upheld or broken, and can't immediately jeopardize the criatura's life. For example, you can forbid a criatura from lying only if you are capable of determining if the criatura is lying, and you can't forbid a criatura that needs to breathe from breathing. The criatura can act normally, but if it performs the activity you forbid, you can use a reacción to make a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo against it with the rod. You can forbid only una criatura at a time. If you forbid another criatura from performing an activity, the previous criatura is no longer forbidden from performing activities. Justicars are arbiters of law and order, operating independently of any official city guard or watch divisions. They are recognizable by their black, hooded robes, silver masks, and the rods they carry as weapons. These stern sentinels are overseen by The Magister, a powerful wizard of whom little is known other than their title. The Magister has made it their duty to oversee order in the city and executes their plans through the Justicars, giving them the Magister's mark, a signet ring, as a symbol of their authority. While some officers and members of the watch may be resentful of the Justicars' presence, many are grateful for their aid, especially in situations that could require magic. Justicar's are a small, elite group, typically acting as solo agents, though extremely dangerous situations bring them together in pairs or larger groups as needed. The Justicars are outfitted with three symbols of authority that are also imbued with power: their masks, rods, and rings. Each by itself is a useful item, but they are made stronger when worn together. The combined powers of this trinity of items make a Justicar a formidable fuerza in the pursuit of law and order.

name: Rod of the Infernal Realms
desc: The withered, clawed hand of a demon or devil tops this iron rod. While holding this rod, you gain a +2 bonus to ataque de conjuro rolls, and the save CD for your spells increases by 2. Frightful Eyes. While holding this rod, you can use a acción adicional to cause your eyes to glow with Infernal fuego for 1 minuto. While your eyes are glowing, a criatura that starts its turn or enters a space within 10 pies of you debe tener éxito en a tirada de salvación de Sabiduría against your CD de salvación del conjuro or become asustado of you until your eyes stop glowing. A asustado criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito. Once used, you can’t use this property again until the next dawn.

name: Rod of the Jester
desc: This wooden rod is decorated with colorful scarves and topped with a carving of a madly grinning head. Caper. While holding the rod, you can dance and perform general antics that attract attention. Make a CD 10 Carisma (Interpretación) check. en un éxito, una criatura that can see and hear you debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or have desventaja on Sabiduría (Percepción) checks made to perceive any criatura other than you for 1 minuto. The effect ends if the objetivo can no longer see or hear you or if you are incapacitado. You can affect one additional criatura for each 5 points by which you beat the CD (two criaturas with a result of 15, three criaturas with a result of 20, and so on). Once used, this property can’t be used again until the next dawn. Hideous Laughter. While holding the rod, you can use an action to cast the hideous laughter spell (save CD 15) from it. Once used, this property can’t be used again until the next dawn. Slapstick. You can use an action to swing the rod in the direction of a criatura within 5 pies of you. The objetivo debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Destreza or be pushed up to 5 pies away from you and knocked derribado. If the objetivo fails the tirada de salvación by 5 or more, it is also aturdido until the end of its next turn.

name: Rod of the Mariner
desc: This thin bone rod is topped with the carved figurine of an albatross in flight. The rod has 5 charges. You can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges and point the rod at one or more criaturas you can see within 30 pies of you, expending 1 charge for cada criatura. Each objetivo debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be cursed for 1 minuto. A cursed criatura has desventaja on attack rolls and tirada de salvacións while within 100 pies of a body of water that is at least 20 pies deep. The rod regains 1d4 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the rod crumbles to dust and is destroyed, and you debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be cursed for 1 minuto as if you had been the objetivo of the rod's power.

name: Rod of the Wastes
desc: Created by a holy order of knights to protect their most important members on missions into badlands and mágico wastelands, these red gold rods are invaluable tools against the forces of evil. This rod has a rounded head, and it functions as a magic mace that grants a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it. While holding or carrying the rod, you have ventaja on Sabiduría (Percepción) and Sabiduría (Supervivencia) checks made in badlands and wasteland terrain, and you have ventaja on tirada de salvacións against being hechizado or otherwise compelled by aberrations and fiends. If you are hechizado or magically compelled by an aberration or fiend, the rod flashes with crimson ligera, alerting others to your predicament. Aberrant Smite. If you use Divine Smite when you hit an aberration or fiend with this rod, you use the highest number possible for each die of daño radiante rather than rolling one or more dice for the extra daño radiante. You must still roll damage dice for the rod’s damage, as normal. Once used, this property can’t be used again until the next dawn. Spells. You can use an action to cast one of the following spells from the rod: daylight, lesser restoration, or shield of faith. Once you cast a spell with this rod, you can’t cast that spell again until the next dawn.

name: Rod of Thorns
desc: Several long sharp thorns sprout along the edge of this stout wooden rod, and it functions as a magic mace that grants a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it. The rod has 5 charges and regains 1d4 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn. While holding the rod, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges to cast the spike growth spell (save CD 15) from it. Embed Thorn. When you hit a criatura with this rod, you can expend 1 of its charges to embed a thorn in the criatura. At the start of each of the criatura’s turns, it debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Constitución or take 2d6 daño perforante from the embedded thorn. If the criatura succeeds on two tirada de salvacións, the thorn falls out and crumbles to dust. The successes don’t need to be consecutive. If the criatura dies while the thorn is embedded, its body transforms into a patch of no mágico brambles, which fill its space with difficult terrain.

name: Rod of Underworld Navigation
desc: This finely carved rod is decorated with gold and small dragon scales. While underground and holding this rod, you know how deep below the surface you are. You also know the direction to the nearest exit leading upward.
