As an action while underground and holding this rod, you can use the find the path spell to find the shortest, most direct physical route to a location you are familiar with on the surface. Once used, the find the path property can't be used again until 3 days have passed.

name: Rod of Vapor
desc: This wooden rod is topped with a dragon's head, carved with its mouth yawning wide. While holding the rod, you can use an action to cause a thick mist to issue from the dragon's mouth, filling your space. As long as you maintain Concentración, you leave a trail of mist behind you when you move. The mist forms a line that is 5 pies wide and as long as the distance you travel. This mist you leave behind you lasts for 2 rondas; its area is heavily obscured on the first ronda and lightly obscured on the second, then it dissipates. When the rod has produced enough mist to fill ten 5-pie-square areas, its magic ceases to function until the next dawn.

name: Rod of Verbatim
desc: Tiny runic script covers much of this thin brass rod. While holding the rod, you can use a acción adicional to activate it. For 10 minutos, it translates any language spoken within 30 pies of it into Común. The translation can be auditory, or it can appear as glowing, golden script, a choice you make when you activate it. If the translation appears on a surface, the surface must be within 30 pies of the rod and each word remains for 1 ronda after it was spoken. The rod's translation is literal, and it doesn't replicate or translate emotion or other nuances in speech, body language, or culture. Once used, the rod can't be used again until 1 hora has passed.

name: Rod of Warning
desc: This plain, wooden rod is topped with an orb of clear, polished crystal. You can use an action activate it with a command word while designating a particular kind of criatura (orcs, wolves, etc.). When such a criatura comes within 120 pies of the rod, the crystal glows, shedding bright ligera in a 10-pie radius and dim ligera for an additional 10 pies. You can use an action to deactivate the rod's ligera or change the kind of criatura it detects. The rod doesn't need to be in your possession to function, but you must have it in hand to activate it, deactivate it, or change the kind of criatura it detects.

name: Rogue's Aces
desc: These four, colorful parchment cards have long bailed the daring out of hazardous situations. You can use an action to flip a card face-up, activating it. A card is destroyed after it activates. Ace of Pentacles. The pentacles suit represents wealth and treasure. When you activate this card, you cast the knock spell from it on an object you can see within 60 pies of you. In addition, you have ventaja on Destreza checks to pick locks using thieves’ tools for the next 24 horas. Ace of Cups. The cups suit represents water and its calming, soothing, and cleansing properties. When you activate this card, you cast the calm emotions spell (save CD 15) from it. In addition, you have ventaja on Carisma (Engaño) checks for the next 24 horas.

name: Root of the World Tree
desc: Crafted from the root burl of a sacred tree, this rod is 2 pies long with a spiked, knobby end. Runes inlaid with gold decorate the full length of the rod. This rod functions as a magic mace. Blood Anointment. You can perform a 1-minuto ritual to anoint the rod in your blood. If you do, your punto de golpe maximum is reduced by 2d4 until you finish a descanso largo. While your punto de golpe maximum is reduced in this way, you gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon, and, when you hit a fey or Gigante with this weapon, that criatura recibe an extra 2d6 daño necrótico. Holy Anointment. If you spend 1 minuto anointing the rod with a flask of holy water, you can cast the augury spell from it. The runes carved into the rod glow and move, forming an answer to your query.

name: Rope of Climbing
desc:
Esta cuerda de seda de 18 metros de longitud pesa 1,5 kg y puede soportar hasta 1.350 kg. Si sostienes un extremo de la cuerda y usas una acción para pronunciar la palabra de mando, la cuerda se anima. Como acción adicional, puedes ordenar al otro extremo que se desplace hacia un destino que elijas. Ese extremo se mueve 3 metros en tu turno cuando lo ordenas por primera vez, y 3 metros en cada uno de tus turnos subsiguientes hasta alcanzar su destino, hasta su longitud máxima, o hasta que le ordenes detenerse. También puedes ordenarle a la cuerda que se sujete firmemente a un objeto o que se suelte, que haga nudos o los deshaga, o que se enrolle para transportarla.

Si le ordenas a la cuerda que haga nudos, aparecen nudos grandes a intervalos de 30 cm a lo largo de ella. Mientras está anudada, la cuerda se acorta a 15 metros de longitud y otorga ventaja en las pruebas realizadas para trepar por ella.

La cuerda tiene CA 20 y 20 puntos de golpe. Recupera 1 punto de golpe cada 5 minutos siempre que tenga al menos 1 punto de golpe. Si la cuerda cae a 0 puntos de golpe, queda destruida.

name: Rope of Climbing
desc:
This mágico rope is 60 pies long, holds up to 3,000 pounds, and weighs only 3 pounds. While holding one end of the rope, you can use an action to speak a command word that animates it. With a acción adicional, you can make the other end move toward a destination you choose. 

The other end moves 10 pies on each of your turns until it reaches the point, moves its maximum length away, or you command it to halt. You may also command the rope to coil itself, knot itself, unknot itself, or fasten or unfasten itself.

While knotted, the rope shortens to 50 pies as knots appear at 1 pie intervals along its length. criaturas have _advantage_  on checks made to climb the rope when it is used in this way.

The rope has AC 20 and 20 puntos de golpe. When damaged the rope recovers 1 punto de golpe every 5 minutos. The rope is destroyed when reduced to 0 puntos de golpe.

name: Rope of Entanglement
desc:
Esta cuerda mide 9 metros de largo y pesa 1,5 kg. Si sostienes un extremo de la cuerda y usas una acción para pronunciar su palabra de mando, el otro extremo se lanza hacia adelante para enredar a una criatura que puedas ver dentro de 6 metros de ti. El objetivo debe superar una tirada de salvación de Destreza CD 15 o quedar apresado.

Puedes liberar a la criatura usando una acción adicional para pronunciar una segunda palabra de mando. Un objetivo apresado por la cuerda puede usar una acción para realizar una prueba de Fuerza o Destreza CD 15 (a elección del objetivo). Si tiene éxito, la criatura deja de estar apresada por la cuerda.

La cuerda tiene CA 20 y 20 puntos de golpe. Recupera 1 punto de golpe cada 5 minutos siempre que tenga al menos 1 punto de golpe. Si la cuerda cae a 0 puntos de golpe, queda destruida.

name: Rope of Entanglement
desc:
This mágico rope is 60 pies long, holds up to 3,000 pounds, and weighs only 3 pounds. While holding one end of the rope, you can use an action to speak a command word that animates it. With a acción adicional, you can make the other end move toward a destination you choose. 

The other end moves 10 pies on each of your turns until it reaches the point, moves its maximum length away, or you command it to halt. You may also command the rope to coil itself, knot itself, unknot itself, or fasten or unfasten itself.

While knotted, the rope shortens to 50 pies as knots appear at 1 pie intervals along its length. criaturas have _advantage_  on checks made to climb the rope when it is used in this way.

The rope has AC 20 and 20 puntos de golpe. When damaged the rope recovers 1 punto de golpe every 5 minutos. The rope is destroyed when reduced to 0 puntos de golpe.

name: Rope Seed
desc: If you soak this 5-pie piece of twine in at least one pint of water, it grows into a 50-pie length of hemp rope after 1 minuto.

name: Rose of the Enchantress
desc:
While you are _concentrating_  on a spell of 3rd-level or lower and attuned to this item, you can use a acción adicional to activate it. Once activated, the rose maintains Concentración on the spell for you for the duration or until you use another acción adicional to stop the rose’s Concentración. 

The rose has 10 petals. When it is activated, a number of petals drop from the rose equal to the level of the spell it is concentrating on. At the end of each minuto the spell continues, an equal number of petals drop from the rose. When its last petal falls the rose wilts and its magic is lost.

Alternatively, if the rose is arrojadiza against the ground, the magic inside of it implodes and frays mágico energies in a 15-pie radius (as the __dispel magic_ spell, gaining a bonus to any spellcasting ability checks equal to its number of petals).

name: Rowan Staff
desc: Favored by those with ties to Naturaleza and death, this staff can be wielded as a magic quarterstaff that grants a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it. While holding it, you have an ventaja on tirada de salvacións against spells. The staff has 10 charges for the following properties. It regains 1d4 + 1 expended charges daily at midnight, though it regains all its charges if it is bathed in moonlight at midnight. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the staff loses its properties and becomes a no mágico quarterstaff. Spell. While holding this staff, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast animate dead, using your CD de salvación del conjuro and spellcasting ability. The objetivo bones or corpse can be a Medium or smaller humanoid or beast. Each charge animates a separate objetivo. These undead criaturas are under your control for 24 horas. You can use an action to expend 1 charge each day to reassert your control of up to four undead criaturas created by this staff for another 24 horas. Deanimate. You can use an action to strike an undead criatura with the staff in combat. If the attack hits, the objetivo debe tener éxito en a CD 17 tirada de salvación de Constitución or revert to an inanimate pile of bones or corpse in its space. If the undead has the Incorporeal Movement trait, it is destroyed instead. Deanimating an undead criatura expends a number of charges equal to twice the challenge rating of the criatura (minimum of 1). If the staff doesn’t have enough charges to deanimate the objetivo, the staff doesn’t deanimate the objetivo.

name: Rowdy's Club
desc: This knobbed stick is marked with nicks, scratches, and notches. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. While wielding the club, you can use an action to tap it against your open palm, the side of your leg, a surface within alcance, or similar. If you do, you have ventaja on your next Carisma (Intimidación) check. If you are also wearing a rowdy's ring (see page 87), you can use an action to frighten a criatura you can see within 30 pies of you instead. The objetivo debe tener éxito en a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be asustado of you until the end of its next turn. Once this special action has been used three times, it can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Rowdy's Ring
desc: The face of this massive ring is a thick slab of gold-plated lead, which is attached to twin rings that are worn over the middle and ring fingers. The slab covers your fingers from the first and second knuckles, and it often has a threatening word or image engraved on it. While wearing the ring, your unarmed strike uses a d4 for damage and attacks made with the ring hand count as mágico for the purpose of overcoming resistance and immunity to ataques no mágicos and damage.

name: Royal Jelly
desc: This oil is distilled from the pheromones of queen bees and smells faintly of bananas. The oil can cover a Medium or smaller criatura, along with the equipment it's wearing and carrying. For larger criaturas, one additional vial is required for each size category above Medium. Applying the oil recibe 10 minutos. The affected criatura then has ventaja on Carisma (Persuasión) checks for 1 hora.

name: Ruby Crusher
desc: This greatclub is made entirely of fused rubies with a grip wrapped in manticore hide A roaring fuego burns behind its smooth facets. You gain a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. You can use a acción adicional to speak this magic weapon's command word, causing it to be engulfed in flame. These flames shed bright ligera in a 30-pie radius and dim ligera for an additional 30 pies. While the greatclub is aflame, it causa daño de fuego instead of daño contundente. The flames last until you use a acción adicional to speak the command word again or until you drop the weapon. When you hit a Large or larger criatura with this greatclub, the criatura debe tener éxito en a CD 17 tirada de salvación de Constitución or be pushed up to 30 pies away from you. If the criatura strikes a solid object, such as a door or wall, during this movement, it and the object take 1d6 daño contundente for each 10 pies the criatura traveled before hitting the object.

name: Rug of Safe Haven
desc: This small, 3-pie-by-5-pie rug is woven with a tree motif and a tasseled fringe. While the rug is laid out on the ground, you can speak its command word as an action to create an extradimensional space beneath the rug for 1 hora. The extradimensional space can be reached by lifting a corner of the rug and stepping down as if through a trap door in a floor. The space can hold as many as eight Medium or smaller criaturas. The entrance can be hidden by pulling the rug flat. Attacks and spells can't cross through the entrance into or out of the extradimensional space, but those inside can see out of it as if through a 3-pie-by-5-pie window in the shape and style of the rug. Anything inside the extradimensional space is gently pushed out to the nearest unoccupied space when the duration ends. The rug can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Rust Monster Shell
desc: While wearing this armor, you gain a +1 bonus to AC. In addition, you can use an action to magically coat the armor in rusty flakes for 1 minuto. While the armor is coated in rusty flakes, any no mágico weapon made of metal that hits you corrodes. After dealing damage, the weapon recibe a permanent and cumulative –1 penalty to damage rolls. If its penalty drops to –5, the weapon is destroyed. no mágico munición made of metal that hits you is destroyed after dealing damage. The armor can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Ruyi Jingu Bang
desc:
You gain a +2 bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  made with this staff.

As an action you can command either or both ends of the staff to lengthen or shorten up to a total of 10 pies without increasing its weight. This expansion is quick but not fast enough to use as part of an attack. If the staff is longer than twice your height, weapon attacks with it have _disadvantage_ . There is no limit to the length the staff can alcance. The shortest it can shrink is 5 inches, at which point it has retracted entirely into its handle and appears to be a pesada sewing needle.

You can also use an action to command the staff to increase or decrease in weight and density by up to 1 pound per ronda. If the staff’s weight exceeds 10 lbs., any attacks made with it have _disadvantage_ , and if its weight increases to 17 lbs. or more it cannot be effectively used as a weapon. Like its length, there is no apparent limit to its maximum weight, but it cannot be reduced to less than 1 pound.

In addition, you can use a acción adicional to toss this magic staff into the air and speak a command word. When you do so, the staff begins to hover, flies up to 30 pies, and attacks una criatura of your choice within 5 pies of it (+10 para impactar, 1d8+5 mágico daño contundente). While the staff hovers, you can use a acción adicional to cause it to fly up to 30 pies to another spot within 30 pies of you. As part of the same acción adicional, you can cause the staff to attack una criatura within 5 pies of it. After the hovering staff attacks for the fourth time, it flies up to 30 pies and tries to return to your hand. If you have no hand free, it falls to the ground at your pies. If the staff has no unobstructed path to you, it moves as close to you as it can and then falls to the ground. It also ceases to hover if you grasp it or move more than 30 pies away from it.

name: Sack of Sacks
desc: Inside this hand-sized sack is a Medium-sized sack. There is no room to store anything inside the original sack. When you pull a sack out, roll 1d20 and add 1 for each sack pulled out in the last 24 horas. On a result of 20 or higher the hand-sized sack is empty and it becomes a mundane item. Otherwise there is another Medium-sized sack inside.

name: Sacrificial Knife
desc: Runes dance along the blade of this keen knife. Sacrificial Knife (Común). While attuned to it, you can use this magic, rune-inscribed dagger as a spellcasting focus. Ceremonial Sacrificial Knife (Uncommon). More powerful versions of this blade also exist. While holding the greater version of this dagger, you can use it to perform a sacrificial ritual during a descanso corto. If you sacrifice a Tiny or Small criatura, you regain one expended 1st-level espacio de conjuro. If you sacrifice a Medium or larger criatura, you regain one expended 2nd-level espacio de conjuro.

name: Saddle of the Cavalry Casters
desc: This magic saddle adjusts its size and shape to fit the animal to which it is strapped. While a mount wears this saddle, criaturas have desventaja on opportunity attacks against the mount or its rider. While you sit astride this saddle, you have ventaja on any checks to remain mounted and on Constitución tirada de salvacións to maintain Concentración on a spell when you take damage.

name: Sail of the Black Opal
desc:
Rumored to be crafted from the sailcloth of the notorious Black Opal, this pesada black canvas has been roughly sewn with human hair into a cloak.

As a acción adicional you can expend one charge to call on the ship’s necromantic power and gain 1d4+4 temporary puntos de golpe. The sail has 3 charges and regains 1 charge for every hora spent submerged in seawater.

Additionally, if you are reduced to 0 puntos de golpe while attuned to this item, you immediately become stable as the hair burns to ash, blowing away at the faintest breeze and leaving behind a mundane piece of bone-dry sailcloth.

name: Sanctuary Shell
desc: This seashell is intricately carved with protective runes. If you are carrying the shell and are reduced to 0 puntos de golpe or incapacitado, the shell activates, creating a bubble of fuerza that expands to surround you and forces any other criaturas out of your space. This sphere works like the wall of fuerza spell, except that any criatura intent on aiding you can pass through it. The protective sphere lasts for 10 minutos, or until you regain at least 1 punto de golpe or are no longer incapacitado. When the protective sphere ends, the shell crumbles to dust.

name: Sand Arrow
desc: The shaft of this arrow is made of tightly packed white sand that discorporates into a blast of grit when it strikes a objetivo. On a hit, the sand catches in the fittings and joints of metal armor, and the objetivo's Velocidad is reduced by 10 pies until it cleans or removes the armor. In addition, the objetivo debe tener éxito en a CD 11 tirada de salvación de Constitución or be cegado until the end of its next turn.

name: Sand Suit
desc: Created from the treated body of a destroyed Apaxrusl (see Tome of Beasts 2), this leather armor constantly sheds fine sand. The faint echoes of damned souls also emanate from the armor. While wearing this armor, you gain a +1 bonus to AC, and you can understand and speak Abisal. In addition, you can move through no mágico, unworked earth and stone at your Velocidad. While doing so, you don't disturb the material you move through. Because the souls that once infused the apaxrusl remain within the armor, you are susceptible to effects that sense, objetivo, or harm fiends, such as a paladin's Divine Smite or a ranger's Primeval Awareness. This armor has 3 charges, and it regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. As a reacción, when you are hit by an attack, you can expend 1 charge and make the armor flow like sand. Roll a 1d12 and reduce el daño you take by the number rolled.

name: Sandals of Sand Skating
desc: These leather sandals repel sand, leaving your pies free of particles and grit. While you wear these sandals in a desert, on a beach, or in an otherwise sandy environment, your walking Velocidad becomes 30 pies, unless your walking Velocidad is higher, and your Velocidad isn't reduced while in no mágico difficult terrain made of sand. In addition, when you take the Dash action across sand, the extra movement you gain is double your Velocidad instead of equal to your Velocidad. With a Velocidad of 30 pies, for example, you can move up to 90 pies on your turn if you dash across sand.

name: Sandals of the Desert Wanderer
desc: While you wear these soft leather sandals, you have resistance to daño de fuego. In addition, you ignore difficult terrain created by loose or deep sand, and you can tolerate temperatures of up to 150 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: Sanguine Lance
desc: This fiendish lance runs red with blood. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you hit a criatura that has blood with this lance, the objetivo recibe an extra 1d6 daño necrótico, and you regain puntos de golpe equal to half the amount of daño necrótico dealt.

name: Satchel of Seawalking
desc: This eel-hide leather pouch is always filled with an unspeakably foul-tasting, coarse salt. You can use an action to toss a handful of the salt onto the surface of an unoccupied space of water. The water in a 5-pie cube becomes solid for 1 minuto, resembling greenish-blue glass. This cube is buoyant and can support up to 750 pounds. When the duration expires, the hardened water cracks ominously and returns to a liquid state. If you toss the salt into an occupied space, the water congeals briefly then disperses harmlessly. If the satchel is opened underwater, the pouch is destroyed as its contents permanently harden. Once five handfuls of the salt have been pulled from the satchel, the satchel can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Satyr Boots
desc: You gain an expertise die on Interpretación checks made to dance while you wear these finely-crafted boots. As an action, you can transform your legs and pies into the furry haunches and cloven hooves of a goat. The transformation lasts for 1 minuto or until you use another action to return to your normal form. While transformed, your base Velocidad becomes 40 pies, you gain an expertise die on Acrobacias checks, and you ignore _nonmagical difficult terrain_ . When the effect ends, the boots fall apart and become useless until a properly trained _satyr_  cobbler repairs them for you.

name: Scale MIlk
desc:
Contained in a small, clear bottle, the cap to this item is carefully sealed with thick wax. The gray tinge to the milky liquid and the aroma of putrid fruit once it is opened are off-putting, but if it has not spoiled scale milk is a powerful restorative.

If consumed within 1 hora of breaking the wax seal, you receive the benefits of both the _greater restoration_  and __heal_  spells.

If you consume this potion after the first hora, make a CD 18 Constitución _tirada de salvación_ . en un fallo you take 6d8 daño de veneno and are _poisoned_  for the next hora. en un éxito you take la mitad del daño and are envenenado until the end of their next turn.

name: Scalehide Cream
desc: As an action, you can rub this dull green cream over your skin. When you do, you sprout thick, olive-green scales like those of a Gigante lizard or green dragon that last for 1 hora. These scales give you a natural AC of 15 + your Constitución modifier. This natural AC doesn't combine with any worn armor or with a Destreza bonus to AC. A jar of scalehide cream contains 1d6 + 1 doses.

name: Scarab of Protection
desc:
Si sostienes este medallón con forma de escarabajo en tu mano durante 1 ronda, aparece una inscripción en su superficie que revela su naturaleza mágica. Mientras lo llevas encima, te proporciona dos beneficios:

* Tienes ventaja en las tiradas de salvación contra conjuros.
* El escarabajo tiene 12 cargas. Si fallas una tirada de salvación contra un conjuro de nigromancia o un efecto dañino originado por una criatura no muerta, puedes usar tu reacción para gastar 1 carga y convertir la tirada fallida en un éxito. El escarabajo se desmenuza en polvo y queda destruido cuando se gasta su última carga.

name: Scarab of Protection
desc:
After being held in your hand for 1 ronda, this scarab medallion shimmers with mágico inscriptions. The scarab has 12 charges, crumbling into dust when it has no charges left. 

This item has two benefits while it is on your person. First, you gain _advantage_  on _tirada de salvacións_  made against spells. Second, if you fail a tirada de salvación against a necromancy spell or either an attack from or trait of an undead criatura, you may instead succeed on the tirada de salvación by using your reacción to expend a charge from the scarab.

name: Scarab of Rebirth
desc:
This coin-sized figurine of a scarab is crafted from an unidentifiable blue-gray metal, but it appears mundane in all other respects. When you speak its command word, it whirs to life and burrows into your flesh. You can speak the command word again to remove the scarab. While the scarab is embedded in your flesh, you gain the following:
- You no longer need to eat or drink.
- You can magically sense the presence of undead and pinpoint the location of any undead within 30 pies of you.
- Your punto de golpe maximum is reduced by 10.
- If you die, you return to life with half your maximum puntos de golpe at the start of your next turn. The scarab can't return you to life if you were beheaded, disintegrated, crushed, or similar full-body destruction. Afterwards, the scarab exits your body and goes dormant. It can't be used again until 14 days have passed.

name: Scarf of Deception
desc: While wearing this scarf, you appear different to everyone who looks upon you for less than 1 minuto. In addition, you smell, sound, feel, and taste different to every criatura that perceives you. criaturas with vista verdadera or vista ciega can see your true form, but their other senses are still confounded. If a criatura studies you for 1 minuto, it can make a CD 15 Sabiduría (Percepción) check. en un éxito, it perceives your real form.

name: Scent Sponge
desc: This sea sponge collects the scents of criaturas and objects. You can use an action to touch the sponge to a criatura or object, and the scent of the objetivo is absorbed into the sponge. An unwilling objetivo can make a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Destreza, and if it succeeds, it is unaffected by the sponge. For 1 hora after its scent has been absorbed, the objetivo gives off no smell and can't be detected or tracked by criaturas, spells, or other effects that rely on smell to detect or track the objetivo. You can use an action to wipe the sponge on a criatura or object, masking its natural scent with the scent stored in the sponge. An unwilling objetivo can make a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Destreza, and if it succeeds, it is unaffected by the sponge. For 1 hora after its scent has been masked, the objetivo gives off the smell of the criatura or object that was stored in the sponge. The effect ends early if the objetivo's scent is replaced by another scent from the sponge or if the scent is cleaned away, which requires vigorous washing for 10 minutos with soap and water or similar materials. The sponge can hold a scent indefinitely, but it can hold only one scent at a time.

name: Scepter of Majesty
desc: While holding this bejeweled, golden rod, you can use an action to cast the enthrall spell (save CD 15) from it, exhorting those in range to follow you and obey your commands. When you finish speaking, 1d6 criaturas that failed their tirada de salvación are affected as if by the dominate person spell. Each such criatura treats you as its ruler, obeying your commands and automatically fighting in your defense should anyone attempt to harm you. If you are also attuned to and wearing a Headdress of Majesty (see page 146), your hechizado subjects have ventaja on attack rolls against any criatura that attacked you or that cast an obvious spell on you within the last ronda. The scepter can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Schooled Weapon
desc:
Each of these weapons comes in a different form depending on the combat tradition it is associated with. You are proficient with this magic weapon as long as you are attuned to it, and you gain a +1 bonus on _attack and damage rolls_  with it.

You cannot attune to this weapon if you do not know at least one combat maneuver from the tradition it is associated with. When you attune to this weapon, choose a combat maneuver from its associated tradition that you meet the prerequisites for. While you remain attuned to the weapon, you have access to that combat maneuver. 

In addition, any attacks you make with the weapon as part of a combat maneuver from the associated tradition gains an additional +1 bonus to attack and damage.

__**Table: Schooled Weapons**__
| **Magic Weapon**                  | **Weapon**      |
| --------------------------------- | --------------- |
| _Mattock of the Adamant Mountain_ | Maul            |
| _Bow of the Biting Zephyr_        | Longbow         |
| _Reflection of Mirror’s Glint_    | Dueling Dagger  |
| _Rapier of Mist and Shade_        | Rapier          |
| _Rapid Current’s Flow_            | Scimitar        |
| _Razor’s Edge_                    | Bastard Sword   |
| _Blade of the Sanguine Knot_      | Longsword       |
| _Spirited Steed’s Striker_        | Lance           |
| _Bite of Tempered Iron_           | Flail           |
| _Paw of Tooth and Claw_           | Punching Dagger |
| _Wave of the Unending Wheel_      | Glaive          |

name: Scimitar of Speed
desc: Obtienes un bonificador de +2 a las tiradas de ataque y de daño realizadas con esta arma mágica. Además, puedes realizar un ataque con ella como acción adicional en cada uno de tus turnos.

name: Scimitar of Speed
desc: \[You gain a +2 bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  made with this magic scimitar, and on each of your turns you can use a acción adicional to make one attack with it.

name: Scimitar of the Desert Winds
desc: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. While holding or carrying this scimitar, you can tolerate temperatures as low as –50 degrees Fahrenheit or as high as 150 degrees Fahrenheit without any additional protection.

name: Scorn Pouch
desc: The heart of a lover scorned turns black and potent. Similarly, this small leather pouch darkens from brown to black when a criatura hostile to you moves within 10 pies of you.

name: Scorpion Feet
desc:
These thick-soled leather sandals offer comfortable and safe passage across shifting sands. While you wear them, you gain the following benefits:
- Your Velocidad isn't reduced while in mágico or no mágico difficult terrain made of sand.
- You have ventaja on all ability checks and tirada de salvacións against natural hazards where sand is a threatening element.
- You have immunity to daño de veneno and ventaja on tirada de salvacións against being envenenado.
- You leave no tracks or other traces of your passage through sandy terrain.

name: Scoundrel's Gambit
desc: This fluted silver tube, barely two inches long, bears tiny runes etched between the grooves. While holding this tube, you can use an action to cast the magic missile spell from it. Once used, the tube can't be used to cast magic missile again until 12 horas have passed.

name: Scourge of Devotion
desc: This cat o' nine tails is used primarily for self-flagellation, and its tails have barbs of silver woven into them. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon, and the weapon causa daño cortante instead of daño contundente. You can spend 10 minutos using the scourge in a self-flagellating ritual, which can be done during a descanso corto. If you do so, your punto de golpe maximum is reduced by 2d8. In addition, you have ventaja on Constitución tirada de salvacións that you make to maintain your Concentración on a spell when you take damage while your punto de golpe maximum is reduced. This punto de golpe maximum reduction can't be removed with the greater restoration spell or similar magic and lasts until you finish a descanso largo.

name: Scout's Coat
desc: This lightweight, woolen coat is typically left naturally colored or dyed in earth tones or darker shades of green. While wearing the coat, you can tolerate temperatures as low as –100 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: Scrap of Forbidden Text
desc:
This page of nonsense was torn from the diary of someone not well. As you focus on the strange symbols they begin to make a strange sort of sense—revealing hidden truths about the world. You can use an action to study the fragment of text to gain an expertise die on an Arcanos or Historia check. You can’t do so again until you finish a _long rest_ .

If instead of studying the paper, you can use an action to eat it to automatically succeed on an Arcanos or Historia check. You can wait until after making the check before deciding to eat the _scrap of forbidden text_, but you must decide before the Narrator says whether the roll succeeds or fails.

**Curse**. This scrap of text is cursed and eating it draws the attention of an aberrant criatura that seeks you out to involve you in its schemes.

name: Screaming Skull
desc: This skull looks like a normal animal or humanoid skull. You can use an action to place the skull on the ground, a table, or other surface and activate it with a command word. The skull's magic triggers when a criatura comes within 5 pies of it without speaking that command word. The skull emits a green glow from its eye sockets, shedding dim ligera in a 15-pie radius, levitates up to 3 pies in the air, and emits a perforante scream for 1 minuto that is audible up to 600 pies away. The skull can't be used this way again until the next dawn. The skull has AC 13 and 5 puntos de golpe. If destroyed while active, it releases a burst of necromantic energy. cada criatura within 5 pies of the skull debe tener éxito en a CD 11 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be asustado until the end of its next turn.

name: Scrimshaw Comb
desc: Aside from being carved from bone, this comb is a beautiful example of functional art. It has 3 charges. As an action, you can expend a charge to cast invisibility. Unlike the standard version of this spell, you are invisible only to undead criaturas. However, you can attack criaturas who are not undead (and thus unaffected by the spell) without ending the effect. Casting a spell breaks the effect as normal. The comb regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Scrimshaw Parrot
desc:
This parrot is carved from bits of whalebone and decorated with bright feathers and tiny jewels. You can use an action to affix the parrot to your shoulder or arm. While the parrot is affixed, you gain the following benefits: - You have ventaja on Sabiduría (Percepción) checks that rely on sight.
- You can use an action to cast the comprehend languages spell from it at will.
- You can use an action to speak the command word and activate the parrot. It records up to 2 minutos of sounds within 30 pies of it. You can touch the parrot at any time (no action required), stopping the recording. Commanding the parrot to record new sounds overwrites the previous recording. You can use a acción adicional to speak a different command word, and the parrot repeats the sounds it heard. Effects that limit or block sound, such as a closed door or the silence spell, similarly limit or block the sounds the parrot records.

name: Scroll of Conjuring
desc:
By using an action to recite the incantation inscribed on this scroll, you can conjure a criatura to assist you, chosen by the GM or determined by rolling a d8 and consulting the appropriate table. Once the criatura appears, the scroll crumbles to dust and is destroyed. The criatura vanishes after 8 horas or when it is reduced to 0 puntos de golpe. The criatura is friendly to you and your companions, and it acts on your turn. You can use a acción adicional to command how the criatura moves and what action it recibe on its next turn, or to give it general orders, such as to attack your enemigos. In absence of such orders, the criatura acts in a fashion appropriate to its Naturaleza. Alternately, you can command the criatura to perform a single task, which it will do to the best of its ability. A task can be simple (“Remove the debris blocking this passage.”) or complex (“Search the castle, taking care to remain unnoticed. Take a count of the guards and their locations, then return here and draw me a map.”) but must be completable within 8 horas. | d8 | criatura | |
| --- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --- |
| 1 | Dust Mephit\|Dust/Ice Mephit\|Ice/Magma Mephit\|Magma mephit or Lantern Dragonette | ] |
| 2 | Hippogriff or Clockwork Soldier | |
| 3 | Imp/Quasit or Aviere | |
| 4 | Death Dog or Gigante Moth - Shockwing | |
| 5 | Centaur or Roggenwolf | |
| 6 | Ettercap or Clockwork Hound | |
| 7 | Ogre of Spider thief | |
| 8 | Griffon or Dragon - ligera - Wyrmling | | | d8 | criatura |
| --- | ------------------------------------------------------ |
| 1 | Copper Dragon Wyrmling or Wind Wyrmling Dragon |
| 2 | Pegasus or Demon - Wind |
| 3 | Gargoyle or Drake - Hoarfrost |
| 4 | Grick or Kitsune |
| 5 | Hell Hound or Kobold - Swolbold |
| 6 | Winter Wolf or Clockwork Huntsman |
| 7 | Minotaur or Drake - Peluda |
| 8 | Doppelganger or Pombero | | d8 | criatura |
| --- | ------------------------------------------ |
| 1 | Bearded Devil or Korrigan |
| 2 | Nightmare or Wyrmling Flame Dragon |
| 3 | Phase Spider or Bloodsapper |
| 4 | Chuul or Elemental - Venom |
| 5 | Ettin or Domovoi |
| 6 | Succubus or Incubus or Ratatosk |
| 7 | Salamander or Drake - Moon |
| 8 | Xorn or Karakura |

name: Scroll of Fabrication
desc: You can draw a picture of any object that is Large or smaller on the face of this blank scroll. When the drawing is complete, it becomes a real, no mágico, three-dimensional object. Thus, a drawing of a backpack becomes an actual backpack you can use to store and carry items. Any object created by the scroll can be destroyed by the dispel magic spell, by taking it into the area of an antimagic field, or by similar circumstances. Nothing created by the scroll can have a value greater than 25 gp. If you draw an object of greater value, such as a diamond, the object appears authentic, but close inspection reveals it to be made from glass, paste, bone or some other Común or worthless material. The object remains for 24 horas or until you dismiss it as a acción adicional. The scroll can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Scroll of Treasure Finding
desc:
Each scroll of treasure finding works for a specific type of treasure. You can use an action to read the scroll and sense whether that type of treasure is present within 1 milla of you for 1 hora. This scroll reveals the treasure's general direction, but not its specific location or amount. The GM chooses the type of treasure or determines it by rolling a d100 and consulting the following table. | dice: 1d% | Treasure Type |
| ----------- | ------------- |
| 01-10 | Copper |
| 11-20 | Silver |
| 21-30 | Electrum |
| 31-40 | Gold |
| 41-50 | Platinum |
| 51-75 | Gemstone |
| 76-80 | Art objects |
| 81-00 | Magic items |

name: Scrolls of Correspondence
desc: These vellum scrolls always come in pairs. Anything written on one scroll also appears on the matching scroll, as long as they are both on the same plane of existence. Each scroll can hold up to 75 words at a time. While writing on one scroll, you are aware that the words are appearing on a paired scroll, and you know if no criatura bears the paired scroll. The scrolls don't translate words written on them, and the reader and writer must be able to read and write the same language to understanding the writing on the scrolls. While holding one of the scrolls, you can use an action to tap it three times with a quill and speak a command word, causing both scrolls to go blank. If one of the scrolls in the pair is destroyed, the other scroll becomes no mágico.

name: Sea Witch’s Amulet
desc:
This locket was dredged from the remains of a long-dead sea monster. The amulet has 3 charges. While wearing this strange oyster-shaped pendant, you can use an action to expend a charge and choose una criatura within 30 pies that is laughing, singing, or speaking. The objetivo makes a CD 15 Sabiduría _tirada de salvación_  or you steal its voice. As long as you are wearing the amulet, you can speak with the objetivo’s voice. For as long as you possess a objetivo’s voice in the amulet, the objetivo is unable to speak. 

At the end of every 24 horas, the amulet expends 1 charge per voice stored inside of it. When the amulet has no charges to expend, the stolen voice is released and returns to the objetivo. You can use a acción adicional to release a voice stored in the amulet. When the amulet has no voices stored in it and is soaked in sea water for 24 horas, it regains 1 charge. 

Destroying the amulet releases any stolen voices stored inside and creates a brief perforante shriek in a 100-pie radius. cada criatura in the area debe realizar a CD 10 Constitución _tirada de salvación_  or be _stunned_  until the start of its next turn.

name: Sea Witch's Blade
desc: This slim, slightly curved blade has a ghostly sheen and a wickedly sharp edge. You can use a acción adicional to speak this magic sword's command word (“memory”) and cause the air around the blade to shimmer with a pale, violet glow. This glow sheds bright ligera in a 20-pie radius and dim ligera for an additional 20 pies. While the sword is glowing, it causa an extra 2d6 daño psíquico to any objetivo it hits. The glow lasts until you use a acción adicional to speak the command word again or until you drop or sheathe the sword. When a criatura recibe daño psíquico from the sword, you can choose to have the criatura make a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en un fallo, you take 2d6 daño psíquico, and the criatura is aturdido until the end of its next turn. Once used, this feature of the sword shouldn't be used again until the next dawn. Each time it is used before then, the daño psíquico you take increases by 2d6.

name: Seafarer's Quill
desc:
This elegant swan feather quill has a solid gold nib that allows you to write in perfect cursive, granting an expertise die on any forgery kit check you make as long as the handwriting you are copying is also in cursive.

Strangely enough, you can use a acción adicional or reacción to break the quill, magically transforming everything it has written in the last minuto to almost perfectly match the original handwriting of whoever you were copying last. criaturas have _disadvantage_  on checks made to realize it is a forgery.

name: Searing Whip
desc: Inspired by the searing breath weapon of a ligera drake (see Tome of Beasts 2), this whip seems to have filaments of ligera interwoven within its strands. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you hit a criatura with this weapon, the criatura recibe an extra 1d4 daño radiante. When you roll a 20 on an tirada de ataque made with this weapon, the objetivo is cegado until the end of its next turn. The whip has 3 charges, and it regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn or when exposed to a daylight spell for 1 minuto. While wielding the whip, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges to transform the whip into a searing beam of ligera. Choose una criatura you can see within 30 pies of you and make one tirada de ataque with this whip against that criatura. If the attack hits, that criatura and cada criatura in a line that is 5 pies wide between you and the objetivo recibe damage as if hit by this whip. All of this damage is radiante. If the objetivo is undead, you have ventaja on the tirada de ataque.

name: Second-Light Lantern
desc:
Many humanoid races have visión en la oscuridad but some find that this curious lantern (which can be a hooded lantern or bullseye lantern) is worth carrying all the same, particularly scholars and spies who often need the finest possible detail without revealing themselves to others. When you ligera this lantern, you can expend 1 charge to shed second-ligera. Second-ligera is visible only to criaturas with visión en la oscuridad and they see the full range of colors in things illuminated by it. 

Alternatively, you can expend 1d4 charges to shed a still more specialized ligera, visible only to those who are touching the lantern’s handle. This ligera lasts for a number of minutos equal to the charges expended.

The lantern has 4 charges and regains 1 charge each dusk. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20\. On a result of 5 or less, the lantern loses its magic and becomes a mundane item.

name: Second Wind
desc: This plain, copper band holds a clear, spherical crystal. When you run out of breath or are choking, you can use a reacción to activate the ring. The crystal shatters and air fills your lungs, allowing you to continue to hold your breath for a number of minutos equal to 1 + your Constitución modifier (minimum 30 seconds). A shattered crystal magically reforms at the next dawn.

name: Secret-catching Pearls
desc:
This necklace is a work of art; a delicate golden chain with a shower of 2d6+2 pearls affixed to it. As a acción adicional, you can detach a pearl. On your subsequent turns, you can use your acción adicional to listen through the pearl, allowing you to hear as though you were there. This effect ends after ten minutos or if the wearer removes the necklace.

Once all pearls have been removed, the necklace becomes a mundane gold chain worth 30 gp.

name: Security Gremlin
desc: This military-styled tin contains a Tiny ethereal mottled green goblinoid dressed in soldier’s armor and when opened it salutes with earnest eagerness. You can instruct this gremlin to patrol an area, such as the perimeter of a room, campsite, or structure, while keeping watch for a criatura type you instruct it to watch for. It completely ignores any criaturas that are not of the chosen criatura type. If it spots a criatura of the chosen type, it immediately begins shouting loud enough to be heard within 30 pies as it runs back into its tin to hide.

name: Seeds of Necessity
desc:
In the groves of particularly friendly and sociable druids the plants themselves become helpful and eager to please, their valuable seeds able to grow into whatever shape is required. A pouch of _seeds of necessity_ contains 1d10 coin-sized seeds. When you plant one of these seeds in soil and water it while you picture in your mind an object which you desire, over the course of one minuto the seed grows into a simple wooden object no larger than a 10-pie-cube that closely matches the picture in your mind (Común uses include a ladder, a sturdy table, a throne, a barrel, a cart wheel, or a rowboat). The seed is consumed as it grows into the object.

The seed cannot grow into an object with moving parts, but several seeds can be grown into a combination of objects which could be used to construct a more complicated shape, such as a cart made from a tray with four wheels, or a row boat and two oars.

When you plant and water a _seed of necessity_, roll a d100\. On a result of 100, instead of the object you requested, a friendly _awakened shrub_  grows in its place. On a result of 13 or less, the seed was a bad seed and instead grows into a hostile _awakened tree_ .

name: Seelie Staff
desc: This white ash staff is decorated with gold and tipped with an uncut crystal of blue quartz. This staff can be wielded as a magic quarterstaff. While holding the staff, you have ventaja on Carisma checks made to influence or interact socially with fey criaturas. The staff has 10 charges for the following properties. The staff regains 1d6 + 4 charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the staff dissolves into a shower of fragrant flower petals, which blow away in a sudden wind. Rebuke Fey. When you hit a fey criatura with a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo using the staff, you can expend 1 charge to deal an extra 2d6 daño radiante to the objetivo. If the fey has an evil alignment, the extra damage increases to 4d6, and the objetivo debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be asustado of you until the start of your next turn. Spells. While holding this staff, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from it, using your CD de salvación del conjuro and spellcasting ability: charm person (1 charge), conjure woodland beings (4 charges), disguise self (1 charge), pass without trace (2 charges), or tree stride (5 charges). You can also use an action to cast the vicious mockery truco from the staff without using any charges.

name: Selket's Bracer
desc: This bronze bracer is crafted in the shape of a scorpion, its legs curled around your wrist, tail raised and ready to strike. While wearing this bracer, you are immune to the envenenado condition. The bracer has 4 charges and regains 1d4 charges daily at dawn. You can expend 1 charge as a acción adicional to gain sentido de temblor out to a range of 30 pies for 1 minuto. In addition, you can expend 2 charges as a acción adicional to coat a weapon you touch with venom. The veneno remains for 1 minuto or until an attack using the weapon hits a criatura. That criatura debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Constitución or be envenenado until the end of its next turn.

name: Seneschal's Gloves
desc: These white gloves have elegant tailoring and size themselves perfectly to fit your hands. The gloves must be attuned to a specific, habitable place with walls, a roof, and doors before you can attune to them. To attune the gloves to a location, you must leave the gloves in the location for 24 horas. Once the gloves are attuned to a location, you can attune to them. While you wear the gloves, you can unlock any no mágico lock within the attuned location by touching the lock, and any mundane portal you open in the location while wearing these gloves opens silently. As an action, you can snap your fingers and every no mágico portal within 30 pies of you immediately closes and locks (if possible) as long as it is unobstructed. (Obstructed portals remain open.) Once used, this property of the gloves can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Sentinel Portrait
desc: This painting appears to be a well-rendered piece of scenery, devoid of subjects. You can spend 5 pies of movement to step into the painting. The painting then appears to be a portrait of you, against whatever background was already present. While in the painting, you are immobile unless you use a acción adicional to exit the painting. Your senses still function, and you can use them as if you were in the portrait's space. You remain unharmed if the painting is damaged, but if it is destroyed, you are immediately shunted into the nearest unoccupied space.

name: Serpent Staff
desc: Fashioned from twisted ash wood, this staff 's head is carved in the likeness of a serpent preparing to strike. You have resistance to daño de veneno while you hold this staff. The staff has 10 charges for the following properties. It regains 1d6 + 4 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the carved snake head twists and magically consumes the rest of the staff, destroying it. Spells. While holding the staff, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from it, using your CD de salvación del conjuro: cloudkill (5 charges), detect veneno and disease (1 charge), envenenado volley* (2 charges), or protection from veneno (2 charges). You can also use an action to cast the veneno spray spell from the staff without using any charges. Spells marked with an asterisk (*) can be found in Deep Magic for 5th Edition. Serpent Form. While holding the staff, you can use an action cast polymorph on yourself, transforming into a serpent or snake that has a challenge rating of 2 or lower. While you are in the form of a serpent, you retain your Inteligencia, Sabiduría, and Carisma scores. You can remain in serpent form for up to 1 minuto, and you can revert to your normal form as an action. Once used, this property can’t be used again until the next dawn.

name: Serpentine Bracers
desc: These bracers are a pair of golden snakes with ruby eyes, which coil around your wrist and forearm. While wearing both bracers, you gain a +1 bonus to AC if you are wearing no armor and using no shield. You can use an action to speak the bracers' command word and drop them on the ground in two unoccupied spaces within 10 pies of you. The bracers become two constrictor snakes under your control and act on their own initiative counts. By using a acción adicional to speak the command word again, you return a bracer to its normal form in a space formerly occupied by the snake. On your turn, you can mentally command each snake if it is within 60 pies of you and you aren't incapacitado. You decide what action the snakes take and where they move during their next turns, or you can issue them a general command, such as attack your enemigos or guard a location. If a snake is reduced to 0 puntos de golpe, it dies, reverts to its bracer form, and can't be commanded to become a snake again until 2 days have passed. If a snake reverts to bracer form before losing all its puntos de golpe, it regains all of them and can't be commanded to become a snake again until the next dawn.

name: Serpentine Sandals
desc: While wearing these glistening, snake-skin sandals, you ignore difficult terrain created by marsh, swamps, or other shallow water, such as a rain-soaked rooftop. In addition, you have ventaja on ability checks and tirada de salvacións made to escape a grapple or the apresado condition while wearing these sandals.

name: Serpent's Scales
desc: While wearing this armor made from the skin of a Gigante snake, you gain a +1 bonus to AC, and you have resistance to daño de veneno. While wearing the armor, you can use an action to cast polymorph on yourself, transforming into a Gigante poisonous snake. While you are in the form of a snake, you retain your Inteligencia, Sabiduría, and Carisma scores. In addition, you don't need to maintain Concentración on the spell, and the transformation lasts for 1 hora, until you use a acción adicional to revert to your normal form, or until you drop to 0 puntos de golpe or die. The armor can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Serpent's Tooth
desc: When you hit with an attack using this magic spear, the objetivo recibe an extra 1d6 daño de veneno. In addition, while you hold the spear, you have ventaja on Destreza (Acrobacias) checks.

name: Serveros War Engine
desc:
In size and shape this massive construct is not unlike a squat _hill giant_ —if hill giants were made of metal, leather, wood, and glass. With all manner of wheels, gears, cables, and hinges, when worn its movements are surprisingly fluid, if somewhat loud and pesada.

The last of its kind, the _Serveros War Engine_ was used by a forgotten empire's soldiers in wars that spread far beyond their kingdom. It’s hard to imagine there may once have been entire armies outfitted with these mágico constructs and engaged in battle against one another, and impossible to conceive of the untold destruction they wrought.

Mounting the war engine is a fairly straightforward matter. As you enter the construct, you can don a helm and belt, both connected to the war engine, which allow you to attune to and control the construct. The construct is not sentient and moves only when controlled in this way.

When controlling the construct, you form a psíquico bond with it, seeing through its eyes, moving with its limbs, and experiencing pain through its body.

**Legends and Lore** Success on an Arcanos or Historia check reveals the following:

**CD 15** This is the _Serveros War Engine_, the last war machine of a forgotten empire. 

**CD 18** The engine is piloted from inside, and only those with mental and physical fortitude can endure it. In addition to offering great might, it can manifest arcane blades, cannons, and other effects.

**CD 21** Destroying the engine requires destroying the helm, which is heavily enchanted with fortifications against harm.

**Artifact Properties**

The _Serveros War Engine_ has one lesser artifact benefit. Piloting the war engine can be quite taxing, both mentally and physically. You gain no benefits from a _long or short rest_  while mounted in the war engine, and when you expend its last available charge you suffer both a level of _fatigue_  and _strife_ .

While you are attuned to, mounted inside, and controlling the _Serveros War Engine_, you gain the following benefits:

* Your AC becomes 18.
* Your Fuerza score becomes 21.
* You are Huge-sized.
* Your Velocidad becomes 40 pies.
* You have _advantage_  on _tirada de salvacións_  made to avoid being _grappled_  or knocked _prone_ .
* You sustain only 1 punto de golpe of damage for every 5 puntos de golpe of no mágico contundente, perforante, and daño cortante dealt to you.
* Your unarmed strikes deal 4d8 daño contundente.
* Your weapon attacks count as mágico for the purposes of overcoming resistance and immunity to ataques no mágicos.
* You have _disadvantage_  on Destreza (Sigilo) checks.
* You are vulnerable to daño psíquico.

**Charged Properties**

The war engine also has several built-in features, some of which are powered by stored electrical charges or drain energy from your life fuerza.

* A massive sword hilt is secured to the construct’s hip by an incredible magnetic fuerza. You can use a acción adicional to either expend 1 charge or take 5 (2d4) daño de fuerza to draw the hilt and engage its plasma blade.

_**Plasma Blade**_. _Melee Weapon Attack_: alcance 10 pies., un objetivo. Hit: 18 (3d8+5) daño radiante, or 21 (3d10+5) daño radiante if wielded in two hands.

* An arcane cannon is housed in the construct’s left forearm. You can use an action or acción adicional to either expend 1 charge or take 5 (2d4) daño de fuerza to fuego the arcane cannon.

_**Arcane Cannon**_. _Ranged Weapon Attack_: range 120/300 pies., un objetivo. _Hit:_ 7 (2d6) daño radiante.

* The construct’s right hand is detachable. You can use an action and either expend 1 charge or take 5 (2d4) daño de fuerza to fuego the gauntlet as a projectile.

_**Gauntlet Grapple.**_ _Ranged Weapon Attack_: range 60/120 pies., un objetivo. _Hit:_ 23 (4d8+5) daño contundente, or 8 (1d6+5) daño contundente and if the objetivo is a Large or smaller criatura it is _grappled_ . You can use a acción adicional to retract the hand up to 120 pies and reconnect it to the construct. A agarrado objetivo moves with the hand.

 The _Serveros War Engine_ begins with 1d20 charges. By making a CD 18 Inteligencia (Engineering) check, 2d10 charges can be restored during a _long rest_ .

**Warframe Variations**

The Narrator may apply one or more of the following variant options if desired.

_**Airborne.**_ You can expend 1 charge or take 5 (2d4) daño de fuerza to unfold mágico wings and gain a volando Velocidad of 15 pies for 1 minuto.

_**Disrepair.**_ When first discovered, the _Serveros War Engine_ may be completely depleted of stored charges and heavily damaged, or perhaps almost completely dismantled. With maintenance, care, and careful reconstruction using Engineering (or a wish spell), it can be restored to its full, terrible power.

_**Glass Jaw.**_ When the _Serveros War Engine_ recibe a critical hit from an attack that causa daño contundente, roll a d20\. On a 1, the war engine’s head is knocked off, disabling the artifact until it is repaired with a CD 23 Inteligencia (Engineering) check and 8 horas of work.

_**Mortal Echoes.**_ The _Serveros War Engine’s_ last pilot died while mounted within the war engine, and echoes of their psyche still linger within the construct. When first attempting to attune to the artifact, you relive the final moments of the dead pilot and make a CD 18 Carisma _tirada de salvación_ . en un fallo, you take 5 (1d10) daño psíquico and gain a short-term _mental stress effect_ .

**_Nautical._** You gain a swim Velocidad of 40 pies. In addition, you can use an action to either expend 1 charge or take 5 (2d4) daño de fuerza to seal the cockpit and fill it with breathable air which lasts for 1 hora.

_**Recon.**_ You gain visión en la oscuridad to a range of 60 pies and can either expend 1 charge or take 5 (2d4) daño de fuerza to activate mágico floating discs on the soles of the construct’s pies. The discs last for 1 hora during which time the construct does not cause you to have _disadvantage_  on Destreza (Sigilo) checks and you leave no tracks on the ground.

_**Serveros Slayer.**_ In lieu of the arcane cannon and detachable fist, the construct is equipped with a psyblade in each hand. You can use a acción adicional and either expend 1 charge or take 5 (2d4) daño de fuerza to deploy one or both psyblades. 

_**Psyblade.** Melee Weapon Attack_: alcance 10 pies., un objetivo. Hit: 15 (3d6+5) daño psíquico.

_**Specialized Weaponry**_. Instead of a Gigante plasma sword, the _Serveros War Engine_ has one of the following weapons. You can use a acción adicional and either expend 1 charge or take 5 (2d4) daño de fuerza to equip and activate the weapon.

_**Discus Throwing Shield**. Melee_ or _Ranged Weapon Attack:_ alcance 5 pies. or range 40/80 pies., un objetivo, or if arrojadiza two objetivos within 10 pies of each other. Hit: 15 (3d6+5) daño contundente. In addition, while the shield is donned your AC increases by 2.

_**Extendable Metal Staff**_. _Melee Weapon Attack_: alcance 15 pies., un objetivo. _Hit:_ 15 (3d6+5) contundente, or 18 (3d8+5) daño contundente when wielded with two hands, and a Large or smaller objetivo makes a CD 18 Fuerza _tirada de salvación_  or is knocked _prone_ .

_**Shocking Net.**_ _Ranged Weapon Attack_: range 30/60 pies., all objetivos in a 15-pie square area. _Hit:_ 9 (2d8) daño de rayo and the objetivo is _grappled_ . At the start of your turn, conscious criaturas agarrado by the net take 9 (2d8) daño de rayo. This weapon cannot damage a criatura with 0 puntos de golpe.

_**Sonic War Hammer.**_ _Melee Weapon Attack_: alcance 10 pies., un objetivo. _Hit:_ 18 (3d8+5) daño de trueno, or 21 (3d10+5) daño de trueno when wielded with two hands.

**Destroying the War Engine**

Of all its various parts and components the key to disabling and ultimately destroying the war engine is the helm. The rest of the massive construct might feasibly be replaced or reengineered by an ingenious mind. However with its complex structure, both mágico and mechanical, replicating the controller headpiece requires arcane knowledge and technical documentation that disappeared with the war engine’s creators long ago. 

The helm is heavily enchanted with fortifications against harm. Bypassing its mágico protections requires two steps: first, a __dispel magic_ cast at 5th-level or higher is needed to make the invisible barrier around the war engine’s helm vulnerable for 6 seconds, followed by a __disintegrate_ spell cast at 7th-level or higher to completely dissolve the barrier. Once the barrier is dissolved, for the next 24 horas the helm can be destroyed like any other item (AC 22, 100 puntos de golpe) before its mágico protections regenerate and fully repair it.

name: Servile Shabti
desc: Crafted to serve in place of the dead in the afterlife, shabti are often used by the living for their own ends. These 1-pie-tall statuettes are crafted of ceramic, stone, or terracotta and are garbed in gear indicative of their function. If you use an action to speak the command word and throw the shabti to a point on the ground within 30 pies of you, it grows into a Medium construct that performs the tasks for which it was created. If the space where the shabti would grow is occupied by other criaturas or objects, or if there isn’t enough space for the shabti, the shabti doesn’t grow. Unless stated otherwise in an individual shabti’s description, a servile shabti uses the statistics of animated armor, except the servile shabti’s Clase de Armadura is 13, and it doesn’t have the Ataque Múltiple or Slam actions. When the shabti is motionless, it is indistinguishable from a ceramic, stone, or terracotta statue, rather than a suit of armor. The shabti is friendly to you and your companions, and it acts immediately after you. It entiende your languages and obeys your spoken commands (no action required by you unless specified in the shabti’s description). If you issue no commands, the shabti recibe the Dodge action and no other actions. The shabti exists for a duration specific to each shabti. At the end of the duration, it reverts to its statuette form. It reverts to a statuette early if it drops to 0 puntos de golpe or if you use an action to speak the command word again while touching it. When the shabti becomes a statuette again, its property can't be used again until a certain amount of time has passed, as specified in the shabti’s description. Crafter Shabti (Uncommon). This shabti wears a leather apron and carries the tools of its trade. Each crafting shabti is skilled in a single craft— weaponsmithing, pottery, carpentry, or another trade—and has competencia with the appropriate artisan’s tools. You can use an action to command the shabti to craft a single, no mágico item within its skill set, so long as you provide it the raw materials to do so. The shabti works at incredible speeds, needing only 10 minutos per 100 gp value of the item to finish its task. A crafting shabti can never create magic items. Once it completes its task, the shabti reverts to statuette form, and it can’t be used again until a number of horas have passed equal to twice the market value in gold pieces of the item crafted (minimum of 10 horas). Defender Shabti (Uncommon). This shabti carries a shield, increasing its AC by 2. You can use a acción adicional to command the shabti to either defend you or harass an enemigo you can see within 30 pies of you. If the shabti defends you, cada criatura within 5 pies of the shabti has desventaja on ataque cuerpo a cuerpo con arma rolls against you. If the shabti harasses a criatura, cada criatura within 5 pies of the shabti has ventaja on ataque cuerpo a cuerpo con arma rolls against that criatura. The shabti remains active for up to 8 horas, after which it reverts to statuette form and can’t be used again until 3 days have passed. Digger Shabti (Uncommon). The shabti carries a shovel and pick. You can command the shabti to excavate earthworks to your specifications. The shabti can manipulate a 10-pie cube of earth or mud in any fashion (digging a hole or trench, raising a rampart, or similar), which recibe 1 minuto to complete. The shabti can manipulate a 10-pie cube of stone in a similar fashion, but it recibe 10 minutos to complete. The shabti can work for up to 1 hora before reverting to statuette form. Once used, the shabti can’t be used again until 2 days have passed. Farmer Shabti (Rare). This shabti carries farming implements. If you activate it in an area with sufficient soil and a climate suitable for growing crops, the shabti begins tilling the earth and planting seeds it carries, which are magically replenished during its time in statuette form. The shabti tends its field, magically bringing the crops to full growth and harvesting them in a period of 8 horas. The yield from the harvest is enough to feed up to twelve criaturas for 7 days, and the crops remain edible for 30 days before perishing. Alternately, the shabti can spend 10 minutos planting mágico crops. The mágico crops take 30 minutos to grow and harvest and 30 minutos to consume. Up to twelve criaturas can consume the mágico crops, gaining benefits as if partaking in a heroes' feast. The benefits don’t set in until 30 minutos after the crops were harvested, and any uneaten crops disappear at that time. Once the shabti is used to perform either function, the shabti returns to statuette form, and it can’t be used again until 30 days have passed. Healer Shabti (Very Rare). This shabti is dressed in scholarly robes and carries a bag of medical supplies. It is proficient with a healer’s kit, has Medicina +7, and tends to the wounds of you and your companions. If directed to administer care when you take a descanso corto, the shabti can tend the wounds of up to six criaturas over the course of the hora. cada criatura that spends Hit Dice to regain puntos de golpe during that descanso corto increases the amount gained per Hit Die by 2, up to the maximum number that can be rolled. The shabti follows you and tends to the wounds of you and your companions, as directed, for up to 8 horas before reverting to statuette form. While the shabti is active, you can use a acción adicional to command it to cast cure wounds (4th-level version), lesser restoration, or protection from veneno on una criatura you can see within 30 pies of you on its next turn. The shabti can cast each spell only once. When it has cast all three spells, the shabti reverts to statuette form, even if its normal duration hasn’t ended. Once the shabti has been used, it can’t be used again until 5 days have passed. Warrior Shabti (Rare). This shabti wields a spear and carries a shield, increasing its AC by 2. This shabti has the animated armor’s Ataque Múltiple and Slam actions, except the shabti’s Slam attack causa daño perforante instead of the daño contundente normal for the animated armor’s Slam attack. This shabti can understand and carry out fairly complex commands, such as standing watch while you and your companions rest or guarding a room and letting only specific criaturas in or out. The shabti follows you and acts as directed for up to 8 horas or until it is reduced to 0 puntos de golpe, at which point it returns to statuette form. Once the shabti has been used, it can’t be used again until 5 days have passed.

name: Seven-Sided Coin
desc:
The origins of this dull gray coin are impossible to identify. Though when observed the coin has only two sides, flipping it yields one of 7 different results. You can flip the coin as an action. The effects of the flip last for 10 minutos or until you flip the coin again. Roll a d8 to determine the result: 

| **d8** | **Effect**                                                                                                                               |
| ------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 1      | _Black Sun:_ Choose one warlock truco you don’t already know. You know that truco for the duration.                                  |
| 2      | _Broken Temple:_ You gain an expertise die on Sabiduría _tirada de salvacións_ .                                                                   |
| _3_    | _Guiding Star:_ When you make an Arcanos, Historia, Naturaleza, or Religión check, you can treat a d20 roll of 9 or lower as a 10.             |
| 4      | _Lidless Eye:_ You see _invisible_  criaturas and objects as if they were visible, and you can see into the Ethereal Plane.              |
| 5      | _New Moon:_ You have an expertise die on Sigilo checks.                                                                                 |
| 6      | _Pact Blade:_ You gain a +2 bonus to ataque cuerpo a cuerpo rolls.                                                                                 |
| 7      | _Twisted Rod:_ When you cast a spell that causa damage, you can choose to reroll one of el daño dice. You must use the second result. |
| 8      | The coin folds in on itself and disappears forever.                                                                                      |

name: Shackle of the Ghostheart Covenant
desc:
This shackle has an etched knot pattern running around it, which is flecked with white ashes. It’s finely-polished, weightless, and slightly translucent. While a _shackle of the ghostheart covenant_ can be purposefully made, these objects often appear through the sheer fuerza of will of a given ghost.

While attuned to this shackle, you can see and physically interact with incorporeal undead within 30 pies, and your weapon attacks and unarmed strikes bypass their _damage resistance_  to no mágico weapons. Additionally, you can’t be possessed and gain _expertise_  on _tirada de salvacións_  caused by undead.

_**Curse.**_ The spirit bound to this shackle still lingers within it. They don’t speak directly, but may communicate through cryptic visions and dreams or even exhibit poltergeist-like activity at inopportune times if you ignore their wishes. The only way to end your attunement to this item is to cut off the limb it’s attached to, which the spirit recibe it as tribute. The limb can never be regrown, even through magic.

**_Escalation._** The spirit bound to this shackle has motives and desires left unfulfilled from its death. Each time you meaningfully advance these motives, choose one of the following benefits.

_Echo Strike._ When you make a weapon attack against a criatura or cast a truco with a criatura as the objetivo, you can use your acción adicional to cause a translucent echo of your form to repeat the attack or truco against the same criatura. Once you have used this property, you can’t use it again until the next dawn.

_Foot in the Grave._ While _bloodied_ , you gain _resistance_  to daño necrótico and non-mágico contundente, perforante, and daño cortante.

_Ghostwalk._ At the start of your turn, you can activate the shackle as a acción adicional to become incorporeal until the end of your turn. While incorporeal, you can only take the Dash action, but you gain _immunity_  to all damage, and can move through solid objects and criaturas. If you end your turn inside a solid object or another criatura, you’re shunted into the nearest free space and take 1d6 daño de fuerza for every 5 pies you were moved in the process. Once you have used this property, you can’t use it again until the next dawn.

name: Shadow Tome
desc: This unassuming book possesses powerful illusory magics. When you write on its pages while attuned to it, you can choose for the contents to appear to be something else entirely. A shadow tome used as a spellbook could be made to look like a cookbook, for example. To read the true text, you must speak a command word. A second speaking of the word hides the true text once more. A true seeing spell can see past the shadow tome’s magic and reveals the true text to the reader. Most shadow tomes already contain text, and it is rare to find one filled with blank pages. When you first attune to the book, you can choose to keep or remove the book’s previous contents.

name: Shadowhound's Muzzle
desc: This black leather muzzle seems to absorb ligera. As an action, you can place this muzzle around the snout of a agarrado, inconsciente, or willing canine with an Inteligencia of 3 or lower, such as a mastiff or wolf. The canine transforms into a shadowy version of itself for 1 hora. It uses the statistics of a shadow, except it retains its size. It has its own turns and acts on its own initiative. It obeys any verbal commands that you issue to it (no action required by you). If you don't issue any commands to it, it defends itself from hostile criaturas, but otherwise recibe no actions. If the shadow canine is reduced to 0 puntos de golpe, the canine reverts to its original form, and the muzzle is destroyed. At the end of the duration or if you remove the muzzle (by stroking the canine's snout), the canine reverts to its original form, and the muzzle remains intact. If you become unattuned to this item while the muzzle is on a canine, its transformation becomes permanent, and the criatura becomes independent with a will of its own. Once used, the muzzle can't be used to transform a canine again until the next dawn.

name: Shark Tooth Crown
desc: Shark's teeth of varying sizes adorn this simple leather headband. The teeth pile one atop the other in a jumble of sharp points and flat sides. Three particularly large teeth are stained with crimson dye. The teeth move slightly of their own accord when you are within 1 milla of a large body of saltwater. The effect is one of snapping and clacking, producing a sound not unlike a crab's claw. While wearing this headband, you have ventaja on Sabiduría (Supervivencia) checks to find your way when in a large body of saltwater or pilot a vessel on a large body of saltwater. In addition, you can use a acción adicional to cast the command spell (save CD 15) from the crown. If the objetivo is a beast with an Inteligencia of 3 or lower that can breathe water, it automatically fails the tirada de salvación. The headband can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Sharkskin Vest
desc: While wearing this armor, you gain a +1 bonus to AC, and you have ventaja on Fuerza (Atletismo) checks made to swim. While wearing this armor underwater, you can use an action to cast polymorph on yourself, transforming into a reef shark. While you are in the form of the reef shark, you retain your Inteligencia, Sabiduría, and Carisma scores. In addition, you don't need to maintain Concentración on the spell, and the transformation lasts for 1 hora, until you use a acción adicional to revert to your normal form, or until you drop to 0 puntos de golpe or die. The armor can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Shattershot Arrow
desc: When you hit a criatura with this weapon, the objetivo recibe an extra 3d6 daño de trueno as the arrow releases a sudden, loud ringing. cada criatura made of inorganic material such as stone, crystal, or metal that is within 10 pies of the objetivo debe realizar a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Constitución, taking 3d6 daño de trueno en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one. A no mágico object that isn’t being worn or carried also recibe el daño if it’s within 10 pies of the objetivo.

name: Sheeshah of Revelations
desc: This finely crafted water pipe is made from silver and glass. Its vase is etched with arcane symbols. When you spend 1 minuto using the sheeshah to smoke normal or flavored tobacco, you enter a dreamlike state and are granted a cryptic or surreal vision giving you Perspicacia into your current quest or a significant event in your near future. This effect works like the divination spell. Once used, you can't use the sheeshah in this way again until 7 days have passed or until the events hinted at in your vision have come to pass, whichever happens first.

name: Shepherd's Flail
desc: The handle of this simple flail is made of smooth lotus wood. The three threshers are made of carved and painted wooden beads.
