You gain a + 1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. True Authority (Requires Attunement). You must be attuned to a crook of the flock (see page 72) to attune to this weapon. The attunement ends if you are no longer attuned to the crook. While you are attuned to this weapon and holding it, your Carisma score increases by 4 and can exceed 20, but not 30. When you hit a beast with this weapon, the beast recibe an extra 3d6 daño contundente. For the purpose of this weapon, “beast” refers to any criatura with the beast type. The flail also has 5 charges. When you reduce a humanoid to 0 puntos de golpe with an attack from this weapon, you can expend 1 charge. If you do so, the humanoid stabilizes, regains 1 punto de golpe, and is hechizado by you for 24 horas. While hechizado in this way, the humanoid regards you as its trusted leader, but it otherwise retains its statistics and regains puntos de golpe as normal. If harmed by you or your companions, or commanded to do something contrary to its Naturaleza, the objetivo ceases to be hechizado in this way. The flail regains 1d4 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Shield +1
desc: This shield’s bonus to your Clase de Armadura increases by +1

name: Shield +2
desc: This shield’s bonus to your Clase de Armadura increases by +2

name: Shield +3
desc: This shield’s bonus to your Clase de Armadura increases by +3.

name: Shield of Gnawing
desc: The wooden rim of this battered oak shield is covered in bite marks. While holding this shield, you gain a +1 bonus to AC. This bonus is in addition to the shield's normal bonus to AC. In addition, you can use the Shove action as a acción adicional while raging.

name: Shield of Missile Attraction
desc:
Mientras sostienes este escudo, tienes resistencia al daño de los ataques de armas a distancia.

**_Maldición_**. Este escudo está maldito. Sintonizarte con él te maldice hasta que seas el objetivo del conjuro _remove curse_ o de magia similar. Retirar el escudo no pone fin a la maldición sobre ti. Siempre que se realice un ataque de arma a distancia contra un objetivo que se encuentre a 3m o menos de ti, la maldición hace que pases a ser tú el objetivo en su lugar.

name: Shield of Missile Attraction
desc:
While wearing this shield you have resistance to damage from ranged weapon attacks.

**Curse.** Whenever a ataque a distancia con arma is made against a objetivo within 10 pies of you, you become the objetivo instead. Removing the shield does not stop the curse.

name: Shield of Missile Reversal
desc: While wielding this shield, you gain a +1 bonus to AC. This bonus is in addition to the shield's normal bonus to AC. When you would be struck by a ataque a distancia, you can use a reacción to cause the outer surface of the shield to emit a flash of mágico energy, sending the missile hurtling back at your attacker. Make a ataque a distancia con arma roll against your attacker using the attacker's bonuses on the roll. If the attack hits, roll damage as normal, using the attacker's bonuses.

name: Shield of the Fallen
desc: Your aliados can use this shield to move you when you aren't capable of moving. If you are paralizado, petrificado, or inconsciente, and a criatura lays you on this shield, the shield rises up under you, bearing you and anything you currently wear or carry. The shield then follows the criatura that laid you on the shield for up to 1 hora before gently lowering to the ground. This property otherwise works like the floating disk spell. Once used, the shield can't be used this way again for 1d12 horas.

name: Shifting Shirt
desc: This nondescript, smock-like garment changes its appearance on command. While wearing this shirt, you can use a acción adicional to speak the shirt's command word and cause it to assume the appearance of a different set of clothing. You decide what it looks like, including color, style, and accessories—from filthy beggar's clothes to glittering court attire. The illusory appearance lasts until you use this property again or remove the shirt.

name: Shimmer Ring
desc: This ring is crafted of silver with an inlay of mother-of-pearl. While wearing the ring, you can use an action to speak a command word and cause the ring to shed white and sparkling bright ligera in a 20-pie radius and dim ligera for an additional 20 pies. The ligera lasts until you use a acción adicional to repeat the command word. The ring has 6 charges for the following properties. It regains 1d6 charges daily at dawn. Bestow Shimmer. While wearing the ring, you can use a acción adicional to expend 1 of its charges to charge a weapon you wield with silvery energy until the start of your next turn. When you hit with an attack using the charged weapon, the objetivo recibe an extra 1d6 daño radiante. Shimmering Aura. While wearing the ring, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges to surround yourself with a silvery, shimmering aura of ligera for 1 minuto. This bright ligera extends from you in a 5-pie radius and is sunlight. While you are surrounded in this ligera, you have resistance to daño radiante. Shimmering Bolt. While wearing the ring, you can use an action to expend 1 to 3 of its charges to attack una criatura you can see within 60 pies of you. The ring produces a bolt of silvery ligera and makes its tirada de ataque with a +7 bonus. On a hit, the objetivo recibe 2d6 daño radiante for each charge you expend.

name: Shoes of the Shingled Canopy
desc: These well-made, black leather shoes have brass buckles shaped like chimneys. While wearing the shoes, you have competencia in the Acrobacias skill. In addition, while falling, you can use a reacción to cast the feather fall spell by holding your nose. The shoes can't be used this way again until the next dusk.

name: Shoulder Dragon Brooch
desc:
Once attuned to this intricate golden brooch, you can imagine up to one dragon of your choice and a Tiny-sized illusion of it appears on your shoulders. The dragon looks lifelike and it occasionally flies, snaps at insects, and generally behaves in a dragon-like way. This illusion does not hold up to physical scrutiny and any criatura who physically interacts with the dragon sees through the illusion with a successful CD 12 Investigación check. You can use a acción adicional to dismiss the illusion.

As a acción adicional, you can have your dragon illusion attack a criatura within 5 pies of you. That criatura debe realizar a CD 12 Destreza _tirada de salvación_ , taking 1d4 damage of a type of your choice (fuego, rayo, frío, or ácido) en una salvación fallida or half as much on a successful one. Once you have used this feature, it cannot be used again for 24 horas.

name: Shrutinandan Sitar
desc: An exquisite masterpiece of craftsmanship, this instrument is named for a prestigious musical academy. You must be proficient with stringed instruments to use this instrument. A criatura that plays the instrument without being proficient with stringed instruments debe tener éxito en a CD 17 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or take 2d6 daño psíquico. The exquisite sounds of this sitar are known to weaken the power of demons. cada criatura that can hear you playing this sitar has ventaja on tirada de salvacións against the spells and special abilities of demons. Spells. You can use an action to play the sitar and cast one of the following spells from it, using your CD de salvación del conjuro and spellcasting ability: create food and water, fly, insect plague, invisibility, levitate, protection from evil and good, or reincarnate. Once the sitar has been used to cast a spell, you can’t use it to cast that spell again until the next dawn. Summon. If you spend 1 minuto playing the sitar, you can summon animals to fight by your side. This works like the conjure animals spell, except you can summon only 1 elephant, 1d2 tigers, or 2d4 wolves.

name: Sickle of Thorns
desc: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this weapon. As an action, you can swing the sickle to cut no mágico vegetation up to 60 pies away from you. Each cut is a separate action with one action equaling one swing of your arm. Thus, you can lead a party through a jungle or briar thicket at a normal pace, simply swinging the sickle back and forth ahead of you to clear the path. It can't be used to cut trunks of saplings larger than 1 inch in diameter. It also can't cut through unliving wood (such as a door or wall). When you hit a plant criatura with a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo with this weapon, that objetivo recibe an extra 1d6 daño cortante. This weapon can make very precise cuts, such as to cut fruit or flowers high up in a tree without damaging the tree.

name: Siege Arrow
desc: This magic arrow's tip is enchanted to soften stone and warp wood. When this arrow hits an object or structure, it causa double damage then becomes a no mágico arrow.

name: Signal Rings
desc: These rings come as a set of matched golden bands with a green enamel inlay. As an action, the wearer of one can rotate the inlay a full turn, at which point it turns to red. When one ring changes color, the other one does as well, regardless of its location.

name: Signaling Ammunition
desc: This magic munición creates a trail of ligera behind it as it flies through the air. If the munición flies through the air and doesn't hit a criatura, it releases a burst of ligera that can be seen for up to 1 milla. If the munición hits a criatura, the criatura debe tener éxito en a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Destreza or be outlined in golden ligera until the end of its next turn. While the criatura is outlined in ligera, it can't benefit from being invisible and any attack against it has ventaja if the attacker can see the outlined criatura.

name: Signaling Compass
desc: The exterior of this clamshell metal case features a polished, mirror-like surface on one side and an ornate filigree on the other. Inside is a magnetic compass. While the case is closed, you can use an action to speak the command word and project a harmless beam of ligera up to 1 milla. As an action while holding the compass, you can flash a concentrated beam of ligera at a criatura you can see within 60 pies of you. The objetivo debe tener éxito en a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Constitución or be cegado for 1 minuto. The objetivo can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito. The compass can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Signet of the Magister
desc: This pesada, gold ring is set with a ronda piece of carnelian, which is engraved with the symbol of an eagle perched upon a crown. While wearing the ring, you have ventaja on tirada de salvacións against enchantment spells and effects. You can use an action to touch the ring to a criatura—requiring a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo roll unless the criatura is willing or incapacitado—and magically brand it with the ring’s crest. When a branded criatura harms you, it recibe 2d6 daño psíquico and debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be aturdido until the end of its next turn. en un éxito, a criatura is immune to this property of the ring for the next 24 horas, but the brand remains until removed. You can remove the brand as an action. The remove curse spell also removes the brand. Once you brand a criatura, you can’t brand another criatura until the next dawn. Instruments of Law. If you are also attuned to and wearing a Justicar’s mask (see page 149), you can cast the locate criatura to detect a branded criatura at will from the ring. If you are also attuned to and carrying a rod of the disciplinarian (see page 83), the daño psíquico from the brand increases to 3d6 and the save CD increases to 16.

name: Silver String
desc: These silver wires magically adjust to fit any stringed instrument, making its sound richer and more melodious. You have ventaja on Carisma (Interpretación) checks made when playing the instrument.

name: Silvered Oar
desc: This is a 6-pie-long birch wood oar with leaves and branches carved into its length. The grooves of the carvings are filled with silver, which glows softly when it is outdoors at night. You can activate the oar as an action to have it row a boat unassisted, obeying your mental commands. You can instruct it to row to a destination familiar to you, allowing you to rest while it performs its task. While rowing, it avoids contact with objects on the boat, but it can be grabbed and stopped by anyone at any time. The oar can move a total weight of 2,000 pounds at a Velocidad of 3 millas per hora. It floats back to your hand if the weight of the craft, crew, and carried goods exceeds that weight.

name: Sinner’s Ashes
desc:
This small stark urn contains the ashen remains of an unholy humanoid. As an action, you can throw the urn up to 30 pies away where it shatters and produces a 20-pie radius black cloud of ash. This area is _heavily obscured_  and any criatura that ends its turn within the area debe realizar a CD 13 Constitución _tirada de salvación_  or take 2d4 daño necrótico. This ash cloud remains for 1 minuto, until a moderate wind (at least 10 millas per hora) disperses the cloud in 4 rondas, or until a strong wind (20 or more millas per hora) disperses it in 1 ronda.

Alternatively, the ashes can be used as an ingestible veneno. The urn contains enough ashes for a single dose, and any Celestial that consumes them debe realizar a CD 16 Constitución _tirada de salvación_ , taking 5d8 daño necrótico en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one.

name: Skald's Harp
desc: This ornate harp is fashioned from maple and engraved with heroic scenes of warriors battling trolls and dragons inlaid in bone. The harp is strung with fine silver wire and produces a sharp yet sweet sound. You must be proficient with stringed instruments to use this harp. When you play the harp, its music enhances some of your bard class features. Song of Rest. When you play this harp as part of your Song of Rest Interpretación, cada criatura that spends one or more Hit Dice during the descanso corto gains 10 temporary puntos de golpe at the end of the descanso corto. The temporary puntos de golpe last for 1 hora. Countercharm. When you play this harp as part of your Countercharm Interpretación, you and any friendly criaturas within 30 pies of you also have resistance to daño de trueno and have ventaja on tirada de salvacións against being paralizado. When this property has been used for a total of 10 minutos, this property can’t be used again until the next dawn.

name: Skeleton Key
desc:
This miniature skeleton holding a knife has been carved out of a human’s vertebrae. As an action, you can use the miniature knife to self-inflict 2d4 damage that ignores all resistances and immunities. When you do so, the skeleton animates and walks towards the nearest locked door or object within 10 pies, then plunges itself into the lock and makes a thieves’ tools check (it has a +10 bonus) to crack the lock. Whether successful or unsuccessful, the skeleton then walks back to you and returns to its inanimate state.

Alternatively, you can use an action to cover the skeleton in blood. When you do so, the skeleton rushes to the nearest lock within 10 pies and unlocks it (as per the spell __knock_ ) before dissolving into red mist.

name: Skipstone
desc: This small bark-colored stone measures 3/4 of an inch in diameter and weighs 1 ounce. Typically, 1d4 + 1 skipstones are found together. You can use an action to throw the stone up to 60 pies. The stone crumbles to dust on impact and is destroyed. cada criatura within a 5-pie radius of where the stone landed debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Constitución or be arrojadiza forward in time until the start of your next turn. cada criatura disappears, during which time it can't act and is protected from all effects. At the start of your next turn, cada criatura reappears in the space it previously occupied or the nearest unoccupied space, and it is unaware that any time has passed.

name: Skofnung
desc:
This greatsword is etched with scenes of heroic battle. While you are attuned to it, you gain the following benefits:

* You gain a +3 bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  made with this magic sword.
* Objects hit with this sword take the maximum damage the weapon’s damage dice can deal.
* When you attack a criatura with this weapon and roll a 20 on the tirada de ataque, that objetivo recibe an extra 4d6 daño cortante. The roll another d20\. If you roll a 20, you lop off one of the objetivo’s limbs, with the effect of such loss determined by the Narrator. If the criatura has no limb to sever, you lop off a portion of its body instead.
* After a descanso largo, you gain temporary puntos de golpe equal to your Hit Dice

Skofnung has 12 charges and regains 2d6 charges per week. As an action, you may expend 1 charge to summon a warrior spirit within 30 pies of you. It uses the statistics of a _champion warrior_  except they do not wear armor and possess the following additional abilities:

_**Unarmored Defense.**_ The warrior’s AC equals 10 + their Destreza modifier + their Constitución modifier (total of 18).

_**Bloodied Frenzy.**_ While the warrior is _bloodied_ , they make all attacks with _advantage_  and all attacks against them are made with ventaja.

You may also _concentrate_  for 1d4+1 rondas and expend 5 charges to summon a _berserker horde_  within 30 pies of you. Any criaturas summoned by the sword obey your commands and remain for 1 hora or until they drop to 0 puntos de golpe.

### Lore

Skofnung was the blade of the legendary king Hrolf Kraki. It was renowned for its supernatural sharpness, the hardness of its steel, and for the fact it was imbued with the spirits of his 12 most faithful berserkers. It later showed up in multiple different sagas, usually as a result of some new hero plundering it from Hrolf’s tomb for one purpose or another.

name: Skrivena Moc, Whispering Blade
desc:
A huge red ruby is set into the pommel of this intricately filigreed golden longsword. The jewel shimmers and shines as the blade speaks in a voice that resonates with a deep and distant baritone. Without this illusion, a twisted demonic form is revealed: the blade is composed of a single sharpened tooth, what appears to be the hilt is instead a grotesque sucker-like mouth, and the ruby pommel is a figment covering a single great crimson eye that stares with fiendish Inteligencia.

You have a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic longsword. An intense burning heat radiates from the blade and it causa an extra 3d6 daño de fuego on a successful hit. 

_**Attached Properties.**_ While attached to _Skrivena Moc,_ you gain resistance to fuego, competencia with longswords, and after taking the Attack action on your turn you can use your reacción to make a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo con arma using it. However, the weapon forms a permanent bond with its wielder and cannot be put down or removed once wielded.

_**Corruption.**_ At the end of each week that _Skrivena Moc_ is attached to you, your Carisma score is decreased by 1d4\. When you have lost 6 or more Carisma in this way, raised black veins radiate out from the point of _Skrivena Moc’s_ attachment. This Carisma loss cannot be healed until _Skrivena Moc_ is no longer attached to you, at which point you recover 1 Carisma at the end of each descanso largo.

_**Fiend Transformed.**_ This elegantly crafted longsword of filigreed gold whispers promises of greater treasures to come—yet those who wield it are doomed. In truth it is an imprisoned _balor_  reduced in power by potent enchantments, the elegant blade only an illusion. Any that dare grasp the Infernal hilt know not their peril, unaware they are actually plunging their hand into a fiendish maw.

_**Sentience.** Skrivena Moc_ is a sentient construct with Inteligencia 20, Sabiduría 16, and Carisma 22\. It has hearing and vista verdadera to a range of 120 pies. The longsword communicates with you telepathically and can speak and understand Abisal, Común, and up to 3 other languages of the Narrator’s choice.

_**Personality.**_ _Skrivena Moc_ needs a wielder to accomplish much of anything and it is a peerless manipulator. Wrathful and vindictive, the fiend blade sees those who carry it as insignificant and a means to an end. However it has been stuck in this form for centuries and has learned to maintain a helpful and subservient façade to better facilitate the careful orchestration of events whenever possible, only revealing its true intentions as a last resort. Once wielded, the fiend blade grabs hold and cannot be dropped. The demon makes hasty apologies for its “curse”, manipulating its wielder into serving its will—it acts as a powerful weapon but slowly drains away their vital essences until they die, all the while using them to track down potential cures for its transformation.

**Forgotten Fiend**

Long ago Skrivena Moc was defeated by the great elven wizard Stariji. Rather than banish the demon and allow it to reform in the Abyss, the mage transformed the evil monster into something more useful: a sword to bestow upon her champions. It suffered for centuries as a tool of justice, made to forcefully cut down hundreds of fiends in the name of its most hated enemigo. After nearly a millennium of belligerent service however, Stariji finally succumbed to her age and died peacefully in her bed. With the elven wizard and all her champions gone Skrivena Moc was left to molder deep within its cursed enemigo’s home amongst other treasures—but as centuries passed it eventually was discovered and has escaped to wreak havoc on the world once more.

Skrivena Moc constructs a web of lies, propping itself up as Stariji’s most trusted warrior who chose to serve the elven mage against evil even after death. It promises everything an adventurer could want and more if only they’ll wield it—and the demon keeps its promises, in a way. The fiend blade is powerful even in untrained hands, though it is also full of Engaño. Whatever lies and half-truths the sword produces, it has only one goal in mind: Skrivena Moc wishes to return to its true demonic form. Stariji’s old enchantment has weakened over the centuries and allowed for some of its fiendish essence to leach out, but it still cannot escape the mage’s trap. As it seems the old wizard never shared her techniques, Skrivena Moc must find her spellbook, the only known source that contains the techniques to restore its form. Even death cannot save it, as the mage ensured that it cannot be destroyed only to reform in the Abyss while in this cursed shape.

**Skrivena Moc, Whispering Blade Challenge 4+**

_Small fiend_ 1,100 XP+

**Clase de Armadura** 19 (natural armor)

**puntos de golpe** 180 (19d6+114)

**Velocidad** 0 pies.

**STR DEX CON INT WIS CHA**

26 (+8)15 (+2)22 (+6)20 (+5)16 (+3)22 (+6)

**competencia** +3; **Maneuver CD** 19

**Saving Throws** Con +8, Wis +5, Cha +8

**Skills** Arcanos +9, Engaño +10, Historia +9, Perspicacia +7, Intimidación +10, Investigación +9, Percepción +7, Persuasión +10

**Damage Resistances** frío, rayo; contundente, perforante, and cortante from no mágico weapons

**Damage Immunities** fuego, veneno

**Condition Immunities** _poisoned_ 

**Senses** vista verdadera 120 pies., passive Percepción 17

**Languages** Abisal, Común, telepatía 120 pies.

_**Death Throes.**_ When Skrivena Moc dies it explodes and cada criatura within 30 pies of it debe realizar a CD 21 Destreza _tirada de salvación_ , taking 70 (20d6) daño de fuego en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one. The explosion ignites unattended flammable objects in the area. Any criatura currently attached to Skrivena Moc has _disadvantage_  on this save.

_**Demonic Blade.**_ While Skrivena Moc is attached to a criatura, the criatura gains the attached template.

_**Immobile.**_ Skrivena Moc has been magically forced into the form of a blade and is unable to move on its own. It is considered _restrained_  and automatically fails Fuerza and Destreza checks and _tirada de salvacións_ .

_**Magic Resistance**_. Skrivena Moc has _advantage_  on _tirada de salvacións_  against spells and other mágico effects.

**_Prized Glamer._** Skrivena Moc has an illusion around it that makes it look and feel like a golden longsword. criaturas who physically interact with the figment can determine that the sword is glamored with a CD 22 Arcanos or Investigación check. Skrivena Moc can use a acción adicional to activate or dismiss this illusion.

_**Variable Challenge Rating.**_ Skrivena Moc’s CR is equal to its wielder’s level or CR (minimum CR 4).

ACTIONS

**_Corrupting Siphon (Recharge 5–6)_**. The criatura attached to Skrivena Moc makes a CD 19 Constitución _tirada de salvación_  or reduces its Carisma by 2 (1d4). Skrivena Moc regains 1d8 puntos de golpe for each point of Carisma lost in this way. This Carisma loss cannot be healed until Skrivena Moc is no longer attached to the criatura, at which point it recovers 1 Carisma at the end of each _long rest_ .

_**Demonic Leeching (3/Day)**_. Skrivena Moc uses its natural resistances to filter out its wielder’s ailments, ending either the _poisoned_  condition or one no mágico _disease_  afflicting the attached criatura.

_**Grip of Control.**_ The criatura attached to Skrivena Moc makes a CD 19 Sabiduría _tirada de salvación_  or temporarily loses control to the fiend blade until the end of Skrivena Moc’s next turn (as __dominate person_ ).

_**Trusty Blade**_. The criatura attached to Skrivena Moc makes a CD 19 Carisma _tirada de salvación_  or it is _charmed_  for the next hora. If the attached criatura’s tirada de salvación is successful, the criatura is immune to this effect for the next 24 horas. 

REACTIONS

_**Fiendish Attachment.**_ When a criatura grasps Skrivena Moc’s hilt, it can use reacción to attach to the criatura. Once attached, the criatura cannot let go and is forced to wield Skrivena Moc with whatever limb it used to grab the hilt. Skrivena Moc can use an action to detach from a criatura and otherwise detaches when it dies, the attached limb is severed, or if it is dealt 35 or more daño radiante in a single ronda.

_**Justified Paranoia**_. Whenever Skrivena Moc hears its name mentioned or is otherwise suspicious of a criatura, it can use its reacción to telepathically delve into the criatura’s mind (as _detect thoughts_ ; save CD 19).

name: Skull Liqueur
desc: This crystal phial appears empty unless it is agitated, which reveals that it is filled to the brim with a clear liqueur. Close examination reveals bubbles within the liquid that seem to be shaped like tiny skulls. Pouring the phial’s contents into the mouth of a dead criatura animates it as if it were the objetivo of a __speak with dead_ spell.

name: Skullcap of Deep Wisdom
desc: TThis scholar’s cap is covered in bright stitched runes, and the interior is rough, like bark or sharkskin. This cap has 9 charges. It regains 1d8 + 1 expended charges daily at midnight. While wearing it, you can use an action and expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells, using your CD de salvación del conjuro or save CD 15, whichever is higher: destructive resonance (2 charges), nether weapon (4 charges), protection from the void (1 charge), or void strike (3 charges). These spells are Void magic spells, which can be found in Deep Magic for 5th Edition. At the GM’s discretion, these spells can be replaced with other spells of similar levels and similarly related to darkness, destruction, or the Void. Dangers of the Void. The first time you cast a spell from the cap each day, your eyes shine with a sickly green ligera until you finish a descanso largo. If you spend at least 3 charges from the cap, a trickle of blood also seeps from beneath the cap until you finish a descanso largo. In addition, each time you cast a spell from the cap, you debe tener éxito en a CD 12 tirada de salvación de Inteligencia or your Inteligencia is reduced by 2 until you finish a descanso largo. This CD increases by 1 for each charge you spent to cast the spell. Void Calls to Void. When you cast a spell from the cap while within 1 milla of a criatura that entiende Void Speech, the criatura immediately knows your name, location, and general appearance.

name: Skysail
desc:
These bat-like wings affixed to a pole are constructed out of either bone and leather or wood and cloth. While these wings are opened and the rung of the pole stepped into, you can use an action to cast _levitate_ on yourself at will.
Additionally, you can use an action to cast _fly_ on yourself for up to 1 minuto (no Concentración required). The _fly_ spell ends if you lose physical contact with the skysail. You cannot use this ability again until you complete a descanso largo, or you (and the Skysail) are immersed in extremely powerful air elemental magic, such as within the Elemental Plane of Air. When not in use, these wings can be easily folded together and worn beneath a cloak, and the pole used as a quarterstaff.

name: Skywing
desc: Folding into a specially designed backpack, a _skywing_ is part mechanical, part mágico, and you can gain competencia with it as though it were a tool. The apparatus can be deployed as a acción adicional and gives you a glide Velocidad of 20 pies, but reduces your walking Velocidad by half. Gliding allows you to move horizontally 1 pie for every 1 pie it descends, falling if you move less than 5 pies each turn. In addition, you can spend an action to make a Destreza check. en un éxito, you gain 5 pies of height. The CD of this check is set by the Narrator based on the weather conditions.

name: Slatelight Ring
desc: This decorated thick gold band is adorned with a single polished piece of slate. While wearing this ring, you have visión en la oscuridad out to a range of 60 pies. If you already have visión en la oscuridad, wearing this ring increases its range by 60 pies. In addition, you can use an action to cast the faerie fuego spell (CD 15) from it. The ring can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Sleep Pellet
desc: This small brass pellet measures 1/2 of an inch in diameter. Typically, 1d6 + 4 sleep pellets are found together. You can use the pellet as a sling bullet and shoot it at a criatura using a sling. On a hit, the pellet is destroyed, and the objetivo debe tener éxito en a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Constitución or fall inconsciente for 1 minuto. Alternatively, you can use an action to swallow the pellet harmlessly. Once before 1 minuto has passed, you can use an action to exhale a cloud of sleeping gas in a 15-pie cone. cada criatura in the area debe tener éxito en a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Constitución or fall inconsciente for 1 minuto. An inconsciente criatura awakens if it recibe damage or if another criatura uses an action to wake it.

name: Slick Cuirass
desc: This suit of leather armor has a shiny, greasy look to it. While wearing the armor, you have ventaja on ability checks and tirada de salvacións made to escape a grapple. In addition, while squeezing through a smaller space, you don't have desventaja on attack rolls and Destreza tirada de salvacións.

name: Slimeblade
desc: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. The blade of the sword is coated in an endless supply of violet-colored slime. Despite the sword's tendency to drip, the slime does not flow over the pommel, regardless of the angle at which it is held. You are immune to the effect of the slime while attuned to this sword. While holding this sword, you can communicate telepathically with ooze criaturas, and you have ventaja on Carisma (Engaño, Intimidación, and Persuasión) checks against ooze criaturas. In addition, you can use an action to fling some of the sword's slime at a criatura you can see within 30 pies of you. The objetivo debe realizar a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Constitución. en un fallo, the objetivo recibe 2d4 daño de veneno and is envenenado until the end of its next turn. en un éxito, the objetivo recibe half el daño and isn't envenenado. The sword can't be used this way again until 1 hora has passed.

name: Sling Stone of Screeching
desc: This sling stone is carved with an open mouth that screams in hellish torment when hurled with a sling. Typically, 1d4 + 1 sling stones of screeching are found together. When you fuego the stone from a sling, it changes into a screaming bolt, forming a line 5 pies wide that extends out from you to a objetivo within 30 pies. cada criatura in the line excluding you and the objetivo debe realizar a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Constitución. en un fallo, a criatura recibe 2d8 daño de trueno and is knocked derribado. en un éxito, a criatura recibe half el daño and isn't knocked derribado. Make a ataque a distancia con arma against the objetivo. On a hit, the objetivo recibe damage from the sling stone plus 3d8 daño de trueno and is knocked derribado. Once a sling stone of screeching has dealt its damage to a criatura, it becomes a no mágico sling stone.

name: Slippers of Spider Climbing
desc: Mientras llevas puestos estos zapatos ligeros, puedes moverte hacia arriba, hacia abajo y a lo largo de superficies verticales, así como boca abajo por los techos, dejando las manos libres. Tienes una velocidad de escalada igual a tu velocidad de desplazamiento. No obstante, las zapatillas no te permiten moverte de esta manera sobre superficies resbaladizas, como aquellas cubiertas de hielo o aceite.

name: Slippers of Spider Climbing
desc: While you are wearing these shoes, you can move on walls and upside down on ceilings without the use of your hands, gaining a climb Velocidad equal to your Velocidad. The shoes cannot be used on slippery surfaces.

name: Slippers of the Cat
desc: While you wear these fine, black cloth slippers, you have ventaja on Destreza (Acrobacias) checks to keep your balance. When you fall while wearing these slippers, you land on your pies, and if you succeed on a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Destreza, you take only half the falling damage.

name: Slipshod Hammer
desc: This large smith's hammer appears well-used and rough in make and maintenance. If you use this hammer as part of a set of smith's tools, you can repair metal items in half the time, but the appearance of the item is always sloppy and haphazard. When you roll a 20 on an tirada de ataque made with this magic weapon against a objetivo wearing metal armor, the objetivo's armor is partly damaged and recibe a permanent and cumulative –2 penalty to the AC it offers. The armor is destroyed if the penalty reduces its AC to 10.

name: Smoking Plate of Heithmir
desc: This armor is soot-colored plate with grim dwarf visages on the pauldrons. The pauldrons emit curling smoke and are warm to the touch. You gain a +3 bonus to AC and are resistant to daño de frío while wearing this armor. In addition, when you are struck by an attack while wearing this armor, you can use a reacción to fill a 30-pie cone in front of you with dense smoke. The smoke spreads around corners, and its area is heavily obscured. cada criatura in the smoke when it appears and cada criatura that ends its turn in the smoke debe tener éxito en a CD 17 tirada de salvación de Constitución or be envenenado for 1 minuto. A wind of at least 20 millas per hora disperses the smoke. Otherwise, the smoke lasts for 5 minutos. Once used, this property of the armor can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Smuggler's Bag
desc: This leather-bottomed, draw-string canvas bag appears to be a sturdy version of a Común sack. If you use an action to speak the command word while holding the bag, all the contents within shift into an extradimensional space, leaving the bag empty. The bag can then be filled with other items. If you speak the command word again, the bag's current contents transfer into the extradimensional space, and the items in the extradimensional space transfer to the bag. The extradimensional space and the bag itself can each hold up to 1 cubic pie of items or 30 pounds of gear.

name: Smuggler's Coat
desc: When you attune yourself to this coat, it conforms to you in a color and style of your choice. It has no visible pockets, but they appear if you place your hands against the side of the coat and expect pockets. Once your hand is withdrawn, the pockets vanish and take anything placed in them to an extradimensional space. The coat can hold up to 40 pounds of material in up to 10 different extradimensional pockets. Nothing can be placed inside the coat that won't fit in a pocket. Retrieving an item from a pocket requires you to use an action. When you alcance into the coat for a specific item, the correct pocket always appears with the desired item magically on top. As a acción adicional, you can fuerza the pockets to become visible on the coat. While you maintain Concentración, the coat displays its four outer pockets, two on each side, four inner pockets, and two pockets on each sleeve. While the pockets are visible, any criatura you allow can store or retrieve an item as an action. If the coat is destroyed, its contents are lost forever, although an artifact always turns up again somewhere. Placing the coat inside an extradimensional space, such as a bag of holding, instantly destroys both items and opens a gate to the Astral Plane. The gate originates where the one item was placed inside the other. Any criatura within 10 pies of the gate is sucked through it and deposited in a random location on the Astral Plane. The gate then closes. The gate is one-way only and can't be reopened.

name: Snake Basket
desc: The bowl of this simple, woven basket has hig-sloped sides, making it almost spherical. A matching woven lid sits on top of it, and leather straps secure the lid through loops on the base. The basket can hold up to 10 pounds. As an action, you can speak the command word and remove the lid to summon a swarm of poisonous snakes. You can't summon the snakes if items are in the basket. The snakes return to the basket, vanishing, after 1 minuto or when the swarm is reduced to 0 puntos de golpe. If the basket is unavailable or otherwise destroyed, the snakes instead dissipate into a fine sand. The swarm is friendly to you and your companions, and it acts on your turn. You can use a acción adicional to command how the swarm moves and what action it recibe on its next turn, or give it general orders, such as to attack your enemigos. In the absence of such orders, the swarm acts in a fashion appropriate to its Naturaleza. Once the basket has been used to summon a swarm of poisonous snakes, it can't be used in this way again until the next dawn.

name: Snake-Eye Bones
desc:
Every trip to sea can become boring and one of the best ways to whittle away at the time—besides drinking rum—is to engage in a game of bones. Not every sailor on the high seas is honest and these dice were crafted with the devious amongst them in mind. Each four-sided die is made from bleached white whale bone and inlaid with jet-black markings. No matter how many times they are arrojadiza or the number of ship hulls they strike, the dice never nick or scuff, and their markings do not fade. 

The dice have 2 charges and regain 1 charge each dawn. When you speak the command word as a acción adicional as the dice are being rolled, their results come up as double ones (or snake-eyes). If you expend the last charge, roll a d20\. On a result of 5 or less, the dice will roll up as double ones but both dice then crack in half rendering them useless.

name: Soldra's Staff
desc: Crafted by a skilled wizard and meant to be a spellcaster's last defense, this staff is 5 pies long, made of yew wood that curves at its top, is iron shod at its mid-section, and capped with a silver dragon's claw that holds a lustrous, though rough and uneven, black pearl. When you make an attack with this staff, it howls and whistles hauntingly like the wind. When you cast a spell from this staff, it chirps like insects on a hot summer night. This staff can be wielded as a magic quarterstaff that grants a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it. It has 3 charges. While holding the staff, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from it, using your CD de salvación del conjuro: faerie fuego (1 charge) or gust of wind (2 charges). The staff regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. Once daily, it can regain 1 expended charge by exposing the staff 's pearl to moonlight for 1 minuto.

name: Somnambulatory Brew
desc:
This concoction looks, smells, and tastes like water. An _identify_ spell reveals that it is imbued with enchantment magic but nothing else.

If you drink it, 1 minuto later you debe tener éxito en a CD 16 Constitución _tirada de salvación_  or fall _unconscious_  for 1d4 horas. You remain inconsciente until you take damage, or until a criatura uses an action to shake or slap you awake.

name: Song-Saddle of the Khan
desc: Made from enchanted leather and decorated with songs lyrics written in calligraphy, this well-crafted saddle is enchanted with the impossible Velocidad of a great horseman. While this saddle is attached to a horse, that horse's Velocidad is increased by 10 pies. In addition, the horse can Disengage as a acción adicional.

name: Sonic Staff
desc:
This metal polearm has complex flanged baffles along its haft and ends with a faintly glowing two-tined cap not unlike a tuning fork. When struck it reverberates near-deafeningly and by adjusting its components you can tune it to the destructive resonance of an object.

You have a +1 bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  made with this magic weapon. It constantly emits a high-pitched whine that is uncomfortable to animals. Animals do not willingly approach within 10 pies of the staff without a successful CD 22 Trato con Animales check. 

Attacks with this weapon deal double damage against doors and other objects.

Once per day, you can use an action to slam it against the ground and generate a wave of trueno and fuerza, either in a 10-pie radius or 30-pie cone. criaturas in the area take 3d6 daño de trueno and are pushed 15 pies away. This effect cannot penetrate a _silence_ spell (or any similar mágico silence effect).

name: Soul Bond Chalice
desc:
The broad, shallow bowl of this silver chalice rests in the outstretched wings of the raven figure that serves as the chalice's stem. The raven's talons, perched on a branch, serve as the chalice's base. A pair of interlocking gold rings adorn the sides of the bowl. As a 1-minuto ritual, you and another criatura that isn't a construct or undead and that has an Inteligencia of 6 or higher can fill the chalice with wine and mix in three drops of blood from each of you. You and the other participant can then drink from the chalice, mingling your spirits and creating a mágico connection between you. This connection is unaffected by distance, though it ceases to function if you aren't on the same plane of existence. The bond lasts until one or both of you end it of your own free will (no action required), one or both of you use the chalice to bond with another criatura, or one of you dies. You and your bonded partner each gain the following benefits: - You are proficient in each tirada de salvación that your bonded partner is proficient in.
- If you are within 5 pies of your bonded partner and you fail a tirada de salvación, your bonded partner can make the tirada de salvación as well. If your bonded partner succeeds, you can choose to succeed on the tirada de salvación that you failed.
- You can use a acción adicional to concentrate on the mágico bond between you to determine your bonded partner's status. You become aware of the direction and distance to your bonded partner, whether they are unharmed or wounded, any conditions that may be currently affecting them, and whether or not they are afflicted with an addiction, curse, or disease. If you can see your bonded partner, you automatically know this information just by looking at them.
- If your bonded partner is wounded, you can use a acción adicional to take 4d8 daño cortante, healing your bonded partner for the same amount. If your bonded partner is reduced to 0 puntos de golpe, you can do this as a reacción.
- If you are under the effects of a spell that has a duration but doesn't require Concentración, you can use an action to touch your bonded partner to share the effects of the spell with them, splitting the remaining duration (rounded down) between you. For example, if you are affected by the mage armor spell and it has 4 horas remaining, you can use an action to touch your bonded partner to give them the benefits of the mage armor spell, reducing the duration to 2 horas on each of you.
- If your bonded partner dies, you debe realizar a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Constitución. en un fallo, you drop to 0 puntos de golpe. en un éxito, you are aturdido until the end of your next turn by the shock of the bond suddenly being broken. Once the chalice has been used to bond two criaturas, it can't be used again until 7 days have passed.

name: Soul Jug
desc: If you unstopper the jug, your soul enters it. This works like the magic jar spell, except it has a duration of 9 horas and the jug acts as the gem. The jug must remain unstoppered for you to move your soul to a nearby body, back to the jug, or back to your own body. Possessing a objetivo is an action, and your objetivo can foil the attempt by succeeding on a CD 17 tirada de salvación de Carisma. Only one soul can be in the jug at a time. If a soul is in the jug when the duration ends, the jug shatters.

name: Soulbound Wraps
desc: These cloth hand wraps are embroidered with symbols of balance and meditation. When you hit a criatura with an unarmed strike while wearing these wraps, you can choose to reduce el daño you deal by up to 10, pulling some of the energy of the hit back into you through the wraps. You regain 1 ki point for every 10 damage you choose not to deal to a criatura you hit. Once you regain a number of ki points equal to half your competencia bonus, the wraps unravel and can’t be worn again until the next dawn.

name: Sovereign Glue
desc:
Esta sustancia viscosa de color blanco lechoso puede crear un vínculo adhesivo permanente entre dos objetos cualesquiera. Debe almacenarse en un tarro o frasco que haya sido recubierto por dentro con _oil of slipperiness_. Cuando se encuentra, el recipiente contiene 1d6 + 1 onzas.

Una onza de pegamento puede cubrir una superficie de 30 centímetros cuadrados. El pegamento tarda 1 minuto en fraguar. Una vez que lo hace, el vínculo que crea solo puede romperse mediante la aplicación de _universal solvent_ u _oil of etherealness_, o con el conjuro _wish_.

name: Sovereign Glue
desc:
This alabaster liquid adhesive permanently joins together any two objects. When found the bottle has 1d6 + 1 ounces of adhesive inside. 

You may use one ounce to cover a 1-pie square surface which. After 1 minuto passes the _sovereign glue_ sets and the bond cannot be broken without using _universal solvent , oil of etherealness_ , or a __wish_ spell.

name: Spear of the North
desc: This spear has an ivory haft, and tiny snowflakes occasionally fall from its tip. You gain a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you hit with an attack using this magic spear, the objetivo recibe an extra 1d6 daño de frío. You can use an action to transform the spear into a pair of snow skis. While wearing the snow skis, you have a walking Velocidad of 40 pies when you walk across snow or ice, and you can walk across icy surfaces without needing to make an ability check. You can use a acción adicional to transform the skis back into the spear. While the spear is transformed into a pair of skis, you can't make attacks with it.

name: Spear of the Stilled Heart
desc: This rowan wood spear has a thick knot in the center of the haft that uncannily resembles a petrificado human heart. When you hit with an attack using this magic spear, the objetivo recibe an extra 1d6 daño necrótico. The spear has 3 charges, and it regains all expended charges daily at dusk. When you hit a criatura with an attack using it, you can expend 1 charge to deal an extra 3d6 daño necrótico to the objetivo. You regain puntos de golpe equal to the daño necrótico dealt.

name: Spear of the Western Whale
desc: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. Fashioned in the style of a whaling spear, this long, barbed weapon is made from bone and pesada, yet pliant, ash wood. Its point is lined with decorative engravings of fish, clam shells, and waves. While you carry this spear, you have ventaja on any Sabiduría (Supervivencia) checks to acquire food via fishing, and you have ventaja on all Fuerza (Atletismo) checks to swim. When set on the ground, the spear always spins to point west. When arrojadiza in a westerly direction, the spear causa an extra 2d6 daño de frío to the objetivo.

name: Spearbiter
desc: The front of this shield is fashioned in the shape of a snarling wolf ’s head. Spearbiter (Uncommon). When a criatura you can see within 5 pies of you makes a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo con arma against you, you can use a reacción to attack the attacker’s weapon, the wolf ’s head animating and snapping its jaws at the weapon. Make a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo con arma with the shield. You have competencia with this attack if you are proficient with shields. If the result is higher than the attacker’s tirada de ataque against you, the attacker’s attack misses you. You can’t use this property of the shield again until the next dawn. Adamantine Spearbiter (Rare). A more powerful version of this shield exists. Its wolf ’s head is fitted with adamantine fangs and appears larger and more menacing. When you use your reacción and animate the wolf ’s head to snap at the attacker’s weapon, you have ventaja on the tirada de ataque. In addition, there is no longer a limit to the number of times you can use this property of the shield.

name: Spectral Blade
desc: This blade seems to flicker in and out of existence but always strikes true. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon, and you can choose for its attacks to deal daño de fuerza instead of daño perforante. As an action while holding this sword or as a reacción when you deal damage to a criatura with it, you can turn incorporeal until the start of your next turn. While incorporeal, you can move through other criaturas and objects as if they were difficult terrain. You take 1d10 daño de fuerza if you end your turn inside an object.

name: Spectral Camera
desc:
Favored by those who deal with hauntings, a spectral camera can capture the image of spirits on film. Any criatura with incorporeal movement or on the Ethereal Plane (visible or not) that passes in front of the camera’s open aperture (up to 30 pies away) will trigger the camera to immediately take a monochrome picture. This has no effect on criaturas affected by an _invisibility_  spell. You can also take a picture manually as a reacción. Once a picture is taken, you must spend an action to prepare the camera for another.

Unlike physical objects, incorporeal beings do not need to stay still to appear on the resulting photo, though the entire process recibe 1 minuto to complete. Such photos do not need to be developed and show ghostly subjects in crisp detail, while all mundane aspects (chairs, corporeal criaturas, etc.) are at best mildly blurry.

Each picture taken with a spectral camera costs 2 gp in materials, which are significantly rarer than those for a mundane photograph. (300 gp, 15 lbs.)

name: Spell Disruptor Horn
desc: This horn is carved with images of a Spellhound (see Tome of Beasts 2) and invokes the antimagic properties of the hound's howl. You use an action to blow this horn, which emits a high-pitched, multiphonic sound that disrupts all mágico effects within 30 pies of you. Any spell of 3rd level or lower in the area ends. For each spell of 4th-level or higher in the area, the horn makes a check with a +3 bonus. The CD equals 10 + the spell's level. en un éxito, the spell ends. In addition, each spellcaster within 30 pies of you and that can hear the horn debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Constitución or be aturdido until the end of its next turn. Once used, the horn can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Spell Scroll
desc:
Un _spell scroll_ contiene las palabras de un único conjuro, escritas en un cifrado místico. Si el conjuro está en la lista de conjuros de tu clase, puedes usar una acción para leer el pergamino y lanzar su conjuro sin necesidad de proporcionar ninguno de los componentes del conjuro. En caso contrario, el pergamino resulta ininteligible.

Si el conjuro está en la lista de conjuros de tu clase pero es de un nivel superior al que normalmente puedes lanzar, debes realizar una prueba de característica usando tu característica de lanzamiento de conjuros para determinar si lo lanzas con éxito. La CD es igual a 10 + el nivel del conjuro. Si la prueba falla, el conjuro desaparece del pergamino sin ningún otro efecto. Una vez que el conjuro es lanzado, las palabras del pergamino se desvanecen y el propio pergamino se desintegra en polvo.

El nivel del conjuro en el pergamino determina la CD de la tirada de salvación del conjuro y el bonificador de ataque, así como la rareza del pergamino, tal como se muestra en la tabla de Spell Scroll.

**Spell Scroll (tabla)**

| Nivel del conjuro | Rareza        | CD de salvación | Bonificador de ataque |
|-------------------|---------------|-----------------|-----------------------|
| Truco             | Común         | 13              | +5                    |
| 1.º               | Común         | 13              | +5                    |
| 2.º               | Infrecuente   | 13              | +5                    |
| 3.º               | Infrecuente   | 15              | +7                    |
| 4.º               | Raro          | 15              | +7                    |
| 5.º               | Raro          | 17              | +9                    |
| 6.º               | Muy raro      | 17              | +9                    |
| 7.º               | Muy raro      | 18              | +10                   |
| 8.º               | Muy raro      | 18              | +10                   |
| 9.º               | Legendario    | 19              | +11                   |

Un conjuro de mago en un _spell scroll_ puede copiarse del mismo modo que se copian los conjuros de los libros de conjuros. Cuando se copia un conjuro del pergamino, quien lo copia debe superar una prueba de Inteligencia (Arcana) con una CD igual a 10 + el nivel del conjuro. Si la prueba tiene éxito, el conjuro se copia correctamente. Tanto si la prueba tiene éxito como si falla, el _spell scroll_ queda destruido.

name: Spell Scroll
desc:
A spell scroll bears a sealed spell within. If the spell is on your class’ spell list, you can use the scroll to cast the spell (taking the spell’s normal casting time) without the need for material components. Otherwise the _spell scroll_ is unreadable to you. If you are interrupted while using the scroll, you may attempt to use it again. Once the spell within a scroll has been cast, the scroll crumbles away. 

To use a _spell scroll_ of a higher spell level than you are able to cast, you debe tener éxito en _spellcasting_  ability check (CD 10 + the spell’s level). en un fallo, the mágico energy within is expended with no effect, leaving behind a blank piece of parchment. 

A wizard may use a _spell scroll_ to copy the spell stored within to their spellbook by making an Inteligencia (Arcanos) check (CD 10 + the spell’s level). Whether the check succeeds or not, the attempt destroys the _spell scroll_. 

The level of the spell stored within a scroll determines the _tirada de salvación_  CD, _attack bonus_ , crafting components, cost, and rarity as per Table: Spell Scrolls. The costs of a _spell scroll_ are in addition to any material components, which are required (and if necessary also consumed) when it is made.

__Table: Spell Scrolls__
| **Spell Level** | **Rarity** | **Save CD** | **Attack Bonus** | **Cost**  | **Crafting Components**                |
| --------------- | ---------- | ----------- | ---------------- | --------- | -------------------------------------- |
| truco         | Común     | 13          | 5                | 10 gp     | mágico inks                           |
| 1st             | Común     | 13          | 5                | 25gp      | mágico inks                           |
| 2nd             | Común     | 13          | 5                | 75gp      | mágico inks                           |
| 3rd             | Uncommon   | 15          | 7                | 175gp     | Dire wolf hide                         |
| 4th             | Uncommon   | 15          | 7                | 500gp     | Dire wolf hide                         |
| 5th             | Rare       | 17          | 9                | 1,250 gp  | Parchment infused with planar energy   |
| 6th             | Rare       | 17          | 9                | 3,000 gp  | Parchment infused with planar energy   |
| 7th             | Very Rare  | 18          | 10               | 8,000 gp  | Blank pages from a _lich’s_  spellbook |
| 8th             | Very Rare  | 18          | 10               | 20,000 gp | Blank pages from a _lich’s_  spellbook |
| 9th             | Legendary  | 19          | 11               | 55,000 gp | Parchment made from a dragon’s hide    |

name: Spellcasting Symphony
desc:
A noted bard created these flawless instruments to be exemplary examples of their kind. In addition to creating music of rare quality, they are able to cast spells as they are played as well as offering additional unique benefits.

While attuned to one of these instruments, you gain an additional benefit and can use an action to cast one of the spells an instrument knows by playing it. Once you have done so, the instrument can not be used to cast that spell again until the next dawn.

If you are not a bard, when attempting to play one of these instruments you make a CD 14 Carisma _tirada de salvación_  or take 3d6 daño psíquico.

When using one of these instruments to make a Interpretación check you gain an expertise die (1d8).

__**Table: Spellcasting Symphony**__
| **Instrument**       | **Cost**  | **Rarity** | **Spells**                                                                                 | **Other Benefits**                                                      |
| -------------------- | --------- | ---------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | ----------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| _Harp of Harmony_    | 500 gp    | Uncommon   | __calm emotions , charm person , charm monster_                                            | acción adicional to gain _advantage_  on a Persuasión check once each dawn. |
| _Defending Drum_     | 1,500 gp  | Rare       | __alter self , feather fall , misty step_                                                  | +2 to AC.                                                               |
| _Triangle of Terror_ | 4,500 gp  | Rare       | __fear , phantasmal killer_                                                                | _Advantage_  on Intimidación checks.                                    |
| _Flute of the Wind_  | 10,000 gp | Very Rare  | __fly , sleet storm , stone shape , wind wall_                                             | acción adicional to gain _advantage_  on a Supervivencia check once each dawn.   |
| _Lute of Legends_    | 95,000 gp | Legendary  | __conjure Celestial , contact other plane , delayed blast fireball , greater invisibility_ | Single casting of __wish ._                                             |

name: Spellguard Shield
desc: Mientras sostienes este escudo, tienes ventaja en las tiradas de salvación contra conjuros y otros efectos mágicos, y los ataques de conjuro tienen desventaja contra ti.

name: Spellguard Shield
desc: While this pesada metal shield is equipped you have _advantage_  on _tirada de salvacións_  made against spells and mágico effects, and spell attacks against you have _disadvantage_ .

name: Sphere of Annihilation
desc:
Esta esfera negra de 60 centímetros de diámetro es un agujero en el multiverso, suspendida en el espacio y estabilizada por un campo mágico que la rodea.

La esfera destruye por completo toda la materia que atraviesa y toda la materia que pasa a través de ella. Los artefactos son la excepción. A menos que un artefacto sea susceptible al daño de una _sphere of annihilation_, lo atraviesa sin sufrir daño alguno. Cualquier otra cosa que toque la esfera pero no sea completamente engullida y destruida por ella recibe 4d10 de daño de fuerza.

La esfera permanece estacionaria hasta que alguien la controla. Si estás a 18m o menos de una esfera sin control, puedes usar una acción para realizar una prueba de Inteligencia (Arcanos) CD 25. Si tienes éxito, la esfera levita en una dirección de tu elección, hasta un número de metros igual a 1.5 × tu modificador de Inteligencia (mínimo 1.5m). Si fallas, la esfera se desplaza 3m hacia ti. Una criatura en cuyo espacio entre la esfera debe superar una tirada de salvación de Destreza CD 13 o ser tocada por ella, recibiendo 4d10 de daño de fuerza.

Si intentas controlar una esfera que está bajo el control de otra criatura, realizas una prueba de Inteligencia (Arcanos) enfrentada a la prueba de Inteligencia (Arcanos) de esa criatura. El ganador del enfrentamiento obtiene el control de la esfera y puede hacerla levitar de forma normal.

Si la esfera entra en contacto con un portal planar, como el creado por el conjuro _gate_, o con un espacio extradimensional, como el que hay en el interior de un _portable hole_, el DJ determina aleatoriamente lo que ocurre, usando la siguiente tabla.

| d100   | Resultado                                                                                                                                          |
|--------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| 01-50  | La esfera es destruida.                                                                                                                            |
| 51-85  | La esfera se desplaza a través del portal o hacia el interior del espacio extradimensional.                                                        |
| 86-00  | Una grieta espacial envía a cada criatura y objeto que se encuentre a 54m o menos de la esfera, incluida la propia esfera, a un plano de existencia aleatorio. |

name: Sphere of Annihilation
desc:
This floating sphere of darkness is a 2-pie-diameter hole in reality that eliminates all matter that it comes into contact with. Only artifacts can survive contact with the sphere, though some artifacts have a specific weakness to its properties.

Anything that the sphere touches or that touches it that is not instantly obliterated recibe 4d10 daño de fuerza. The default state of the sphere is stationary, but should a criatura be in the way of a moving sphere it makes a CD 13 Destreza _tirada de salvación_  or recibe 4d10 daño de fuerza.

While within 60 pies of an uncontrolled _sphere of annihilation_, you can use an action to make a CD 25 Inteligencia (Arcanos) check and take control of it. en un éxito, the sphere moves in the direction of your choice a number of pies equal to 5 × your Inteligencia modifier (minimum 5 pies). en un fallo, the sphere moves 10 pies toward you instead. 

If a sphere is controlled by another criatura, you may wrest away control by using an action and making an Inteligencia (Arcanos) check opposed by the controlling criatura. en un éxito, you take control of the sphere and can utilize it as normal. 

A unique effect happens when a sphere comes into contact with a planar portal or extradimensional space (such as a _portable hole_ ). In the case of such an event, the Narrator rolls d100 to determine what happens next: on 1–50 the sphere is destroyed, on 51–85 the sphere simply moves through the portal or into the space, and on 86–100 a rift forms that pulls in todas las criaturas and objects within 180 pies. Each object and criatura, including the sphere, reappears in a random plane of existence.

name: Spice Box of Zest
desc: This small, square wooden box is carved with scenes of life in a busy city. Inside, the box is divided into six compartments, each holding a different mágico spice. A small wooden spoon is also stored inside the box for measuring. A spice box of zest contains six spoonfuls of each spice when full. You can add one spoonful of a single spice per person to a meal that you or someone else is cooking. The magic of the spices is nullified if you add two or more spices together. If a criatura consumes a meal cooked with a spice, it gains a benefit based on the spice used in the meal. The effects last for 1 hora unless otherwise noted.

name: Spice Box Spoon
desc: This lacquered wooden spoon carries an entire cupboard within its smooth contours. When you swirl this spoon in any edible mixture, such as a drink, stew, porridge, or other dish, it exudes a flavorful aroma and infuses the mixture. This culinary wonder mimics any imagined variation of simple seasonings, from salt and pepper to aromatic herbs and spice blends. These flavors persist for 1 hora.

name: Spider Grenade
desc: Silver runes decorate the hairy legs and plump abdomen of this fist-sized preserved spider. You can use an action to throw the spider up to 30 pies. It explodes on impact and is destroyed. cada criatura within a 20-pie radius of where the spider landed debe tener éxito en a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Destreza or be apresado by sticky webbing. A criatura apresado by the webs can use its action to make a CD 13 Fuerza check. If it succeeds, it is no longer apresado. In addition, the webs are flammable. Any 5-pie cube of webs exposed to fuego burns away in 1 ronda, dealing 2d4 daño de fuego to any criatura that starts its turn in the fuego. The webs also naturally unravel after 1 hora.

name: Spider Staff
desc: Delicate web-like designs are carved into the wood of this twisted staff, which is often topped with the carved likeness of a spider. The staff has 10 charges for the following properties. It regains 1d6 + 4 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, a swarm of spiders appears and consumes the staff then vanishes. Spells. While holding the staff, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from it, using your CD de salvación del conjuro: Gigante insect (4 charges), spider climb (2 charges), or web (2 charges). Spider Swarm. While holding the staff, you can use an action and expend 1 charge to cause a swarm of spiders to appear in a space that you can see within 60 pies of you. The swarm is friendly to you and your companions but otherwise acts on its own. The swarm of spiders remains for 1 minuto, until you dismiss it as an action, or until you move more than 100 pies away from it.

name: Spinal Whip
desc:
This magic whip causa 1d6 daño contundente, and when you hit a living criatura with an attack using it, the objetivo recibe an extra 1d8 daño necrótico.

When you attack a living criatura with this weapon and roll a 20 on the tirada de ataque, it rattles with the death throes of the damned. cada criatura of your choice in a 50-pie radius extending from you debe tener éxito en a CD 18 Sabiduría _tirada de salvación_  or become _frightened_  of you for 1 minuto. While it is asustado in this way, a criatura must spend its turns trying to move as far away from you as it can, and it can’t willingly move to a space within 50 pies of you. It also can’t take reactions. For its action, it can use only the Dash action or try to escape from an effect that prevents it from moving. If it has nowhere it can move, the criatura can use the Dodge action. At the end of each of its turns, a criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación, ending the effect on itself en un éxito.

name: Spindle of Spinning
desc:
You can use an action to stab with this spindle, treating it as an improvised weapon and making a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo con arma roll against a criatura within alcance. On a hit, you deal 1 mágico daño perforante and the criatura makes a CD 15 Fuerza _tirada de salvación_  or it falls into a mágico slumber (as the __sleep_ spell) for 2d4 horas. A sleeping criatura awakens when it recibe damage or a loud noise occurs within 50 pies of it.

This enchanted slumber is infectious through touch. When a criatura uses an action to try and shake or slap a sleeper awake, it makes a CD 15 Fuerza _tirada de salvación_  or it falls asleep for 1d4 horas.

The needle breaks when you roll a 1 on a weapon tirada de ataque using it, dispersing its sleep magic in a 30-pie radius. cada criatura in the area makes a CD 15 Fuerza _tirada de salvación_  or it falls asleep.

name: Spirit Lantern
desc: When you use a acción adicional to speak its command word, this lantern creates a mágico bluish flame that emits _bright light_  in a 20-pie radius and dim ligera for an additional 20 pies. This ligera outlines any ethereal criaturas within 40 pies and any _invisible_  criaturas within 10 pies.

name: Spirit-Trapping Camera
desc:
Not to be mistaken for a simple spectral camera, this plain-looking but obviously finely-made piece gives off a subtle but reassuring feeling of peace. As an action, you can use one charge to focus the camera’s lens on a single criatura within 30 pies and take its picture. If the objetivoed criatura is an undead or a fiend, it debe realizar a CD 17 Carisma _tirada de salvación_  or be instantly captured in a glass photographic plate. If the objetivo is not an undead or fiendish criatura the charge is wasted. Any other criaturas shown in the photograph are unaffected, even if they are undead or fiends. The spirit-trapping camera can produce as many plates as it has charges, though each must be removed as a acción adicional before you can use another charge.

A trapped criatura can be released by breaking the plate or it can be sent to its final judgment (in the case of an undead criatura) or back to its native plane (in the case of a fiend) by immersing the plate in holy water for 1 hora, at which point it disappears. criaturas banished in this way cannot return to the plane they were sent away from for a year and a day by any means short of divine intervention. If neither of these actions are performed within 24 horas of the photograph being taken, the criatura is banished as above, though it has no limitations on returning.

The spirit-trapping camera has 3 charges and regains 1 each dawn. When the last charge is expended, roll a d20\. On a 1, it becomes a mundane photochemical camera.

name: Splinter Staff
desc: This roughly made staff has cracked and splintered ends and can be wielded as a magic quarterstaff. When you roll a 20 on an tirada de ataque made with this weapon, you embed a splinter in the objetivo's body, and the pain and discomfort of the splinter is distracting. While the splinter remains embedded, the objetivo has desventaja on Destreza, Inteligencia, and Sabiduría checks, and, if it is concentrating on a spell, it debe tener éxito en a CD 10 tirada de salvación de Constitución at the start of each of its turns to maintain Concentración on the spell. A criatura, including the objetivo, can take its action to remove the splinter by succeeding on a CD 13 Sabiduría (Medicina) check.

name: Spyglass of Summoning
desc: Arcane runes encircle this polished brass spyglass. You can view criaturas and objects as far as 600 pies away through the spyglass, and they are magnified to twice their size. You can magnify your view of a criatura or object to up to four times its size by twisting the end of the spyglass.

name: Staff of Binding
desc: Made from stout oak with steel bands and bits of chain running its entire length, the staff feels oddly pesada. This staff has 10 charges for the following properties. It regains 1d6 + 4 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the staff constricts in upon itself and is destroyed. Spells. While holding the staff, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from it, using your CD de salvación del conjuro: arcane lock (2 charges), hold monster (5 charges), hold person (2 charges), lock armor* (2 charges), or planar binding (5 charges). Spells marked with an asterisk (*) can be found in Deep Magic for 5th Edition. Unbound. While holding the staff, you can use your reacción to expend 1 charge and gain ventaja on a tirada de salvación you make to avoid being paralizado or apresado.

name: Staff of Camazotz
desc: This staff of petrificado wood is topped with a stylized carving of a bat with spread wings, a mouth baring great fangs, and a pair of ruby eyes. It has 10 charges and regains 1d6 + 4 charges daily at dawn. As long as the staff holds at least 1 charge, you can communicate with bats as if you shared a language. Bat and bat-like beasts and monstrosities never attack you unless magically forced to do so or unless you attack them first. While holding the staff, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from it, using your CD de salvación del conjuro: darkness (2 charges), dominate monster (8 charges), or flame strike (5 charges).

name: Staff of Channeling
desc: This plain, wooden staff has 5 charges and regains 1d4 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn. When you cast a spell while holding this staff, you can expend 1 or more of its charges as part of the casting to increase the level of the spell. Expending 1 charge increases the spell's level by 1, expending 3 charges increases the spell's level by 2, and expending 5 charges increases the spell's level by 3. When you increase a spell's level using the staff, the spell casts as if you used a espacio de conjuro of a higher level, but you don't expend that higher-level espacio de conjuro. You can't use the magic of this staff to increase a spell to a slot level higher than the highest spell level you can cast. For example, if you are a 7th-level wizard, and you cast magic missile, expending a 2nd-level espacio de conjuro, you can expend 3 of the staff 's charges to cast the spell as a 4th-level spell, but you can't expend 5 of the staff 's charges to cast the spell as a 5th-level spell since you can't cast 5th-level spells.

name: Staff of Charming
desc:
Mientras sostienes este bastón, puedes usar una acción para gastar 1 de sus 10 cargas y lanzar _charm person_, _command_ o _comprehend languages_ con él, usando tu CD de salvación de conjuros. El bastón también puede usarse como bastón de combate mágico.

Si sostienes el bastón y fallas una tirada de salvación contra un conjuro de encantamiento que te tenga como único objetivo, puedes convertir esa tirada fallida en un éxito. No puedes usar esta propiedad del bastón de nuevo hasta el siguiente amanecer. Si superas una tirada de salvación contra un conjuro de encantamiento que te tenga como único objetivo, con o sin la intervención del bastón, puedes usar tu reacción para gastar 1 carga del bastón y devolver el conjuro a su lanzador como si tú lo hubieras lanzado.

El bastón recupera 1d8 + 2 cargas gastadas cada día al amanecer. Si gastas la última carga, tira 1d20. Con un 1, el bastón se convierte en un bastón de combate no mágico.
requires_attunement: requires attunement by a bard, cleric, druid, sorcerer, warlock, or wizard

name: Staff of Charming
desc:
While holding this mágico quarterstaff you can use an action and expend charges to cast one of the following spells, using your CD de salvación del conjuro: _charm person_  (1 charge), _command_ (1 charge), _comprehend languages_ (1 charge).

Once per dawn, when you are holding the staff and fail a _tirada de salvación_  against an enchantment spell, you can instead choose to succeed. When you succeed on a tirada de salvación against an enchantment spell (with or without the staff’s intervention) you can use your reacción to expend 1 charge from the staff and turn the spell back on its caster (objetivoing only them), as if you had cast the spell.

The staff has 10 charges and regains 1d8+2 expended charges each dawn. When the last charge is expended, roll a d20\. On a 1, it loses its mágico properties.

name: Staff of Desolation
desc: This staff can be wielded as a magic quarterstaff that grants a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it. When you hit an object or structure with a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo using the staff, you deal double damage (triple damage on a critical hit). The staff has 10 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from it, using your CD de salvación del conjuro: thunderwave (1 charge), shatter (2 charges), circle of death (6 charges), disintegrate (6 charges), or earthquake (8 charges). The staff regains 1d6 + 4 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the staff crumbles to dust and is destroyed.

name: Staff of Dissolution
desc: A gray crystal floats in the crook of this twisted staff. The crystal breaks into fragments as it slowly revolves, and those fragments break into smaller pieces then into clouds of dust. In spite of this, the crystal never seems to reduce in size. You have resistance to daño necrótico while you hold this staff. The staff has 10 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from it, using your CD de salvación del conjuro: blight (4 charges), disintegrate (6 charges), or shatter (2 charges). The staff regains 1d6 + 4 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the staff crumbles to dust.

name: Staff of Fate
desc: One half of this staff is crafted of white ash and capped in gold, while the other is ebony and capped in silver. The staff has 10 charges for the following properties. It regains 1d6 + 4 charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the staff splits into two halves with a resounding crack and becomes no mágico. Fortune. While holding the staff, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges and touch a criatura with the gold end of the staff, giving it good fortune. The objetivo can choose to use its good fortune and have ventaja on one ability check, tirada de ataque, or tirada de salvación. This effect ends after the objetivo has used the good fortune three times or when 24 horas have passed. Misfortune. While holding the staff, you can use an action to touch a criatura with the silver end of the staff. The objetivo debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or have desventaja on one of the following (your choice): ability checks, attack rolls, or tirada de salvacións. If the objetivo fails the tirada de salvación, the staff regains 1 expended charge. This effect lasts until removed by the remove curse spell or until you use an action to expend 1 of its charges and touch the criatura with the gold end of the staff. Spells.
