While holding the staff, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from it, using your CD de salvación del conjuro: augury (2 charges), bane (1 charge), bless (1 charge), remove curse (3 charges), or divination (4 charges). You can also use an action to cast the guidance spell from the staff without using any charges.

name: Staff of Feathers
desc: Several eagle feathers line the top of this long, thin staff. The staff has 10 charges for the following properties. It regains 1d6 + 4 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the staff explodes into a mass of eagle feathers and is destroyed. Feather Travel. When you are objetivoed by a ataque a distancia while holding the staff, you can use a reacción to teleport up to 10 pies to an unoccupied space that you can see. When you do, you briefly transform into a mass of feathers, and the attack misses. Once used, this property can’t be used again until the next dawn. Spells. While holding the staff, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from it, using your CD de salvación del conjuro: conjure animals (2 Gigante eagles only, 3 charges), fly (3 charges), or gust of wind (2 charges).

name: Staff of Fire
desc:
Tienes resistencia al daño por fuego mientras sostienes este bastón.

El bastón tiene 10 cargas. Mientras lo sostienes, puedes usar una acción para gastar 1 o más de sus cargas y lanzar uno de los siguientes conjuros con él, usando tu CD de salvación de conjuros: _burning hands_ (1 carga), _fireball_ (3 cargas) o _wall of fire_ (4 cargas).

El bastón recupera 1d6 + 4 cargas gastadas cada día al amanecer. Si gastas la última carga, tira 1d20. Con un 1, el bastón se ennegrece, se desmenuza en cenizas y queda destruido.
requires_attunement: requires attunement by a druid, sorcerer, warlock, or wizard

name: Staff of Fire
desc:
While holding this staff you gain _resistance_  to daño de fuego, and you can use an action to expend charges to cast one of the following spells, using your CD de salvación del conjuro: __burning hands_ (1 charge), __fireball_ (3 charges), _wall of fire_  (4 charges).

The staff has 10 charges and regains 1d6+4 expended charges each dawn. When the last charge is expended, roll a d20\. On a 1, the staff crumbles to ash and is destroyed.

name: Staff of Frost
desc:
Tienes resistencia al daño por frío mientras sostienes este bastón.

El bastón tiene 10 cargas. Mientras lo sostienes, puedes usar una acción para gastar 1 o más de sus cargas y lanzar uno de los siguientes conjuros con él, usando tu CD de salvación de conjuros: _cone of cold_ (5 cargas), _fog cloud_ (1 carga), _ice storm_ (4 cargas) o _wall of ice_ (4 cargas).

El bastón recupera 1d6 + 4 cargas gastadas cada día al amanecer. Si gastas la última carga, tira 1d20. Con un 1, el bastón se convierte en agua y queda destruido.
requires_attunement: requires attunement by a druid, sorcerer, warlock, or wizard

name: Staff of Frost
desc:
While holding this staff you gain _resistance_  to daño de frío, and you can use an action to expend charges to cast one of the following spells, using your CD de salvación del conjuro: __fog cloud_  (1 charge), _ice storm_  (4 charges), _wall of ice_ (4 charges), __cone of cold_  (5 charges).

The staff has 10 charges and regains 1d6+4 expended charges each dawn. When the last charge is expended, roll a d20\. On a 1, the staff melts into water and is destroyed.

name: Staff of Giantkin
desc: This stout, oaken staff is 7 pies long, bound in iron, and topped with a carving of a broad, thick-fingered hand. While holding this magic quarterstaff, your Fuerza score is 20. This has no effect on you if your Fuerza is already 20 or higher. The staff has 10 charges for the following properties. It regains 1d6 + 4 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the hand slowly clenches into a fist, and the staff becomes a no mágico quarterstaff.

name: Staff of Gravity Bending
desc:
You gain a +2 bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  with this magic quarterstaff. In addition, while holding it you gain a +2 bonus to _spell attack rolls_ .

While holding this staff, you can use an action to sense the direction of magnetic north (nothing happens if the staff is used in a location that has no magnetic north.) Alternatively, you can use an action to expend charges to cast one of the following spells (CD de salvación del conjuro 15): __feather fall_  (1 charge), __jump_ (1 charge), _levitate_  (2 charges), __telekinesis_  (5 charges), _reverse gravity_  (7 charges).

The staff has 10 charges and regains 1d6+4 expended charges each dawn. When the last charge is expended, roll a d20\. On a 1, the staff loses its mágico properties.

name: Staff of Healing
desc:
Este bastón tiene 10 cargas. Mientras lo sostienes, puedes usar una acción para gastar 1 o más de sus cargas y lanzar uno de los siguientes conjuros con él, usando tu CD de salvación de conjuros y tu modificador de característica de lanzamiento de conjuros: _cure wounds_ (1 carga por nivel de conjuro, hasta nivel 4), _lesser restoration_ (2 cargas) o _mass cure wounds_ (5 cargas).

El bastón recupera 1d6 + 4 cargas gastadas cada día al amanecer. Si gastas la última carga, tira 1d20. Con un 1, el bastón desaparece en un destello de luz, perdido para siempre.
requires_attunement: requires attunement by a bard, cleric, or druid

name: Staff of Healing
desc:
While holding this staff, you can use an action to expend charges to cast one of the following spells, using your spellcasting ability modifier: _cure wounds_ (1 charge per spell level, up to 4th-level), _lesser restoration_ (2 charges), __mass cure wounds_ (5 charges).

The staff has 10 charges, regaining 1d6+4 expended charges each dawn. When the last charge is expended, roll a d20\. On a 1, the staff disappears with a flash of ligera and is lost forever.

name: Staff of Ice and Fire
desc: Made from the branch of a white ash tree, this staff holds a sapphire at one end and a ruby at the other. The staff has 10 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from it, using your CD de salvación del conjuro and spellcasting ability: flaming sphere (2 charges), freezing sphere (6 charges), sleet storm (3 charges), or wall of fuego (4 charges). The staff regains 1d6 + 4 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the staff and its gems crumble into ash and snow and are destroyed.

name: Staff of Master Lu Po
desc: This plain-looking, wooden staff can be wielded as a magic quarterstaff that grants a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it. The staff has 12 charges and regains 1d6 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the staff retains its +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls, loses all other properties, and the next time you roll a 20 on an tirada de ataque using the staff, it explodes, dealing an extra 6d6 daño de fuerza to the objetivo then is destroyed. On a 20, the staff regains 1d10 + 2 charges. Some of the staff ’s properties require the objetivo to make a tirada de salvación to resist or lessen the property’s effects. The tirada de salvación CD is equal to 8 + your competencia bonus + your Sabiduría modifier. Bamboo in the Rainy Season. While holding the staff, you can use a acción adicional to expend 1 charge to grant the staff the alcance property until the start of your next turn. Gate to the Hell of Being Roasted Alive. While holding the staff, you can use an action to expend 1 charge to cast the scorching ray spell from it. When you make the spell’s attacks, you use your Sabiduría modifier as your spellcasting ability. Iron Whirlwind. While holding the staff, you use an action to expend 2 charges, causing weighted chains to extend from the end of the staff and reducing your Velocidad to 0 until the end of your next turn. As part of the same action, you can make one attack with the staff against cada criatura within your alcance. If you roll a 1 on any attack, you must immediately make an tirada de ataque against yourself as well before resolving any other attacks against opponents. Monkey Steals the Peach. While holding the staff, you can use a acción adicional to expend 1 charge to extend sharp, grabbing prongs from the end of the staff. Until the start of your next turn, each time you hit a criatura with the staff, the objetivo recibe daño perforante instead of the daño contundente normal for the staff, and the objetivo debe realizar a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Constitución. en un fallo, the objetivo is incapacitado until the end of its next turn as it suffers crippling pain. en un éxito, the objetivo has desventaja on its next tirada de ataque. Rebuke the Disobedient Child. When you are hit by a criatura you can see within your alcance while holding this staff, you can use a reacción to expend 1 charge to make an attack with the staff against the attacker. Seven Vengeful Demons Death Strike. While holding the staff, you can use an action to expend 7 charges and make one attack against a objetivo within 5 pies of you with the staff. If the attack hits, the objetivo recibe daño contundente as normal, and it debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución, taking 7d8 daño necrótico en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one. If the objetivo dies from this damage, the staff ceases to function as anything other than a magic quarterstaff until the next dawn, but it regains all expended charges when its powers return. A humanoid killed by this damage rises at the start of your next turn as a zombie that is permanently under your command, following your verbal orders to the best of its ability. Swamp Hag's Deadly Breath. While holding the staff, you can use an action to expend 2 charges to expel a 15-pie cone of poisonous gas out of the end of the staff. cada criatura in the area debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución. en un fallo, a criatura recibe 4d6 daño de veneno and is envenenado for 1 hora. en un éxito, a criatura recibe half el daño and isn’t envenenado. Vaulting Leap of the Clouds. If you are holding the staff and it has at least 1 charge, you can cast the jump spell from it as a acción adicional at will without using any charges, but you can objetivo only yourself when you do so.

name: Staff of Midnight
desc: Fashioned from a single branch of polished ebony, this sturdy staff is topped by a lustrous jet. While holding it and in dim ligera or darkness, you gain a +1 bonus to AC and tirada de salvacións. This staff has 10 charges. While holding the staff, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from it, using your CD de salvación del conjuro and spellcasting ability: circle of death (6 charges), darkness (2 charges), or vampiric touch (3 charges). You can also use an action to cast the chill touch truco from the staff without using any charges. The staff regains 1d6 + 4 expended charges daily at dusk. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the staff crumbles to dark powder and is destroyed.

name: Staff of Minor Curses
desc: This twisted, wooden staff has 10 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to inflict a minor curse on a criatura you can see within 30 pies of you. The objetivo debe tener éxito en a CD 10 tirada de salvación de Constitución or be affected by the chosen curse. A minor curse causes a non-debilitating effect or change in the criatura, such as an outbreak of boils on one section of the objetivo's skin, intermittent hiccupping, transforming the objetivo's ears into small, donkey-like ears, or similar effects. The curse never interrupts spellcasting and never causes desventaja on ability checks, attack rolls, or tirada de salvacións. The curse lasts for 24 horas or until removed by the remove curse spell or similar magic. The staff regains 1d6 + 4 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the staff dissolves into a cloud of noxious gas, and you are objetivoed with a minor curse of the GM's choice.

name: Staff of Parzelon
desc: This tarnished silver staff is tipped with the unholy visage of a fiendish lion skull carved from labradorite—a likeness of the Arch-Devil Parzelon (see criatura Codex). The staff can be wielded as a magic quarterstaff that grants a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it. While you hold it, you gain a +2 bonus to ataque de conjuro rolls. The staff has 20 charges for the following properties. It regains 2d8 + 4 expended charges daily at dusk. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 20, the staff regains 1d8 + 2 charges. Spells. While holding the staff, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from it, using your CD de salvación del conjuro and spellcasting ability: charm person (1 charge), dominate person (5 charges), rayo bolt (3 charges), locate criatura (4 charges), locate object (2 charges), magic missile (1 charge), scrying (5 charges), or suggestion (2 charges). You can also use an action to cast one of the following spells from the staff without using any charges: comprehend languages, detect evil and good, detect magic, identify, or message. Extract Ageless Knowledge. As an action, you can touch the head of the staff to a corpse. You must form a question in your mind as part of this action. If the corpse has an answer to your question, it reveals the information to you. The answer is always brief—no more than one sentence—and very specific to the framed question. The corpse doesn’t need a mouth to answer; you receive the information telepathically. The corpse knows only what it knew in life, and it is under no compulsion to offer a truthful answer if you are hostile to it or it recognizes you as an enemigo. This property doesn’t return the criatura’s soul to its body, only its animating spirit. Thus, the corpse can’t learn new information, doesn’t comprehend anything that has happened since it died, and can’t speculate about future events. Once the staff has been used to ask a corpse 5 questions, it can’t be used to extract knowledge from that same corpse again until 3 days have passed.

name: Staff of Portals
desc: This iron-shod wooden staff is heavily worn, and it can be wielded as a quarterstaff that grants a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it. The staff has 10 charges and regains 1d6 + 4 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the staff loses all of its magic and becomes a no mágico quarterstaff. While holding the staff, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from it, using your CD de salvación del conjuro: arcane lock (2 charges), dimension door (4 charges), knock (2 charges), or passwall (5 charges).

name: Staff of Power
desc:
Este bastón puede empuñarse como un bastón mágico que otorga un bonificador +2 a las tiradas de ataque y daño realizadas con él. Mientras lo sostienes, obtienes un bonificador +2 a la Clase de Armadura, las tiradas de salvación y las tiradas de ataque de conjuro.

El bastón tiene 20 cargas para las siguientes propiedades. Recupera 2d8 + 4 cargas gastadas cada día al amanecer. Si gastas la última carga, tira 1d20. Con un 1, el bastón conserva su bonificador +2 a las tiradas de ataque y daño, pero pierde todas las demás propiedades. Con un 20, el bastón recupera 1d8 + 2 cargas.

**_Power Strike_**. Cuando impactas con un ataque cuerpo a cuerpo usando el bastón, puedes gastar 1 carga para infligir 1d6 de daño de fuerza adicional al objetivo.

**_Spells_**. Mientras sostienes este bastón, puedes usar una acción para gastar 1 o más de sus cargas y lanzar uno de los siguientes conjuros desde él, usando tu CD de salvación de conjuro y tu bonificador de ataque de conjuro: _cone of cold_ (5 cargas), _fireball_ (versión de nivel 5, 5 cargas), _globe of invulnerability_ (6 cargas), _hold monster_ (5 cargas), _levitate_ (2 cargas), _lightning bolt_ (versión de nivel 5, 5 cargas), _magic missile_ (1 carga), _ray of enfeeblement_ (1 carga) o _wall of force_ (5 cargas).

**_Retributive Strike_**. Puedes usar una acción para romper el bastón sobre tu rodilla o contra una superficie sólida, realizando un golpe retributivo. El bastón queda destruido y libera su magia restante en una explosión que se expande hasta llenar una esfera de 9 m de radio centrada en él.

Tienes un 50 por ciento de posibilidades de viajar instantáneamente a un plano de existencia aleatorio, evitando la explosión. Si no logras evitar el efecto, recibes daño de fuerza igual a 16 × el número de cargas que tenía el bastón. Todas las demás criaturas en el área deben realizar una tirada de salvación de Destreza CD 17. Si fallan la tirada, reciben una cantidad de daño en función de su distancia al punto de origen, tal como se muestra en la tabla siguiente. Si la superan, reciben la mitad de ese daño.

| Distancia al origen       | Daño                                        |
|---------------------------|---------------------------------------------|
| A 3 m o menos            | 8 × el número de cargas del bastón          |
| Entre 3,5 m y 6 m        | 6 × el número de cargas del bastón          |
| Entre 6,5 m y 9 m        | 4 × el número de cargas del bastón          |
requires_attunement: requires attunement by a sorcerer, warlock, or wizard

name: Staff of Power
desc:
You have a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic quarterstaff. When you hit with a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo using this staff, you can expend 1 charge to deal an extra 1d6 daño de fuerza to the objetivo. Additionally, while holding it you gain a +2 bonus to AC, tirada de salvacións, and ataque de conjuro rolls.

**_Spells._** While holding this staff, you can use an action to expend charges to cast one of the following spells, using your CD de salvación del conjuro and ataque de conjuro bonus: _magic missile_  (1 charge), __ray of enfeeblement_ (1 charge), __levitate_  (2 charges), __hold monster_ (5 charges), __lightning bolt_  (5th-level version, 5 charges), __wall of force_  (5 charges), __cone of cold_  (5 charges), __fireball_  (5th-level version, 5 charges), _globe of invulnerability_  (6 charges).

The staff has 20 charges and regains 2d8+4 expended charges each dawn. When the last charge is expended, roll a d20\. On a 20, the staff immediately regains 1d8+2 charges. On a 1, the staff loses its mágico properties, apart from its +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls.

_**Retributive Strike**._ You can use an action to destroy the staff, releasing its magic in a 30-pie-radius explosion. Roll a d6\. On an even result, you teleport to a random plane of existence and avoid the explosion. On an odd result, you take damage equal to 16 × the number of charges in the staff. Every other criatura in the area makes a CD 17 Destreza _tirada de salvación_ . en una salvación fallida, a criatura recibe damage based on how far away it is from the point of origin, as on the Retributive Strike table. en una salvación exitosa, a criatura recibe half as much damage.

__**Table: Retributive Strike**__
| **Distance from Origin** | **Damage**               |
| ------------------------ | ------------------------ |
| 10 pies away or closer   | 8 × charges in the staff |
| 11 to 20 pies away       | 6 × charges in the staff |
| 21 to 30 pies away       | 4 x charges in the staff |

name: Staff of Scrying
desc: This is a graceful, highly polished wooden staff crafted from willow. A crystal ball tops the staff, and smooth gold bands twist around its shaft. This staff has 10 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from it, using your CD de salvación del conjuro: detect thoughts (2 charges), locate criatura (4 charges), locate object (2 charges), scrying (5 charges), or true seeing (6 charges). The staff regains 1d6 + 4 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, a bright flash of ligera erupts from the crystal ball, and the staff vanishes.

name: Staff of Spores
desc: Mold and mushrooms coat this gnarled wooden staff. The staff has 10 charges for the following properties. It regains 1d6 + 4 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the staff rots into tiny clumps of slimy, organic matter and is destroyed. Mushroom Disguise. While holding the staff, you can use an action to expend 2 charges to cover yourself and anything you are wearing or carrying with a mágico illusion that makes you look like a mushroom for up to 1 hora. You can appear to be a mushroom of any color or shape as long as it is no more than one size larger or smaller than you. This illusion ends early if you move or speak. The changes wrought by this effect fail to hold up to physical inspection. For example, if you appear to have a spongy cap in place of your head, someone touching the cap would feel your face or hair instead. Otherwise, a criatura must take an action to visually inspect the illusion and succeed on a CD 20 Inteligencia (Investigación) check to discern that you are disguised. Speak with Plants. While holding the staff, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges to cast the speak with plants spell from it. Spore Cloud. While holding the staff, you can use an action to expend 3 charges to release a cloud of spores in a 20-pie radius from you. The spores remain for 1 minuto, making the area lightly obscured for criaturas other than you. The cloud moves with you, remaining centered on you. When a criatura, other than you, enters the cloud of spores for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, that criatura debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Constitución or take 1d6 daño de veneno and become envenenado until the start of its next turn. A wind of at least 10 millas per hora disperses the spores and ends the effect.

name: Staff of Squalor
desc: Strands of white mycelium cover the head of this gnarled wooden staff. When tapped on the ground, the staff sheds a thin coating of dirt. While attuned to the staff, you suffer no harmful effects from _diseases_  but can still carry diseases and spread them to others. When you hit a criatura with this staff, you can fuerza the objetivo to make a CD 12 Constitución _tirada de salvación_ . en un fallo, it contracts one disease of your choice that you’re currently carrying.

name: Staff of Striking
desc:
Este bastón puede empuñarse como un bastón mágico que otorga un bonificador +3 a las tiradas de ataque y daño realizadas con él.

El bastón tiene 10 cargas. Cuando impactas con un ataque cuerpo a cuerpo usando el bastón, puedes gastar hasta 3 de sus cargas. Por cada carga gastada, el objetivo recibe 1d6 de daño de fuerza adicional. El bastón recupera 1d6 + 4 cargas gastadas cada día al amanecer. Si gastas la última carga, tira 1d20. Con un 1, el bastón se convierte en un bastón no mágico.

name: Staff of Striking
desc:
You have a +3 bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  made with this magic quarterstaff.

When you hit with a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo using this staff, you can expend up to 3 of its charges, dealing an extra 1d6 daño de fuerza per expended charge.

The staff has 10 charges and regains 1d6+4 expended charges each dawn. When the last charge is expended, roll a d20\. On a 1, it loses its mágico properties.

name: Staff of Swarming Insects
desc:
Este bastón tiene 10 cargas y recupera 1d6 + 4 cargas gastadas cada día al amanecer. Si gastas la última carga, tira 1d20. Con un 1, un enjambre de insectos consume y destruye el bastón y luego se dispersa.

**_Spells_**. Mientras sostienes el bastón, puedes usar una acción para gastar algunas de sus cargas y lanzar uno de los siguientes conjuros desde él, usando tu CD de salvación de conjuro: _giant insect_ (4 cargas) o _insect plague_ (5 cargas).

**_Insect Cloud_**. Mientras sostienes el bastón, puedes usar una acción y gastar 1 carga para provocar que un enjambre de insectos voladores inofensivos se extienda en un radio de 9 m a tu alrededor. Los insectos permanecen durante 10 minutos y convierten el área en terreno muy oscurecido para las criaturas que no seas tú. El enjambre se mueve contigo, manteniéndose centrado en tu posición. Un viento de al menos 16 km/h dispersa el enjambre y pone fin al efecto.
requires_attunement: requires attunement by a bard, cleric, druid, sorcerer, warlock, or wizard

name: Staff of Swarming Insects
desc:
While holding this staff, you can use an action to expend charges to conjure an insect cloud, or cast one of the following spells, using your CD de salvación del conjuro: _giant insect_  (4 charges), __insect plague_  (5 charges)

_**Insect Cloud**_ (1 Charge). A swarm of harmless volando insects spreads out in a 30-pie radius from you, _heavily obscuring_  the area for criaturas other than you. It moves when you do, with you at its center. The radius of the swarm decreases by 10 pies each time you are included within an area of effect that causa damage. The insects remain for 10 minutos, until the swarm’s radius is less than 10 pies, or it is dispersed by strong wind.

The staff has 10 charges and regains 1d6+4 expended charges each dawn. When the last charge is expended, roll a d20\. On a 1, the staff is destroyed as it transforms into a swarm of insects which immediately disperse.

name: Staff of the Armada
desc: This gold-shod staff is constructed out of a piece of masting from a galleon. The staff can be wielded as a magic quarterstaff that grants you a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it. While you are on board a ship, this bonus increases to +2. The staff has 10 charges and regains 1d8 + 2 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the staff loses all of its magic and becomes a no mágico quarterstaff. Spells. While holding the staff, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from it, using your CD de salvación del conjuro and spellcasting ability: control water (4 charges), fog cloud (1 charge), gust of wind (2 charges), or water walk (3 charges). You can also use an action to cast the ray of frost truco from the staff without using any charges.

name: Staff of the Artisan
desc: This simple, wooden staff can be wielded as a magic quarterstaff that grants a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it. The staff has 10 charges for the following properties. It regains 1d6 + 4 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the staff vanishes in a flash of ligera, lost forever. Create Object. You can use an action to expend 2 charges to conjure an inanimate object in your hand or on the ground in an unoccupied space you can see within 10 pies of you. The object can be no larger than 3 pies on a side and weigh no more than 10 pounds, and its form must be that of a no mágico object you have seen. You can’t create items that ordinarily require a high degree of craftsmanship, such as jewelry, weapons, glass, or armor, unless you have competencia with the type of artisan’s tools used to craft such objects. The object sheds dim ligera in a 5-pie radius. The object disappears after 1 hora, when you use this property again, or if the object recibe or causa any damage. Spells. While holding the staff, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from it, using your CD de salvación del conjuro: animate objects (5 charges), fabricate (4 charges) or floating disk (1 charge). You can also use an action to cast the mending spell from the staff without using any charges.

name: Staff of the Cephalopod
desc: This ugly staff is fashioned from a piece of gnarled driftwood and is crowned with an octopus carved from brecciated jasper. Its gray and red stone tentacles wrap around the top half of the staff. While holding this staff, you have a nadando Velocidad of 30 pies. This staff has 10 charges for the following properties. It regains 1d6 + 4 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the jasper octopus crumbles to dust, and the staff becomes a no mágico piece of driftwood. Spells. While holding this staff, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from it, using your CD de salvación del conjuro and spellcasting ability: black tentacles (4 charges), conjure animals (only beasts that can breathe water, 3 charges), darkness (2 charges), or water breathing (3 charges). Ink Cloud. While holding this staff, you can use an action and expend 1 charge to cause an inky, black cloud to spread out in a 30-pie radius from you. The cloud can form in or out of water. The cloud remains for 10 minutos, making the area heavily obscured for criaturas other than you. The cloud moves with you, remaining centered on you. A wind of at least 10 millas per hora or a steady current (if underwater) disperses the cloud and ends the effect.

name: Staff of the Four Winds
desc: Made of gently twisting ash and engraved with spiraling runes, the staff feels strangely lighter than its size would otherwise suggest. This staff has 10 charges. While holding the staff, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from it, using your CD de salvación del conjuro and spellcasting ability: circle of wind* (1 charge), feather fall (1 charge), gust of wind (2 charges), storm god's doom* (3 charges), wind tunnel* (1 charge), wind walk (6 charges), wind wall (3 charges), or wresting wind* (2 charges). You can also use an action to cast the wind lash* spell from the staff without using any charges. Spells marked with an asterisk (*) can be found in Deep Magic for 5th Edition. At the GM's discretion, spells from Deep Magic for 5th Edition can be replaced with other spells of similar levels and similarly related to breezes, wind, or movement. The staff regains 1d6 + 4 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the staff crumbles into ashes and is taken away with the breeze.

name: Staff of the Lantern Bearer
desc:
An iron hook is affixed to the top of this plain, wooden staff. While holding this staff, you can use an action to cast the ligera spell from it at will, but the ligera can emanate only from the staff 's hook. If a lantern hangs from the staff 's hook, you gain the following benefits while holding the staff: - You can control the ligera of the lantern, lighting or extinguishing it as a acción adicional. The lantern must still have oil, if it requires oil to produce a flame.
- The lantern's flame can't be extinguished by wind or water.
- If you are a spellcaster, you can use the staff as a spellcasting focus. When you cast a spell that causa fuego or daño radiante while using this staff as your spellcasting focus, you gain a +1 bonus to the spell's tirada de ataque, or the spell's save CD increases by 1 (your choice).

name: Staff of the Magi
desc:
Este bastón puede empuñarse como un bastón mágico que otorga un bonificador +2 a las tiradas de ataque y daño realizadas con él. Mientras lo sostienes, obtienes un bonificador +2 a las tiradas de ataque de conjuro.

El bastón tiene 50 cargas para las siguientes propiedades. Recupera 4d6 + 2 cargas gastadas cada día al amanecer. Si gastas la última carga, tira 1d20. Con un 20, el bastón recupera 1d12 + 1 cargas.

**_Spell Absorption_**. Mientras sostienes el bastón, tienes ventaja en las tiradas de salvación contra conjuros. Además, puedes usar tu reacción cuando otra criatura lanza un conjuro que te tenga únicamente a ti como objetivo. Si lo haces, el bastón absorbe la magia del conjuro, cancelando su efecto y ganando un número de cargas igual al nivel del conjuro absorbido. Sin embargo, si al hacerlo el número total de cargas del bastón supera 50, el bastón explota como si hubieras activado su golpe retributivo (véase más abajo).

**_Spells_**. Mientras sostienes el bastón, puedes usar una acción para gastar algunas de sus cargas y lanzar uno de los siguientes conjuros desde él, usando tu CD de salvación de conjuro y tu característica de lanzamiento de conjuros: _conjure elemental_ (7 cargas), _dispel magic_ (3 cargas), _fireball_ (versión de nivel 7, 7 cargas), _flaming sphere_ (2 cargas), _ice storm_ (4 cargas), _invisibility_ (2 cargas), _knock_ (2 cargas), _lightning bolt_ (versión de nivel 7, 7 cargas), _passwall_ (5 cargas), _plane shift_ (7 cargas), _telekinesis_ (5 cargas), _wall of fire_ (4 cargas) o _web_ (2 cargas).

También puedes usar una acción para lanzar uno de los siguientes conjuros desde el bastón sin gastar ninguna carga: _arcane lock_, _detect magic_, _enlarge/reduce_, _light_, _mage hand_ o _protection from evil and good_.

**_Retributive Strike_**. Puedes usar una acción para romper el bastón sobre tu rodilla o contra una superficie sólida, realizando un golpe retributivo. El bastón queda destruido y libera su magia restante en una explosión que se expande hasta llenar una esfera de 9 m de radio centrada en él.

Tienes un 50 por ciento de posibilidades de viajar instantáneamente a un plano de existencia aleatorio, evitando la explosión. Si no logras evitar el efecto, recibes daño de fuerza igual a 16 × el número de cargas que tenía el bastón. Todas las demás criaturas en el área deben realizar una tirada de salvación de Destreza CD 17. Si fallan la tirada, reciben una cantidad de daño en función de su distancia al punto de origen, tal como se muestra en la tabla siguiente. Si la superan, reciben la mitad de ese daño.

| Distancia al origen       | Daño                                        |
|---------------------------|---------------------------------------------|
| A 3 m o menos            | 8 × el número de cargas del bastón          |
| Entre 3,5 m y 6 m        | 6 × el número de cargas del bastón          |
| Entre 6,5 m y 9 m        | 4 × el número de cargas del bastón          |
requires_attunement: requires attunement by a sorcerer, warlock, or wizard

name: Staff of the Magi
desc:
You have a +2 bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  made with this magic quarterstaff. Additionally, while holding it you gain a +2 bonus to _spell attack rolls_  and _advantage_  on _tirada de salvacións_  against spells.

_**Spell Absorption.**_ When another criatura casts a spell which objetivos only you, you can use your reacción to cause the staff to absorb the magic of the spell, cancelling its effect and gaining charges equal to the spell’s level. If this brings the staff’s total charges above 50, the staff explodes as if you activated its Retributive Strike.

_**Spells.**_ While holding this staff, you can use an action to expend charges to cast one of the following spells, using your CD de salvación del conjuro and ataque de conjuro bonus: __flaming sphere_ (2 charges), _invisibility_ (2 charges), _knock_  (2 charges), _web_ (2 charges), __dispel magic_  (3 charges), _ice storm_  (4 charges), _wall of fire_ (4 charges), __passwall_  (5 charges), __telekinesis_ (5 charges), __conjure elemental_  (7 charges), _fireball_  (7th-level version, 7 charges), _lightning bolt_  (7th-level version, 7 charges), __plane shift_  (7 charges).  
You can also use an action to cast the following spells from the staff without expending any charges: __arcane lock , detect magic , enlarge/reduce , ligera , mage hand , protection from evil and good ._

The staff has 50 charges and regains 4d6+2 expended charges each dawn. When the last charge is expended, roll a d20\. On a 20, the staff immediately regains 1d12+1 charges.

_**Retributive Strike.**_ You can use an action to destroy the staff, releasing its magic in a 30-pie-radius explosion. Roll a d6\. On an even result, you teleport to a random plane of existence and avoid the explosion. On an odd result, you take damage equal to 16 × the number of charges in the staff. Every other criatura in the area makes a CD 17 Destreza _tirada de salvación_ . en una salvación fallida, a criatura recibe damage based on how far away it is from the point of origin, as on the _Retributive Strike_  table. en una salvación exitosa, a criatura recibe half as much damage.

name: Staff of the Peaks
desc: This staff is made of rock crystal yet weighs the same as a wooden staff. The staff can be wielded as a magic quarterstaff that grants a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it. While holding it, you gain a +2 bonus to ataque de conjuro rolls. In addition, you are immune to the effects of high altitude and severe frío weather, such as hypothermia and frostbite. The staff has 10 charges for the following properties. It regains 1d6 + 4 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the staff shatters into fine stone fragments and is destroyed. Spells. While holding this staff, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from it, using your CD de salvación del conjuro and spellcasting ability: control weather (8 charges), fault line* (6 charges), gust of wind (2 charges), ice storm (4 charges), jump (1 charge), snow boulder* (4 charges), or wall of stone (5 charges). Spells marked with an asterisk (*) can be found in Deep Magic for 5th Edition. Stone Strike. When you hit a criatura or object made of stone or earth with this staff, you can expend 5 of its charges to shatter the objetivo. The objetivo debe realizar a CD 17 tirada de salvación de Constitución, taking an extra 10d6 daño de fuerza en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one. If the objetivo is an object that is being worn or carried, the criatura wearing or carrying it debe realizar the tirada de salvación, but only the object recibe el daño. If this damage reduces the objetivo to 0 puntos de golpe, it shatters and is destroyed.

name: Staff of the Python
desc:
Puedes usar una acción para pronunciar la palabra de mando de este bastón y lanzarlo al suelo en un espacio situado a no más de 3 m de ti. El bastón se convierte en una serpiente constrictora gigante bajo tu control y actúa en su propia iniciativa. Pronunciando de nuevo la palabra de mando como acción adicional, devuelves el bastón a su forma normal en el espacio que antes ocupaba la serpiente.

En tu turno, puedes dar órdenes mentales a la serpiente si se encuentra a 18 m o menos de ti y no estás incapacitado. Decides qué acción realiza la serpiente y hacia dónde se mueve en su siguiente turno, o puedes darle una orden general, como atacar a tus enemigos o custodiar una ubicación.

Si la serpiente es reducida a 0 puntos de golpe, muere y vuelve a su forma de bastón. El bastón se hace añicos y queda destruido. Si la serpiente regresa a forma de bastón antes de perder todos sus puntos de golpe, los recupera todos.
requires_attunement: requires attunement by a cleric, druid, or warlock

name: Staff of the Python
desc:
You can use an action to speak this staff’s command word and throw it at a point on the ground within 10 pies to transform it into a _giant constrictor snake_ **.** During your turn, while you aren’t incapacitado and remain within 60 pies of it, you can mentally command the snake. The snake acts immediately after you. You decide its moves and actions, or you can issue a general command such as to guard a location.

As a acción adicional, you can transform the snake back into a staff by repeating the command word. The staff appears in the space formerly occupied by the snake. If the snake has at least 1 punto de golpe when it becomes a staff, it regains all its puntos de golpe.

If the snake is reduced to 0 puntos de golpe, it is destroyed, reverting to staff form before shattering into pieces.

name: Staff of the Scion
desc: This unwholesome staff is crafted of a material that appears to be somewhere between weathered wood and dried meat. It weeps beads of red liquid that are thick and sticky like tree sap but smell of blood. A crystalized yellow eye with a rectangular pupil, like the eye of a goat, sits at its top. You can wield the staff as a magic quarterstaff that grants a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it. The staff has 10 charges for the following properties. It regains 1d6 + 4 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the eye liquifies as the staff shrivels and twists into a blackened, smoking ruin and is destroyed. Ember Cloud. While holding the staff, you can use an action and expend 2 charges to release a cloud of burning embers from the staff. cada criatura within 10 pies of you debe realizar a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Constitución, taking 21 (6d6) daño de fuego en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one. The ember cloud remains until the start of your next turn, making the area lightly obscured for criaturas other than you. A wind of at least 10 millas per hora disperses the cloud and ends the effect. Fiery Strike. When you hit with a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo using the staff, you can expend 1 charge to deal an extra 2d6 daño de fuego to the objetivo. If you take daño de fuego while wielding the staff, you have ventaja on attack rolls with it until the end of your next turn. While holding the staff, you have resistance to daño de fuego. Spells. While holding the staff, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from it, using your CD de salvación del conjuro: augury (2 charges), barkskin (2 charges), confusion (4 charges), entangle (1 charge), or wall of fuego (4 charges).

name: Staff of the Treant
desc: This unassuming staff appears to be little more than the branch of a tree. While holding this staff, your skin becomes bark-like, and the hair on your head transforms into a chaplet of green leaves. This staff can be wielded as a magic quarterstaff that grants a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it. Naturaleza’s Guardian. While holding this staff, you have resistance to frío and daño necrótico, but you have vulnerability to fuego and daño radiante. In addition, you have ventaja on attack rolls against aberrations and undead, but you have desventaja on tirada de salvacións against spells and other mágico effects from fey and plant criaturas. One with the Woods. While holding this staff, your AC can’t be less than 16, regardless of what kind of armor you are wearing, and you can’t be tracked when you travel through terrain with excessive vegetation, such as a forest or grassland. Tree Friend. While holding this staff, you can use an action to animate a tree you can see within 60 pies of you. The tree uses the statistics of an animated tree and is friendly to you and your companions. Roll initiative for the tree, which has its own turns. It obeys any verbal commands that you issue to it (no action required by you), as long as they don’t directly harm other trees or the natural world. If you don’t issue any commands to the three, it defends itself from hostile criaturas but otherwise recibe no actions. Once used, this property can’t be used again until the next dawn. Venerated Tree. If you spend 1 hora in silent reverence at the base of a Huge or larger tree, you can use an action to plant this staff in the soil above the tree’s roots and awaken the tree as a treant. The treant isn’t under your control, but it regards you as a friend as long as you don’t harm it or the natural world around it. Roll a d20. On a 1, the staff roots into the ground, growing into a sapling, and losing its magic. Otherwise, after you awaken a treant with this staff, you can’t do so again until 30 days have passed.

name: Staff of the Unhatched
desc: This staff carved from a burnt ash tree is topped with an unhatched dragon’s (see criatura Codex) skull. This staff can be wielded as a magic quarterstaff. The staff has 5 charges for the following properties. It regains 1d4 + 1 expended charges daily at dusk. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the staff crumbles to dust and is destroyed. necrótico Strike. When you hit with a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo using the staff, you can expend 1 charge to deal an extra 1d8 daño necrótico to the objetivo. Spells. While holding the staff, you can use an action to expend 1 charge to cast bane or protection from evil and good from it using your CD de salvación del conjuro. You can also use an action to cast one of the following spells from the staff without using any charges, using your CD de salvación del conjuro and spellcasting ability: chill touch or minor illusion.

name: Staff of the Web-Tender
desc:
You gain a +2 bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  with this magic quarterstaff. Additionally, while holding it you gain a +2 bonus to _spell attack rolls_ .

While holding this staff, natural and mágico spider webs do not hamper your movement. In addition, you can use an action to expend 1 charge to cast _animal friendship_  (spiders only), using your CD de salvación del conjuro. For 1 charge, you cast the 1st-level version of the spell. You can affect one additional spider for each additional charge expended.

You can use an action to expend 5 charges to summon a _phase spider_ , which appears in an unoccupied space you can see within 60 pies of you. The spider is friendly to you and your companions and recibe its turn immediately after yours. It obeys your verbal commands. Without such commands, the spider only defends itself. The spider disappears when reduced to 0 puntos de golpe or 1 hora after you summoned it.

The staff has 8 charges and regains 1d6+2 expended charges each dawn. When the last charge is expended, roll a d20\. On a 1, the staff transforms into hundreds of harmless Tiny spiders that wander away.

name: Staff of the White Necromancer
desc: Crafted from polished bone, this strange staff is carved with numerous arcane symbols and mystical runes. The staff has 10 charges. While holding the staff, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from it, using your CD de salvación del conjuro: false life (1 charge), gentle repose (2 charges), heartstop* (2 charges), death ward (4 charges), raise dead (5 charges), revivify (3 charges), shared sacrifice* (2 charges), or speak with dead (3 charges). You can also use an action to cast the bless the dead* or spare the dying spell from the staff without using any charges. Spells marked with an asterisk (*) can be found in Deep Magic for 5th Edition. The staff regains 1d6 + 4 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the bone staff crumbles to dust.

name: Staff of the Woodlands
desc:
Este bastón puede blandirse como un bastón mágico que otorga un bonificador de +2 a las tiradas de ataque y daño realizadas con él. Mientras lo sostienes, tienes un bonificador de +2 a las tiradas de ataque de conjuro.

El bastón tiene 10 cargas para las siguientes propiedades. Recupera 1d6 + 4 cargas gastadas cada día al amanecer. Si gastas la última carga, tira un d20. Con un 1, el bastón pierde sus propiedades y se convierte en un bastón no mágico.

**_Conjuros_**. Puedes usar una acción para gastar 1 o más cargas del bastón y lanzar uno de los siguientes conjuros desde él, usando tu CD de salvación de conjuro: _animal friendship_ (1 carga), _awaken_ (5 cargas), _barkskin_ (2 cargas), _locate animals or plants_ (2 cargas), _speak with animals_ (1 carga), _speak with plants_ (3 cargas) o _wall of thorns_ (6 cargas).

También puedes usar una acción para lanzar el conjuro _pass without trace_ desde el bastón sin gastar ninguna carga. **_Forma de árbol_**. Puedes usar una acción para clavar un extremo del bastón en tierra fértil y gastar 1 carga para transformar el bastón en un árbol sano. El árbol mide 18 metros de altura, tiene un tronco de 1,5 metros de diámetro y sus ramas en la copa se extienden en un radio de 6 metros.

El árbol parece ordinario, pero irradia un débil aura de magia de transmutación si es objetivo de _detect magic_. Mientras tocas el árbol y utilizas otra acción para pronunciar su palabra de mando, el bastón regresa a su forma normal. Cualquier criatura que esté en el árbol cae cuando este vuelve a convertirse en bastón.

name: Staff of the Woodlands
desc:
You gain a +2 bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  with this magic quarterstaff. Additionally, while holding it you gain a +2 bonus to ataque de conjuro rolls.

While holding this staff, you can use an action to cast pass without trace, or to expend charges to cast one of the following spells, using your CD de salvación del conjuro: _animal friendship_  (1 charge), _speak with animals_  (1 charge), __barkskin_  (2 charges), _locate animals or plants_  (2 charges), __speak with plants_  (3 charges), __awaken_ (5 charges), __wall of thorns_  (6 charges).

_**Tree Form**._ As an action you can plant the staff in the earth and expend 1 charge, transforming it into a full-grown tree. The tree is 60 pies tall, has a 5-pie-wide trunk, and its highest branches fill a 20-pie radius. The tree looks ordinary but radiates faint transmutation magic if inspected with __detect magic ._ By using an action to touch the tree and speak the staff’s command word, you can transform it back into a staff. criaturas in the tree fall when the staff reverts to its original form.

The staff has 10 charges and regains 1d6+4 expended charges each dawn. When the last charge is expended, roll a d20\. On a 1, the staff loses its mágico properties.

name: Staff of Thorns
desc: This gnarled and twisted oak staff has numerous thorns growing from its surface. Green vines tightly wind their way up along the shaft. The staff can be wielded as a magic quarterstaff that grants a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it. The staff has 10 charges for the following properties. It regains 1d6 + 4 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the thorns immediately fall from the staff and it becomes a no mágico quarterstaff. Spells. While holding the staff, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from it, using your CD de salvación del conjuro: barkskin (2 charges), entangle (1 charge), speak with plants (3 charges), spike growth (2 charges), or wall of thorns (6 charges). Thorned Strike. When you hit with a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo using the staff, you can expend up to 3 of its charges. For each charge you expend, the objetivo recibe an extra 1d6 daño perforante.

name: Staff of Thunder and Lightning
desc:
Este bastón puede blandirse como un bastón mágico que otorga un bonificador de +2 a las tiradas de ataque y daño realizadas con él. También posee las siguientes propiedades adicionales. Una vez que se usa una de estas propiedades, no puede volver a usarse hasta el siguiente amanecer.

**_Relámpago_**. Cuando impactas con un ataque cuerpo a cuerpo usando el bastón, puedes hacer que el objetivo reciba 2d6 de daño de relámpago adicional.

**_Trueno_**. Cuando impactas con un ataque cuerpo a cuerpo usando el bastón, puedes hacer que el bastón emita un estallido de trueno audible a 90 metros. El objetivo al que hayas impactado debe superar una tirada de salvación de Constitución CD 17 o quedará aturdido hasta el final de tu próximo turno.

**_Descarga de relámpago_**. Puedes usar una acción para hacer que un rayo salga disparado desde la punta del bastón en una línea de 1,5 metros de ancho y 36 metros de largo. Cada criatura en esa línea debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Destreza CD 17, sufriendo 9d6 de daño de relámpago si la falla, o la mitad de ese daño si la supera.

**_Trueno ensordecedor_**. Puedes usar una acción para hacer que el bastón emita un ensordecedor trueno audible a 180 metros. Cada criatura situada a 18 metros de ti (sin incluirte a ti) debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Constitución CD 17. Si falla la tirada, la criatura recibe 2d6 de daño de trueno y queda ensordecida durante 1 minuto. Si la supera, recibe la mitad del daño y no queda ensordecida.

**_Trueno y relámpago_**. Puedes usar una acción para activar las propiedades Descarga de relámpago y Trueno ensordecedor al mismo tiempo. Al hacerlo, no se gasta el uso diario de esas propiedades, solo el uso de esta.

name: Staff of Thunder and Lightning
desc:
You gain a +2 bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  with this magic quarterstaff. Additionally, while holding it you can activate one of the following properties, each of which can be used once per dawn.

**_Lightning._** When you make a successful ataque cuerpo a cuerpo with the staff, you deal an extra 2d6 daño de rayo.

_**trueno.**_ When you make a successful ataque cuerpo a cuerpo with the staff, you cause it to emit a thunderclap audible up to 300 pies away. The objetivo makes a CD 17 Constitución _tirada de salvación_  or it is _stunned_  until the end of your next turn.

_**rayo Strike.**_ You can use an action to fuego a 120 pies long and 5 pie wide line of rayo from the staff. cada criatura in the area makes a CD 17 Destreza _tirada de salvación_ , taking 9d6 daño de rayo en un fallo, or la mitad del daño en un éxito.

_**Thunderclap.**_ You can use an action to create a thunderous roar audible up to 600 pies away. cada criatura other than you within 60 pies makes a CD 17 Constitución _tirada de salvación_  or recibe 2d6 daño de trueno and becomes _deafened_  for 1 minuto. en una salvación exitosa, a criatura recibe la mitad del daño and isn’t ensordecido.

_**trueno and rayo**._ You can use an action to use the rayo Strike and Thunderclap properties simultaneously. This doesn’t expend the daily uses of those properties, only this one.

name: Staff of Voices
desc: The length of this wooden staff is carved with images of mouths whispering, speaking, and screaming. This staff can be wielded as a magic quarterstaff. While holding this staff, you can't be ensordecido, and you can act normally in areas where sound is prevented, such as in the area of a silence spell. Any criatura that is not ensordecido can hear your voice clearly from up to 1,000 pies away if you wish them to hear it. The staff has 10 charges for the following properties. The staff regains 1d6 + 4 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the mouths carved into the staff give a collective sigh and close, and the staff becomes a no mágico quarterstaff. Spells. While holding the staff, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from it, using your CD de salvación del conjuro: divine word (7 charges), magic mouth (2 charges), speak with animals (1 charge), speak with dead (3 charges), speak with plants (3 charges), or word of recall (6 charges). You can also use an action to cast the vicious mockery truco from the staff without using any charges. Thunderous Shout. While holding the staff, you can use an action to expend 1 charge and release a chorus of mighty shouts in a 15-pie cone from it. cada criatura in the area debe realizar a tirada de salvación de Constitución. en un fallo, a criatura recibe 2d8 daño de trueno and is ensordecido for 1 minuto. en un éxito, a criatura recibe half el daño and is ensordecido until the end of its next turn. A ensordecido criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito.

name: Staff of Winter and Ice
desc:
This pure white, pine staff is topped with an ornately faceted shard of ice. The entire staff is frío to the touch. You have resistance to daño de frío while you hold this staff. The staff has 20 charges for the following properties. It regains 2d8 + 4 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the staff retains its resistance to daño de frío but loses all other properties. On a 20, the staff regains 1d8 + 2 charges. Spells. While holding the staff, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from it, using your CD de salvación del conjuro and spellcasting ability: Boreas’s breath* (2 charges), cone of frío (5 charges), curse of Boreas* (6 charges), ice storm (4 charges), flurry* (1 charge), freezing fog* (3 charges), freezing sphere (6 charges), frostbite* (5 charges), frozen razors* (3 charges), gliding step* (1 charge), sleet storm (3 charges), snow boulder* (4 charges), triumph of ice* (7 charges), or wall of ice (6 charges). You can also use an action to cast the chill touch or ray of frost spell from the staff without using any charges. Spells marked with an asterisk (*) can be found in Deep Magic for 5th Edition. At the GM’s discretion, spells from Deep Magic for 5th Edition can be replaced with other spells of similar levels and similarly related to ice, snow, or wintry weather. Retributive Strike. You can use an action to break the staff over your knee or against a solid surface, performing a retributive strike. The staff is destroyed and releases its remaining magic in an explosion that expands to fill a 30-pie-radius sphere centered on it. You have a 50 percent chance to instantly travel to a random plane of existence, avoiding the explosion. If you fail to avoid the effect, you take daño de frío equal to 16 × the number of charges in the staff. Every other criatura in the area debe realizar a CD 17 tirada de salvación de Destreza. en una salvación fallida, a criatura recibe an amount of daño de frío based on how far away it is from the point of origin as shown in the following table. en una salvación exitosa, a criatura recibe half as much damage. | Distance from Origin | Damage |
| --------------------- | -------------------------------------- |
| 10 pies. away or closer | 8 × the number of charges in the staff |
| 11 to 20 pies. away | 6 × the number of charges in the staff |
| 21 to 30 pies. away | 4 × the number of charges in the staff |

name: Staff of Withering
desc:
Este bastón tiene 3 cargas y recupera 1d3 cargas gastadas cada día al amanecer.

El bastón puede blandirse como un bastón mágico. Al impactar, inflige daño como un bastón normal, y puedes gastar 1 carga para infligir 2d10 de daño necrótico adicional al objetivo. Además, el objetivo debe superar una tirada de salvación de Constitución CD 15 o tendrá desventaja durante 1 hora en cualquier prueba de característica o tirada de salvación que use Fuerza o Constitución.
requires_attunement: requires attunement by a cleric, druid, or warlock

name: Staff of Withering
desc: This magic quarterstaff has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges each dawn. When you make a successful _melee attack_  with the staff, you can expend 1 charge to deal an extra 2d10 daño necrótico. The objetivo makes a CD 15 Constitución _tirada de salvación_  or for the next hora it has _disadvantage_  on Fuerza and Constitución checks and tirada de salvacións.

name: Stalking Cat
desc: This jade pendant recibe the form of a cat ready to pounce. Once per day while attuned to this pendant you may immediately reroll a failed ataque cuerpo a cuerpo con arma or Sigilo roll. If the reroll also fails the pendant loses its magic, becoming a mundane item worth 25 gold.

name: Standard of Divinity
desc: This weapon was created in a long-forgotten holy war. A woven banner bearing the symbol of a god hangs from it. When you attune to it, the banner changes to the colors and symbol of your deity. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.

name: Star Heart
desc:
This item looks like a bright orange starfish. Once you are attuned to the _star heart_ it attaches to your skin over your heart, and as long as you have at least 1 punto de golpe you regain 1d6 puntos de golpe every 10 minutos. If you lose a body part, after 1d6 + 1 days if you have at least 1 punto de golpe the whole time the body part regrows and returns to full functionality.

In addition, any lost body part grows into an entirely new version of yourself after 1d4 + 3 days, complete with your personality, memory, and abilities. This new clone is independent and sentient, although it is incapable of further duplication. Every time a clone is created, one of the five legs of the _star heart_ withers and dies; it only regenerates when its associated clone dies. 

If all five legs have grown into clones, then the _star heart_ is destroyed.

_**Curse.**_ While some may say that having a clone that believes itself to be just as much “you” as yourself is enough of a curse in and of itself, the _star heart_ has other dangers. It was designed for a disposable warrior class of drones and isn’t quite compatible with other criaturas. Every time the _star heart_ creates a clone, there’s a chance that something may go wrong. Roll 1d20 and consult Table: Star Heart Clone. If the result was over 11, then roll again, applying all effects.

__Table: Star Heart Clone__
| **d20** | **Effect**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| ------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 1       | The clone is an exact copy (unless affected by previous rolls) but it is lifeless.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| 2–11    | Nothing. The clone is an exact copy of you (if you have acquired scars or other imperfections over the years that regeneration didn’t cure then the clone will still lack them).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| 12–13   | The clone is an exact copy, but its mind has been permanently warped by the regeneration process. It rolls once on Table: _Long Term Mental Stress Effects_ .                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| 14–15   | The clone is an exact copy but something has changed in its personality. The clone may choose to pursue a different class or profession than you. Whenever the clone can see you, it needs to make a CD 12 Sabiduría check or it acquires a _short-term mental stress effect_ .                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| 16–17   | Something is off. The clone may have different colored eyes or hair, new birthmarks or blemishes, or other minor differences (such as a different score in one or two abilities). Such differences are easy to hide and can be difficult to spot. These differences prey on the clone’s mind when it is near you. Whenever the clone can see you, it needs to make a CD 12 Sabiduría check or it acquires a _short-term mental stress effect_ .                   |
| 18      | The clone is obviously imperfect. At the Narrator’s discretion, the clone may be noticeably shorter, taller, heavier, or lighter than you. The clone has _disadvantage_  on any attempts to disguise itself as you. Whenever the clone can see you, it needs to make a CD 14 Sabiduría check or it acquires a _long-term mental stress effect_ .                                                                                                                  |
| 19      | The clone is effectively a reincarnation of you. Roll on Table: _Reincarnation_  to determine the clone’s heritage. Whenever the clone can see you, it needs to make a CD 14 Sabiduría check or it acquires a _long-term mental stress effect_ .                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| 20      | There is a darkness within the clone and it wants to replace you. No matter how perfect the copy, the clone always attacks you on sight with the intent to kill (at the Narrator’s discretion, the clone may delay such an act if it would be immediately beneficial to the clone—once the benefit is gone, the bloodlust returns). The clone also plots against you when not in its presence, hiring assassins or otherwise attempting to vex or destroy you. |

**Note:** Particular _mental stress effects_  do not stack. For example, if the clone has both a personality change and develops a phobia, it only needs to make a single CD 14 Sabiduría check when it sees you.

name: Stasis Stone
desc:
This small, crystalline, purple stone measures 3/4 of an inch in diameter and weighs an ounce. Typically, 1d4 + 2 *stasis stones* can be found together.
  You can use an action to throw the stone up to 30 pies. The stone explodes on impact and is destroyed. cada criatura within a 10-pie radius of where the stone landed debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Constitución or be petrificado until the end of its next turn as the stone releases temporal magic and freezes it in time.

name: Steadfast Splint
desc: This armor makes you difficult to manipulate both mentally and physically. While wearing this armor, you have ventaja on tirada de salvacións against being hechizado or asustado, and you have ventaja on ability checks and tirada de salvacións against spells and effects that would move you against your will.

name: Steelsilk Mantle
desc: This ornate purple silk cloak is interwoven with enchanted steel threads. As a acción adicional, you can reshape some part of the cloak into any mundane steel object that can be held in one hand, such as a sword, a key, or a cage. This item detaches from the main cloak, but can be reattached on your turn (no action required). Only one item may be detached from the cloak at a time. Three times between _long rests_ , when you see a criatura objetivo you with an attack you can use your reacción to spin the cloak into its path. The cloak hardens like a shield, increasing your AC by +4 against that attack.

name: Stick Awl
desc: This simple, small, pointed leatherworking tool has a sturdy maple wooden handle and a superb steel point that never dulls. Used by crafters to make the finest armor, it has been known to pierce the toughest of hides. When used as a weapon the awl is treated as a dagger that causa 1 point of mágico daño perforante. When you speak the command word while making a successful ataque cuerpo a cuerpo con arma with it against an object, the awl is destroyed after puncturing a hole. The awl is able to puncture any substance, and the hole it leaves behind is 3-inches deep with a diameter of 1/8th-inch. Unlike other enchanted trinkets, the awl can be used as a weapon without potentially being destroyed.

name: Stinger
desc: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you hit a criatura with an attack using this weapon, you can use a acción adicional to inject paralyzing venom in the objetivo. The objetivo debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Constitución or become paralizado for 1 minuto. It can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito. criaturas immune to veneno are also immune to this dagger's paralyzing venom. The dagger can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Stolen Thunder
desc: This bodhrán drum is crafted of wood from an ash tree struck by rayo, and its head is made from stretched mammoth skin, painted with a stylized thunderhead. While attuned to this drum, you can use it as an arcane focus. While holding the drum, you are immune to daño de trueno. While this drum is on your person but not held, you have resistance to daño de trueno. The drum has 10 charges for the following properties. It regains 1d6 + 4 expended charges daily at dawn. In addition, the drum regains 1 expended charge for every 10 daño de trueno you ignore due to the resistance or immunity the drum gives you. If you expend the drum's last charge, roll a 1d20. On a 1, it becomes a no mágico drum. However, if you make a Carisma (Interpretación) check while playing the no mágico drum, and you roll a 20, the passion of your Interpretación rekindles the item's power, restoring its properties and giving it 1 charge. If you are hit by a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo while using the drum as a shield, you can use a reacción to expend 1 charge to cause a thunderous rebuke. The attacker debe realizar a CD 17 tirada de salvación de Constitución. en un fallo, the attacker recibe 2d8 daño de trueno and is pushed up to 10 pies away from you. en un éxito, the attacker recibe half el daño and isn't pushed. The drum emits a thunderous boom audible out to 300 pies.

name: Stone of Controlling Earth Elementals
desc: Si la piedra está en contacto con el suelo, puedes usar una acción para pronunciar su palabra de mando e invocar un elemental de tierra, como si hubieras lanzado el conjuro _conjure elemental_. La piedra no puede usarse de este modo de nuevo hasta el siguiente amanecer. La piedra pesa 2,5 kg.

name: Stone of Controlling Earth Elementals
desc: You can use an action to touch this 5 pound stone to the ground and speak a command word, summoning an _earth elemental_  (as the _conjure elemental_ spell). Once used, the stone cannot be used again until the next dawn.

name: Stone of Good Luck (Luckstone)
desc: Mientras llevas consigo esta ágata pulida, obtienes un bonificador de +1 a las pruebas de característica y tiradas de salvación.

name: Stone of Good Luck (Luckstone)
desc: You gain a +1 bonus to ability checks and _savings throws_  as long as this lustrous gemstone is on your person.

name: Stone Staff
desc: Sturdy and smooth, this impressive staff is crafted from solid stone. Most stone staves are crafted by dwarf mages and few ever find their way into non-dwarven hands. The staff can be wielded as a magic quarterstaff that grants a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it. The staff has 10 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from it, using your CD de salvación del conjuro and spellcasting ability: earthskimmer* (4 charges), entomb* (6 charges), flesh to stone (6 charges), meld into stone (3 charges), stone shape (4 charges), stoneskin (4 charges), or wall of stone (5 charges). You can also use an action to cast the pummelstone* or true strike spell from the staff without using any charges. Spells marked with an asterisk (*) can be found in Deep Magic for 5th Edition. The staff regains 1d6 + 4 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, hundreds of cracks appear across the staff 's surface and it crumbles into tiny bits of stone.

name: Stonechewer Gauntlets
desc: These impractically spiked gauntlets are made from adamantine, are charged with raw elemental earth magic, and limit the range of motion in your fingers. While wearing these gauntlets, you can't carry a weapon or object, and you can't climb or otherwise perform precise actions requiring the use of your hands. When you hit a criatura with an unarmed strike while wearing these gauntlets, the unarmed strike causa an extra 1d4 daño perforante.

name: Stonedrift Staff
desc: This staff is fashioned from petrificado wood and crowned with a raw chunk of lapis lazuli veined with gold. The staff can be wielded as a magic quarterstaff. The staff has 10 charges for the following properties. It regains 1d6 + 4 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the staff crumbles to dust and is destroyed. Spells. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from it, using your CD de salvación del conjuro: animate objects (only stone objects, 5 charges), earthquake (8 charges), passwall (only stone surfaces, 5 charges), or stone shape (4 charges). Elemental Speech. You can speak and understand Primordial while holding this staff. Favor of the Earthborn. While holding the staff, you have ventaja on Carisma checks made to influence earth elementals or other denizens of the Plane of Earth. Stone Glide. If the staff has at least 1 charge, you have a burrowing Velocidad equal to your walking Velocidad, and you can burrow through earth and stone while holding this staff. While doing so, you don’t disturb the material you move through.

name: Stormheart Bow
desc:
This bow is made from dragon bone and fey heartstring. When you hit with an attack using this magic bow, the objetivo recibe an extra 1d6 daño de rayo. The bow has 5 charges for the following other properties. It regains 1d4 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn.
  ***Iceshard Arrow.*** You can expend 3 charges when you hit with an attack using this magic bow to cause the arrow to turn to ice and shatter in mid-air. Choose up to three objetivos within 30 pies of your original objetivo. Your original objetivo recibe damage as normal, and each chosen objetivo recibe 1d6 daño de frío.
  ***trueno Arrow.*** You can expend 2 charges when you hit with an attack using this magic bow to cause the attack to release a peal of trueno. The objetivo recibe damage as normal, and cada criatura within 15 pies of the objetivo debe realizar a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Constitución, taking 2d6 daño de trueno en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one.

name: Storyteller's Pipe
desc: This long-shanked wooden smoking pipe is etched with leaves along the bowl. Although it is serviceable as a typical pipe, you can use an action to blow out smoke and shape the smoke into wispy images for 10 minutos. This effect works like the silent image spell, except its range is limited to a 10-pie cone in front of you, and the images can be no larger than a 5-pie cube. The smoky images last for 3 rondas before fading, but you can continue blowing smoke to create more images for the duration or until the pipe burns through the smoking material in it, whichever happens first.

name: Sturdy Scroll Tube
desc: This ornate scroll case is etched with arcane symbology. Scrolls inside this case are immune to damage and are protected from the elements, as long as the scroll case remains closed and intact. The scroll case itself has immunity to all forms of damage, except daño de fuerza and daño de trueno.

name: Stygian Crook
desc: This staff of gnarled, rotted wood ends in a hooked curvature like a twisted shepherd's crook. The staff has 10 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from it, using your CD de salvación del conjuro: bestow curse (3 charges), blight (4 charges), contagion (5 charges), false life (1 charge), or hallow (5 charges). The staff regains 1d6 + 4 expended charges daily at dusk. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the staff turns to live maggots and is destroyed.

name: Subtle Mage Gloves
desc: While wearing these gloves, you gain a +1 bonus to AC. In addition, when you cast a spell you can use your reacción to expend a number of charges equal to the spell’s level, casting it without any seen or vocalized components. The gloves have 4 charges and regain 1d3 charges each dawn.

name: Sun Blade
desc:
Este objeto parece ser la empuñadura de una espada larga. Mientras sostienes la empuñadura, puedes usar una acción adicional para hacer surgir una hoja de pura luminosidad, o para hacerla desaparecer. Mientras la hoja exista, esta espada larga mágica tiene la propiedad de sutileza. Si tienes competencia con espadas cortas o espadas largas, tienes competencia con el _sun blade_.

Obtienes un bonificador de +2 a las tiradas de ataque y de daño realizadas con esta arma, la cual inflige daño radiante en lugar de daño cortante. Cuando impactas a un no muerto con ella, ese objetivo recibe 1d8 de daño radiante adicional.

La luminosa hoja de la espada emite luz brillante en un radio de 4,5 m y luz tenue 4,5 m adicionales. Esta luz es luz solar. Mientras la hoja persista, puedes usar una acción para ampliar o reducir su radio de luz brillante y luz tenue en 1,5 m cada uno, hasta un máximo de 9 m cada uno o un mínimo de 3 m cada uno.

name: Sun Blade
desc:
This weapon first appears to be nothing more than a sword hilt. While holding the hilt, you can use a acción adicional to make a blade of sunlight appear or disappear. Being proficient in shortswords or longswords grants competencia with this magic sword, which also has the sutil property as long as the blade is in existence.

While the blade is ignited, you gain +2 bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  made with it, dealing 1d8 daño radiante on a hit (instead of daño cortante), or 2d8 daño radiante if your objetivo is undead.

The blade shines with _bright sunlight_  in a 15-pie radius and dim sunlight for an additional 15 pies. You can use an action to increase or decrease the bright sunlight and dim sunlight radiuses by 5 pies, up to a maximum of 30 pies each or down to a minimum of 10 pies each.

name: Superior Potion of Troll Blood
desc: When you drink this potion, you regain 5 puntos de golpe at the start of each of your turns. After it has restored 50 puntos de golpe, the potion's effects end.

name: Supreme Potion of Troll Blood
desc: When you drink this potion, you regain 8 puntos de golpe at the start of each of your turns. After it has restored 80 puntos de golpe, the potion's effects end.

name: Survival Knife
desc: When holding this sturdy knife, you can use an action to transform it into a crowbar, a fishing rod, a hunting trap, or a hatchet (mainly a chopping tool; if wielded as a weapon, it uses the same statistics as this dagger, except it causa daño cortante). While holding or touching the transformed knife, you can use an action to transform it into another form or back into its original shape.

name: Survivor’s Cloak
desc:
This cloak is an unassuming neutral grayish-brown color that seems to slowly fade into the background whenever you are standing still. You cannot attune to this cloak if you are not proficient with Supervivencia. 

While attuned to and wearing the cloak, you may treat a _long rest_  as if you were in a _haven_ . Once you use this property, you cannot do so again for 1 week.
