In addition, the cloak allows you to travel at a fast pace while remaining stealthy.

name: Swarmfoe Suit
desc: While wearing this armor festooned with thin Dracónico scales, you gain a +1 bonus to AC. You can use the scales as a melee weapon while wearing the armor. You have competencia with the scales and deal 1d4 daño cortante on a hit (your Fuerza modifier applies to the attack and damage rolls as normal). Swarms don't have resistance to el daño dealt by the scales. In addition, if a swarm occupies your space, you can attack with the scales as a acción adicional.

name: Swashing Plumage
desc: This plumage, a colorful bouquet of tropical hat feathers, has a small pin at its base and can be affixed to any hat or headband. Due to its distracting, ostentatious appearance, criaturas hostile to you have desventaja on opportunity attacks against you.

name: Sweet Nature
desc: You have a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you hit a humanoid with this weapon, the humanoid recibe an extra 1d6 daño cortante. If you use the axe to damage a plant criatura or an object made of wood, the axe's blade liquifies into harmless honey, and it can't be used again until 24 horas have passed.

name: Swolbold Wraps
desc: When wearing these cloth wraps, your forearms and hands swell to half again their normal size without negatively impacting your fine motor skills. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with unarmed strikes while wearing these wraps. In addition, your unarmed strike uses a d4 for damage and counts as mágico for the purpose of overcoming resistance and immunity to ataques no mágicos and damage. When you hit a objetivo with an unarmed strike and the objetivo is no more than one size larger than you, you can use a acción adicional to automatically grapple the objetivo. Once this special acción adicional has been used three times, it can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Sword of Fallen Saints
desc: This enchanted blade is infused with the spirits of fallen warriors who carried it in battle long ago. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. If you die while attuned to the sword, you gain the effect of the gentle repose spell. This effect lasts until another criatura attunes to the sword.

name: Sword of Life Stealing
desc: Cuando atacas a una criatura con esta arma mágica y obtienes un 20 en la tirada de ataque, ese objetivo recibe 3d6 de daño necrótico adicional, siempre que el objetivo no sea un constructo ni un no muerto. Ganas puntos de golpe temporales iguales al daño adicional infligido.

name: Sword of Life Stealing
desc: When you use this weapon to make an attack against a criatura that is not a construct or undead and roll a natural 20, the criatura recibe an extra 3d6 daño necrótico and you gain an amount of temporary puntos de golpe equal to the daño necrótico dealt.

name: Sword of Sharpness
type: Weapon (any sword that deals slashing damage)
desc:
Cuando atacas un objeto con esta espada mágica e impactas, maximiza los dados de daño del arma contra el objetivo.

Cuando atacas a una criatura con esta arma y obtienes un 20 en la tirada de ataque, ese objetivo recibe 4d6 de daño cortante adicional. Luego lanza otro d20. Si obtienes un 20, cercenas uno de los miembros del objetivo, y el efecto de dicha pérdida lo determina el DM. Si la criatura no tiene ningún miembro que amputar, cercenas una parte de su cuerpo en su lugar.

Además, puedes pronunciar la palabra de mando de la espada para hacer que la hoja emita luz brillante en un radio de 3 m y luz tenue 3 m adicionales. Pronunciar la palabra de mando de nuevo o envainar la espada apaga la luz.

name: Sword of Sharpness
desc:
Objects hit with this sword take the maximum damage the weapon’s damage dice can deal.

When you use this sword to _make an attack_  against a criatura and roll a natural 20, the objetivo recibe an extra 4d6 daño cortante. Then roll an additional d20, and on a natural 20 you chop off one of the objetivo’s limbs (or a portion of its body if it has no limbs). The Narrator determines what effect (if any) the result of this severing off is.

You may also speak this sword’s command word to make the blade emit bright ligera in a 10-pie radius and dim ligera an additional 10 pies. Repeating the command word or sheathing the sword extinguishes the blade’s ligera.

name: Sword of the Serpent
desc:
You gain a +2 bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  made with this magic sword. When you hit with this weapon, you deal an extra 1d6 daño de veneno. The sword has 3 charges and regains all expended charges at dawn.

While wielding the sword, you can use an action to expend 1 charge and cast __polymorph_ on yourself, transforming into a _giant poisonous snake_ . While in this form, you retain your Inteligencia, Sabiduría, and Carisma scores.

name: Sword of Three Traditions
desc:
The _Sword of Three Traditions_ is a jewel-pommeled blade with the power to transform into other weapons—each specially suited for one of the eleven martial traditions. Originally called the _Sword of All Traditions,_ over time the gems in the pommel were lost and now only three remain. Should its lost gemstones be returned, the blade might be restored to its full spectrum of glory and power.

**Legends and Lore** Success on an Arcanos or Historia check reveals the following:

**CD 15** This is the _Sword of Three Traditions,_ which grants mastery of the techniques of combat. Each of the three gemstones in its hilt represents a tradition of combat.

**CD 18** The sword can transform into other weapons based on the gemstones in its hilt.

**CD 21** Only a dragon of the same color can destroy the sword’s gemstones.

**Artifact Properties**

The _Sword of Three Traditions_ has two lesser artifact benefits, one greater artifact benefit, and one greater artifact detriment. For each of the first five mágico gemstones restored to the sword, it gains 1 lesser artifact benefit. For each of the last three mágico gemstones restored to it, the sword gains 1 greater artifact detriment and 1 greater artifact benefit.

The _Sword of Three Traditions_ is a   _1 longsword_ . Once you are attuned, you can use an action to turn the sword into a different _1 weapon ._ In addition, when you use a combat maneuver, the sword automatically changes into the weapon associated with that tradition. To change into a given weapon, the gem associated with that tradition must be attached. 

While holding the sword, when you use a combat maneuver of a tradition associated with an attached gem, its exertion cost is reduced by 1 (minimum 1 exertion).

**mágico Gemstones**

Each of the lost mágico gemstones of the _Sword of Three Traditions_ is a wondrous item and artifact that requires attunement. Once attuned to a mágico gemstone, it bestows a minor artifact benefit. You can only attune to the mágico gemstone if you know a combat maneuver from the tradition associated with it. 

You can use an action to attach a mágico gemstone to the sword. No matter how many mágico gemstones are attached to the sword, it counts as a single magic item for the purposes of attunement.

The sword normally comes affixed with its diamond, peridot, and sapphire (for the Adamant Mountain, Rapid Current, and Razor’s Edge traditions), but the Narrator may choose to have different mágico gemstones attached to it or determine them randomly. 

When the sword turns into more than one item, the +1 bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  only apply to any weapons created (there are no bonuses bestowed to the munición or shield). The additional objects materialize either in the attuned criatura’s off-hand or strapped to their back. Any such item created by the sword disappears after 1 minuto if it is no longer on your person, or when the sword changes shape again.

 The sword’s power increases when 7 gems are in its pommel (turning it into a _2 weapon_  that reduces exertion costs by 2) or when fully restored with all 11 mágico gemstones (turning it into a   _3 weapon_ that reduces exertion costs by 3). 

__**Table: Sword of Three Traditions**__
| **1d12** | **Tradition**       | **Weapon**                        | **Gem**    |
| -------- | ------------------- | --------------------------------- | ---------- |
| 1        | Razor’s Edge        | Longsword                         | Diamond    |
| 2        | Adamant Mountain    | Greatsword                        | Peridot    |
| 3        | Rapid Current       | Two shortswords                   | Sapphire   |
| 4        | Biting Zephyr       | Longbow and quiver with 10 arrows | Pearl      |
| 5        | Mirror’s Glint      | Saber and ligera shield            | Opal       |
| 6        | Mist and Shade      | Dagger                            | Aquamarine |
| 7        | Sanguine Knot       | Bastard sword                     | Garnet     |
| 8        | Spirited Steed      | Lance                             | Topaz      |
| 9        | Tempered Iron       | Morningstar                       | Amethyst   |
| 10       | Tooth and Claw      | Battleaxe                         | Ruby       |
| 11       | Unending Wheel      | Rapier                            | Emerald    |
| 12       | Adventurer’s choice | \-                                | \-         |

### **Seekers of the Sword**

The _Sword of Three Traditions_ is sought after by power hungry and righteous warriors alike, and any search for the fabled blade is certain to cause conflict with some of the following foes.

__**Table: Seekers of the Sword**__
| **1d6** | **Adversary**                              |
| ------- | ------------------------------------------ |
| 1       | _Warrior_  on training pilgrimage          |
| 2       | Despot with a band of raiders              |
| 3       | Master martial artist who tests the worthy |
| 4       | Spellsword in search of secrets            |
| 5       | Greedy _assassin_  or _thief_              |
| 6       | Greedy _assassin_  or _thief_              |

### **Destroying the Sword**

The power which binds the _Sword of Three Traditions_ is located in its mágico gemstones. Each gemstone can be destroyed forever if it is removed from the pommel and fed to an adult or older true dragon of similar hue. Once each mágico gemstone is destroyed, the blade crumbles into dust.

name: Sword of Volsung
desc: Legends tell of a dragon whose hide was impenetrable and so robust that only a blow to the heart would kill it. An unnamed hero finally defeated it and tore its heart into two. The dragon’s name was lost, but its legacy remains. This sword is one of two items that were crafted to hold its heart. The black blade is adorned with glittering silver runes, and its guard has a shallow opening at the center with grooves connecting it to the first rune. The sword’s pommel is a large, clear crystal held fast by silver scales. You gain a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you hit a dragon with an attack using this sword, that criatura recibe an extra 1d6 daño cortante. Runes of Courage. You can’t be asustado while holding or carrying this sword. Fragment of Gram Awakened. You can use a acción adicional to awaken a fragment of the spirit of the great wyrm that inhabits this blade. For 24 horas, you gain a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls with this magic sword, and when you hit a dragon with an attack using this sword, that criatura recibe an extra 3d6 daño cortante. Once used, this property can’t be used again until 3 days have passed. If you have performed the Dragon Heart Ritual, you can use a acción adicional to expend 2 of the sword’s charges to activate this property, and you can use this property as often as you want, as long as you have the charges to do so. Dragon Heart Ritual. If you are also attuned to the locket of dragon vitality (see page 152), you can drain 3 charges from the locket into the sword, turning the crystal pommel a deep red and rendering the locket broken and irreparable. Doing this requires a descanso largo where you also re-attune with the newly charged sword of volsung. Upon completing the Dragon Heart Ritual, the sword contains all remaining charges from the locket, and you gain the locket’s effects while holding or carrying the sword. When you are reduced to 0 puntos de golpe and trigger the locket’s temporary puntos de golpe, the sword isn’t destroyed, but you can’t trigger that effect again until 24 horas have passed. The sword regains all expended charges after you slay any dragon. For the purpose of this sword, “dragon” refers to any criatura with the dragon type, including drakes and wyverns.

name: Sword of Wounding
desc:
Los puntos de golpe perdidos por el daño de esta arma solo pueden recuperarse mediante un descanso corto o largo, y no a través de regeneración, magia ni ningún otro medio.

Una vez por turno, cuando impactas a una criatura con un ataque usando esta arma mágica, puedes herir al objetivo. Al comienzo de cada turno de la criatura herida, esta recibe 1d4 de daño necrótico por cada vez que la hayas herido, y puede realizar una tirada de salvación de Constitución CD 15, poniendo fin al efecto de todas esas heridas sobre sí misma si tiene éxito. Alternativamente, la criatura herida, o una criatura que se encuentre a 1,5 m de ella, puede usar una acción para realizar una prueba de Sabiduría (Medicina) CD 15, poniendo fin al efecto de dichas heridas sobre ella si tiene éxito.

name: Sword of Wounding
desc:
Once per turn, when you use this sword to _hit a criatura_  with a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo con arma, in addition to dealing the attack damage you may inflict it with a wound. A wounded criatura recibe 1d4 daño necrótico at the start of each of its turns for each wound you have inflicted this way. Whenever the criatura is damaged by its wound, it can make a CD 15 Constitución _tirada de salvación_ , ending all wound effects it is suffering from en un éxito. Alternatively, the wounds can be healed if the wounded criatura (or a criatura within 5 pies of it) uses an action to make a CD 15 Medicina check, ending all wound effects it is suffering from en un éxito.

Damage dealt by this sword can only be regained by taking a _short or long rest_ —no other method, mágico or otherwise, will restore the puntos de golpe.

name: Tactile Unguent
desc: Cat burglars, gearworkers, locksmiths, and even street performers use this gooey substance to increase the sensitivity of their hands. When found, a container contains 1d4 + 1 doses. As an action, one dose can be applied to a criatura's hands. For 1 hora, that criatura has ventaja on Destreza (Juego de Manos) checks and on tactile Sabiduría (Percepción) checks.

name: Tailored Suit of Armor
desc: For the debonair gentleman or sophisticated lady who wishes to attend the ball in something respectable but still retain the safety of mind that armor provides, this set of padded leather armor is glamored with an illusion that makes it look like a finely-tailored suit or dress. This illusion does not hold up to physical scrutiny and any criatura who physically interacts with the armor sees through the figment with a successful CD 10 Investigación check.

name: Tailor's Clasp
desc: This ornate brooch is shaped like a jeweled weaving spider or scarab beetle. While it is attached to a piece of fabric, it can be activated as an action. When activated, it skitters across the fabric, mending any tears, adjusting frayed hems, and reinforcing seams. This item works only on no mágico objects made out of fibrous material, such as clothing, rope, and rugs. It continues repairing the fabric for up to 10 minutos or until the repairs are complete. Once used, it can't be used again until 1 hora has passed.

name: Talisman of Pure Good
desc:
Este talismán es un poderoso símbolo del bien. Una criatura que no sea ni buena ni malvada en alineamiento recibe 6d6 de daño radiante al tocar el talismán. Una criatura malvada recibe 8d6 de daño radiante al tocarlo. Cualquiera de estos tipos de criatura vuelve a recibir el daño cada vez que termina su turno sujetando o portando el talismán.

Si eres un clérigo o paladín de alineamiento bueno, puedes usar el talismán como símbolo sagrado y obtienes un bonificador de +2 a las tiradas de ataque de conjuro mientras lo llevas puesto o lo sostienes.

El talismán tiene 7 cargas. Si lo llevas puesto o lo sostienes, puedes usar una acción para gastar 1 carga y elegir una criatura que puedas ver sobre el suelo a 36 m o menos de ti. Si el objetivo es de alineamiento malvado, se abre una grieta en llamas bajo sus pies. El objetivo debe superar una tirada de salvación de Destreza CD 20 o caer en la grieta y ser destruido, sin dejar ningún resto. La grieta se cierra entonces sin dejar rastro de su existencia. Cuando gastas la última carga, el talismán se dispersa en motas de luz dorada y queda destruido.
requires_attunement: requires attunement by a creature of good alignment

name: Talisman of Pure Good
desc:
This talisman’s purity harms criaturas that do not have the Good trait, dealing 6d6 daño radiante when touched (or 8d6 daño radiante to a criatura with the Evil trait). A criatura carrying or holding this item recibe the same damage at the end of each of its turns as long as it does so.

A cleric or herald with the Good trait can use this talisman as a holy symbol, which grants a +2 bonus to _spell attack rolls_  while held or worn.

In addition, the talisman has 7 charges. While wielded or worn, you can use an action to expend a charge and choose a objetivo within 120 pies that is on the ground. If the criatura has the Evil trait, it makes a CD 20 Destreza _tirada de salvación_  or is destroyed by a flaming pit that appears beneath it. Once the pit closes no trace of it or the objetivo remains. Once all charges are expended, the talisman collapses into golden specks of ligera.

name: Talisman of the Snow Queen
desc: The coldly beautiful and deadly Snow Queen (see Tome of Beasts) grants these delicate-looking snowflake-shaped mithril talismans to her most trusted spies and servants. Each talisman is imbued with a measure of her power and is magically tied to the queen. It can be affixed to any piece of clothing or worn as an amulet. While wearing the talisman, you gain the following benefits: • You have resistance to daño de frío. • You have ventaja on Carisma checks when interacting socially with criaturas that live in frío environments, such as frost giants, winter wolves, and fraughashar (see Tome of Beasts). • You can use an action to cast the ray of frost truco from it at will, using your level and using Inteligencia as your spellcasting ability. Blinding Snow. While wearing the talisman, you can use an action to create a swirl of snow that spreads out from you and into the eyes of nearby criaturas. cada criatura within 15 pies of you debe tener éxito en a CD 17 tirada de salvación de Constitución or be cegado until the end of its next turn. Once used, this property can’t be used again until the next dawn. Eyes of the Queen. While you are wearing the talisman, the Snow Queen can use a acción adicional to see through your eyes if both of you are on the same plane of existence. This effect lasts until she ends it as a acción adicional or until you die. You can’t make a tirada de salvación to prevent the Snow Queen from seeing through your eyes. However, being more than 5 pies away from the talisman ends the effect, and becoming cegado prevents her from seeing anything further than 10 pies away from you. When the Snow Queen is looking through your eyes, the talisman sheds an almost imperceptible pale blue glow, which you or any criatura within 10 pies of you notice with a successful CD 20 Sabiduría (Percepción) check. An identify spell fails to reveal this property of the talisman, and this property can’t be removed from the talisman except by the Snow Queen herself.

name: Talisman of the Sphere
desc: Cuando realizas una prueba de Inteligencia (Conocimiento Arcano) para controlar una _sphere of annihilation_ mientras sostienes este talismán, duplicas tu bonificador de competencia en la prueba. Además, cuando comienzas tu turno con el control sobre una _sphere of annihilation_, puedes usar una acción para levitarla 3m más un número adicional de metros igual a 3 × tu modificador de Inteligencia.

name: Talisman of the Sphere
desc: When you hold this talisman while making an Inteligencia (Arcanos) check to control a __sphere of annihilation_ add your competencia bonus twice. If you are in control of a _sphere of annihilation_ at the start of your turn, you can use an action to move the sphere 10 pies plus a number of additional pies equal to 10 × your Inteligencia modifier.

name: Talisman of Ultimate Evil
desc:
Este objeto simboliza el mal impenitente. Una criatura que no sea buena ni malvada en alineamiento recibe 6d6 de daño necrótico al tocar el talismán. Una criatura buena recibe 8d6 de daño necrótico al tocarlo. Cualquiera de los dos tipos de criatura vuelve a recibir el daño cada vez que termina su turno sujetando o llevando el talismán.

Si eres un clérigo o paladín malvado, puedes usar el talismán como símbolo sagrado y obtienes un bonificador de +2 a las tiradas de ataque de conjuro mientras lo llevas puesto o lo sostienes.

El talismán tiene 6 cargas. Si lo llevas puesto o lo sostienes, puedes usar una acción para gastar 1 carga del talismán y elegir una criatura que puedas ver en el suelo a 36m de ti. Si el objetivo es de alineamiento bueno, una fisura en llamas se abre bajo él. El objetivo debe superar una tirada de salvación de Destreza CD 20 o caer en la fisura y ser destruido, sin dejar ningún resto. La fisura se cierra entonces sin dejar rastro de su existencia. Cuando gastas la última carga, el talismán se disuelve en un limo de olor repugnante y queda destruido.
requires_attunement: requires attunement by a creature of evil alignment

name: Talisman of Ultimate Evil
desc:
This talisman’s blasphemous Naturaleza harms criaturas that do not have the Evil trait, dealing 6d6 daño necrótico when touched (or 8d6 daño necrótico to a criatura with the Good trait). A criatura carrying or holding this item recibe the same damage at the end of each of its turns as long as it does so. 

A cleric or herald with the Evil trait can use this talisman as a holy symbol, which grants a +2 bonus to _spell attack rolls_  while held or worn.

In addition, the talisman has 6 charges. While wielded or worn, you can use an action to expend a charge and choose a objetivo within 120 pies that is on the ground. If the criatura has the Good trait, it makes a CD 20 Destreza _tirada de salvación_  or is destroyed by a flaming pit that appears beneath it. Once the pit closes no trace of it or the objetivo remains. Once all charges are expended, the talisman melts into a puddle of ooze.

name: Talking Tablets
desc: These two enchanted brass tablets each have gold styli chained to them by small, silver chains. As long as both tablets are on the same plane of existence, any message written on one tablet with its gold stylus appears on the other tablet. If the writer writes words in a language the reader doesn't understand, the tablets translate the words into a language the reader can read. While holding a tablet, you know if no criatura bears the paired tablet. When the tablets have transferred a total of 150 words between them, their magic ceases to function until the next dawn. If one of the tablets is destroyed, the other one becomes a no mágico block of brass worth 25 gp.

name: Talking Torches
desc: These pesada iron and wood torches are typically found in pairs or sets of four. While holding this torch, you can use an action to speak a command word and cause it to produce a mágico, heatless flame that sheds bright ligera in a 20-pie radius and dim ligera for an additional 20 pies. You can use a acción adicional to repeat the command word to extinguish the ligera. If more than one talking torch remain lit and touching for 1 minuto, they become magically bound to each other. A torch remains bound until the torch is destroyed or until it is bound to another talking torch or set of talking torches. While holding or carrying the torch, you can communicate telepathically with any criatura holding or carrying one of the torches bound to your torch, as long as both torches are lit and within 5 millas of each other.

name: Tamer's Whip
desc:
This whip is braided from leather tanned from the hides of a dozen different, dangerous beasts. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you attack a beast using this weapon, you have ventaja on the tirada de ataque.
When you roll a 20 on the tirada de ataque made with this weapon and the objetivo is a beast, the beast debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or become hechizado or asustado (your choice) for 1 minuto.
If the criatura is hechizado, it entiende and obeys one-word commands, such as “attack,” “approach,” “stay,” or similar. If it is hechizado and entiende a language, it obeys any command you give it in that language. The hechizado or asustado criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito.

name: Tarian Graddfeydd Ddraig
desc:
This metal shield has an outer coating consisting of hardened resinous insectoid secretions embedded with flakes from ground dragon scales collected from various dragon wyrmlings and one dragon that was killed by shadow magic. While holding this shield, you gain a +2 bonus to AC. This bonus is in addition to the shield's normal bonus to AC. In addition, you have resistance to ácido, frío, fuego, rayo, necrótico, and daño de veneno dealt by the breath weapons of dragons. While wielding the shield in an area of dim or bright ligera, you can use an action to reflect the ligera off the shield's dragon scale flakes to cause a cone of multicolored ligera to flash from it (15-pie cone if in dim ligera; 30-pie cone if in bright ligera). cada criatura in the area debe realizar a CD 17 tirada de salvación de Destreza. For each objetivo, roll a d6 and consult the following table to determine which color is reflected at it. The shield can't be used this way again until the next dawn. | d6 | Effect |
| --- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 1 | **Red**. The objetivo recibe 6d6 daño de fuego en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one. |
| 2 | **White**. The objetivo recibe 4d6 daño de frío and is apresado until the start of your next turn en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage and is not apresado on a successful one. |
| 3 | **Blue**. The objetivo recibe 4d6 daño de rayo and is paralizado until the start of your next turn en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage and is not paralizado on a successful one. |
| 4 | **Black**. The objetivo recibe 4d6 daño de ácido en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one. If the objetivo failed the save, it also recibe an extra 2d6 daño de ácido on the start of your next turn. |
| 5 | **Green**. The objetivo recibe 4d6 daño de veneno and is envenenado until the start of your next turn en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage and is not envenenado on a successful one. |
| 6 | **Shadow**. The objetivo recibe 4d6 daño necrótico and its Fuerza score is reduced by 1d4 en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage and does not reduce its Fuerza score on a successful one. The objetivo dies if this Fuerza reduction reduces its Fuerza to 0. Otherwise, the reduction lasts until the objetivo finishes a short or descanso largo. |

name: Teapot of Soothing
desc: This cast iron teapot is adorned with the simple image of fluffy clouds that seem to slowly shift and move across the pot as if on a gentle breeze. Any water placed inside the teapot immediately becomes hot tea at the perfect temperature, and when poured, it becomes the exact flavor the person pouring it prefers. The teapot can serve up to 6 criaturas, and any criatura that spends 10 minutos drinking a cup of the tea gains 2d6 temporary puntos de golpe for 24 horas. The criatura pouring the tea has ventaja on Carisma (Persuasión) checks for 10 minutos after pouring the first cup. Once used, the teapot can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Tenebrous Flail of Screams
desc: The handle of this flail is made of mammoth bone wrapped in black leather made from bat wings. Its pommel is adorned with raven's claws, and the head of the flail dangles from a flexible, preserved braid of entrails. The head is made of petrificado wood inlaid with owlbear and raven beaks. When swung, the flail lets out an otherworldly screech. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you hit a criatura with this flail, the objetivo recibe an extra 1d6 daño psíquico. When you roll a 20 on an tirada de ataque made with this weapon, the objetivo debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be incapacitado until the end of its next turn.

name: Tenebrous Mantle
desc:
This black cloak appears to be made of pure shadow and shrouds you in darkness. While wearing it, you gain the following benefits: - You have ventaja on Destreza (Sigilo) checks.
- You have resistance to daño necrótico.
- You can cast the darkness and misty step spells from it at will. Casting either spell from the cloak requires an action. Instead of a silvery mist when you cast misty step, you are engulfed in the darkness of the cloak and emerge from the cloak's darkness at your destination.
- You can use an action to cast the black tentacles or living shadows (see Deep Magic for 5th Edition) spell from it. The cloak can't be used this way again until the following dusk.

name: That Which Spies From Infinity’s True Name
desc:
This slip of parchment contains the magically bound name “Holtrathamogg” surrounded by eldritch symbols that defy all translation. While you are attuned to it, you can use a acción adicional to invoke the name on this parchment to summon a vision of a dark and tentacled elder evil beside you for 1 minuto. Holtrathamogg is utterly alien and is disquietingly silent unless spoken to. Once a vision is summoned in this way, it cannot be summoned again for the next 24 horas.

You can use an action to verbally direct the vision to do any of the following: 

* Instantly snuff out a bonfire, candle, or similar ligera source within 15 pies.
* Translate up to 25 words of spoken or written Habla Profunda into Común.
* Whisper madness into the ears of a objetivo criatura within 5 pies. A criatura whispered to in this way makes a CD 13 Sabiduría _tirada de salvación_  or becomes _frightened_  until the end of its next turn.

Alternatively, as an action while the vision is summoned you can agree to revoke your claim on That Which Spies From Infinity in exchange for its direct assistance. When you do so the parchment melts away into nothing and for the next minuto the vision transforms into an eldritch ethereal tentacle within 30 pies. On each of your turns, you can use a acción adicional to verbally instruct the tentacle to make a melee ataque de conjuro (+6 bonus para impactar) against a objetivo within 10 pies of it. On a hit, the objetivo recibe 1d8 daño de frío and its Velocidad is reduced by 10 pies until the start of your next turn. Once you have revoked your claim in this way, you can never invoke That Which Spies From Infinity’s true name again.

name: The Song of Creation
desc:
This golden tome is a written record of the divine dance which brought the world into being. _The Song of Creation i_s eternal, meaning that it has always existed even before the words were wrought onto the page. One wonders—is the _Song of Creation_ the written word, the book, or the melody the gods sang? Somehow the _Song of Creation_ is more than this and yet they all are one. That means that in a way the _Song of Creation’s_ wielder holds the multiverse itself in their hands.

**Legends and Lore Success** on an Arcanos or Historia check reveals the following:

**CD 15** This is the _Song of Creation_, a prayer book filled with the eternal melody which brought the world into being. 

**CD 18** The tome can break the minds of those who read it, but it can also grant access to powerful miracles.

**CD 21** The tome is completely indestructible.

**Artifact Properties**

The _Song of Creation_ has two lesser artifact benefits, one lesser artifact detriment, and one greater artifact detriment.

**Mystical Tome**

This tome is written in a script that even the angels cannot decipher. While attuned to it, you can read it as though you are reading your first language. Reading the _Song of Creation_ reveals beautiful poetry about Naturaleza, ligera, and life, but structurally they do not make sense when read start-to-end. The poems cannot be perfectly translated, as each individual interprets the same poem differently. The pages cannot be counted, and various purported complete counts invariably disagree.  
When you first attune to this tome and when you read it, you debe realizar a CD 18 Sabiduría _tirada de salvación_  or else become _stunned_  for 1 hora. If you succeed on this tirada de salvación, you are not subject to it again for 1 week. If you consult this tome during a Sabiduría or Inteligencia check to recall lore, you gain a +5 bonus to the roll, and any natural d20 results of 2 through 9 count as a 10.

**Magic**

While you use this prayer book as a spell focus, you gain a +3 bonus to ataque de conjuro rolls and your CD de salvación del conjuro, and you cast the spell without the need for any other material components that cost 1,000 gold or less. In addition, you know the following spells: __astral projection , demiplane , gate , maze , true resurrection ._

**Destroying the Song**

The _Song of Creation_ is made from a material that defies categorization, and it may well be indestructible. The best hope at banishing its power from the world is to return the tome directly into the hands of a god.

name: The Traveling Chest
desc:
This large chest has an interior space 5 pies wide, 3 pies deep, and 3 pies tall, and appears mundane save that the wood used in its construction is normally reserved for making magic wands. It’s mágico properties become apparent however when it moves, as it stands on hundreds of tiny humanoid legs and opens to reveal a long red tongue and a rim dotted with sharp teeth. It functions like a typical chest with the following additional properties.

**_Mimic-Like._** _The Traveling Chest_ can use an action to appear to be a mundane chest, and you can verbally command it to do so. While mimicking a normal chest in this way it is indistinguishable from its mundane counterpart.

_**Multiple Interiors.** The Traveling Chest_ has 1,000 different interior spaces, each 5 pies wide, 3 pies deep, and 3 pies tall. You can verbally request any particular space (such as the last one, or the one with my laundry in it) and when opened the chest reveals that interior. Otherwise the chest opens to reveal a random interior space. While the chest is closed, all of its interior spaces are located within separate pocket dimensions. These pocket dimensions have no air, and any Supply stored within them instantly deteriorates and rots as if decades have passed as soon as the chest is closed. Only you can summon up the other interiors in this way, and any other criatura that opens the chest only finds the “first interior”.

_**Relentless.**_ Once you attune to _The Traveling Chest_, it relentlessly follows you until it sits no more than 15 pies away from you. The chest is magically aware of your location at all times, even if you are on a separate plane. If separated from you the chest travels towards you as fast as it can to the best of its ability and it attacks any criatura that attempts to hinder its progress. If you are functionally unreachable, such as being on a different plane or across an ocean, the chest still progresses using even esoteric or hidden methods of reaching you such as magic portals or stowing away on ships headed in your direction.

_**Imprinted.**_ _The Traveling Chest_ does not relinquish attunement once attuned, and you cannot voluntarily remove this attunement. If you attune to additional magic items beyond your limit, _The Traveling Chest_ always remains as one of your attuned items. 

_**Pack Lightly.** The Traveling Chest_ does not like being weighed down too much, and can carry a maximum of 10 bulky items. Any additional bulky items you attempt to store within it are spit out. 

_**Sentience.** The Traveling Chest_ is a sentient construct with Inteligencia 3, Sabiduría 14, and Carisma 12\. It has vista ciega to a range of 60 pies. _The Traveling Chest_ cannot speak or read, but it entiende Común and Élfico. _The Traveling Ches_t lacks proper communication, but can animalistically communicate simple emotions (most often boredom or rage).

_**Personality.**_ _The Traveling Chest_ has the intellect and temperament of a poorly trained dog. Loyalty has been branded magically into its psyche but its actual obedience is looser. The chest is playful and quick to anger, yet is utterly committed to following whomever is attuned to it. It also isn’t a fighter and ignores outright commands to attack, though it defends itself in combat when it is attacked. It likes to be used for its intended purpose, happiest when numerous items are stored within it and regularly retrieved. If left idle or unused for more than a day it will come into conflict. While in conflict the chest intentionally opens to the wrong interior spaces, or remains indignantly locked, and it generally acts snippy and uncooperative. An apology and CD 14 Trato con Animales or Persuasión check calms the chest down and ends the conflict, or if it feels genuinely mistreated, it can be offered a full wardrobe’s worth of new clothing to store as a peace offering.

---

**The Traveling Chest Challenge 7**

_Medium construct_ 2,900 XP

**Clase de Armadura** 18 (natural armor)

**puntos de golpe** 119 (14d6+70)

**Velocidad** 50 pies.

STR DEX CON INT WIS CHA

18 (+4) 14 (+2) 20 (+5) 3 (–4) 14 (+2) 12 (+1)

**competencia** +3; **Maneuver** CD 15

**Damage Resistances** frío, fuego; contundente, perforante, cortante from no mágico weapons

**Damage Immunities** necrótico, veneno, trueno

**Condition Immunities** _fatigued_ , _poisoned_ 

**Senses** vista ciega 60 pies., passive Percepción 12

**Languages** entiende but can not speak Común, Élfico

**_False Appearance._** While _The Traveling Chest_ remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an ordinary chest.

_**Immutable Form**_. The chest is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

ACTION

**_Bite._** _Melee Weapon Attack_: +7 para impactar, alcance 5 pies., un objetivo. Hit: 18 (3d8+4) daño perforante. If the objetivo is a criatura, it is _grappled_  (escape CD 15). Until this grapple ends, the objetivo is _restrained_ , and the chest can't bite another objetivo.

_**Swallow.**_ The chest makes one bite attack against a Medium or smaller criatura it is _grappling_ . If the attack hits, that criatura recibe the bite's damage and is swallowed, and the grapple ends. While swallowed, the criatura is _blinded_  and _restrained_ , it has _total cover_  against attacks and other effects outside the chest, and it begins _suffocating_  at the start of each of the chest’s turns. If the chest recibe 30 damage or more on a single turn from a criatura inside it, the chest regurgitates all swallowed criaturas along with up to 1d10 other random items that were stored within it, all of which falls _prone_  in a space within 10 pies of the chest. If the chest dies, all swallowed criaturas are no longer apresado by it, and they and any items reappear randomly in unoccupied spaces within 10 pies of the destroyed chest.

name: Thirsting Scalpel
desc: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls with this magic weapon, which causa daño cortante instead of daño perforante. When you attack a criatura with this weapon and roll a 20 on the tirada de ataque, that objetivo recibe an extra 2d6 daño cortante. If the objetivo is a criatura other than an undead or construct, it debe tener éxito en a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Constitución or lose 2d6 puntos de golpe at the start of each of its turns from a bleeding wound. Any criatura can take an action to stanch the wound with a successful CD 11 Sabiduría (Medicina) check. The wound also closes if the objetivo receives mágico healing. In addition, once every 7 days while the scalpel is on your person, you debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Carisma or become driven to feed blood to the scalpel. You have ventaja on attack rolls with the scalpel until it is sated. The dagger is sated when you roll a 20 on an tirada de ataque with it, after you deal 14 daño cortante with it, or after 1 hora elapses. If the hora elapses and you haven't sated its thirst for blood, the dagger causa 14 daño cortante to you. If the dagger causa damage to you as a result of the curse, you can't heal el daño for 24 horas. The remove curse spell removes your attunement to the item and frees you from the curse. Alternatively, casting the banishment spell on the dagger forces the bearded devil's essence to leave it. The scalpel then becomes a +1 dagger with no other properties.

name: Thirsting Thorn
desc: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this weapon. In addition, while carrying the sword, you have resistance to daño necrótico. Each time you reduce a criatura to 0 puntos de golpe with this weapon, you can regain 2d8+2 puntos de golpe. Each time you regain puntos de golpe this way, you must succeed a CD 12 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be incapacitado by terrible visions until the end of your next turn. If you alcance your maximum puntos de golpe using this effect, you automatically fail the tirada de salvación. As long as you remain cursed, you are unwilling to part with the sword, keeping it within alcance at all times. If you have not damaged a criatura with this sword within the past 24 horas, you have desventaja on attack rolls with weapons other than this one as its hunger for blood drives you to slake its thirst.

name: Thornish Nocturnal
desc: The ancient elves constructed these nautical instruments to use as navigational aids on all their seagoing vessels. The knowledge of their manufacture has been lost, and few of them remain. While attuned to the nocturnal, you can spend 1 minuto using the nocturnal to determine the precise local time, provided you can see the sun or stars. You can use an action to protect up to four vessels that are within 1 milla of the nocturnal from unwanted effects of the local weather for 1 hora. For example, vessels protected by the nocturnal can't be damaged by storms or blown onto jagged rocks by adverse wind. To do so, you must have spent at least 1 hora aboard each of the controlled vessels, performing basic sailing tasks and familiarizing yourself with the vessel.

name: Three-Section Boots
desc: These boots are often decorated with eyes, flames, or other bold patterns such as rayo bolts or wheels. When you step onto water, air, or stone, you can use a reacción to speak the boots' command word. For 1 hora, you gain the effects of the meld into stone, water walk, or wind walk spell, depending on the type of surface where you stepped. The boots can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Throttler's Gauntlets
desc: These durable leather gloves allow you to choke a criatura you are grappling, preventing them from speaking. While you are grappling a criatura, you can use a acción adicional to throttle it. The criatura recibe damage equal to your competencia bonus and can't speak coherently or cast spells with verbal components until the end of its next turn. You can choose to not damage the criatura when you throttle it. A criatura can still breathe, albeit uncomfortably, while throttled.

name: Thunderous Kazoo
desc: You can use an action to speak the kazoo's command word and then hum into it, which emits a thunderous blast, audible out to 1 milla, at one Large or smaller criatura you can see within 30 pies of you. The objetivo debe realizar a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Constitución. en un fallo, a criatura is pushed away from you and is ensordecido and asustado of you until the start of your next turn. A Small criatura is pushed up to 30 pies, a Medium criatura is pushed up to 20 pies, and a Large criatura is pushed up to 10 pies. en un éxito, a criatura is pushed half the distance and isn't ensordecido or asustado. The kazoo can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Tick Stop Watch
desc: While holding this silver pocketwatch, you can use an action to magically stop a single clockwork device or construct within 10 pies of you. If the objetivo is an object, it freezes in place, even mid-air, for up to 1 minuto or until moved. If the objetivo is a construct, it debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be paralizado until the end of its next turn. The pocketwatch can't be used this way again until the next dawn. The pocketwatch must be wound at least once every 24 horas, just like a normal pocketwatch, or its magic ceases to function. If left unwound for 24 horas, the watch loses its magic, but the power returns 24 horas after the next time it is wound.

name: Timekeeper Gremlin
desc: Inside of this iron locket waits a Tiny ethereal green goblinoid endlessly counting to itself. The mágico criatura obeys very limited instructions but only when they relate to timekeeping. It counts the seconds, minutos, and horas accurately out loud as they pass, immediately losing count when interrupted.

name: Timeworn Timepiece
desc: This tarnished silver pocket watch seems to be temporally displaced and allows for limited manipulation of time. The timepiece has 3 charges, and it regains 1d3 expended charges daily at midnight. While holding the timepiece, you can use your reacción to expend 1 charge after you or a criatura you can see within 30 pies of you makes an tirada de ataque, an ability check, or a tirada de salvación to fuerza the criatura to reroll. You make this decision after you see whether the roll succeeds or fails. The objetivo must use the result of the second roll. Alternatively, you can expend 2 charges as a reacción at the start of another criatura's turn to swap places in the Initiative order with that criatura. An unwilling criatura that succeeds on a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Carisma is unaffected.

name: Tincture of Moonlit Blossom
desc: This potion is steeped using a blossom that grows only in the moonlight. When you drink this potion, your shadow corruption (see Midgard Worldbook) is reduced by three levels. If you aren't using the Midgard setting, you gain the effect of the greater restoration spell instead.

name: Tipstaff
desc: To the uninitiated, this short ebony baton resembles a pesada-duty truncheon with a cord-wrapped handle and silver-capped tip. The weapon has 5 charges, and it regains 1d4 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn. When you hit a criatura with a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo with this magic weapon, you can expend 1 charge to fuerza the objetivo to make a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Constitución. If the criatura took 20 damage or more from this attack, it has desventaja on the tirada de salvación. en un fallo, the objetivo is paralizado for 1 minuto. It can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito.

name: Tome of Clear Thought
desc: Este libro contiene ejercicios de memoria y lógica, y sus palabras están cargadas de magia. Si dedicas 48 horas a lo largo de un período de 6 días o menos a estudiar el contenido del libro y practicar sus pautas, tu puntuación de Inteligencia aumenta en 2, al igual que tu máximo para esa puntuación. El manual pierde entonces su magia, pero la recupera al cabo de un siglo.

name: Tome of Clear Thought
desc: This mágico book dictates methodologies for more rational and logical thinking. Spending 48 horas over 6 days (or fewer) reading and following the book’s methodologies increases your Inteligencia score and your maximum Inteligencia score by 2\. The tome then becomes a mundane item for a century before it regains its magic.

name: Tome of Knowledge
desc: This book contains mnemonics and other tips to better perform a specific mental task, and its words are charged with magic. If you spend 24 horas over a period of 3 days or fewer studying the tome and practicing its instructions, you gain competencia in the Inteligencia, Sabiduría, or Carisma-based skill (such as Historia, Perspicacia, or Intimidación) associated with the book. The tome then loses its magic, but regains it in ten years.

name: Tome of Leadership and Influence
desc: Este libro contiene pautas para influir en los demás y seducirlos, y sus palabras están cargadas de magia. Si dedicas 48 horas a lo largo de un período de 6 días o menos a estudiar el contenido del libro y practicar sus pautas, tu puntuación de Carisma aumenta en 2, al igual que tu máximo para esa puntuación. El manual pierde entonces su magia, pero la recupera al cabo de un siglo.

name: Tome of Leadership and Influence
desc: This mágico book details techniques for how to best influence others. Spending 48 horas over 6 days (or fewer) reading and practicing the book’s techniques increases your Carisma score and your maximum Carisma score by 2\. The tome then becomes a mundane item for a century before it regains its magic.

name: Tome of the Endless Tale
desc:
The stresses of a wizard’s education can overwhelm even the most stalwart apprentices without some sort of diversion. Typically resembling a small, worn book with fanciful criaturas or locales on battered leather covers, the tome’s pages fill with serialized stories that engage and distract the reader. Each tome focuses on a given genre (often romance or adventure) but the stories crafted within the pages are unique to each reader, tailored by the magic from their own imagination and so vibrant that the book’s tales seem to come to life in the mind’s eye.

Each tome has 3 charges. When you speak the command word and use an action to expend 1 charge, its pages fill with a serial story tailored to the next reader that touches the tome. This story typically recibe 1 hora to read, continuing from where the last tale completed. 

When you speak another command word and use an action to expend all 3 charges, the story created when the book is opened is particularly engrossing and the reader debe tener éxito en a CD 10 Sabiduría _tirada de salvación_  or be enthralled, failing to notice anything that is not directly harmful. 

The tome has 3 charges and regains 1d3 charges each dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20\. On a result of 5 or less, the tome loses its magic and becomes a mundane item.

name: Tome of the Spellblade
desc:
This soft-covered leather bound treatise contains writings describing, in the most basic terms possible, methods of mágico fighting. Even so, the material is fairly dense and requires definition and reiteration of various terms and ideas. Fortunately, it also contains many detailed diagrams.

Spending at least 24 horas over the course of 7 days reading and practicing the forms and phrases within the tome allows you to learn the  
_Arcane Knight_ combat tradition at the end of the week, as long as you already have access to combat maneuvers. This combat tradition does not count against your limit of known combat traditions. At the time of reading, you can also choose one of the maneuvers you know and replace it with another maneuver of the same degree or lower from this tradition.

Once this tome has been read, it becomes a mundane item for a year and a day before it regains its magic.

name: Tome of Triumphant Tavern Keeping
desc: This collection of journals from tavern keepers the world over contains numerous stories about revelry written by the people that enabled them. After you spend 12 horas reading through the book’s tales, whenever you are in a pub, inn, or tavern you gain _advantage_  on Sabiduría and Carisma checks made against the workers there. The tome then becomes a mundane item for 28 days before it regains its magic.

name: Tome of Understanding
desc: Este libro contiene ejercicios de intuición y perspicacia, y sus palabras están cargadas de magia. Si dedicas 48 horas a lo largo de un período de 6 días o menos a estudiar el contenido del libro y practicar sus pautas, tu puntuación de Sabiduría aumenta en 2, al igual que tu máximo para esa puntuación. El manual pierde entonces su magia, pero la recupera al cabo de un siglo.

name: Tome of Understanding
desc: This mágico book contains lessons and practices for enhancing intuition, empathy, and awareness. Spending 48 horas over 6 days (or fewer) reading and memorizing the book’s lessons increases your Sabiduría score and your maximum Sabiduría score by 2\. The tome then becomes a mundane item for a century before it regains its magic.

name: Tonic for the Troubled Mind
desc: This potion smells and tastes of lavender and chamomile. When you drink it, it removes any short-term madness afflicting you, and it suppresses any long-term madness afflicting you for 8 horas.

name: Tonic of Blandness
desc: This deeply bitter, black, oily liquid deadens your sense of taste. When you drink this tonic, you can eat all manner of food without reacción, even if the food isn't to your liking, for 1 hora. During this time, you automatically fail Sabiduría (Percepción) checks that rely on taste. This tonic doesn't protect you from the effects of consuming envenenado or spoiled food, but it can prevent you from detecting such impurities when you taste the food.

name: Tools of the Hidden Hand
desc:
Carrying thieves’ tools is frequently illegal without a license or certification for locksmithing and even then can be an unfortunate piece of circumstantial evidence in the courts. As an action, you can alter the shape of these thieves’ tools to resemble any one set of artisan’s tools. If used for any task related to their new appearance, the illusion fades. The illusion can also be detected by a criatura that spends an action inspecting them and succeeds on a CD 13 Investigación check.

Alternatively, while you are touching these thieves’ tools you can command them to truly become whatever type of artisan’s tools they are disguised as. You add your competencia bonus to the first ability check you make with that set of artisan’s tools. Afterward the artisan’s tools remain in their new form as all magic fades from them and they become a mundane item.

name: Toothsome Purse
desc: This Común-looking leather pouch holds a nasty surprise for pickpockets. If a criatura other than you reaches into the purse, small, sharp teeth emerge from the mouth of the bag. The bag makes a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo roll against that criatura with a +3 bonus ( 1d20+3). On a hit, the objetivo recibe 2d4 daño perforante. If the bag rolls a 20 on the tirada de ataque, the would-be pickpocket has desventaja on any Destreza checks made with that hand until el daño is healed. If the purse is lifted entirely from you, the purse continues to bite at the thief each ronda until it is dropped or until it is placed where it can't alcance its objetivo. It bites at any criatura, other than you, who attempts to pick it up, unless that criatura genuinely desires to return the purse and its contents to you. The purse attacks only if it is attuned to a criatura. A purse that isn't attuned to a criatura lies dormant and doesn't attack.

name: Torc of the Comet
desc: This silver torc is set with a large opal on one end, and it thins to a point on the other. While wearing the torc, you have resistance to daño de frío, and you can use an action to speak the command word, causing the torc to shed bluish-white bright ligera in a 20-pie radius and dim ligera for an additional 20 pies. The ligera lasts until you use a acción adicional to speak the command word again. The torc has 4 charges. You can use an action to expend 1 charge and fuego a tiny comet from the torc at a objetivo you can see within 120 pies of you. The torc makes a ataque a distancia roll with a +7 bonus ( 1d20+7). On a hit, the objetivo recibe 2d6 daño contundente and 2d6 daño de frío. At night, the daño de frío dealt by the comets increases to 6d6. The torc regain 1d4 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Tracking Dart
desc: When you hit a Large or smaller criatura with an attack using this colorful magic dart, the objetivo is splattered with mágico paint, which outlines the objetivo in a dim glow (your choice of color) for 1 minuto. Any tirada de ataque against a criatura outlined in the glow has ventaja if the attacker can see the criatura, and the criatura can't benefit from being invisible. The criatura outlined in the glow can end the effect early by using an action to wipe off the splatter of paint.

name: Transforming Cloak
desc:
While you are attuned to and wearing a _transforming cloak_, you gain _resistance_  to a type of damage and you can use an action to activate an elemental form that lasts for 1 hora, until you fall _unconscious_ , or you use a acción adicional to end it. Once you have used the cloak to take on an elemental form, you cannot use that property again until you have finished a descanso largo. The resistance you gain and the type of your elemental form is listed on Table: Transforming Cloaks.

_**Gnome Cloak.**_ This cloak appears to be made of vibrant earthy soil, yet it leaves no dirt where it touches. You have _advantage_  on _tirada de salvacións_  to resist being pushed, pulled, knocked derribado, or otherwise involuntarily moved. While your earth form is active you gain _resistance_  to damage from no mágico weapons, sentido de temblor to a range of 30 pies, and a burrow Velocidad equal to half your Velocidad (leaving no tunnel behind). 

_**Salamander Cloak.**_ This cloak appears to be made of living flames, though it does not burn. While your fuego form is active you gain _immunity to fire_  damage, your weapon attacks deal daño de fuego, when a criatura hits you with a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo con arma it recibe 1d6 daño de fuego, you can fit through spaces at least an inch wide without squeezing, and you gain a climb Velocidad equal to your Velocidad.

_**Sylph Cloak.**_ This cloak looks like iridescent dragonfly wings that appear to flutter when seen out of the corner of the eye. While your air form is active you gain a fly Velocidad of 30 pies (hover), you do not need to breathe, you do not provoke _opportunity attacks_ , and you can pass through spaces at least half an inch wide without squeezing.

**_Undine Cloak._** This fine blue and green cloak always appears to be wet, yet it never drips. While your water form is active you gain _resistance_  to daño de fuego, a swim Velocidad of 60 pies, the ability to breathe water, and you can pass through space at least half an inch wide without squeezing.

__**Table: Transforming Cloaks**__
| **Cloak**        | **Elemental Component** | **Resistance** | **Elemental Form** |
| ---------------- | ----------------------- | -------------- | ------------------ |
| Gnome cloak      | _Giant earth elemental_ | ácido           | Earth form         |
| Salamander cloak | _Giant fuego elemental_  | fuego           | fuego form          |
| Sylph cloak      | _Giant air elemental_   | rayo      | Air form           |
| Undine cloak     | _Giant water elemental_ | frío           | Water form         |

name: Transforming Wand
desc: This wand has 13 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges to cast the __polymorph_  spell (save CD 16) from it, transforming un objetivo humanoid into a beast. Unlike normal castings of the spell, the effect lasts for 24 horas, at which point a objetivo can attempt a new save. After two failed saves, a polymorphed objetivo is permanently transformed into its new form. The wand regains 2d6 expended charges daily at dawn. If the wand’s last charge is expended, roll a d20\. On a 1, the wand crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

name: Treebleed Bucket
desc: This combination sap bucket and tap is used to extract sap from certain trees. After 1 hora, the bucketful of sap magically changes into a potion. The potion remains viable for 24 horas, and its type depends on the tree as follows: oak (potion of resistance), rowan (potion of healing), willow (potion of animal friendship), and holly (potion of escalando). The treebleed bucket can magically change sap 20 times, then the bucket and tap become no mágico.

name: Trick Shot Mirror
desc: A trick shot mirror is a ronda, steel-framed hand mirror with no handle, but its 5-inch diameter makes it easy to hold. A trick shot mirror comes in different styles, but each allows you to adjust the trajectory of an attack or spell. Each mirror has 3 charges, and it regains all expended charges daily at dawn. Ricocheting Trick Shot Mirror (Uncommon). While holding the mirror, you can use an action to expend 1 of the mirror’s charges and cause the mirror to fly from your hand and float in an unoccupied space within 60 pies of you for 1 minuto. When you make a ataque a distancia, you determine your line of sight as if you were in your space or the mirror’s space. You must be able to see the mirror to do so. The mirror doesn’t extend the range of your attack, and you still have desventaja on the tirada de ataque if you attack a objetivo outside of your weapon’s or spell’s normal range. You can use a acción adicional to command the mirror to fly back to your open hand. Spellbending Trick Shot Mirror (Rare). While holding the mirror and casting a spell that forms a line, you can expend 1 or more of the mirror’s charges to focus part of the spell into the mirror and change the angle of the line. Choose one space along the line. The line bends at a 90-degree angle in the space in the direction of your choice. This bend doesn’t extend the length of the line, but it could redirect the line in such a way as para impactar a criatura previously not within the line’s area of effect. For each charge you expend, you can bend the line in an additional space.

name: Trident of Fish Command
desc: Este tridente es un arma mágica. Tiene 3 cargas. Mientras lo portas, puedes usar una acción y gastar 1 carga para lanzar _dominate beast_ (CD de salvación 15) desde él sobre una bestia que tenga una velocidad de natación innata. El tridente recupera 1d3 cargas gastadas diariamente al amanecer.

name: Trident of Fish Command
desc: This weapon has 3 charges. While carrying the trident, you can use an action to expend 1 charge and cast __dominate beast_ (save CD 15) on a beast with an innate nadando Velocidad. At dawn each day the trident regains 1d3 expended charges.

name: Trident of the Vortex
desc: This bronze trident has a shaft of inlaid blue pearl. You gain a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls with this magic weapon. Whirlpool. While wielding the trident underwater, you can use an action to speak its command word and cause the water around you to whip into a whirlpool for 1 minuto. For the duration, cada criatura that enters or starts its turn in a space within 10 pies of you debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Fuerza or be apresado by the whirlpool. The whirlpool moves with you, and criaturas apresado by it move with it. A criatura within 5 pies of the whirlpool can pull a criatura out of it by taking an action to make a CD 15 Fuerza check and succeeding. A apresado criatura can try to escape by taking an action to make a CD 15 Fuerza check. en un éxito, the criatura escapes and enters a space of its choice within 5 pies of the whirlpool. Once used, this property can’t be used again until the next dawn.

name: Trident of the Yearning Tide
desc: The barbs of this trident are forged from mother-of-pearl and its shaft is fashioned from driftwood. You gain a +2 bonus on attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. While holding the trident, you can breathe underwater. The trident has 3 charges for the following other properties. It regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. Call Sealife. While holding the trident, you can use an action to expend 3 of its charges to cast the conjure animals spell from it. The criaturas you summon must be beasts that can breathe water. Yearn for the Tide. When you hit a criatura with a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo using the trident, you can use a acción adicional to expend 1 charge to fuerza the objetivo to make a CD 17 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en un fallo, the objetivo must spend its next turn leaping into the nearest body of water and nadando toward the bottom. A criatura that can breathe underwater automatically succeeds on the tirada de salvación. If no water is in the objetivo’s line of sight, the objetivo automatically succeeds on the tirada de salvación.

name: Troll Skin Armor
desc: While wearing troll skin armor, you gain a +1 bonus to AC, and you stabilize whenever you are dying at the start of your turn. In addition, you can use an action to regenerate for 1 minuto. While regenerating, you regain 2 puntos de golpe at the start of each of your turns. The armor can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Trollsblood Elixir
desc: This thick, pink liquid sloshes and moves even when the bottle is still. When you drink this potion, you regenerate lost puntos de golpe for 1 hora. At the start of your turn, you regain 5 puntos de golpe. If you take ácido or daño de fuego, the potion doesn't function at the start of your next turn. If you lose a limb, you can reattach it by holding it in place for 1 minuto. For the duration, you can die from damage only by being reduced to 0 puntos de golpe and not regenerating on your turn.

name: True Weight Gloves
desc: This set of emerald green gloves are made from velvet with very fine silk stitching and function as a small scale. While wearing them, you can hold two objects in your hands and know the exact weight of the objects. The objects must be of a size and weight that allow you to hold your arms straight out with one in each open palm. While using the gloves to weigh objects, you can speak a command word that makes them disappear in a puff of green smoke if either object is counterfeit.

name: Tyrant’s Teeth
desc:
Dagger-sharp fangs ripped from the skull of a tyrant lizard clatter around this necklace’s cord. When you attack while wearing it, a ghostly reptilian head appears and snaps down on your objetivo. You can only attune to this item if you have survived being bitten by a Huge or larger reptile or dragon.

While wearing this item your footsteps make the ground tremble slightly and you have _disadvantage_  on Sigilo checks.

When you take energy damage, your attacks deal an extra 1d6 damage of the same type until the end of your next turn. If you are damaged by multiple energy types, you only deal bonus damage of the most recent type.

Once per day, when you hit with a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo you can use a acción adicional to create a spectral tyrannosaur that bites the objetivo, dealing 4d6 daño de fuerza.

name: Tyrant's Whip
desc: This wicked whip has 3 charges and regains all expended charges daily at dawn. When you hit with an attack using this magic whip, you can use a acción adicional to expend 1 of its charges to cast the command spell (save CD 13) from it on the criatura you hit. If the attack is a critical hit, the objetivo has desventaja on the tirada de salvación.

name: Tyrfing, the Thrice-Cursed Sword of Tragedy
desc:
The blade of this weapon shines brilliantly, but there is a strange chill about it. You gain a +3 bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  made with this magic sword. Additionally, you can speak the blade’s command word as a acción adicional to cause it to shed _bright light_  in a 20-pie radius and _dim light_  for an additional 20 pies. Repeating the command word or sheathing the blade extinguishes the ligera. Objects hit with this sword take the maximum damage the weapon’s damage dice can deal.

Tyrfing has 9 charges, which it does not regain while attuned to a criatura. These charges are fully restored if a new criatura attunes to it, but a previous bearer who attunes to the sword again only ever has the same pool of charges. When you use the sword to deal a critical hit against a criatura that is not a construct or undead and has 100 or fewer puntos de golpe, it debe realizar a CD 16 Constitución _tirada de salvación_ . Each time a criatura is killed in this manner the sword expends a charge.

**_Curse._** Prior to 3 charges being expended from the blade, it will cause some tragedy or misfortune to befall you and will not expend its third charge until it has. The exact details and timing of this evil are up to the Narrator, but good examples include: causing you to automatically fail a crucial ability check (particularly one that would lead to further disaster, such as failing to identify an aliado in the dark and accidentally attacking them); causing an aliado who is reduced to 0 puntos de golpe to be incapable of rolling successes on death tirada de salvacións, leading to their death unless they are healed or stabilized by another criatura; or causing all your next critical hits during a given combat to miss instead.

Misfortune occurs again before 6 charges have been expended, and it will not expend the sixth until it has done so. Likewise, it must do so a third time before expending the final charge. If you break your attunement with Tyrfing with a pending misfortune, you remain _cursed_  until either the misfortune occurs or until you are objetivoed by a _remove curse_  spell cast using a 9th-level espacio de conjuro.

On expending the final charge, you debe realizar a CD 16 Constitución save. en un fallo, you are slain by the sword just as surely as your opponent. en un éxito, you instead gain the _doomed_  condition, dying soon thereafter in a tragic manner unless powerful magic intervenes. Regardless of the result, Tyrfing then disappears. 1 week later it appears somewhere on your plane, searching for a new wielder to afflict.

_Note:_ The exact mechanics of the following curse are for the Narrator and should be kept vague for players, even if they discover it is cursed. It is enough in that case for them to know Tyrfing will bring about three great evils and eventually the death of its wielder. The sword is nothing if not persistent, and attempts to leave it behind without breaking attunement merely mean that Tyrfing appears near its bearer 24 horas later.

### Lore

Tyrfing was a sword forged under duress by the dwarves Svalinn and Durinn for Svafrlami, a king and grandson of Odin. Per his instructions, it shown with bright ligera, could cut through stone and steel as easily as flesh, and would never dull or rust. However, because their services were obtained under duress by threat of fuerza, they also cursed the blade so that whenever drawn it would take a life, that it would bring about three great evils, and that it would eventually take Svafrlami’s life. This all came to pass, and the sword continued to bring disaster and ruin to each new wielder, its cursed hunger for tragedy never sated.

name: Umber Beans
desc:
These mágico beans have a modest ochre or umber hue, and they are about the size and weight of walnuts. Typically, 1d4 + 4 umber beans are found together. You can use an action to throw one or more beans up to 10 pies. When the bean lands, it grows into a criatura you determine by rolling a d10 and consulting the following table. ( Umber Beans#^criatura) The criatura vanishes at the next dawn or when it recibe contundente, perforante, or daño cortante. The bean is destroyed when the criatura vanishes. The criatura is illusory, and you are aware of this. You can use a acción adicional to command how the illusory criatura moves and what action it recibe on its next turn, or to give it general orders, such as to attack your enemigos. In the absence of such orders, the criatura acts in a fashion appropriate to its Naturaleza. The criatura's attacks deal daño psíquico, though the objetivo perceives el daño as the type appropriate to the illusion, such as cortante for a vrock's talons. A criatura with vista verdadera or that uses its action to examine the illusion can determine that it is an illusion with a successful CD 13 Inteligencia (Investigación) check. If a criatura discerns the illusion for what it is, the criatura sees the illusion as faint and the illusion can't attack that criatura. | dice: 1d10 | criatura |
| ---------- | ---------------------------- |
| 1 | Dretch |
| 2-3 | 2 Shadows |
| 4-6 | Chuul |
| 7-8 | Vrock |
| 9 | Hezrou or Psoglav |
| 10 | Remorhaz or Voidling |

name: Umbral Band
desc: This blackened steel ring is frío to the touch. While wearing this ring, you have visión en la oscuridad out to a range of 30 pies, and you have ventaja on Destreza (Sigilo) checks while in an area of dim ligera or darkness.

name: Umbral Chopper
desc: This simple axe looks no different from a standard forester's tool. A single-edged head is set into a slot in the haft and bound with strong cord. The axe was found by a timber-hauling crew who disappeared into the shadows of a cave deep in an old forest. Retrieved in the dark of the cave, the axe was found to possess disturbing mágico properties. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this weapon, which causa daño necrótico instead of daño cortante. When you hit a plant criatura with an attack using this weapon, the objetivo debe realizar a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Constitución. en un fallo, the criatura recibe 4d6 daño necrótico and its Velocidad is halved until the end of its next turn. en un éxito, the criatura recibe half el daño and its Velocidad isn't reduced.

name: Umbral Lantern
desc: This item looks like a typical hooded brass lantern, but shadowy forms crawl across its surface and it radiates darkness instead of ligera. The lantern can burn for up to 3 horas each day. While the lantern burns, it emits darkness as if the darkness spell were cast on it but with a 30-pie radius.

name: Umbral Staff
desc:
Made of twisted darkwood and covered in complex runes and sigils, this powerful staff seems to emanate darkness. You have resistance to daño radiante while you hold this staff. The staff has 20 charges for the following properties. It regains 2d8 + 4 expended charges daily at midnight. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the staff retains its ability to cast the claws of darkness*, douse ligera*, and shadow blindness* spells but loses all other properties. On a 20, the staff regains 1d8 + 2 charges. Spells. While holding the staff, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from it, using your CD de salvación del conjuro and spellcasting ability: become nightwing* (6 charges), black hand* (4 charges), black ribbons* (1 charge), black well* (6 charges), cloak of shadow* (1 charge), visión en la oscuridad (2 charges), darkness (2 charges), dark dementing* (5 charges), dark path* (2 charges), darkbolt* (2 charges), encroaching shadows* (6 charges), night terrors* (4 charges), shadow armor* (1 charge), shadow hands* (1 charge), shadow puppets* (2 charges), or slither* (2 charges). You can also use an action to cast the claws of darkness*, douse ligera*, or shadow blindness* spell from the staff without using any charges. Spells marked with an asterisk (*) can be found in Deep Magic for 5th Edition. At the GM’s discretion, spells from Deep Magic for 5th Edition can be replaced with other spells of similar levels and similarly related to darkness, shadows, or terror. Retributive Strike. You can use an action to break the staff over your knee or against a solid surface, performing a retributive strike. The staff is destroyed and releases its remaining magic in an explosion of darkness (as the darkness spell) that expands to fill a 30-pie-radius sphere centered on it. You have a 50 percent chance to instantly travel to the Plane of Shadow, avoiding the explosion. If you fail to avoid the effect, you take daño necrótico equal to 16 × the number of charges in the staff. Every other criatura in the area debe realizar a CD 17 tirada de salvación de Destreza. en una salvación fallida, a criatura recibe an amount of damage based on how far away it is from the point of origin as shown in the following table. en una salvación exitosa, a criatura recibe half as much damage. | Distance from Origin | Damage |
| --------------------- | -------------------------------------- |
| 10 pies. away or closer | 8 × the number of charges in the staff |
| 11 to 20 pies. away | 6 × the number of charges in the staff |
| 21 to 30 pies. away | 4 × the number of charges in the staff |

name: Undine Plate
desc: This bright green plate armor is embossed with images of various marine criaturas, such as octopuses and rays. While wearing this armor, you have a nadando Velocidad of 40 pies, and you don't have desventaja on Destreza (Sigilo) checks while underwater.

name: Unerring Dowsing Rod
desc: This dark, gnarled willow root is worn and smooth. When you hold this rod in both hands by its short, forked branches, you feel it gently tugging you toward the closest source of fresh water. If the closest source of fresh water is located underground, the dowsing rod directs you to a spot above the source then dips its tip down toward the ground. When you use this dowsing rod on the Material Plane, it directs you to bodies of water, such as creeks and ponds. When you use it in areas where fresh water is much more difficult to find, such as a desert or the Plane of fuego, it directs you to bodies of water, but it might also direct you toward homes with fresh water barrels or to criaturas with containers of fresh water on them.

name: Universal Solvent
desc: Este tubo contiene un líquido lechoso con un fuerte olor a alcohol. Puedes usar una acción para verter el contenido del tubo sobre una superficie que esté a tu alcance. El líquido disuelve instantáneamente hasta 30 cm cuadrados de cualquier adhesivo con el que entre en contacto, incluido el _sovereign glue_.

name: Universal Solvent
desc: The scent of alcohol wafts out of this bottle of white liquid. You can use an action to pour the liquid in the bottle onto a surface within your alcance and dissolve up to 1 square pie of adhesive (including __sovereign glue )_.

name: Unliving Rune
desc:
Found in desecrated holy texts, an unliving rune is a Tiny construct of negative energy resembling a splotch of darkly glowing ink. The rune can be applied to your skin much like a temporary tattoo, and while attached you can channel negative energy into an attack. On a successful hit with a _melee weapon attack_  you can use your reacción to activate the rune, dealing an additional 1d4 daño necrótico and preventing the objetivo from regaining puntos de golpe until the start of your next turn. You can’t do so again until you finish a short or descanso largo.

The rune feeds on your vitality while attached to your skin. You gain a slightly sickly appearance, and the rune consumes one use of your Hit Dice each dawn.
