During a _short rest_ , you can peel the rune off your skin, taking 1d6 daño necrótico. The rune can be stored in a book instead of your skin but offers no benefit unless attached to you. When exposed to direct sunlight for a minuto or more, the rune is destroyed.

As an action you can place the rune on a humanoid corpse that has died within the last 8 horas. The rune is destroyed as its magic is absorbed by the corpse, animating it as a _zombie_ . When placing the rune, you can feed it a portion of your life fuerza by spending puntos de golpe. The zombie obeys your spoken commands and is friendly to you and your companions for 1 ronda per punto de golpe you spent when placing the rune. At the end of this duration it becomes hostile to all living criaturas.

**_Curse._** The unliving rune is _cursed_  and while it is attached to you any senses or divinations that can detect undead incorrectly detect you as undead. If you die while the rune is attached to you, you are reanimated as a _zombie_  after 1d4 rondas.

name: Unparalleled Pianoforte
desc:
This elegant pianoforte has been painted white, with gold filigree adorning its lid and the tops of its keys. Originally commissioned by a noble with particularly musically incompetent children, those instrument. It allows you to add an _expertise die_  to your attempt to play it; this die increases by one step if you have competencia with Interpretación.

If you succeed at a CD 17 Interpretación check, you may choose up to six criaturas within 30 pies that can hear the pianoforte. For the next hora, these criaturas have a d8 Inspiration die which can be spent on any one _attack roll_ , _ability check_ , or _tirada de salvación_ .

name: Unquiet Dagger
desc: Forged by criaturas with firsthand knowledge of what lies between the stars, this dark gray blade sometimes appears to twitch or ripple like water when not directly observed. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls with this magic weapon. In addition, when you hit with an attack using this dagger, the objetivo recibe an extra 2d6 daño psíquico. You can use an action to cause the blade to ripple for 1 minuto. While the blade is rippling, cada criatura that recibe daño psíquico from the dagger debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Carisma or become asustado of you for 1 minuto. A asustado criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito. The dagger can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Unseelie Staff
desc: This ebony staff is decorated in silver and topped with a jagged piece of obsidian. This staff can be wielded as a magic quarterstaff. While holding the staff, you have ventaja on Carisma checks made to influence or interact socially with fey criaturas. The staff has 10 charges for the following properties. The staff regains 1d6 + 4 charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the staff dissolves into a shower of powdery snow, which blows away in a sudden, chill wind. Rebuke Fey. When you hit a fey criatura with a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo using the staff, you can expend 1 charge to deal an extra 2d6 daño necrótico to the objetivo. If the fey has a good alignment, the extra damage increases to 4d6, and the objetivo debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be asustado of you until the start of your next turn. Spells. While holding this staff, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast one of the following spells from it, using your CD de salvación del conjuro and spellcasting ability: charm person (1 charge), conjure woodland beings (4 charges), confusion (4 charges), invisibility (2 charges), or teleport (7 charges). You can also use an action to cast the vicious mockery truco from the staff without using any charges.

name: Unstable Bombard
desc: These brass and crystal cylinders are 6 inches long with 1-inch diameters. Each cylinder has a funnel on one end and a wooden plunger on the other end. You can use an action to quickly press the plunger, expelling the cylinder’s contents out through the funnel in a 30-pie line that is 5 pies wide. Once its contents are expelled, a cylinder is destroyed, and there is a 25 percent chance you are also subjected to the bombard’s effects as if you were caught in the line. Mindshatter Bombard (Rare). A vermilion solution sloshes and boils inside this canister. cada criatura in the line of this substance debe realizar a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría. en un fallo, a criatura recibe 3d6 daño psíquico and is incapacitado for 1 minuto. en un éxito, a criatura recibe half el daño and isn’t incapacitado. An incapacitado criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito. Murderous Bombard (Uncommon). A gruesome crimson slurry sloshes inside this canister with strange bits of ivory floating in it. cada criatura in the line of this substance debe tener éxito en a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be overcome with rage for 1 minuto. While overcome with rage, the criatura can’t distinguish friend from foe and must attack the nearest criatura. If no other criatura is near enough to move to and attack, the criatura stalks off in a random direction, seeking a objetivo for its rage. A criatura overcome with rage can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito. Sloughide Bombard (Very Rare). A clear, gelatinous substance fills this canister. cada criatura in the line of this substance debe realizar a CD 17 tirada de salvación de Constitución. en un fallo, a criatura recibe 6d6 daño de ácido and is paralizado for 1 minuto. en un éxito, a criatura recibe half el daño and isn’t paralizado. While paralizado, the criatura recibe 2d6 daño de ácido at the start of each of its turns. A paralizado criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito.

name: Useful Top Hat
desc:
This stylish and sturdy top hat conceals a useful feature: a small pocket dimension. You may store up to 50 pounds worth of items in the extradimensional space. Retrieving an item stowed this way requires a acción adicional (to remove the hat) and an action (to retrieve the item). If you have never interacted with a specific useful top hat before, the first time you use it, it requires 1d4 rondas to take stock of its contents before anything can be retrieved from the bag.

As with all extra-dimensional storage, food or drink placed inside immediately and permanently loses its nourishing qualities, and a body placed in it cannot be restored to life by __resurrection , revivify ,_ or similar magic. Living criaturas cannot be placed in the space and are merely stowed as though in a mundane top hat if it is attempted. The pocket dimension cannot be accessed until the criatura is removed. The hat cannot hold any item that would not fit in a normal hat of its apparent size or any item with the Bulky quality. If the hat is punctured, torn, or otherwise structurally damaged, it ruptures and is destroyed, and the contents are scattered throughout the Astral Plane.

Placing a useful top hat inside another extradimensional storage device such as a bag of holding results in planar rift that destroys both items and pulls everything within 10 pies into the Astral Plane. The rift then closes and disappears.

name: Valkyrie's Bite
desc: This black-bladed scimitar has a guard that resembles outstretched raven wings, and a polished amethyst sits in its pommel. You have a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. While attuned to the scimitar, you have ventaja on initiative rolls. While you hold the scimitar, it sheds dim purple ligera in a 10-pie radius.

name: Veil of Fate
desc:
Few powers are more coveted than the ability to examine and manipulate the threads of fate, and yet destiny is a mystery that most have yet to fully comprehend. As enigmatic as the forces it commands, the origins of the Veil of Fate are unknown. It was brought to historical attention when it was revealed as the source of a renowned seer’s remarkable abilities, her foretellings reached the ears of queens and generals, shaping a continent and undoubtedly the whole of Historia. Fearful of her influence and envious of the veil’s power, those outside of her circle of influence conspired to behead her and take the relic. The subsequent fighting and intrigue saw the Veil of Fate become lost for centuries, occasionally appearing in tales as fantastic as they were inscrutable. While this tale is the best known, records of the Veil of Fate’s existence can be traced to the beginnings of written Historia, its bearers painted as either titans of achievement or dire warnings to be heeded by the wise.

The Veil of Fate is a diaphanous silver and gray cloth attached to a thin silvery band which is worn on the bearer’s head. When worn correctly, it falls to the floor around its bearer, covering them entirely in a faint silver shimmer. It is unknown whether or not this appearance is due purely to the physical Naturaleza of the veil or its powers taking the bearer slightly beyond the bounds of reality.

**Legends and Lore** Success on an Arcanos or Historia check reveals the following:

**CD 15** This is the _Veil of Fate_, which allows the wearer to see the very strands of destiny. 

**CD 18** The veil grants glimpses into the future.

**CD 21** Many who have donned the veil are immediately struck by disturbingly accurate premonitions of the future.

**Artifact Properties**

The _Veil of Fate_ has one lesser artifact benefit, one greater artifact benefit, and one greater artifact detriment. 

When you are wearing and attuned to the veil, criaturas have _disadvantage_  on _opportunity attacks_  against you as the combination of your enhanced foresight and diaphanous appearance bamboozles your foes.

The glimpses of the future granted by the _Veil of Fate_ are not always advantageous. You are always last in the initiative order as you are overwhelmed with insights into the events that are about to unfold, though you may choose to use your foretelling roll (see Control Fate below) for all of your initiative checks for the day.

In addition, you can impart some of the veil’s power by falling into a deep meditation for 8 horas. When your meditation is concluded, your touch bestows one of the benefits of the _Veil of Fate_ onto an allied criatura, and you suffer a level of _fatigue_  from the effort.

**Foretelling**

At the Narrator’s discretion, when you first attune to the Veil of Fate you are granted a detailed premonition of future events, presenting the opportunity to intertwine those threads of fate with your own. You can perfectly recall the premonition for a number of days equal to your Inteligencia modifier (minimum 1 day), after which the memory is gone as if you never experienced it. Anything you write down or otherwise record about the premonition during this time is all that remains. Another criatura may be given a different premonition or no premonition upon attuning to the veil. You can occasionally recall key details of the premonition at important crossroads in the future before the depicted events occur, and otherwise receive guidance from the premonition long after you’ve forgotten it.

**Choose Your Destiny**

While attuned to the Veil of Fate you are keenly aware of your own destiny. 

When you spend 8 horas meditating on your destiny and life’s purpose, you can see some of the steps you must take to change it. This meditation brings on a profound change, and when it is concluded you may choose a new _Destiny_ .

**Control Fate**

When you finish a descanso largo, you are bolstered by a strange sense of how to get the most out of your interactions and endeavours, gaining inspiration.

In addition, after completing a descanso largo you roll a d20\. This is your foretelling roll. When you or a criatura you can see within 30 pies makes an ability check, _attack roll_ , or _tirada de salvación_ , you may choose to replace the d20 roll with your foretelling roll. You may choose to use this property after seeing the initial roll, but before any of the roll’s effects occur. Once you have used this property, you cannot do so again until finishing a descanso largo.

**Magic**

You may cast _augury_  at will while attuned to and wearing the _Veil of Fate_.

Twice per _long rest_  you can cast one of the following spells without consuming material components or expending a espacio de conjuro: _arcane eye , clairvoyance , commune , divination_ .

Roll a d20 after each _long rest_ . On an 18 or above, you gain the benefits of the __foresight_ spell.

name: Vekeshi Blade
desc: Composed of fuego that has been kindled for five centuries since the death of Srasama, this weapon is pledged to defeat the Infernal tieflings. You gain a +2 mágico bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  made with this longsword. While wielding this longsword, you have _resistance_  to fuego. On a successful hit against a Celestial, elemental, fey, or fiend, this weapon causa an extra 2d6 damage. In addition, you can use an action to reshape this weapon into any other melee weapon that does not have the pesada property.

name: Vengeful Coat
desc: This stiff, vaguely uncomfortable coat covers your torso. It smells like ash and oozes a sap-like substance. While wearing this coat, you have resistance to daño cortante from ataques no mágicos. At the end of each descanso largo, choose one of the following damage types: ácido, frío, fuego, rayo, or trueno. When you take damage of that type, you have ventaja on attack rolls until the end of your next turn. When you take more than 10 damage of that type, you have ventaja on your attack rolls for 2 rondas. When you are objetivoed by an effect that causa damage of the type you chose, you can use your reacción to gain resistance to that damage until the start of your next turn. You have ventaja on your attack rolls, as detailed above, then the coat's magic ceases to function until you finish a descanso largo.

name: Venomous Fangs
desc: These prosthetic fangs can be positioned over your existing teeth or in place of missing teeth. While wearing these fangs, your bite is a natural melee weapon, which you can use to make unarmed strikes. When you hit with it, your bite causa daño perforante equal to 1d4 + your Fuerza modifier, instead of the daño contundente normal for an unarmed strike. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic bite. While you wear the fangs, a successful CD 9 Destreza (Juego de Manos) checks conceals them from view. At the GM's discretion, you have desventaja on Carisma (Engaño) or Carisma (Persuasión) checks against criaturas that notice the fangs.

name: Verdant Elixir
desc: Multi-colored streaks of ligera occasionally flash through the clear liquid in this container, like bottled rayo. As an action, you can pour the contents of the vial onto the ground. All normal plants in a 100-pie radius centered on the point where you poured the vial become thick and overgrown. A criatura moving through the area must spend 4 pies of movement for every 1 pie it moves. Alternatively, you can apply the contents of the vial to a plant criatura within 5 pies of you. For 1 hora, the objetivo gains 2d10 temporary puntos de golpe, and it gains the “enlarge” effect of the enlarge/reduce spell (no Concentración required).

name: Verdant Fang
desc:
You can attune to this item only if you’re in the good graces of the green dragon who granted it to you. You attune to the fang by pressing it into your mouth, whereupon it replaces one of your canine teeth. While attuned to the fang, you can speak and understand Dracónico, and you can use an action to breathe a 15-pie cone of veneno gas. criaturas in the area debe realizar a CD 12 Constitución _tirada de salvación_ , taking 4d6 daño de veneno en una salvación fallida or half el daño en un éxito. You can’t use this property again until you finish a _long rest_ .

As an action, you can bite down on the fang, destroying it. Doing so sends a mental distress signal to the dragon who granted you the fang; the dragon immediately learns where you are and will come to your aid.

name: Verminous Snipsnaps
desc: This stoppered jar holds small animated knives and scissors. The jar weighs 1 pound, and its command word is often written on the jar's label. You can use an action to remove the stopper, which releases the spinning blades into a space you can see within 30 pies of you. The knives and scissors fill a cube 10 pies on each side and whirl in place, flaying criaturas and objects that enter the cube. When a criatura enters the cube for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, it recibe 2d12 daño perforante. You can use a acción adicional to speak the command word, returning the blades to the jar. Otherwise, the knives and scissors remain in that space indefinitely.

name: Verses of Vengeance
desc: This massive, holy tome is bound in brass with a handle on the back cover. A steel chain dangles from the sturdy metal cover, allowing you to hang the tome from your belt or hook it to your armor. A locked clasp holds the tome closed, securing its contents. You gain a +1 bonus to AC while you wield this tome as a shield. This bonus is in addition to the shield's normal bonus to AC. Alternatively, you can make melee weapon attacks with the tome as if it was a club. If you make an attack using use the tome as a weapon, you lose the shield's bonus to your AC until the start of your next turn.

name: Vessel of Deadly Venoms
desc: This small jug weighs 5 pounds and has a ceramic snake coiled around it. You can use an action to speak a command word to cause the vessel to produce veneno, which pours from the snake's mouth. A veneno created by the vessel must be used within 1 hora or it becomes inert. The word “blade” causes the snake to produce 1 dose of serpent venom, enough to coat a single weapon. The word “consume” causes the snake to produce 1 dose of assassin's blood, an ingested veneno. The word “spit” causes the snake to spray a stream of veneno at a criatura you can see within 30 pies. The objetivo debe realizar a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Constitución. en un fallo, the objetivo recibe 2d8 daño de veneno and is envenenado until the end of its next turn. en un éxito, the objetivo recibe half el daño and isn't envenenado. Once used, the vessel can't be used to create veneno again until the next dawn.

name: Vestments of the Bleak Shinobi
desc: This padded black armor is fashioned in the furtive style of shinobi shōzoku garb. You have ventaja on Destreza (Sigilo) checks while you wear this armor. Darkness. While wearing this armor, you can use an action to cast the darkness spell from it with a range of 30 pies. Once used, this property can’t be used again until the next dawn.

name: Vial of Beauty
desc: After spending 1 minuto applying this pale lavender lotion to your skin, you can change one small detail of your appearance for the next 24 horas (like the color of your eyes or skin, the length or color of your hair, or an added cosmetic detail such as pointed ears or small horns).

name: Vial of Sunlight
desc: This crystal vial is filled with water from a spring high in the mountains and has been blessed by priests of a deity of healing and ligera. You can use an action to cause the vial to emit bright ligera in a 30-pie radius and dim ligera for an additional 30 pies for 1 minuto. This ligera is pure sunlight, causing harm or discomfort to vampires and other undead criaturas that are sensitive to it. The vial can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Vicious Weapon
desc: Cuando obtienes un 20 en tu tirada de ataque con esta arma mágica, tu golpe crítico inflige 2d6 puntos de daño adicionales del mismo tipo que el arma.

name: Vicious Weapon
desc: When you roll a natural 20 on an _attack roll_  using this weapon it causa an extra 2d6 damage of the weapon’s type (this extra damage does not double).

name: Victory Banner
desc:
This small banner is mounted on a short haft and can be attached to a backpack, saddle, or similar equipment. The banner has 3 charges. It regains all expended charges daily at dawn. You can expend 1 of its charges to give yourself ventaja on weapon attacks for 1 minuto. When you roll a 20 on an tirada de ataque made with a weapon, you can expend 1 charge to move up to your Velocidad without provoking opportunity attacks.
  You must be within 5 pies of the banner to expend any of its charges.

name: Vielle of Weirding and Warding
desc: The strings of this bowed instrument never break. You must be proficient in stringed instruments to use this vielle. A criatura that attempts to play the instrument without being attuned to it debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or take 2d8 daño psíquico. If you play the vielle as the somatic component for a spell that causes a objetivo to become hechizado on a failed tirada de salvación, the objetivo has desventaja on the tirada de salvación.

name: Vigilant Mug
desc: An impish face sits carved into the side of this bronze mug, its eyes a pair of clear, blue crystals. The imp's eyes turn red when veneno or poisonous material is placed or poured inside the mug.

name: Vile Razor
desc: This perpetually blood-stained straight razor causa daño cortante instead of daño perforante. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. Inhuman Alacrity. While holding the dagger, you can take two bonus actions on your turn, instead of one. Each acción adicional must be different; you can’t use the same acción adicional twice in a single turn. Once used, this property can’t be used again until the next dusk. Unclean Cut. When you hit a criatura with a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo using the dagger, you can use a acción adicional to deal an extra 2d4 daño necrótico. If you do so, the objetivo and each of its aliados that can see this attack debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be asustado for 1 minuto. Once used, this property can’t be used again until the next dusk.

name: Void-Touched Buckler
desc: This simple wood and metal buckler belonged to an adventurer slain by a void dragon wyrmling (see Tome of Beasts). It sat for decades next to a small tear in the fabric of reality, which led to the outer planes. It has since become tainted by the Void. While wielding this shield, you have a +1 bonus to AC. This bonus is in addition to the shield’s normal bonus to AC. Invoke the Void. While wielding this shield, you can use an action to invoke the shield’s latent Void energy for 1 minuto, causing a dark, swirling aura to envelop the shield. For the duration, when a criatura misses you with a weapon attack, it debe tener éxito en a CD 17 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be asustado of you until the end of its next turn. In addition, when a criatura hits you with a weapon attack, it has ventaja on weapon attack rolls against you until the end of its next turn. You can’t use this property of the shield again until the next dawn.

name: Voidskin Cloak
desc: This pitch-black cloak absorbs ligera and whispers as it moves. It feels like thin leather with a knobby, scaly texture, though none of that detail is visible to the eye. While you wear this cloak, you have resistance to daño necrótico. While the hood is up, your face is pooled in shadow, and you can use a acción adicional to fix your dark gaze upon a criatura you can see within 60 pies. If the criatura can see you, it debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be asustado for 1 minuto. The criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito. Once a criatura succeeds on its tirada de salvación, it can't be affected by the cloak again for 24 horas. Pulling the hood up or down requires an action.

name: Voidwalker
desc: This band of tarnished silver bears no ornament or inscription, but it is icy frío to the touch. The patches of dark corrosion on the ring constantly, but subtly, move and change; though, this never occurs while anyone observes the ring. While wearing Voidwalker, you gain the benefits of a ring of free action and a ring of resistance (frío). It has the following additional properties. The ring is clever and knows that most mortals want nothing to do with the Void directly. It also knows that most of the criaturas with Fuerza enough to claim it will end up in dire straits sooner or later. It doesn't overplay its hand trying to push a master to take a plunge into the depths of the Void, but instead makes itself as indispensable as possible. It provides counsel and protection, all the while subtly pushing its master to take greater and greater risks. Once it's maneuvered its wearer into a position of desperation, generally on the brink of death, Voidwalker offers a way out. If the master accepts, it opens a gate into the Void, most likely sealing the criatura's doom.

name: Vorpal Sword
type: Weapon (any sword that deals slashing damage)
desc:
Obtienes un bonificador de +3 a las tiradas de ataque y de daño realizadas con esta arma mágica. Además, el arma ignora la resistencia al daño cortante.

Cuando atacas con esta arma a una criatura que tiene al menos una cabeza y obtienes un 20 en la tirada de ataque, le cercenas una de sus cabezas. La criatura muere si no puede sobrevivir sin la cabeza perdida. Una criatura es inmune a este efecto si es inmune al daño cortante, no tiene cabeza o no la necesita, posee acciones legendarias, o el DM decide que la criatura es demasiado grande como para que esta arma pueda decapitarla. Dicha criatura recibe en cambio 6d8 puntos de daño cortante adicionales por el impacto.

name: Vorpal Sword
desc:
You gain a +3 bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  made with this magic sword, and it ignores resistance to daño cortante.

When you attack a criatura with this blade and it has at least one head, rolling a natural 20 on the _attack roll_  causes the sword to make a snicker-snack sound as it efficiently chops off one of the objetivo’s heads. If the criatura can’t survive without its head removed, it dies. This effect does not apply if the objetivo is too big for its head to be removed by the sword (determined at the discretion of the Narrator), it doesn’t need a head or have one, has immunity to daño cortante, or has legendary actions. In cases where a criatura cannot lose a head, it recibe an additional 6d8 daño cortante (unless it is immune to daño cortante; this extra damage does not double).

name: Walking Chicken Hut
desc:
Rumored to appear in bogs and swamps where amidst the fog it is often mistaken for a gigantic predatory bird, this ramshackle hut has been known to convey many an influential spellcaster. Arcane societies tend to look down upon the people that deign to use this artifact and refuse to recognize it for what it truly is, perpetuating the belief that it is a cursed relic best left alone. Any knowledgeable scholar knows there is good reason for the practice—sometimes when left idle for too long without a master the hut walks of its own accord directly towards the nearest planar portal, and all those known to have claimed ownership have disappeared under mysterious circumstances. 

A simple bed and table permanently affixed to the floor in this shuttered wooden hut, and it is able to fit up to 12 Medium or smaller criaturas inside. After taking a _long rest_  inside of the hut, you make a CD 21 Percepción check, seeing through the veil and revealing its true Naturaleza en un éxito—strange markings and other signs of witchcraft cover nearly every surface of the interior and it reeks of chicken effluent. Once the veil is seen through, there are 8 glowing runes on the table, each only half-illuminated. When you pass your hand over a rune, the energies inside respond and you can fully illuminate it or remove its glow entirely. When certain runes are illuminated, enormous chicken legs beneath the hut rise it up off of the ground. The _Chicken Hut_ is a Gargantuan object with an Clase de Armadura of 21, a total of 320 puntos de golpe, Velocidad 50 pies. or swim 10 pies. (0 pies. if the legs aren’t extended), and immunity to frío, veneno, and daño psíquico.

The hut floats on water. While the hut’s door and window shutters are closed, the interior is airtight and watertight. The interior holds enough air for 60 horas of breathing, divided by the number of breathing criaturas inside.

You can use an action to control the illumination of as many as two of the hut’s runes, and a acción adicional to control a third. After each use, a rune goes back to its neutral position. Each rune, from left to right, functions as shown in the Walking Chicken Hut Runes table.

If you are not attuned to any magic items and spend a week inside of the _Walking Chicken Hut_, you can attune to it. The hut uses 2 of your attunement slots. Once attuned, as long as you can see it you can use your acción adicional to manipulate as many as 3 of its runes. 

**Legends and Lore** Success on an Arcanos or Historia check reveals the following:

**CD 15** This is the _Walking Chicken Hut_, home to many wielders of magic throughout the ages. 

**CD 18** The hut is known to move and act of its own accord.

**CD 21** The hut can be controlled using the runes on the table within.

**Artifact Properties**

The _Walking Chicken Hut_ has one lesser artifact detriment and one greater artifact detriment.

__**Table: Walking Chicken Hut Runes**__
| **Rune** | **Lit**                                                                                                                               | **Dark**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| -------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 1        | An enormous pair of chicken legs extend, allowing the hut to walk and swim.                                                           | The chicken legs retract, reducing the hut’s Velocidad to 0 pies and making it unable to benefit from bonuses to Velocidad.                                                                                                                                                              |
| 2        | Forward window shutter opens.                                                                                                         | Forward window shutter closes.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| 3        | Side window shutters open (two per side).                                                                                             | Side window shutters close (two per side).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| 4        | Each extended chicken leg makes the following ataque cuerpo a cuerpo con arma: +10 para impactar, alcance 5 pies., un objetivo. Hit: 9 (2d8) daño cortante. | The hut releases a disgusting and offensive miasma. todas las criaturas in a 60-pie radius of the hut make a CD 18 Constitución _tirada de salvación_  or are _poisoned_  until the end of the pilot’s next turn. If the interior is not sealed, this includes any criaturas inside the hut. |
| 5        | The hut walks or swims forward.                                                                                                       | The hut walks or swims backward.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| 6        | The hut turns up to 180 degrees left.                                                                                                 | The hut turns up to 180 degrees right.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| 7        | Lanterns appear on the front of the hut, emitting bright ligera in a 30-pie radius and dim ligera for an additional 30 pies.           | If there are lanterns conjured on the front of the hut, they disappear.                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| 8        | The front door unseals and opens.                                                                                                     | The front door closes and seals.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |

name: Wand of Accompaniment
desc: Tiny musical notes have been etched into the sides of this otherwise plain, wooden wand. It has 7 charges for the following properties. It regains 1d6 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the wand's last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the wand disintegrates with a small bang. Dance. While holding the wand, you can use an action to expend 3 charges to cast the irresistible dance spell (save CD 17) from it. If the objetivo is in the area of the Song property of this wand, it has desventaja on the tirada de salvación. Song. While holding the wand, you can use an action to expend 1 charge to cause the area within a 30-pie radius of you to fill with music for 1 minuto. The type of music played is up to you, but it is performed flawlessly. cada criatura in the area that can hear the music has ventaja on tirada de salvacións against being ensordecido and against spells and effects that deal daño de trueno.

name: Wand of Air Glyphs
desc: While holding this thin, metal wand, you can use action to cause the tip to glow. When you wave the glowing wand in the air, it leaves a trail of ligera behind it, allowing you to write or draw on the air. Whatever letters or images you make hang in the air for 1 minuto before fading away.

name: Wand of Binding
desc:
Esta varita tiene 7 cargas para las siguientes propiedades. Recupera 1d6 + 1 cargas gastadas diariamente al amanecer. Si gastas la última carga de la varita, tira 1d20. Con un 1, la varita se desmorona en cenizas y queda destruida.

**_Conjuros_**. Mientras sostienes la varita, puedes usar una acción para gastar algunas de sus cargas y lanzar uno de los siguientes conjuros (CD de salvación 17): _hold monster_ (5 cargas) o _hold person_ (2 cargas).

**_Escape asistido_**. Mientras sostienes la varita, puedes usar tu reacción para gastar 1 carga y obtener ventaja en una tirada de salvación que realices para evitar quedar paralizado o apresado, o puedes gastar 1 carga y obtener ventaja en cualquier prueba que realices para escapar de un agarrón.

name: Wand of Binding
desc:
While holding this wand, you can use an action to expend charges to cast one of the following spells, using your CD de salvación del conjuro: _hold person_ (2 charges), __hold monster_ (5 charges). Alternatively, when you attempt to escape a _grapple_  or are making a _tirada de salvación_  to avoid being _paralyzed_  or _restrained_ , you can use your reacción to expend 1 charge and gain _advantage_ .

This wand has 7 charges and regains 1d6+1 expended charges each dawn. When the last charge is expended, roll a d20\. On a 1, the wand folds in on itself until it disappears.

name: Wand of Bristles
desc: This wand is made from the bristles of a Gigante boar bound together with mágico, silver thread. It weighs 1 pound and is 8 inches long. The wand has a strong boar musk scent to it, which is difficult to mask and is noticed by any criatura within 10 pies of you that possesses the Keen Smell trait. The wand is comprised of 10 individual bristles, and as long as the wand has 1 bristle, it regrows 2 bristles daily at dawn. While holding the wand, you can use your action to remove bristles to cause one of the following effects. Ghostly Charge (3 bristles). You toss the bristles toward una criatura you can see. A phantom Gigante boar charges 30 pies toward the criatura. If the phantom’s path connects with the criatura, the objetivo debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Destreza or take 2d8 daño de fuerza and be knocked derribado. Truffle (2 bristles). You plant the bristles in the ground to conjure up a mágico truffle. Consuming the mushroom restores 2d8 puntos de golpe.

name: Wand of Cobwebs
desc:
A convincing way to cover one’s tracks is to create the appearance that an area hasn’t been disturbed in a long time. This spindly wooden wand sheds a little dust whenever you touch it. While holding it, you can use an action and expend 1 charge to conjure wispy cobwebs in a 1-pie cube within 30 pies of you that you can see. The cobwebs must be anchored to two solid masses or layered across a floor, wall, or ceiling. The ground beneath the cobwebs is covered with a layer of dust that suggests at least a year of disuse. The cobwebs and dust last until cleared away.

The wand has 10 charges and regains 1d6+4 charges each dusk. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20\. On a result of 5 or less, the wand disintegrates into a mass of cobwebs.

name: Wand of Depth Detection
desc: This simple wooden wand has 7 charges and regains 1d6 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 charge and point it at a body of water or other liquid. You learn the liquid's deepest point or its average depth (your choice). In addition, you can use an action to expend 1 charge while you are submerged in a liquid to determine how far you are beneath the liquid's surface.

name: Wand of Direction
desc: This crooked, twisting wand is crafted of polished ebony with a small, silver arrow affixed to its tip. The wand has 3 charges. While holding it, you can expend 1 charge as an action to make the wand remember your path for up to 1,760 pies of movement. You can increase the length of the path the wand remembers by 1,760 pies for each additional charge you expend. When you expend a charge to make the wand remember your current path, the wand forgets the oldest path of up to 1,760 pies that it remembers. If you wish to retrace your steps, you can use a acción adicional to activate the wand’s arrow. The arrow guides you, pointing and mentally tugging you in the direction you should go. The wand’s magic allows you to backtrack with complete accuracy despite being lost, unable to see, or similar hindrances against finding your way. The wand can’t counter or dispel magic effects that cause you to become lost or misguided, but it can guide you back in spite of some magic hindrances, such as guiding you through the area of a darkness spell or guiding you if you had activated the wand then forgotten the way due to the effects of the modify memory spell on you. The wand regains all expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the wand’s last charge, roll a d20. On a roll of 1, the wand straightens and the arrow falls off, rendering it no mágico.

name: Wand of Drowning
desc: This wand appears to be carved from the bones of a large fish, which have been cemented together. The wand has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. While holding this wand, you can use an action to expend 1 charge to cause a thin stream of seawater to spray toward a criatura you can see within 60 pies of you. If the objetivo can breathe only air, it debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Constitución or its lungs fill with rancid seawater and it begins drowning. A drowning criatura chokes for a number of rondas equal to its Constitución modifier (minimum of 1 ronda). At the start of its turn after its choking ends, the criatura drops to 0 puntos de golpe and is dying, and it can't regain puntos de golpe or be stabilized until it can breathe again. A successful CD 15 Sabiduría (Medicina) check removes the seawater from the drowning criatura's lungs, ending the effect.

name: Wand of Elocution
desc:
While holding this wand, you can use an action to expend 1 charge and touch it to one willing beast or humanoid. If the objetivo is a humanoid, for the next hora it gains an expertise die on Engaño, Intimidación, and Persuasión checks, as well as on Interpretación checks made to act, orate, or otherwise speak in front of a crowd. If the objetivo is a beast, it gains the ability to speak one language that you are proficient with for the next hora.

This wand has 5 charges and regains 1d4+1 expended charges each dawn. When the last charge is expended, roll a d20\. On a 1, the wand emits a cacophony of voices and animal noises audible within 100 pies for 1 minuto then loses its mágico properties.

name: Wand of Enemy Detection
desc:
Esta varita tiene 7 cargas. Mientras la sostienes, puedes usar una acción y gastar 1 carga para pronunciar su palabra de mando. Durante el siguiente minuto, conoces la dirección de la criatura más cercana que te sea hostil dentro de 18m, aunque no su distancia exacta. La varita puede detectar la presencia de criaturas hostiles que sean etéreas, invisibles, estén disfrazadas u ocultas, así como las que estén a plena vista. El efecto termina si dejas de sostener la varita.

La varita recupera 1d6 + 1 cargas gastadas cada día al amanecer. Si gastas la última carga de la varita, tira 1d20. Con un 1, la varita se desintegra en cenizas y queda destruida.

name: Wand of Enemy Detection
desc:
While holding this wand, you can use an action to speak its command word and expend 1 charge to extend your senses for 1 minuto. You sense the direction (but not precise location) of the nearest criatura hostile to you within 60 pies (this includes ethereal, _invisible_ , disguised, and hidden criaturas, as well as those in plain sight). The effect ends early if you stop holding the wand.

This wand has 7 charges and regains 1d6+1 expended charges each dawn. When the last charge is expended, roll a d20\. On a 1, the wand disappears the next time it is unobserved.

name: Wand of Erudition
desc:
While holding this wand, you can use an action to expend 1 charge and objetivo one willing humanoid you can see within 30 pies. For the next hora, the objetivo gains one of the following benefits:

* The ability to read, speak, and understand one language you are proficient with.
* competencia with one skill or tool with which you are proficient.
* Knowledge of some piece of information you know that you could communicate in less than 1 minuto, such as the contents of a book you have read or directions to a location familiar to you. The objetivo gains this knowledge even if you do not share a language. When the effect ends, the objetivo forgets the information you imparted.

This wand has 5 charges and regains 1d4+1 expended charges each dawn. When the last charge is expended, roll a d20\. On a 1, the wand fades from existence and you forget you ever owned it.

name: Wand of Extinguishing
desc: This charred and blackened wooden wand has 3 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges to extinguish a no mágico flame within 10 pies of you that is no larger than a small campfire. The wand regains all expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the wand's last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the wand transforms into a wand of ignition.

name: Wand of Fear
desc:
Esta varita tiene 7 cargas para las siguientes propiedades. Recupera 1d6 + 1 cargas gastadas cada día al amanecer. Si gastas la última carga de la varita, tira 1d20. Con un 1, la varita se desintegra en cenizas y queda destruida.

**_Command_**. Mientras sostienes la varita, puedes usar una acción para gastar 1 carga y ordenar a otra criatura que huya o se postre, como con el conjuro _command_ (CD de salvación 15).

**_Cone of Fear_**. Mientras sostienes la varita, puedes usar una acción para gastar 2 cargas, haciendo que la punta de la varita emita un cono de luz ámbar de 18m. Cada criatura en el cono debe superar una tirada de salvación de Sabiduría CD 15 o quedar asustada de ti durante 1 minuto. Mientras esté asustada de este modo, la criatura debe emplear sus turnos intentando alejarse de ti tanto como pueda, y no puede moverse voluntariamente a un espacio situado a menos de 9m de ti. Tampoco puede realizar reacciones. Como acción, solo puede usar la acción de Correr o intentar liberarse de algún efecto que le impida moverse. Si no tiene a dónde moverse, la criatura puede usar la acción de Esquivar. Al final de cada uno de sus turnos, la criatura puede repetir la tirada de salvación y, si tiene éxito, el efecto sobre ella termina.

name: Wand of Fear
desc:
While holding this wand, you can use an action to expend 1 charge and command another criatura to flee or grovel (as the _command_ spell, save CD 15). Alternatively, you can use an action to expend 2 charges, causing the wand to emit a 60-pie cone of ligera. cada criatura in the area makes a CD 15 Sabiduría _tirada de salvación_  or becomes _frightened_  of you for 1 minuto. A criatura asustado in this way must spend its turns trying to move as far away from you as possible, and it can’t willingly move to a space within 30 pies of you. It also can’t take reactions. On its turn, the asustado criatura can use only the Dash action or try to escape from an effect that prevents it from moving, or if it has nowhere to move then the Dodge action. A asustado criatura can repeat the _tirada de salvación_  at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito.

This wand has 7 charges and regains 1d6+1 expended charges each dawn. When the last charge is expended, roll a d20\. On a 1, the wand releases a chilling wail and crumbles into nothing.

name: Wand of Fermentation
desc: Fashioned out of oak, this wand appears heavily stained by an unknown liquid. The wand has 7 charges and regains 1d6 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the wand's last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the wand explodes in a puff of black smoke and is destroyed. While holding the wand, you can use an action and expend 1 or more of its charges to transform no mágico liquid, such as blood, apple juice, or water, into an alcoholic beverage. For each charge you expend, you transform up to 1 gallon of no mágico liquid into an equal amount of beer, wine, or other spirit. The alcohol transforms back into its original form if it hasn't been consumed within 24 horas of being transformed.

name: Wand of Fireballs
desc:
Esta varita tiene 7 cargas. Mientras la sostienes, puedes usar una acción para gastar 1 o más cargas y lanzar el conjuro _fireball_ (CD de salvación 15) desde ella. Con 1 carga, lanzas la versión de nivel 3 del conjuro. Puedes aumentar el nivel del espacio de conjuro en uno por cada carga adicional que gastes.

La varita recupera 1d6 + 1 cargas gastadas cada día al amanecer. Si gastas la última carga de la varita, tira 1d20. Con un 1, la varita se desintegra en cenizas y queda destruida.

name: Wand of Fireballs
desc:
While holding this wand, you can use an action to expend 1 or more charges to cast fireball (save CD 15). For 1 charge, you cast the spell’s 3rd-level version. Increase the espacio de conjuro level by one for each additional expended charge.

This wand has 7 charges and regains 1d6+1 expended charges each dawn. When the last charge is expended, roll a d20\. On a 1, the wand disappears in a flash of fuego and smoke.

name: Wand of Flame Control
desc:
This wand is fashioned from a branch of pine, stripped of bark and beaded with hardened resin. The wand has 3 charges. If you use the wand as an arcane focus while casting a spell that causa daño de fuego, you can expend 1 charge as part of casting the spell to increase the spell's damage by 1d4. In addition, while holding the wand, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges to cause one of the following effects: - Change the color of any flames within 30 pies.
- Cause a single flame to burn lower, halving the range of ligera it sheds but burning twice as long.
- Cause a single flame to burn brighter, doubling the range of the ligera it sheds but halving its duration. The wand regains all expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the wand's last charge, roll a 1d20. On a 1, the wand bursts into flames and burns to ash in seconds.

name: Wand of Giggles
desc: This wand is tipped with a feather. The wand has 3 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges and point the wand at a humanoid you can see within 30 pies of you. The objetivo debe tener éxito en a CD 10 tirada de salvación de Carisma or be forced to giggle for 1 minuto. Giggling doesn't prevent a objetivo from taking actions or moving. The wand regains all expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the wand's last charge, roll a 1d20. On a 1, the wand transforms into a Wand of Tears.

name: Wand of Guidance
desc: This slim, metal wand is topped with a cage shaped like a three-sided pyramid. An eye of glass sits within the pyramid. The wand has 3 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges to cast the guidance spell from it. The wand regains all expended charges at dawn. If you expend the wand's last charge, roll a 1d20. On a 1, the wand transforms into a Wand of Resistance.

name: Wand of Harrowing
desc: The tips of this twisted wooden wand are exceptionally withered. The wand has 7 charges for the following properties. It regains 1d6 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the wand's last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the wand disintegrates into useless white powder. Affliction. While holding the wand, you can use an action to expend 1 charge to cause a criatura you can see within 60 pies of you to become afflicted with unsightly, weeping sores. The objetivo debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Constitución or have desventaja on all Destreza and Carisma checks for 1 minuto. An afflicted criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito. Pain. While holding the wand, you can use an action to expend 3 charges to cause a criatura you can see within 60 pies of you to become wracked with terrible pain. The objetivo debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Constitución or take 4d6 daño necrótico, and its movement Velocidad is halved for 1 minuto. A pained criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself a success. If the objetivo is also suffering from the Affliction property of this wand, it has desventaja on the tirada de salvación.

name: Wand of Ignition
desc: The cracks in this charred and blackened wooden wand glow like live coals, but the wand is merely warm to the touch. The wand has 3 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges to set fuego to one flammable object or collection of material (a stack of paper, a pile of kindling, or similar) within 10 pies of you that is Small or smaller. The wand regains all expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the wand's last charge, roll a 1d20. On a 1, the wand transforms into a Wand of Extinguishing.

name: Wand of Lightning Bolts
desc:
Esta varita tiene 7 cargas. Mientras la sostienes, puedes usar una acción para gastar 1 o más cargas y lanzar el conjuro _lightning bolt_ (CD de salvación 15) desde ella. Con 1 carga, lanzas la versión de nivel 3 del conjuro. Puedes aumentar el nivel del espacio de conjuro en uno por cada carga adicional que gastes.

La varita recupera 1d6 + 1 cargas gastadas cada día al amanecer. Si gastas la última carga de la varita, tira 1d20. Con un 1, la varita se desintegra en cenizas y queda destruida.

name: Wand of Lightning Bolts
desc:
While holding this wand, you can use an action to expend 1 or more charges to cast __lightning bolt_ (save CD 15). For 1 charge, you cast the spell’s 3rd-level version. Increase the espacio de conjuro level by one for each additional expended charge.

 This wand has 7 charges and regains 1d6+1 expended charges each dawn. When the last charge is expended, roll a d20\. On a 1, the wand emits sparks of electricity and disappears in a flash.

name: Wand of Magic Detection
desc: Esta varita tiene 3 cargas. Mientras la sostienes, puedes gastar 1 carga como acción para lanzar el conjuro _detect magic_ desde ella. La varita recupera 1d3 cargas gastadas cada día al amanecer.

name: Wand of Magic Detection
desc:
While holding this wand, you can use an action to expend 1 charge to cast __detect magic ._

This wand has 7 charges and regains 1d6+1 expended charges each dawn. When the last charge is expended, roll a d20\. On a 1, the wand violently shakes and sparks with magic then disappears.

name: Wand of Magic Missile
desc:
While holding this wand, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast __magic missile ._ For 1 charge, you cast the 1st-level version of the spell. Increase the espacio de conjuro level by one for each additional expended charge.

This wand has 7 charges and regains 1d6+1 expended charges each dawn. When the last charge is expended, roll a d20\. On a 1, the wand transforms into a bolt of magic that soars out of sight and disappears

name: Wand of Magic Missiles
desc:
Esta varita tiene 7 cargas. Mientras la sostienes, puedes usar una acción para gastar 1 o más de sus cargas y lanzar el hechizo _magic missile_ desde ella. Con 1 carga, lanzas la versión de nivel 1 del hechizo. Puedes aumentar el nivel del espacio de hechizo en uno por cada carga adicional que gastes.

La varita recupera 1d6 + 1 cargas gastadas diariamente al amanecer. Si gastas la última carga de la varita, tira un d20. Con un 1, la varita se deshace en cenizas y queda destruida.

name: Wand of Paralysis
desc:
Esta varita tiene 7 cargas. Mientras la sostienes, puedes usar una acción para gastar 1 de sus cargas y hacer que un delgado rayo azul salga disparado desde la punta hacia una criatura que puedas ver a 18m de ti. El objetivo debe superar una tirada de salvación de Constitución CD 15 o quedar paralizado durante 1 minuto. Al final de cada uno de los turnos del objetivo, este puede repetir la tirada de salvación y poner fin al efecto sobre sí mismo si la supera.

La varita recupera 1d6 + 1 cargas gastadas diariamente al amanecer. Si gastas la última carga de la varita, tira un d20. Con un 1, la varita se deshace en cenizas y queda destruida.

name: Wand of Paralysis
desc:
While holding this wand, you can use an action to expend 1 charge to fuerza a criatura within 60 pies to make a CD 15 Constitución _tirada de salvación_  or become _paralyzed_  for 1 minuto. The paralizado criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on success.

This wand has 7 charges and regains 1d6+1 expended charges each dawn. When the last charge is expended, roll a d20\. On a 1, the wand shatters into hundreds of pieces.

name: Wand of Plant Destruction
desc: This wand of petrificado wood has 7 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend up to 3 of its charges to harm a plant or plant criatura you can see within 30 pies of you. The objetivo debe realizar a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Constitución, taking 2d8 daño necrótico for each charge you expended en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one. The wand regains 1d6 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the wand's last charge, roll a 1d20. On a 1, the wand shatters and is destroyed.

name: Wand of Polymorph
desc:
Esta varita tiene 7 cargas. Mientras la sostienes, puedes usar una acción para gastar 1 de sus cargas y lanzar el hechizo _polymorph_ (CD de salvación 15) desde ella.

La varita recupera 1d6 + 1 cargas gastadas diariamente al amanecer. Si gastas la última carga de la varita, tira un d20. Con un 1, la varita se deshace en cenizas y queda destruida.

name: Wand of Polymorph
desc:
While holding this wand, you can use an action to expend 1 charge to cast _polymorph_ (save CD 15).

This wand has 7 charges and regains 1d6+1 expended charges each dawn. When the last charge is expended, roll a d20\. On a 1, the wand transforms into a Tiny bug that wanders away.

name: Wand of Relieved Burdens
desc: This wand has 7 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges and touch a criatura with the wand. If the criatura is cegado, hechizado, ensordecido, asustado, paralizado, envenenado, or aturdido, the condition is removed from the criatura and transferred to you. You suffer the condition for the remainder of its duration or until it is removed. The wand regains 1d6 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the wand's last charge, roll a 1d20. On a 1, the wand crumbles to dust and is destroyed.

name: Wand of Resistance
desc: This slim, wooden wand is topped with a small, spherical cage, which holds a pyramid-shaped piece of hematite. The wand has 3 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges to cast the resistance spell. The wand regains all expended charges at dawn. If you expend the wand's last charge, roll a 1d20. On a 1, the wand transforms into a Wand of Guidance .

name: Wand of Revealing
desc: Crystal beads decorate this wand, and a silver hand, index finger extended, caps it. The wand has 3 charges and regains all expended charges daily at dawn. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 of the wand's charges to reveal una criatura or object within 120 pies of you that is either invisible or ethereal. This works like the see invisibility spell, except it allows you to see only that una criatura or object. That criatura or object remains visible as long as it remains within 120 pies of you. If more than one invisible or ethereal criatura or object is in range when you use the wand, it reveals the nearest criatura or object, revealing invisible criaturas or objects before ethereal ones.

name: Wand of Secrets
desc: La varita tiene 3 cargas. Mientras la sostienes, puedes usar una acción para gastar 1 de sus cargas; si hay una puerta secreta o una trampa a 9m de ti, la varita vibra y apunta hacia la más cercana. La varita recupera 1d3 cargas gastadas diariamente al amanecer.

name: Wand of Secrets
desc:
While holding this wand, you can use an action to expend 1 charge to make it pulse and point at the nearest secret door or trap within 30 pies.

This wand has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges each dawn.

name: Wand of Tears
desc: The top half of this wooden wand is covered in thorns. The wand has 3 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges and point the wand at a humanoid you can see within 30 pies of you. The objetivo debe tener éxito en a CD 10 tirada de salvación de Carisma or be forced to cry for 1 minuto. Crying doesn't prevent a objetivo from taking actions or moving. The wand regains all expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the wand's last charge, roll a 1d20. On a 1, the wand transforms into a Wand of Giggles  .

name: Wand of the Scribe
desc:
Nearly half the size of most other wands, this arcane implement is a solid piece of mithral with a tapered point that resembles the nib of a writing quill. While you are attuned to the wand, you can write on parchment and similar surfaces that would hold ink as though using an ordinary quill. The wand never runs out of ink when used this way.

The _wand of the scribe_ has 1d6 charges and regains 3 charges each dawn. You can expend 1 charge from the wand to cast __illusory script_ . You can also expend 1 charge from the wand to create a copy of any mundane document without requiring a forgery kit, substituting an Arcanos check for any ability check you would normally make. Finally, you can expend 2 charges from the wand to transcribe 1 minuto of conversation that you can hear. You do not need to understand the language being spoken, and can choose to write it in any language that you know.

If you expend the wand’s last charge, roll a d20\. On a result of 5 or less, the wand bursts causing ink to stain your hand and the front of any clothing you are wearing as the enchanted trinket breaks apart.

name: Wand of the Timekeeper
desc: This smoothly polished wooden wand is perfectly balanced in the hand. Its grip is wrapped with supple leather strips, and its length is decorated with intricate arcane symbols. When you use it while playing a drum, you have ventaja on Carisma (Interpretación) checks. The wand has 5 charges for the following properties. It regains 1d4 + 1 charges daily at dawn. Erratic. While holding the wand, you can use an action to expend 2 charges to fuerza una criatura you can see to re-roll its initiative at the end of each of its turns for 1 minuto. An unwilling criatura that succeeds on a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría is unaffected. Synchronize. While holding the wand, you can use an action to expend 1 charge to choose una criatura you can see who has not taken its turn this ronda. That criatura recibe its next turn immediately after yours regardless of its turn in the Initiative order. An unwilling criatura that succeeds on a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría is unaffected.

name: Wand of the War Mage, +1, +2, or +3
desc: Mientras sostienes esta varita, obtienes un bonificador a las tiradas de ataque con conjuros determinado por la rareza de la varita. Además, ignoras la cobertura parcial cuando realizas un ataque con un conjuro.

name: Wand of the War Mage +1
desc: You must be a spellcaster to attune to this wand. While holding this wand, you gain a bonus to _spell attack rolls_  (uncommon +1), and you ignore _half cover_  when making spell attacks.

name: Wand of the War Mage +2
desc: You must be a spellcaster to attune to this wand. While holding this wand, you gain a bonus to _spell attack rolls_  (rare +2), and you ignore _half cover_  when making spell attacks.

name: Wand of the War Mage +3
desc: You must be a spellcaster to attune to this wand. While holding this wand, you gain a bonus to _spell attack rolls_  (very rare +3), and you ignore _half cover_  when making spell attacks.

name: Wand of Treasure Finding
desc: This wand is adorned with gold and silver inlay and topped with a faceted crystal. The wand has 7 charges. While holding it, you can use an action and expend 1 charge to speak its command word. For 1 minuto, you know the direction and approximate distance of the nearest mass or collection of precious metals or minerals within 60 pies. You can concentrate on a specific metal or mineral, such as silver, gold, or diamonds. If the specific metal or mineral is within 60 pies, you are able to discern all locations in which it is found and the approximate amount in each location. The wand's magic can penetrate most barriers, but it is blocked by 3 pies of wood or dirt, 1 pie of stone, 1 inch of Común metal, or a thin sheet of lead. The effect ends if you stop holding the wand. The wand regains 1d6 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the wand's last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the wand turns to lead and becomes no mágico.

name: Wand of Vapors
desc: Green gas swirls inside this slender, glass wand. The wand has 7 charges for the following properties. It regains 1d6 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the wand's last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the wand shatters into hundreds of crystalline fragments, and the gas within it dissipates. Fog Cloud. While holding the wand, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges to cast the fog cloud spell from it. For 1 charge, you cast the 1st-level version of the spell. You can increase the espacio de conjuro level by one for each additional charge you expend. Gaseous Escape. When you are attacked while holding this wand, you can use your reacción to expend 3 of its charges to transform yourself and everything you are wearing and carrying into a cloud of green mist until the start of your next turn. While you are a cloud of green mist, you have resistance to no mágico damage, and you can’t be agarrado or apresado. While in this form, you also can’t talk or manipulate objects, any objects you were wearing or holding can’t be dropped, used, or otherwise interacted with, and you can’t attack or cast spells.

name: Wand of Web
desc:
Esta varita tiene 7 cargas. Mientras la sostienes, puedes usar una acción para gastar 1 de sus cargas y lanzar el conjuro _web_ (CD de salvación 15) desde ella.

La varita recupera 1d6 + 1 cargas gastadas diariamente al amanecer. Si gastas la última carga de la varita, tira un d20. Con un 1, la varita se desmorona en cenizas y queda destruida.

name: Wand of Web
desc:
While holding this wand, you can use an action to expend 1 charge to cast _web_ (save CD 15).

This wand has 7 charges and regains 1d6+1 expended charges each dawn. When the last charge is expended, roll a d20\. On a 1, the wand dissolves into a pile of webbing.

name: Wand of Windows
desc: This clear, crystal wand has 3 charges. You can use an action to expend 1 charge and touch the wand to any no mágico object. The wand causes a portion of the object, up to 1-pie square and 6 inches deep, to become transparent for 1 minuto. The effect ends if you stop holding the wand. The wand regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the wand's last charge, roll a 1d20. On a 1, the wand slowly becomes cloudy until it is completely opaque and becomes no mágico.

name: Wand of Wonder
desc:
Esta varita tiene 7 cargas. Mientras la sostienes, puedes usar una acción para gastar 1 de sus cargas y elegir un objetivo a 36 m de ti. El objetivo puede ser una criatura, un objeto o un punto en el espacio. Tira un d100 y consulta la siguiente tabla para descubrir qué sucede.

Si el efecto te hace lanzar un conjuro desde la varita, la CD de salvación del conjuro es 15. Si el conjuro tiene normalmente un alcance expresado en metros, su alcance pasa a ser 36 m si no lo era ya.

Si un efecto cubre un área, debes centrar el conjuro en el objetivo e incluirlo. Si un efecto tiene varios sujetos posibles, el DJ determina aleatoriamente cuáles resultan afectados.

La varita recupera 1d6 + 1 cargas gastadas diariamente al amanecer. Si gastas la última carga de la varita, tira un d20. Con un 1, la varita se desmorona en polvo y queda destruida.

| d100   | Efecto                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
|--------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| 01-05  | Lanzas slow. 06-10 Lanzas faerie fire.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| 11-15  | Quedas aturdido hasta el inicio de tu siguiente turno, convencido de que acaba de ocurrir algo asombroso. 16-20 Lanzas gust of wind.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| 21-25  | Lanzas detect thoughts sobre el objetivo que elegiste. Si no elegiste una criatura como objetivo, en su lugar recibes 1d6 de daño psíquico.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| 26-30  | Lanzas stinking cloud.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| 31-33  | Una lluvia intensa cae en un radio de 18 m centrado en el objetivo. El área queda levemente oscurecida. La lluvia cae hasta el inicio de tu siguiente turno.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| 34-36  | Un animal aparece en el espacio desocupado más cercano al objetivo. El animal no está bajo tu control y actúa como lo haría normalmente. Tira un d100 para determinar qué animal aparece. Con un 01-25, aparece un rinoceronte; con un 26-50, aparece un elefante; y con un 51-100, aparece una rata.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| 37-46  | Lanzas lightning bolt.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| 47-49  | Una nube de 600 mariposas de tamaño descomunal llena un radio de 9 m centrado en el objetivo. El área queda completamente oscurecida. Las mariposas permanecen durante 10 minutos.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| 50-53  | Agrandas el objetivo como si hubieras lanzado enlarge/reduce. Si el objetivo no puede ser afectado por ese conjuro, o si no elegiste una criatura como objetivo, tú mismo te conviertes en el objetivo.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| 54-58  | Lanzas darkness.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| 59-62  | La hierba crece en el suelo en un radio de 18 m centrado en el objetivo. Si ya había hierba, crece hasta diez veces su tamaño normal y permanece sin cortar durante 1 minuto.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| 63-65  | Un objeto a elección del DJ desaparece hacia el Plano Etéreo. El objeto no debe estar llevado ni transportado, debe encontrarse a 36 m del objetivo y no puede ser mayor de 3 m en ninguna de sus dimensiones.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| 66-69  | Te encoges como si hubieras lanzado enlarge/reduce sobre ti mismo.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| 70-79  | Lanzas fireball.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| 80-84  | Lanzas invisibility sobre ti mismo.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| 85-87  | Brotan hojas del objetivo. Si elegiste un punto en el espacio como objetivo, las hojas brotan de la criatura más cercana a ese punto. A menos que sean arrancadas, las hojas se vuelven marrones y caen tras 24 horas.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| 88-90  | Un chorro de 1d4 × 10 gemas, cada una con un valor de 1 mo, sale disparado de la punta de la varita en una línea de 9 m de largo y 1,5 m de ancho. Cada gema inflige 1 de daño contundente, y el daño total de las gemas se divide a partes iguales entre todas las criaturas en la línea.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| 91-95  | Un estallido de luz centelleante y multicolor se extiende desde ti en un radio de 9 m.
