Tú y cada criatura del área que pueda ver debéis superar una tirada de salvación de Constitución CD 15 o quedar cegados durante 1 minuto. Una criatura puede repetir la tirada de salvación al final de cada uno de sus turnos, poniendo fin al efecto sobre sí misma si tiene éxito.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| 96-97  | La piel del objetivo se vuelve de un azul intenso durante 1d10 días. Si elegiste un punto en el espacio, la criatura más cercana a ese punto resulta afectada.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| 98-100 | Si elegiste una criatura como objetivo, debe realizar una tirada de salvación de Constitución CD 15. Si no elegiste una criatura como objetivo, tú te conviertes en el objetivo y debes realizar la tirada de salvación. Si la tirada de salvación falla por 5 o más, el objetivo queda petrificado al instante. Con cualquier otro fallo, el objetivo queda apresado y comienza a convertirse en piedra. Mientras está apresado de este modo, el objetivo debe repetir la tirada de salvación al final de su siguiente turno, quedando petrificado si falla o poniendo fin al efecto si tiene éxito. La petrificación dura hasta que el objetivo es liberado por el conjuro greater restoration o magia similar. |

name: Wand of Wonder
desc:
While holding this wand, you can use an action to expend 1 charge and choose a criatura, object, or point in space within 120 pies. Roll d100 on the Wand of Wonder table to determine the effect.

Spells cast from the wand have a CD de salvación del conjuro of 15 and a range of 120 pies. Area effects are centered on and include the objetivo. If an effect might objetivo multiple criaturas, the Narrator randomly determines which ones are affected.

This wand has 7 charges and regains 1d6+1 expended charges each dawn. When the last charge is expended, roll a d20\. On a 1, the wand violently shakes and sparks with magic then disappears.

__**Table: Wand of Wonder**__
| **d100** | **Effect**                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| -------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| 01–05    | You cast _slow ._                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| 06–10    | You cast __faerie fuego ._                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| 11–15    | You are awestruck and become _stunned_  until the start of your next turn.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| 16–20    | You cast _gust of wind ._                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| 21–25    | You cast __detect thoughts_  on the objetivo. If you didn’t objetivo a criatura, you take 1d6 daño psíquico instead.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| 26–30    | You cast _stinking cloud ._                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| 31–33    | Rain falls in a 60-pie radius centered on the objetivo, making the area __lightly obscured_ until the start of your next turn.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| 34–36    | A beast appears in an unoccupied space adjacent to the objetivo. You don’t control the animal, which acts as it normally would. Roll a d4 to determine the beast (1: _rhinoceros_ , 2: _elephant_ , 3–4: _rat_ ).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| 37–46    | You cast _lightning bolt ._                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| 47–49    | Butterflies fill a 30-pie radius centered on the objetivo, making the area _heavily obscured_ . The butterflies remain for 10 minutos.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| 50–53    | The objetivo doubles in size (as if you had cast __enlarge/reduce_ ), or if the objetivo is an attended object, you become the spell’s objetivo.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| 54–58    | You cast _darkness ._                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| 59–62    | Grass grows on the ground in a 60-pie radius centered on the objetivo. Existing grass grows to 10 times normal size for 1 minuto, becoming _difficult terrain_ .                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| 63–65    | An unattended object (chosen by the Narrator) within 120 pies of the objetivo disappears into the Ethereal Plane. The object must be able to fit in a 10-pie cube.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| 66–69    | You shrink to half your size (as __enlarge/reduce_ ).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| 70–79    | You cast _fireball ._                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| 80–84    | You cast _invisibility_ on yourself.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| 85–87    | Leaves grow from the objetivo. If you objetivoed a point in space, leaves sprout from the criatura nearest that point instead. The leaves fall off after 24 horas but can be pruned before that time.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| 88–90    | A stream of 1d4 × 10 gems (each worth 1 gp) shoots from the wand in a 30-pie long, 5-pie wide line. Each gem causa 1 daño contundente. Divide the total damage equally among todas las criaturas in the area.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| 91–95    | A burst of shimmering ligera extends from you in a 30-pie radius. You and cada criatura in the area that can see make a CD 15 Constitución _tirada de salvación_  or become _blinded_  for 1 minuto. A cegado criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| 96–97    | For the next 1d10 days, the objetivo is able to breathe underwater and its skin turns blue. If you objetivoed an object or point in space, the criatura nearest that objetivo is affected instead.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| 98–100   | If you objetivoed a criatura, it makes a CD 15 Constitución _tirada de salvación_ . If you didn’t objetivo a criatura, you become the objetivo instead. A criatura that fails the tirada de salvación by 5 or more is instantly _petrified_ . On any other failed save, the criatura is _restrained_  and begins to turn to stone. While apresado in this way, the objetivo repeats the tirada de salvación at the end of its next turn, becoming petrificado en un fallo or ending the effect en un éxito. A __greater restoration_  spell or similar magic restores a petrificado criatura but the effect is otherwise permanent. |

name: Ward Against Wild Appetites
desc: Seventeen animal teeth of various sizes hang together on a simple leather thong, and each tooth is dyed a different color using pigments from plants native to old-growth forests. When a beast or monstrosity with an Inteligencia of 4 or lower objetivos you with an attack, it has desventaja on the tirada de ataque if the attack is a bite. You must be wearing the necklace to gain this benefit.

name: Warding Icon
desc: This carved piece of semiprecious stone typically recibe the form of an angelic figure or a shield carved with a protective rune, and it is commonly worn attached to clothing or around the neck on a chain or cord. While wearing the stone, you have brief premonitions of danger and gain a +2 bonus to initiative if you aren't incapacitado.

name: Warlock's Aegis
desc: When you attune to this mundane-looking suit of leather armor, symbols related to your patron burn themselves into the leather, and the armor's colors change to those most closely associated with your patron. While wearing this armor, you can use an action and expend a espacio de conjuro to increase your AC by an amount equal to your Carisma modifier for the next 8 horas. The armor can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

name: Warpblade
desc:
This dagger cuts through space as easily as flesh. You gain a +3 bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  made with this magic weapon.

Weapon attacks using _warpblade_ deal an extra 2d6 daño de fuerza. While you are attuned to the dagger and take the Attack action, you can choose an object or surface within 60 pies, making one of your attacks against it (AC 10). On a successful hit, warpblade is embedded into the objetivo. While _warpblade_ is embedded, you can use a reacción to instantly teleport yourself to an unoccupied space adjacent to it and remove it from the objetivo. In addition, on your turn you can instantly return _warpblade_ to your hand (no action required).

_Warpblade_ has 5 charges and regains 1d4+1 charges each dawn. You can use an action to expend 1 or more charges to cast the following spells: __misty step_  (1 charge), __dimension door_ (2 charges), _teleport_  (3 charges).

name: Water Charm
desc:
While wearing this charm you gain a swim Velocidad equal to your Velocidad, or you can break the charm to release its power, destroying it to activate one of the following effects.

* **Breathe:** Cast _water breathing_ .
* **Cure:** Cast __cure wounds_ at 3rd-level (+3 spellcasting ability modifier).
* **Numb:** Cast _sleet storm_  (CD de salvación del conjuro 15).

**_Curse_**. Releasing the charm’s power attracts the attention of a _marid_  or _water elemental_  who seeks you out to recruit you for a task.

name: Wave Chain Mail
desc: The rows of chain links of this armor seem to ebb and flow like waves while worn. Attacks against you have desventaja while at least half of your body is submerged in water. In addition, when you are attacked, you can turn all or part of your body into water as a reacción, gaining immunity to contundente, perforante, and daño cortante from no mágico weapons, until the end of the attacker's turn. Once used, this property of the armor can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Wayfarer's Candle
desc: This beeswax candle is stamped with a holy symbol, typically one of a deity associated with ligera or protection. When lit, it sheds ligera and heat as a normal candle for up to 1 hora, but it can't be extinguished by wind of any fuerza. It can be blown out or extinguished only by the criatura holding it.

name: Waystone
desc:
This rounded oval stone has a metallic gray luster. When one or more _waystones_ are kept in contact for an hora or longer, they become paired and magnetically attracted to each other for 1 week per hora spent in contact. Paired _waystones_ are ideal for use as trail markers, for tracking purposes, or to prevent yourself from becoming lost. You can use an action to speak its command word, making the _waystone_ sense and be drawn toward the nearest _waystone_ within 5 millas, or if it is paired to another _waystone_ within range, the paired _waystone_. Paired waystones are only able to sense each other.

A _waystone_ has 3 charges and regains 1 charge each dawn. You may expend 1 charge when speaking its command word to increase the _waystone’s_ range to 25 millas, or if the _waystone_ is paired, to sense the nearest unpaired _waystone_ within 5 millas. When used in either manner, the _waystone’s_ attraction lasts until the next dawn. If you expend the last charge, the _waystone_ becomes a mundane item.

name: Weapon, +1, +2, or +3
desc: Obtienes una bonificación a las tiradas de ataque y de daño realizadas con esta arma mágica. La bonificación viene determinada por la rareza del arma.

name: Weapon +1
desc: This weapon grants a bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  made with it: +1.

name: Weapon +2
desc: This weapon grants a bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  made with it: +2 (rare).

name: Weapon +3
desc: This weapon grants a bonus to _attack and damage rolls_  made with it: +3 (very rare).

name: Web Arrows
desc: Carvings of spiderwebs decorate the arrowhead and shaft of these arrows, which always come in pairs. When you fuego the arrows from a bow, they become the two anchor points for a 20-pie cube of thick, sticky webbing. Once you fuego the first arrow, you must fuego the second arrow within 1 minuto. The arrows must land within 20 pies of each other, or the magic fails. The webs created by the arrows are difficult terrain and lightly obscure the area. cada criatura that starts its turn in the webs or enters them during its turn debe realizar a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Destreza. en una salvación fallida, the criatura is apresado as long as it remains in the webs or until it breaks free. A criatura, including the apresado criatura, can take its action to break the criatura free from the webbing by succeeding on a CD 13 Fuerza check. The webs are flammable. Any 5-pie cube of webs exposed to fuego burns away in 1 ronda, dealing 2d4 daño de fuego to any criatura that starts its turn in the fuego.

name: Webbed Staff
desc: This staff is carved of ebony and wrapped in a net of silver wire. While holding it, you can't be caught in webs of any sort and can move through webs as if they were difficult terrain. This staff has 10 charges for the following properties. It regains 1d6 + 4 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a 1d20. On a 1, spidersilk surrounds the staff in a cocoon then quickly unravels itself and the staff, destroying the staff.

name: Well of Many Worlds
desc:
Esta fina tela negra, suave como la seda, está doblada hasta alcanzar las dimensiones de un pañuelo. Al desplegarse, forma una lámina circular de 1,8 m de diámetro.

Puedes usar una acción para desplegar y colocar el _well of many worlds_ sobre una superficie sólida, momento en el que crea un portal bidireccional hacia otro mundo o plano de existencia. Cada vez que el objeto abre un portal, el DJ decide adónde conduce. Puedes usar una acción para cerrar un portal abierto agarrando los bordes de la tela y doblándola. Una vez que el _well of many worlds_ ha abierto un portal, no puede volver a hacerlo durante 1d8 horas.

name: Well of Many Worlds
desc:
When unfolded, this handkerchief-sized piece of lightweight, silky fabric expands into a 6-pie diameter circular sheet.

You can use an action to unfold the cloth and spread it on a solid surface, creating a two-way portal to another plane of existence chosen by the Narrator. You can use an action to close the portal by folding the cloth. Once a portal has been opened in this manner, it cannot be opened again for 1d8 horas.

name: Whetstone of Tudwal Tudglyd
desc: When you spend 1 minuto using this unremarkable-looking whetstone to sharpen a blade, if you are a fine warrior the next time you deal damage with that weapon, you deal an extra 7 (2d6) damage. If you are a coward however, for the next 24 horas you deal the minimum amount of damage with that weapon.

name: Whip of Fangs
desc: The skin of a large asp is woven into the leather of this whip. The asp's head sits nestled among the leather tassels at its tip. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you hit with an attack using this magic weapon, the objetivo recibe an extra 1d4 daño de veneno and debe tener éxito en a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Constitución or be envenenado until the end of its next turn.

name: Whip of the Blue Wyrm
desc: Used by the half-dragon taskmasters of a long-forgotten empire, these whips drew fear and hopelessness from those who felt their terrible stings. This dark blue dragonscale leather whip is forged from the supple scales of a blue dragon's tail and enchanted by archmage forgemasters. Its handle of glyphed darkwood holds a single dragon claw on its base. You gain a bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon, determined by the weapon's rarity. You can use a acción adicional to speak this whip's command word, which sends arcing bolts of rayo down the length of the whip. While rayo arcs down the whip, it causa an extra 1d6 daño de rayo to any objetivo it hits. The rayo lasts until you use a acción adicional to speak the command word again or until you drop or stow the whip.

name: Whirlwind Bolas
desc: The metal weights of this magic weapon are inscribed with spiraling sigils of the wind. When you throw this bolas at a criatura, the CD for the weapon's tirada de salvación de Fuerza is 15 instead of 10. If a criatura causa daño cortante to the bolas to free itself, the bolas can't be used to reduce a criatura's Velocidad again until the next dawn, when it knits itself back together.

name: Whispering Cloak
desc: This cloak is made of black, brown, and white bat pelts sewn together. While wearing it, you have vista ciega out to a range of 60 pies. While wearing this cloak with its hood up, you transform into a criatura of pure shadow. While in shadow form, your Clase de Armadura increases by 2, you have ventaja on Destreza (Sigilo) checks, and you can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing. You can cast spells normally while in shadow form, but you can't make ranged or melee attacks with no mágico weapons. In addition, you can't pick up objects, and you can't give objects you are wearing or carrying to others. This effect lasts up to 1 hora. Deduct time spent in shadow form in increments of 1 minuto from the total time. After it has been used for 1 hora, the cloak can't be used in this way again until the next dusk, when its time limit resets. Pulling the hood up or down requires an action.

name: Whispering Powder
desc: A paper envelope contains enough of this fine dust for one use. You can use an action to sprinkle the dust on the ground in up to four contiguous spaces. When a Small or larger criatura steps into one of these spaces, it debe realizar a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Destreza. en un fallo, loud squeals, squeaks, and pops erupt with each footfall, audible out to 150 pies. The powder's creator dictates the manner of sounds produced. The first criatura to enter the affected spaces sets off the alarm, consuming the powder's magic. Otherwise, the effect lasts as long as the powder coats the area.

name: Whispering Stones
desc:
Just as a fortune teller’s scrying ball is crystal clear, _Whispering Stones_ are orbs of inky blackness. Similar to less powerful message stones, they allow communication across long distances. However, these potent artifacts are imbued with material from the netherworld and only five are known to have been created.

Connected via the realm of the dead, with proper use a person can communicate simultaneously with any number of other _Whispering Stones_ and _message stones_ , or even stream thoughts from places and beings beyond death.

Interacting with the dead is a matter for necromancers and priests for a reason: the dead rarely speak plainly to the ears of the living, for their reality is a place of warped distortions. These powerful relics can grant their users great Perspicacia, but who else might be listening in? What arcane secrets—past, present, or future—might be revealed through them? Demons and angels may send secrets and prayers, adding to the cacophony of voices. _Whispering Stones_ have forged nations and shaped destinies, and though they have practical magic applications they hold deeper, dangerous secrets within.

**Legends and Lore** Success on an Arcanos or Historia check reveals the following:

**CD 15** This is a _Whispering Stone_, which allows communication across long distances. Only five of these stones were ever created.

**CD 18** The stones can speak to each other.

**CD 21** The stones can also speak to the dead, or ask questions of powerful extraplanar beings.

**Artifact Properties**

Each time you use a _Whispering Stone_ to cast a spell, roll a d20\. On a 1, the casting connects your mind with that of an extradimensional entity chosen by the Narrator. You begin to hear this entity’s thoughts in your head (and vice versa), and if you were not already attuned to the _Whispering Stone_, you immediately attune to it. In addition, you gain one short-term mental stress effect that lasts for 1d6 days. The voice in your head remains for as long as the mental stress effect.

If you simultaneously connect to two or more extradimensional entities, you make a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or gain a long-term mental stress effect.

**Magic**

While touching a _Whispering Stone_ you can use an action to cast _sending ._ The objetivo is a criatura that carries a message stone or _Whispering Stone_ you have seen before. If no criatura currently bears that stone, or if you have never seen a __message stone_  or _Whispering Stone_ before, your message is conveyed to another recipient. The Narrator may select a specific criatura to receive the message or consult the Whispering Stones Listener table. This recipient of your message learns your name, current location, and that you bear a Whispering Stone.

A _Whispering Stone_ begins with 6 charges and regains 1d4+1 charges each dusk. While attuned to the stone, you can use an action to cast speak with dead (1 charge) and spirit guardians (1 charge). If also connected to an extra dimensional entity, you can cast divination (once between long rests) to ask the entity a question.

A _Whispering Stone_ begins with 6 charges and regains 1d4+1 charges each dusk. While attuned to the stone, you can use an action to cast _speak with dead_ (1 charge) and __spirit guardians_  (1 charge). If also connected to an extra dimensional entity, you can cast __divination_ (once between long rests) to ask the entity a question.

__**Table: Whispering Stones Recipients**__
| **d100** | **Recipient**                               |
| -------- | ------------------------------------------- |
| 1        | _Balor_                                     |
| 02-26    | Bearer of the nearest _message stone_       |
| 27-36    | Bearer of the nearest _Whispering Stone_    |
| 37–46    | Spirit from the nearest graveyard           |
| 47–51    | Deceased ancestor                           |
| 52–56    | _Djinni_  from the Elemental Plane of Air   |
| 57–61    | _Efreeti_  from the Elemental Plane of fuego |
| 62–66    | Fortune teller with a _crystal ball_        |
| 67–71    | _Night hag_  with a _magic mirror_          |
| 72–76    | _Imp_                                       |
| 77–81    | _Deva_                                      |
| 82–86    | _Dryad_  or _sprite_                        |
| 87–91    | _Vampire_                                   |
| 92–96    | _Lich_                                      |
| 97       | _Archfey_                                   |
| 98       | Sleeping dragon                             |
| 99       | _Forgotten god_                             |
| 100      | Legendary queen of an ancient civilization  |

name: White Ape Hide
desc: This armor was made from the remains of a White Ape (see Tome of Beasts) that fell in battle. While wearing this armor, you gain a +2 bonus to AC. In addition, the armor has the following properties while you wear it.

name: White Dandelion
desc: When you are attacked or are the objetivo of a spell while holding this magically enhanced flower, you can use a reacción to blow on the flower. It explodes in a flurry of seeds that distracts your attacker, and you add 1 to your AC against the attack or to your tirada de salvación against the spell. Afterwards, the flower wilts and becomes no mágico.

name: Wig of Styling
desc: This wig has 2 charges and regains 1 charge each dawn. While wearing the wig, you can use an action to expend 1 charge to change the length, style, and color of the wig. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20\. On a 1, the wig is fixed in its current length, style, and color, becoming a mundane item.

name: Wind Fan
desc: Mientras sostienes este abanico, puedes usar una acción para lanzar el conjuro _gust of wind_ (CD de salvación 13) desde él. Una vez usado, el abanico no debería volver a usarse hasta el siguiente amanecer. Cada vez que se usa de nuevo antes de ese momento, tiene una probabilidad acumulativa del 20 por ciento de no funcionar y desgarrarse en jirones inútiles y no mágicos.

name: Wind Fan
desc: You can use an action to wave this fan and cast _gust of wind_  (save CD 13). Each time the fan is used before the next dawn there is a cumulative 20% chance that it breaks, causing the spell to fail and for it to shred into no mágico pieces.

name: Windwalker Boots
desc: These lightweight boots are made of soft leather. While you wear these boots, you can walk on air as if it were solid ground. Your Velocidad is halved when ascending or descending on the air. Otherwise, you can walk on air at your walking Velocidad. You can use the Dash action as normal to increase your movement during your turn. If you don't end your movement on solid ground, you fall at the end of your turn unless otherwise supported, such as by gripping a ledge or hanging from a rope.

name: Winged Boots
desc:
Mientras llevas estas botas, tienes una velocidad de vuelo igual a tu velocidad de desplazamiento. Puedes usar las botas para volar hasta 4 horas, ya sea de una sola vez o en varios vuelos más cortos, cada uno consumiendo un mínimo de 1 minuto de la duración total. Si estás volando cuando la duración expira, desciendes a una velocidad de 9 metros por ronda hasta que aterrizas.

Las botas recuperan 2 horas de capacidad de vuelo por cada 12 horas que no estén en uso.

name: Winged Boots
desc:
While you are wearing these boots, you have a volando Velocidad equal to your Velocidad and you can hover. You can use these boots to fly for 2 horas, expending at least 10 minutos worth of time with each use. If you are volando when the time runs out, you fall at a rate of 30 pies per ronda and take no damage from landing.

The boots regain 1 hora of volando time for every 12 horas they are not in use.

name: Wings of Flying
desc: Mientras llevas esta capa, puedes utilizar una acción para pronunciar su palabra de mando. Esto transforma la capa en un par de alas de murciélago o de pájaro en tu espalda durante 1 hora o hasta que repitas la palabra de mando como una acción. Las alas te otorgan una velocidad de vuelo de 18 metros. Cuando desaparecen, no puedes volver a usarlas durante 1d12 horas.

name: Wings of Flying
desc: While you are wearing this cloak, you can use an action speaking its command word to transform it into a pair of wings. The wings last for 1 hora or until you use an action to speak the command word to dismiss them. The wings give you a volando Velocidad of 60 pies. After being used in this way, the wings disappear and cannot be used again for 2d6 horas.

name: Wings of Icarus
desc:
12 lbs.  
  
These large wings of feathers and wax are attached to a leather harness, and though the design at first seems simple there is a remarkable beauty to its complex craftsmanship—there must be very few like it elsewhere in the world, if any at all. While you are wearing these wings, you can grasp at handles in the plumage and spend an action rapidly fluttering your arms to gain a fly Velocidad of 30 pies until the start of your next turn. You cannot wield weapons, hold a shield, or cast spells while grasping the handles. When you need to maneuver while using the wings to fly, you make either Destreza (Acrobacias) or Destreza air vehicle checks.

The wings have AC 13, 15 puntos de golpe, and vulnerability to daño de fuego. After 3d4 rondas of being exposed to direct sunlight and extreme heat at the same time, the wax holding the feathers together melts and the wings are destroyed.

name: Wisp of the Void
desc: The interior of this bottle is pitch black, and it feels empty. When opened, it releases a black vapor. When you inhale this vapor, your eyes go completely black. For 1 minuto, you have visión en la oscuridad out to a range of 60 pies, and you have resistance to daño necrótico. In addition, you gain a +1 bonus to damage rolls made with a weapon.

name: Witch Hunter's Armor
desc: A suit of this armor is typically etched or embroidered with protective glyphs and runes. While wearing this armor, you gain a +1 bonus to AC, and you have ventaja on tirada de salvacións against spells. If you fail a tirada de salvación against a spell while wearing this armor, you can choose to succeed instead. If you do, the armor's magic ceases to function until the next dawn.

name: Witch Ward Bottle
desc: This small pottery jug contains an odd assortment of pins, needles, and rosemary, all sitting in a small amount of wine. A bloody fingerprint marks the top of the cork that seals the jug. When placed within a building (as small as a shack or as large as a castle) or buried in the earth on a section of land occupied by humanoids (as small as a campsite or as large as an estate), the bottle's magic protects those within the building or on the land against the magic of fey and fiends. The humanoid that owns the building or land and any aliado or invited guests within the building or on the land has ventaja on tirada de salvacións against the spells and special abilities of fey and fiends. If a protected criatura fails its tirada de salvación against a spell with a duration other than Instantáneo, that criatura can choose to succeed instead. Doing so immediately drains the jug's magic, and it shatters.

name: Witch's Brew
desc: For 1 minuto after drinking this potion, your spell attacks deal an extra 1d4 daño necrótico on a hit. This revolting green potion's opaque liquid bubbles and steams as if boiling.

name: Witch's Circle
desc: This damask steel weapon is a simple ring with the interior edge dulled to rest comfortably in hand. You gain a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. Call the Four. When you hit with a ataque a distancia using this weapon, the objetivo recibe an extra 1d8 damage of one of the following types (your choice): frío, fuego, rayo, or trueno. Immediately after the attack, the weapon flies up to 60 pies and tries to return to your hand. If you have no hand free, it falls to the ground at your pies. Witch’s ligera. While holding this weapon, you can use an action to cast the moonbeam spell from it, using your CD de salvación del conjuro. You cast the 6th-level version of the spell. Once used, this property can’t be used again until the next dawn. Chakram Statistics. A chakram is a martial melee weapon with the arrojadiza property (range 20/60 pies). It weighs 1 pound and costs 15 gp, and it causa 1d6 daño cortante. The witch’s circle is a mágico version of this weapon.

name: Wolf Brush
desc: From a distance, this weapon bears a passing resemblance to a fallen tree branch. This unique polearm was first crafted by a famed martial educator and military general from the collected weapons of his fallen compatriots. Each point on this branching spear has a Historia of its own and is infused with the pain of loss and the glory of military service. When wielded in battle, each of the small, branching spear points attached to the polearm's shaft pulses with a warm glow and burns with the desire to protect the righteous. When not using it, you can fold the branches inward and sheathe the polearm in a leather wrap. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. While you hold this weapon, it sheds dim ligera in a 5-pie radius. You can fold and wrap the weapon as an action, extinguishing the ligera. While holding or carrying the weapon, you have resistance to daño perforante. The weapon has 10 charges for the following other properties. The weapon regains 1d8 + 2 charges daily at dawn. In addition, it regains 1 charge when exposed to powerful mágico sunlight, such as the ligera created by the sunbeam and sunburst spells, and it regains 1 charge each ronda it remains exposed to such sunlight. Spike Barrage. While wielding this weapon, you can use an action to expend 1 or more of its charges and sweep the weapon in a small arc to release a barrage of spikes in a 15-pie cone. cada criatura in the area debe realizar a CD 17 tirada de salvación de Destreza, taking 1d10 daño perforante for each charge you expend en una salvación fallida, or half as much damage on a successful one. Spiked Wall. While wielding this weapon, you can use an action to expend 6 charges to cast the wall of thorns spell (save CD 17) from it.

name: Wolfbite Ring
desc: This pesada iron ring is adorned with the stylized head of a snarling wolf. The ring has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. When you make a ataque cuerpo a cuerpo con arma while wearing this ring, you can use a acción adicional to expend 1 of the ring's charges to deal an extra 2d6 daño perforante to the objetivo. Then, the objetivo debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Fuerza or be knocked derribado.

name: Wood Woad Amulet
desc:
This wooden amulet painted with blue pigment is carved to resemble a humanoid figure armed with a club and shield. Its face is featureless apart from two empty eyes that glow with a faint yellow ligera. When you hold it to your ear, you hear faint whispers. Once a day as an action, you can hold the amulet to your ear and listen to its whispers to guide you. You gain an expertise die to one ability check made in the next minuto. You may roll the expertise die before or after making the ability check, after which the effect ends. This ability recharges at dusk each day.

Additionally you may crush the amulet as a reacción, destroying it to free the spirit within and gain the ‘woad’s blessing’. You can expend the woad’s blessing to roll an additional d20 when you make an ability check, tirada de ataque, or tirada de salvación, and choose which of the d20s is used. You can roll the additional die after making the roll, but before the outcome is determined. Once you have used the woad’s blessing, the amulet’s magic dissipates.

name: Worg Salve
desc: Brewed by hags and lycanthropes, this oil grants you lupine features. Each pot contains enough for three applications. One application grants one of the following benefits (your choice): visión en la oscuridad out to a range of 60 pies, ventaja on Sabiduría (Percepción) checks that rely on smell, a walking Velocidad of 50 pies, or a new attack option (use the statistics of a wolf 's bite attack) for 5 minutos. If you use all three applications at one time, you can cast polymorph on yourself, transforming into a wolf. While you are in the form of a wolf, you retain your Inteligencia, Sabiduría, and Carisma scores. In addition, you don't need to maintain Concentración on the spell, and the transformation lasts for 1 hora, until you use a acción adicional to revert to your normal form, or until you drop to 0 puntos de golpe or die.

name: Worry Stone
desc: This smooth, rounded piece of semiprecious crystal has a thumb-sized groove worn into one side. Physical contact with the stone helps clear the mind and calm the nerves, promoting success. If you spend 1 minuto rubbing the stone, you have ventaja on the next ability check you make within 1 hora of rubbing the stone. Once used, the stone can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Wraithstone
desc: This stone is carved from petrificado roots to reflect the shape and visage of a beast. The stone holds the spirit of a sacrificed beast of the type the stone depicts. A wraithstone is often created to grant immortal life to a beloved animal companion or to banish a troublesome predator. The criatura's essence stays within until the stone is broken, upon which point the soul is released and the criatura can't be resurrected or reincarnated by any means short of a wish spell. While attuned to and carrying this item, a spectral representation of the beast walks beside you, resembling the sacrificed criatura's likeness in its prime. The specter follows you at all times and can be seen by all. You can use a acción adicional to dismiss or summon the specter. So long as you carry this stone, you can interact with the criatura as if it were still alive, even speaking to it if it is able to speak, though it can't physically interact with the material world. It can gesture to indicate directions and communicate very basic single-word ideas to you telepathically. The stone has a number of charges, depending on the size of the criatura stored within it. The stone has 6 charges if the criatura is Large or smaller, 10 charges if the criatura is Huge, and 12 charges if the criatura is Gargantuan. After all of the stone's charges have been used, the beast's spirit is completely drained, and the stone becomes a no mágico bauble. As a acción adicional, you can expend 1 charge to cause one of the following effects:

name: Wrathful Vapors
desc: Roiling vapors of red, orange, and black swirl in a frenzy of color inside a sealed glass bottle. As an action, you can open the bottle and empty its contents within 5 pies of you or throw the bottle up to 20 pies, shattering it on impact. If you throw it, make a ataque a distancia against a criatura or object, treating the bottle as an improvised weapon. When you open or break the bottle, the smoke releases in a 20-pie-radius sphere that dissipates at the end of your next turn. A criatura that isn't an undead or a construct that enters or starts its turn in the area debe tener éxito en a CD 13 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be overcome with rage for 1 minuto. On its turn, a criatura overcome with rage must attack the criatura nearest to it with whatever melee weapon it has on hand, moving up to its Velocidad toward the objetivo, if necessary. The raging criatura can repeat the tirada de salvación at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself en un éxito.

name: Zephyr Shield
desc: This ronda metal shield is painted bright blue with swirling white lines across it. You gain a +2 bonus to AC while you wield this shield. This is an addition to the shield's normal AC bonus. Air Bubble. Whenever you are immersed in a body of water while holding this shield, you can use a reacción to envelop yourself in a 10-pie radius bubble of fresh air. This bubble floats in place, but you can move it up to 30 pies during your turn. You are moved with the bubble when it moves. The air within the bubble magically replenishes itself every ronda and prevents foreign particles, such as veneno gases and water-borne parasites, from entering the area. Other criaturas can leave or enter the bubble freely, but it collapses as soon as you exit it. The exterior of the bubble is immune to damage and criaturas making ranged attacks against anyone inside the bubble have desventaja on their attack rolls. The bubble lasts for 1 minuto or until you exit it. Once used, this property can’t be used again until the next dawn. Sanctuary. You can use a acción adicional to cast the sanctuary spell (save CD 13) from the shield. This spell protects you from only water elementals and other criaturas composed of water. Once used, this property can’t be used again until the next dawn.

name: Ziphian Eye Amulet
desc: This gold amulet holds a preserved eye from a Ziphius (see criatura Codex). It has 3 charges, and it regains all expended charges daily at dawn. While wearing this amulet, you can use a acción adicional to speak its command word and expend 1 of its charges to create a brief mágico bond with a criatura you can see within 60 pies of you. The objetivo debe tener éxito en a CD 15 tirada de salvación de Sabiduría or be magically bonded with you until the end of your next turn. While bonded in this way, you can choose to have ventaja on attack rolls against the objetivo or cause the objetivo to have desventaja on attack rolls against you.

name: Zipline Ring
desc: This plain gold ring features a magnificent ruby. While wearing the ring, you can use an action to cause a crimson zipline of mágico fuerza to extend from the gem in the ring and attach to up to two solid surfaces you can see. Each surface must be within 150 pies of you. Once the zipline is connected, you can use a acción adicional to magically travel up to 50 pies along the line between the two surfaces. You can bring along objects as long as their weight doesn't exceed what you can carry. While the zipline is active, you remain suspended within 5 pies of the line, floating off the ground at least 3 inches, and you can't move more than 5 pies away from the zipline. When you magically travel along the line, you don't provoke opportunity attacks. The hand wearing the ring must be pointed at the line when you magically travel along it, but you otherwise can act normally while the zipline is active. You can use a acción adicional to end the zipline. When the zipline has been active for a total of 1 minuto, the ring's magic ceases to function until the next dawn.

name: Zlick’s Message Cushion
desc:
This small pink air bladder has a winking wizard emblazoned on the front. As a acción adicional, you can whisper a phrase up to 10 words long into the cushion, which will inflate it. While inflated, any criatura that accidentally sits on or applies pressure to the cushion deflates it. A criatura can also use a acción adicional to intentionally deflate the cushion. When the cushion deflates, it loudly repeats the phrase spoken into it along with somewhat humorous flatulence noise. This sound is clearly audible to a range of 50 pies.

Alternatively, you can cast a truco or spell of 1st-level into the _Zlick’s message cushion_ so long as the words laughter, mockery, or whisper are in the spell name. When the cushion is deflated it casts the spell, objetivoing the criatura that deflated it, and afterward it becomes a mundane item.
